nama: Yéné sem Yesu Kerisoene Ákifafene yétkwén. Yesu témorwén Defidene mérénmén. Deifid témorwén Ebraamene mérénmén.
english: The book of the genealogy of Jesus Christ , the son of David , the son of Abraham.

nama: Ebraam témorwén Aiseke yárefé, Aisek témorwén Jeikofe yárefé, Jeikof témorwén Judase yárefé a yánngnéf,
english: Abraham became the father of Isaac . Isaac became the father of Jacob . Jacob became the father of Judah and his brothers.

nama: Judas témorwén Feres a Jeraye yéferafé a yéfetmé témorwén Tamar, Feres témorwén Esrone yárefé, Esron témorwén Rame yárefé,
english: Judah became the father of Perez and Zerah by Tamar . Perez became the father of Hezron . Hezron became the father of Ram.

nama: Ram témorwén Aminadabe yárefé, Aminadab témorwén Nasone yárefé, Nason témorwén Salmone yárefé,
english: Ram became the father of Amminadab. Amminadab became the father of Nahshon . Nahshon became the father of Salmon .

nama: Salmon témorwén Boase yárefé, yátmé témorwén Raaf, Boas témorwén Obede yárefé, yátmé témorwén Rut, Obed témorwén Jesie yárefé,
english: Salmon became the father of Boaz by Rahab . Boaz became the father of Obed by Ruth . Obed became the father of Jesse .

nama: Jesi warsagh ár Deifide yárefé. Deifid témorwén Solomone yárefé, yátmé efe témorwén Uriane amaf,
english: Jesse became the father of King David . David the king became the father of Solomon by her who had been Uriah ’s wife.

nama: Solomon témorwén Reyoboame yárefé, Reyoboam témorwén Abia yárefé, Abia témorwén Asa yárefé,
english: Solomon became the father of Rehoboam . Rehoboam became the father of Abijah. Abijah became the father of Asa.

nama: Asa témorwén Yeyosafate yárefé, Yeyosafat témorwén Yeyorame yárefé, Yeyoram témorwén Usiya yárefé,
english: Asa became the father of Jehoshaphat . Jehoshaphat became the father of Joram . Joram became the father of Uzziah .

nama: Usiya témorwén Yotame yárefé, Yotam témorwén Aase yárefé, Aas témorwén Esékia yárefé,
english: Uzziah became the father of Jotham . Jotham became the father of Ahaz. Ahaz became the father of Hezekiah .

nama: Esékia témorwén Ménase yárefé, Ménase témorwén Amone yárefé, Amon témorwén Yosia yárefé
english: Hezekiah became the father of Manasseh . Manasseh became the father of Amon. Amon became the father of Josiah .

nama: Yosia témorwén Yekonia yéferafé a yánngnéf. Yéné efghon njam Israil árfene mék téfnáram engwasroyénd Babilonét.
english: Josiah became the father of Jechoniah and his brothers at the time of the exile to Babylon.

nama: Soramé engwasroyénd Babilonét: Yekonia témorwén Sietiele yárefé, Sietiel témorwén Jerubabele yárefé,
english: After the exile to Babylon, Jechoniah became the father of Shealtiel . Shealtiel became the father of Zerubbabel .

nama: Jerubabel témorwén Abiute yárefé, Abiut témorwén Eliakime yárefé, Eliakim témorwén Asore yárefé,
english: Zerubbabel became the father of Abiud. Abiud became the father of Eliakim . Eliakim became the father of Azor.

nama: Asor témorwén Jadoke yárefé, Jadok témorwén Ákime yárefé Ákim témorwén Eliute yárefé,
english: Azor became the father of Zadok . Zadok became the father of Achim. Achim became the father of Eliud .

nama: Eliut témorwén Eliasare yárefé, Eliasar témorwén Matane yárefé, Matan témorwén Jeikofe yárefé,
english: Eliud became the father of Eleazar . Eleazar became the father of Matthan . Matthan became the father of Jacob .

nama: Jeikof témorwén Josefe yárefé, Merie yánjar, a emo Yesu yéráftam efe yémndetat Keriso.
english: Jacob became the father of Joseph , the husband of Mary , from whom was born Jesus , who is called Christ .

nama: Kété tamorwén 14 ár saté kétándmé Ebraam kétán Deifid, kétamé Deifid ámb 14 ár saté njam ewitromboyénd Israil ár kétán Babilonét, a ámb 14 ár saté kétamé engwasroyénd Babilonét kétán Kerisoene áráfégh. Yesu Kerisoene áráféghmén si
english: So all the generations from Abraham to David are fourteen generations ; from David to the exile to Babylon fourteen generations ; and from the carrying away to Babylon to the Christ , fourteen generations .

nama: Ndernáye Yesu Kerisoene áráfégh yamam yérsam. Yátmé Meri yéreindaménd Josefefaf awerghét. Yéné nufrotam fronde soramé nawereyayénd. Meri nawayamngoyéng ndené ambumafé yém Ngánján Mbérmbér kénjúmé. 19 Ménamén Josef yánjar mbarkánd ár témorwén, wénde fá yau ménde témorwén wáiwáiot sái tékmangai Meri maratan, yáfaf mwighayanro témorwén watembéghét métare.
english: Now the birth of Jesus Christ was like this : After his mother , Mary , was engaged to Joseph , before they came together , she was found pregnant by the Holy Spirit .
Joseph , her husband, being a righteous man , and not willing to make her a public example, intended to put her away secretly .

nama: Wénde soramé kemnawéng yénémamén, Yurane tambén njafar si résagh ár nufaryéng onjoe a yémndai, "Josef Deifidene ambum, yau férfér ném Merie awerghét amafot. Ménamén némé yáne kénjún nafuna Ngánján Mbérmbérta yém. 21 Amafom so yéráfte ambum, a fémon so yétkwén taram Yesu, ménamén yémon so tawanjarngé yánjo ár yéfenjo yaufita.
english: But when he thought about these things , behold , an angel of the Lord appeared to him in a dream , saying , “ Joseph , son of David , don’ t be afraid to take to yourself Mary as your wife , for that which is conceived in her is of the Holy Spirit .
She shall give birth to a son . You shall name him Jesus , for it is he who shall save his people from their sins.”

nama: Méinyotio yéné kufrotawét némat Yuré té korayau Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár kénjúmé, 23 "Yuwagia mérés efe árfé ekmarmén so yém suafé a so náráfte ambum, a yémofem so yétkwén yémndetat Immanwel" Yáne fifi siyém, "Ngánjánafé yénd yéném."
english: Now all this has happened that it might be fulfilled which was spoken by the Lord through the prophet , saying ,
“ Behold , the virgin shall be with child , and shall give birth to a son . They shall call his name Immanuel ,” which is , being interpreted , “ God with us .” + 1:23 Isaiah 7:14

nama: Njam Josef kéméghta nanoyéng, yémon yéné tawafrotau némat Yurane njafar si résagh árém yémndayéng fá a Meri yéngwasroi amafot. 25 Wénde yau ekmarmén kétánotio Meri náráftam ambum. Yémon yaramai yá yétkwén Yesu.
english: Joseph arose from his sleep , and did as the angel of the Lord commanded him , and took his wife to himself;
and didn’ t know her sexually until she had given birth to her firstborn son . He named him Jesus .

nama: Soramé Yesu náráftam Betliemén Judia kénjún, njam warsagh ár Erod témorwén, káfeté ár enmormén wer tambén Jerusalemét. 2 Njam fá nufaryénd kété, yémofem ár mogh ewafngoyénd, "Ánde yém ambum árké káráfte efe so yém Ju árfene warsagh ár? Yéndfem yáne kénd yinjongém werta, a nénwanongém yá wáwefnoghét.
english: Now when Jesus was born in Bethlehem of Judea in the days of King Herod , behold , wise men from the east came to Jerusalem , saying,
“ Where is he who is born King of the Jews ? For we saw his star in the east, and have come to worship him .”

nama: Njam warsagh ár Erod náyárai yéné, fá mámé mwighé témorwén a ndenéyameyo méinyotio Jerusalemmén ár. 4 Yémon eumendai méinyotio sénko ghéngén wárogh ár a nák watamegh ár, emotayéng, "Ánde so náráfte Keriso?" 5 Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Betliemén Judia kénjún, yéné yém némé Ngánjánene mat yátogh árém té yéfarotaménd:
english: When King Herod heard it , he was troubled , and all Jerusalem with him .
Gathering together all the chief priests and scribes of the people , he asked them where the Christ would be born .
They said to him , “ In Bethlehem of Judea , for this is written through the prophet ,

nama: "Wénde fém, Betliem, Judia mbandan, fém yau némbne tesen ném, ménamén fe tambén limánégh ár so yéném emon so ewambete tane ár Israil ndenanit sif wanjengégh ár."
english: ‘ You Bethlehem, land of Judah , are in no way least among the princes of Judah ; for out of you shall come a governor who shall shepherd my people , Israel .’” + 2:6 Micah 5:2

nama: Féyo Erodém emotayéng káfeté ár kwankwane matot árké efghon kénd té nufaryéng. 8 Yémon ewáfáretayéng Betliemét a emndai, "Kuwanongi a merkéráye yéronjati ambum ánde yém. Njam ténmwinjongi, mat kwiyátongi ménát yénd wéi so wéngém yá wáwefnoghét.
english: Then Herod secretly called the wise men , and learned from them exactly what time the star appeared .
He sent them to Bethlehem, and said , “ Go and search diligently for the young child . When you have found him , bring me word , so that I also may come and worship him .”

nama: Warsagh ároene áyárégh soramé, fá nuwanoyénd, yéné kénd yémofem árké yinjoyénd werta néwanoyéng yéfe frondeta kétánotio kor nékmboyéng yéné sifayan ánde ambum témorwén. 10 Njam yémofem yinjoyénd yéné kénd, fá káuwétawét minde. 11 Méngot nénaflayénd, yémofem yinjoyénd tosé yátmé Meriefaf a fá narámnjoyénd a yáwefnoyénd. Féyo yémofem yafta eutoryénd a yaramayénd ndimbal faimén ramégh rokar-gol, mer wimafé wékwér a mer wimafé murémuré. 12 Onjoe Ngánjánam mat eyátoyéng yau angoghét Erodefaf, wénde fá ngangotawét yéfenjo yuwot ámb endmé. Josef a yánjo mérén nuwanoyénd Ijifét
english: They , having heard the king , went their way ; and behold , the star, which they saw in the east, went before them until it came and stood over where the young child was .
When they saw the star, they rejoiced with exceedingly great joy .

They came into the house and saw the young child with Mary , his mother , and they fell down and worshiped him . Opening their treasures , they offered to him gifts : gold , frankincense , and myrrh .
Being warned in a dream not to return to Herod , they went back to their own country another way .

nama: Njam fá néngwanoyénd, Yurane njafar si résagh ár nufaryéng Josefefaf onjoe. Yémon témndangé, "Kano, ambum tané a yátmé kuwanongi Ijifét. Kété fiya emor kétánotio yéndon fém kénémndan, ménamén Erod so kénwanongé ambum ronjaghét yá ngiot."
english: Now when they had departed, behold , an angel of the Lord appeared to Joseph in a dream , saying , “ Arise and take the young child and his mother , and flee into Egypt, and stay there until I tell you , for Herod will seek the young child to destroy him .”

nama: Yénémamén fá nanoi, ambum yanai yátmafé sémbáran nuwanoyénd Ijifét, 15 kété emorangérmén kétánotio Erod kér yémorwén. Efalo si náyátoi némat Yuram korayau Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár kénjúmé, "Ijifta yéndon tane ambum yanmoyén."{a{ ...f* {a{2.15 Osiya 11:1
english: He arose and took the young child and his mother by night and departed into Egypt,
and was there until the death of Herod , that it might be fulfilled which was spoken by the Lord through the prophet , saying , “ Out of Egypt I called my son .”

nama: Njam Erod nawayamngoi ndené yá té yawindaménd káfeté árém, fá minde nékw nawerai, yénémamén yémon emndai fiyaré méinyotio ghakér ambum ngiot Betliem kénjún a ámb kaka méngotumén efe sómbio yunjéf tamorwén a nde yuwot. Yémo yéné yafrotam ménayan ndernáye káfeté ár tambén mat náyátoi árké efghon kénd ánde nufaryéng. 17 Féyo némé Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár Jeremaya norayaméng efalo náyátoi,
english: Then Herod , when he saw that he was mocked by the wise men , was exceedingly angry, and sent out and killed all the male children who were in Bethlehem and in all the surrounding countryside, from two years old and under , according to the exact time which he had learned from the wise men .
Then that which was spoken by Jeremiah the prophet was fulfilled , saying ,

nama: "Kém té náyárayénd Rama méngotuan, ye nende, Amaf árkéméné emormén Reseleta nendat yéfenjo ambummén; fá nakenat wamaroghét, ménamén yéfene ambum kér emormén." Josef a yánjo mérén nénangoyénd Najaretét
english: “ A voice was heard in Ramah , lamentation, weeping and great mourning , Rachel weeping for her children ; she wouldn’ t be comforted , because they are no more .” + 2:18 Jeremiah 31:15

nama: Soramé Erod kér yémormén, Yurane njafar si résagh ár nufaryéng onjoe Josefefaf Ijifén, 20 a témndangé, "Kano, ambum tanang a yátmé kuwanongi Israil yuwot, ménamén emo ambum ngiot térametat kér té tam."
english: But when Herod was dead , behold , an angel of the Lord appeared in a dream to Joseph in Egypt, saying,
“ Arise and take the young child and his mother , and go into the land of Israel , for those who sought the young child ’s life are dead .”

nama: Féyo fá nanoi, ambum yanai a yátmé nuwanoyénd Israil yuwot. 22 Wénde njam fá náyárai ndené Akelausém yétkwén yanayéng Judia kénjún yárefé warsagh ár Erodene sifayan, fá férféram téfindau kétán álighét. Onjoe yawatnam, yénémamén fá nosémnam Galili yuwot, 23 a fá néwanoi a témorangérwén tesen yétkwén Najaretén. Féyo efalo náyátoi némé Ngánjánene mat yátogh árém korayawét: "Fá so yémndetat Najaretmén ár."
english: He arose and took the young child and his mother , and came into the land of Israel .
But when he heard that Archelaus was reigning over Judea in the place of his father , Herod , he was afraid to go there . Being warned in a dream , he withdrew into the region of Galilee ,
and came and lived in a city called Nazareth ; that it might be fulfilled which was spoken through the prophets that he will be called a Nazarene .

nama: Yéné efghon Jon walitogh ár yénmormén, si táitotau Judia fanfne yuwon, 2 a korayau yéné si, "Féfenjo yaufita kawengongi, ménamén Njafar limánégh siyém kaka." 3 Fá fiyém endenemén korayau Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár Aisaya kénjúmé, "Ár nutne fanfne yuwon, 'Frengégh end Yurai; wafrogh mbarkánd end yáyot.'"
english: In those days , John the Baptizer came , preaching in the wilderness of Judea , saying,
“ Repent , for the Kingdom of Heaven is at hand !”
For this is he who was spoken of by Isaiah the prophet , saying , “ The voice of one crying in the wilderness , make the way of the Lord ready ! Make his paths straight !” + 3:3 Isaiah 40:3

nama: Jon tawongérwén kamel séf sáláme ménáyafé wérár ngar belesafé, a yémon tánetau ngumbwainy a fámghár. 5 Ár tangmorwén yáfaf Jerusalemta a méinyotio Judiata a méinyotio Joden yuta. 6 Yéfenjo yaufimén kawafenawét, yémon tawalitotau Joden wanjen.
english: Now John himself wore clothing made of camel ’ s hair with a leather belt around his waist . His food was locusts and wild honey .
Then people from Jerusalem , all of Judea , and all the region around the Jordan went out to him .
They were baptized by him in the Jordan , confessing their sins.

nama: Njam yémon ewinjoi tárfár Farasi ár a Saduki ár tanmorwén ménát Joném sái tawalitotau, yémon tamndetau fá, "Fém kamban ghérsafé! Yau nemnati fém so kawatembangi Yurane nékwta. 8 Tawafrotangi yéné yam ménát sái nufarotati ndené té féfenjo yaufita nawengongi. 9 Yau fém nemnati ndené fém so kenngongi kértata yéné sie, 'Ebraam siyém téfene áki.' Yéndon ewaufrotan féfe ndené Ngánjánam féyotaro so taunjangé ambumtértér yéné wímta Ebraameyot. 10 Mbilé siyém yékmang wén sérémban, féyo méinyotio wén árkéméné afoghofnar em so enfetat a ewitat fését.
english: But when he saw many of the Pharisees and Sadducees coming for his baptism, he said to them , “ You offspring of vipers , who warned you to flee from the wrath to come ?
Therefore produce fruit worthy of repentance !
Don’ t think to yourselves , ‘ We have Abraham for our father ,’ for I tell you that God is able to raise up children to Abraham from these stones .
Even now the ax lies at the root of the trees . Therefore every tree that doesn’ t produce good fruit is cut down , and cast into the fire .

nama: Yéndon ewalitotan nue ufaroghét ndené fém té nawengongi yaufita, wénde efe ta soramé yéném yáne muyé so kawaindangé. Yénd féyotarofnar wém yáne sandol résaghét. Yémon so ewalitote fém Ngánján Mbérmbére a fése. 12 Yáne witrémbogh fok siyém yáne ngángayan yém. Yémo yéné foke ewite féskaf flawé tukét ménát mbormboram so efnje mbwe faloghét kétamé ngarta a eumnda mbwe méngo kénjún laughét a ewakérna ngarngar umbértoghofnar fése. Joném yalitote Yesu
english: “ I indeed baptize you in water for repentance , but he who comes after me is mightier than I , whose sandals I am not worthy to carry. He will baptize you in the Holy Spirit .
His winnowing fork is in his hand , and he will thoroughly cleanse his threshing floor. He will gather his wheat into the barn, but the chaff he will burn up with unquenchable fire .”

nama: Féyo Yesu yénmormén Galili yuta Jonefaf Joden wanjen walitoghét. 14 Wénde Joném yéta fá yémndai, "Yénd kwalito fémon mbarkánd so yém. Fém némamén kéném tafaf?"
english: Then Jesus came from Galilee to the Jordan to John , to be baptized by him .
But John would have hindered him , saying , “ I need to be baptized by you , and you come to me ?”

nama: Yesum yawangoyéng, "So fété nufrote sénonjo. Yéné ende yéndfem ewafrowam méinyotio Ngánjánene ménde." Féyo Jon namyoi.
english: But Jesus , answering, said to him , “Allow it now , for this is the fitting way for us to fulfill all righteousness .” Then he allowed him .

nama: Njam Joném Yesu yalitoi, tekofnar nénwiwoi nuta, táf fété njafar nasawéryéng a yémon yinjoi Ngánján Mbérmbér kénewonau mamunit nafayoi yáne fifiyan. 17 A si yénmormén njafarta, "Yéné siyém tane ambum efe yéndon yuwetan, yénd mindefifi náuwétan yáfaf."
english: Jesus , when he was baptized, went up directly from the water : and behold , the heavens were opened to him . He saw the Spirit of God descending as a dove , and coming on him .
Behold , a voice out of the heavens said , “ This is my beloved Son , with whom I am well pleased .”

nama: Féyo Yesue Ngánján Mbémbéram yélimai fanfne yuwot ménát Sáifram sái tufotau. 2 Nawafarmai 40 efogh a 40 sémbár yéné soramé Yesu siogh témorwén. 3 Wufogh ár nénwanoi yáfaf a témndangé, "Fém Ngánjánene ambum njam ném, tamndé yéné wím so kawengongi flawat."
english: Then Jesus was led up by the Spirit into the wilderness to be tempted by the devil .
When he had fasted forty days and forty nights , he was hungry afterward .
The tempter came and said to him , “ If you are the Son of God , command that these stones become bread.”

nama: Yesum yawangoyéng, "Buk si noraye, "Ár yau so nakete flawayanro, wénde méinyotio si némé Ngánján noraye."
english: But he answered , “ It is written , ‘ Man shall not live by bread alone , but by every word that proceeds out of God ’s mouth .’”

nama: Féyo Sáifram wéi yasroi fá Jerusalem, njúnnjúnofnar tesenot, wáwefnogh méngo tukétfifi. 6 Fá yémndai, "Fém Ngánjánene ambum njam ném, fém kátna yuwot ndené Buk si noraye, "Yémon so tawáfáretangé yáne njafar si résagh ár feyot, yémofem so kémerangi fém yéfenjo ngángaye, ménát fene kafkaf yau so kasmangi wíman."
english: Then the devil took him into the holy city . He set him on the pinnacle of the temple ,

and said to him , “ If you are the Son of God , throw yourself down , for it is written , ‘ He will command his angels concerning you ,’ and , ‘ On their hands they will bear you up , so that you don’ t dash your foot against a stone .’” + 4:6 Psalms 91:11-12

nama: Yesum yawangoyéng, "Buk si wéi noraye, 'Yau yékmeta Yuré fenjo Ngánján wufoghan.'"
english: Jesus said to him , “ Again , it is written , ‘ You shall not test the Lord , your God .’”

nama: Wéikor, Sáifram yémnjoi mband tunakéf tukét a tauyafotawéng yáyot méinyotio mband marat a yáne minde mer. 9 Yémon yémndai, "Méinyotio yéné kés em yéndon so kémaraman fe, fém njam budme kéyé a kwáwefno tayot."
english: Again , the devil took him to an exceedingly high mountain , and showed him all the kingdoms of the world and their glory .
He said to him , “ I will give you all of these things , if you will fall down and worship me .”

nama: Yesum yémndai fá, "Kitrémb ta tambén, Sáifér! Ndené Buk si noraye, 'Táwefnongi Yurai féfenjo Ngánjáne a yáyotro násáfotati.'"
english: Then Jesus said to him , “ Get behind me , Satan ! For it is written , ‘ You shall worship the Lord your God , and you shall serve him only .’”

nama: Féyo Sáifram yéfrangoi fá, a njafar si résagh ár enmormén yá wáutárghét. Yesum yérnyai yánjo ásáfogh
english: Then the devil left him , and behold , angels came and served him .

nama: Yesum njam náyárai ndené Jon té yélawayénd kwéfkwéf méngon, fá nangoi Galili yuwot. 13 Yémo yéfrangoi Najaret, fá néwanoi yémorangérmén Káfenamén, árké témorwén arakaf téndon Jebulun a Naftali yuwon. 14 Yéné ufroghan témorwén némat Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár Aisaya norayai efalo náyátoi.
english: Now when Jesus heard that John was delivered up , he withdrew into Galilee .
Leaving Nazareth , he came and lived in Capernaum , which is by the sea , in the region of Zebulun and Naphtali ,
that it might be fulfilled which was spoken through Isaiah the prophet , saying ,

nama: "Jebulun yu a Naftali yu, end kétán arakafot, Joden téndomé, Galili yu, Téndo árfene yu.
english: “ The land of Zebulun and the land of Naphtali , toward the sea , beyond the Jordan , Galilee of the Gentiles ,

nama: Ár efe emorang kwéfkwéfan té yinjoyénd ndimbal kwayaghé, efe emorang kér mbanmbanan kwayaghé té nátremngo yéfefaf."
english: the people who sat in darkness saw a great light ; to those who sat in the region and shadow of death , to them light has dawned.” + 4:16 Isaiah 9:1-2

nama: Kétándmé Yesum yéngérnyayéng si waitogh, "Yaufita kawengongi ménamén njafar limánégh siyém kaka!" Yesum ewanmoi fronde waitogh ár
english: From that time , Jesus began to preach , and to say , “ Repent ! For the Kingdom of Heaven is at hand .”

nama: Njam Yesu tiyotawéng Galili arakaf téndomé, yémon ewinjeyai sómbio ár yánngnéfé, Saimon, efe wéi yémndetat Fité, a yánngén Endru. Yémofem tawamwét net sawan, ménamén fá tárwén wagif rényégh ár. 19 Yesum tamndé, "Kénaflend, kwemaitend yénd, a yéndon so ewatamewan fém ár rényéghét." 20 Táf fété yémofem eureyayénd yéfenjo net yáiteyayénd fá.
english: Walking by the sea of Galilee , he saw two brothers: Simon , who is called Peter , and Andrew, his brother, casting a net into the sea ; for they were fishermen.
He said to them , “ Come after me , and I will make you fishers for men.”
They immediately left their nets and followed him .

nama: Kétándmé néngaflayénd, yémon ewinjeyai sómbio ár yánngnéfé Jems Jefediene ambum a yánngén Jon. Fá tárwén boutan yáferafé Jefedifé, tawamyotawét yéfenjo net. Yesum ewanmeyai fá, 22 táf fété yémofem noreyayénd bout a yéferafé a yáiteyayénd Yesu. Yesum mer yiyátoi enjne téfnár
english: Going on from there , he saw two other brothers, James the son of Zebedee , and John his brother, in the boat with Zebedee their father , mending their nets . He called them .
They immediately left the boat and their father , and followed him .

nama: Yesu néngwanoyéng Galili yuwomé, tawatametau yéfenjo áumengégh méngon, táitotau mer si Njafar limánéghmén, a mer táyátotau méinyotio tékratafé a enjnefé ár. 24 Yesuenemén si marat náyátoi Siria yuwan, yénémamén árém tanérsawét yáfaf emofem tékrát téfandawét fénaté enjneta, efe tamorwén minde ndémkeyan, efe yaufi mbérmbéram tawasérmbotau, ghérareye enjne téfnár a aknyégh ár- a Yesum mer táyátotau méinyotio. 25 Ndimbal ár mérén tanmorwén kétándmé Galili, Dekafolis yu, Jerusalem, Judia a ámb yu Joden téndomén a yaitoyénd Yesu.
english: Jesus went about in all Galilee , teaching in their synagogues , preaching the Good News of the Kingdom, and healing every disease and every sickness among the people .

The report about him went out into all Syria . They brought to him all who were sick , afflicted with various diseases and torments, possessed with demons, epileptics , and paralytics ; and he healed them .
Great multitudes from Galilee , Decapolis , Jerusalem , Judea , and from beyond the Jordan followed him .

nama: Njam Yesum ewinjoi ár mérén, fá néngaflai mband tunakfot ánde fá námnjoi. Yáne waitogh árém yarendayénd fá, 2 yémon watamegh yérnyai yéfefaf: Efalo áuwégh
english: Seeing the multitudes , he went up onto the mountain . When he had sat down , his disciples came to him .
He opened his mouth and taught them , saying ,

nama: "Áuwéghafé fá em efe em mbérmbére yauyau, ménamén yéfeyot njafar limánégh yém!
english: “ Blessed are the poor in spirit , for theirs is the Kingdom of Heaven . + 5:3 Isaiah 57:15; 66:2

nama: Áuwéghafé fá em efe ye nendat, ménamén fá so wamaroghan em!
english: Blessed are those who mourn , for they shall be comforted . + 5:4 Isaiah 61:2; 66:10,13

nama: Áuwéghafé fá em efe yu mwighafé em, ménamén yémofem so tanangi méinyotio mband marat!
english: Blessed are the gentle , for they shall inherit the earth . + 5:5 or, land. + 5:5 Psalms 37:11

nama: Áuwéghafé fá em efe minde ménde em mbarkánd yamot ndené fété njamke a nu ménde yénau em, ménamén fá so taremngongé.
english: Blessed are those who hunger and thirst for righteousness , for they shall be filled .

nama: Áuwéghafé fá em efe ghérghérsisé em ámb árfefaf, ménamén Ngánján so ndenéyameyo ghérghérsisé yém yéfefaf!
english: Blessed are the merciful , for they shall obtain mercy .

nama: Áuwéghafé fá em efe njúnnjúnofnar em tikfan, ménamén yémofem so tinjongi Ngánján!
english: Blessed are the pure in heart , for they shall see God .

nama: Áuwéghafé fá em efe krufrát wafrogh ár em, ménamén fá so emndetat Ngánjánene ambumtértér!
english: Blessed are the peacemakers , for they shall be called children of God .

nama: Áuwéghafé fá em efe ewasérmbotat ménamén mbarkánd yammén, yéfene so yém njafar limánégh!
english: Blessed are those who have been persecuted for righteousness ’ sake , for theirs is the Kingdom of Heaven .

nama: "Áuwégh yém féfeyot njam árém ewasalitat, ewasérmbotat a méinyotio unyégh si ewawafrotat ménamén fém em tane waitogh ár. 12 Náuwetati a nasnetati, ménamén féfene fai sem ndimbal njafaran, ndené ende yémofem ewasérmbotaménd Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár efe fronde enmormén. Fém em ndenanit sol a kwayaghé
english: “ Blessed are you when people reproach you , persecute you , and say all kinds of evil against you falsely , for my sake .
Rejoice , and be exceedingly glad , for great is your reward in heaven . For that is how they persecuted the prophets who were before you .

nama: "Fém sol em mband maratoe. Wénde njam solene ménde kefongé, ndernáye so yafarnje solene ménde wéikor? Yau mer yém wanjmengét, ménaro yém sái téngwayangi a árém so kafkafe yétumndat.
english: “ You are the salt of the earth , but if the salt has lost its flavor, with what will it be salted? It is then good for nothing , but to be cast out and trodden under the feet of men .

nama: "Fém kwayaghé em mband maratoe. Tesen mband tunakfan yau so yafato. 15 Árké árém yau so tawarongi lambefé a tákmangi sin mbanmbanan. Wénde so tafayongi lambefé fayogh kitarayan ánde kwayaghé so yéramete méinyotio árét méngo kénjún. 16 Ndené yameyo, féfene kwayaghé so nanete ár sáfrére, ménát yémofem so yéfandat féfene mer wafroghyam a yuwetat Féferafé njafarmén. Yesu yénmormén nák efalo yátoghét
english: “ You are the light of the world . A city located on a hill can ’ t be hidden .
Neither do you light a lamp and put it under a measuring basket , but on a stand; and it shines to all who are in the house .
Even so , let your light shine before men , that they may see your good works and glorify your Father who is in heaven .

nama: "Yau ndené nemnati yénd kwéném Mosesene nák witrémboghét a Ngánjánene mat yátogh árfene watamegh. Yénd yau kwéném yéné witrémboghét wénde nákoene watamegh si sái efalo kamndangé. 18 Yéndon efalo emndetan, kétánotio njafar a mband marat kawaindangend, ámb némbne férén tosé o fen faroghmén yau so kawaindangé nákta kétánotio méinyotio ufroghan sái em. 19 Emofem njam yéráfnat ámbiro némbne nák a ewatametat ámb ár yéné yamotio, fá so emndetat némbne njafar limánéghan. Wénde emofem wafroghan ekmetat a ewatametat yéné nák fá so emndetat ndimbal njafar limánéghan. 20 Yéndon ewaufrotan féfe ndené féfene mbarkánd yamam táf tawaindangé Farasi ár a nák watamegh árfene mbarkánd wafrogh yam. A njam fémofem yau yéné ewafrotati, fém yau so kényawangi njafar limánéghét. Yesum emndete nékwafé ármén
english: “Don’ t think that I came to destroy the law or the prophets . I didn’ t come to destroy , but to fulfill .
For most certainly , I tell you , until heaven and earth pass away , not even one smallest letter or one tiny pen stroke shall in any way pass away from the law , until all things are accomplished .

Therefore , whoever shall break one of these least commandments and teach others to do so , shall be called least in the Kingdom of Heaven ; but whoever shall do and teach them shall be called great in the Kingdom of Heaven .
For I tell you that unless your righteousness exceeds that of the scribes and Pharisees , there is no way you will enter into the Kingdom of Heaven .

nama: "Fém té náyárayénd ndené Ngánjánene nák norayai árfefaf tándái, 'Yau ár ngi, árké árom efe njam tésmetau so yakai moghan.' 22 Wénde yéndon ewaufrotan féfeyot ndené árké ár efe nékw yém fútarefaf so yakai moghan. Árké árom ewasalite fútarefaf. Féyo fá táf so kokayongé sénko árfene rére. A árké ár noraya ndené, 'Fém ném onon,' so kértayan yém tuot fését.
english: “ You have heard that it was said to the ancient ones , ‘ You shall not murder ;’ and ‘ Whoever murders will be in danger of the judgment .’

But I tell you that everyone who is angry with his brother without a cause will be in danger of the judgment . Whoever says to his brother, ‘ Raca !’ will be in danger of the council . Whoever says , ‘ You fool !’ will be in danger of the fire of Gehenna.

nama: "Yénémaménnde, njam fene ramégh rokar ersa ghéngén wárogh kitarat a kété kawafarota ndené fe fútarém nékwafé néfande fém, 24 tauro fenjo ramégh rokar kété ghéngén wárogh kitaré sáfrére. Fronde nguwano a ténfrendangend fe fútarfé, féyo kénaf a taram fenjo ramégh rokar.
english: “ If therefore you are offering your gift at the altar , and there remember that your brother has anything against you ,
leave your gift there before the altar , and go your way . First be reconciled to your brother, and then come and offer your gift .

nama: "Téfrenda kérté wékeye fe mék téfnárafé emon nérse fém moghét. Tafrota njamandio fém mé ném frengéghét, yau njam, yémon so ngénramangé fém mogh téfnárafefaf, a mogh téfnáram ngénmafnamongi kétán folis árfefaf, a kénlawangi kwéfkwéf méngon. 26 Yéndon ewaufrotan féfe efaloe, fém yau so kenngo kétánotio fém méinyotio fai so nufrote. Yesum korayau amafanyo wanéghmén
english: Agree with your adversary quickly while you are with him on the way ; lest perhaps the prosecutor deliver you to the judge , and the judge deliver you to the officer , and you be cast into prison .
Most certainly I tell you , you shall by no means get out of there until you have paid the last penny .

nama: Fém té náyáretati ndené Ngánjánene nák noraye, 'Yau amafanyo wanégh.' 28 Wénde yéndon ewaufrotan ndené emon njam yéfanda amaf mwighaye yékwna yamot téfe yafrote fá yáne tikfe. 29 Njam fene tambén ghékfam fém néméinda yaufiyot, tutor a téngwayang. Yau minde mámáfi yém feyot ámb fifikafe sái ténfang, wénde minde mámáfi yém feyot méinyotio fifi sái yiyota fését. 30 A njam fene tambén ngángayam néméinda yaufiot, ténéf a téngwai. Yau minde yaufi yém feyot ámb fifi kafe sái ténfang, wénde minde yaufi yém feyot fene méinyotio fifi sái yiyota fését. Yesum korayau amaf watembéghmén
english: “ You have heard that it was said , ‘ You shall not commit adultery ;’
but I tell you that everyone who gazes at a woman to lust after her has committed adultery with her already in his heart .

If your right eye causes you to stumble , pluck it out and throw it away from you . For it is more profitable for you that one of your members should perish than for your whole body to be cast into Gehenna.

If your right hand causes you to stumble , cut it off , and throw it away from you . For it is more profitable for you that one of your members should perish, than for your whole body to be cast into Gehenna.

nama: "Ngánjánene nák wéi noraye ndené, 'Emon korongé yánjo amaf so taramangé yá watembégh férén.' 32 Wénde yéndon féfe ewaufrotan ndené emon yau so mé amaf tatembangé, táfandro amaf njam yam yafrota ámb árom, yémon njam yafrota, yémon yéméinde ménát fá so kamndangé amafanyo wanégh ár. A emon njam kawerangé watembégh amaf yaufi kor téfé yafrote amafanyo wanéghan. Yesum korayau sotafé unyéghofnar simén Ngánjánefaf
english: “ It was also said , ‘ Whoever shall put away his wife , let him give her a writing of divorce,’
but I tell you that whoever puts away his wife , except for the cause of sexual immorality , makes her an adulteress; and whoever marries her when she is put away commits adultery .

nama: "Fém wéi té náyárayénd ndené korayawét árfefaf tándái, 'Yau táf fenjo sotafé unyéghofnar si eráfna, wénde ewéreta fenjo sotafé unyéghofnar si fémo árké noraye Yurafaf.' 34 Wénde yéndon ewaufrotan féfe, 'Yau sotafé unyéghofnar si norayati, njafarmén, ménamén Ngánjánene limánégh ámnjogh sifayé yém; 35 o yau ménaye mband marate, ménamén Yáne kafkaf kété nenat, o yau Jerusalem, ménamén yéné siyém Ngánján Ndimbal Warsagh ároene tesen. 36 A yau sotafé unyéghofnar si noraya fenjo sénkoe, ménamén fémo yau so tengo ámbiro séf kwayaghat o kwéfitat. 37 Áfrátaye mé koraya, 'Fété' o 'Yau,' némé si koraya yéné farun yém yaufi ároeta. Yesum korayau fai wangoghmén
english: “ Again you have heard that it was said to the ancient ones , ‘ You shall not make false vows , but shall perform to the Lord your vows ,’
but I tell you , don’ t swear at all : neither by heaven , for it is the throne of God ;
nor by the earth , for it is the footstool of his feet ; nor by Jerusalem , for it is the city of the great King .
Neither shall you swear by your head , for you can ’ t make one hair white or black .
But let your ‘ Yes ’ be ‘ Yes ’ and your ‘ No ’ be ‘ No .’ Whatever is more than these is of the evil one .

nama: "Fém té náyáretati ndené Ngánjánene nák noraye, 'Emon njam tutorngé fene ghékéf, fémo wéi so tutor yáne ghékéfro. Emon njam tésufangé fene sén, fémo wéi so tésuf yáne sénro.' 39 Wénde yéndon ewaufrotan féfe, 'Yau yékena yaufi ár. Árké árom njam kénsmangé tambén fétta, witmé fét tawengo. 40 Njam ámb árom ngénmanangé moghét ménamén fene sálámemén a yanang, mé téngwaram fene sodé. 41 Ámb árom njam máméghéraye némafareta rokar résaghét ámbiro kilomité álighét, mé téngwasamngo sómbio kilomitat. 42 Taram yá emon fém kémamnendangé, a yau sem tawengo yáyot emon watmé rokar résaghét táfngongé. Yuweta fene mék téfnár
english: “ You have heard that it was said , ‘ An eye for an eye , and a tooth for a tooth .’
But I tell you , don’ t resist him who is evil ; but whoever strikes you on your right cheek , turn to him the other also .
If anyone sues you to take away your coat , let him have your cloak also .
Whoever compels you to go one mile , go with him two .
Give to him who asks you , and don’ t turn away him who desires to borrow from you .

nama: "Fém té náyárayénd ndené, 'Euwetati féfenjo kaka ár, méndméndat efandati mék téfnár.' 44 Wénde yéndon ewaufrotan féfe ndené, euwetati féfene mék téfnár, a Ngánjánafé norayati yéfeyot emofem ewasérmbotat fém, 45 ménát fém so káyátongi féfene njafarmén Afane ambumtértér, yémon yéméinde efogh atremngoghét yaufi árét a mer árét, a yénmafarete nu mbarkánd árét a mbarkándofnar árét. 46 Fémofem njam euwetati fáro emofem euwetat fém, némé fai fémofem so tawanangi yéné yammén? Yau. Téu mani kafégh árém túmén yéné ewafrotat! 47 Fémofem njam esnetati féfenjo futáréfro, féfene yamam ewaindat árfene yam? Yau. Ngánjánofnar árém yéné yam ewafrotat! 48 Fém aem mé féwénféwénofnar ndené fété féfene njafarmén Afé nderé féwénféwénofnar yém.
english: “ You have heard that it was said , ‘ You shall love your neighbor and hate your enemy .’
But I tell you , love your enemies , bless those who curse you , do good to those who hate you , and pray for those who mistreat you and persecute you ,
that you may be children of your Father who is in heaven . For he makes his sun to rise on the evil and the good , and sends rain on the just and the unjust.
For if you love those who love you , what reward do you have ? Don’ t even the tax collectors do the same ?
If you only greet your friends, what more do you do than others ? Don’ t even the tax collectors do the same ?
Therefore you shall be perfect , just as your Father in heaven is perfect .

nama: "Kor nawarawenati yau fémofem ewafrotati meryam ár sáfan ménát yémofem so efandat. Fémofem njam ewafrotati, féfene fai yau so em féfene njafarmén Afata.
english: “ Be careful that you don’ t do your charitable giving before men , to be seen by them , or else you have no reward from your Father who is in heaven .

nama: "Njam fémofem tawaramangi áronjagh árét, yau táf marataye keye ndené ár efe em faruta mer wénde kénjún yau, nufrotat áumengégh méngon a endmé ménát árém so eutémndat. Yéndon efalo emndetan, yémofem té ewanangi yéfenjo fai. 3 Wénde njam fémofem tawaramangi yauyau árét, yau táf mat tiyáto féfene fatra ngángé némé féfene tambén ngángayam yafrote, 4 ménát féfene ramégh yam sái yém kwankwane. Féyo Féferafé emo yéfande némé yam wafrogh kwankwane yém so fai yénmafrote. Yesum ewatamete Ngánjánafé orayéghmén
english: Therefore , when you do merciful deeds , don’ t sound a trumpet before yourself , as the hypocrites do in the synagogues and in the streets , that they may get glory from men . Most certainly I tell you , they have received their reward .
But when you do merciful deeds , don’ t let your left hand know what your right hand does ,
so that your merciful deeds may be in secret , then your Father who sees in secret will reward you openly.

nama: "A njam fém Ngánjánafé norayati, yau táf ndené em ár efe em faruta mer wénde kénjún yau efe náuwetat Ngánjánafé oraighan ewakai áumengégh méngon a ndimbal endmé ménát sái efandat árém. Yéndon efalo emndetan, yémofem té ewanangi yéfenjo fai méinyoe. 6 Wénde njam Ngánjánafé norayati, kényawangi féfenjo méngo kénjút, ténémnangi sésafne a Ngánjánafé norayati yáfaf Féferafafaf, efe yém fandaghofnar. Féyo Féferafam emo efande kwankwane yam wafroghan so fai ewafrote. 7 Fém njam Ngánjánafé norayati, yau tárfár fifiofnar si norayati ndené Téndo ár kés em, ménamén fá ndené nemnat yéfene ngánjánam so eyárete tárfár sian. 8 Yau táf ndené em fá kés em, ménamén Féferafé fronde mat yém féfene ménde némat fémofem yamnendati. 9 Féyo, ndené so Ngánjánafé norayati: 'Téfene Afé njafar tukén, so mé yém fene yétkwén njúnnjúnofnar,
english: “ When you pray , you shall not be as the hypocrites , for they love to stand and pray in the synagogues and in the corners of the streets , that they may be seen by men . Most certainly , I tell you , they have received their reward .
But you , when you pray , enter into your inner room , and having shut your door , pray to your Father who is in secret ; and your Father who sees in secret will reward you openly.
In praying , don’ t use vain repetitions as the Gentiles do ; for they think that they will be heard for their much speaking.
Therefore don’ t be like them , for your Father knows what things you need before you ask him .
Pray like this : “‘ Our Father in heaven , may your name be kept holy.

nama: fene limánégh so yéném, a fene ménde so nufrote yéné mband maratan ndené fété njafaran kés yém.
english: Let your Kingdom come . Let your will be done on earth as it is in heaven .

nama: Ténmaram téfe sénonjo efoghmén njamke.
english: Give us today our daily bread.

nama: Kémawalindangé téfene yaufi, ndenéyameyo yénd té yénmawalinda yéfene yaufi téfefaf.
english: Forgive us our debts , as we also forgive our debtors .

nama: Yau yénd yénlimnda ufogh yamamé, wénde yénmanjana yénd kétándmé yaufi ároe tambén. Fene yém limánégh, wafté a ndimbal kwayaghé tuot. Efalo.' {b{ ...f* {b{6.13 Fene yém limánégh, wafté a ndimbal kwayaghé tuot. Efalo.' Ámb Bukan yéné si fu yau yém.
english: Bring us not into temptation , but deliver us from the evil one . For yours is the Kingdom, the power, and the glory forever . Amen.’ + 6:13 NU omits “For yours is the Kingdom, the power, and the glory forever. Amen.”

nama: "Fém táf tawawalindangé ámb árfene yaufiyam yémofem njam ewafrotat féfefaf, Féferafé njafaran wéi so tawalindangé féfene yaufi. 15 Wénde fém yau njam tawawalindangé árfene yaufiyam, féfene Afé yau so tawalindangé féfene yaufi. Yesum korayau awafarmanéghmén
english: “ For if you forgive men their trespasses , your heavenly Father will also forgive you .
But if you don’ t forgive men their trespasses , neither will your Father forgive your trespasses .

nama: "Njam nawafarmetati, yau yuyafotati ghérghérsisé sáf ndené ár kés nufrotat efe em faruta mer wénde kénjún yau, ménamén yémofem eyatotat yéfenjo sáf ghérghérsisafé ménát árém so efandat ndené fá nawafarmetat. Yéndon efalo emndetan, yémofem té ewanangi yéfenjoyo fai méinyoe. 17 Wénde njam fém nawafarmetati, efaghanati sénko a eumbnati sáf. 18 Yéné ewafrotati ménát ár yau mat so em ndené nawafarmetati, wénde mé Féferafaro efe yém fandaghofnar; Féferafé efe nérete yéné yam wafroghan em kwankwane so fai ewafrote fém. Yesum korayau ngonjélmén kété njafaran
english: “ Moreover when you fast , don’ t be like the hypocrites , with sad faces . For they disfigure their faces that they may be seen by men to be fasting . Most certainly I tell you , they have received their reward .
But you , when you fast , anoint your head and wash your face ,
so that you are not seen by men to be fasting , but by your Father who is in secret ; and your Father , who sees in secret , will reward you .

nama: "Yau táf eumendati féfendio ngonjél yéné mband maratan, ánde ghénjam a nekérnekéram ewasrombotat, a ánde so kényawangi oro téfnár orot. 20 Wénde eumendati féfendio ngonjél kétán njafarot, ánde ghénjam a nekérnekéram yau so ewasérmbotat, a ánde yau so kényawangi oro téfnár orot. 21 Féyo ánde féfene ngonjél yém, kété féfene tikéf wéikor yém.
english: “Don’ t lay up treasures for yourselves on the earth , where moth and rust consume, and where thieves break through and steal ;
but lay up for yourselves treasures in heaven , where neither moth nor rust consume, and where thieves don’t break through and steal ;
for where your treasure is , there your heart will be also .

nama: "Ghékéf siyém lambefé yém fifioene. Táf féfene ghékéf njam em mer, féfene méinyo fifi so yém kwayaghanro. 23 Wénde táf féfene ghékéf njam em mámáfi, féfene méinyo fifi so yém kwéfitayanroǃ Njam kwayaghé féfe kénjún kamndangé kwéfité, fém so em minde kwéfitayanǃ
english: “ The lamp of the body is the eye . If therefore your eye is sound, your whole body will be full of light .
But if your eye is evil , your whole body will be full of darkness . If therefore the light that is in you is darkness , how great is the darkness !

nama: "Yau fémofem so eyátotati sómbio yuré. Árkéméné sái méndméndat yéfandati a árkéméné sái yuwetati, o ámb sái eyátotati efaloe a ámb sái yékarotati. Fém yau so násáfotati sómbio yurat Ngánjáne a maniot. Yesum emndai yau mámé mwighé em
english: “ No one can serve two masters , for either he will hate the one and love the other , or else he will be devoted to one and despise the other . You can ’ t serve both God and Mammon .

nama: "Yénémaménnde yéndon emndetan fém, yau mámé mwighé em ndernáye fém emor, némé fémofem so enetati njamke a nu; o wéi féfenjo fifimén, némé fémofem so nawotati. Ghérsé siyém minde ndimbal, wénde njamke siyém némbnare yém, a fifi siyém minde ndimbal yém, wénde sáláme siyém némbnare yém. 26 Efandati men; fá yau násáfotat yéghan, targhan, wamane umengéghan, wénde féfene njafarmén Afam emanjne fá. Fém ár sem minde ndimbal em Ngánjánene ghékfan a ewaindati men. 27 Mwighé éwórsoghe fémofem yau so tombé ghérsé eyátotati.
english: Therefore I tell you , don’ t be anxious for your life : what you will eat , or what you will drink ; nor yet for your body , what you will wear. Isn’ t life more than food , and the body more than clothing ?
See the birds of the sky , that they don’ t sow , neither do they reap , nor gather into barns. Your heavenly Father feeds them . Aren’ t you of much more value than they ?
“ Which of you by being anxious , can add one moment to his lifespan?

nama: "Némamén wét mwighan néworsotati sálámemén? Efandati ndernáye kéghat mbumbu nanotat. Yémofem yau sáláme ewafrotat yéfendio. 29 Wénde yéndon ewaufrotan Solomon yánjo méinyotio wémáran ndené umaneghkaf yau kéretau fá sem. 30 Yéné ndené yém Ngánjánam kés yus ewamanete kéghatan, sénonjo árké em a káye fésén nakérnat. Fém so Ngánjánam ewamanete ndimbal kéráye. Fém némbnar ndimbal mwighafé! 31 Féyo yau mwighayam ewawórsota norayati, 'Némé so yéndfem enetam?' o 'Némé nu so enetam?' o 'Némé so yénd yénmawo?' 32 Ménamén Téndo árém yéné ménde yéngwaitotat, féyo féfene njafarmén Afé mat yém fém yéné ménde em. 33 Wénde fronde yafarenati Ngánján limánégh a yáne mbarkándyam, a féyo méinyotio yéné rokar so eramete féyotaroe. 34 Yénémamén kaitaumén yau néngemnati, ménamén káye efgham so yénérse yánjo méghmégh. Sénonjo efoghmén kérté sem sénonjoyot.
english: Why are you anxious about clothing ? Consider the lilies of the field, how they grow. They don’ t toil , neither do they spin ,
yet I tell you that even Solomon in all his glory was not dressed like one of these .
But if God so clothes the grass of the field, which today exists and tomorrow is thrown into the oven, won’ t he much more clothe you , you of little faith ?
“ Therefore don’t be anxious , saying , ‘ What will we eat ?’, ‘ What will we drink ?’ or , ‘ With what will we be clothed ?’
For the Gentiles seek after all these things ; for your heavenly Father knows that you need all these things .
But seek first God ’s Kingdom and his righteousness ; and all these things will be given to you as well .
Therefore don’ t be anxious for tomorrow, for tomorrow will be anxious for itself . Each day ’s own evil is sufficient.

nama: "Yau moghan ámb ár ekmetati, ménát Ngánjánam yau so moghan kénékmangé, 2 ménamén Ngánjánam so moghan kénékmangé ndenéyameyo fémon ndernáye ámb ár moghan ekmete, a ndenéyameyo yémo so ewafrote fémo ndernáye ámb ár moghan ekmete.
english: “Don’t judge , so that you won’t be judged .
For with whatever judgment you judge , you will be judged ; and with whatever measure you measure , it will be measured to you .

nama: "Némamén fémo yafande fe fútarene ghékéf fémégh wénde fémo yau yéfande fenjo ghékfan yém wén ténj? 4 Ndernáye fém so koraya fútarefaf, 'Kumyo yéndon so kémautorén fene ghékéf fémégh, táf fefaf yém wén ténj fenjo ghékfan? 5 Fém farun mer nérete wénde kénjún yau! Fronde tutor fene ghékfan wén ténj, féyo fémo so efande safénro a fémo táf so tautor fútarene ghékéf fémégh.
english: Why do you see the speck that is in your brother’s eye , but don’ t consider the beam that is in your own eye ?
Or how will you tell your brother, ‘ Let me remove the speck from your eye ,’ and behold , the beam is in your own eye ?
You hypocrite ! First remove the beam out of your own eye , and then you can see clearly to remove the speck out of your brother’s eye .

nama: "Yau ewarametati némé em njúnnjúnofnar ághafet a yau ewawitati féfenjo ndindi kimbafet. Njam fémofem yafrotati, yémofem so esénat yéné rokar yéfene ngángaye a so kawengongi a eftérnat fém karéfkarfot. Kamota, káronja, kautar
english: “Don’ t give that which is holy to the dogs , neither throw your pearls before the pigs , lest perhaps they trample them under their feet , and turn and tear you to pieces .

nama: "Namotati Yurafaf, a yémo so tawaramangé; náronjati a so tinjongi; nautanati, a sésafne so kásáwérngé féfeyot. 8 Ménamén méinyotio ár efe nómnendat yémofem so tawanangi, efe náronjat yémofem so tinjongi, a fá efe nautanat, sésafne so kásáwérngé."
english: “Ask, and it will be given you . Seek , and you will find . Knock , and it will be opened for you .
For everyone who asks receives . He who seeks finds . To him who knocks it will be opened.

nama: "Njam féfene ambum kómnendangi flawayat, fémofem so tawaramangi wím? Yau. 10 Fá njam kamotangi wagifot, fémofem so tawaramangi rarégh kamban? Yau. 11 Fém, efe em yaufi, mat em ndernáye fémofem so ewarametati mer ramégh rokar féfene ambumat. Féyo féfene Afé Ngánjánam njafaran efaloe so tawaramangé mer ramégh rokar yéfeyot emofem tamnendangi fá. 12 Yénémaménnde méinyotio kénjún, ewawafrotati ámb árét némat fém ménde em ámb árém sái ewafrotat féfe. Yéné téfén yém némé Mosesene nák a Ngánjánene mat yátogh árfene Bukam yénd yénmatametat." Némbne a marat sésafne
english: Or who is there among you who , if his son asks him for bread, will give him a stone ?
Or if he asks for a fish , who will give him a serpent ?
If you then , being evil , know how to give good gifts to your children , how much more will your Father who is in heaven give good things to those who ask him !
Therefore , whatever you desire for men to do to you , you shall also do to them ; for this is the law and the prophets .

nama: "Kélawangi némbne sésafnemé. Ménamén sésafne siyém marat a end árkéméné yékém áfrátaye yém fését, a tárfár ár nényawetat yéné kénjúmé. 14 Wénde sésafne siyém némbne a end árké yékém kétán efalo ghérsafaf taikér yém, a mé nambio árémro tinjongi yéné end. Wén a yáne mbwe
english: “ Enter in by the narrow gate ; for the gate is wide and the way is broad that leads to destruction, and there are many who enter in by it .
How narrow is the gate and the way is restricted that leads to life ! There are few who find it .

nama: "Kor nawarawenati unyégh Ngánjánene mat yátogh árfenemén. Fá eném féfefaf sif sálámeyafé, wénde kénjún fá em tékratro munjan ághé. 16 Fémofem so fá tawayamngongi yéfenjo mbweyan. Wét árém so ekafetat yéro wétwétafé mbwe o wiwi fasalaron? Yau. 17 Méinyotio mer wénam efune mer mbwe, wénde mámáfi wénam efune mámáfi mbwe. 18 Mer wénam yau efune mámáfi mbwe, a mámáfi wénam yau efune mer mbwe. 19 Méinyotio wénam yau njam mer mbwe efunat so enfetat a ewitat fését. 20 Féyo fémofem so tawayamngongi unyégh Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár yéfenjo yam wafroghan." Efalo waitogh ár a unyégh waitogh ár
english: “ Beware of false prophets , who come to you in sheep ’s clothing , but inwardly are ravening wolves .
By their fruits you will know them . Do you gather grapes from thorns or figs from thistles ?
Even so , every good tree produces good fruit , but the corrupt tree produces evil fruit .
A good tree can ’t produce evil fruit , neither can a corrupt tree produce good fruit .
Every tree that doesn’t grow good fruit is cut down and thrown into the fire .
Therefore by their fruits you will know them .

nama: "Méinyotio ár efe norayat tafaf ndené, 'Tane Yuré, tane Yuré,' yau so kélawangi njafar limánéghét, wénde mé fáro emofem yafrotat tane Afane ménde efe yém njafaran. 22 Tárfár ár so norayat tafaf mogh efghon, 'Tane Yuré, tane Yuré, fene yétkwénan yéndfem kafrotawém Buk si a fene yétkwénan yaufi mbérmbér tawifnawém a sélngwélafé yam tawafrotawém?' 23 Féyo yénd so korayangén yéfefaf, 'Yénd mafina wém fém efe em. Kitérmbongi tafafta, fém yaufiyam wafrogh ár.' Káfeté mwighafé ár a onon méngo ramégh ár
english: “ Not everyone who says to me , ‘ Lord , Lord ,’ will enter into the Kingdom of Heaven , but he who does the will of my Father who is in heaven .
Many will tell me in that day , ‘ Lord , Lord , didn’ t we prophesy in your name , in your name cast out demons , and in your name do many mighty works ?’
Then I will tell them , ‘ I never knew you . Depart from me , you who work iniquity.’

nama: "Yénémaménnde, ár efe náyáretat yéné si tanemén a ewaitotat ndenanit em káfeté mwighafé ár emon méngo yeitam wím tukén. 25 Nu afamégh nufngoi, wanje kéfér armbogh nufngoi, a mbormbor téfnjau a yéné méngo yésmai; wénde yéné méngo yau yéfuryéng. Ménamén yáne sérasér tayangérwén wíman. 26 Wénde ár efe náyáretat yéné si tanemén wénde yau ewaitotat ndenanit em onon ár emon méngo yeitam mirian. 27 Nu afamégh nufngoi, wanje kéfér armbogh nufngoi, a mbormbor téfnjau a méngo yésmai, a yéné méngo yéfuryéng ambino."
english: “ Everyone therefore who hears these words of mine and does them , I will liken him to a wise man who built his house on the rock .
The rain came down , the floods came , and the winds blew and beat on that house ; and it didn’ t fall , for it was founded on the rock .
Everyone who hears these words of mine and doesn’ t do them will be like a foolish man who built his house on the sand.
The rain came down , the floods came , and the winds blew and beat on that house ; and it fell — and its fall was great .”

nama: Njam Yesum si yifoi sómbio méngo ramégh árfenemén, ár mérén tamorwén sélngwél yáne watameghan, 29 ménamén yémon tawatametau muyafé, yau ndené yéfene nák watamegh ár.
english: When Jesus had finished saying these things , the multitudes were astonished at his teaching ,
for he taught them with authority , and not like the scribes .

nama: Yesu njam néneworyéng kétamé mband tunakéf tambén, tárfár ár mérnam yaitoyénd. 2 Yaufi ghénganafé ár sélngwéle yénmormén a budme niyai yáfaf a témndangé, "Yuré, fém ménde njam ném, fémo so mer kwiyáto Ngánjánene ghékfan."
english: When he came down from the mountain , great multitudes followed him .
Behold , a leper came to him and worshiped him , saying , “ Lord , if you want to , you can make me clean .”

nama: Yesum engwatembai yánjo ngángé a tianjangé ár. Fá korayangé, "Yénd ménde fété wém, mer kamndé!" Tekofnar yémo frengégh yinjoi yánjo yaufi ghéngan enjne tambén. 4 Féyo Yesum yémndai, "Ende yau táf taufro yénémamén, wénde néngém, kauyafo ghéngén wárogh téfnárafefaf ndené fém mer té namndé a ramégh yam téfrenda ndenáye Mosesene si féyotaroe ménát yéfeyot matot. Rom fiyarafene sénko téfnároene ndimbal mwighé
english: Jesus stretched out his hand and touched him , saying , “ I want to . Be made clean .” Immediately his leprosy was cleansed .
Jesus said to him , “ See that you tell nobody ; but go , show yourself to the priest , and offer the gift that Moses commanded , as a testimony to them .”

nama: Táf Yesu njam néngnyawai Káfenam tesenan, Rom fiyarafene sénko téfnár yénmormén yáfaf a yémndai wáutárghét. 6 Yémon témndangé "Yuré, tane faiofnar ásáfogh ár yékmang méngon aknyéghkaf a ndimbal tékrátan yém."
english: When he came into Capernaum , a centurion came to him , asking him for help,
saying , “ Lord , my servant lies in the house paralyzed , grievously tormented.”

nama: Yesum témndangé fá, "Yénd so wéngém a mer tiyáton."
english: Jesus said to him , “ I will come and heal him .”

nama: Rom fiyarafene sénko téfnáram yawangoi, "Yuré, yénd yau merfifi wém fém sái néném tane méngot. Wénde mé siro koraya, féyo tane faiofnar ásáfogh ár mer so káyátongé. 9 Ménamén yénd yéndio ár wém wafté mbanmbanan, yémafé fiyaré efe em tane mbanmbanan. Yéndo njam témndan, "Kuwano," féyo fá kuwanongé, a yéndo njam témndan ámb ár "kénaf," féyo fá kénaflangé. Yéndo njam témndan tane faiofnar ásáfogh ár, 'Yéné tafrota,' féyo yémo so yafrote."
english: The centurion answered , “ Lord , I ’m not worthy for you to come under my roof . Just say the word , and my servant will be healed .

For I am also a man under authority , having under myself soldiers . I tell this one , ‘ Go ,’ and he goes ; and tell another , ‘ Come ,’ and he comes ; and tell my servant , ‘ Do this ,’ and he does it .”

nama: Táf njam Yesu náyárai yéné, fá sélngwél yémormén a tamndangé fá emofem táitotawét, "Yéndon efalo emndetan, yéndon ámb yau ndené ár yinjoyén Israil kénjún ndené ndimbal mwighé téfnár. 11 Yéndon emndetan fém ndené tárfár ár so eném werta a mbormborta, a so tawanangi yéfenjo sifayé téméndfaf yémafé Ebraam, Aisek a Jeikof njafar limánéghan. 12 Wénde Ju ár efe fiya tamorwén Ngánjánene limánéghan fá so nawitat téndot, kwéfité kénjút, ánde so nendat a sén ekérnat."
english: When Jesus heard it , he marveled and said to those who followed, “Most certainly I tell you , I haven’ t found so great a faith , not even in Israel .
I tell you that many will come from the east and the west , and will sit down with Abraham, Isaac , and Jacob in the Kingdom of Heaven ,
but the children of the Kingdom will be thrown out into the outer darkness . There will be weeping and gnashing of teeth .”

nama: Féyo Yesum yémndai Rom fiyarafene sénko ár, "Kuwanoǃ Ndenáye so nufrote ndernáye fémo efalo yiyátote." Féyo yáne faiofnar ásáfogh ár mer namndai mé yéné efghon fété. Yesum tárfár ár mer eyátoi
english: Jesus said to the centurion , “ Go your way . Let it be done for you as you have believed .” His servant was healed in that hour .

nama: Njam Yesu néngnyawai Fitane méngot, yémo yinjoi Fité yánat ausé tékmangérwén kémégh sifayan fifi wafté enjnefe. 15 Yesum yayanjai yáne ngángé, a fifi wafté enjneyam yéfrangoi. A fá nokayoi a njamke yawaflitam Yesue.
english: When Jesus came into Peter ’s house , he saw his wife’s mother lying sick with a fever .
He touched her hand , and the fever left her . So she got up and served him .

nama: Njam téfértau, árém tánémnjawét Yesuefaf efe yaufi mbérmbéram talimndau, a tautonau yaufi mbérmbér ménaye sie a méinyotio enjne téfnárfayo mer káyátotawét. 17 Yéné yam efalo káyátotau némat Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár Aisaya korayau: "Yémo téfene tékrát té mer eyáto a téfene enjne ewitrémb."{c{ ...f* {c{8.17 Aisaya 53:4 Ámb ár ménde tamorwén Yesue waitoghét
english: When evening came , they brought to him many possessed with demons. He cast out the spirits with a word , and healed all who were sick ,
that it might be fulfilled which was spoken through Isaiah the prophet , saying , “ He took our infirmities and bore our diseases .”

nama: Njam Yesum ewinjoi ár mérén yarendayénd, yémo emndai yánjo waitogh ár, "So yénngém kétán arakaf witmé karfot." 19 Wénde nák watamegh ár yénmormén yáfaf yémndai, "Watamegh ár, yéndon so némaitotan fém árkamé njam niota."
english: Now when Jesus saw great multitudes around him , he gave the order to depart to the other side .
A scribe came and said to him , “ Teacher , I will follow you wherever you go .”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Ághéághafene té ewam féne, a men kés em yéfene té em njén, wénde Ároene Ambum yáne ámb sifayé yau yém ánde yémo yánjo sénko so téfayongé."
english: Jesus said to him , “ The foxes have holes and the birds of the sky have nests , but the Son of Man has nowhere to lay his head .”

nama: Ámb waitogh árom yémndai fá, "Yuré, fronde so wénngém yényatotan afé."
english: Another of his disciples said to him , “ Lord , allow me first to go and bury my father .”

nama: Wénde Yesum témndangé "Kwénmaito, so kér árém eyatotat ámb kér ár." Yesum yékmboi ndimbal mbormbor
english: But Jesus said to him , “ Follow me , and leave the dead to bury their own dead .”

nama: Féyo fá nuflai boutan a yánjo waitogh árém yaitoyénd. 24 Sélngwéle njam ndimbal mbormboram yésmai arakaf, a sófam tafarngai bout a olitoghétro témorwén. Wénde Yesu kémégh tékmangérwén 25 Waitogh ár naflayénd yáfaf a yanoyénd korayangi, "Yuré, yénd ténmanjar! Olitoghétro yénémǃ"
english: When he got into a boat , his disciples followed him .
Behold , a violent storm came up on the sea , so much that the boat was covered with the waves ; but he was asleep .
The disciples came to him and woke him up , saying , “ Save us , Lord ! We are dying!”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Féfene ndimbal mwighé siyém némbnar, némamén fém férfér em?" Kétamé fá nokayoi ekmbeyai mbormbor a sóf, féyo nénamndai métar.
english: He said to them , “ Why are you fearful , O you of little faith ?” Then he got up , rebuked the wind and the sea , and there was a great calm .

nama: Méinyotio ár sélngwél emormén a namotayénd, "Némé ár yéné yém? Ménamén mbormbor sóf té yiyárendǃ" Yesum mer eyáteyai sómbio yaufi mbérmbérafé ár
english: The men marveled , saying , “ What kind of man is this , that even the wind and the sea obey him ?”

nama: Njam Yesu nufaryéng witmé karéf Gadara yu marat kénjút, sómbio yaufi mbérmbérafé ár tanérwén mbéwé méngo tambén a yafotangeyayénd. Fá tárwén nékwafé efe yau so kawaindau yénamé. 29 Fá nutnangeyayénd "Némé ménde ném téfefaf, Ngánjánene Ambum? Fém kéném téfefaf tékrat raméghét Ngánjánene ufoghmén efogh yau nawer?"
english: When he came to the other side , into the country of the Gergesenes, two people possessed by demons met him there , coming out of the tombs , exceedingly fierce , so that nobody could pass that way .
Behold , they cried out , saying , “ What do we have to do with you , Jesus , Son of God ? Have you come here to torment us before the time ?”

nama: Kor yau nayu témorwén kétán tárfár kimb mérén ánde kafenetawét. 31 Yaufi mbérmbéram yamnendayénd Yesu, "Fémo njam ténmutor, ténmáfáreta kétán kimb mérénfaf."
english: Now there was a herd of many pigs feeding far away from them .
The demons begged him , saying , “ If you cast us out , permit us to go away into the herd of pigs .”

nama: Fá korayangé yéfefaf, "Kuwanongi!" Féyo fá nétoryénd a néwanoyénd nélawayénd kimbafefaf, a kimb mérén wérseye wékeye kewonawét mband tunkéf néngatnaménd sawét kolitotawét kérotio.
english: He said to them , “ Go !” They came out and went into the herd of pigs ; and behold , the whole herd of pigs rushed down the cliff into the sea and died in the water .

nama: Yéné kimb wanjengégh ár nenngoyénd kétán tesenot, kafrotawét méinyotio yénémamén a wéi ndenáyo yéfenemén efe tamorwén yaufi mbérmbérafé ár. 34 Féyo ár méinyotio tesenmén nénefoyénd ténmanfetawét Yesu; a njam yinjoyénd yémndayénd ménát sái korongai a kuwangai yéfene yuta.
english: Those who fed them fled and went away into the city and told everything , including what happened to those who were possessed with demons.
Behold , all the city came out to meet Jesus . When they saw him , they begged that he would depart from their borders .

nama: Yesu nuflai boutan, kétán yánjo tesen, Kafenamét. 2 Ámb árém yénmufaryénd aknyégh ár tékmangérwén yameyan. Njam Yesum ewawinjoi yéfene ndimbal mwighé, yémo témndangé aknyégh ár, "Mámé mwighé yau ném, tane ambum! Fene yaufiyam té wawalinda."
english: He entered into a boat and crossed over , and came into his own city .
Behold , they brought to him a man who was paralyzed , lying on a bed . Jesus , seeing their faith , said to the paralytic , “ Son , cheer up ! Your sins are forgiven you .”

nama: Féyo ámb nák watamegh téfnáram korayangi yéfenjo kénjúnro, "Yéné ár korayau fá kar Ngánján yémǃ Yéné siyém wasáligh si."
english: Behold , some of the scribes said to themselves , “ This man blasphemes.”

nama: Fá mat náyátoi yéfene mwighé, Yesum emndai, "Némamén fém nemnati yéné yaufi mwighé féfenjo tikéf kénjún? 5 Árké si yém áfrat tafaf sái korayangén, 'Fene yaufi té wawalinda,' o sái korayangén, 'Kokai a kuwano'? 6 Wénde yénd ménde wém ménát fém mat so ném ndené Ároene Ambum waftafé yém mband maratan yaufiyam wawalingét." Féyo fá norayai aknyégh ároefaf, "Kunjé, tané fenjo yame, a kuwano méngot!"
english: Jesus , knowing their thoughts , said , “ Why do you think evil in your hearts ?
For which is easier , to say , ‘ Your sins are forgiven;’ or to say , ‘ Get up , and walk ’?
But that you may know that the Son of Man has authority on earth to forgive sins—” ( then he said to the paralytic ), “ Get up , and take up your mat, and go to your house .”

nama: Fá nokayoi a néwanoi méngot. 8 Njam ár mérnam yinjoyénd yéné yam, fá férféram ewifoi, tuyotawét Ngánján, emon ndené muyé té ewaramete árét. Yesum yémotai Metyu
english: He arose and departed to his house .
But when the multitudes saw it , they marveled and glorified God , who had given such authority to men .

nama: Táf Yesu nénuwanoi kétamé, yémo yinjoi ár yétkwén Metyu témorangérwén mani kafégh méngon. Yesum témndangé, "Kwénmaito." Féyo Metyu nokayoi a yaitoi Yesu.
english: As Jesus passed by from there , he saw a man called Matthew sitting at the tax collection office. He said to him , “Follow me .” He got up and followed him .

nama: Soramé, Yesu nuwanoi njamke nénet Metyuene méngot. Tárfár mani kafégh ár a yaufi ár enmormén njamke tánetawét yémafé Yesufé a yáne waitogh ár. 11 Njam Farasi árém yinjoyénd, yémofem emotayénd yáne waitogh ár, "Némamén féfene watamegh árfé enetat yémafé mani kafégh ár a yaufi árfé?"
english: As he sat in the house , behold , many tax collectors and sinners came and sat down with Jesus and his disciples .
When the Pharisees saw it , they said to his disciples , “ Why does your teacher eat with tax collectors and sinners?”

nama: Yesu náyárai Farasi árfene si a norayai, "Yau enjnefnar árfet yém njokté sái yéfandat, wénde enjne téfnárafetro. 13 Wénde tangém mat káyátongi némé yénayoene fifi yém Bukan, 'Yéndon, Ngánjánam, méndefé yéfandan ghérghérsisayam, yau ghéngén.' Ménamén yénd yau kwéném mbarkánd árét, wénde yaufiyam árét." Yémofem yémotayénd awafarmanéghmén Yesuefaf
english: When Jesus heard it , he said to them , “ Those who are healthy have no need for a physician , but those who are sick do .
But you go and learn what this means : ‘ I desire mercy , and not sacrifice ,’ for I came not to call the righteous , but sinners to repentance.”

nama: Féyo Jon walitogh ároene waitogh ár enmormén yémotayénd Yesu, "Yénd a Farasi ár túmén nawafarmetam, wénde némamén fene waitogh ár yau nawafarmetat?"
english: Then John ’s disciples came to him , saying , “ Why do we and the Pharisees fast often , but your disciples don’ t fast ?”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Ndernáye wét so totér awerégh téfnároene fútaréf nendat táf yémafé njam em? Yau. Yéné efogh so kawerangé ánde yéné awerégh téfnár so téngwanangi yéfe tambén, a féyo fá táf so nawafarmetat."
english: Jesus said to them , “ Can the friends of the bridegroom mourn as long as the bridegroom is with them ? But the days will come when the bridegroom will be taken away from them , and then they will fast .

nama: "Ámb árom yau so yámyote totér sálámeye tándáwár sáláme, ménamén totér wamyogh sálámeyam so yiyátote fétrarghét minde. 17 Yau árém ewasunat totér wéri nu kétán tándáwár gout ghéngan séfkwénan. Njam yafrotat, gout ghéngan séfkwénan so katirarngé, wéri nu so nasune, a gout ghéngan séfkwén so mámáfi kamndangé. Wénde, totér wéri nu so fété tényawangi kétán totér gout ghéngan séfkwénan. Féyo wéri nu a gout ghéngan séfkwén mer so ere." Kér mérés a enjne amaf
english: No one puts a piece of unshrunk cloth on an old garment ; for the patch would tear away from the garment , and a worse hole is made .

Neither do people put new wine into old wineskins, or else the skins would burst , and the wine be spilled , and the skins ruined. No , they put new wine into fresh wineskins, and both are preserved .”

nama: Njam Yesu mé korayau yéné, áumengégh méngo wanjengégh ár yénmormén, budéme niyai yáne sáfrére a korayangé, "Tane mérés mé fété kér tém. Wénde kénaf ngángé téfai yáfaf, fá so táf kanongé." 19 Yesu nokayoi a yéngwaitoyéng, a waitogh árfé néngwanoyénd.
english: While he told these things to them , behold , a ruler came and worshiped him , saying , “ My daughter has just died , but come and lay your hand on her , and she will live .”
Jesus got up and followed him , as did his disciples .

nama: Amaf efe férék kertau 12 yunjéf nénaflai Yesue sémta a yiyánjai yáne sáláme fétfét. 21 Amaf fáyo korayangé, "Yéndo njam mé yáne sálámero tiyánjangén, yénd so mer kamndan.
english: Behold , a woman who had a discharge of blood for twelve years came behind him , and touched the fringe of his garment ;
for she said within herself , “ If I just touch his garment , I will be made well .”

nama: Yesu nawengoi sémta a yinjoi, a norayai, "Mámé mwighé yau ném, tane mérés! Fenjo ndimbal mwighayam mer té niyáto." Amaf táfandio mer fété náyátoi.
english: But Jesus , turning around and seeing her , said , “ Daughter , cheer up ! Your faith has made you well .” And the woman was made well from that hour .

nama: Njam Yesu nényawai áumengégh méngo wanjengégh ároene méngo féyo ewinjoi buraré kembne téfnár a keye kutnawét yeyan sarake tafrotawét, 24 fá korayangé, "Kuwanongi. Mérés kér yau tém wénde kémégh yékém." Wénde yémofem turtawét. 25 Soramé ár mérén njam téndot nitérmboyénd, fá nénglawai kénjút a mérés yerai ngángayan, a yanoyéng. 26 Yénémamén si marat náyátoi yéné yuwon. Yesum mer eyáteyai sómbio ghékéf kwéfkwéf ár
english: When Jesus came into the ruler’s house and saw the flute players and the crowd in noisy disorder ,
he said to them , “ Make room, because the girl isn’ t dead, but sleeping .” They were ridiculing him .
But when the crowd was sent out , he entered in , took her by the hand , and the girl arose .
The report of this went out into all that land .

nama: Táf Yesu njam kétamé néngwanoi, sómbio ghékéf kwéfkwéf árém yáiteyayénd kutarwét, "Deifidene ambum, fene ghérghérsisé ayém téfefafǃ"
english: As Jesus passed by from there , two blind men followed him , calling out and saying , “ Have mercy on us , son of David !”

nama: Njam Yesu kényawetau méngot, sómbio ghékéf kwéfkwéf ár enérmén yáfaf, féyo yémo emotangeyai, "Fémofem efalo té yiyátot ndené yéndon yéné so yafrotan?" Yémofem yawangeyayénd, "Néméwét, Yuré."
english: When he had come into the house , the blind men came to him . Jesus said to them , “ Do you believe that I am able to do this ?” They told him , “ Yes , Lord .”

nama: Féyo yémo ewayanjangeyai yéfene ghékéf a norayai, "Féfenjo ndimbal mwighayan féfefaf yéné so nufrote." 30 Féyo yéfene ghékéf násáwéryénd. Yesum emndeyai taikrataye, "Yau táf ámb ároe taufrend yénémamén." 31 Wénde fá néngtoreyayénd a marat yiyáteyayénd yánemén méinyotio yéné yuwon.
english: Then he touched their eyes , saying , “ According to your faith be it done to you .”
Then their eyes were opened. Jesus strictly commanded them , saying , “ See that no one knows about this .”
But they went out and spread abroad his fame in all that land .

nama: Táf fá njam kétorwét, ámb ár yaufi mbérmbérafé a siofnar wéi yénmufaryénd Yesuefaf. 33 Táf yaufi mbérmbér yutoryéng, ár efe babé témorwén norayai. Féyo ár mérén sélngwél emormén a korayangi, "Ámb yau ndené yéfandamém Israil kénjún.
english: As they went out , behold , a mute man who was demon possessed was brought to him .
When the demon was cast out , the mute man spoke . The multitudes marveled , saying , “ Nothing like this has ever been seen in Israel !”

nama: Wénde Farasi ár korayawét, "Ménaye yaufi mbérmbérafene sénko ároene waftaye, yéné árom eutone ámb yaufi mbérmbér." Ásáfogh téfnár sem tárfárofnar
english: But the Pharisees said , “ By the prince of the demons , he casts out demons .”

nama: Yesu tiotau méinyotio tesen kénjúmé a méngotuamé, tawatametau áumengégh méngon, tangwawaitotau mer si Ngánján limánéghmén, a mer tangyátotau méinyotio fénaté enjne tambén. 36 Njam yémo ewinjoi ár mérén, fá ghérghérsisayam yifoi yéfefaf, ménamén fá tamorwén tárfár kértayan a wáutáréghofnar, ndenanit sif wanjengégh árofnar. 37 Féyo fá norayai yánjo waitogh árfefaf, "Yéné wau yu targhét siyém minde tárfár yém, wénde ásáfogh ár sem tárfárofnar. 38 Féyo yémotati yéné wau yu Yuré ménát so ewáfárete ásáfogh ár kétán yánjo wau yu ndau sifayat."
english: Jesus went about all the cities and the villages , teaching in their synagogues and preaching the Good News of the Kingdom, and healing every disease and every sickness among the people .
But when he saw the multitudes , he was moved with compassion for them because they were harassed and scattered , like sheep without a shepherd .
Then he said to his disciples , “ The harvest indeed is plentiful , but the laborers are few .
Pray therefore that the Lord of the harvest will send out laborers into his harvest .”

nama: Yesum emotai yánjo 12 waitogh ár yáfaftio a ewaramai yéfe muyé yaufi mbérmbér utorghét a ménát wéi mer yátoghét méinyotio fénaté enjneta. 2 Yéné fiyém yéfene yétkwén 12 Yesuene muyafé ár: fronde Saimon efe yanmotat Fité a yánngén Endru, Jems Jefediene ambum, a yánngén Jon, 3 Filif a Batolome, Tomas a Metyu mani kafégh ár, Jems Alfausene ambum, Tades, 4 Saimon efe ménde témorwén ndené Ju ár so kawanjetawét fáyo yau Rom waftayan a Judas Iskariot emo sén yérametam.
english: He called to himself his twelve disciples , and gave them authority over unclean spirits , to cast them out , and to heal every disease and every sickness .
Now the names of the twelve apostles are these . The first , Simon , who is called Peter ; Andrew, his brother; James the son of Zebedee ; John , his brother;
Philip ; Bartholomew; Thomas ; Matthew the tax collector ; James the son of Alphaeus; Lebbaeus , who was also called Thaddaeus ;
Simon the Zealot ; and Judas Iscariot , who also betrayed him .

nama: Yéné 12 ár Yesum ewatembai yéné wawéngsogh siafé: "Yau táf Téndo árfene kénjúmé engém o Samaria árfene tesenamé. 6 Kétán engém Israil árfene olingégh sifsif. 7 Njam fém engém a yéngwaitotati yéné si: 'Njafar limánégh siyém kaka yém!' 8 Enjneta mer engiyátoti, ewanotati kérta, engwawainati yaufi ghéngan, a engwifnati yaufi mbérmbér. Faiofnar fémofem té ewanangi, faiofnar tawaramangi.
english: Jesus sent these twelve out and commanded them , saying , “Don’ t go among the Gentiles , and don’ t enter into any city of the Samaritans .
Rather , go to the lost sheep of the house of Israel .
As you go , preach , saying , ‘ The Kingdom of Heaven is at hand !’
Heal the sick, cleanse the lepers , and cast out demons . Freely you received , so freely give .

nama: "Yau táf tawanangi ámb gol, silfé o kofa mani féfenjo yáfyáfén; 10 álighmén yáf yau tawanangi, o ámb sáláme, o sandol wéi wétu kés, ménamén ásáfogh árét ewamndat njamke.
english: Don’ t take any gold , silver, or brass in your money belts .
Take no bag for your journey , neither two coats , nor sandals , nor staff : for the laborer is worthy of his food .

nama: "Árké tesen o méngotu fém kufarngi, yéronjati ámb wanjengégh téfnár a emor yéné méngon kétánotio féfene áligh. 12 Njam méngo néngufanati, áuwégh si táf tawaramangi. 13 Yéné méngo árém njam taumyongi, féfene krufrát tawaramangi yéfe, táf yéné yau njam yém, yéné krufrát tangongi féfefafétio. 14 Táf ámb árém njam yau taumyongi o káyárangi féfene si, kafkaf ngwérméng tasénangi táf korongi yéné méngo o tesen. 15 Yéndon efalo ewaufrotan, mogh efghon, kérté yéné méngotuamé Sodom a Gomora so em ndimbal, wénde kérté yéné méngotuam sái ersat so ewaingét Sodom a Gomora tesen. Wasérmbogh so natiane
english: Into whatever city or village you enter , find out who in it is worthy, and stay there until you go on .
As you enter into the household , greet it .
If the household is worthy, let your peace come on it , but if it isn’ t worthy, let your peace return to you .
Whoever doesn’ t receive you or hear your words , as you go out of that house or that city , shake the dust off your feet .
Most certainly I tell you , it will be more tolerable for the land of Sodom and Gomorrah in the day of judgment than for that city .

nama: "Yéndon engwatembetan ndenanit sifsif yénau munjan ághafene kénjún em. Yénémaménnde mwighé sénté em ndené kamban kés a téfnofnar em ndenanit mamu.
english: “ Behold , I send you out as sheep among wolves . Therefore be wise as serpents and harmless as doves .

nama: "Kor aem! Yémofem so erametat Ju árfene moghfaf, a so efmotat yéfene áumengégh sifayan. 18 Tane téfnan fém so ersat limánégh árfefaf a warsagh árfefaf. Fém so nafrotati tane mer si yéfefaf a Téndo árfefaf. 19 Wénde yémofem njam kémerangi, yau táf mámé mwighé em némé so norayati o ndernáye so norayati. Yéné efghon féfeyot so tawaramangé némé si so norayati, 20 ménamén fémyo yau so norayati, wénde féfene Afé Ngánjánene Mbérmbér so noraye féfe kénjúmé.
english: But beware of men , for they will deliver you up to councils , and in their synagogues they will scourge you .
Yes , and you will be brought before governors and kings for my sake , for a testimony to them and to the nations .
But when they deliver you up , don’ t be anxious how or what you will say , for it will be given you in that hour what you will say .
For it is not you who speak , but the Spirit of your Father who speaks in you .

nama: "Yánafem so taramangi yánngénof ménát so tákmangi krot, a yárefafem yéfenjo ambum so ewafrotat ndenéyameyo, ambum wéi so kénawengongi yárefafefaf a krot tákmangi. 22 Méinyotio árém so méndméndat néfandat tanemén, wénde efe njam yakai taikrataye kétán kerker so kunjarngé. 23 Fém njam ámb tesenan ewasérmbotat, kenngongi ámb tesenfaf. Yéndon efalo emndetan, fémofem yau so tifongi féfenjo áligh yénamé tesenamé Israil kénjún njam Ároene Ambum nénangota.
english: “Brother will deliver up brother to death , and the father his child . Children will rise up against parents and cause them to be put to death .
You will be hated by all men for my name ’s sake , but he who endures to the end will be saved .
But when they persecute you in this city , flee into the next , for most certainly I tell you , you will not have gone through the cities of Israel until the Son of Man has come .

nama: "Waitogh ár yau yém tukén yáne watamegh ároefaf, a faiofnar ásáfogh ár yau yém tukén yáne yurafaf. 25 Waitogh ár siyém féyotaro yém sái kamndangé ndené yánjo watamegh ár wénde yau so yainde, a ndenéyameyo yém faiofnar ásáfogh ár yáne yurafaf. Táf mérén sénko téfnár njam té yémndetat Beljebul, wéi nderé minde yáne mérén wéi so ewasalitat! Yau férfér em némamén wénde Ngánjánefaf
english: “ A disciple is not above his teacher , nor a servant above his lord .
It is enough for the disciple that he be like his teacher , and the servant like his lord . If they have called the master of the house Beelzebul, how much more those of his household !

nama: "Yénémaménnde yau táf férfér em yéfenemén. Némé átnoghe yém so safét kufarngé, a méinyotio némé kwankwane em so mat náyátotat. 27 Némé yéndon norayan féfefaf kwéfitayan, korayangi efogh kwayaghayan, a némé ewawanjan féfene ténganan, nafrotati méngo séman.
english: Therefore don’t be afraid of them , for there is nothing covered that will not be revealed, or hidden that will not be known .
What I tell you in the darkness , speak in the light ; and what you hear whispered in the ear , proclaim on the housetops .

nama: "Yau férfér em yéfefaf emofem fifi so esmetat wénde yau so yésmetat mbérmbér. Wénde férfér aem Ngánjánefaf, emo so tawife mbérmbér a fifi kété kémboghofnar fésén. 29 Sómbio mbinj némbne manie so tatérnangend, wénde ámb yau so kuyangé mbandot Féferafane matofnar. 30 Ngánján mat yém njénamb síf em féfene sénkoyan. 31 Yénémaménnde yau férfér em. Fémofem ewaindati yéné némbnar men.
english: Don’ t be afraid of those who kill the body , but are not able to kill the soul . Rather , fear him who is able to destroy both soul and body in Gehenna.
“Aren’ t two sparrows sold for an assarion coin? Not one of them falls to the ground apart from your Father ’s will .
But the very hairs of your head are all numbered.
Therefore don’t be afraid . You are of more value than many sparrows .

nama: "Fém so noraye safénro kétán ámb árfefaf, "Yéndo efalo yiyátotan Yesu.' Njam fémo yafrota yéné, yéndo so témndan tane Afé njafaran, "Fá siyém tane waitogh ár." 33 Wénde njam fém noraya ámb árfefaf, "Yéndo yau efalo yiyátotan Yesu," yéndo so táf témndan tane Afé njafaran, 'Yénd mafina wém yéné ár. Fá yau yém tane waitogh ár." Árém so yuwetat Yesu mindefifi
english: Everyone therefore who confesses me before men , I will also confess him before my Father who is in heaven .
But whoever denies me before men , I will also deny him before my Father who is in heaven .

nama: "Fém yau ndené nemnati ndené yénd wénmormén krufrát yam yénérsamén mbandot! Yénd yau wénmormén yénérsamén krufrát yam, wénde witmafé sénté náifé. 35 Ménát yénd wénmormén sái ewengotan, 'ár yárefé tambén, mérés kétándmé yátmafe tambén, a yáki alé kétándmé yáki amaf tambén.
english: “Don’ t think that I came to send peace on the earth . I didn’ t come to send peace , but a sword .
For I came to set a man at odds against his father , and a daughter against her mother , and a daughter-in-law against her mother-in-law .

nama: Ároene mék téfnár so eném kétamé yánjo mérén kénjúta.'
english: A man’s foes will be those of his own household .

nama: "Árké árom njam uweta yárefé o yátmé mindefifi, wénde yáne uwégh siyém némbnar yém tayot, fá féyotarofnar yém ta waitoghét.
