Árké árom uweta yánjo ambum o mérés mindefifi, wénde yáne uwégh siyém némbnar yém tayot, fá féyotarofnar yém ta waitoghét. 38 Árké árom yau njam yérsa yánjo wafatarégh wén a waitota yénd, fá féyotarofnar yém ta waitoghét. 39 Árké árom njam yarawena yánjo ghérsé so yétarne, a emo njam yétarna yánjo ghérsé tane téfnan so tinjongé. Emofem ewáutánat Yesuene mérén so tawanangi mer fai
english: He who loves father or mother more than me is not worthy of me ; and he who loves son or daughter more than me isn’ t worthy of me .
He who doesn’ t take his cross and follow after me isn’ t worthy of me .
He who seeks his life will lose it ; and he who loses his life for my sake will find it .

nama: "Árké árom njam kémumyongé fém kwumyongé yénd, a árké árom kwumyongé yénd tumyongé fá emo yénd wénmáfáretam. 41 Árké árom njam tumyongé Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár ménamén fá Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár yém, so ndenéyameyo fai tawanangé Ngánjánene mat yátogh árfene kés yém. A árké árom njam tumyongé mbarkánd ár ménamén fá siyém mbarkánd ár, yémo so ndenéyameyo fai tawanangé mbarkánd ároene kés yém. 42 A njam árké árom tawaramangé mé krufrát kafusi nu yéfeyot ámb yéné ménd árét ménamén fá siyém tane waitogh ár, yéndon efalo ewaufrotan, yémo efaloe yau so yétarne yánjo fai."
english: “ He who receives you receives me , and he who receives me receives him who sent me .
He who receives a prophet in the name of a prophet will receive a prophet ’s reward . He who receives a righteous man in the name of a righteous man will receive a righteous man ’s reward .
Whoever gives one of these little ones just a cup of cold water to drink in the name of a disciple , most certainly I tell you , he will in no way lose his reward .”

nama: Soramé njam Yesum té yifoi wawéngsogh si yánjo 12 waitogh árfefaf, fá kétándmé nuwanoi watameghét a waitoghét tesenot Galili yu kénjún.
english: When Jesus had finished directing his twelve disciples , he departed from there to teach and preach in their cities .

nama: Njam Jon náyárai kwéfkwéf méngon némé Kerisom tawafrotau, yémo ewáfáretam yánjo waitogh ár, 3 ménát sái témotangayénd, "Némé fém yéné ném efe so kénmorwén, o yéndfem ámb ár so tanjetawém?
english: Now when John heard in the prison the works of Christ , he sent two of his disciples
and said to him , “ Are you he who comes , or should we look for another ?”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Ngangotangi a nafrotati Jonefaf némé fémofem náyáretati a yéfandati: 5 Ghékéf kwéfkwéf árém éregh yinjongi, njangén ár áligh nufngongi, efe tam yaufi ghénganafé ár frengégh yam té ewanangi, téngan méngu té náyárangi, kér ár té nanongi, a mer si siyém waitoghan yém yéfefaf yauyau árfefaf. 6 Emo njam efalo wiyátota a yau wékene, fá so yém frengéghkaf."
english: Jesus answered them , “ Go and tell John the things which you hear and see:
the blind receive their sight, the lame walk , the lepers are cleansed , the deaf hear, the dead are raised up , and the poor have good news preached to them .
Blessed is he who finds no occasion for stumbling in me .”

nama: Njamandio Jonene waitogh ár kuwanotawét, Yesum siot yiyátoi ár mérnafefaf yánemén Jon: "Némé ár sáf fém néngtor fanfne yuwot fandaghét? Tombé yus árké efénje mbormboram? 8 Yau njam, némé ár wét fém néngtoryénd fandaghét? Ár efe numaneta kwayaghé sáláme? Yau. Fá efe ewawo minde tukén sáláme sáf fá kété táf em warsagh ároene méngon. 9 Fém némat tangém fandaghét? Némé Ngánjánene mat yátogh ároefaf? Néméwét, yéndon emndetan, Joném ewainde méinyotio ámb Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár. 10 Yéné fiyém yánemén endenemén té yékai Bukan: 'Yéndon, Ngánjánam, so yéngwáfáretan tane si résagh ár fe frondeyo, emo so end yéfrende feyot.{d{ ...f* {d{11.10 Malaki 3:1 '
english: As these went their way , Jesus began to say to the multitudes concerning John , “ What did you go out into the wilderness to see ? A reed shaken by the wind?
But what did you go out to see ? A man in soft clothing? Behold , those who wear soft clothing are in kings ’ houses .
But why did you go out ? To see a prophet ? Yes , I tell you , and much more than a prophet .
For this is he , of whom it is written , ‘ Behold , I send my messenger before your face , who will prepare your way before you .’

nama: Yéndon efalo ewaufrotan féfe, Jon walitogh árém ewainde efe náráftaménd yéné mbandan. Wénde efe njam yém némbnar njafar limánéghan so taindangé Jon. 12 Kétamé Jon walitogh ároene efogh yénmormén yénanotio sénonjo, árém sémégh yafngoyénd njafar limánégh mámé kéraye, a muyé kér ro mék téfnáram yéta sifayé résaghét térametawét. 13 Kétánotio Jonene efogh méinyotio Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár a Mosesene nák korayawét njafar limánéghmén. 14 Fém njam ménde em tane si efalo yátoghét, Jon yéné yém Elaija efe so ténmorwén. 15 Fá efe yém ténganafé, so náyárete.
english: Most certainly I tell you , among those who are born of women there has not arisen anyone greater than John the Baptizer; yet he who is least in the Kingdom of Heaven is greater than he .
From the days of John the Baptizer until now , the Kingdom of Heaven suffers violence, and the violent take it by force.
For all the prophets and the law prophesied until John .
If you are willing to receive it , this is Elijah , who is to come .
He who has ears to hear, let him hear.

nama: "Némayafé yéndon yéné ár saté so etémndan? Fá ndenanit em marat sifayamé ambumtértéram yénau emotat ámb ambumtértér:
english: “ But to what shall I compare this generation ? It is like children sitting in the marketplaces, who call to their companions

nama: 'Yénd té kambnam buraraye féfeyot, a fém yau kerémndati; yéndfem kér téménd wagh taufanam wénde fém yau kendati.'
english: and say , ‘ We played the flute for you , and you didn’t dance . We mourned for you , and you didn’t lament .’

nama: "Ménát yau Jon yénmormén mer njamke a wéri nu nénet, a fá korayawét, 'Fá yaufi mbérmbérafé yém. 19 Ároene Ambum yénmormén njamke a nu nénet, fá korayangi, 'Yéné siyém njamke amanjaréghan a wéri nu néneyan mindefifi; fá yém mani kafégh ár a yaufiyam árfene fútar.' Wénde Ngánjánene káfeté mwighé yuyafote yánjo yam wafroghan." O awengoghofnaye tesen
english: For John came neither eating nor drinking , and they say , ‘ He has a demon .’
The Son of Man came eating and drinking , and they say , ‘ Behold , a gluttonous man and a drunkard , a friend of tax collectors and sinners!’ But wisdom is justified by her children .”

nama: Féyo Yesu usérmbogh ewafngoi yéné tesenmén ánde yémon tárfár sélngwélafé yam tawafrotau yéné yuwomé, ménamén fá yau kawengotawét yaufiyam tambén. 21 "O feyot Korasinǃ O feyot Betsaidaǃ Yéndo té tawafrotawén sélngwélafé yam féfefafmé, wénde fém yau yaufita kawengotawét. Táf yéndo ndené sélngwélafé yam njam té tawafrotawén féfefafmé Tairen a Sidonén, fá so tándái kawengotawét yéfenjo yaufiyamta saghé umaneghe a fak awafaréghe. 22 Wénde yéndon fém emndetan, soramé mogh efghon Taire a Sidon kérté sái tawanangi so em ndimbal, wénde kérté fémofem sái tawinjongi so tawaindangi yéfene. 23 A fém, Káfenam, so nuyote kétán njafar tukét? Yau! Fém so newone kétán kémboghofnar yékwot. Táf yéndo ndené sélngwélafé yam njam té tawafrotawén fefaf kété Sodomén, yéné mé táf so kufrotau sénonjo tawétio. 24 Wénde yéndon fém emndetan, soramé mogh efghon, Sodomém kérté sái tanangé so yém ndimbal, wénde kérté fémofem sái tawinjongi so tawaindangi yéfene. Taném tafaf enaghét
english: Then he began to denounce the cities in which most of his mighty works had been done , because they didn’ t repent .
“ Woe to you , Chorazin ! Woe to you , Bethsaida! For if the mighty works had been done in Tyre and Sidon which were done in you , they would have repented long ago in sackcloth and ashes .
But I tell you , it will be more tolerable for Tyre and Sidon on the day of judgment than for you .
You , Capernaum , who are exalted to heaven , you will go down to Hades. For if the mighty works had been done in Sodom which were done in you , it would have remained until today .
But I tell you that it will be more tolerable for the land of Sodom on the day of judgment , than for you .”

nama: Yéné efghon Yesu norayai, "Yéndon némuyotan fém, Afé, Yuré njafarmén a mband maratmén, ménamén fémo té etnoi yéné rokarmén fifi kétándmé yéné árfeta efe em káfeté mwighafé a matyamafé, wénde fém mat kénmorwén a safét tawakmetau yéfe ménd ár efe némbnar ambumtértérnit em. 26 Néméwét, Afé, yéné témorwén fene méndeyan ufroghét.
english: At that time , Jesus answered , “ I thank you , Father , Lord of heaven and earth , that you hid these things from the wise and understanding, and revealed them to infants .
Yes , Father , for so it was well-pleasing in your sight .

nama: "Méinyotio yam té eramai tafaf tane Afam. Efe ámb yau mat yém Ambumoenemén mé Afaro, a efe ámb yau mat yém Afanemén mé Ambumro a ár efe Ambumom ewafene yandio afroghét.
english: All things have been delivered to me by my Father . No one knows the Son , except the Father ; neither does anyone know the Father , except the Son and he to whom the Son desires to reveal him .

nama: "Efe em sakér kérté résaghmén, eném tafaf, yéndon so tawaraman enagh. 29 Ewafrotati némat yéndo emndetan wafroghét. Káyárangi tane sifaf a mat káyátongi tafaf némé yém efalo. Ménamén yénd wém mer yamafé a métar tikéf kénjún, a fémofem táf so tinjongi enagh féfene tikfan. 30 Ménamén yéndo yau so tamndan ménát so ewafrotati yam árké em minde táikér. Yéndo yau so tamndan ménát sái ersati ámb rokar árkéméné em minde kérté féfeyot.
english: “ Come to me , all you who labor and are heavily burdened , and I will give you rest.
Take my yoke upon you and learn from me , for I am gentle and humble in heart ; and you will find rest for your souls .
For my yoke is easy , and my burden is light .”

nama: Yéné efghon Yesu tiyotawéng ámb flawé ndawamé Safatan. Yáne waitogh ár siogham ewifoi, féyo flawé mbwe férarégh engwafngoyénd a tánetawét. 2 Njam Farasi árém ewinjoyénd yénayan, fá norayayénd Yesuefaf, "Kéreta! Fene waitogh árém kés yafrotat téfene nákam yatne Safatan.
english: At that time , Jesus went on the Sabbath day through the grain fields . His disciples were hungry and began to pluck heads of grain and to eat .
But the Pharisees , when they saw it , said to him , “ Behold , your disciples do what is not lawful to do on the Sabbath .”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Fémofem yau yaftaménd némé Deifidém yafrotam yéné kwéfon njam fá a yánjo mérnafé siogh tamorwén? 4 Deifid nélawai Ngánjánene méngot, a fá a yánjo mérén yérafnaménd nák a enetaménd árké témorwén Ngánjánefaf wateghkaf féskaf flawé yéfendro ghéngén wárogh árétro yéné féskaf flawé nénet. 5 A fémofem yaftaménd Mosesene nákan ndené Safatan ghéngén wárogh téfnáram wáwefnogh méngon túmén Safat nák tarafnawét, wénde fá téfnofnar tamorwén. 6 Yéndon emndetan, yéna yém ár efe yém ndimbalfifi, yau wáwefnogh méngo. 7 Buk si noraye, 'Yénd, Ngánján, ménde wém ghérghérsisé, yau ghéngénghéngén.' Fém njam mat tamorwén yáne fifi némé yém, fémofem yau so emndetati ndené fá yaufi ár em efe em téfnofnar. 8 Ároene Ambum siyém Safat Yuré yém." Ngángé aknyégh ár
english: But he said to them , “Haven’ t you read what David did when he was hungry , and those who were with him :
how he entered into God ’s house and ate the show bread, which was not lawful for him to eat , nor for those who were with him , but only for the priests ?
Or have you not read in the law that on the Sabbath day the priests in the temple profane the Sabbath and are guiltless?
But I tell you that one greater than the temple is here .
But if you had known what this means , ‘ I desire mercy , and not sacrifice ,’ you wouldn’ t have condemned the guiltless.
For the Son of Man is Lord of the Sabbath .”

nama: Yesum yéngéfrangoi yéné sifayé a néngwanoi kétán áumengégh méngot. 10 Yéné méngon ngángé aknyégh ár témorwén. Ámb Farasi ár namotayénd Yesuefaf, "Té nákam yumyote ár ménaye sái ár mer eyátotat Safatan?" Fá ménde tamorwén sái Yesu tanangayénd moghét.
english: He departed from there and went into their synagogue .
And behold , there was a man with a withered hand . They asked him , “ Is it lawful to heal on the Sabbath day ?” so that they might accuse him .

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Fém njam sifafé em a ámb sif kélawangé yékwét Safatan? So fémofem terangi a ténmurtongi kétamé yékwta? A so fété yafrotati. 12 Ár siyém ndimbalfifi, ndené yau sif kés yém. Féyo yénémamén, yénd téfene nákam yénmumyote ár wáutárghét Safatan."
english: He said to them , “ What man is there among you who has one sheep , and if this one falls into a pit on the Sabbath day , won’ t he grab on to it and lift it out ?
Of how much more value then is a man than a sheep ! Therefore it is lawful to do good on the Sabbath day .”

nama: Táf fété yémon norayayéng ngángé aknyégh ároefaf, "Tawalinjo fene ngángé mbarkánde." Yémon ewalinjoi ngángé merafayo, ndené fété ámb ngángé kés tamorwén. 14 Féyo Farasi ár néwanoyénd a mwighé ronjagh ewafngoyénd Yesue ngiot. Ngánjánene waferégh ásáfogh ár
english: Then he told the man, “ Stretch out your hand .” He stretched it out ; and it was restored whole , just like the other .
But the Pharisees went out and conspired against him , how they might destroy him .

nama: Yesum mat náyátoi kwankwane mwighé farorégh, féyo fá néngwanoi yéné sifayata, a tárfár ár mérnam yaitoyénd Yesu. Yémon mer táyátotau méinyotio fá efe enjnefé tamorwén. 16 Yesum emndai yéné ár, "Yau táf tawaufrongi ámb árét tanemén." 17 Yémon yéné yafrotam ménát némé Ngánján té norayai mat yátogh ár Aisaya kénjúmé efalo náyátoi:
english: Jesus , perceiving that , withdrew from there . Great multitudes followed him ; and he healed them all ,
and commanded them that they should not make him known ,
that it might be fulfilled which was spoken through Isaiah the prophet , saying ,

nama: "Yéné fiyém tane ásáfogh ár, efe yéndon té yaferyén, yéndon efe yuwetan, a endefaf yénd náuwetan. Yéndo so tasurén tane Mbérmbér yáfaf, a yémon so mat eyátote tane moghmén méinyotio yuwomé.
english: “ Behold , my servant whom I have chosen , my beloved in whom my soul is well pleased . I will put my Spirit on him . He will proclaim justice to the nations .

nama: Fá yau so néwit o nutne, o fá yau marate so néngutne endmé.
english: He will not strive , nor shout , neither will anyone hear his voice in the streets .

nama: Yémon yau so ghérnat tékofem eráfne, o yau so umbértoghétro fés tumbértongé. Kétánotio yémon so taindangé moghan yaufi,
english: He won’ t break a bruised reed . He won’ t quench a smoking flax , until he leads justice to victory .

nama: a méinyotio mband maratan ár kamnang so em yáfaf."{e{ ...f* {e{12.21 Aisaya 42:1-4 Yesu a Beljebul
english: In his name , the nations will hope .”

nama: Ámb árém ténérsawét Yesuefaf efe kwéfkwéf ár témorwén babé ár efe yau korayau ménamén fá yaufi mbérmbérafé témorwén. Yesum yéné ár mer yiyátoi, táf fété si nufngoi a néretai. 23 Ár mérén sélngwél emormén a norayayénd, "Fété fá yém Deifidene ambum?"
english: Then one possessed by a demon, blind and mute , was brought to him ; and he healed him , so that the blind and mute man both spoke and saw.
All the multitudes were amazed , and said , “ Can this be the son of David ?”

nama: Njam Farasi ár náyárayénd yéné si, a norayayénd, "Yémon ewifne yaufi mbérmbér Beljebulene waftaye, yaufi mbérmbérafene sénko ár."
english: But when the Pharisees heard it , they said , “ This man does not cast out demons except by Beelzebul, the prince of the demons .”

nama: Yesu mat náyátoi némé fá kemnawét, féyo fá norayai yéfefaf, "Ndimbal yu njam kafalongé so nawasérmbote. A ndimbal tesen o mérén njam kafalongi yau so ewakai. 26 Njam Sáifram yifna yaufi mbérmbér, Sáiféroene mérén so kafalongé fénataye, ndernáye so yakai yáne yu? 27 Fém norayati ndené yéndon ewifnan yaufi mbérmbér Beljebulene waftaye, emo féfene waitogh árét wafté tawaramangé wifarghét? Némé féfene waitogh árém ewafrotat yiyátote ndené fém em unyégh ár. 28 Yau, Beljebulene waftaye yau, wénde Ngánján Mbérmbéram wafté kwaramangé yaufi mbérmbér wifarghét. Yénayam efalo yiyátote ndené Ngánján limánégh té téném féfefaf yém.
english: Knowing their thoughts , Jesus said to them , “ Every kingdom divided against itself is brought to desolation, and every city or house divided against itself will not stand .
If Satan casts out Satan , he is divided against himself . How then will his kingdom stand ?
If I by Beelzebul cast out demons , by whom do your children cast them out ? Therefore they will be your judges .
But if I by the Spirit of God cast out demons , then God ’s Kingdom has come upon you .

nama: "Efe ár yau so kényawangé ndimbal muyafé ároene méngo kénjún rokar résaghét táfandro yémon njam fronde yumbeta ángéghe ndimbal muyafé ár. Féyo táf yémon so méinyotio rokar tawanangé yáne méngota.
english: Or how can one enter into the house of the strong man and plunder his goods , unless he first bind the strong man ? Then he will plunder his house .

nama: "Árké ár efe yau yém tafaf fá siyém yéndfé asénánégh ár; emofé yéndfé yau eumendam ár, fá siyém wirorégh ár. 31 Yéndon ewaufrotan, méinyotio árfene yaufiyam a yaufi si, Ngánján so tawalindangé, wénde emon njam noraya sotafé yaufi si Ngánján Mbérmbéroefaf, yau so tawalindangé yéné yaufi. 32 Emon njam noraya yaufi si Ároene Ambumoefaf, Ngánján féyotaro so tawalindangé, wénde emo njam yaufi si noraya Ngánján Mbérmbéroefaf, Ngánján yau so tawalindangé sénonjo o soramé. Wén a yáne mbwe
english: “ He who is not with me is against me , and he who doesn’ t gather with me , scatters .
Therefore I tell you , every sin and blasphemy will be forgiven men , but the blasphemy against the Spirit will not be forgiven men .
Whoever speaks a word against the Son of Man , it will be forgiven him ; but whoever speaks against the Holy Spirit , it will not be forgiven him , either in this age, or in that which is to come .

nama: "Njam wén yém mer, so efune mer mbwe, a njam wén yém yaufi, so efune yaufi mbwe. Árém efande wén mbwe a mat náyátote némé yéné wén mer yém o yaufi. 34 Fém kamban, fém yaufi ár. Fém ndernáye so norayati mer si? Mbírmbír norayat némé tikéf afoghare yém. 35 Mer árom efune mer yam mer tikéfta, a yaufi árom efune yaufiyam yaufi tikéfta.
english: “ Either make the tree good and its fruit good , or make the tree corrupt and its fruit corrupt ; for the tree is known by its fruit .
You offspring of vipers , how can you , being evil , speak good things ? For out of the abundance of the heart , the mouth speaks .
The good man out of his good treasure brings out good things , and the evil man out of his evil treasure brings out evil things .

nama: "Yéndon ewaufrotan féfe yénémamén, mogh efghon méinyotio árém so nafrotat némamén fá korayawét méinyotio fifiofnar si. 37 Ngánjánam so emote féfenjo simén, tamndangé mbarkánd o moghan so takmangé." Yémofem yémotayénd Yesu ufarogh yamot
english: I tell you that every idle word that men speak , they will give account of it in the day of judgment .
For by your words you will be justified , and by your words you will be condemned .”

nama: Ámb nák watamegh ár a ámb Farasi árém norayayénd, "Watamegh ár, yénd ménde yéném sélngwélafé yam tafrota téfe fandaghét."
english: Then certain of the scribes and Pharisees answered , “ Teacher , we want to see a sign from you .”

nama: Yesu norayai, "Nderé yaufi a ngánjánofnar ár mérén yéné sénonjo efoghmén em! Fémofem wémotangi ufarogh yam wafroghét? Yau! Mé yáne ufarogh yamro féfeyot so tawaraman Jona Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár. 40 Jona nambio efogh a sémbár yékmangérmén ndimbal wagifoene fút kénjún, ndené endeyo Ároene Ambum so wéi nambio efogh a sémbár mbéwé méngon yém. 41 Mogh efghon ár Ninéfamén so kokayongi yéné ár satafaf a so emronat, ménamén ár Ninéfan té nawengongi yaufiyamta Jonane si waitoghan; yéndon ewaufrotan féfeyot ndené ámb ár yéna yém ndimbalfifi, yau kor ndené Jona. Fém wéi so kawengongi yaufiyam. 42 Mogh efghon Warsagh amaf Sefamén so kokayongé yéné ár satafaf a emronat, ménamén fá ténmorwén kétamé nayu yánjo ndimbal yuta ménát Warsagh ár Solomonene káfeté mwighé áyárghét; yéndon ewaufrotan féfeyot ndené ámb ár yéna yém ndimbalfifi, yau kor ndené Solomon! Yaufi mbérmbér kor wéi nénangoi
english: But he answered them , “ An evil and adulterous generation seeks after a sign , but no sign will be given to it but the sign of Jonah the prophet .
For as Jonah was three days and three nights in the belly of the huge fish, so will the Son of Man be three days and three nights in the heart of the earth .
The men of Nineveh will stand up in the judgment with this generation and will condemn it , for they repented at the preaching of Jonah ; and behold , someone greater than Jonah is here .

The Queen of the South will rise up in the judgment with this generation and will condemn it , for she came from the ends of the earth to hear the wisdom of Solomon ; and behold , someone greater than Solomon is here .

nama: "Njam yaufi mbérmbér kéntorngé ár tambén, fá nguwanongé fanfne yuwot sifayé ronjaghét enaghét. Yau njam sifayé tinjongé, 44 fáyo so korayangé, 'Yénd so nangotan tanjo méngot.' Féyo fá néngangote a tinjongé méngo sotro, mer a frengéghkaf. 45 Féyo yaufi mbérmbér kuwanongé tanwasrongé ámb 7 yaufi mbérmbér efe em minde yaufi yaindat fá, féyo kélawangi a kámnjongi kété. Yéné soramé ároene ghérsé siyém minde mámáfi kétándmé fronde ndernáye témorwén. Yéné fiyém némé so ufroghan yém yéné yaufi ár satafaf." Yesuene yátmé a yánngnéf
english: “ When an unclean spirit has gone out of a man , he passes through waterless places seeking rest, and doesn’ t find it .
Then he says , ‘ I will return into my house from which I came ;’ and when he has come back , he finds it empty , swept , and put in order .

Then he goes and takes with himself seven other spirits more evil than he is , and they enter in and dwell there . The last state of that man becomes worse than the first . Even so will it be also to this evil generation .”

nama: Yesu mé korayau árfefaf njam yátmé a yánngnéf nufaryénd. Fá nokayoyénd téndota, namotayénd yémafé siot. 47 Ámb árom yaufroi yá, "Kéreta, fene amé a fenngnéf ewakai téndon, a fá ménde em fémafé siot."
english: While he was yet speaking to the multitudes , behold , his mother and his brothers stood outside , seeking to speak to him .
One said to him , “ Behold , your mother and your brothers stand outside , seeking to speak to you .”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Efe yém tane amé? Efe em tane nénngnéf?" 49 Féyo yémon táf euyafoi yáne waitogh ár a korayangé, "Kéretangi! Fá em tane amé a tane nénngnéf! 50 Árké árom njam yafrota tane njafarmén Afane ménde, fá fem tane nénngnéf a tane mérés a tane amé."
english: But he answered him who spoke to him , “ Who is my mother ? Who are my brothers?”
He stretched out his hand toward his disciples , and said , “ Behold , my mother and my brothers!
For whoever does the will of my Father who is in heaven , he is my brother, and sister, and mother .”

nama: Yéné efghonyo Yesum yéfrangoi méngo a néngaflai a námnjoi arakaf téndota watameghét. 2 Tárfár ár mérén náumendaménd a yarendayénd Yesu. Yéné téfnan Yesu naflai a nuflai boutot, a námnjoi kété a ár tawakayongérwén arakaf téndomé. 3 Fá korayau árfefaf tárfár yammén rengerenge sie:
english: On that day Jesus went out of the house and sat by the seaside.
Great multitudes gathered to him , so that he entered into a boat and sat ; and all the multitude stood on the beach.
He spoke to them many things in parables , saying , “ Behold , a farmer went out to sow .

nama: Njam yémon mbwe tatarnau, ámb kuitawét endmé a men tanmorwén a tanetawét. 5 Ámb kuitawét wím éreéreghat mbandot, ánde némbne mband témorwén. Mbwe wéke afiyarégh nufngoyénd, ménamén mband yau témorwén kénjkam. 6 Wénde njam efogh waftayam ewerai, wén éruyagh nufngoyénd, a kér emormén ménamén yéfene sérémb yau niyayénd kénjút. 7 Ámb mbwe kuitawét yus wétfaf, yus kanotawét a wétam takuindawét. 8 Ámb mbwe kuitawét mer mbandot, nanotaménd kwéki, ámb 100, ámb 60 a ámb 30. 9 Efe njam ténganafé yém áyárghét, fá so káyárangé."
english: As he sowed , some seeds fell by the roadside, and the birds came and devoured them .
Others fell on rocky ground , where they didn’ t have much soil , and immediately they sprang up , because they had no depth of earth .
When the sun had risen , they were scorched . Because they had no root , they withered away .
Others fell among thorns. The thorns grew up and choked them .
Others fell on good soil and yielded fruit : some one hundred times as much, some sixty , and some thirty .
He who has ears to hear, let him hear.”

nama: Yáne waitogh ár enmormén Yesuefaf a yémndayénd, "Némamén fém noraye árfefaf rengerenge sie?"
english: The disciples came , and said to him , “ Why do you speak to them in parables ?”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Kwankwane mat njafar limánéghmén féfe té ewaufroyén, wénde yéfe yau. 12 Njam ámb ároefaf matyam yém, Ngánjánam so taramangé tárfár matyam. Wénde njam ámb ároefaf yau yém matyam, Ngánjánam so takawangé yáyot némé némbnar yáne yém. 13 Yéné téfnan yénd norayan rengerenge sie yéfefaf: "Fété néretat, wénde yau yéfandat, fété náyáretat, wénde yau náyáretat o mat yau náyátotat.
english: He answered them , “ To you it is given to know the mysteries of the Kingdom of Heaven , but it is not given to them .
For whoever has , to him will be given , and he will have abundance ; but whoever doesn’t have , from him will be taken away even that which he has .
Therefore I speak to them in parables , because seeing they don’t see, and hearing, they don’t hear, neither do they understand .

nama: "Aisayane mat yátogh si némé témorwén efalo náyátoi yéfenemén, 'Fém so túmén náyáretati, wénde mat yau so kamndangi, fém so túmén néretati, wénde yau so mat náyátotati.
english: In them the prophecy of Isaiah is fulfilled, which says , ‘ By hearing you will hear, and will in no way understand ; Seeing you will see , and will in no way perceive ;

nama: Ménamén yéné árfene tikéf namndai táikér, a yéfene téngan yau kor náyáretat, a yémofem té eumbértongi ghékéf. Yéfene ghékfam yau so yéfandat, yéfene ténganam yau so náyáretat, a yéfene tikfam yau so mat tiyátongé, a fá yau so kawengongi tafaf, a yéndo so mer táyáton fá.'{f{ ...f* {f{13.15 Aisaya 6:9,10
english: for this people ’s heart has grown callous, their ears are dull of hearing , and they have closed their eyes ; or else perhaps they might perceive with their eyes , hear with their ears , understand with their heart , and would turn again , and I would heal them .’ + 13:15 Isaiah 6:9-10

nama: "Wénde féfene ghékéf em frengégh ménamén yémofem té yinjongi, a féfene téngan wéi em frengégh ménamén yémofem náyárangi. 17 Efalo yéndon ewaufrotan féfe, tárfár Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár a mbarkánd ár minde ménde tamorwén winjoghét némé fémofem yinjongi, wénde yau yinjongi, a náyárangi némé fém náyárangi, wénde yau náyárangi.
english: “ But blessed are your eyes , for they see; and your ears , for they hear.
For most certainly I tell you that many prophets and righteous men desired to see the things which you see , and didn’t see them ; and to hear the things which you hear, and didn’t hear them .

nama: "Káyárangi némé ndau téfnárane rengerenge kémbun yém: 19 Njam efe náyáreta njafar limánéghmén si a yau mat kamndangé, yaufi ár kénuwanongé a si tawanangé némé taitau yáne tikfan. Yéné siyém mbwe árkéméné tatarnau endmé. 20 Árké mbwe kuitawét wím éreéreghat mbandot, yéné ár fiyém efe náyárete si a tanangé áuwéghafé. 21 Wénde ménamén yéfene sérémb yau, yéfene akegh yau teke. Njam kérté a wasérmbogh yéném ménamén si téfnan, fá wékero kuyangi. 22 Árké mbwe kuitawét wétwét sifayan, yéné ár eufane efe si káyárangi, wénde mband mwighayam ewafote, mani mwighayam ewawinde a ámb rokarot. Árké ménáyam si njangénnjangén tiyátongé mbwefnarot. 23 Wénde árké mbwe mer mbandot nuyáyénd, fá fiyém efe si náyárai a sioene fifi yanayéng. Yéné ár sáfam efunat 100, ámb 60, ámb ndené 30." Rengerenge si yaufi yusmén
english: “Hear, then , the parable of the farmer.
When anyone hears the word of the Kingdom and doesn’ t understand it , the evil one comes and snatches away that which has been sown in his heart . This is what was sown by the roadside.
What was sown on the rocky places, this is he who hears the word and immediately with joy receives it ;
yet he has no root in himself , but endures for a while . When oppression or persecution arises because of the word , immediately he stumbles.
What was sown among the thorns, this is he who hears the word , but the cares of this age and the deceitfulness of riches choke the word , and he becomes unfruitful.
What was sown on the good ground , this is he who hears the word and understands it , who most certainly bears fruit and produces , some one hundred times as much, some sixty , and some thirty .”

nama: Yesu korayau ámb rengerenge si: "Njafar limánégh siyém ndenanit árom tátárnau mer mbwe yánjo ndawan. 25 Ámb sémbár, njam méinyotio ár kémégh tákmangérwén, yáne mék téfnár néwanoi a yégh ewafngoi yaufi mbwe mer mbwe kénjún a néwanoi. 26 Njam mer mbwe afiyarégh nufngoyénd a sénko ufrogh nufngoyénd, a ndenéyameyo yaufi mbwe anogh nufngoyénd.
english: He set another parable before them , saying , “ The Kingdom of Heaven is like a man who sowed good seed in his field,
but while people slept , his enemy came and sowed darnel weeds also among the wheat , and went away.
But when the blade sprang up and produced grain , then the darnel weeds appeared also .

nama: "Ndau yurane faiofnar ásáfogh ár nénaflayénd yáfaf a témndangé, 'Ndimbal, fémon taite mer mbwe fene ndawan. Árkandmé yéné yaufi yus taném?'
english: The servants of the householder came and said to him , ‘ Sir , didn’ t you sow good seed in your field? Where did these darnel weeds come from ?’

nama: "Yémon ewawangoi, 'Mék téfnárom yéné tafrote.' Faiofnar ásáfogh árém témotangi, 'Fém ménde téném yénd so yénngém yaufi yus rufghét?'
english: “ He said to them , ‘ An enemy has done this .’ “ The servants asked him , ‘ Do you want us to go and gather them up ?’

nama: "Yémon ewawangoi, 'Yau, ménamén njam fémofem erufetati yaufi yus mété mer mbweyafé erufetati. 30 Taurend mérne anoghét kétánotio tarégh. Yéné efghon yéndo so tamndan wauyu ásáfogh ár, "Fronde kafégh yaufi yus a umbégh sute ménát wakrarghét, a féyo umbégh mer mbwe résagh wembégh méngo kénjút."'" Rengerenge si némbne mbwemén a fak flawé minaghmén
english: “ But he said , ‘ No , lest perhaps while you gather up the darnel weeds , you root up the wheat with them .

Let both grow together until the harvest , and in the harvest time I will tell the reapers , “ First , gather up the darnel weeds , and bind them in bundles to burn them ; but gather the wheat into my barn.”’”

nama: Yesum tawaufrotau ámb rengerenge si: "Njafar limánégh siyém ndenanit némbne mbwe, árom yénau tiangé yánjo ndawan. 32 Ndemamén némbne mbwe yém, wénde njam tiangé, minde ndimbal ndaumén njamke téfén káyátongé a wén kamndangé, kafe ewatene ánde menam njén erametat."
english: He set another parable before them , saying , “ The Kingdom of Heaven is like a grain of mustard seed which a man took , and sowed in his field,
which indeed is smaller than all seeds . But when it is grown , it is greater than the herbs and becomes a tree , so that the birds of the air come and lodge in its branches .”

nama: Yesum ámb rengerenge si tawaufrotau yéfeyot, "Njafar limánégh siyém ndenanit fak flawé minaghmén. Amafom yanai ámb fak a yanjmetam ámbiro ndimbal flawé baikafé kétánotio néminam ndimbal náyátoyéng."
english: He spoke another parable to them . “ The Kingdom of Heaven is like yeast which a woman took and hid in three measures of meal, until it was all leavened .”

nama: Yesum tawaufrotau méinyotio yéné rokarmén ár mérnat rengerenge siero; fá yau korayau yéfefaf rengerenge siofnaye. 35 Yéné efalo kufrotawéng némat Ngánjánene mat yátogh árom korayau: "Yéndo so tane sénfne tésawérén rengerenge siot, Yéndo so ewaufrotan yéfeyot warambnogh yammén kétándmayo yu ufrogh." Rengerenge si yaufi yus waferéghmén
english: Jesus spoke all these things in parables to the multitudes ; and without a parable , he didn’ t speak to them ,
that it might be fulfilled which was spoken through the prophet , saying , “ I will open my mouth in parables ; I will utter things hidden from the foundation of the world.” + 13:35 Psalms 78:2

nama: Féyo Yesum engéfrangoi ár mérén a néngaflai méngot. Yáne waitogh ár néngaflayénd yáfaf a témndangi, "Ténmawafer téfé rengerenge sioene fifi yaufi yusmén ndau kénjún."
english: Then Jesus sent the multitudes away, and went into the house . His disciples came to him , saying , “ Explain to us the parable of the darnel weeds of the field.”

nama: Yémon ewawangoi, "Yéné ár emo mer mbwe eite siyém Ároene Ambum. 38 Yéné ndau siyém mband marat a mer mbwe sem njafar limánéghmén ár; yaufi yus sem Yaufi ároene ár; 39 yéné mék téfnár emo eite yaufi yus yém Sáifér. Yéné árnogh siyém wauyu mband yatoghmén, a wau yu ásáfogh ár em njafar si résagh ár. 40 Yaufi yus taumendawét a tawarotawét fésén, ndenéyameyo so nufrote kété kerker efghon. 41 Ároene Ambumom so tawáfáretangé yánjo njafar si résagh ár a yémofem so tautorngi kétándmé yáne limánéghta méinyotio fá emofem emeindat ár yaufiot a méinyotio emofem yaufiyam ewafrotat. 42 Yémofem so ewitat fá kétán kémboghofnar fését, kété ye so nendat a sén ekérnat. 43 Féyo mbarkánd ár so katremngongi efoghnit yéfene Afane limánégh yuwon. Fá efe ténganafé em, fá yéné si so náyáretat. Rengerenge si ténogh ngonjél a ndindi mbwe
english: He answered them , “ He who sows the good seed is the Son of Man ,
the field is the world , the good seeds are the children of the Kingdom, and the darnel weeds are the children of the evil one .
The enemy who sowed them is the devil . The harvest is the end of the age, and the reapers are angels.
As therefore the darnel weeds are gathered up and burned with fire ; so will it be at the end of this age.
The Son of Man will send out his angels, and they will gather out of his Kingdom all things that cause stumbling and those who do iniquity,
and will cast them into the furnace of fire . There will be weeping and gnashing of teeth .
Then the righteous will shine like the sun in the Kingdom of their Father . He who has ears to hear, let him hear.

nama: "Njafar limánégh siyém ndenanit ténogh ngonjél yénau mband kénjún yém. Njam árom tinjongé, yémon wéikor so yiyatote mbandan, a féyo yáne áuwéghan fá so kuwanongé a etérna méinyotio yáne némé em, a tanangé yéné mband.
english: “ Again , the Kingdom of Heaven is like treasure hidden in the field, which a man found and hid . In his joy , he goes and sells all that he has and buys that field.

nama: Wéikor Yesu norayai njafar limánégh siyém ndenanit yém. Térarégh ár yénau kuwanongé tukén faimén ndindi mbwe ronjaghét. 46 Njam tinjongé minde tukén faimén ndindi mbwe, fá so kuwanongé a etérna méinyotio yáne némé em, a tanangé yéné ndindi mbwe. Rengerenge si netmén
english: “ Again , the Kingdom of Heaven is like a man who is a merchant seeking fine pearls ,
who having found one pearl of great price, he went and sold all that he had and bought it .

nama: "Ndenéyameyo, njafar limánégh siyém ndenanit net yénau yamang sawan a nawametat fénaté sáfot wagif. 48 Njam net nafoyéng, wagif rényégh árém wagifafé yurtoyénd tunat. Féyo fá námnjoyénd mer wagif waferghét yáfén flighét, wénde ewitaménd mámáfi. 49 Ndenéyameyo so fiyém mband marat yatoghan: njafar si résagh ár so eném yaufi ár faloghét kétándmé mbarkánd árta 50 a so ewitat yaufi ár kétán kémboghofnar fését, kété so yém ye a sén kérarégh."
english: “ Again , the Kingdom of Heaven is like a dragnet that was cast into the sea and gathered some fish of every kind ,
which , when it was filled , fishermen drew up on the beach. They sat down and gathered the good into containers, but the bad they threw away .
So it will be in the end of the world. The angels will come and separate the wicked from among the righteous ,
and will cast them into the furnace of fire . There will be weeping and gnashing of teeth .”

nama: Yesum emotai, "Fém mat té namndangi yéné méinyotio yammén?" Yémofem yawangoyénd, "O."
english: Jesus said to them , “ Have you understood all these things ?” They answered him, “ Yes , Lord.”

nama: Fá norayai yéfefaf, "Yéné sioene fifi ndené yém méinyotio nák watamegh ár efe njam kénamndangi waitogh ár njafar limánégh kénjún fá so yém ndenanit méngo yuram yénau eutonat totér rokar a tándáwár rokar wembégh méngota." Yesu yékenayénd Najaretén
english: He said to them , “ Therefore every scribe who has been made a disciple in the Kingdom of Heaven is like a man who is a householder , who brings out of his treasure new and old things .”

nama: Njam Yesum ewifoi yéné rengerenge si, fá néngimndayéng kétándmé 54 a fá néngangoi yánjo tesenot, a féyo watamegh ewafngoi áumengégh méngon, a fá náyárayénd sélngwél emormén a namotayénd yéfe kénjúnro, "Ánde yéné árom káfeté mwighé a sélngwélafé wafté yanai? 55 Fá siyém méngo ramégh ároene ambum. Meri yátmé yém, a yánngnof em Jems, Josef, Saimon a Judas. 56 Méinyotio yámérésof yéna em yéndfé. Ánde yéné árom méinyotio ewanai yéné wafté?" 57 Féyo fá yékenayénd. Yesum emndai fá, "Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár siyém yutémndat árkamé yénamé wénde yánjo tesen a yánjo mérnan yau."
english: When Jesus had finished these parables , he departed from there .
Coming into his own country , he taught them in their synagogue , so that they were astonished and said , “ Where did this man get this wisdom and these mighty works ?
Isn’ t this the carpenter ’s son ? Isn’ t his mother called Mary , and his brothers James , Joses, Simon , and Judas ?
Aren’ t all of his sisters with us ? Where then did this man get all of these things ?”
They were offended by him . But Jesus said to them , “ A prophet is not without honor, except in his own country and in his own house .”

nama: Yesum yau tárfár sélngwélafé yam ewafrotam kété ménamén yéfene ndimbal mwighé yau tawamorwén.
english: He didn’ t do many mighty works there because of their unbelief.

nama: Yéné efghon Erod, Galili yu warsagh ár, náyárai Yesuenemén, 2 a Erod norayai yáne ásáfogh árfefaf, "Jon walitogh ár séno yém kérta nénano ghérsat, a yénémamén yáfaf yém yéné waftafé sélngwélafé yam ewafroghét."
english: At that time , Herod the tetrarch heard the report concerning Jesus ,
and said to his servants , “ This is John the Baptizer. He is risen from the dead . That is why these powers work in him .”

nama: Njam Jon ghérsé mé témorwén, Erodém emndai Jone werghét, a yumbetaménd a yélawayénd kwéfkwéf méngon. Yéné yafrotam ménát yátén Erodiase áuwéghét. Soramé Erodém nawerai, fronde témorwén yánngén Filifene amaf. 4 Fronde Joném mé korayau Erodefaf, "Yau mbarkánd yém feyot fenngnoene amaf awerghét." 5 Erod ménde témorwén Jone ngiot, wénde férfér témorwén Ju árfenemén, ménamém fá minde kemnawét ndené Jon témorwén Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár.
english: For Herod had arrested John , bound him , and put him in prison for the sake of Herodias , his brother Philip ’s wife .
For John said to him , “ It is not lawful for you to have her .”
When he would have put him to death, he feared the multitude , because they counted him as a prophet .

nama: Erodene áráfégh témndan, Erodiasene mérsom tawawermndau wan téfnárat a Erode sáfrére, a yénémamén Erod káuwetau. 7 Erod sotafé unyéghofnar si norayai mérsoefaf, "Yénd kwamnenda fém némat ménde ném, yéndon so kémaraman feyot!"
english: But when Herod ’s birthday came , the daughter of Herodias danced among them and pleased Herod .
Therefore he promised with an oath to give her whatever she should ask.

nama: Yátmane sian mérsom yamnendai fá, "Kwaram ta sénonjo Jon walitogh ároene sénko merekinafé!"
english: She , being prompted by her mother , said , “ Give me here on a platter the head of John the Baptizer.”

nama: Warsagh ár minde ghérghérsisé nawerai, wénde ménamén sotafé unyéghofnar si té norayai méinyotio yáne wan téfnárafene sáfrére, yémon ewafarotai yáne méndefé yam wafroghét. 10 Féyo yémon fiyaré ewáfáretai Jon walitogh ároene sénko néfghét kwéfkwéf méngot. 11 Yáne sénko yénérsaménd merekinafé a yaramayénd mérsoe. Yémo yérsaméng yátmafaf. 12 Jonene waitogh ár enmormén a yéngwanayénd yáne fifi a yiyatotaménd. Féyo fá engmormén a Yesue yaufroyénd. Yesum emanjnam 5,000 ár
english: The king was grieved , but for the sake of his oaths and of those who sat at the table with him , he commanded it to be given ,
and he sent and beheaded John in the prison .
His head was brought on a platter and given to the young lady; and she brought it to her mother .
His disciples came , took the body , and buried it . Then they went and told Jesus .

nama: Njam Yesu náyárayéng némé nufrotam, fá boute nuwanoi métar sifayat sái yambia témorwén. Árém náyárayénd yénémamén, féyo yémofem yéfrangoyénd yéfene tesen a yaitoyénd fá tayotau tunamé. 14 Njam Yesu nurtoi tunat a ewinjoi ndimbal ár mérén, fá ghérghérsisayam yifoi yéfefaf a mer táyátotau fá efe enjnefé tamorwén.
english: Now when Jesus heard this , he withdrew from there in a boat to a deserted place apart . When the multitudes heard it , they followed him on foot from the cities .
Jesus went out , and he saw a great multitude . He had compassion on them and healed their sick.

nama: Férghétro témorwén yáne waitogh ár náflayénd yáfaf a yémndayénd, "Yéné siyém yauyau sifayé a séite té náyáto. Tawafarna kaka méngotuot njamke résaghét manie yéfendio."
english: When evening had come , his disciples came to him , saying , “ This place is deserted , and the hour is already late . Send the multitudes away , that they may go into the villages , and buy themselves food .”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Fá yau so kuwanongi. Némndafi tawaramangi nénet."
english: But Jesus said to them , “ They don’ t need to go away. You give them something to eat .”

nama: Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Téfene yénaro em 5 féskaf flawé a sómbio wagif."
english: They told him , “ We only have here five loaves and two fish .”

nama: Yémon norayai, "Tanwanangi tafaf." 19 Yémon emndai ár ámnjoghét yusan. Yesum ewerai 5 féskaf flawé a sómbio wagif a néretai njafar tukét, yémon kánjo yaramai Ngánjáne etfotam a eramai yánjo waitogh árfefaf, a yánjo waitogh árém tawarametawét árét. 20 Méinyotio árém enetaménd a fá eremngoyéng, a waitogh árém ekafayénd 12 yáf afoghare njamke mbarmbar árké nafrangoyénd. 21 Kété tamorwén 5,000 ár ghakér emofem enetaménd njamke, wénde yau ewaftaménd amaf a ambumtértér. Yesu tiotau nu tukmé
english: He said , “ Bring them here to me .”

He commanded the multitudes to sit down on the grass ; and he took the five loaves and the two fish , and looking up to heaven , he blessed , broke and gave the loaves to the disciples ; and the disciples gave to the multitudes .
They all ate and were filled . They took up twelve baskets full of that which remained left over from the broken pieces .
Those who ate were about five thousand men , in addition to women and children .

nama: Tekofnaye Yesum emndai yánjo waitogh ár uflighét bout kénjút a néngwanoyénd frondeyo witmé karéf sawot, njamandio ewafarnam ár mérén. 23 Soramé ár ewafarnai, fá néngwanoi yambia kétán mband tunakfot Ngánjánafé orayéghét. Njam yéfertai, fáro témorwén. 24 Yéné bout waitogh ár ánde tawaflangérwén té náyátoi sau néndkéfan. Yéné témorwén nayuyo tunata. Mbormboram tangotau bout a sófam tésmetau.
english: Immediately Jesus made the disciples get into the boat and go ahead of him to the other side , while he sent the multitudes away.
After he had sent the multitudes away, he went up into the mountain by himself to pray . When evening had come , he was there alone .
But the boat was now in the middle of the sea , distressed by the waves , for the wind was contrary .

nama: Faurghétro témorwén Yesu néngwanoi nu tukmé tiotau. 26 Njam waitogh árém yinjoyénd álighan nu tukmé, fá norayayénd, "Mbérsembérse yém!" a fá kutnawét férfére.
english: In the fourth watch of the night , Jesus came to them , walking on the sea .
When the disciples saw him walking on the sea , they were troubled , saying , “ It ’s a ghost !” and they cried out for fear .

nama: Yesu norayai yéfefaf tekofnaye, "Muyé tanangi! Yénd wém. Yau férfér em."
english: But immediately Jesus spoke to them , saying , “Cheer up ! It is I ! Don’t be afraid .”

nama: Fitam yawangoi, "Yuré, fém njam ném, yénd kwénémnde álighét nu tukmé fefaf."
english: Peter answered him and said , “ Lord , if it is you , command me to come to you on the waters .”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Kénaf!"
english: He said , “ Come !” Peter stepped down from the boat and walked on the waters to come to Jesus .

nama: Wénde njam yémon mbormbor yinjoi minde fénjaghan, fá férfér nawerai a olitogh nufngoi. Féyo fá nutnayéng, "Yuré, yénd kwanjar!"
english: But when he saw that the wind was strong , he was afraid , and beginning to sink , he cried out , saying , “ Lord , save me !”

nama: Tekofnaye Yesum ngángé ewatembai a yerai a norayai yáfaf, "Némé némbne mwighafé ném! Fém némamén mwighé déudéu ném?"
english: Immediately Jesus stretched out his hand , took hold of him , and said to him , “ You of little faith , why did you doubt ?”

nama: Fá nufleyayénd boutan, a mbormbor nékmboi. 33 Efe tawaflangérwén boutan yémofem yáwefnoyénd Yesue yéné siafé, "Efalo Ngánjánene Ambum fété ném." Yesum mer táyátotau enjne téfnár Genesaretén
english: When they got up into the boat , the wind ceased .
Those who were in the boat came and worshiped him , saying , “ You are truly the Son of God !”

nama: Njam fá sau witmé karfot nurtoyéng Genesaretét. 35 Yéné yu árém njam yáyámngoyénd Yesu, yémofem ghany yatembayénd méinyotio kaka yu árét a yémofem tanérsawét yáfaf méinyotio efe enjnefé tamorwén. 36 Fá yamnendayénd mé sáláme fétfét yanjaghétro a méinyotio enjne árém tiyanjawét merafayo.
english: When they had crossed over , they came to the land of Gennesaret .
When the people of that place recognized him , they sent into all that surrounding region and brought to him all who were sick ;
and they begged him that they might just touch the fringe of his garment . As many as touched it were made whole .

nama: Féyo ámb Farasi ár a nák watamegh ár efe enmormén Jerusalemta Yesuefaf a yémotayénd, 2 "Némamén fene waitogh árém eráfnat téfene ákiafene watamegh yam? Yémofem yau fronde ngángé eumbnat a soramé enetat!"
english: Then Pharisees and scribes came to Jesus from Jerusalem , saying ,
“ Why do your disciples disobey the tradition of the elders ? For they don’ t wash their hands when they eat bread.”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Némamén fémofem eráfnati Ngánjánene nák ákiafene yame? 4 Ngánján noraye, 'Eutémndati féferafaf a féfetmaf' a 'Emo njam yáne afé a amé ewafalngowé, fá so kéran kakmangé.' 5 Wénde fémofem ewatametati ndené ár so noraye yárefafaf o yátmafaf, "Yéndo so tawaraman ramégh rokar féfe wáutárghét. Wénde yéndon yéné yau so ewafrotan ménamén yéndo té eraman Ngánjáne." 6 Fémofem ewafrotati yéné a norayati yéné ndené yémofem yau so eutémndat yéfene afaf a amaf. Yéné yame fémofem ekenati Ngánjánene si ménát waitoghét féfene ákiafene watamegh. 7 Fém em ár efe em faruta mer wénde kénjún yau! Aisayane ufroghmén si efalo témorwén féfenemén:
english: He answered them , “ Why do you also disobey the commandment of God because of your tradition ?
For God commanded , ‘ Honor your father and your mother ,’ and , ‘ He who speaks evil of father or mother , let him be put to death .’
But you say , ‘ Whoever may tell his father or his mother , “ Whatever help you might otherwise have gotten from me is a gift devoted to God ,”
he shall not honor his father or mother.’ You have made the commandment of God void because of your tradition .
You hypocrites ! Well did Isaiah prophesy of you , saying ,

nama: "'Yéné árém wutémndat yénd mé mbírmbírero wénde yéfene tikéf em nayu ta tambén.
english: ‘ These people draw near to me with their mouth, and honor me with their lips ; but their heart is far from me .

nama: Yémofem wáwefnotat ta fifiofnar, ménamén yémofem ewatametat ár wafroghmén náke ndenanit kar em tane nák.'{g{ ...f* {g{15.9 Aisaya 29:13 "
english: And they worship me in vain , teaching as doctrine rules made by men.’” + 15:9 Isaiah 29:13

nama: Yesum emotai ár mérén tamndangé, "Káyárangi a mat kamndangi. 11 Némé yéngém ároene sénfneta yéngém fútot yau ár yiyátote njúnnjúnafé, wénde némé kéntorngé yáne sénfnemé yéné yam ár tiyátongé njúnnjúnafé."
english: He summoned the multitude , and said to them , “Hear, and understand .
That which enters into the mouth doesn’ t defile the man ; but that which proceeds out of the mouth , this defiles the man .”

nama: Féyo waitogh ár enmormén Yesuefaf a yémotayénd, "Fém mat ném Farasi ár nékw tam njam fá náyárangi fene si?"
english: Then the disciples came and said to him , “ Do you know that the Pharisees were offended when they heard this saying ?”

nama: Yémon ewawangoi, "Méinyotio wén tane njafar tukmén Afam árké yau eyai so erufete." 14 Fá tafrangongi; mámé mwighé yau em yéfenemén. Fá sem kwéfkwéf limánégh ár em; a njam kwéfkwéf árom yémnja ámb kwéfkwéf áryo, so sómbioyo kélawend yékwét."
english: But he answered , “ Every plant which my heavenly Father didn’ t plant will be uprooted .
Leave them alone . They are blind guides of the blind . If the blind guide the blind , both will fall into a pit.”

nama: Fitam témndangé, "Ténmawafer yéné rengerenge sioene fifi téfeyot."
english: Peter answered him , “ Explain the parable to us .”

nama: Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Fém so mé yau mat namndangi? 17 Fém mat fiya tam némé engém sénfneta fútot a kéntorngé féfene fifita. 18 Wénde némé kéntorngi njúnnjúnafé sénfneta kétándmé yéném tikéfta, a yéné yamam ár tiyátongi njúnnjúnafé. 19 Némé féfene tikéfta eném yaufi mwighé árké yamam fém nélimnde, ár ngi, amafanyo wanégh, a walwal yam, oro, unyégh, yaufi si ámb árfenemén. 20 Yéné yamam fém niyátotat njúnnjúnafé; wénde njamke néne ngángé umbaréghofnaram yau eyátote njúnnjúnafé." Amafoene ndimbal mwighé
english: So Jesus said , “ Do you also still not understand?
Don’ t you understand that whatever goes into the mouth passes into the belly and then out of the body ?
But the things which proceed out of the mouth come out of the heart , and they defile the man .
For out of the heart come evil thoughts , murders , adulteries , sexual sins, thefts , false testimony , and blasphemies.
These are the things which defile the man ; but to eat with unwashed hands doesn’ t defile the man .”

nama: Yesum yéné yu yéfrangoi a nuwanoi Taire a Sidon yuwot. 22 Kanan yumén amaf efe témorangérwén yéné yuwon yénmormén yáfaf a nutnai, "Yuré, Deifidene ambum! Tafaf ghérghérsisé so ném! Tane mérés yaufi mbérmbérafé yém a minde kértayan yém."
english: Jesus went out from there and withdrew into the region of Tyre and Sidon .
Behold , a Canaanite woman came out from those borders and cried , saying , “ Have mercy on me , Lord , you son of David ! My daughter is severely possessed by a demon!”

nama: Wénde Yesum si yau yawangoi. Féyo yáne waitogh ár enmormén a Yesu yamnendayénd, "Titrémb yéné amaf, ménamén yémon yénd yénmaitote a sarake yafrote."
english: But he answered her not a word . His disciples came and begged him , saying , “Send her away; for she cries after us .”

nama: Féyo Yesum ewawangoi, "Yénd wénmáfáretam mé olingégh sif Israil árétro."
english: But he answered , “ I wasn’ t sent to anyone but the lost sheep of the house of Israel .”

nama: Yéné sian amaf naflayéng a budme niyai yáne kafkafan a norayai, "Yuré, ta kwáutána!"
english: But she came and worshiped him , saying , “ Lord , help me .”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Yau mbarkánd yém ambumtértérafene njamke sái ewatarnat ághat."
english: But he answered , “ It is not appropriate to take the children ’s bread and throw it to the dogs .”

nama: Amafom yawangoi, "Efalo yéné yém, Yuré, wénde ágham enetat njamke fénjfénj árkéméné nuitat yéfene yurane kitarata."
english: But she said , “ Yes , Lord , but even the dogs eat the crumbs which fall from their masters ’ table .”

nama: Féyo Yesu norayai yáfaf, "Amaf, fene ndimbal mwighé siyém minde ndimbal yém! Némat fém ménde ném yéndon so yafrotan feyot." A tekofnaye yámérés mer náyátoi. Yesum mer táyátotau tárfár ár
english: Then Jesus answered her , “ Woman , great is your faith ! Be it done to you even as you desire .” And her daughter was healed from that hour .

nama: Yesum yéfrangoi yéné yu a néwanoi Galili arakaf téndomé. Fá néngurtoi mband tunakéf téndot a námnjoi. 30 Tárfár ár mérén enmormén yáfaf, tanérsawét álighofnar, ghékéf kwéfkwéf ár, kal ár, babé a tárfár ámb enjnefé ár, efe tanérsawét yémofem Yesuene kafkafot, a mer táyátotau. 31 Ár sélngwél tamorwén njam yémofem ewinjoyénd babé ár si oraighan, kal ár mer káyátotawét, álighofnar ár álighan, ghékéf kwéfkwéf ár kéretawét, a yénémamén yémofem tuwetawét Israil Ngánján. Yesum emanjnam 4,000 ár
english: Jesus departed from there and came near to the sea of Galilee ; and he went up on the mountain and sat there .
Great multitudes came to him , having with them the lame , blind , mute , maimed , and many others , and they put them down at his feet . He healed them ,
so that the multitude wondered when they saw the mute speaking , the injured healed , the lame walking , and the blind seeing— and they glorified the God of Israel .

nama: Yesum emotai yáne waitogh ár yáfaftio a norayai, "Yénd ghérghérsisé wém yéné árfenemén, ménamén yéndfé yéna té téném nambio efogh ámb yau némndafi em nénet. Yénd méndefnar wém siogh sái tawatemban ménamén fá mé té álighan nénguitat."
english: Jesus summoned his disciples and said , “ I have compassion on the multitude , because they have continued with me now three days and have nothing to eat . I don’ t want to send them away fasting , or they might faint on the way .”

nama: Waitogh árém yawangoyénd, "Ánde yéndfem so tanuwanangém njamke yéné yauyau sifayan yéné ár mérén manjarghét?"
english: The disciples said to him , “ Where could we get so many loaves in a deserted place as to satisfy so great a multitude ?”

nama: Yesum emotayéng fá, "Njénamb féskaf flawé em féfefaf?" Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Sefen féskaf flawé a nambio némbnar wagif."
english: Jesus said to them , “ How many loaves do you have ?” They said , “ Seven , and a few small fish .”

nama: Yesum emndai ár mérén mbandan ámnjoghét. 36 Féyo yémon euyoi sefen féskaf flawé a wagif a kánjo si yaramai Ngánjáne, a etfotam ewaramayéng yánjo waitogh árfefaf, a tawarametawét ár mérnat. 37 Árém méinyotio enetaménd a eremngoyéng. Yéné soramé waitogh árém ekafayénd sefen yáf afoghare mbarmbar árkéméné ninamoyénd. 38 Kété tamorwén 4,000 ár ghakér néneyan, wénde yau ewaftaménd amaf a ambumtértér.
english: He commanded the multitude to sit down on the ground ;
and he took the seven loaves and the fish . He gave thanks and broke them , and gave to the disciples , and the disciples to the multitudes .
They all ate and were filled . They took up seven baskets full of the broken pieces that were left over .
Those who ate were four thousand men , in addition to women and children .

nama: Soramé Yesum ár mérén engwatembai, fá boutan nénguflai a néngwanoi Magadan yuwot.
english: Then he sent away the multitudes , got into the boat , and came into the borders of Magdala .

nama: Farasi ár a Saduki ár enmormén Yesuefaf a ámoghe tufotawét ufarogh yam uyafoghét yéfe matot ndené Ngánjánam yéné wafté yaramai.
english: The Pharisees and Sadducees came , and testing him , asked him to show them a sign from heaven .

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Njam téfértangé, fém korayangi, 'Yau nu so nafamnde, ménamén njafar wauké ngarot yém.' 3 Tándái akwan fém so korayangi ndené, 'Mbormbor so yéfnje a nu so nafamnde, ménamén njafar yém wauké ngarot a nu kwéfafé.' Féyo, fémofem túmén so efandati némé ufarogh yam em njafaran, a so norayati némat em, wénde fém mafina em némé ufarogh yam em yéné efoghmén. 4 Yaufi a ndimbal mwighafnar ár saté néretat ufarogh, wénde yéndo so tawaraman Jonane ufarogh yamro." Féyo Yesum efrangoi a fá néngwanoi. Farasi ár a Saduki árfene féskaf flawé minaghmén
english: But he answered them , “ When it is evening , you say , ‘ It will be fair weather , for the sky is red .’

In the morning , ‘ It will be foul weather today , for the sky is red and threatening .’ Hypocrites! You know how to discern the appearance of the sky , but you can ’ t discern the signs of the times !
An evil and adulterous generation seeks after a sign , and there will be no sign given to it , except the sign of the prophet Jonah .” He left them and departed.

nama: Njam fá néngférmayénd witmé karéf arakaf, waitogh ár engwawalindai féskaf flawé résaghét. 6 Yesum tamndangé fá, "Aya kor, fété aem ghékéf sénté Farasi ár a Saduki árfene féskaf flawé minaghmén."
english: The disciples came to the other side and had forgotten to take bread.
Jesus said to them , “ Take heed and beware of the yeast of the Pharisees and Sadducees .”

nama: Yémofem warunyéghét yiyátoyénd yéfe kénjúnro a norayayénd, "Ménamén yéndfem ámb féskaf flawé yau enwanangém."
english: They reasoned among themselves , saying , “ We brought no bread.”

nama: Yesu mat náyátoi yéfene warunyéghmén, Yesum emotai, "Fém némamén nawawanjati féfe kénjún féskaf flawafnarmén? Némé ndimbal mwighafnar em? 9 Fém yau so mé mat namndangi. Fém fái kawafarotangi njam yéndon etfotamén 5 féskaf flawé yéfe 5,000 árét, a nderé tárfár yáf afoghare fémofem ekafayénd. 10 Wéi so nawafarotati njam yéndon sefen féskaf flawé etfotamén yéfe 4,000 árét, a nderé tárfár yáf afoghare ekafayénd. 11 Némamén fém yau mat náyátotati ndené yau yénd kénorayawén féfefaf féskaf flawamén? Aya kor ghékéf sénté Farasi ár a Saduki árfene flawé minaghmén." 12 Féyo fá mat náyátoyénd flawé minaghoene fifi Yesum tawawéngsotau Farasi ár a Saduki árfene mbarkándofnar watameghmén. Fité korayau Yesu siyém Keriso
english: Jesus , perceiving it , said , “ Why do you reason among yourselves , you of little faith , because you have brought no bread?
Don’ t you yet perceive or remember the five loaves for the five thousand , and how many baskets you took up ,
or the seven loaves for the four thousand , and how many baskets you took up ?
How is it that you don’ t perceive that I didn’ t speak to you concerning bread? But beware of the yeast of the Pharisees and Sadducees .”
Then they understood that he didn’ t tell them to beware of the yeast of bread, but of the teaching of the Pharisees and Sadducees .

nama: Njam Yesu yénmormén kétán Kaisaria Filifi tesenot, yémon emotai yánjo waitogh ár, "Ndernáye ár norayat ndené Ároene Ambum efe yém?"
english: Now when Jesus came into the parts of Caesarea Philippi , he asked his disciples , saying , “ Who do men say that I , the Son of Man , am ?”

nama: Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Ámb norayat Jon walitogh ár; ámb norayat Elaija; a ámb norayat Jeremaia o ámb Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár."
english: They said , “ Some say John the Baptizer, some , Elijah , and others , Jeremiah or one of the prophets .”

nama: Yémon emotayéng, "Wénde fém ndernáye norayati yénd efe wém?"
english: He said to them , “ But who do you say that I am ?”

nama: Saimon Fitam yawangoi, "Fém ném yéné Keriso, akegh Ngánjánene ambum."
english: Simon Peter answered , “ You are the Christ , the Son of the living God .”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Frengégh yém feyot, Saimon Jonane ambum! Yéné efalo mat yau téném ár tambén, wénde tane Afam némaram njafarta. 18 A yéndon némndetan ndené fém ném Fité, yáne fifi siyém wím, yéné tukén yéndon so yérametan tane mérén, a kéroene waftayam yau so taindangé. 19 Yéndon so ewarametan ki njafar limánéghmén. Némé fémo tumbé yéné mband maratan ndenéyameyo njafaran so tumbangé, a ndenéyameyo némé téferngi yéné mband maratan so wéi téferngi njafaran."
english: Jesus answered him , “ Blessed are you , Simon Bar Jonah, for flesh and blood has not revealed this to you , but my Father who is in heaven .
I also tell you that you are Peter , and on this rock I will build my assembly , and the gates of Hades will not prevail against it .
I will give to you the keys of the Kingdom of Heaven , and whatever you bind on earth will have been bound in heaven ; and whatever you release on earth will have been released in heaven .”

nama: Féyo yémon ekmboi yáne waitogh ár ende yau táf taufrongi ndené fá yém yéné Keriso. Yesu korayau yánjo tékrátmén a kérmén
english: Then he commanded the disciples that they should tell no one that he was Jesus the Christ .

nama: Kétándmé yéné efoghta Yesum si waitogh yafngoi yánjo kérmén waitogh árét, "Yénd so fété wéngém Jerusalemét a tékrát so yáraretan sénko árfene ngángayan, limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a nák watamegh ár. Yénd yémofem so wesmetat, wénde nambio efogh soramé Ngánjánam so yénd kwanongé ghérsat."
english: From that time , Jesus began to show his disciples that he must go to Jerusalem and suffer many things from the elders , chief priests, and scribes , and be killed, and the third day be raised up .

nama: Fitam yasotai téndot a yusérmbotam, "Yau, Yuré! Ngánjánam yau so tumyongé yéné sái nufrota fefaf!"
english: Peter took him aside and began to rebuke him , saying , “ Far be it from you , Lord ! This will never be done to you .”

nama: Yesu nawengoi a témndangé Fité, "Sáifér, kitrémb tatambén! Nétér ném tayot, ménamén fene mwighé yau yém Ngánjáneta. Wénde fém nemne ndenanit ár ndernáye nemnat."
english: But he turned and said to Peter , “ Get behind me , Satan ! You are a stumbling block to me , for you are not setting your mind on the things of God , but on the things of men .”

nama: Féyo Yesum emndai yáne waitogh ár, "Efe ta waitoghét kufngongé fá so tawalindangé yánjomén, a tanangé yánjo wafatarégh wén a kwaitongé yénd. 25 Efe njam ménde yém yánjo mbandmén ghérsé wanjarghét so yétarne tuot ghérsé, wénde emo yétarna yánjo mbandmén ghérsé tane téfnan yémo so tanang tuot ghérsé. 26 'Árém so tanangé méinyotio mband marat yandio. Wénde njam yémo yánjo tuot ghérsé yétarna, yéné yau so yém mer yáyot. Yéna yau yém ámb ár emo so kémaramangé yánjo ghérsé wéikor. 27 Ároene Ambum so nénangote njafar si résagh árfé Yárefane ndimbal kwayaghayan, a fai yémon so ewaramete fénatayero árét yéfene ásáfoghmén.
english: Then Jesus said to his disciples , “ If anyone desires to come after me , let him deny himself , take up his cross , and follow me .
For whoever desires to save his life will lose it , and whoever will lose his life for my sake will find it .
For what will it profit a man if he gains the whole world and forfeits his life ? Or what will a man give in exchange for his life ?
For the Son of Man will come in the glory of his Father with his angels, and then he will give to everyone according to his deeds .

nama: Yéndon efalo emndetan fém, ámb yéna em efe kér yau so em kétánotio yémofem tinjongi Ároene Ambumoene angogh a fá so kamndangé Warsagh ár.
english: Most certainly I tell you , there are some standing here who will in no way taste of death until they see the Son of Man coming in his Kingdom.”

nama: 6 efogh soramé Yesum engwasroi Fité, Jems a yánngén Jon, a elimayéng mband tunakéf tukét fáro. 2 Kété Yesuene fifi nafurnai yéfene sáfrére. Yáne sáf natremngoi ndenanit efogh, a yáne sáláme témorwén minde kwayaghé. 3 Féyo kété nambio waitogh árém ewinjeyayénd Moses a Elaija korayawét Yesufé.
english: After six days , Jesus took with him Peter , James , and John his brother, and brought them up into a high mountain by themselves .
He was changed before them . His face shone like the sun , and his garments became as white as the light .
Behold , Moses and Elijah appeared to them talking with him .

nama: Fitam témndangé Yesu, "Yuré, nderé mer yém yénd yéna siyéném! Fém njam ménde ném, yéndon so nambio méngoméngo erametan yéna, ámb feyot, ámb Mosese a Elaijai ámb."
english: Peter answered and said to Jesus , “ Lord , it is good for us to be here . If you want , let ’ s make three tents here : one for you , one for Moses , and one for Elijah .”

nama: Njam fá mé korayau, kwayaghaye njafar kwamkwamam ewafaryéng fá, a si yénmormén njafar kwamkwamta, "Yéné siyém tane tikfafé Ambum yénd endefaf náuwetan. Náyáretati yáfaf!"
english: While he was still speaking , behold , a bright cloud overshadowed them . Behold , a voice came out of the cloud , saying , “ This is my beloved Son , in whom I am well pleased . Listen to him .”

nama: Njam waitogh árém náyárayénd si, fá férfér tamorwén a niyayénd mbandot. 7 Yesu naflai yéfefaf a eyanjai fá a emndai, "Kanongi, yau férfér em." 8 Njam fá néngretayénd, yémofem efe yau yinjoyénd mé Yesuro.
english: When the disciples heard it , they fell on their faces , and were very afraid .
Jesus came and touched them and said , “ Get up , and don’ t be afraid .”
Lifting up their eyes , they saw no one , except Jesus alone .

nama: Njamandio fá kénewonawét mband tunakéfta, Yesum taikrataye emndai, "Ende yau tawaufrongi némé fémofem yéfandati, kétánotio Ngánjánam tanongé Ároene Ambum kérta."
english: As they were coming down from the mountain , Jesus commanded them , saying , “Don’ t tell anyone what you saw , until the Son of Man has risen from the dead .”

nama: Yémofem yémotayénd Yesu, "Némamén nák watamegh árém norayat ndené Elaija so yéném fronde?"
english: His disciples asked him , saying , “ Then why do the scribes say that Elijah must come first ?”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Elaija so yéném efrenda méinyotio yam. 12 Wénde yéndon ewaufrotan féfe ndené Elaija té yénmormén a yau yáyámngoyénd fá, wénde yémofem mé tawafrotawét yéfenjo méndefé yam wafrogh. Ndenéyameyo Ároene Ambumom tékrát so yárarete yéfene ngángayan." 13 Féyo waitogh ár mat náyátoyénd ndené fá korayau Jon walitogh ároenemén. Yesum mer yiyátoi yaufi mbérmbérafé ambum
english: Jesus answered them , “ Elijah indeed comes first , and will restore all things ;
but I tell you that Elijah has come already , and they didn’ t recognize him , but did to him whatever they wanted to . Even so the Son of Man will also suffer by them .”
Then the disciples understood that he spoke to them of John the Baptizer.

nama: Njam fá néngangoyénd ár mérnafefaf, ár yénmormén Yesuefaf a budme niyái yáne sáfrére, 15 a yémon norayai, "Yuré, ghérghérsisé so ném tane ambumoenemén! Fá siyém ghérare enjneyam taufarngé a ndimbal ndémkeyan yém. Fá túmén fését kaunámngongé a nuot kuyangé. 16 Féyo yéndon yénémnjamén fá fene waitogh árfefaf, wénde yémofem yau mer yiyátoyénd."
english: When they came to the multitude , a man came to him , kneeling down to him and saying,
“ Lord , have mercy on my son , for he is epileptic and suffers grievously ; for he often falls into the fire , and often into the water .
So I brought him to your disciples , and they could not cure him .”

nama: Yesum yawangoyéng, "Fém efalo yátoghofnar a yaufi ár saté! Nderé teke yénd so wém féfefaf? Nderé teke fémofem so kérté warametati? Ténémnjend ambum tafaf!" 18 Yesum yémndai yaufi mbérmbér, "Kétor!" nétoryéng táf fété ambum mer náyátoi.
english: Jesus answered , “Faithless and perverse generation ! How long will I be with you ? How long will I bear with you ? Bring him here to me .”
Jesus rebuked the demon , and it went out of him , and the boy was cured from that hour .

nama: Féyo yáne waitogh ár enmormén fáro yáfaf a yémotayénd, "Némamén yéndfem féyotarofnar ténmormén yaufi mbérmbér witérmboghét. 20 Yesum ewawangoi, "Ménamén féfene ndimbal mwighé némbnarfifi ewam. Efalo yéndon fém emndetan, féfene ndimbal mwighé njam ewam némbnar mbwenit táf fémofem témndangi yéné mband tunakéf, 'Kitro yénandmé kétán' a so kitrongé. Fémofem némé téu ewafrotati."{h{ ...f* {h{17.21 Yau siménj Wéikor Yesu korayau yánjo kérmén
english: Then the disciples came to Jesus privately , and said , “ Why weren’ t we able to cast it out ?”

He said to them , “ Because of your unbelief. For most certainly I tell you , if you have faith as a grain of mustard seed , you will tell this mountain , ‘ Move from here to there ,’ and it will move ; and nothing will be impossible for you .
But this kind doesn’t go out except by prayer and fasting.”

nama: Njam méinyotio yáne waitogh ár náumendayénd Galili yuwon, Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Ároene Ambum siyém wáfnamoghétro yém yéfefaf 23 efe so yésmetat a nambio efogh soramé Ngánjánam so wéikor tanongé ghérsat." Yáne waitogh ár ghérghérsisayam ewifoyéng. Wáwefnogh méngomén mani kaféghmén si
english: While they were staying in Galilee , Jesus said to them , “ The Son of Man is about to be delivered up into the hands of men ,
and they will kill him , and the third day he will be raised up .” They were exceedingly sorry .

nama: Njam Yesu a yáne waitogh ár nufaryénd Káfenamét, wáwefnogh méngomén mani kafégh ár nufaryénd Fitafaf yémotayénd, "Féfene watamegh árom so tákmangé wáwefnogh méngomén mani?"
english: When they had come to Capernaum , those who collected the didrachma coins came to Peter , and said , “Doesn’ t your teacher pay the didrachma?”

nama: Fitam ewawangoi, "O, yémon so tékmangé." Njam Fité nénglawai méngo kénjút, Yesu norayai fronde, "Saimon, fém ndernáye nemne? Emofem so ekmetat fai o mani mband marat warsagh árfet? Yéfenjo ambumam o ámb árém?
english: He said , “ Yes .” When he came into the house , Jesus anticipated him , saying , “ What do you think , Simon ? From whom do the kings of the earth receive toll or tribute ? From their children , or from strangers?”

nama: Fitam yawangoi, "Ámb árém"
english: Peter said to him , “ From strangers.” Jesus said to him , “ Therefore the children are exempt .

nama: Wénde yénd yau nékwafé so káyátongém yéné árét, nguwano sawot susiot. Fronde wagif njam térnyé, kéreta so tinjo mani yáne sénfneyan a tutor téngwan téram téfene mani mbwe tayot a feyot."
english: But , lest we cause them to stumble , go to the sea , cast a hook, and take up the first fish that comes up . When you have opened its mouth , you will find a stater coin. Take that , and give it to them for me and you .”

nama: Yéné efghon waitogh ár naflayénd Yesuefaf yémotayénd, "Efe yém ndimbalfifi njafar limánéghan?"
english: In that hour the disciples came to Jesus , saying , “ Who then is greatest in the Kingdom of Heaven ?”

nama: Yesum yémotayéng ambum tosé yáfaftio a yékmai ambum yéfene kénjún, 3 a yémon emndai: "Yéndon efalo ewaufrotan féfeyot, táfandro fém njam kawengongi a kamndangi ndené ambum tosanit, yau so kélawangi njafar limánéghét. 4 Féyo, árké ár njam yuwan kamndangé yéné ambum tosanit yém ndimbalfifi njafar limánéghan. 5 A emon tumyongé tane yétkwénan ndené ambum tosé ndenéyameyo yénd kwumyongé. Emofem eméindat ménd ár yaufiot
english: Jesus called a little child to himself, and set him in the middle of them
and said , “Most certainly I tell you , unless you turn and become as little children , you will in no way enter into the Kingdom of Heaven .
Whoever therefore humbles himself as this little child is the greatest in the Kingdom of Heaven .
Whoever receives one such little child in my name receives me ,

nama: "Nderé mámáfi so yém yáyot kéman umbéghét ndimbal wím a yitat arakafot. Wénde njam ámb árom yéné ménd ár yéméinda yaufiot emo yénd efalo wiyátote siyém minde mámáfi so yém yáyot. 7 Nderé mámáfi yém mband maratoe ménamén mband marat ghérsayam eméinde ár yaufiyot! Yéné yam so fété nufrotat, wénde nderé mámáfi yém yéné ároe emo eméinde yéné yamot!
english: but whoever causes one of these little ones who believe in me to stumble , it would be better for him if a huge millstone were hung around his neck and that he were sunk in the depths of the sea .
“ Woe to the world because of occasions of stumbling ! For it must be that the occasions come , but woe to that person through whom the occasion comes !

nama: "Njam fene ngángayam o kafkafam néméinde fém yaufiot, ténéf a téngwai. Yéné mámáfi yém feyot élaughét ghérsat ámbiro ngángafé o ámbiro kafkafafé, wénde yéné minde mámáfi yém feyot sómbio ngángé a kafkafafé sái ném a némwitat tuot fését. 9 A njam fene ghékfam néméinde fém yaufiot, tútor a téngwai. Yéné mámáfi yém feyot élaughét ghérsat ámbiro ghékfafé, wénde yéné minde mámáfi yém sómbio ghékfafé sái ném a némwitat tuot fését. Rengerenge si olingégh sifmén
english: If your hand or your foot causes you to stumble , cut it off and cast it from you . It is better for you to enter into life maimed or crippled , rather than having two hands or two feet to be cast into the eternal fire .
If your eye causes you to stumble , pluck it out and cast it from you . It is better for you to enter into life with one eye , rather than having two eyes to be cast into the Gehenna of fire .

nama: "Kor aem! Yau ámb yéné ménd ár yuwan efandati. Ménamén yéndon emndetan ndené kété njafaran yéfene njafar si résagh árém túmén yéfandat tane Afane sáf.{i{ ...f* {i{18.11 Yau siménj.
english: See that you don’ t despise one of these little ones , for I tell you that in heaven their angels always see the face of my Father who is in heaven .
For the Son of Man came to save that which was lost.

nama: "Ndernáye fém nemnati? Sif wanjengégh ároene em 100 sif a ámbiro njam kolindangé, so tafrangongé ámb 99 mband tunakfan a kuwanongé olingégh sif ronjaghét? 13 Yéndon efalo ewaufrotan, njam yémon tinjongé sif, yáne áuwégh yénémamén so kawaindangé yáne áuwégh kés yém 99 sifmén árké té em kété. 14 Ndené yameyo yau féfene Afane ménde yém njafaran ámb ménd ár sái kolindangé. Njam ámb árom yaufi yafrota fefaf
english: “ What do you think ? If a man has one hundred sheep , and one of them goes astray , doesn’ t he leave the ninety-nine , go to the mountains , and seek that which has gone astray ?
If he finds it , most certainly I tell you , he rejoices over it more than over the ninety-nine which have not gone astray .
Even so it is not the will of your Father who is in heaven that one of these little ones should perish.

nama: "Njam fe efalo yátogh fútarom yafrota yaufiyam fefaf, kuwano yáfaf a tauyafo yáne yaufi. Wénde yafrota fembia mé féfe kénjúnro. Njam yémon kényárangé fém, fémon té yango fene efalo yátogh fútar. 16 Wénde yémon yau njam kényárangé fém, ténmasro ámbiro o sómbio ár fémofé ménát sái norayat yáfaf. Fá so mat kamndangi némé mámáfi yam fene efalo yátogh fútarém tawafrote. Nawafarotati ndernáye Buk si noraye, "Kété fiya em sómbio o nambio ár siot ménáyan ndené ámb árom té tafrote ámb mámáfi yam. Sómbio o nambio árém táf tiyátongi némé njam nufrota." 17 Yau njam fá káyárangé yéfefaf, féyo taufrongi méinyotiomén tane mérnat. Yau njam káyárangé tane mérnoene sian, féyo yau yáutánati téfrangongi ndené fété Téndo ár a yaufi mani kafégh ár.
english: “ If your brother sins against you , go , show him his fault between you and him alone . If he listens to you , you have gained back your brother.
But if he doesn’t listen, take one or two more with you , that at the mouth of two or three witnesses every word may be established .
If he refuses to listen to them , tell it to the assembly . If he refuses to hear the assembly also , let him be to you as a Gentile or a tax collector .

nama: "Yéndon féfe efalo ewaufrotan, némé fémofem tumbangi yéné mband maratan ndenéyameyo so tumbangé kété njafaran, a fémofem njam téferngi yéna mband maratan so ndenéyameyo kaferngé njafaran.
english: Most certainly I tell you , whatever things you bind on earth will have been bound in heaven , and whatever things you release on earth will have been released in heaven .

nama: "Yéndon wéi ewaufrotan féfe, njam fémofem sómbioyam tiyátend yéna mband maratan némat fém nómnengéghét, tane Afam so yafrote féfeyot njafaran. 20 Ménamén ánde sómbio o nambio káumendangi tane yétkwénan, yénd kété wém yéfefaf." Rengerenge si wawalingéghofnar faiofnar ásáfogh ároenemén
english: Again , assuredly I tell you , that if two of you will agree on earth concerning anything that they will ask , it will be done for them by my Father who is in heaven .
For where two or three are gathered together in my name , there I am in the middle of them .”

nama: Féyo Fité naflayéng Yesuefaf a yémotai, "Yuré, njam tane fútar ménjté mé yém tafaf yaufi wafroghan, njénamb mbinotmé yénd so kwawalindangé yáne yaufi? 7 mbinotmé?"
english: Then Peter came and said to him , “ Lord , how often shall my brother sin against me , and I forgive him ? Until seven times ?”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Yau, yau 7 mbinotmé wénde 70 mbinotmé 7."
english: Jesus said to him , “ I don’ t tell you until seven times , but , until seventy times seven .

nama: Féyo Yesu norayai, "Yéndo so ewaufrotan si ménát so tawauyafon ndernáye njafar limánégh yém. Warsagh ár ewanmoi yánjo fáiofnar ásáfogh ár ménát sái tanmorwén a mani fai tawangongayénd némé yémofem té ewanayénd. 24 Féyo warsagh árom yéné wafrogh ewafngoi. Yánjo árém yélimayénd ámb faiofnar ásáfogh ár yáfaf endene tamorwén tárfár mani wangoghofnar. Yémo so tawafangotau 10 milion kina yáyot. 25 Yémo yau so tawafangotau, féyo warsagh árom yémndai ndené fá a yátén a yáne ambumtértér a yáne méinyotio rokar sái tatérnau maniot yáne fai wangoghét.
english: Therefore the Kingdom of Heaven is like a certain king who wanted to settle accounts with his servants .
When he had begun to settle , one was brought to him who owed him ten thousand talents .
But because he couldn’ t pay, his lord commanded him to be sold , with his wife , his children , and all that he had , and payment to be made .

nama: "Faiofnar ásáfogh árom yáwefnoi budme warsagh ároene sáfrére a nómnendai, 'Ámb efogh mé kwaram, a yéndon so némawafángotan méinyotio fai.' 27 Warsagh ár ghérghérsisayam yifoyéng, féyo fá yawalindai yáne faimén a yéngwatembai.
english: The servant therefore fell down and knelt before him , saying , ‘ Lord , have patience with me , and I will repay you all !’
The lord of that servant , being moved with compassion , released him and forgave him the debt .

nama: "Féyo ár néngtoryéng a yéfángoi ámb yáne faiofnar ásáfogh fútar yáne fai wangoghofnar témorwén 3,000 kina. Yémon yambnai a kém yéfaryéng yéné siafé a norayai, 'Kwawafango tane mani!'
english: “ But that servant went out and found one of his fellow servants who owed him one hundred denarii , and he grabbed him and took him by the throat, saying , ‘Pay me what you owe !’

nama: "Yáne faiofnar ásáfogh fútarom budme yáwefnoi a nómnendai, 'Ámb efogh mé kwaram, yéndon so kémawafangon fai!'
english: “ So his fellow servant fell down at his feet and begged him , saying , ‘ Have patience with me , and I will repay you !’

nama: "Wénde fá mé nakenayéng a néngaflayéng a yéné ár yélawayéng kwéfkwéf méngot kétánotio yémon fai kor kufrotau.
english: He would not , but went and cast him into prison until he should pay back that which was due .

nama: "Njam ámb faiofnar ásáfogh árém yinjoyénd némé kufrotau, fá minde áuwéghofnar náyátoyénd a naflayénd warsagh ároefaf a yaufroyénd méinyotio yammén. 32 Féyo warsagh árom yanmoi faiofnar ásáfogh ár kénjút a yémndai, 'Fém yaufi faiofnar ásáfogh ár. Yénd té wawalinda méinyotio fene fai wafangoghofnar némé tafaf em ménamén té yénd fémon wámnenda wafroghét. 33 Fém ghérghérsisé fiya kénmorwén fene faiofnar ásáfogh fútaroefaf, ndené fété yénd ghérghérsisé kés wém fefaf. 34 Yéné nékwan warsagh árom yáfáretayéng yéné ár kwéfkwéf méngot tékratan sái yém kétánotio yémon so méinyotio fai tawafangotau."
english: So when his fellow servants saw what was done , they were exceedingly sorry , and came and told their lord all that was done .
Then his lord called him in and said to him , ‘ You wicked servant ! I forgave you all that debt because you begged me .
Shouldn’ t you also have had mercy on your fellow servant , even as I had mercy on you ?’
His lord was angry , and delivered him to the tormentors until he should pay all that was due to him .

nama: Yesum soramé si norayai, "Ndené fiyém tane Afam njafaran so yafrote féfeyot, njam fém yau tawawalindangé ámb efalo yátogh árfene yaufimén féfene tikfan."
english: So my heavenly Father will also do to you , if you don’ t each forgive your brother from your hearts for his misdeeds.”
