nama: Njam Yesum yifoi yéné watamegh si, yémon yéfrangoi Galili yu a nénguwanoi Judia yuwot witmé karfan Joden wanjen. 2 Tárfár ár mérnam yaitoyénd fá, a yémon mer táyátotau enjne téfnár kété.
english: When Jesus had finished these words , he departed from Galilee and came into the borders of Judea beyond the Jordan .
Great multitudes followed him , and he healed them there .

nama: Ámb Farasi ár enmormén kétán yáfaf ámogh sie tufotawét, "Téfene nákam ár té yumyote amaf sái tatembangé ámb yam wafroghmén?"
english: Pharisees came to him , testing him and saying , “ Is it lawful for a man to divorce his wife for any reason?”

nama: Yesum ewawangoyéng, "Té fémofem yaftaménd buk árké noraye ndené kété ufroghan 'Ngánjánam ewafroméng ár a amaf{j{ ...f* {j{19.4 Gen 1:27; 5:2
english: He answered , “Haven’ t you read that he who made them from the beginning made them male and female ,

nama: A Ngánján noraye, 'Yéné téfnan árom so tafrange yárefé a yátmé a kakayongé amafoefef, a sómbio so kamndend ámbiro.'{k{ ...f* {k{19.5 Gen 2:24
english: and said , ‘ For this cause a man shall leave his father and mother , and shall be joined to his wife ; and the two shall become one flesh ’?

nama: Féyo sómbio yau ere, wénde ámbiro. Árké árom yau so tafale némé Ngánjánam eyáteyai."
english: So that they are no more two , but one flesh . What therefore God has joined together , don’ t let man tear apart.”

nama: Farasi árém yémotayénd, "Féyo némamén Mosesém nák ewaramai árét ménát amaf so kangongai watembégh férnafé?"
english: They asked him , “ Why then did Moses command us to give her a certificate of divorce and divorce her ?”

nama: Yesum ewawangoyéng, "Mosesém taumyongai amaf watembéghét ménamén féfene tikéf taikérmén. Wénde ndené kété yau témorwén ufroghan. 9 Yéndon féfe ewaufrotan yéné, emo tatembangé amaf, a kawerangé ámb amaf, yémo yafrote amafanyo wanégh. Njam yáne amafom áranyo wanégh yafrota, féyo yémo yau yafrote amafanyo wanégh.
english: He said to them , “ Moses , because of the hardness of your hearts , allowed you to divorce your wives , but from the beginning it has not been so .
I tell you that whoever divorces his wife , except for sexual immorality , and marries another , commits adultery ; and he who marries her when she is divorced commits adultery .”

nama: Yáne waitogh ár norayayénd yáfaf, "Njam ár a amaf ere yéné si mbanmbanan, so mer témorwén yau njam kawereyayénd."
english: His disciples said to him , “ If this is the case of the man with his wife , it is not expedient to marry .”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Yéné aweréghofnarmén yau méinyotio árét yém, wénde yéné árétro féyotaro yém Ngánjánam endefet yéramai. 12 Tárfáryam em ménamén ár yau so naweretat amaf: ámb, ménamén ndené ende náráftaménd, ámb, ménamén árém ewafrotaménd ndené ende a ámb yau naweretat njafar limánégh téfnan. Njam ár efe so yémor amaf aweréghofnar, tumyongi ndenaye fété." Yesum efrende ambumtértér
english: But he said to them , “ Not all men can receive this saying , but those to whom it is given .

For there are eunuchs who were born that way from their mother ’s womb , and there are eunuchs who were made eunuchs by men ; and there are eunuchs who made themselves eunuchs for the Kingdom of Heaven ’s sake . He who is able to receive it , let him receive it .”

nama: Ámb árém enémnjaménd ambumtértér Yesuefaf ngángé fayoghét a Ngánjánafé orayéghét yéfenemén. Wénde yáne waitogh árém ekmboyénd ár.
english: Then little children were brought to him that he should lay his hands on them and pray ; and the disciples rebuked them .

nama: Yesu norayai, "Tanéumyongi ambumtértér tafaf, yau ekmbotati, ménamén njafar limánégh siyém ndené árfet fiyém ambumtértér sem. 15 Yémon ngángé efayoi a soramé néngwanoi. Wemár totér ár
english: But Jesus said , “Allow the little children , and don’ t forbid them to come to me ; for the Kingdom of Heaven belongs to ones like these .”
He laid his hands on them , and departed from there .

nama: Ámb ár yénmormén a namotai, "Watamegh ár, némé mer yéndon so yafrotan ménát tuot ghérsé résaghét?"
english: Behold , one came to him and said , “ Good teacher , what good thing shall I do , that I may have eternal life ?”

nama: Yesum yawangoyéng, "Némamén fémo namota meryammén? Yau efe mer yém mé Ngánján fáro. Fém njam ménde ném tuot ghérsé résaghét, ewafrota némé nák noraye."
english: He said to him , “ Why do you call me good ? No one is good but one , that is , God . But if you want to enter into life , keep the commandments .”

nama: Fá namotayéng, "Némé nák em?"
english: He said to him , “ Which ones ?” Jesus said , “‘ You shall not murder .’ ‘ You shall not commit adultery .’ ‘ You shall not steal .’ ‘ You shall not offer false testimony .’

nama: eutmanwé afé amé; euweta fenjo kaka ár ndené fété fémyo."
english: ‘ Honor your father and your mother .’ And , ‘ You shall love your neighbor as yourself .’”

nama: Wemár totér árom yawangoi, "Méinyotio yéné nák yéndon tawarawenan. Némé wét tafaf náláitat?"
english: The young man said to him , “ All these things I have observed from my youth. What do I still lack ?”

nama: Yesum yémndayéng fá, "Njam fém ménde ném féwénféwénofnarot, kuwano a etérna maniot fene méinyotio rokar fene némé em a ewarameta mani yauyau árét, a fene ngonjél so nawamndat njafaran, féyo kénaf, yénd kwénmaito."
english: Jesus said to him , “ If you want to be perfect , go , sell what you have , and give to the poor , and you will have treasure in heaven ; and come , follow me .”

nama: Njam totér árom yéné si náyárayéng, fá wáiwáiafé néngwanoyéng, ménamén fá témorwén ndimbal wemár.
english: But when the young man heard this , he went away sad , for he was one who had great possessions .

nama: Yesum táf norayai yánjo waitogh árfefaf, "Yéndon efalo emndetan: nderé táikér so yém wemár árét élaughét njafar limánéghét. 24 Yéndon kor emndetan: kameloe lil féne élaughét táikér yém, wénde wemár ároe kétán Ngánján limánégh élaughét siyém minde táikér yém a yáne kérté yamam so taindangé yéné."
english: Jesus said to his disciples , “Most certainly I say to you , a rich man will enter into the Kingdom of Heaven with difficulty.
Again I tell you , it is easier for a camel to go through a needle ’s eye than for a rich man to enter into God ’s Kingdom.”

nama: Njam waitogh árém yéné si náyárayénd, fá minde sélngwél emormén a namotayénd, "Féyo efe wét so ngunjarngi?"
english: When the disciples heard it , they were exceedingly astonished , saying , “ Who then can be saved ?”

nama: Yesum mbarkándaye engfandayéng fá a ewawangoi, "Yéné siyém féyotarofnar yém árét, wénde Ngánjáne méinyotio yam féyotaro em."
english: Looking at them , Jesus said , “ With men this is impossible, but with God all things are possible .”

nama: Fitam témndangé, "Kéreta, yéndfem rokar méinyotio té tanéurotam fe waitoghét! Féyo némé wét yéndfem so tawanangém?"
english: Then Peter answered , “ Behold , we have left everything and followed you . What then will we have ?”

nama: Yesum emndai fá, "Yéndon efalo emndetan, njam Ngánjánam so tawafrotangé méinyotio rokar táyátongé totér, Ároene Ambum so kámnjongé yánjo ndimbal kwayaghafé limánégh ámnjogh sifayan, ndenáyo fém tane tuwelf waitogh ár so kámnjongi limánégh ámnjogh sifayé, ménát Israilmén tuwelf mérén limánéghét. 29 A ámb ár emo téfrangongé yánjo méngo o yanaf o mérésof o yárefaf o yátmaf o ambumtértér o ndau tane téfnan, so tawanangé fai 100 mbinotmé a so taraman tuot akegh ghérsé. 30 Wénde tárfár ár efe sénonjo fronde em so kénamndangi soramé, a efe sénonjo soramé em so kénamndangi fronde.
english: Jesus said to them , “Most certainly I tell you that you who have followed me , in the regeneration when the Son of Man will sit on the throne of his glory , you also will sit on twelve thrones , judging the twelve tribes of Israel .

Everyone who has left houses , or brothers, or sisters, or father , or mother , or wife , or children , or lands, for my name ’s sake , will receive one hundred times , and will inherit eternal life .
But many will be last who are first , and first who are last .

nama: "Njafar limánégh siyém ndené yém. Mband yuré tándái akwan nuwanoi ámb árét mani ásáfogh ramghét yáne géreif mbwe ménj ndawot. 2 Yémon yiyátoi yéfe fai ramghét, ámbiro efoghmén túmén fai, a ewáfáretai fá ásáfoghét yáne wén mbwe ménj ndawot.
english: “ For the Kingdom of Heaven is like a man who was the master of a household , who went out early in the morning to hire laborers for his vineyard.
When he had agreed with the laborers for a denarius a day , he sent them into his vineyard.

nama: "Fá kor wéi nuwanoi kété térarégh sifayafaf táf 9 aklok a ewinjoi ámb ár tawakayongérwén ásáfoghofnar. 4 Féyo yémon tamndangé, 'Fém wéi nguwanongi násáfotati wén mbwe ménj ndawan, a yéndon so fai ewarametan mbarkánde.' 5 Féyo fá nuwanoyénd. Táf efoghméf 12 aklok a kor 3 aklokan yénéyamyo yéngmormén térarégh sifayat a ámb ásáfogh ár kor ekafai. 6 Kaka káyátotau 5 aklok njam fá yiotam kétán térarégh sifayat a ewinjoi ámb ár mé tawakayongérwén kété. Yémon emotai, 'Némamén fém ásáfoghofnar efogh tombé ewakai?'
english: He went out about the third hour , and saw others standing idle in the marketplace.
He said to them , ‘ You also go into the vineyard, and whatever is right I will give you .’ So they went their way .
Again he went out about the sixth and the ninth hour , and did likewise .
About the eleventh hour he went out and found others standing idle. He said to them , ‘ Why do you stand here all day idle?’

nama: "Yémofem yawangoyénd, 'Emon ámb yau mani ásáfoghét yénémnde.' "Yémon emndai fá, 'Féyotaro fém nguwanongi ásáfoghét géreif mbwe ménj ndawot.'
english: “ They said to him , ‘ Because no one has hired us .’ “ He said to them , ‘ You also go into the vineyard, and you will receive whatever is right .’

nama: "Njam férégh náyátoi, yuram yémndai yánjo wanjengégh ár, 'Tamota ásáfogh ár a fai ewarameta, kétándmé efe ásáfoghét soramé nufnyayénd a kefongé kétán efe ásáfoghét fronde nufnyayénd.'
english: “ When evening had come , the lord of the vineyard said to his manager , ‘ Call the laborers and pay them their wages , beginning from the last to the first .’

nama: "Yéné ár emofem ásáfogh yafngoyénd táf 5 aklokan yéfe fai ewaramayéng ámbiro efoghmén túmén fai ámbiroámbiroe. 10 Féyo njam yéné fronde ásáfogh ár enmormén fai résaghét ndené kemnawét yémofem kar so tukén fai tawanangayénd. Wénde yémofayo ámbrérero ámbiro efoghmén fairo tarsawét. 11 Njam yémofem ewanayénd yéfenjo mani a mikemike nufngoyénd yurafaf. 12 'Yéné ár kásáfotat ámbiro efoghfénefénero, wénde fémo fai tawafrote ndené fété fémo kés fai yénd ténmafrote efe kásáfotam ámbiro méinyo efogh efoghwaftayan.' 13 Yuram yawangoi ámb ároe, 'Koyáré, fútar. Yénd féfefaf kwém ámbrérero. Fémo yiyáto ásáfoghét ámbiro efoghmén túmén faiot. 14 Sénonjo tawan fene fai a nguwano méngot. Yénd ménde wém yéné ároe fai ramghét soramé ásáfogh ár ámbrérero yéndon fe kés némaraman. 15 Tane mbarkánd yém yénd némé ménde wém wafroghét tane manie! O fém méndménd em ménamén yénd mer ár wém raméghan?'"
english: “ When those who were hired at about the eleventh hour came , they each received a denarius .
When the first came , they supposed that they would receive more ; and they likewise each received a denarius .
When they received it , they murmured against the master of the household ,
saying , ‘ These last have spent one hour , and you have made them equal to us who have borne the burden of the day and the scorching heat !’
“ But he answered one of them , ‘ Friend , I am doing you no wrong. Didn’ t you agree with me for a denarius ?
Take that which is yours , and go your way . It is my desire to give to this last just as much as to you .
Isn’ t it lawful for me to do what I want to with what I own ? Or is your eye evil , because I am good ?’

nama: "A Yesum wifoghétro si norayai, "Efe soramé em so em fronde, a efe fronde em so em soramé." Yesum korayau nambiomén si yánjo kérmén
english: So the last will be first , and the first last . For many are called , but few are chosen.”

nama: Njam Yesu tiyotawéng kétán Jerusalemét, yémon ewasroi yánjo 12 waitogh ár ewimndai téndot a tamndangé fá yéfembiayan, njamandio tayotawéng endmé. 18 Yémon tamndangé fá, "Káyárangi, yénd yényote kétán Jerusalemét, ánde Ároene Ambum so téramangi kétán limánégh ghéngén wárogh árfefaf a nák watamegh árfefaf. Fá so korayangi fá fété so kér yém 19 a tramangi kétán Téndo árfefaf, emofem so méndménd yawafrotat, yéfmotat, a tamangi wafatarégh wénan. Wénde nambio efogh soramé Ngánjánam so tanongé ghérsat. Amane ómnengégh
english: As Jesus was going up to Jerusalem , he took the twelve disciples aside , and on the way he said to them ,
“ Behold , we are going up to Jerusalem , and the Son of Man will be delivered to the chief priests and scribes , and they will condemn him to death ,
and will hand him over to the Gentiles to mock , to scourge , and to crucify ; and the third day he will be raised up .”

nama: Féyo Jefediene ambum, Jems a Jon yéfene amé yénmormén Yesuefaf yánjo sómbio ambumofé, yáwefnoyénd sáfrére yáyot, a yémotayénd Yesu yáne ménde wafroghét.
english: Then the mother of the sons of Zebedee came to him with her sons , kneeling and asking a certain thing of him .

nama: Yesum yémotai, "Némé wafroghét fém ménde ném?" Amafom yawangoi, "Unyéghofnar si kwaram ta so tane sómbio ambum taumuyé ménát so emorare ámb fatrata ámb tambénta njam fémon warsagh ár yétkwén tané."
english: He said to her , “ What do you want ?” She said to him , “ Command that these , my two sons , may sit , one on your right hand and one on your left hand , in your Kingdom.”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Fém yau mat ere némat fém namot. Fém féyotaro ere tékrat kafusi nénet yéndon árkéméné so yénetan?" Yémofem yawangeyayénd, "Féyotaro yéndfem so ere."
english: But Jesus answered , “ You don’ t know what you are asking . Are you able to drink the cup that I am about to drink , and be baptized with the baptism that I am baptized with ?” They said to him , “ We are able .”

nama: Yesum emndeyai fá, "Fémofem so féyotaro yénét tékrat kafusi yéndon sái yénetan. Wénde kétán tane tambénta a fatrata yénd waftafnar wém ramghét. Yéné sifayé yéfendro yém efe tané Afam té efrendayéng."
english: He said to them , “ You will indeed drink my cup , and be baptized with the baptism that I am baptized with ; but to sit on my right hand and on my left hand is not mine to give , but it is for whom it has been prepared by my Father .”

nama: Njam ámb 10 waitogh árém náyárayénd yénémamén, fá nékwafé nafghetaménd yéné sómbio árfefaf. 25 Féyo Yesum emotayéng fá méinyotio a norayai, "Fém mat em ndené Téndo árfene limánégh ár waftafé em yéfefaf limánéghét, a limángégh téfnáram tawafaretawét ár ménát sái tawaitotawét némé nák yémofem takmetawét. 26 Ndené yau nufrotati fá kés em. Efe njam ménde yém ndimbalot, fá táf kamndangé féfene faiofnar ásáfogh ár, 27 a efe njam ménde yém frondeyot, fá kamndangé féfene faiofnar ásáfogh ár. 28 Ároene Ambum, yau yénmormén sái yásáfotat, wénde yéfe wásáfoghét a yánjo ghérsé yéramai tárfár ár wanjarghét." Yesum efrendangeyai sómbio ghékéf kwéfkwéf ár
english: When the ten heard it , they were indignant with the two brothers.
But Jesus summoned them , and said , “ You know that the rulers of the nations lord it over them , and their great ones exercise authority over them .
It shall not be so among you ; but whoever desires to become great among you shall be your servant .
Whoever desires to be first among you shall be your bondservant,
even as the Son of Man came not to be served , but to serve , and to give his life as a ransom for many .”

nama: Soramé, Yesu a yáne waitogh ár yéngéfrangoyénd Jeriko, tárfár ár mérén kuwaitotawét. 30 Sómbio kwéfkwéf ár efe tamorarwén end téndon náyáreyayénd ndené Yesu kawaindawéng, fá táf ke nufngeyayénd, "Deifidene Ambum, ghérghérsisé kawer téfefaf, Yuré!"
english: As they went out from Jericho , a great multitude followed him .
Behold , two blind men sitting by the road , when they heard that Jesus was passing by , cried out , “ Lord , have mercy on us , you son of David !”

nama: Ár mérnam eusérmboménd, "Métar!" Wénde fá mé minde tukén kutarwét, "Deifidene ambum! Ghérghérsisé kawer téfefaf, Yuré!"
english: The multitude rebuked them , telling them that they should be quiet , but they cried out even more , “ Lord , have mercy on us , you son of David !”

nama: Yesu nékmboyéng a emotangeyai fá, "Némat fém ménde ere yéndon sái ewawafrowan féfe?"
english: Jesus stood still and called them , and asked , “ What do you want me to do for you ?”

nama: Yémofem yawangeyayénd, "Yuré, yénd ménde yénre sái kretangém!"
english: They told him , “ Lord , that our eyes may be opened.”

nama: Yesu ghérghérsisé nawerai yéfefaf a ewayanjangeyai yéfene ghékéf. Táf fété néretangeyayénd, a yémofem yáiteyayénd Yesu.
english: Jesus , being moved with compassion , touched their eyes ; and immediately their eyes received their sight , and they followed him .

nama: Njam Yesu a yáne waitogh ár ufarghétro tangmorwén Jerusalemét, fá engmormén kétán Betfage Olif Mband tunakfot. Yesum ewáfáretangeyai yánjo sómbio waitogh ár fronde 2 yéné siafé: "Nguwanend méngotuot féferére, a tekofnar fémofem so tawinjend téndota ndonki a yáné tosafé umbéghkaf ere. Tanferend a enémnjet tafaf. 3 A emon njam fém tamotange, táf yá taufrend, 'Yuré ménde yém,' a táf so yémon tanéumie wasroghét tekofnaye."
english: When they came near to Jerusalem and came to Bethsphage, to the Mount of Olives , then Jesus sent two disciples ,
saying to them , “ Go into the village that is opposite you , and immediately you will find a donkey tied , and a colt with her . Untie them and bring them to me .
If anyone says anything to you , you shall say , ‘ The Lord needs them ,’ and immediately he will send them .”

nama: Yéné kufrotau némat Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár korayau:
english: All this was done that it might be fulfilled which was spoken through the prophet , saying ,

nama: "Tawaufrongi Jerusalem árét, 'Kéretangi, féfene warsagh ár nufane féfefaf! Fá yém yuwan ár a yénfayong totér ndonki sémsot tukén."{l{ ...f* {l{21.5 Jakaraya 9:9
english: “ Tell the daughter of Zion , behold , your King comes to you , humble, and riding on a donkey , on a colt , the foal of a donkey .” + 21:5 Zechariah 9:9

nama: Féyo sómbio waitogh ár nuwaneyayénd a yafrotaménd némé Yesum té engémndeyai fá yéné wafroghét 7 Yémofem yénémnjménd ndonki a ndonki tosé, efayeyayénd yéfenjo sáláme yéfene sémsot tukét, a Yesu nafayoi. 8 Tárfár ár mérnam wéi ndenéyameyo tangfiyangotawét yéfenjo sáláme endmé ndenáyo ámb árém wén njambam tanénfetawét a tangfiyangotawét endmé. 9 Ár mérén efe tayotawéng endmé Yesue frondeta a efe soramé nguwaitotawét ngutnawét, "Yuyotam Deifidene Ambum! Ngánjánam fá yéfrende efe yéném Yurane yétkwénan! Yuyotam Ngánján!"
english: The disciples went and did just as Jesus commanded them ,
and brought the donkey and the colt and laid their clothes on them ; and he sat on them .
A very great multitude spread their clothes on the road . Others cut branches from the trees and spread them on the road .
The multitudes who went in front of him , and those who followed, kept shouting , “ Hosanna to the son of David ! Blessed is he who comes in the name of the Lord ! Hosanna in the highest !”

nama: Njam Yesu nénglawai Jerusalem, méinyotio ár tesenan sélngwélan a uwérsoghan tamorwén a árém namotayénd, "Efe fá yém?"
english: When he had come into Jerusalem , all the city was stirred up , saying , “ Who is this ?”

nama: Ár mérnam enwawangoyénd, "Yéné siyém Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár Yesu, Najaretmén kété Galili yuwon." Yesu néngwanoyéng kétán wáwefnogh méngot
english: The multitudes said , “ This is the prophet , Jesus , from Nazareth of Galilee .”

nama: Yesu yiotam kétán wáwefnogh méngo sifayat a wifarégh ewafngoi fá emofem tarsawét a tátérnawét rokar kété. Yémon tawengotau mani térarégh árfene kitaré a mamu térarégh árfene ámnjogh kitaré, 13 a norayai yéfefaf, "Yéné ndené yéfarotaménd Buk sian ndené Ngánján norayai, 'Tane méngo so yémndetat Ngánjánafé orayégh méngo. Wénde fémofem yengongi oro téfnárafene átnogh sifayat.
english: Jesus entered into the temple of God and drove out all of those who sold and bought in the temple , and overthrew the money changers ’ tables and the seats of those who sold the doves .
He said to them , “ It is written , ‘ My house shall be called a house of prayer ,’ but you have made it a den of robbers !”

nama: Kwéfkwéf ár a aknyégh ár enmormén kétán Yesuefaf wáwefnogh méngo sifayat, a yémon mer táyátotau. 15 Limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a nák watamegh ár táf nékw nawerayénd njam yémofem yinjoyénd ndené sélngwélafé yam yémo tawafrotau a ambumtértér kutnawét wáwefnogh méngo sifayan, "Yuyota Deifidene Ambum!" 16 Féyo yémofem yémotayénd Yesu, "Fémon té eyárete némé fá norayat?" Yesum ewawangoi, "Efalo fété yénd náyáretan. Fémofem yau yaftaménd yéné Buk si? 'Yuré Ngánján, ambumtértér a fasri némuyotat fém. Fémo fémonyo ewatametam yéné wafroghét."
english: The lame and the blind came to him in the temple , and he healed them .
But when the chief priests and the scribes saw the wonderful things that he did , and the children who were crying in the temple and saying , “ Hosanna to the son of David !” they were indignant,

and said to him , “ Do you hear what these are saying ?” Jesus said to them , “ Yes . Did you never read, ‘ Out of the mouth of children and nursing babies , you have perfected praise’?” + 21:16 Psalms 8:2

nama: Yesum engéfrangoi fá a néwanoi tesenta kétán Betanit, ánde fá yékmangérmén sémbáran. Yesum yafalngoi fig wén
english: He left them and went out of the city to Bethany, and camped there .

nama: Tándái akwan, Yesu kénangotau kétán Jerusalem. Néndkfan fá siogham yifoi. 19 Yémon yéngwinjoi fig wén end téndon a néngwanoi kétán, wénde ámb mbwe yau ewinjoi mé árauro. Féyo fá norayayéng kétán wénoefaf, "Fefaf yau so mbwe néngafote wéikor!" Táf fété fig wén néruyam.
english: Now in the morning , as he returned to the city , he was hungry .
Seeing a fig tree by the road , he came to it and found nothing on it but leaves . He said to it , “ Let there be no fruit from you forever !” Immediately the fig tree withered away .

nama: Waitogh árém njam yéné wafroghyam yinjoyénd fá sélngwél emormén a namotayénd, "Ndernáye yéné fig wén kéruye tekofnaye?"
english: When the disciples saw it , they marveled , saying , “ How did the fig tree immediately wither away ?”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Yéndon efalo ewaufrotan féfe, ndené njam ndimbal mwighé ewam a yau natambnati, fémofem so ewafrotati ndené yéndon némé tafrotan yéné fig wénoefaf. A yénaro yau, wénde fémofem so témndangi yéné mband tunakéf, 'Nguwano a kawita fémyo arakafot,' a so nufrote. 22 Njam fémofem efalo yiyátotati, fémofem so ewinjotati némat fém nómnendati ménaye Ngánjánafé orayéghe." Ámogh ménamén Yesuene si muyamén
english: Jesus answered them , “Most certainly I tell you , if you have faith and don’ t doubt , you will not only do what was done to the fig tree , but even if you told this mountain , ‘ Be taken up and cast into the sea ,’ it would be done .
All things , whatever you ask in prayer , believing , you will receive .”

nama: Yesu nénangotam kétán wáwefnogh méngo sifayat a njam yémo tawatametau, limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a limánégh ár nénufaryénd yáfaf a namotayénd, "Némé muyaye fémo ewafrote yéné yam? Emo némaram yéné muyé feyot?"
english: When he had come into the temple , the chief priests and the elders of the people came to him as he was teaching , and said , “ By what authority do you do these things ? Who gave you this authority ?”

nama: Yesum ewawangoyéng yéfe, "Yéndon fém so tamotangén ámbiro ámogh si, a njam fémofem kwaramangi wangogh si ta, yéndon wéi so tawaufron féfe némé muyayan yéndon yéné yam ewafrotan. 25 Jonene walitogh árkamé yénmormén: Ngánjáneta o kétamé árta?"
english: Jesus answered them , “ I also will ask you one question , which if you tell me , I likewise will tell you by what authority I do these things .
The baptism of John , where was it from ? From heaven or from men ?” They reasoned with themselves , saying , “ If we say , ‘ From heaven ,’ he will ask us , ‘ Why then did you not believe him ?’

nama: Wénde njam yénd korayangém, 'Kétándmé árta,' yénd férfér yéném árém némé mété yafrotat, ménamén méinyotio ár kemnawét ndené Jon fété témorwén Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár." 27 Féyo yémofem yawangoyénd Yesue, "Yénd mafina yéném." A fá norayai yéfefaf, "Yéndon ndenáyo wéi yau so tawaufron némé muyayan yéndon ewafrotan yéné yam." Rengerenge si sómbio ambummén
english: But if we say , ‘ From men ,’ we fear the multitude , for all hold John as a prophet .”
They answered Jesus , and said , “ We don’ t know .” He also said to them , “ Neither will I tell you by what authority I do these things .

nama: "Ndernáye wét fém nemnati yéné rengerenge simén? Kété ámb ár témorwén endene ambum tárwén sómbio. Fá nuwanoi fronde sénko ambumoefaf a norayai, 'Ambum, nguwano ásáfoghét géreif mbwe ménj ndawot sénonjo.' 29 Yémon yawangoi, 'Yénd yau ménde wém.' Wénde soramé yémon mwighé yáitoi a nuwanoi. 30 Féyo yéné yéferafé nénwanoi kétán ámb ambumoefaf a norayai ndené sio. Yémon yawangoi, 'Féyotaro, afé." Wénde fá yau néngwanoi. 31 Árké ambumom kétándmé sómbiota yiyárai némat yéferafé ménde témorwén?" Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Fronde sénko ambum."
english: But what do you think ? A man had two sons , and he came to the first , and said , ‘ Son , go work today in my vineyard.’
He answered , ‘ I will not ,’ but afterward he changed his mind , and went .
He came to the second , and said the same thing . He answered , ‘ I ’m going , sir ,’ but he didn’ t go .

Which of the two did the will of his father ?” They said to him , “ The first .” Jesus said to them , “ Most certainly I tell you that the tax collectors and the prostitutes are entering into God ’s Kingdom before you .

nama: Ménamén Jon walitogh ár yénmormén féfefaf tawauyafotau mbarkánd end féfeyot résaghét, a fémofem yau efalo yiyátoyénd fá, wénde mani kafégh ár a tukal amafam efalo yiyátoyénd fá. Táf njam fémofem yinjoyénd yéné yam, fém yau nawengoyénd a efalo yiyátoyénd. Rengerenge si ndau téfnárfenemén géreif mbwe ménj ndawan
english: For John came to you in the way of righteousness , and you didn’ t believe him ; but the tax collectors and the prostitutes believed him . When you saw it , you didn’ t even repent afterward , that you might believe him .

nama: Yesu norayayéng, "Káyárangi ámb rengerenge si. Kété ámb mband Yuré emon yeitam géreif mbwe ménj ndau ménát mbwe anoghét kété, áráke yurnam, yékw yétanam ménát géreif mbwe tumangéghét a tuk ghékéf fayogh méngo kitaré yérametam. Féyo yémon yéramai watma géreif mbwe ménj ndau kétán ndau téfnárafefaf ménát yémo so ewinjote ámb géreif mbwe yéné ndauta a fá nuwanoyéng nayu yuwot. 34 Njam árnogh efogh nawerai, ámb faiofnar ásáfogh ár engwáfáretam ndau téfnárafefaf ménát sái tawinjongayénd ámb géreif mbwe yéné ndauta. 35 Wénde yémofem ewerayénd yáne faiofnar ásáfogh ár, ámb yéfmotaménd, ámb yésmetaménd krotio, wíme ámb tafiyátotawét.
english: “Hear another parable . There was a man who was a master of a household who planted a vineyard, set a hedge about it , dug a wine press in it , built a tower , leased it out to farmers, and went into another country.
When the season for the fruit came near , he sent his servants to the farmers to receive his fruit .
The farmers took his servants , beat one , killed another , and stoned another .

nama: "Féyo wéikor yémon ámb tárfár faiofnar ásáfogh ár ewáfáretam, ndau téfnáram ndenéyameyo tawafrotawét. 37 Soraméfifi yémon yáfáretam yánjo ambum kétán yéfefaf. Fá norayayéng, 'Efaloe yémofem so yutémndat tane ambum.' 38 Wénde njam ndau téfnáram yinjoyénd ambum, yémofem norayayénd yéfe kénjúnro, 'Yéné siyém Yurane ambum. Kénaflangi, so yésmetam fá, a ménát yéné ndau so kamndangé téfene!' 39 Féyo yémofem yerayénd fá, yitaménd géreif mbwe ménj ndau téndota, a krotio yésmetaménd."
english: Again , he sent other servants more than the first ; and they treated them the same way .
But afterward he sent to them his son , saying , ‘ They will respect my son .’
But the farmers, when they saw the son , said among themselves , ‘ This is the heir . Come , let ’ s kill him and seize his inheritance .’
So they took him and threw him out of the vineyard, then killed him .

nama: Yesum emotai, "Féyo, njam géreif mbwe ménj ndau yuré nénangota, némé yémon so yafrote ndau téfnárafefaf?
english: When therefore the lord of the vineyard comes , what will he do to those farmers?”

nama: Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Yémon so esmete yéné yaufi ár a géreif mbwe ménj ndau so tawaramangé watma maniot ámb árfeyot, emofem so taramangi yáyot yáne géreif mbwe wau efghon."
english: They told him , “ He will miserably destroy those miserable men , and will lease out the vineyard to other farmers who will give him the fruit in its season .”

nama: Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Té fémofem yéné si yaftaménd Buk sian? 'Wím yékenayénd méngo ramégh árém soramé namndayéng sénko wím. Yuram yéné yafrotaméng, merfifi téfene ghékfan.
english: Jesus said to them , “ Did you never read in the Scriptures , ‘ The stone which the builders rejected was made the head of the corner . This was from the Lord . It is marvelous in our eyes ’? + 21:42 Psalms 118:22-23

nama: Yesu kor mé korayau, "Féyo yéndon emndetan fém, Ngánjánene limánégh so tawakawangé féfeyot a tawaramangé árét emofem efunat mer mbwe. 44 Árké ár njam kuyangé yéné wíman so natyane karéfkarfot a fá endefaf njam kuyangé so yéfarne."
english: “ Therefore I tell you , God ’s Kingdom will be taken away from you and will be given to a nation producing its fruit .
He who falls on this stone will be broken to pieces, but on whomever it will fall, it will scatter him as dust .”

nama: Limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a Farasi árém njam náyárayénd Yesuene rengerenge si a mat náyátoyénd ndené yémon korayawéng yéfenemén, 46 féyo yémofem werghét Yesu térametawét. Wénde fá férfér tamorwén ár mérénmén, emofem nemnat ndené fá siyém Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár.
english: When the chief priests and the Pharisees heard his parables , they perceived that he spoke about them .
When they sought to seize him , they feared the multitudes , because they considered him to be a prophet .

nama: Yesu wéi korayau rengerenge sie yéfefaf: 2 "Njafar limánégh ndenanit yém. Kété témorwén warsagh ár emon yéfrendaméng awerégh téménd njamke yánjo ambumoenemén. 3 Yémon yánjo faiofnar ásáfogh ár ewáfáretam yéfe wasroghét efe té engémndai fronde, wénde fá yau ménde tamorwén álighét.
english: Jesus answered and spoke to them again in parables , saying ,
“ The Kingdom of Heaven is like a certain king , who made a wedding feast for his son ,
and sent out his servants to call those who were invited to the wedding feast , but they would not come .

nama: "Féyo wéi ámb faiofnar ásáfogh ár ewáfáretam yéfe orayéghét efe té engémndai fronde: 'Tane téménd siyém frengéghkaf yém. Yéndon esman tane ghakér kau a ámb yarésafé tot kau, a méinyotio téménd frengéghkaf yém! Kénaflangi awerégh téméndfaf.'
english: Again he sent out other servants , saying , ‘ Tell those who are invited , “ Behold , I have prepared my dinner. My cattle and my fatlings are killed , and all things are ready . Come to the wedding feast !”’

nama: "Wénde yéné wan téfnár efe té engémndai fronde yau namnyoyénd álighét a fá nuwanoyénd yéfenjo méndefé yam wafroghét: ámb nuwanoi yánjo ndaufaf, ámb yánjo sétuwafaf, 6 táf ámb árém ewerayénd yáne faiofnar ásáfogh ár, ngi ewafngoyénd, a esmetaménd fá krotio. 7 Warsagh ár minde nékw témorwén. Féyo yémon yánjo fiyaré ewáfáretam yéné tesenot ánde yéné ár tamorangérwén. Yémofem esmetaménd ár emofem esmetaménd warsagh ároene faiofnar ásáfogh ár a ewasérmbotaménd yéfene tesen fése.
english: But they made light of it , and went their ways, one to his own farm, another to his merchandise ;
and the rest grabbed his servants , treated them shamefully, and killed them .
When the king heard that , he was angry , and sent his armies , destroyed those murderers , and burned their city .

nama: "Féyo yémon emotai yánjo faiofnar ásáfogh ár a tamndangé fá, 'Tane awerégh téménd frengéghkaf yém, wénde ár efe yéndon engémndan fá féyotarofnar em sái eném. 9 Sénonjo tangém túmén endfaf a tanémndangi tárfár ár téméndfaf njam tawinjongi.' 10 Féyo faiofnar ásáfogh ár nuwanoyénd endét a engwasrotaménd méinyotio ár efe té ewinjoyénd, mer a yaufi ár, a awerégh téménd méngo árém nofayoyéng.
english: “ Then he said to his servants , ‘ The wedding is ready , but those who were invited weren’ t worthy.
Go therefore to the intersections of the highways , and as many as you may find , invite to the wedding feast .’
Those servants went out into the highways and gathered together as many as they found , both bad and good . The wedding was filled with guests.

nama: "Warsagh ár néngaflai wan téfnár fandaghét. Yémo yinjoi ámb ár efe yau tawongérwén awerégh sáláme. 12 Warsagh árom yémotayéng, 'Fútar, ndernáye fém yéna ném awerégh téménd sálámefnar?' Wénde árom yau nuwangoyéng.
english: “ But when the king came in to see the guests, he saw there a man who didn’ t have on wedding clothing ,
and he said to him , ‘ Friend , how did you come in here not wearing wedding clothing ?’ He was speechless .

nama: "Féyo warsagh árom emndai faiofnar ásáfogh ár, 'Taumbangi yáne ngángé a kafkaf, a titangi sémta kwéfkwéf sifayat. Kété ánde yémon tékrát a sén so ekérne.'"
english: Then the king said to the servants , ‘ Bind him hand and foot , take him away , and throw him into the outer darkness . That is where the weeping and grinding of teeth will be .’

nama: Yesum kerker si norayai, "Tárfár so tangémndangé, wénde nambioro tawaferngé." Ámogh ménát mani ramégh Rom tuk warsagh ár, Kaisare
english: For many are called , but few chosen .”

nama: Farasi ár néwanoyénd a unyégh sie urér takeindawét Yesu némé si sái korayangai némat so terangayénd. 16 Féyo yémofem yéfenjo waitogh ár engwáfáretaménd Yesuefaf a ámb ár kétándmé Erodene mérénta a korayangi, "Watamegh ár, yénd mat yéném fém sném efalo si afrogh ár. Fémon ewatamete efalo si némé Ngánjánene ménde yém árét. Fém yau férfér ném ámb árém némé nemnat fenemén, ménamén fémo méinyotio ár efande ámbiroréran. 17 Féyo ténmaufro téfeyot, ndernáye wét fém nemne? Yéné mbarkánd yém mani raméghmén kétán Rom tuk warsagh ár, Kaisarefaf o yau?"
english: Then the Pharisees went and took counsel how they might entrap him in his talk .

They sent their disciples to him , along with the Herodians , saying , “ Teacher , we know that you are honest, and teach the way of God in truth, no matter whom you teach ; for you aren’ t partial to anyone .
Tell us therefore , what do you think ? Is it lawful to pay taxes to Caesar , or not ?”

nama: Wénde Yesu mat náyátoi yéfene yaufi mwighé a fá norayai, "Fém farun mer néretati wénde kénjún yau em. Némamén ta fémofem unyégh sie urér wakeindati? 19 Kwémauyafend ta mani mbwe árké mani ramégh fáyot!"
english: But Jesus perceived their wickedness , and said , “ Why do you test me , you hypocrites ?
Show me the tax money .” They brought to him a denarius .

nama: a yémon emotayéng fá, "Endene sáf a yétkwén yéné yém?"
english: He asked them , “ Whose is this image and inscription ?”

nama: Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Kaisarene." Féyo Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Kaisare taramangi yáne némé yém, a Ngánjáne taramangi yáne némé yém."
english: They said to him , “ Caesar ’s.” Then he said to them , “ Give therefore to Caesar the things that are Caesar ’s, and to God the things that are God ’s.”

nama: Yémofem njam náyárayénd, fá sélngwél emormén a yémofem yéfrangoyénd a nuwanoyénd. Ámogh si ménamén kérta anoghmén
english: When they heard it , they marveled , and left him and went away.

nama: Yéné efghonyo ámb Saduki ár enmormén Yesuefaf ámoghét. Yémofem efalo tiyátotawét ndené ár kérta yau so nanotat. 24 Fá korayangi, "Watamegh ár! Mosesém yéfarotam nák ndené njam efe ár ambumofnar kér yém, yánngénom fété so kwiré kawerangé a ambum eunjeta yanai. 25 Yéna tamorangérwén 7 ambum téfe kénjún. Fronde sénkom nawerai a kér yémormén ambumofnar, féyo yémon yéfrangoi kwiré yánngnoe. 26 Yénamayom nawerai a kér yémorwén, a nambiomén nawerai. Náyátoyénd kétánotio sefenmén efe témorwén. 27 Soramé amaf kér yémormén. 28 Táf yéné efghon njam ár kérta nanotat ghérsat, endene amaf so yém? Ménamén méinyotioam té naweretaménd fá."
english: On that day Sadducees ( those who say that there is no resurrection) came to him . They asked him ,
saying , “ Teacher , Moses said , ‘ If a man dies, having no children , his brother shall marry his wife and raise up offspring for his brother.’
Now there were with us seven brothers. The first married and died , and having no offspring left his wife to his brother.
In the same way , the second also , and the third , to the seventh .
After them all , the woman died .
In the resurrection therefore , whose wife will she be of the seven ? For they all had her .”

nama: Yesum ewawangoyéng yéfeyot, "Féfene mwighé mámáfi yém. Ménamén fém yau mat em Buk si a Ngánjánene wafté. 30 Njam kér ár kanongi ghérsat, fá ndené so em njafar si résagh ár njafaran a yau so naweretat. 31 Kérta angoghmén ghérsat, fémofem té yaftaménd némé Ngánjánam emndai fém? Ngánján norayam, 32 'Yénd wém Ebraamene Ngánján, Aisekene Ngánján a Jeikofene Ngánján.' Fá siyém ghérsé árfene Ngánján yém, yau kér árfene Ngánján yém."
english: But Jesus answered them , “ You are mistaken , not knowing the Scriptures , nor the power of God .
For in the resurrection they neither marry nor are given in marriage , but are like God ’s angels in heaven .
But concerning the resurrection of the dead , haven’ t you read that which was spoken to you by God , saying ,
‘ I am the God of Abraham, and the God of Isaac , and the God of Jacob ’? God is not the God of the dead , but of the living .”

nama: Njam ár mérnam náyárayénd yéné, fá emormén sélngwél yáne watameghmén. Ndimbal nák
english: When the multitudes heard it , they were astonished at his teaching .

nama: Njam Farasi ár náyárayénd ndené Yesum té ekmboyéng Saduki ár, Farasi ár mérne náumendayénd, 35 a ámb Farasi ár efe témorwén nák watamegh ár, kemnau Yesue ámogh sie ufoghét. 36 Yémon yémotai, "Watamegh ár! Árké nákam ewainde ámb nák?"
english: But the Pharisees , when they heard that he had silenced the Sadducees , gathered themselves together .
One of them , a lawyer , asked him a question , testing him .
“ Teacher , which is the greatest commandment in the law ?”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "'Yuweta fenjo Yuré Ngánján méinyotio fenjo tikfe, méinyotio fenjo mbérmbére, méinyotio fene mwighaye.' 38 Yéné siyém fronde a minde ndimbal nák yém. 39 Yénamayo minde ndimbal nák siyém, 'Euweta fenjo kaka ár ndené fémyo ndernáye náuwete.' 40 Yéné sómbio nák ere méinyotio Mosesene nák a Ngánjánene mat yátogh árfene watameghene téfén ere." Ámogh si Kerisoenemén
english: Jesus said to him , “‘ You shall love the Lord your God with all your heart , with all your soul , and with all your mind .’
This is the first and great commandment .
A second likewise is this , ‘ You shall love your neighbor as yourself .’
The whole law and the prophets depend on these two commandments .”

nama: Njam ámb Farasi ár náumendayénd mérne, Yesum emotayéng, 42 "Ndernáye wét fém nemnati yéné Kerisoenemén? Árké ákimén fá yém?" Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Fá yém Deifidene ákimén."
english: Now while the Pharisees were gathered together , Jesus asked them a question ,
saying , “ What do you think of the Christ ? Whose son is he ?” They said to him , “ Of David .”

nama: Yesum emotai, "Féyo némamén Ngánján Mbérmbéram télimndau Deifidém sái tanmotau tane 'Yuré'? Deifid norayai,
english: He said to them , “ How then does David in the Spirit call him Lord , saying ,

nama: 'Yuré Ngánján noraye kétán tane Yurafaf: Kámnjo yénandmé tane tambénta kétánotio yéndon fene mék téfnár tákman fene kafkaf mbanmbanan.'
english: ‘ The Lord said to my Lord , sit on my right hand , until I make your enemies a footstool for your feet ’? + 22:44 Psalms 110:1

nama: Deifidém njam yémndeta Keriso 'Yuré,' ndernáye so yéné Keriso yém yáne ákiambum?"
english: “ If then David calls him Lord , how is he his son ?”

nama: Emon ámb kor yau Yesue uwangogh si yaramai, a kétándmé yéné efghon a ámb efghon, méinyotio ár férfér tamorwén Yesue ámb ámogh siyot.
english: No one was able to answer him a word , neither did any man dare ask him any more questions from that day forward.

nama: Féyo Yesu korayau ár mérnafefaf a yáne waitogh árfefaf. 2 "Nák watamegh ár a Farasi ár em waftafé ménát Mosesene nákoene fifi waferghét. 3 Fém táf so náyáretati a ewaitotati méinyotio némat yémofem njam emndetat wafroghét, wénde yau táf yéfene yam wafrogh nufénmetati, ménamén yémofem yau wafrogh yaman yékmetat némé ewatametat. 4 Yémofem tafayongi kérté árfene faderan árké em kérté a résaghét táikér, wénde yéfene wáutárégh ngángé yau yém ménát yéné kérté résaghét.
english: Then Jesus spoke to the multitudes and to his disciples ,
saying , “ The scribes and the Pharisees sit on Moses ’ seat .
All things therefore whatever they tell you to observe , observe and do , but don’ t do their works ; for they say , and don’ t do .
For they bind heavy burdens that are grievous to be borne, and lay them on men ’s shoulders ; but they themselves will not lift a finger to help them .

nama: "Yémofem méinyotio yam ewafrotat ménát ndené árém so efandat fá. Fá ewawo némbnar boks ménayafé faroghkaf Buk si ménj yéné kénjún, wénde yémofem engwafrotat yéné boks minde ndimbale. Yémofem eumbetat tombé sayérsayér sálámeyan! 6 Yémofem túmén méndefé efandat utmanégh sifayé téméndfaf a merfifi ámnjogh sifayé áumengégh méngomé, 7 yéfene áuwéghafé yém árém sái esmetat térarégh sifayamé a sái emndetat 'Watamegh ár.'
english: But they do all their works to be seen by men . They make their phylacteries broad and enlarge the fringes of their garments,
and love the place of honor at feasts , the best seats in the synagogues ,
the salutations in the marketplaces, and to be called ‘ Rabbi , Rabbi ’ by men .

nama: "Árém yau táf ewanmotat 'watamegh ár,' ménamén fém ámbrérero em a mé ámbiro Watamegh ár yém. 9 A fémofem yau táf yémndetati ámb ár yéna mband maratan 'Afé,' ménamén féfene Afé njafaran siyém ámbiroro yém. 10 Yau ámb árém táf ewanmotat 'Limánégh ár,' ménamén féfene mé fáro a ámbiro limánégh ár yém yéné Keriso. 11 Minde tukén ár féfe kénjún sái yém féfene faiofnar ásáfogh ár. 12 Efe fáyo nawarmbote Ngánjánam so tékmangé yuwan, a efe yuwén yém Ngánjánam so tékmangé tukén. Yesu korayau Farasi ár a nák watamegh árfene mámáfimén
english: But you are not to be called ‘ Rabbi ’, for one is your teacher , the Christ , and all of you are brothers.
Call no man on the earth your father , for one is your Father , he who is in heaven .
Neither be called masters , for one is your master , the Christ .
But he who is greatest among you will be your servant .
Whoever exalts himself will be humbled , and whoever humbles himself will be exalted .

nama: "Nderé mámáfi yém féfeyot, nák watamegh ár a Farasi ár. Fém farun mer néretati wénde kénjún yau. Fémofem njafar limánégh sésafne yémnati árfene sáfrére. Fém fémyo yau nélawangi, yau eumyotati fá efe ménde em élaughét!{m{ ...f* {m{23.14 Ámb Grik bukan siménj 14 kété yém, wénde tárfár Grik bukan yau yém. Yéné siménj, "Fém nák watamegh téfnár a Farasi ár efe farun mer néretati wénde kénjún yau em. Nderé mámáfi yém féfeyot. Fémofem ewawindati séfarékw amafafet a tawanangi yéfene méngo a rokar féfendio, a fémofem ewafrotati tombé Ngánjánafé orayégh si ménát ámb árém so efandat. Soramé kerker efghon fémofem so tawanangi ndimbalfifi kérté."
english: “ Woe to you , scribes and Pharisees , hypocrites ! For you devour widows’ houses, and as a pretense you make long prayers. Therefore you will receive greater condemnation.
“But woe to you, scribes and Pharisees, hypocrites! Because you shut up the Kingdom of Heaven against men; for you don’t enter in yourselves, neither do you allow those who are entering in to enter.

nama: "Nderé mámáfi yém féfeyot, nák watamegh ár a Farasi ár. Fém farun mer néretati wénde kénjún yau. Fém boute eyota arakafamé a néférmetati méinyotio yuwomé ménát ámbiro waitogh ár winjoghét, a fémofem njam tinjongi yéné ár, fémofem minde yaufiafé tiyátongi kémboghofnar fését, yáne yaufiyam tawaindangé féfene yaufiyam!
english: Woe to you , scribes and Pharisees , hypocrites ! For you travel around by sea and land to make one proselyte ; and when he becomes one , you make him twice as much a son of Gehenna as yourselves .

nama: "Nderé mámáfi yém féfeyot, kwéfkwéf limánégh ár. Fém watameghan em, 'Njam ár noraya kwérnar si wáwefnogh méngoe, yémon féyotaro so erafne yánjo si. Wénde njam fá noraya kwérnar si gole wáwefnogh méngon, yémon táf yau so erafne yánjo si.' 17 Kwéfkwéf onon ár mérén! Árkéméné minde tukén yém, gol o wáwefnogh méngo árkéménayam tiyátongé gol njúnnjúnofnar? Wáwefnogh méngo. 18 Fémofem wéi ewatametati, 'Árké árom njam kwérnar si noraya ghéngén wárogh kitarae, yémon féyotaro so erafne yánjo si. Wénde emon njam kwérnar si noraya ramégh rokar ghéngén wárogh kitarayan, yémon táf yau so erafne yánjo si.' 19 Fém kwéfkwéf ár! Árkéméné minde tukén yém, ramégh rokar o ghéngén wárogh kitaré árkéménayam ramégh rokar njúnnjúnofnar tiyátongé? Ghéngén wárogh kitarayam. 20 Yénémaménnde, njam árom ghéngén wárogh kitarae kwérnar si noraya, fá siyém yénaye kwérnar si noraye a méinyotio yéné ramégh rokaran. 21 A njam fá kwérnar si noraya wáwefnogh méngoe, fá kwérnar si noraye yánjo wáwefnogh méngoe a Ngánjáne, efe yémor kété. 22 A njam ámb ár kwérnar si noraya njafare, fá kwérnar si noraye Ngánjánene limánégh ámnjogh sifayae a Ngánjáne efe yémor kété.
english: “ Woe to you , you blind guides , who say , ‘ Whoever swears by the temple , it is nothing ; but whoever swears by the gold of the temple , he is obligated .’
You blind fools ! For which is greater , the gold or the temple that sanctifies the gold ?
And , ‘ Whoever swears by the altar , it is nothing ; but whoever swears by the gift that is on it , he is obligated .’
You blind fools! For which is greater , the gift , or the altar that sanctifies the gift ?
He therefore who swears by the altar , swears by it and by everything on it .
He who swears by the temple , swears by it and by him who has been living in it .
He who swears by heaven , swears by the throne of God and by him who sits on it .

nama: "Nderé mámáfi yém féfeyot, nák watamegh árét a Farasi árét! Fém farun mer néretati wénde kénjún yau em. Fémofem taramangi Ngánjáne ámbiro tenmén ramégh wérwéran, némbne rokar ndené ngandaré, méngér árau, wénde fémofem ekarotati efalo ndimbal watamegh némé yém nákan, ndené mbarkándyam a ghérghérsisayam a ndimbal mwighé. Fémofem táf so némbnar rokarmén ámbiro tenmén ramégh yafrotati, wénde wéi so ewafrotati yéné ndimbal yam. 24 Kwéfkwéf limánégh ár! Fémofem turtongi mbwerang kétándmé féfene nu kafusita, wénde kélongi kemol.
english: “ Woe to you , scribes and Pharisees , hypocrites ! For you tithe mint , dill, and cumin, and have left undone the weightier matters of the law : justice , mercy , and faith . But you ought to have done these , and not to have left the other undone.
You blind guides , who strain out a gnat , and swallow a camel !

nama: "Nderé mámáfi féfeyot, nák watamegh ár a Farasi ár. Fém farun mer néretati wénde kénjún yau em. Fémofem ewányányotati farutaro féfene kafusi a merekin, táf kénjú siyém yaufi mwighé afoghkaf a nité. 26 Kwéfkwéf Farasi ár! Fémofem kénjú eumbnati kafusi a merekin fronde, a faru so yém mer ndenáyo!
english: “ Woe to you , scribes and Pharisees , hypocrites ! For you clean the outside of the cup and of the platter , but within they are full of extortion and unrighteousness.
You blind Pharisee , first clean the inside of the cup and of the platter , that its outside may become clean also .

nama: "Nderé mámáfi féfeyot, nák watamegh ár a Farasi árét. Fém farun mer néretati wénde kénjún yau em. Fém ndené em kwayaghé faruta wénde kénjú kérkéf mbéwé méngonit, árké néretat mer faruta wénde kénjú siyém kér árfene sot afoghare a kérkéf fifi. 28 Ndené endeyo, faruta fém néretati mer méinyotio árfefaf, wénde kénjún fém sem kérkéfro a yaufiyamro. Yesu korayau yéfene tékrátmén
english: “ Woe to you , scribes and Pharisees , hypocrites ! For you are like whitened tombs , which outwardly appear beautiful , but inwardly are full of dead men ’s bones and of all uncleanness.
Even so you also outwardly appear righteous to men , but inwardly you are full of hypocrisy and iniquity.

nama: "Nderé mámáfi féfeyot, nák watamegh ár a Farasi ár! Fém farun mer néretati wénde kénjún yau em. Fémofem ewafrotati mé mer mbéwé méngo yéfene Ngánjánene mat yátogh árfene a ewamanetati yéfene mbéwé méngo fá efe tamorangérwén mbarkánd ghérsaye. 30 Fém norayati, 'Yénd njam ténmorwén téfene ákiafene efghon, yéndfem yau ámb yam so tafrotawém némé yémofem tawafrotawét esmetaménd Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár.' 31 Fém efalo norayati ndené fém em yéné ákimén emofem esmetaménd Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár! 32 Féyo nguwanongi a mé engwafrotati némé féfene ákifem té yaufi tawafrotawét!
english: “ Woe to you , scribes and Pharisees , hypocrites ! For you build the tombs of the prophets and decorate the tombs of the righteous ,
and say , ‘ If we had lived in the days of our fathers , we wouldn’ t have been partakers with them in the blood of the prophets .’
Therefore you testify to yourselves that you are children of those who killed the prophets .
Fill up , then , the measure of your fathers .

nama: "Fém kamban a kambanene ambumtértér! Ndernáye ende wét fém so kawanjarngi kétándmé fém kémboghofnar fését sái engém féfene yaufiyammén? 34 Yéndon fém emndetan ndené yéndon so engwáfáretan féfeyot Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár a káfeté mwighafé ár a watamegh ár. Fémofem ámb so esmetati, enamndati wafatarégh wénan, a efmotati ámb kété áumengégh méngon a ewifnati kétándmé tesenta wéi ámb tesenot. 35 Mbarkánd árfene ngi téfnárafene tékrat so yém féfeyot, kétándmé mbarkánd ár Abel kétán Jakaraya Berekiane ambum, efe fémofem esmetaménd wáwefnogh méngon a ghéngén wárogh kitaré néndkéfan. 36 Yéndon efalo si emndetan: yéné méinyotio árfene ngi téfnárat tékrát so yém yéné ár satafaf! Yesuene uwégh Jerusalemét
english: You serpents , you offspring of vipers , how will you escape the judgment of Gehenna?
Therefore , behold , I send to you prophets , wise men , and scribes . Some of them you will kill and crucify ; and some of them you will scourge in your synagogues and persecute from city to city ,
that on you may come all the righteous blood shed on the earth , from the blood of righteous Abel to the blood of Zachariah son of Barachiah, whom you killed between the sanctuary and the altar .
Most certainly I tell you , all these things will come upon this generation .

nama: "Jerusalem, Jerusalem! Fémon tásmetau Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár a wíme tawafiyatotawét si résagh ár Ngánjánam engwáfáretam féfeyot! Njénamb mbinotmé yénd ménde wém tane ngángé warengégh so yém fene árét, ndené fété amaf kowiam táumendangé yáne tosétosé njamb mbanmbanan, wénde fémon yénd mat yau wiyáto! 38 Sénonjo fene wáwefnogh méngo té nafrangong a sotro yém. 39 Yénandmé sénonjo, yéndon némndetan fém Jerusalem, fémon yénd yau so kwinjo ámb káye kétánotio fém koraya, 'Ngánjánam yéfrende efe yéném Yurane yétkwénan.'"
english: “ Jerusalem , Jerusalem , who kills the prophets and stones those who are sent to her ! How often I would have gathered your children together , even as a hen gathers her chicks under her wings , and you would not !
Behold , your house is left to you desolate .
For I tell you , you will not see me from now on , until you say , ‘ Blessed is he who comes in the name of the Lord !’”

nama: Yesum yéfrangoi wáwefnogh méngo. Njam fá tiyotawéng, yáne waitogh ár enmormén yáfaf a yémofem yauyafoyénd mer wáwefnogh méngo a yénayoene méngo. 2 Fá norayai, "Féyotaro, fémofem kor efandati yéné méinyotio méngo. Yéndon fem efalo emndetan ndené, yau ámb wím so yéfai ámb wíman, méinyotio yéné taranéghmén em." Soramé efoghmén ufrogh yam
english: Jesus went out from the temple , and was going on his way . His disciples came to him to show him the buildings of the temple .
But he answered them , “ You see all of these things , don’ t you ? Most certainly I tell you , there will not be left here one stone on another , that will not be thrown down .”

nama: Njam Yesu námnjoi Olif Mband tunakfan, waitogh ár enmormén yéfembia yáfaf a yémotayénd, "Ténmaufro njam yéné yam ufroghan so em wawefnogh méngofaf a némé yamam so ténmaufrongé ndené efogh té nawer fene angoghmén a mband maratoene yatoghmén."
english: As he sat on the Mount of Olives , the disciples came to him privately , saying , “ Tell us , when will these things be ? What is the sign of your coming , and of the end of the age?”

nama: Yesum ewawangoyéng, "Mwighé sénté, yau ámb árom táf ewawinda féfe. 5 Tárfár ár so eném tane yétkwénan nénorayat, 'Yénd wém Keriso,' a so ewawindat tárfár árét. 6 Fém so náyáretati mékmén kaka a afrogh si mékmén nayumén, wénde fém férfér yau em. Yéné yam fété so nufrotat, wénde yéné fifi yau yém ndené yatogh efogh té nawer. 7 Ámb ndimbal yu so násmetat ámb ndimbal yuafé, warsagh ár limánégh yu so násmetat ámb warsagh limánégh yuafé. Kété so yém káukáu a sokrere fénaté yuwomé. 8 Yéné yam so em ndenanit fronde tékrát yénau yém ambum áráfghan.
english: Jesus answered them , “ Be careful that no one leads you astray .
For many will come in my name , saying , ‘ I am the Christ ,’ and will lead many astray .
You will hear of wars and rumors of wars . See that you aren’ t troubled , for all this must happen , but the end is not yet .
For nation will rise against nation , and kingdom against kingdom; and there will be famines , plagues, and earthquakes in various places .
But all these things are the beginning of birth pains .

nama: "Fém so tawerangi a ewasérmbotat a krot takmangi. Méinyotio mband marat ár méndménd so em féfefaf ménamén tane téfnan. 10 Yéné efghon, tárfáram so etarnat ndimbal mwighé, a so sén nufrotat a méndméndat nafandat fárofáro.
english: “ Then they will deliver you up to oppression and will kill you . You will be hated by all of the nations for my name ’s sake .
Then many will stumble , and will deliver up one another, and will hate one another.

nama: "Tárfár unyégh mat yátogh ár so nufanat a ewawindat tárfár árét. 12 Yéné yaufioene ásáfogh maratan so em a árfene uwégh so kékmbongé. 13 Wénde efe njam taikre nawereta kerker efoghtio Ngánjánam so kawanjarngé. 14 Yéné mer si njafar limánéghmén so yéngwaitotat méinyotio mband maratan matot méinyotio árét, a féyo so yéném yatogh. Minde mámáfi yam
english: Many false prophets will arise and will lead many astray .
Because iniquity will be multiplied , the love of many will grow cold .
But he who endures to the end will be saved .
This Good News of the Kingdom will be preached in the whole world for a testimony to all the nations , and then the end will come .

nama: "Fémofem so tinjongi 'Minde mámáfi yam' Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár Danielém árké korayau. Minde mámáfi árkéméné so yakai yiyátota wáwefnogh méngo mámáfi." Férén matot wafégh árét: mat kamndé yéné sioene fifi némé yém. 16 "Efe njam Judian em táf nénngérsat tárfár mband tunakfot. 17 Ámb ár efe njam méngo tukén yéfai yau táf kéneworngé rokar résaghét méngot. 18 Ámb ár efe njam ndawan yém yau táf ngangongé sáláme résaghét. 19 Nderé tékrát yéné kwéfon so yém yéfeyot amafat efe suafé njam em a amaf efe fasri ambumafé sái em! 20 So Ngánjánafé norayati ménát fém yau so kenngo yunjéf néndkéfan o Safatan! 21 Kérté yéné efghon so yém minde tukén mámáfi ánde ndené yau yénmormén kétándmé mband ufrogh kétánotio sénonjo. Soramé efghon ámb ndené yam yau so kor yém. 22 Wénde Ngánjánam yau njam efogh ténjfi táyátongé, efe yau so kunjarngé. Wénde ménamén yáne waferégh ár téfnan, Ngánjánam efogh so ténjfi táyátongé.
english: “ When , therefore , you see the abomination of desolation , which was spoken of through Daniel the prophet , standing in the holy place ( let the reader understand ),
then let those who are in Judea flee to the mountains .
Let him who is on the housetop not go down to take out the things that are in his house .
Let him who is in the field not return back to get his clothes .
But woe to those who are with child and to nursing mothers in those days !
Pray that your flight will not be in the winter nor on a Sabbath ,
for then there will be great suffering , such as has not been from the beginning of the world until now , no , nor ever will be .
Unless those days had been shortened , no flesh would have been saved . But for the sake of the chosen ones, those days will be shortened .

nama: "Féyo, njam emon tamndangé fém, 'Kéretangi, Keriso siyém' o 'Kété kés yém,' yau táf efalo yiyátotati. 24 Unyégh Keriso a unyégh mat yátogh ár so eném. Yémofem minde tukén fénaté ufarogh yam wafrogh a sélngwélafé yam so ewafrotat ménát yénaye ár so ewawindat méinyotio ár, a wéi Ngánjánene waferéghmén ár, yéné njam féyotaro yém. 25 Káyárangi! Yéndon fém frondeyo té enémndetamén.
english: “ Then if any man tells you , ‘ Behold , here is the Christ !’ or , ‘ There !’ don’ t believe it .
For false christs and false prophets will arise , and they will show great signs and wonders , so as to lead astray , if possible , even the chosen ones .
“ Behold , I have told you beforehand.

nama: "O, njam árém tamndangé fém, 'Kéretangi, fá kété fanfne yuwon yém,' yau engém kétán; o yémofem tamndangi, 'Kéretangi, fá kété méngo sátayan yém,' efalo yau táf yiyátotati. 27 Ménamén Ároene Ambum so yéném ndenanit toya kwayaghé yénau yém njafaran kétándmé werta kétán mbormbor tambén.
english: “ If therefore they tell you , ‘ Behold , he is in the wilderness ,’ don’ t go out ; or ‘ Behold , he is in the inner rooms ,’ don’ t believe it .
For as the lightning flashes from the east, and is seen even to the west , so will the coming of the Son of Man be .

nama: "Ánde kér fifi yékmang, ndikáké kété so náumendat. Ároene Ambumoene angoghmén
english: For wherever the carcass is , that is where the vultures gather together .

nama: "Tekofnar wasérmbogh efogh soramé, efogh so téfértangé kwéfité, ndenáyo ghérare kwayaghé yau so yém, kénd so nénuitat kétándmé njafarta, a njafarmén waftafé rokar so násámbnetat.
english: “ But immediately after the suffering of those days , the sun will be darkened , the moon will not give its light , the stars will fall from the sky , and the powers of the heavens will be shaken ;

nama: "Yéné efghon Ároene Ambumoene ufarégh sáf so kufarngé njafaran, a ár méinyotio mband maratan so nendat táf Ároene Ambum njam tinjongi njafar kwamkwaman yéném waftafé a ndimbal kwayaghafé. 31 Sufér keyafé yémon so tawáfáretangé yáne njafar si résagh ár méinyotio yu a méngotuot ménát áumengéghét yáne waferégh ár kétándmé ámb mband maratoene yatogh kétán ámbfaf. Tanangi matyam fig wénta
english: and then the sign of the Son of Man will appear in the sky . Then all the tribes of the earth will mourn , and they will see the Son of Man coming on the clouds of the sky with power and great glory .
He will send out his angels with a great sound of a trumpet , and they will gather together his chosen ones from the four winds, from one end of the sky to the other .

nama: "Matyam tanangi fig wénta. Njam yáne kafekafe kénamndangi wén árau ngarot a áfrát a totér mbém árau afiyarégh ngufngongi, fém mat kamndangi ndené efogh yu siyém kaka yém. 33 Ndené endeyo, fémofem njam tinjongi méinyotio yéné yam fém so mat kamndangi ndené Ároene Ambumoene angogh kwéf kaka yém. 34 Yéndo emndetan yéné: yéné ár saté yau so méinyotio kér em kétánotio méinyotio yéné yam nufrotat. 35 Njafar a mband marat so kawaindangend, wénde tane si siyém yau so kawaindangé. Efe ámb yau mat yém njam Ároene Ambum so nénangote
english: “ Now from the fig tree learn this parable : When its branch has now become tender and produces its leaves , you know that the summer is near .
Even so you also , when you see all these things , know that he is near , even at the doors .
Most certainly I tell you , this generation will not pass away until all these things are accomplished .
Heaven and earth will pass away , but my words will not pass away .

nama: "Efe ámb yau mat yém njam yéné efogh o efoghféneféne so ufroghan yém-yau njafar si résagh ár ndenáyo a yau Ambum wénde Afaro. 37 Ároene Ambumoene angogh siyém ndenanit némé nufrotam Noane efghon. 38 Yéné efghon soramé kéfér yémormén ár njamke a nu néneyan, ár a amaf kaweretawét, kétán efogh nawerai Noa nélawai bout kénjút. 39 Fá yau mat namndayénd némé so kufrotau kétánotio kéféram ewalitotam méinyotio ewifoi. Ndené yam so fiyém njam Ároene Ambum nénangota. 40 Táf yéné efghon sómbio ár ásáfoghan so ere ndawan: Ároene Ambumom so téngwanangé ámb ár, ámb so téfrangongé yambia. 41 Sómbio amaf kété so ere mérne biskar soghan: Ároene Ambumom so téngwanangé ámb, ámb so téfrangongé yambia. 42 Kor aem ghékéf sénté, ménamén fém mafina em árké efghon féfene Yuré so kufarngé. 43 Njam méngo yuré mat yém oro téfnároene efogh, fá táf so mé nérete yáne méngo yau so kélawangé oro téfnár. 44 Féyo fém túmén afrengéghkaf aem. Ároene Ambum so yéném táf fém yau sái nemnati yénémamén. Ndimbal mwighé kér ro o yau ndimbal mwighé kér ro faiofnar ásáfogh ár
english: “ But no one knows of that day and hour , not even the angels of heaven , but my Father only .
As the days of Noah were , so will the coming of the Son of Man be .
For as in those days which were before the flood they were eating and drinking , marrying and giving in marriage , until the day that Noah entered into the ship,
and they didn’ t know until the flood came and took them all away, so will the coming of the Son of Man be .
Then two men will be in the field: one will be taken and one will be left.
Two women will be grinding at the mill : one will be taken and one will be left.
Watch therefore , for you don’ t know in what hour your Lord comes .
But know this , that if the master of the house had known in what watch of the night the thief was coming , he would have watched, and would not have allowed his house to be broken into .
Therefore also be ready , for in an hour that you don’ t expect , the Son of Man will come .

nama: "Efe yém ndimbal mwighé kér ro a káfeté mwighafé faiofnar ásáfogh ár? Yéné ár efe yáne yuram tékmangé wanjengégh ár ámb faiofnar ásáfogh árét sái ewarameta njamke frengéghkaf efghon. 46 Nderé áuwégh yéné faiofnar ásáfogh ároe njam yáne yuram tinjongé yéné yam wafroghan njam fá nénangota méngot! 47 Efalo, yéndon fém emndetan, yuram so tékmangé yéné faiofnar ásáfogh ár méinyotio yáne rokar wanjengéghét. 48 Wénde njam fá yaufi faiofnar ásáfogh ár yém, a korayangé fáyo, 'Tane yuré yau so nénangote wékeye,' 49 a yémon ewafngoi ngi yánjo faiofnar ásáfogh fútaréf njamke a wéri nu enetam wéri árfé. 50 Féyo yéné faiofnar ásáfogh ároene yuré so nénangote yéné kwéfon ánde fá yau so afrengéghkaf yém a yau nawanjete yáyot. 51 Yuram so yénfete ndimbulndimbul a tékmangé kété ánde fá em efe farun mer néretat wénde kénjún yau. Kété fá so ye nendat a sén ekérnat.
english: “ Who then is the faithful and wise servant , whom his lord has set over his household , to give them their food in due season ?
Blessed is that servant whom his lord finds doing so when he comes .
Most certainly I tell you that he will set him over all that he has .
But if that evil servant should say in his heart , ‘ My lord is delaying his coming ,’
and begins to beat his fellow servants , and eat and drink with the drunkards ,
the lord of that servant will come in a day when he doesn’ t expect it and in an hour when he doesn’ t know it ,
and will cut him in pieces and appoint his portion with the hypocrites . That is where the weeping and grinding of teeth will be .

nama: "Yéné kwéfon njafar limánégh siyém ndenanit so yém. Kété tamorwén ten yuwagia mérés emofem tarsawét yéfenjo lambefé a nuwanoyénd amaf awerégh ároe wanféghét a nguwanongayénd yáné awerégh téméndfaf. 2 Ámb 5 tamorwén ongén mwighayan, a ámb 5 tamorwén káfeté mwighafé. 3 Yéné ongén mwighafé totér mérsam ewanayénd lambefé wénde yau ewanayénd ámb farun oil, 4 wénde 5 tamorwén káfeté mwighafé ewanayénd ámb farun oil séfkwénan yéfenjo lambefat. 5 Amaf awerégh ár somé tésiyongérwén, féyo fá kémgham ewifoi a nakmayénd.
english: “ Then the Kingdom of Heaven will be like ten virgins who took their lamps and went out to meet the bridegroom .
Five of them were foolish , and five were wise .
Those who were foolish , when they took their lamps , took no oil with them ,
but the wise took oil in their vessels with their lamps .
Now while the bridegroom delayed, they all slumbered and slept .

nama: "Njam sémbár néndkéf namndai ke táf yémormén, 'Snufar amaf awerégh ár! Kénaflangi a tumyongi fá!' 7 Ten mérés nanoyénd a tafrendawét yéfenjo lambefé mer sái kásáfotawét. 8 Féyo ongén mwighafé mérsam norayayénd yéfefaf káfeté mwighafé mérsafefaf, 'Ténmaramangi téfe ámb féfenemén oil, ménamén téfene lambefé umbértoghétro em.' 9 Káfeté mwighafé mérsam ewawangoyénd, "Yau, so féyotarofnar yém féfe a téfeyot. Nguwanongi kétán sétuat a tanwanangi ámb féfendio.' 10 Féyo ongén mwighafé mérés nuwanoyénd ámb oil résaghét. Njamandio nénguwanoyénd, amaf awerégh ár nufaryéng, yéné 5 efe afrengéghkaf kawanjetawét nénglawayénd kénjút yémafé kétán awerégh téméndfaf, a sésafne namnai.
english: But at midnight there was a cry , ‘ Behold ! The bridegroom is coming ! Come out to meet him !’
Then all those virgins arose , and trimmed their lamps .
The foolish said to the wise , ‘ Give us some of your oil , for our lamps are going out .’
But the wise answered , saying , ‘ What if there isn’ t enough for us and you ? You go rather to those who sell , and buy for yourselves .’
While they went away to buy, the bridegroom came , and those who were ready went in with him to the wedding feast , and the door was shut .

nama: "Soramé ámb ongén mérés nufaryénd a fá nómnendayénd, "Yuré, yuré! Ténmasawér sésafne!' 12 Amaf awerégh árom ewawangoi, "Yéndo efalo emndetan, yénd mafina wém fém.'"
english: Afterward the other virgins also came , saying , ‘ Lord , Lord , open to us .’
But he answered , ‘Most certainly I tell you , I don’ t know you .’

nama: Yesum soramé si norayai, "Mwighé sénté, ménamén fém yau mat em yéné efogh o efoghféneféne tane angoghmén. Rengerenge si nambio faiofnar ásáfogh árfenemén
english: Watch therefore , for you don’ t know the day nor the hour in which the Son of Man is coming.

nama: "Yéné efghon yénd so nénangotan wéikor, njafar limánégh siyém ndené so yém. Kété témorwén ár efe álighét nufngoi, yémon eumendai yánjo faiofnar ásáfogh ár a tawarametau yánjo mani yéfeyot wanjengéghét. 15 Yémon mani ewarametam yéfenjo ásáfogh muyé féyotaroan: ámb ároe yaramai 5,000 gol mani mbwe, ámb ároe yéramai 2,000 gol mani mbwe, a ámb ároe 1,000 gol mani mbwe. Yéné soramé fá nuwanoi. 16 Yéné faiofnar ásáfogh ár emon ewanai 5,000 gol mani mbwe yiotam tekofnaye. Yémo ersam wéikor mani wafroghét. Njam yéné yafrotam, yémo ewinjoi wéikor ámb 5,000 gol mani mbwe. 17 Ndenéyameyo wéi ámb faiofnar ásáfogh ár emon ewanai 2,000 gol mani mbwe ewinjoi wéikor ámb 2,000 gol mani mbwe. 18 Wénde yéné faiofnar ásáfogh ár emon ewanai 1,000 gol mani mbwe yiotam, yékw natanam eyátoi mbandan, a etnoi yáne yurane mani.
english: “ For it is like a man going into another country, who called his own servants and entrusted his goods to them .
To one he gave five talents , to another two , to another one , to each according to his own ability . Then he went on his journey.
Immediately he who received the five talents went and traded with them , and made another five talents .
In the same way , he also who got the two gained another two .
But he who received the one talent went away and dug in the earth and hid his lord ’ s money.

nama: "Soramé tek awafingégh kénjún faiofnar ásáfogh árfene yuré nénangotam a mat tiyátotawét manimén. 20 Yéné faiofnar ásáfogh ár ende yaramai 5,000 gol mani mbwe nélawai yaramai ámb 5,000 gol mani mbwe a norayayéng, 'Fémon waramai ta 5,000 gol mani mbwe, yuré. Tafanda! Sem ámb 5,000 gol mani mbwe árké yéndon té tafrotan.' 21 Yáne yuram yémndai, "Mer ásáfogh, fém mer a ndimbal mwighé kér ro faiofnar ásáfogh ár! Fém ndimbal mwighé kér ro kéném némbne rokar wanjengét, féyo yéndon so kénékman tárfár rokar wanjengégh sifayan. Kénaf a yéndfé áuwégham so yénre!'
english: “ Now after a long time the lord of those servants came , and settled accounts with them .
He who received the five talents came and brought another five talents , saying , ‘ Lord , you delivered to me five talents . Behold , I have gained another five talents in addition to them .’
“ His lord said to him , ‘ Well done , good and faithful servant . You have been faithful over a few things , I will set you over many things . Enter into the joy of your lord .’

nama: "Ásáfogh ár ende yaramai 2,000 gol mani mbwe nélawai a norayai, 'Fémon waramai ta 2,000 gol mani mbwe, yuré. Tafanda! Sem ámb 2,000 gol mani mbwe árké yéndon té tafrotan.' 23 Yáne yuram yémndai, "Mer ásáfogh, fém mer a ndimbal mwighé kér ro faiofnar ásáfogh ár! Fém ndimbal mwighé kér ro kéném némbne rokar wanjengét, féyo yéndon so kénékman tárfár rokar mani wanjengégh sifayan. Kénaf a yéndfé áuwégham so yénre!'
english: “ He also who got the two talents came and said , ‘ Lord , you delivered to me two talents . Behold , I have gained another two talents in addition to them .’
“ His lord said to him , ‘ Well done , good and faithful servant . You have been faithful over a few things . I will set you over many things . Enter into the joy of your lord .’

nama: "Ámb faiofnar ásáfogh ár ende yéramai 1,000 gol mani mbwe nélawai a norayayéng, 'Yuré, yénd mat wém fém ném táikér ár; fémon etane fifi kétándmé ánde fémon yau tiang a ekafete mbwe kétándmé fémon ánde yau etarnam mbwe. 25 Yénd férfér kwém, féyo yénd wiotam a etnoyén fene mani mband kénjún. Tafanda! Sem némé fene em.'
english: “ He also who had received the one talent came and said , ‘ Lord , I knew you that you are a hard man , reaping where you didn’ t sow , and gathering where you didn’ t scatter .
I was afraid , and went away and hid your talent in the earth . Behold , you have what is yours .’

nama: "Yáne yuram yémndai, 'Fém yaufi a sakér faiofnar ásáfogh ár! Fém té mat kénmorwén ndené yéndon etnamén kétándmé ánde yéndon yau eitamén, a eumendamén kété yéndon ánde etarnamén mbwe. 27 Féyotaro yém fémon miya tanyawangai tane mani kété bankot, a yéndon táf so tawanangayén minagh maniafé njam kénangotawén. 28 Féyo mani tanwan yá tambén a taram yéné ároe efe yém 10,000 gol mani mbweyafé. 29 Kétán yéné ároefaf efe yém tárfár rokarafé, yéndo so taraman minde tárfár a yáne némé em so kénamndangi minde tárfár. A yáyot endene yém némbnar, yéndo so takawan némé némbnar yáfaf yém. 30 Ndené fété yéné sakér faiofnar ásáfogh ár, yitat yéné ár sémta kétán kwéfitafaf, ánde fá so nende a yánjo sén so ekérne.' Ambinomén mogh
english: “ But his lord answered him , ‘ You wicked and slothful servant . You knew that I reap where I didn’ t sow , and gather where I didn’ t scatter .
You ought therefore to have deposited my money with the bankers, and at my coming I should have received back my own with interest .
Take away therefore the talent from him and give it to him who has the ten talents .
For to everyone who has will be given , and he will have abundance , but from him who doesn’ t have , even that which he has will be taken away.
Throw out the unprofitable servant into the outer darkness , where there will be weeping and gnashing of teeth .’

nama: "Njam Ároene Ambum nénangota ndené fété warsagh ár a méinyotio njafar si résagh árfé, fá so kénámnjongé yánjo ndimbal kwayaghafé limánégh ámnjogh sifayayan. 32 Ár méinyotio ndimbal yuta táf so náumende yá sáfrére. Féyo yémon sómbio mérén so tafale, ndené fété sif wanjengégh árom nderé tafalongé sif kétándmé gout tambén. 33 Yémon so tákmangé mbarkánd ár yáne tambénta a ámb ár yáne fatrata.
english: “ But when the Son of Man comes in his glory , and all the holy angels with him , then he will sit on the throne of his glory .
Before him all the nations will be gathered , and he will separate them one from another , as a shepherd separates the sheep from the goats .
He will set the sheep on his right hand , but the goats on the left .

nama: "Féyo Warsagh árom so korayangé árfefaf efe em yáne tambénta, 'Kénaflangi, fém efe tane Afam efrendayéng! Kénaflangi a kélawangi limánéghét árké frengéghkaf yém féfeyot kétamé mband marat ufrogh. 35 Ménamén yénd njam siogh kwémorwén fémofem kwémanjnawét yénd, nu siogh a fémofem kwaramangayénd nu, yénd wan téfnár kwémorwén a fémofem kwumyongayénd yénd féfene méngot, 36 njam sálámeofnar kwémorwén, fémofem kwawongayénd sáláme, a yénd njam enjne kwémorwén fémofem kwanjetawét yénd, a njam kwémorwén kwéfkwéf méngon fémofem kwiyafotawét yénd.'
english: Then the King will tell those on his right hand , ‘ Come , blessed of my Father , inherit the Kingdom prepared for you from the foundation of the world ;
for I was hungry and you gave me food to eat . I was thirsty and you gave me drink . I was a stranger and you took me in .
I was naked and you clothed me . I was sick and you visited me . I was in prison and you came to me .’

nama: "Táf mbarkánd árém so tawangongi yáyot, 'Yuré, njam yéndfem fém kénfandawém siogh kénmorwén a kémanjnayém njamke, o nu siogh kénmorwén, nu kémaramangayém feyot? 38 Njam yéndfem kénfandawém fém wan téfnár, kémumyongayém fém téfene méngon, o njam sálámeofnar kénmorwén awoghét, yéndfem kémawotawém? 39 Njam yéndfem kénfandawém fém enjneyan o kété kwéfkwéf méngon, yéndfem kényafotawém fém? 40 Warsagh árom so tawawangongé, 'Yéndon efalo emndetan, némé fémofem tawafrotawét ámb némbnar ároe tane efalo yátogh ármén, fémofem tafrotawét tayot!'
english: “ Then the righteous will answer him , saying , ‘ Lord , when did we see you hungry and feed you , or thirsty and give you a drink ?
When did we see you as a stranger and take you in , or naked and clothe you ?
When did we see you sick or in prison and come to you ?’
“ The King will answer them , ‘Most certainly I tell you , because you did it to one of the least of these my brothers, you did it to me .’

nama: "Féyo yémon wéi so tamndangé yéné fatrata efe em, 'Nguwanongi ta tambén, fém efe em Ngánjánene nékw mbanmbanan! Tangém kétán tuot akegh fését frengéghkaf árké yém Sáifére a yáne yaufi mbérmbér! 42 Yénd njam siogh kwémorwén fémofem yau kwémanjnawét yénd, nu sioghan, fémofem yau kwaramangayénd nu, 43 a njam yénd kwémorwén wan téfnár, fémofem yau kwumyongayénd yénd féfene méngot, a njam sálámeofnar kwémorwén, fémofem yau kwawongayénd sáláme, a yénd njam enjne kwémorwén, fémofem yau kwanjetawét yénd, a njam kwémorwén kwéfkwéf méngon, fémofem yau kwiyafotawét.
english: Then he will say also to those on the left hand , ‘ Depart from me , you cursed , into the eternal fire which is prepared for the devil and his angels;
for I was hungry , and you didn’t give me food to eat ; I was thirsty , and you gave me no drink ;
I was a stranger , and you didn’t take me in ; naked , and you didn’t clothe me ; sick, and in prison , and you didn’t visit me .’

nama: "Féyo yémofem so tawangongi, "Yuré, njam yéndfem kénfandawém fém siogh o nu siogh o wan téfnár o firo o enjne o kété kwéfkwéf méngon, yéndfem yau kénmáutánawém fe?' 45 Warsagh árom so tawawangé, 'Yéndon efalo emndetan, njam fémofem yau táutánawét ámb némbnar ároe tane efalo yátogh ármén, fémofem yau káutánawét ta!'
english: “ Then they will also answer, saying , ‘ Lord , when did we see you hungry , or thirsty , or a stranger , or naked , or sick, or in prison , and didn’t help you ?’
“ Then he will answer them , saying , ‘Most certainly I tell you , because you didn’ t do it to one of the least of these , you didn’ t do it to me .’

nama: "Féyo fá so kuwanongi kétán kémboghofnar tékratfaf, wénde mbarkánd ár so engém kétán tuot akegh ghérsafaf."
english: These will go away into eternal punishment , but the righteous into eternal life .”

nama: Njam Yesuene watamegh méinyotio yammén nefoi, fá norayayéng yánjo waitogh árfefaf, 2 "Fémyo mat, yéné sómbio efghon, Waingégh téménd{n{ ...f* {n{26.2 Waingégh téménd Yéné efghon táf fá kawafarotawét, ménát Ngánjánam sái Israil ár tanwangongai kétamé Ijifta, njafar si résagh yémormén a ewaindai Israilmén ambumtértér a tasmetau a kérot takmangai fronde sénko ambum Ijifmén. kété so yém, a Ároene Ambum so téramangi kétán sái yénamndat wafatarégh wénan."
english: When Jesus had finished all these words , he said to his disciples ,
“ You know that after two days the Passover is coming , and the Son of Man will be delivered up to be crucified .”

nama: Limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a limánégh ár mérne náumendayénd tuk ghéngén wárogh ár, Kayafasene ndimbal méngon, 4 a mwighé táronjawét Yesue werghét kwankwane a Yesu sái krot tékmangayénd. 5 Yémofem norayayénd, "Yau téménd kénjún so terangém o ár mété nékw em téfefaf." Amafom Yesu mer wimafé wékwére yasuryéng Betanin
english: Then the chief priests, the scribes, and the elders of the people were gathered together in the court of the high priest, who was called Caiaphas .
They took counsel together that they might take Jesus by deceit and kill him .
But they said , “ Not during the feast , lest a riot occur among the people .”

nama: Yesu témorwén Betanin kété Saimonene méngon, ár efe fronde tékrátan témorwén yaufi ghéngan enjnemén. 7 Njam Yesum njamke tánetau, amaf yénmormén yáfaf ménáyafé wímmén séfkwénafé ánde ndimbal faimén fénaté mer wimafé wékwér témorwén, a yasuryéng Yesuene sénkoyan. 8 Waitogh árém njam yinjoyénd yéné a nékw nawerayénd a kamotangi, "Némamén yéné yaghne? 9 Yéné amafom so ndimbal maniot yéné mer wimafé wékwér tétérnangai féyo yauyau árét mani so tawarametau!"
english: Now when Jesus was in Bethany, in the house of Simon the leper ,
a woman came to him having an alabaster jar of very expensive ointment , and she poured it on his head as he sat at the table.
But when his disciples saw this , they were indignant, saying , “ Why this waste?
For this ointment might have been sold for much and given to the poor .”

nama: Yesu mat náyátoi fá némé korayawét, a norayai yéfefaf, "Yau mwighé kértayan em yéné amafoefaf. Yémon yafrota yéné minde mer yam tafaf. 11 Yauyau ár túmén fémafé so em, wénde yénd fémafé yau so túmén yéném. 12 Yémon yéné mer yafrota frondeyo yasur tane fifiyan mer wimafé wékwére tane mband ramégh yéfrenda. 13 Yéndon efalo emndetan, méinyotio sifayamé mband maratan árkamé téu árém néngafrotat yéné mer si, yémofem wéi so nafrotat némé yéné amafom yafrotam a so yéngwafarotat fá." Judas néngwanoi Yesue sénot
english: However , knowing this , Jesus said to them , “ Why do you trouble the woman ? She has done a good work for me .
For you always have the poor with you , but you don’ t always have me .
For in pouring this ointment on my body , she did it to prepare me for burial .
Most certainly I tell you , wherever this Good News is preached in the whole world , what this woman has done will also be spoken of as a memorial of her .”

nama: Judas Iskariot, ámb témorwén tuwelf waitogh ár, fá nuwanoi limánégh ghéngén wárogh árfefaf 15 a emotai, "Némé so ta fémofem kwaramangi tayot njam yéndon Yesu sén yérametan féfefaf? Yémofem wafégh mani ewafngoyénd kétán 30 silfé mani mbwe nawerayénd a eramayénd yáyot. 16 Kétándmé Judasém end ronjagh ewafngoi mer ndernáye so témorwén Yesue sén ramghét yéfefaf. Yesuf yáne waitogh árfé ambinomén njamke enetaménd
english: Then one of the twelve , who was called Judas Iscariot , went to the chief priests
and said , “ What are you willing to give me if I deliver him to you ?” So they weighed out for him thirty pieces of silver.
From that time he sought opportunity to betray him .
