nama: Fronde efghon Minaghofnar flawé téméndmén, waitogh ár enmormén kétán Yesuefaf a yémotayénd fá, "Ándan fene ménde yém yéndfem sái yéfrendam Waingégh téménd njamke feyot?"
english: Now on the first day of unleavened bread, the disciples came to Jesus , saying to him , “ Where do you want us to prepare for you to eat the Passover ?”

nama: Yémon emndai fá, "Kuwanongi ámb ár kété yém tesenan a témndangi fá: "Watamegh ár nénorayang: Tane kwéf té nawer, yéndon so enetan Waingégh téménd njamke tane waitogh árfé fene méngon."
english: He said , “ Go into the city to a certain person, and tell him , ‘ The Teacher says , “ My time is at hand . I will keep the Passover at your house with my disciples .”’”

nama: Waitogh árém yafrotaménd ndenáye Yesum ndernáye engémndai Waingégh téménd njamke frengéghét.
english: The disciples did as Jesus commanded them , and they prepared the Passover .

nama: Njam férégh namndai, Yesu a yáne 12 waitogh ár námnjoyénd nénet. 21 Njam yémofem njamke tanetawét Yesum emndayéng, "Yéndon efalo emndetan fém, ámbiro ár yéna yém emo sén so wéramete."
english: Now when evening had come , he was reclining at the table with the twelve disciples .
As they were eating , he said , “ Most certainly I tell you that one of you will betray me .”

nama: Yéné siam waitogh ár eméindai ghérghérsisat a ámbiroámbiro korayawét, "Yuré, tanemén noraye?"
english: They were exceedingly sorrowful , and each began to ask him , “ It isn’t me , is it , Lord ?”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Yéna fété yém ámb ár emafé yéndfé eukéwam féskaf flawé ámbiro merekinan yémon sén so kwéramangé. 24 Ároene Ambum kér so yém ndernáye yéfarotaménd Buk si ndené fá so yém, wénde nderé mámáfi so yém yéné ároe emon Ároene Ambum sén yéramete! Mer so témorwén fá yau fiya káráftau!"
english: He answered , “ He who dipped his hand with me in the dish will betray me .
The Son of Man goes even as it is written of him , but woe to that man through whom the Son of Man is betrayed ! It would be better for that man if he had not been born .”

nama: Judas, sén téfnár, norayai, "Watamegh ár, fém tanemén noraye?" Yesum yawangoyéng, "Fém té norayang efaloe." Yurane ambinomén njamke
english: Judas , who betrayed him , answered , “ It isn’ t me , is it , Rabbi ?” He said to him , “ You said it .”

nama: Njam yémofem njamke tánetawét, Yesum méinyo féskaf flawé yerai, kánjo si yaramai Ngánjáne, a tawatfotau, a ewaramai yánjo waitogh árét a norayai, "Tawerangi a tánetangi. Yéné siyém tane fifi yém."
english: As they were eating , Jesus took bread, gave thanks for it , and broke it . He gave to the disciples and said , “ Take , eat ; this is my body .”

nama: Féyo yémon yerai kafusi, kánjo si yaramai Ngánjáne, a ewaramai yéfe a emndai, "Tánetangi, méinyotio fémofem. 28 Yéné siyém tane férék yém árnyéghmén, árké nertam tárfár árét árfene yaufi wawalingét. 29 Yéndon emndetan fém, yéndon yaufifi so yénetan yéné wéri nu kétánotio efogh kawerangé táf yéndon so yénetan totér wéri nu fémafé kété tane Afane limánéghan."
english: He took the cup , gave thanks , and gave to them , saying , “ All of you drink it ,
for this is my blood of the new covenant , which is poured out for many for the remission of sins.
But I tell you that I will not drink of this fruit of the vine from now on , until that day when I drink it anew with you in my Father ’s Kingdom.”

nama: Táf yémofem Ngánjáneyot wagh eufaryénd a nuwanoyénd Olif Mband tunakfot. Yesu norayai Fitane kenaghmén
english: When they had sung a hymn , they went out to the Mount of Olives .

nama: Féyo Yesum emndai fá, "Sénonjo sémbár méinyotio fém so kenngongi kwéfrangongi yénd, ndené Buk siam noraye, 'Yéndon, Ngánjánam so tésmangén sif wanjengégh ár, táf sif so nofarnat.' 32 Wénde soramé yénd njam kwanongé ghérsat, yénd féfe frondeta so wéngém Galili yuwot."
english: Then Jesus said to them , “ All of you will be made to stumble because of me tonight , for it is written , ‘ I will strike the shepherd , and the sheep of the flock will be scattered .’
But after I am raised up , I will go before you into Galilee .”

nama: Fitam yawangoi, "Yéndo yaufifi so kénéfrangon, wénde ámb árémro so kénéfrangongi!"
english: But Peter answered him , “ Even if all will be made to stumble because of you , I will never be made to stumble .”

nama: Yesu norayai Fitafaf, "Yéndon efalo némndetan fém, fém fronde so korayang nambinotmé, "Yénd mafina wém Yesu." Yéné soramé ghakér kowi kutnangé sénonjo sémbáran.
english: Jesus said to him , “Most certainly I tell you that tonight , before the rooster crows , you will deny me three times .”

nama: Fitam yawangoi, "Yénd yaufifi so ndené korayangén, féyotaro, yéndfé so kér yénre." A méinyotio ámb waitogh ár ndené sáfotio si korayawét. Yesuf Ngánjánafé koraiwét Getsemanen
english: Peter said to him , “ Even if I must die with you , I will not deny you .” All of the disciples also said likewise .

nama: Yesu a yánjo waitogh ár nuwanoyénd yu yétkwén Getsemane, a fá norayai yéfefaf, "Kámnjongi yéna njamandio yénd kétán wéngém Ngánjánafé orayéghét" 37 Yémon ewasroi Fité a sómbio Jefediene ambum yémafé álighét. Yémo yáyárai ghérghérsisé a kérté. 38 Féyo fá norayai yéfefaf, "Yénd minde ghérghérsisé wém. Yéné ghérghérsisayam mété kwésmanga. Nawanjetam yéna a mé néretati yéndfé."
english: Then Jesus came with them to a place called Gethsemane , and said to his disciples , “ Sit here , while I go there and pray .”
He took with him Peter and the two sons of Zebedee , and began to be sorrowful and severely troubled.
Then Jesus said to them , “ My soul is exceedingly sorrowful , even to death . Stay here and watch with me .”

nama: Yesu néngwanoi nayuofnar, fá sáfe náwefnoi mbandot a Ngánjánafé koraiwét, "Tane Afé, njam féyotaro yém, téfnár yéné tékrát tafaf siyéném. Wénde tane ménde yau, wénde fene ménde so nufrote."
english: He went forward a little , fell on his face , and prayed , saying , “ My Father , if it is possible , let this cup pass away from me ; nevertheless , not what I desire , but what you desire .”

nama: Féyo Yesu nénangotam yánjo nambio waitogh árfefaf a ewinjoi fá kémghan, a yémo yémndai Fité, "Fém yau snéretati yéndfé ámbiro efoghfénefénero? 41 Néretati a Ngánjánafé norayati ménát fém yau so ufogham tautfongé. Mbérmbér ménde yém mer yam wafroghét, wénde fifi siyém njangénnjangén yém."
english: He came to the disciples and found them sleeping , and said to Peter , “ What , couldn’ t you watch with me for one hour ?
Watch and pray , that you don’ t enter into temptation . The spirit indeed is willing , but the flesh is weak.”

nama: Ámbirotaro Yesu néngaflai Ngánjánafé orayéghét, "Tane Afé, yéné tékrát yau njam téfnár táfandro yéndon yénetan, fene méndero so nufrote."
english: Again , a second time he went away and prayed , saying , “ My Father , if this cup can ’ t pass away from me unless I drink it , your desire be done .”

nama: Yesu kor nénangoi a ewinjoi waitogh ár kémghan, ménamén yéfene ghékéf tamorwén kérté.
english: He came again and found them sleeping , for their eyes were heavy.

nama: Yesum wéikor efrangoi a néngaflai Ngánjánafé orayéghét nambiomén, yéné sio téfértau. 45 Féyo Yesu nénangotam waitogh árfefaf a emndai, "Némé fém mé kémégh ekém a nenati? Kéretangi! Efoghféneféne té nawer Ároene Ambum yaufi árfene ngángat ramghét yafngongi. 46 Kokayongi, mato kuwanongém. Kéretangi, tane sén téfnár snufane!" Yesu yerayénd
english: He left them again , went away, and prayed a third time , saying the same words .
Then he came to his disciples and said to them , “ Are you still sleeping and resting? Behold , the hour is at hand , and the Son of Man is betrayed into the hands of sinners.
Arise , let’s be going. Behold , he who betrays me is at hand .”

nama: Yesu njam mé korayau, Judas nufaryéng efe témorwén ámbiro kétándmé 12 waitogh ármén. Tárfár árém tanérsawét timé a witmafé sénté naifafé enmormén kétán yáfaf yémofem engwáfáretaménd limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a Ju árfene limánégh ár. 48 Judas, sén téfnárom mat eyátoi frondeyo: "Ár efe yéndon tésnetangén fá fiyém. Fá táf terangi!"
english: While he was still speaking , behold , Judas , one of the twelve , came , and with him a great multitude with swords and clubs , from the chief priests and elders of the people .
Now he who betrayed him had given them a sign , saying , “ Whoever I kiss , he is the one . Seize him .”

nama: Judas néwanoi mbarkándaye Yesuefaf a yémndai. "Mer sémbár, watamegh ár," a yésnetai fá.
english: Immediately he came to Jesus , and said , “ Greetings , Rabbi !” and kissed him .

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Tafrota némat kéném, fútar!"
english: Jesus said to him , “ Friend , why are you here ?” Then they came and laid hands on Jesus , and took him .

nama: Ámb Yesuene waitogh árom yésufai witmafé sénté náifé. Yémo yésmai yénaye tuk ghéngén wárogh ároene faiofnar ásáfogh ár a yanfai yáne téngan. 52 Yesum yémndai fá, "Tango tékém fene witmafé sénté náifé yánjo sifayat. Emofem witmafé sénté náifé tawerangi so kér em witmafé sénté naifayan. 53 Fém táf mat ném yéndo so tamnendangén tane Afé ta wáutárghét, a yémon so tekofnar enwáfárete 72,000 minde tárfár njafar si résagh ár mérén so nasmetat tayot. 54 Yémofem so kwanjarngi. Wénde yéné yammén árké Ngánján té norayai Buk si kénjún yénémamén yau so nufrote. Féyo so nufrote yéné ende.
english: Behold , one of those who were with Jesus stretched out his hand and drew his sword , and struck the servant of the high priest, and cut off his ear .
Then Jesus said to him , “ Put your sword back into its place , for all those who take the sword will die by the sword .
Or do you think that I couldn’ t ask my Father , and he would even now send me more than twelve legions of angels?
How then would the Scriptures be fulfilled that it must be so ?”

nama: Yesu norayai ár mérnafefaf, "Némamén fém taném naifayafé a timayafé ta werghét, ndenanit yénd kar nák rafarégh ár wém? Méinyotio efghon yénd kwémor a tawatametan wáwefnogh méngo sifayan a fémofem yénd yau werayénd. 56 Wénde yéné méinyotio kufrotawét ménát si efalo náyátoi némat Ngánjánene mat yátogh árém yéfrotaménd." Féyo méinyotio waitogh árém yéfrangoyénd fá a nenngoyénd. Yesu yénémnjoyénd Ju ndimbal árfene áumengégh sáfrére
english: In that hour Jesus said to the multitudes , “ Have you come out as against a robber with swords and clubs to seize me ? I sat daily in the temple teaching , and you didn’ t arrest me .
But all this has happened that the Scriptures of the prophets might be fulfilled .” Then all the disciples left him and fled .

nama: Emofem yerayénd Yesu yémnjoyénd kétán tuk ghéngén wárogh ár Kayafasene ndimbal méngot, ánde nák watamegh ár a limánégh ár nénáumendayénd. 58 Fité nayukéráye mé kénwaitotau, njam kaka yiyátoi tuk ghéngén wárogh ároene méngo sifayé. Fá nélawai kénjút yéné sifayat a námnjoi wambégh árfé ménát fandaghét némé so kufrotau Yesuefaf. 59 Limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a méinyotio Ju limánégh ár ménjtaye mé kéretawét Yesuenemén ámb unyégh siyot ménát sái tékmangayénd Yesu krot. 60 Kété tárfár ár enmormén kétán a unyégh si korayawét Yesuenemén, wénde yémofem ámb téfén yau yawinjoyénd ménát sái kérot tékmangayénd.
english: Those who had taken Jesus led him away to Caiaphas the high priest, where the scribes and the elders were gathered together .
But Peter followed him from a distance to the court of the high priest, and entered in and sat with the officers , to see the end .
Now the chief priests, the elders, and the whole council sought false testimony against Jesus , that they might put him to death ,
and they found none . Even though many false witnesses came forward , they found none . But at last two false witnesses came forward

nama: a norayangeyayénd yéné unyégh si, "Yéné ár norayayéng, 'Yéndon féyotaro so yironan Ngánjánene wáwefnogh méngo a nambio efogh kénjún so yérametan tifon."
english: and said , “ This man said , ‘ I am able to destroy the temple of God , and to build it in three days .’”

nama: Tuk ghéngén waitogh ár nokayoi a yémotai Yesu, "Fém némamén yau noraye fendio awamarogh si?" 63 Wénde Yesu mé métar namndai. Wéikor tuk ghéngén wárogh árom yémotai fá, "Akegh Ngánjánene yétkwénan yéndon sénonjo némndetan sotafé unyéghofnar si: ténmaufro téfeyot fém ném yéné Keriso, Ngánjánene Ambum."
english: The high priest stood up and said to him , “ Have you no answer? What is this that these testify against you ?”
But Jesus stayed silent . The high priest answered him , “ I adjure you by the living God that you tell us whether you are the Christ , the Son of God .”

nama: Yesum yawangoi yá, "A! Yénd fété wém. Fém némé noraye. Wénde yéndon fém méinyotio emndetan: yénandmé sénonjo efoghta nde kés yéngém tekofnaye fémofem so tinjongi Ároene Ambum sái yémorang Wafté kér ro Ngánjáne tambén ngángata a so yéném njafar kwamkwam kénjún!"
english: Jesus said to him , “ You have said so . Nevertheless , I tell you , after this you will see the Son of Man sitting at the right hand of Power , and coming on the clouds of the sky .”

nama: Táf fété tuk ghéngén wárogh árom yéftéraryéng yáne sáláme a norayai, "Fá té korayau wasérmbogh si Ngánjánefaf! Yénd yau wéi so náyáretam ámb fandagh árfene si. Fémofem té yiyárangi yáne wasérmbogh si! 66 Fém ndernáye nemnati?" Méinyotio árém yawangoyénd, "Fá siyém yaufi, a krot so tékmangém."
english: Then the high priest tore his clothing , saying , “ He has spoken blasphemy! Why do we need any more witnesses ? Behold , now you have heard his blasphemy.
What do you think ?” They answered , “ He is worthy of death !”

nama: Féyo ámb árém Yesu mbérme farángégh yafngoyénd sáfamé a faise tésmetawét. A ámb árém tésmetawét ngángaye 68 a norayayénd, "Keriso! Ténmauyafo téfe ndené fém ném Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár. Koraya emo nésém!" Fitam yékenayéng Yesu
english: Then they spat in his face and beat him with their fists , and some slapped him ,
saying , “ Prophesy to us , you Christ ! Who hit you ?”

nama: Fité témorangérwén téndota méngo sifayan njam tuk ghéngén wárogh ároene faiofnar ásáfogh mérés yénmormén kétán yáfaf a yémndai, "Fém ámb yéné ném, efe kénmorwén Galili yumén Yesufé."
english: Now Peter was sitting outside in the court, and a maid came to him , saying , “ You were also with Jesus , the Galilean !”

nama: Wénde yémo yékenai yéfe sáfrére a ewawangoi, "Yénd mafina wém némamén fém norayati." 71 A fá néngtoryéng méngo sifayé sésafnefaf. Ámb faiofnar ásáfogh mérsom yinjoi fá kété a norayai árfefaf, "Fá témorwén Najaretmén Yesufé."
english: But he denied it before them all , saying , “ I don’ t know what you are talking about .”
When he had gone out onto the porch , someone else saw him and said to those who were there , “ This man also was with Jesus of Nazareth .”

nama: Kor wéi Fitam yékenayéng a yawangoi, "Yéndon efalo si norayan ndené yénd mafina wém yéné ár!"
english: Again he denied it with an oath , “ I don’ t know the man .”

nama: Tekofnaye ámb ár efe tawakayongérwén kétándmé nuwanoyénd kétán Fitafaf a yémndayénd, "Efalo fété fém ámb ném. Fém ndenanit noraye ámb ár kés yém Galili yumén.
english: After a little while those who stood by came and said to Peter , “Surely you are also one of them , for your speech makes you known.”

nama: Féyo Fité norayai, "Yénd efalo sote si norayan ndené yénd efalo si norayan! Ngánjánam mété tékrátan kwékmangé táf njam nuindan! Yénd mafina wém yéné ár!"
english: Then he began to curse and to swear , “ I don’ t know the man !” Immediately the rooster crowed .

nama: a Fité nawafrotai némé Yesum té témndetau fá, "Fémon so fronde kwékenang nambinotma, yéné soramé ghakér kowi so kutnangé." Fá nuwanoi nétoryéng ye nufngoi máméghéraye.
english: Peter remembered the word which Jesus had said to him , “ Before the rooster crows , you will deny me three times .” Then he went out and wept bitterly .

nama: Tándái akwan méinyotio limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a Ju árfene limánégh ár mwighé efaronaménd a yaitoyénd Yesue krot. 2 Yémofem yumbetaménd, yémnjoyénd a yéramayénd Failetefaf Rommén gafanafaf. Judasene kérmén
english: Now when morning had come , all the chief priests and the elders of the people took counsel against Jesus to put him to death .
They bound him , led him away, and delivered him up to Pontius Pilate , the governor .

nama: Njam Judas, sén ramégh ár, mat namndai ndené Yesu so krot tékmangi, fá mwighayan nawasuryéng a ersam 30 silfé mani mbwe kétán limánégh ghéngén wárogh árfefaf a Ju limánégh árfefaf. 4 Fá norayai, "Yéndon yaufi té tafrotan sén ramghe ménd ároe krot!" Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Yéné yau téfene kérté yém, wénde fene kérté yém!"
english: Then Judas , who betrayed him , when he saw that Jesus was condemned , felt remorse , and brought back the thirty pieces of silver to the chief priests and elders ,
saying , “ I have sinned in that I betrayed innocent blood.” But they said , “ What is that to us ? You see to it .”

nama: Judasém mani mbwe ewitam mbandot wáwefnogh méngo kénjún a efrangoi. Féyo fá táf néngwanoi a náwámái ángéghan fáyo.
english: He threw down the pieces of silver in the sanctuary and departed. Then he went away and hanged himself .

nama: Limánégh ghéngén wárogh árém ekafayénd mani mbwe a norayayénd, "Yéné mani siyém ár ngi faimén yém, a nák noraye ndené yéné mani yau so tafghangém wáwefnogh méngo maniafé." 7 Yémofem mwighé yéfaronaménd yénémamén, yéné manie yémofem yanayénd ngénde rokar wafrogh téfnárane mband ménát dabi ár yatoghét. 8 Yéné téfnan yéné sifayé yémndetat ndené yéné siyém "Férék Mband" yénanotio sénonjo efogh siyém.
english: The chief priests took the pieces of silver and said , “ It ’s not lawful to put them into the treasury , since it is the price of blood.”
They took counsel , and bought the potter ’s field with them to bury strangers in .
Therefore that field has been called “ The Field of Blood” to this day .

nama: Némé Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár Jeremaiam kénorayau efalo namndai: "Yémofem ewanayénd 30 silfé mani mbwe, yéné féyotaroyan Israil árém kés yiyátoyénd yá fai ramghét. 10 Yémofem yéné mani yékmayénd ngénde rokar wafrogh téfnárane mband résaghét, ndené fété Yuram kés wáfáretai yénd." Failetém témotau Yesu ámb ámogh si
english: Then that which was spoken through Jeremiah the prophet was fulfilled , saying , “ They took the thirty pieces of silver, the price of him upon whom a price had been set , whom some of the children of Israel priced,
and they gave them for the potter ’ s field, as the Lord commanded me .” + 27:10 Zechariah 11:12-13; Jeremiah 19:1-13; 32:6-9

nama: Yesu takayongérwén Rom gafanane sáfrére, a gafanam yémotai Yesu, "Fém fété ném Ju árfene warsagh ár?"
english: Now Jesus stood before the governor ; and the governor asked him , saying , “ Are you the King of the Jews ?” Jesus said to him , “ So you say .”

nama: Limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a limánégh árém korayawét tárfár sáfot si yáfaf. Fá korayawét ndené yémo yaufiyam tárfár tawafrotau, wénde Yesum ámb yau ewawangoi.
english: When he was accused by the chief priests and elders , he answered nothing .

nama: Féyo Failet norayai yáfaf, "Té náyárete njénambafé méndméndafé si némafayotat feyot?"
english: Then Pilate said to him , “Don’ t you hear how many things they testify against you ?”

nama: Wénde Yesu nakenai uwangoghét, yéné téfnan Failet sélngwélam yafrotam. Failetém norayai Yesu so fété kér yém
english: He gave him no answer, not even one word , so that the governor marveled greatly .

nama: Táf méinyotio Waingégh témndan Rom gafanam túmén ár tautorngai kwéfkwéf méngota efe kété témorwén árém njam kómnendangayénd. 16 Táf yéné efghon kété témorwén yéfene matkaf kwéfkwéf ár yétkwén Yesu Barabas. 17 Féyo njam ár mérén náumendayénd, Failetém emotayéng fá, "Efe féfene méndefé ár yém yéndon sái tutorén féfeyot? Yesu Barabas o Yesu efe yémndetati Keriso? 18 Fá minde mat témorwén ndené Ju limánégh árém so téramangi Yesu kétán yáfaf ménamén yémofem taramnjawét.
english: Now at the feast the governor was accustomed to release to the multitude one prisoner whom they desired .
They had then a notable prisoner called Barabbas.
When therefore they were gathered together , Pilate said to them , “ Whom do you want me to release to you ? Barabbas, or Jesus who is called Christ ?”
For he knew that because of envy they had delivered him up .

nama: Njamandio Failet témorangérwén mogh sifayan, yáne amafom si yénmawatembai: "Némé ámb yau yafrota yéné ménd ároefaf, ménamén sénonjo sémbáran onjoyan yéndon minde tékrát yéfandan yánemén."
english: While he was sitting on the judgment seat, his wife sent to him , saying , “ Have nothing to do with that righteous man , for I have suffered many things today in a dream because of him .”

nama: Limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a limángégh árém ewasemnayénd ár mérén Failete moghét ménát Barabase utorghét a Yesu yéramai krot. 21 Failetém emotai ár mérén, "Efe ár yém yéné sómbiota yéndon sái tutorén féfeyot? Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Barabas!"
english: Now the chief priests and the elders persuaded the multitudes to ask for Barabbas and destroy Jesus .
But the governor answered them , “ Which of the two do you want me to release to you ?” They said , “Barabbas!”

nama: Failetém emotai fá, "Némé so yéndon yafrotan yéné ároefaf Yesu efe yémndetati Keriso?" Méinyotioyam yawangoyénd, "Ténamndangi wafatarégh wénan!"
english: Pilate said to them , “ What then shall I do to Jesus who is called Christ ?” They all said to him , “ Let him be crucified !”

nama: Wénde Failetém emotai, "Némé yaufi yémon yafrotam?" Wénde fá kutnawét minde tukén: "Ténamndangi wafatarégh wénan!"
english: But the governor said , “ Why ? What evil has he done ?” But they cried out exceedingly , saying , “ Let him be crucified !”

nama: Failet mat náyátoi ndené yémon yau kor némé so tafrotau yéfe kémboghét. Fá nemnai mété ár kásmetawét yáne fiyarafé. Féyo yémon yanai nu a yánjo ngángé umbarégh ewafngoi yéfene sáfrére, a norayai, "Yénd yau wafnyang yéné ároene kér kénjún! Yéné siyém féfene yam wafrogh yém!"
english: So when Pilate saw that nothing was being gained, but rather that a disturbance was starting , he took water and washed his hands before the multitude , saying , “ I am innocent of the blood of this righteous person . You see to it .”

nama: Méinyotio ár mérnam nuwangoyénd, "Féyotaro yéné kérté yéné ároene kérmén so yém téfefaf a ndenáyo téfene ambumfaf!"
english: All the people answered , “ May his blood be on us and on our children !”

nama: Féyo Failetém yéngéumyoi Barabas utorghét yéfeyot. Wénde yémo tamndangé yánjo fiyaré, 'Yesu tésmetangi tárfár mbinotmé a téfmotangi. Féyo témnjongi a ténamndangi wafatarégh wénan." Fiyaram si tawafrotawét Yesue
english: Then he released Barabbas to them , but Jesus he flogged and delivered to be crucified .

nama: Féyo Failetene fiyaram yálimayénd Yesue kétán gafanane méngot, a méinyotio fiyaram yarendayénd Yesu. 28 Yémofem yéfitraryénd fá sáláme a yawoyénd ndéndák ngarot sáláme ndenanit warsagh árfene sálámenit. 29 Féyo táf fété yémofem yafrotaménd wétwétafé ákiki ndenanit warsagh árfene ákikinit a yawoyénd yáne sénkoyan a yanayéng wén ndenanit témorwén warsagh árfene wénnit a yéramayénd yáne tambén ngángat; féyo táf yémofem yáwefnoyénd sáfrére a yémofem si tawafrotawét yáyot. Fá korayawét, "Áuwégh yém feyot! Ju árfene warsagh ár." 30 Yémofem mbérme farángégh yafngoyénd, a yanayénd wén ndenanit warsagh árfene wénnit a yésmayénd sénkoyan. 31 Njam yéfene si wafroghyam nefoi yánemén, yémofem yáfitraryénd ndéndák ngarot sáláme a yawoyénd yánjo sáláme. Féyo táf fété yémofem yálimayénd wamghét. Yesu wafatarégh wénan yénamndat
english: Then the governor ’s soldiers took Jesus into the Praetorium , and gathered the whole garrison together against him .
They stripped him and put a scarlet robe on him .
They braided a crown of thorns and put it on his head , and a reed in his right hand ; and they kneeled down before him and mocked him , saying , “ Hail , King of the Jews !”
They spat on him , and took the reed and struck him on the head .
When they had mocked him , they took the robe off him , and put his clothes on him , and led him away to crucify him .

nama: Njam fá tayotawéng, yémofem yéfángoyénd ár Sairénmén yétkwén Saimon, a fiyaram táfáretawét fá Yesuene wafatarégh wén résaghét. 33 Fá nufaryénd sifayé yétkwén Golgota, yáne fifi yém "Sénkosot sáfnit Sifayé." 34 Kété yémofem yauyafoyénd Yesue njérmat wéri nu, wénde yémo njam yufoi, yau yénetam.
english: As they came out , they found a man of Cyrene , Simon by name , and they compelled him to go with them , that he might carry his cross .
When they came to a place called “ Golgotha ”, that is to say , “ The place of a skull ,”
they gave him sour wine to drink mixed with gall . When he had tasted it , he would not drink .

nama: Yémofem yénamndaménd wafatarégh wénan a tafalotawét yáne sáláme yéfe kénjúnro ménaye ndais kembneye. 36 Yéné soramé fá námnjoyénd kété a téfandawét fá. 37 Yáne sénko tukén yémofem yénamndaménd wén karéf yéné férnafé matot némé yémo yafrotam: "Yéné siyém Yesu, Ju árfene warsagh ár." 38 Féyo yémofem enaménd sómbio oro téfnár Yesufé, ámb tambénta a ámb fatrata.
english: When they had crucified him , they divided his clothing among them , casting lots ,
and they sat and watched him there .
They set up over his head the accusation against him written , “ THIS IS JESUS , THE KING OF THE JEWS .”
Then there were two robbers crucified with him , one on his right hand and one on the left .

nama: Ár endmé kawaindawét yéfene sénko tafnendawét a si tawafrotawét Yesue: 40 "Fémon so tironawéng wáwefnogh méngo a térametau wéikor nambio efghon! Kawanjar fémyo njam fém ném Ngánjánene Ambum! Kénewor mbandot yénandmé wafatarégh wénta!"
english: Those who passed by blasphemed him , wagging their heads
and saying , “ You who destroy the temple and build it in three days , save yourself ! If you are the Son of God , come down from the cross !”

nama: Ndené endeyo limánégh ghéngén wárogh árém a nák watamegh árém a limánégh árém si tawafrotawét: 42 "Yémon tawanjane ámb árro, wénde fá fáyo yau nawanjane! Fá fété yém Israilmén warsagh ár! Táf njam fá kéneworngé sénonjo mbandot wafatarégh wénta, yéndfem so efalo tiyátongém fá! 43 Yémon Ngánján efalo tiyátotau a koraye, 'Yénd wém Ngánjánene Ambum.' Mato so yéfandam mété Ngánjánam tanjarngé fá sénonjo njam fá ménde yém!"
english: Likewise the chief priests also mocking with the scribes , the Pharisees, and the elders , said ,
“ He saved others , but he can ’ t save himself . If he is the King of Israel , let him come down from the cross now , and we will believe in him .
He trusts in God . Let God deliver him now , if he wants him ; for he said , ‘ I am the Son of God .’”

nama: Yéné oro téfnár efe enaménd yémofem wéi si tawafrowét Yesue ndenéyameyo. Yesuene kérmén
english: The robbers also who were crucified with him cast on him the same reproach .

nama: Táf efoghméf témorwén méinyotio yu namndai kwéfitaro, yéné kwéfitayam yérsam kétán 3 aklokot. 46 Táf 3 aklokan Yesu ke nutnai marataye, "Eli, Eli, lama sabaktani?" Yéné sioene fifi siyém, "Tane Ngánján, tane Njánján, némamén yénd fémon wéfrango tambia?"
english: Now from the sixth hour there was darkness over all the land until the ninth hour .
About the ninth hour Jesus cried with a loud voice , saying , “ Eli , Eli , lima sabachthani ?” That is , “ My God , my God , why have you forsaken me ?”

nama: Ámb ár efe tawakayongérwén kaka yiyárayénd Yesu, a norayayénd, "Yémon yémote Elaija!" 48 Ámbiro ár táf fété néngenngoi wékeye a yanai ngu. Yémon yukai ghafté wéri nuan, yumbetam wén fétfétan, a yénguyoi Yesue nénet.
english: Some of them who stood there , when they heard it , said , “ This man is calling Elijah .”
Immediately one of them ran and took a sponge , filled it with vinegar , put it on a reed , and gave him a drink .

nama: Wénde ámb árém norayayénd, "Somé, mato so yéfandam mété Elaija yéném yá wanjarghét!"
english: The rest said , “ Let him be . Let ’s see whether Elijah comes to save him .”

nama: Yesu wéikor minde tukén ke nutnai a ambinomén ambone yitam kér yémormén.
english: Jesus cried again with a loud voice , and yielded up his spirit .

nama: Táf fété wéi, wáwefnogh méngon sénjté sáláme árké kété tamangérwén natiraryéng sómbio karéf kétándmé tuk kétánotio yu. Mband kásámbnetau, wím kafaronawét fénatayero, 52 a mbéwé kasaunawét, a Ngánjánam tawanotau tárfár Ngánjánene ár efe kér emormén ghérsat. 53 Fá kanotawét mbéwata, a Yesuene anogh soramé, fá nényawayénd njúnnjúnofnar ndimbal tesenot, Jerusalemét, ánde tárfár árfefaf néngufaryénd.
english: Behold , the veil of the temple was torn in two from the top to the bottom . The earth quaked and the rocks were split .
The tombs were opened, and many bodies of the saints who had fallen asleep were raised ;
and coming out of the tombs after his resurrection , they entered into the holy city and appeared to many .

nama: Njam fiyaré sénko ár a fiyaré emofem tanjetawét Yesu yinjoyénd sokrere a méinyotio yam némé kufrotau, fá férfér tamorwén a norayayénd, "Fá efalo Ngánjánene Ambum fété yém!"
english: Now the centurion and those who were with him watching Jesus , when they saw the earthquake and the things that were done , were terrified , saying , “ Truly this was the Son of God !”

nama: Kété tamorwén tárfár amaf efe nayuta kéretawét, emofem ténmaitotawét Yesu kétándmayo Galili yuta a yáutánaménd yáyot. 56 Yéfe kénjún tafnyangérwén Meri Makdalin, Meri yéfetmé Jems a Josef, a Jefediene amaf. Yesuene mband raméghmén
english: Many women were there watching from afar , who had followed Jesus from Galilee , serving him .
Among them were Mary Magdalene , Mary the mother of James and Joses, and the mother of the sons of Zebedee .

nama: Njam férégh témorwén, wemár ár kétándmamén Aramatia yumén, yáne yétkwén témorwén Josef, a fá ámb témorwén Yesuene waitogh ár. 58 Fá yiotam kétán Failetefaf nómnendai Yesuene fifiot. Failetém tamndangé yanjo fiyaré, 'Téramangi Yesuene fifi Josefe.' 59 Féyo Josefém yanai, yéfinam mer kwayaghé sálámeye, 60 a yényawai yánjo totér mbéwé kénjún, árké yémonyo té yétanam táikér wíman. Féyo yémon yimndai ndimbal wím yéroghai sésafnen yéngémnai a néngwanoi. 61 Meri Makdalin a ámb Meri tamorarwén mbéwé witmé téndota téfandwét. Mbéwé wanjengégh ár
english: When evening had come , a rich man from Arimathaea named Joseph , who himself was also Jesus ’ disciple , came .
This man went to Pilate and asked for Jesus ’ body . Then Pilate commanded the body to be given up .
Joseph took the body and wrapped it in a clean linen cloth
and laid it in his own new tomb , which he had cut out in the rock . Then he rolled a large stone against the door of the tomb , and departed.
Mary Magdalene was there , and the other Mary , sitting opposite the tomb.

nama: Ámb efghon Safatan, limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a Farasi ár mérén néwanoyénd Failetefaf 63 a norayayénd, "Ndimbal ár, yénd mé nawafarotam ndené njam yéné unyégh ár ghérsé témorwén fá korayau, 'Yénd so kanon ghérsat nambio efogh soramé.' 64 Féyo fémo fiya fiyaré tákmangai yéné mbéwé méngo fandaghét kétánotio nambiomén efogh. Ménamén yau njam, yáne waitogh ár so eném a oroe tanangi yáne fifi, a árét tawaufrongi ndené fá kérta té nano. Yéné totér unyégh yamam so taindangé yéné unyégh Yesu némamén korayau, so yém minde mámáfi"
english: Now on the next day , which was the day after the Preparation Day , the chief priests and the Pharisees were gathered together to Pilate ,
saying , “ Sir , we remember what that deceiver said while he was still alive : ‘ After three days I will rise again .’

Command therefore that the tomb be made secure until the third day , lest perhaps his disciples come at night and steal him away , and tell the people , ‘ He is risen from the dead ;’ and the last deception will be worse than the first .”

nama: Failetém emndai fá, "Tangwasrongi fiyaré, nguwanongi a mere mbéwé yánjetati ndernáye mer so yém."
english: Pilate said to them , “ You have a guard . Go , make it as secure as you can .”

nama: Féyo fá nuwanoyénd a tanjetawét mbéwé, angéghe yéngsoyénd taikrataye a kénde yiyátoyénd a wanjengégh ár efrangoyénd.
english: So they went with the guard and made the tomb secure, sealing the stone .

nama: Safat nawaindai fronde efogh akw téfaunau, Meri Makdalin a ámb Meri nuwaneyayénd mbéwé fandaghét. 2 Kété yémormén sunsune sokrere, Yurane njafar si résagh ár kétándmé yénmormén njafarta, yiroghai wím téndota a námnjoi yéné tukén. 3 Yáne sáf nálálam ndenanit toyé a yáne sáláme tamorwén mé kwayaghé kafe ngarot. 4 Fiyaré férfér a ngerngeram ewifoi a kér árnit tamorwén.
english: Now after the Sabbath , as it began to dawn on the first day of the week , Mary Magdalene and the other Mary came to see the tomb.
Behold , there was a great earthquake , for an angel of the Lord descended from the sky and came and rolled away the stone from the door and sat on it .
His appearance was like lightning, and his clothing white as snow .
For fear of him , the guards shook , and became like dead men .

nama: Njafar si résagh árém emndeyai amaf, "Fém yau táf férfér ere, yénd mat wém fémofem yéronjet Yesu efe yénamndaménd. 6 Fá yéna yau yém. Fá kérta té yéngwano, ndené fété yémon kés tamndetau. Kénaflend yénan a kéretangend kétán yéné sifayat ánde yékmayénd. 7 Kuwanend wékeye tawaufrend sénonjo yáne waitogh árét, 'Fá té yéngwano kérta, a sénonjo fá té yéngém Galili yuwot féfe frondeta. Kété fémofem so tinjongi.' Sénonjo yéndon fém emnden."
english: The angel answered the women , “Don’ t be afraid , for I know that you seek Jesus , who has been crucified .
He is not here , for he has risen , just like he said . Come , see the place where the Lord was lying .
Go quickly and tell his disciples , ‘ He has risen from the dead , and behold , he goes before you into Galilee ; there you will see him .’ Behold , I have told you .”

nama: Féyo yémofem yéfrangeyayénd mbéwé méngo wékeyero. Fá férfér tarwén wénde áuwéghan tarwén, a nengenngeyayénd kétán afroghét yáne waitogh árfefaf.
english: They departed quickly from the tomb with fear and great joy , and ran to bring his disciples word .

nama: Tekofnaye Yesum efangeyai yéné sómbio amaf a norayai, "Mer akw." Fá nénafleyayénd yáfaf, a yereyayénd kafkafan, a yáwefneyayénd yá. 10 Yesum emndeyai fá, "Yau férfér ere. Nguwanend a tawaufrend tane waitogh árfet kétán táf engém Galili yuwot, a kété yémofem so kwinjongi." Fiyarafene unyégh si
english: As they went to tell his disciples , behold , Jesus met them , saying , “ Rejoice !” They came and took hold of his feet , and worshiped him .
Then Jesus said to them , “Don’ t be afraid . Go tell my brothers that they should go into Galilee , and there they will see me .”

nama: Njamandio amaf mé tayowéng, ámb fiyaré emofem tanjetawét mbéwé méngo néwanoyénd nde tesenot a tawaufrongi limánégh ghéngén wárogh árét méinyotio némé kufrotawéng kété. 12 Limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár nafángoyénd ámb limánégh árfé a yémofem mwighé tafaronawét. Yémofem ewaramayénd ndimbal mani kétán fiyarafet. 13 Fá norayayénd, "Fém mato kafrongi yáne waitogh ár taném sémbáran oroe yéngwanangi yáne fifi táf féfene kémghan. 14 Njam gafanam káyárangé yénémamén, yéndfem so ngárámngárám yafrotam fá ndené fém sem ménd ár, a fém mwighayam yau so ewaworsote yénémamén."
english: Now while they were going , behold , some of the guards came into the city and told the chief priests all the things that had happened .
When they were assembled with the elders and had taken counsel , they gave a large amount of silver to the soldiers ,
saying , “ Say that his disciples came by night and stole him away while we slept .
If this comes to the governor ’s ears, we will persuade him and make you free of worry.”

nama: Fiyaram engwanayénd mani a yafrotaménd némat fá té emndayénd wafroghét. A yéné mat si nófarnai marate Ju árfaf yénanotio sénonjo efogh. Yesum emndai yánjo waitogh ár némé ásáfogh so tafrotawét
english: So they took the money and did as they were told. This saying was spread abroad among the Jews , and continues until today .

nama: Féyo 11 waitogh ár néwanoyénd kétán Galili yu mband tunakfot ándan té Yesum emndai fá álighét. 17 Njam yémofem yinjoyénd Yesu, yémofem méinyotioam yáwefnoyénd yáyot, wénde ámb waitogh ár atambarghan mé tamorwén. 18 Yesu yénmormén yéfefaf kaka a norayai yéfefaf, "Ngánjánam té waramai méinyotio muyé njafaran a mbandan. 19 Féyo, fém táf nguwanongi méinyotio árfefaf méinyotio yuwomé a engyátotati tane waitogh ár so em a nuan ewalitotati Afane yétkwénan, Ambumoene yétkwénan a Ngánján Mbérmbéroene yétkwénan. 20 A fémofem táf engwatametati ár ménát áyárégh ár so em méinyotio yam kénjún némé yéndon té emndetamén fém. A yénd so wém féfefaf méinyotio efghon kétánotio mband yatogh.
english: But the eleven disciples went into Galilee , to the mountain where Jesus had sent them .
When they saw him , they bowed down to him ; but some doubted .
Jesus came to them and spoke to them , saying , “ All authority has been given to me in heaven and on earth .
Go and make disciples of all nations , baptizing them in the name of the Father and of the Son and of the Holy Spirit ,
teaching them to observe all things that I commanded you . Behold , I am with you always , even to the end of the age.” Amen.

nama: Mer si náreinde Ngánjánene ambum Yesu Kerisoenemén.
english: The beginning of the Good News of Jesus Christ , the Son of God .

nama: Ndernáye Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár Aisayam yéfarotam yáne Bukan, "Yéndon so yéngwáfáretan fronde si résagh ár, emon so fene end némáfrende,
english: As it is written in the prophets , “ Behold , + 1:2 “Behold”, from “ἰδοὺ”, means look at, take notice, observe, see, or gaze at. It is often used as an interjection. I send my messenger before your face , who will prepare your way before you : + 1:2 Malachi 3:1

nama: ke nutne fanfne yuta, 'End frengéghét Yuraye álighét, wafrogh mbarkánd end yáyot.'"
english: the voice of one crying in the wilderness , ‘ Make ready the way of the Lord ! Make his paths straight !’” + 1:3 Isaiah 40:3

nama: Jon yénmormén walitoghmén si táitotau árét fanfne yuwon, "Kawengongi féfenjo yaufita a so ewalitotan ménát Ngánjánam so ewáwáine féfene yaufi." 5 Méinyotio Judiamén ár a Jerusalemén ár néwanoyénd yáfaf. Fá kafenawét yéfenjo yaufita, yémon tawalitotau fá Joden wanjen. 6 Jon tawongérwén kemol séf sáláme ménáyafé belesafé, a yémon tánetau ngumbwainy a fáméghár. 7 Joném mat táyátotau ár ndenáye: "Efe tane soramé yéném, endene waftayam so yáinde tane wafté, endene sandol ángégh ferghét yénd féyotarofnar wém. 8 Yéndon ewalitotan fém nue, wénde yémon so ewalitote fém Ngánján Mbérmbére." Yesuene walitoghmén a wufoghmén
english: John came baptizing in the wilderness and preaching the baptism of repentance for forgiveness of sins.
All the country of Judea and all those of Jerusalem went out to him . They were baptized by him in the Jordan river , confessing their sins.
John was clothed with camel ’s hair and a leather belt around his waist . He ate locusts and wild honey .
He preached , saying , “ After me comes he who is mightier than I , the strap of whose sandals I am not worthy to stoop down and loosen.
I baptized you in water , but he will baptize you in the Holy Spirit .”

nama: Yéné efghon Yesu yénmormén Najareta Galili yu kénjút a yálitotam Joném Joden wanjen. 10 Yesu njam kénwiwotau nuta, yémon yinjoi njafar sawérghare Ngánján Mbérmbér néneworyéng Yesuefaf mamunit yáne fifiyan nafayoi. 11 Si yénmormén kétándmé njafarta, "Fém ném tane ambum, efe yéndon némuwetan; yénd mindefifi náuwetan fefaf."
english: In those days , Jesus came from Nazareth of Galilee , and was baptized by John in the Jordan .
Immediately coming up from the water , he saw the heavens parting and the Spirit descending on him like a dove .
A voice came out of the sky , “ You are my beloved Son , in whom I am well pleased .”

nama: Táf fété Ngánján Mbérmbéram yéméindai Yesu álighét fanfne yuwot. 13 Fá yémorangérmén kétánotio 40 efogh Sáifram yufotam. Yesu kété témorwén ánde wérár tamorwén, wénde njafar si résagh árém yambayénd Yesu. Yesum ewaferyéng yánjo fronde waitogh ár
english: Immediately the Spirit drove him out into the wilderness .
He was there in the wilderness forty days , tempted by Satan . He was with the wild animals; and the angels were serving him .

nama: Soramé Jon yélawayénd kwéfkwéf sifayan, Yesu néngwanoi Galili yuwot Ngánjánene mer si táitotau. 15 Yesu norayai, "Efogh ténawer, Ngánján limánégh siyém kaka yém. Féfenjo yaufita kawengongi a efalo tiyátongi mer siǃ"
english: Now after John was taken into custody , Jesus came into Galilee , preaching the Good News of God ’s Kingdom,
and saying , “ The time is fulfilled , and God ’s Kingdom is at hand ! Repent , and believe in the Good News .”

nama: Ámb efghon Yesu tiyotawéng Galili arakaf téndomé, yémon ewinjeyai Saimon a yánngén Endru net waméghan ndimbal sawan, ménamén fá tárwén wagif rényégh ár. 17 Yesum emndeyai, "Kénaflend yénd kwénmaitend a yéndon so táyáten ár rényégh ár." 18 Táf fété yémofem eureyayénd yéfenjo net a yáiteyayénd Yesu.
english: Passing along by the sea of Galilee , he saw Simon and Andrew, the brother of Simon , casting a net into the sea , for they were fishermen.
Jesus said to them , “ Come after me , and I will make you into fishers for men .”
Immediately they left their nets , and followed him .

nama: Njam fá néngwanoyénd nayuofnar, yémon ewinjeyai Jems Jefediene ambum, yánngén Jon boutan tawaflarwén, táfrengwét yéfenjo net. 20 Tekofnar Yesum emotangeyai, yémofem yéfrangeyayénd yéferafé Jefedi bout kénjún ásáfogh árofé a yáiteyayénd Yesu. Yesum yitroi yaufi mbérmbér
english: Going on a little further from there , he saw James the son of Zebedee , and John his brother, who were also in the boat mending the nets .
Immediately he called them , and they left their father , Zebedee , in the boat with the hired servants , and went after him .

nama: Fá néngwanoyénd Káfenam tesenot, a Safatan Yesu nénglawai áumengégh méngot a watamegh ewafngoi. 22 Ár sélngwél emormén yáne watameghan, ménamén yáne si waitogh témorwén muyafé, yau ndené nák watamegh ár. 23 Áumengégh méngon kété témorwén ár tasarmbotau yaufi mbérmbéram. Fá nutnayeng minde tukén, 24 "Fém némat ménde ném téfefaf, Yesu Najaretmén? Fém kéném téfefaf wasérmboghét? Yénd mat wém fém efe ném, fém ném Ngánjánene njúnnjúnofnar ár."
english: They went into Capernaum , and immediately on the Sabbath day he entered into the synagogue and taught .
They were astonished at his teaching , for he taught them as having authority , and not as the scribes .
Immediately there was in their synagogue a man with an unclean spirit , and he cried out ,
saying , “Ha! What do we have to do with you , Jesus , you Nazarene ? Have you come to destroy us ? I know who you are : the Holy One of God !”

nama: Yesum yarnam, "Métar kékmboǃ Kéntor yá tambénǃ" 26 Yaufi mbérmbéram yésámbnetai ár a féyo yéméindai yaufi keyot a yéfrangoi.
english: Jesus rebuked him , saying , “ Be quiet , and come out of him !”
The unclean spirit , convulsing him and crying with a loud voice , came out of him .

nama: Méinyotio ár emormén sélngwél a kawawanjawét fáro, némé watamegh yéné yém muyafé? Yéné ár muyafé yém yaufi mbérmbér wafareghét a yémofem tiyárangi Yesuǃ" 28 Si yánemén marat namndai wékeyero Galili yuwon. Yesum mer táyátotau tárfár ár enjneta
english: They were all amazed , so that they questioned among themselves , saying , “ What is this ? A new teaching ? For with authority he commands even the unclean spirits , and they obey him !”
The report of him went out immediately everywhere into all the region of Galilee and its surrounding area.

nama: Yémofem yéfrangoyénd áumengégh méngo, fá néngwanoyénd yémafé Jems a Jon, Saimon a Endru yéfene méngot. 30 Saimone yanat enjne témorwén, a yémofem Yesue yaufroyénd yánemén. 31 Féyo Yesu néngwanoi yáfaf, Yesum ngángé yawerai a yauténam yáyot. Táf fété enjneyam yéfrangoi a yémon ewáfrendam yéfe njamke.
english: Immediately , when they had come out of the synagogue , they came into the house of Simon and Andrew, with James and John .
Now Simon ’s wife’s mother lay sick with a fever , and immediately they told him about her .
He came and took her by the hand and raised her up . The fever left her immediately, and she served them .

nama: Yéné féréghan tárfár enjne téfnár a yaufi mbérmbér wasérmbogh ár tánémnjawét Yesuefaf. 33 Méinyotio tesen ár náumendaménd méngo sésafnefaf, 34 a Yesum mer táyátotau méinyotio fénaté enjneta. A yémo tawifnau tárfár yaufi mbérmbér. Wénde yaufi mbérmbér mat tamorwén efe Yesu témorwén, a Yesum yau taumyotawéng yaufi mbérmbér siot. Yesuf Ngánjánafé koraiwét métar sifayan
english: At evening , when the sun had set , they brought to him all who were sick and those who were possessed by demons.
All the city was gathered together at the door .
He healed many who were sick with various diseases and cast out many demons . He didn’ t allow the demons to speak , because they knew him .

nama: Fauréghan Yesu néngwanoi méngota métar sifayat, ánde fá Ngánjánjafé koraiwét. 36 Saimonéf néngwanoyénd yá fútarfé Yesue ronjaghét, 37 a njam yémofem yinjoyénd Yesu, fá norayayénd, "Árém néronjat fémǃ"
english: Early in the morning , while it was still dark , he rose up and went out , and departed into a deserted place , and prayed there .
Simon and those who were with him searched for him .
They found him and told him , “ Everyone is looking for you .”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Yénd so kuwanongém kaka tesenot, ménát yéndon so ewaufrotan mer si yéné árét. Yénémamén yénd kwéném." 39 Féyo fá tiotau Galili yuwomé, kété yémon táitotau si áumengégh méngo kénjún a yaufi mbérmbér tawifnau. Yesum mer yiyátoi yaufi ghéngan enjnefé ár
english: He said to them , “ Let ’ s go elsewhere into the next towns , that I may preach there also , because I came out for this reason.”
He went into their synagogues throughout all Galilee , preaching and casting out demons .

nama: Yaufi ghéngan enjnefé ár yénmormén Yesuefaf a yáwefnoi budme, "Fém njam ménde ném, fémon so mer kwiyáto yénd."
english: A leper came to him , begging him , kneeling down to him , and saying to him , “ If you want to , you can make me clean .”

nama: Yesu ghérghérsisayam yifoi ewatembai ngángé a yiyánjai ár. Yesum yawangoi, "Yénd ménde fété wém. So mer némǃ" 42 Táf fété yaufi ghéngan enjneyam yéfrangoi merafayo.
english: Being moved with compassion , he stretched out his hand , and touched him , and said to him , “ I want to . Be made clean .”
When he had said this , immediately the leprosy departed from him and he was made clean .

nama: Yesum yéngwáfáretai yéné ár yéné táikér siafé, 44 "Ende yau taufro, téu nguwano, kauyafo fémyo ghéngén wárogh árfefaf a ghéngén taram ndernáye Mosesene nákam némndete fene frengéghmén, ndenáye fété fém frengéghkaf ném." 45 Wénde fá néngwanoi si afrogh marataye néngufngoi. Féyo yéné téfnan Yesu yau nélawai tesenot wénde mé témorangérwén téndota métar sifayan. Wénde ár ménjtaye mé tanmorwén yáfaf méinyotio yuta.
english: He strictly warned him and immediately sent him out ,
and said to him , “ See that you say nothing to anybody, but go show yourself to the priest and offer for your cleansing the things which Moses commanded , for a testimony to them .”

But he went out , and began to proclaim it much , and to spread about the matter , so that Jesus could no more openly enter into a city , but was outside in desert places . People came to him from everywhere .

nama: Nambio efogh soramé, njam Yesu kor nénglawai Káfenamét, ár náyárayénd ndené Yesu té kénangote méngot. 2 Féyo tárfár ár náumendaménd kété témorwén sifayafnar méngon, ndenéyameyo téndota, yémon si táitotau yéfeyot. 3 Fo árém ténérsawét Yesuefaf aknyégh ár yame sutafé. 4 Ménamén ár tárfármén yau yufaryénd Yesuefaf, yénémamén tarmbotawét méngo sémsot tukét, a kend enendayénd némbne fénemé tewonawét néndkfot Yesuene sáfrére.
english: When he entered again into Capernaum after some days , it was heard that he was at home .
Immediately many were gathered together , so that there was no more room , not even around the door ; and he spoke the word to them .
Four people came , carrying a paralytic to him .
When they could not come near to him for the crowd , they removed the roof where he was . When they had broken it up , they let down the mat that the paralytic was lying on .

nama: Njam Yesum ewawinjoi yéfene ndimbal mwighé, fá norayai, "Fútar, fene yaufi té wawalinda."
english: Jesus , seeing their faith , said to the paralytic , “ Son , your sins are forgiven you .”

nama: Ámb nák watamegh ár tamorangérwén kété, kemnawét yéfenjomén, 7 "Némamén yéné ár ndené si noraye? Yémon Ngánjánene sifayé résaghét yafngoǃ Ngánjánro yém efe so tawalindangé yaufiyam!"
english: But there were some of the scribes sitting there and reasoning in their hearts ,
“ Why does this man speak blasphemies like that ? Who can forgive sins but God alone ?”

nama: Yesu mat té náyátoi fá némé kemnawét a emotai, "Fém némamén nemnati yéné féfene tikfan? 9 Taikér yau yém tayot sái témndan yéné ár, 'Fene yaufi sem té wawalinda' o témndan ndenáye, 'Yame tékaf méngot nguwano?' 10 Wénde ndené fém mat so em Ároene Ambum ndené muyafé yém yéné mbandan yaufiyam wawalingét." 11 Yesu norayai aknyégh ároefaf, "Yéndon némndetan fém, kokai, yame tékaf, nguwano méngot." 12 Fá nokayoi yánjo yame yékafai yéné sélngwélafé yamam eméindai ár. Yémofem tuwetawét Ngánján yéné siafé, "Yéndfem ndené wafroghyam yau téfandamǃ" Yesum yanmoi Lefi
english: Immediately Jesus , perceiving in his spirit that they so reasoned within themselves , said to them , “ Why do you reason these things in your hearts ?
Which is easier , to tell the paralytic , ‘ Your sins are forgiven;’ or to say , ‘ Arise , and take up your bed , and walk ’?
But that you may know that the Son of Man has authority on earth to forgive sins” — he said to the paralytic —
“ I tell you , arise , take up your mat , and go to your house .”
He arose , and immediately took up the mat and went out in front of them all , so that they were all amazed and glorified God , saying , “ We never saw anything like this !”

nama: Yesu néngafértai ámbirotaro néngwanoi ndimbal arakaf téndomé. Ár mérén enmormén yáfaf, a yémon watamegh ewafngoi fá. 14 Fá njam tiyoyawéng, Yesum yinjoi Lefi Alfasene ambum témorangérwén mani kafégh méngon. Yesum témndangé, "Yénd kwénmaitoǃ" a Lefi nokayoi yéngwaitoi Yesu.
english: He went out again by the seaside. All the multitude came to him , and he taught them .
As he passed by , he saw Levi the son of Alphaeus sitting at the tax office. He said to him , “Follow me .” And he arose and followed him .

nama: Yéné sémbáran Lefim yumyoi njamkeyot Yesu yánjo méngot, kété tamorwén mani kafégh ár a yaufi ár njamke tánetawét Yesuene waitogh árfé. 16 Njam nák watamegh ár efe tamorwén Farasi ár yinjoyénd Yesu néneyan yaufi ár a mani kafégh árfé, yémofem emotayénd yáne waitogh ár, "Némamén yémon njamke enete mani kafégh árfé a yaufi árfé?"
english: He was reclining at the table in his house , and many tax collectors and sinners sat down with Jesus and his disciples , for there were many , and they followed him .
The scribes and the Pharisees , when they saw that he was eating with the sinners and tax collectors , said to his disciples , “ Why is it that he eats and drinks with tax collectors and sinners?”

nama: Yesum eyárai a ewawangoi, Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Yau mer árém njokté yarawetat wénde enjne téfnáramro. Yénd yau mbarkánd ár moghét wénmormén, wénde yaufi ár wanjarghét." Yesu yémotayénd awafarmanéghmén
english: When Jesus heard it , he said to them , “ Those who are healthy have no need for a physician , but those who are sick . I came not to call the righteous , but sinners to repentance.”

nama: Jonene waitogh ár a Farasi ár kawafarmetawét. Ámb ár enmormén Yesu yémotayénd, "Jonene waitogh ár a Farasi ár nawafarmetat, wénde némamén fene waitogh ár yauǃ"
english: John ’s disciples and the Pharisees were fasting , and they came and asked him , “ Why do John ’s disciples and the disciples of the Pharisees fast , but your disciples don’ t fast ?”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Totér awerégh téfnárane ár yau so nawafarmetat njamandio fá em yémafé? 20 Wénde efogh yéna yéném njam awerégh ár so nguwanongé yéfe tambén, yéné efghon fá so nawafarmetat."
english: Jesus said to them , “ Can the groomsmen fast while the bridegroom is with them ? As long as they have the bridegroom with them , they can ’ t fast .
But the days will come when the bridegroom will be taken away from them , and then they will fast in that day .

nama: Emo yau so tétirarngé totér sálámeta mbékwmbékwot a tékayongé namghét tándáwár sálámeyan. Njam té yafrota yéné, totér sálámeam so nokawete tándáwár sáláme a yáne féne so yém ndimbal. 22 A emon yau so totér wéri nu yararote tándáwár wéri nu ndimbayan. Njam yafrota, wéri nu ndimbé so katiyarngé, wéri nu a ndimbé so nawaghanét. Yau, totér wéri nu so yararote totér wéri nu ndimbat. Safatoe Yuré
english: No one sews a piece of unshrunk cloth on an old garment , or else the patch shrinks and the new tears away from the old , and a worse hole is made .
No one puts new wine into old wineskins; or else the new wine will burst the skins, and the wine pours out , and the skins will be destroyed; but they put new wine into fresh wineskins.”

nama: Ámb Safatan Yesu tiotau kun ndawan yánjo waitogh árfé, yánjo waitogh árém ewafngoyénd kun mbwe férarégh. 24 Farasi ár norayayénd Yesuefaf, "Némamén yémofem ásáfogh yafrotat Safatan táf téfene nák yém?"
english: He was going on the Sabbath day through the grain fields ; and his disciples began , as they went , to pluck the ears of grain .
The Pharisees said to him , “ Behold , why do they do that which is not lawful on the Sabbath day ?”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Fémofem yau yaftaménd némé Deifidém yafrotam njam fá yánjo mérnafé siogh tamorwén nénet? 26 Limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár Abiatarene efghon, fá nélawai Ngánjánene méngot, frengéghkaf féskaf flawé nénet, árké témorwén nák ghéngén wárogh árfetro nénet. A yémon wéi ewaramai ámb yánjo mérnat."
english: He said to them , “ Did you never read what David did when he had need and was hungry — he , and those who were with him ?
How he entered into God ’s house at the time of Abiathar the high priest , and ate the show bread, which is not lawful to eat except for the priests , and gave also to those who were with him ?”

nama: Féyo Yesu wifogh si norayai yéfefaf, "Ngánjánam Safat yafrotam ároe, wénde yau ár yafrotam Safatoe. 28 Féyo Ároene Ambum siyém Safatoe Yuré."
english: He said to them , “ The Sabbath was made for man , not man for the Sabbath .
Therefore the Son of Man is lord even of the Sabbath .”

nama: Ámb efghon fá néngwanoi áumengégh méngo kénjút, a ár kété témorwén ngángé aknyégh ár. 2 Farasi árém end táronjawét Yesue ufarghét kotot ménát némé yaufi sái tafrotangai Safatan, yénémamén ghékéf tafayotawét yá. 3 Yesum yémndai ngángé aknyégh ár, "Kokai ár sáfan."
english: He entered again into the synagogue , and there was a man there whose hand was withered .
They watched him , whether he would heal him on the Sabbath day , that they might accuse him .
He said to the man whose hand was withered , “ Stand up .”

nama: Yesum emotai fá, "Árkéméné nák yém Safatan, mer wafroghét o yaufi wafroghét, ghérsé wanjarghét o ár ngiot?" Wénde fá métar náyátoyénd yáne sian.
english: He said to them , “ Is it lawful on the Sabbath day to do good or to do harm ? To save a life or to kill?” But they were silent .

nama: Yémon ghékfe fá tawámnjotau nékwafé, fá mwighé kérté nawerai yéfenemén ménamén tikéf táikér tamorwén. Féyo Yesum yémndai, "Ngángé táfer." Yémon ngángé yéferyéng táf yáne ngángé mer náyátoyéng. 6 Farasi ár néngwanoyénd a mwighé táfrendawét Erodene árfé Yesue ngiot. Ndimbal mérén eném Yesuefaf
english: When he had looked around at them with anger , being grieved at the hardening of their hearts , he said to the man , “ Stretch out your hand .” He stretched it out , and his hand was restored as healthy as the other .
The Pharisees went out , and immediately conspired with the Herodians against him , how they might destroy him .

nama: Yesuf néngitérmboyénd yánjo waitogh árfé arakaf téndot, a ndimbal mérnam yaitoyénd Yesu Galili yuta. 8 Njam fá náyárayénd méinyotio yémon némé mer tawafrotau, tárfár ár enmormén kétándmé Judia, Jerusalem, Idumiya, a Joden wanje witmé karéf a Taire a Sidon kaka yu ár. 9 Ménamén ár tárfármén yémon emndai yánjo waitogh ár némbne bout frengéghét yáyot ménát árém yau so kilkil tafrotawét fá. 10 Féyo Yesum tárfár ár mer táyátotau, yénémamén efe enjnefé tamorwén frondeyot káyátotawét Yesue yanjaghét. 11 Njamandio yaufi mbérmbéram yinjoi Yesu, fá nuyai yuwot Yesue sáfrére nutnai, "Fém ném Ngánjánene Ambum." 12 Wénde yémon ekmboi fá ende yau taufrongi efe fá yém. Yesum ewaferyéng 12 yánjo muyafé ár
english: Jesus withdrew to the sea with his disciples ; and a great multitude followed him from Galilee , from Judea ,
from Jerusalem , from Idumaea , beyond the Jordan , and those from around Tyre and Sidon . A great multitude , hearing what great things he did , came to him .
He spoke to his disciples that a little boat should stay near him because of the crowd , so that they wouldn’ t press on him .
For he had healed many , so that as many as had diseases pressed on him that they might touch him .
The unclean spirits , whenever they saw him , fell down before him and cried , “ You are the Son of God !”
He sternly warned them that they should not make him known .

nama: Yesu ngarmbotau mband tunakéf téndot a emotayéng fá efe yáne méndefé tamorwén, a nénaflayénd yáfaf. 14 Yémon ewaferyéng 12ro yétkwén ewaramai yánjo muyafé ár, ménát fá yémafé so em a yémon so ewáfárete fá si waitoghét 15 a ménát muyafé so em yaufi mbérmbér wifarghét. 16 Yéné 12 em, Saimon(ende yétkwén yaramai Fité), 17 Jems Jebediene ambum a yánngén Jon(endefet Yesum yétkwén ewarameyai Boanéges, yáne fifi siyém ndenanit toyé), 18 Endru, Filif, Batolome, Metyu, Tomas, Jems Alfesene ambum, Tadeyes, Saimon efe ménde témorwén ndené Ju ár so kawanjetawét fáyo yau Rom waftayan, 19 a Judas Iskariot, emo Yesu sén yéramai. Yesu a Beljebab
english: He went up into the mountain and called to himself those whom he wanted , and they went to him .
He appointed twelve , that they might be with him , and that he might send them out to preach
and to have authority to heal sicknesses and to cast out demons :
Simon ( to whom he gave the name Peter );
James the son of Zebedee ; and John , the brother of James , ( whom he called Boanerges, which means , Sons of Thunder );
Andrew; Philip ; Bartholomew; Matthew ; Thomas ; James , the son of Alphaeus; Thaddaeus ; Simon the Zealot ;
and Judas Iscariot , who also betrayed him . Then he came into a house .

nama: Yesu nélawai méngot, wéikor ár mérén náumendam, yénémamén Yesu a yánjo waitogh ár njamke yau enetaménd. 21 Njam yáne mérén náyárayénd némé kufrotau, fá engmormén kétán Yesue wangoghét ménamén yémofem témndetawét ndené, "Fá siyém onon yém."
english: The multitude came together again , so that they could not so much as eat bread.
When his friends heard it , they went out to seize him ; for they said , “ He is insane.”

nama: Nák watamegh téfnár efe enmormén kétándmé Jerusalemta norayayénd, "Fá siyém Beljebabém yarsoteǃ Yaufi mbérmbérafene sénko ároene muyaye, yémon yaufi mbérmbér ewifne."
english: The scribes who came down from Jerusalem said , “ He has Beelzebul,” and , “ By the prince of the demons he casts out the demons .”

nama: Féyo Yesum eumendai a korayau rengerenge sie yéfefaf, "Ndernáye Sáifér so kawitrongé fáyo? 24 Njam méngotu kafalongé fáyo, méngotu yau so nakete. 25 Njam méngo mérén kafalongi fáyo, yéné méngo yau so nakete. 26 Njam Sáifér mérén nakarotat fáyo kafalongi, fá yau so taikrataye naketat, yáne yam yéna sof eyáto. 27 Efe yau so kényawangé ndimbal muyafé ároene méngo kénjút rokar résaghét táfandro yémon njam fronde yumbeta ángéghe ndimbal muyafé ár. Féyo yémon táf so tanangé yáne méngo. 28 Yéndon ewaufrotan efaloe, méinyotio yaufiyam a yaufi si árfene Ngánján so tawalindangé yéfene yaufi. 29 Wénde emo sotafé yaufi si njam noraya Ngánján Mbérmbéroenemén, Ngánján yau so tawalindangé yáne yaufi si, yéné siyém tuot yaufiyam.
english: He summoned them and said to them in parables , “ How can Satan cast out Satan ?
If a kingdom is divided against itself , that kingdom cannot stand .
If a house is divided against itself , that house cannot stand .
If Satan has risen up against himself , and is divided , he can ’ t stand , but has an end .
But no one can enter into the house of the strong man to plunder unless he first binds the strong man ; then he will plunder his house .
“Most certainly I tell you , all sins of the descendants of man will be forgiven, including their blasphemies with which they may blaspheme;
but whoever may blaspheme against the Holy Spirit never has forgiveness, but is subject to eternal condemnation.”

nama: Yesum korayau yéné si ménamén fá korayawét, "Fá kar yaufi mbérmbérafé témorwén." Yesue yátmé a yánngnéf
english: — because they said , “ He has an unclean spirit .”

nama: Yesue yátmé a yánngnéf nénufaryénd. Tawakayongérwén méngo téndota, yémofem yáfáretayénd ámb ár Yesuefaf. 32 Ár mérén kénjún témorangérwén Yesu, a yémofem yaufroyénd yá, "Fene amé a fenngnéf téndota ewakai fém néronjat."
english: His mother and his brothers came , and standing outside , they sent to him , calling him .
A multitude was sitting around him , and they told him , “ Behold , your mother , your brothers, and your sisters are outside looking for you .”

nama: Yémo emotai, "Efe em tane amé a tane nénngnéf?"
english: He answered them , “ Who are my mother and my brothers?”

nama: Féyo yémon tafandangé fá emofem yarendayénd a norayai, "Tane amé a tane nénngnéf semǃ 35 Emo njam Ngánjánene ménde yafrota fá siyém tane néngén, tane mérés a tane amé."
english: Looking around at those who sat around him , he said , “ Behold , my mother and my brothers!
For whoever does the will of God is my brother, my sister, and mother .”

nama: Kor Yesum yérnyai watamegh arakaf téndon. Ndimbal mérén náumendam fá yarendayénd, Yesu yéné téfnan boutan nuflai a námnjoi téfernetau sawan, njamandio méinyotio ár tamorwén nu téndomé. 2 Yémon tawatametau tárfár yammén rengerenge si, a yáne watamegh kénjún fá norayai, 3 "Káyárangiǃ Ndau téfnár nuwanoi wén mbwe taranéghét. 4 Njamandio tatarnau wén mbwe, ámb kuitawét end téndomé, a wéi men tanmorwén a tánetawét. 5 Ámb kuitawét wím sifayan ánde yau kor mer kanotawét. Fété kanotawét mulmulafé, wénde mband kor mer yau témorwén sérémb eighét. 6 Féyo njam efgham ewinjoi, wén éruyagh nufngoyénd, a kér emormén ménamén yéfene sérémb yau niyayénd kénjút. 7 Ámb kuitawét yus wétfaf, yus kanotawét a tatumndawét, yénémamén mbwe yau kafotawét. 8 Ámb wén mbwe kuitawét mer mbandan. Nanotaménd nafoyénd kwéki, ámb 30, ámb 60, a ámb minde fifi 100."
english: Again he began to teach by the seaside. A great multitude was gathered to him , so that he entered into a boat in the sea and sat down . All the multitude were on the land by the sea .
He taught them many things in parables , and told them in his teaching ,
“ Listen ! Behold , the farmer went out to sow .
As he sowed , some seed fell by the road , and the birds came and devoured it .
Others fell on the rocky ground , where it had little soil , and immediately it sprang up , because it had no depth of soil .
When the sun had risen , it was scorched ; and because it had no root , it withered away .
Others fell among the thorns, and the thorns grew up and choked it , and it yielded no fruit .
Others fell into the good ground and yielded fruit , growing up and increasing. Some produced thirty times, some sixty times, and some one hundred times as much.”

nama: Féyo Yesu norayai, "Fá efe ténganafé yém áyárghét, fá so káyárangé."
english: He said , “ Whoever has ears to hear, let him hear.”

nama: Njam fá yambia témorwén, 12 waitogh ár a ámb árém yémotayénd fá ménamén rengerenge simén. 11 Yémon ewaufroi, "Kwankwane mat Ngánján limánéghmén féfe té ewaramayén, wénde ámb árét siyém rengerenge sie 12 ménát, 'Yéné ár so náronjat, wénde yau so tinjongi. Yéné ár so káyárangi, wénde yau so yáne fifi tayamngongi. Njam fá náyáretat, fá so kawengongi Ngánjánefaf a fá so tawalindangé yéfene yaufi.'"
english: When he was alone , those who were around him with the twelve asked him about the parables .
He said to them , “ To you is given the mystery of God ’s Kingdom, but to those who are outside , all things are done in parables ,
that ‘ seeing they may see and not perceive , and hearing they may hear and not understand , lest perhaps they should turn again , and their sins should be forgiven them .’”

nama: Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Fémofem té yáyamngotati yéné rengerenge si? Nderé ménáyan fém so mat káyátongi ámb rengerenge si? 14 Ndau téfnáram tétarnau si. 15 Ámb ár ndené em end téndon ánde si kuyangé. Njamandio fá káyárangi, Sáifér yéném si oroe engérse árkéméné tatarnau yéfefaf. 16 Ámb ndené em wím sifayan ánde si kuyangé, káyáretawét si a wékeye tanangayénd áuwéghafé. 17 Wénde fá tamorwén sérémbofnar, yéfene efalo yiyátogh siyém tekofnar. Njam kérté o ufogh yéném ménamén simén, fá wékeye kuyangi. 18 Ámb ár ndené em mbandot mbwe árké kuyangi yus wétfaf, náyáretat si; 19 wénde fá mband mwighayam wafogh ewafngoi. Mani mwighayam tawaweindau ámb rokarot. Árkéménáyam si njangénnjangén tiyátotau mbweofnayot. 20 Ámb ár ndené em mer mbandan ánde mbwe kuyangi, si náyárayénd yumyoyénd a nafoi kwéki ámb 30, ámb 60 a ámb 100." Kwayaghé
english: He said to them , “Don’ t you understand this parable ? How will you understand all of the parables ?
The farmer sows the word .
The ones by the road are the ones where the word is sown ; and when they have heard, immediately Satan comes and takes away the word which has been sown in them .
These in the same way are those who are sown on the rocky places, who , when they have heard the word , immediately receive it with joy .
They have no root in themselves , but are short-lived. When oppression or persecution arises because of the word , immediately they stumble .
Others are those who are sown among the thorns. These are those who have heard the word ,
and the cares of this age, and the deceitfulness of riches , and the lusts of other things entering in choke the word , and it becomes unfruitful.
Those which were sown on the good ground are those who hear the word , accept it , and bear fruit , some thirty times, some sixty times, and some one hundred times.”

nama: Yesum ndenéyameyo noyarai, "Ár yau ndené nufarotat lambefé sinan sái etnotat a yame mbanmbanan. Wénde árém tafayongi lambefé kitarékitarayan. 22 Kété siyém némé yau warambnoghmén yém, árkéméné so kakmangé marataye. Némé ténoghe yém safén so kakmangé. 23 Njam ténganafé ném, káyárǃ
english: He said to them , “ Is a lamp brought to be put under a basket or under a bed ? Isn’ t it put on a stand?
For there is nothing hidden except that it should be made known , neither was anything made secret but that it should come to light .
If any man has ears to hear, let him hear.”

nama: "Káyár merkéráye némé fém náyáreteǃ Ndernáye ende fémon efrende ámb ár ndené endeyo fém so néfrendat, a minde tukén mer so yém. 25 Fá efe tane si náyáretat yéfe minde matyam so tawaramangé, wénde yéfeyot efe yau náyáretat némé némbnar yéfene matyam yém so tawakawangé." Rengerenge si wén mbwe anoghmén
english: He said to them , “ Take heed what you hear . With whatever measure you measure , it will be measured to you ; and more will be given to you who hear .
For whoever has , to him more will be given ; and he who doesn’t have , even that which he has will be taken away from him .”

nama: Yesu kor norayai, "Ngánján limánégh siyém ndenanit yém. Ár néwanoi mbwe taranéghét mbandot. 27 Sémbáran a efghon, fá kémégh yékém o kanongé, mbwe káfyarngé anoghafayo, fá mafina yém ndernáye nanote. 28 Méinyotio fáyo mbandam yéfune mbwe, fronde siyém mbém, soramé siyém téfén kétán afoghfaf. 29 Njamandio árnogh wérwér kawerangé a mbwe wau kayongi, féyo ndau téfnáram néfégh naifaye tawafngongé." Rengerenge si némbne mbwemén
english: He said , “ God ’s Kingdom is as if a man should cast seed on the earth ,
and should sleep and rise night and day , and the seed should spring up and grow, though he doesn’ t know how .
For the earth bears fruit by itself: first the blade , then the ear, then the full grain in the ear.
But when the fruit is ripe, immediately he puts in the sickle , because the harvest has come .”

nama: Wéikor Yesu norayai, "Yéndon so ewaufrotan Ngánjánene limánéghmén rengerenge si. 31 Ndenanit yém némbne wén mbwe nau tiyangé mbandan. Yéné némbne mbwe siyém némbne fifi yém, ndené yau ámb wén mbwe kés em mband maratan. 32 Wénde njam tiyangi, so nanote minde ndimbal ndaumén njamke téfén káyátongé a wén náyátoi. Kafe yatene féyotaro menam ánde njén so erametat yáne njaran."
english: He said , “ How will we liken God ’s Kingdom? Or with what parable will we illustrate it ?
It ’s like a grain of mustard seed , which , when it is sown in the earth , though it is less than all the seeds that are on the earth ,
yet when it is sown , grows up and becomes greater than all the herbs , and puts out great branches , so that the birds of the sky can lodge under its shadow .”

nama: Yesum tárfár rengerenge si tawaufrotau árét, yémon tawatametau ár yéfene áyárégh féyotaroyan ménát sioene fifi so tanangayénd. 34 Yémon si tawawaitotau yéfe rengerenge siero. Wénde njam fá yéfembia tamorwén yánjo waitogh árfé, yémon rengerenge sioene fifi tawawafenau yéfeyot. Yesum yékmboi ndimbal mbormbor
english: With many such parables he spoke the word to them , as they were able to hear it .
Without a parable he didn’ t speak to them ; but privately to his own disciples he explained everything .

nama: Yéné férghan, Yesum emndai yánjo waitogh ár, "Kétándmé karéf arakaf kurtongém." 36 Féyo yémofem efrangoyénd ár mérén, a yáne waitogh árfé nuwanoyénd 37 Ndimbal mbormboram eutfoi sawan. Sóf armbogh nufngoyénd bout olitoghétro témorwén.
english: On that day , when evening had come , he said to them , “ Let ’s go over to the other side .”
Leaving the multitude , they took him with them , even as he was , in the boat . Other small boats were also with him .
A big wind storm arose , and the waves beat into the boat , so much that the boat was already filled .

nama: Yesu kémégh tékmangérwén sénko tafal téfayongérwén bout kwémbta. Fá témorwén kémégh kér. Yáne waitogh árém tanongi a témndangi, "Watamegh ár, yénd olitoghétro yéném, yénd fémon té yénmarawene?"
english: He himself was in the stern , asleep on the cushion ; and they woke him up and asked him , “ Teacher , don’ t you care that we are dying?”

nama: Yesu kéméghta nanoi mbormbor a sóf emndeyai, "Métar kamnden." Métar namndeyayénd táf fété.
english: He awoke and rebuked the wind, and said to the sea , “ Peace ! Be still !” The wind ceased and there was a great calm .

nama: Yesum emndai yánjo waitogh ár, "Némamén fém férfér em? Féfene ndimbal mwighé té yém?"
english: He said to them , “ Why are you so afraid ? How is it that you have no faith ?”

nama: Fá minde férfér tamorwén a korayangi yéfe kénjúnro, "Efe yéné yém? Mbormbor a sófam fá yiyárend!"
english: They were greatly afraid and said to one another , “ Who then is this , that even the wind and the sea obey him ?”

nama: Fá néngwanoyénd witmé karéf arakaf Gerasenes mbandot. 2 Njam Yesu nurtoyéng boutta, yaufi mbérmbérafé ár néntoryéng kétándmé mbéwé méngota Yesu yéngwanfetai. 3 Yéné ár tékmangérwén mbéwé méngomé, emo ámb yau yumbai a yénandmé yéfertai ámb seine. 4 Fronde yémofem yéta tumbetawét seine ghambran a ngángayan. Wénde mé tanfetau a emo ámb yau ngárámngárám térametau. 5 Sémbár efogh fá témorwén mbéwé méngon a mband tunakéf sifayan, kutnau a kanfentau fáyo wímamé.
english: They came to the other side of the sea , into the country of the Gadarenes.
When he had come out of the boat , immediately a man with an unclean spirit met him out of the tombs .
He lived in the tombs . Nobody could bind him any more , not even with chains ,
because he had been often bound with fetters and chains , and the chains had been torn apart by him , and the fetters broken in pieces . Nobody had the strength to tame him .
Always , night and day , in the tombs and in the mountains , he was crying out , and cutting himself with stones .

nama: Njam yéné árom yinjoi Yesu nayuta, fá nénenngoi Yesuefaf a budme niyai. 7 Fá nutnayéng yánjo ke féyotaroyan, "Yesu, Minde tukén Ngánjánene ambum, némat fém ménde ném tafaf? Ngánjánene yétkwénan, fémon yau tékrátan kwékémǃ" 8 Ménamén Yesu norayai yáfaf, "Fém yaufi mbérmbér, kéntor yéné ároe tambénǃ"
english: When he saw Jesus from afar , he ran and bowed down to him ,
and crying out with a loud voice , he said , “ What have I to do with you , Jesus , you Son of the Most High God ? I adjure you by God , don’ t torment me .”
For he said to him , “ Come out of the man, you unclean spirit !”

nama: Féyo Yesum yémotai fá, "Fene yétkwén efe yém?"
english: He asked him , “ What is your name ?” He said to him , “ My name is Legion , for we are many .”

nama: Yémon wawérmanéghe taurémnau Yesu ménát yau yéfe witroghét yéné sifayata.
english: He begged him much that he would not send them away out of the country .

nama: Tárfár mérén kimb tamanjnawét mband tunakéf kaka. 12 Yaufi mbérmbéram yamnendayénd Yesu, "Ténmáfáreta kétán kimbafefaf, ténmumyo yénd kétán élaughét yéfefaf." 13 Yesum engéumyoi yaufi mbérmbér néngtoryénd a nénglawayénd kimbafefaf. Yéné kimb mérén 2,000 nuférmoi rékrék ngewonawét sawot méinyotio kolitotawét.
english: Now on the mountainside there was a great herd of pigs feeding .
All the demons begged him , saying , “ Send us into the pigs , that we may enter into them .”

At once Jesus gave them permission . The unclean spirits came out and entered into the pigs . The herd of about two thousand rushed down the steep bank into the sea , and they were drowned in the sea .

nama: Kimb wanjengégh téfnár nétonam a kafrotau yénémamén tesenan a yu tunan, ár néwanoyénd fandaghét némé yam kufrotau. 15 Njam fá enmormén Yesuefaf, yémofem yinjoyénd ár efe témorwén yaufi mbérmbér afoghare, fá témorangérwén sáláme umaneghafé a mer mwighafé, a fá férfér tamorwén. 16 Ár emofem yinjoyénd ewafroyénd árét némé kufrotau yaufi mbérmbér wasérmbogh ároenemén a wéi ewaufroyénd kimbafenemén. 17 Árém yamnendayénd Yesu yéfene yu frangoghét.
english: Those who fed the pigs fled , and told it in the city and in the country. The people came to see what it was that had happened .
They came to Jesus , and saw him who had been possessed by demons sitting , clothed , and in his right mind , even him who had the legion ; and they were afraid .
Those who saw it declared to them what happened to him who was possessed by demons, and about the pigs .
They began to beg him to depart from their region .

nama: Njamandio Yesu uflighétro témorwén boutan, yéné ár efe yaufi mbérmbéram tasérmbotau yénmormén Yesuefaf yémafé álighét. 19 Yesum yau yumyoi, wénde yémon yémndai, "Ngango méngot fenjo mérnafefaf a tawaufro yéfeyot nderé merfifi Yuram tafrote feyot, a nderé mer fá yém feyot." 20 Ár néngwanoi si afrogh yéngérnyai Dekafolis kénjún nderé mer Yesum yafrotam yáyot. Yénémamén méinyotio ár sélngwél emormén. Kér mérés a enjnefé amaf
english: As he was entering into the boat , he who had been possessed by demons begged him that he might be with him .
He didn’ t allow him , but said to him , “ Go to your house , to your friends, and tell them what great things the Lord has done for you and how he had mercy on you .”
He went his way , and began to proclaim in Decapolis how Jesus had done great things for him , and everyone marveled .

nama: Njam Yesu kor néngférmai boute witmé karfot, ndimbal ár mérnam yarendayénd fá njamandio Yesu témorwén arakaf téndon. 22 Ámb áumengégh méngo sénko ár, yétkwén Jairus yénmormén kétán Yesue fandaghét, fá nuyai yáne kafkafot 23 a yémon yamnendai Yesu wáutárghét. Fá norayai, "Tane mérés siyém ndimbal enjne yémǃ Kénaf ngángé tafai, fá mer so káyátongé." 24 Yesuf néngwaneyayénd Jairusfé, tárfár árém soramé yaitoyénd a mé áumengéghanro ár tanmorwén. 25 Ár mérén kénjún amaf kété tafnyangérwén efe férék kertau 12 yunjéf. 26 Fá yéta túmén tiotau tárfár njoktafefaf a yémofem mer yau kor yiyátoyénd, wénde ndémkero tarametawét. 27 Njam amaf náyárai Yesuenemén, amafom yénmaitoi sémta Yesu ár mérén kénjún a yiyánjai yáne sáláme, 28 amaf nemnai, "Yéndon njam yáne sáláme tianjangén, yénd mer so kamndan." 29 Njam yiyánjai yáne sáláme, yáne férék erégh nékmboi a fá táf nawayamngoi nde mer té náyáton.
english: When Jesus had crossed back over in the boat to the other side , a great multitude was gathered to him ; and he was by the sea .
Behold , one of the rulers of the synagogue, Jairus by name , came ; and seeing him , he fell at his feet
and begged him much , saying , “ My little daughter is at the point of death . Please come and lay your hands on her , that she may be made healthy, and live .”
He went with him , and a great multitude followed him , and they pressed upon him on all sides.
A certain woman who had a discharge of blood for twelve years ,
and had suffered many things by many physicians , and had spent all that she had , and was no better , but rather grew worse ,
having heard the things concerning Jesus , came up behind him in the crowd and touched his clothes .
For she said , “ If I just touch his clothes , I will be made well .”
Immediately the flow of her blood was dried up , and she felt in her body that she was healed of her affliction .

nama: Táf fété Yesuene wafté néférmai. Fá nawengoi ár mérnafefaf a kamotangé, "Emo tane sáláme yiyánja?"
english: Immediately Jesus , perceiving in himself that the power had gone out from him , turned around in the crowd and asked , “ Who touched my clothes ?”

nama: Yáne waitogh ár norayayénd yáfaf, "Kéreta yéné árfefaf emofem fém némarendangiǃ Némamén fém namote emo fém nianja?"
english: His disciples said to him , “ You see the multitude pressing against you , and you say , ‘ Who touched me ?’”

nama: Wénde Yesu nawengoi fandaghét emo yiyánjai fá. 33 Amaf mat náyátoi némé yáfaf nufrotam, a yéngmormén férférafé Yesue yáwefnoi. Yémon yaufrotam yáyot méinyotio efalo si. 34 Yesu norayai amafoefaf, "Mérés, fém sénonjo mer ném ménamén fenjo ndimbal mwighamén. Nguwano métare mer té náyáto fenjo kértata."
english: He looked around to see her who had done this thing .
But the woman , fearing and trembling , knowing what had been done to her , came and fell down before him , and told him all the truth.
He said to her , “ Daughter , your faith has made you well . Go in peace , and be cured of your disease .”

nama: Njamandio Yesu mé korayau, ámb ár enmormén Jairusene méngota efe témorwén áumengégh méngo sénko ár. Yémofem norayayénd, "Fene mérés kér té tém, Némamén watamegh ár ndenayu yawérsotati."
english: While he was still speaking , people came from the synagogue ruler’s house, saying , “ Your daughter is dead. Why bother the Teacher any more ?”

nama: Yesum ekenai yéfene si a fá norayai Jairusefaf, "Yau férfér ném, efalo kwiyátoǃ"
english: But Jesus , when he heard the message spoken , immediately said to the ruler of the synagogue, “Don’ t be afraid , only believe .”

nama: Yesum ámb ár yau yumyoi álighét yémafé fáro Fité, Jems a Jon Jemse yánngén. 38 Njam fá néngaflayénd Jairusene méngot a ár ewinjoyénd uwérsoghan yeyan sarake tafrotawét. 39 Féyo Yesu nénglawai méngot a norayai yéfefaf, "Némamén fém ye nendati? Ambum kér yau tém wénde kémégh yékém." 40 Wénde yémofem turtawét Yesu yéné simén.
english: He allowed no one to follow him except Peter , James , and John the brother of James .
He came to the synagogue ruler’s house , and he saw an uproar , weeping , and great wailing .
