When he had entered in , he said to them , “ Why do you make an uproar and weep ? The child is not dead, but is asleep .”
They ridiculed him . But he , having put them all out , took the father of the child , her mother , and those who were with him , and went in where the child was lying.

nama: Yémon yerai ambum ngángayan a norayai yáfaf, "Talita kum," yáne fifi, "Mérés tosé, yéndon némndetan, kano." 42 Tekofnaye mérés nokayoi álighafayo. Mérés témorwén 12 yunjéf. Táf emorméng sélngwél. 43 Wénde Yesum ewaramai táikér si ende yau taufrongi yéné yammén némé nufrote. Féyo Yesum emndai, "Njamke taramangi."
english: Taking the child by the hand , he said to her , “ Talitha cumi !” which means , being interpreted , “ Girl , I tell you , get up !”
Immediately the girl rose up and walked , for she was twelve years old . They were amazed with great amazement .
He strictly ordered them that no one should know this , and commanded that something should be given to her to eat .

nama: Yesum yéfrangoi yéné yu a néngwanoi yánjo tesenot yánjo waitogh árfé. 2 Njam Safat nawerai, yémon watamegh yérnyai áumengégh méngon, tárfár ár efe káyáretawét yáne sifaf sélngwél tamorwén.
english: He went out from there . He came into his own country , and his disciples followed him .

When the Sabbath had come , he began to teach in the synagogue , and many hearing him were astonished , saying , “ Where did this man get these things ?” and , “ What is the wisdom that is given to this man , that such mighty works come about by his hands ?

nama: Fá siyém méngo ramégh árro. Meriene ambum yém, Jems, Josef, Judas a Saimon yánngnéf em. Yáne mérésmérésafé yénd yéna yéném." Yémofem yékenayénd.
english: Isn’ t this the carpenter , the son of Mary and brother of James , Joses , Judah , and Simon ? Aren’ t his sisters here with us ?” So they were offended at him .

nama: Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Méinyotio árém eutémndat Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár wénde yánjo méngotu árém yau a mérnam a fútarém." 5 Yesum yau sélngwélafé yam yéné tesenan ewafrotam, wénde mé nambio enjne téfnárafefafétro ngángé efayoi. 6 Yesu sélngwélam yafrotam njam yéfene ndimbal mwighé yau yinjoi. Yesum ewafarnam 12
english: Jesus said to them , “ A prophet is not without honor, except in his own country , and among his own relatives , and in his own house .”
He could do no mighty work there , except that he laid his hands on a few sick people and healed them .
He marveled because of their unbelief. He went around the villages teaching .

nama: Yesum eumendai yáfaftio 12 waitogh ár, a ewafarnam fá sómbiosómbioe a muyé ewaramai yaufi mbérmbér wifarghét. 8 Yémon emndai fá, "Álighan némé yau tawanangi wénde awamarogh wéturo, yau njamke, yau mani, a yau awogh yáf. 9 Féyotaro yém tamakaro awogh, yau ámb awalogh sáláme tawanangi. 10 Fém njam árké méngot taumyongi, emor kétánotio kor kuwanongi yéné méngotuta. 11 Árké méngotuan yau njam taumyongi o táyárangi fém, kafkaf ngwérméng táf tasénangi féyo méngotu téfrangongi, awafaroghét ndené Ngánjánam tékrátan so tákmangé fá." 12 Yesuene waitogh árém méngotu yéfrangoyénd a si afrogh nufngoyénd árfefaf yaufita awengoghét Ngánjánefaf. 13 Yémofem tawifnawét tárfár yaufi mbérmbér a ár enjne téfnár tafaghanawét olif wén wékwre merafayo. Jon walitogh ároene kérmén
english: He called to himself the twelve , and began to send them out two by two ; and he gave them authority over the unclean spirits .
He commanded them that they should take nothing for their journey , except a staff only : no bread, no wallet, no money in their purse ,
but to wear sandals , and not put on two tunics .
He said to them , “ Wherever you enter into a house , stay there until you depart from there .

Whoever will not receive you nor hear you , as you depart from there , shake off the dust that is under your feet for a testimony against them . Assuredly, I tell you , it will be more tolerable for Sodom and Gomorrah in the day of judgment than for that city!”
They went out and preached that people should repent .
They cast out many demons , and anointed many with oil who were sick and healed them .

nama: Warsagh ár Erod náyárai Yesuenemén ménamén yáne yétkwén marat náyátoi. Ámb ár korayawét, "Jon walitogh ár kérta nénano, yénémamén sélngwélafé ásáfogh yémon ewafrote."
english: King Herod heard this , for his name had become known , and he said , “ John the Baptizer has risen from the dead , and therefore these powers are at work in him .”

nama: Ámb árém korayawét, "Yéné Elaija séno yém." Ámb ár wéi mé korayawét, "Fá siyém mat yátogh ár yém, ndenanit tándái ámb mat yátogh ár kés tanmorwén."
english: But others said , “ He is Elijah .” Others said , “ He is a prophet , or like one of the prophets .”

nama: Wénde njam Erod náyárai Yesuenemén, fá norayai ndené, "Jon séno yémǃ Yéndon efe sénko yénfayén, fá séno nénano ghérsat."
english: But Herod , when he heard this , said , “ This is John , whom I beheaded. He has risen from the dead.”

nama: Erod fá fáyo namndai Jone werghét, a fá engwáfáretam Jone umbghét yélawayénd kwéfkwéf méngot. Erodém yafrotam ménát Erodias sái téfrendangai mwighayan, fá témorwén Erodene néngén Filifene amaf, wénde Erodém yénmakawai a nawerai. 18 Fronde Joném mé korayau Erodefaf, "Yau mbarkánd yém feyot fenngénoene amaf awerghétǃ" 19 Féyo Erodias nékwafé témorwén Jonefaf a fá ménde krot sái tékmangai. Wénde yémon yau yafrotam 20 ménamén Erod férfér témorwén Jonefaf a yambayéng fá. Erod mat témorwén Jon siyém mbarkánd a njúnnjúnofnar ár. Erod mé usérmboghan témorwén ménáyan némé Jon korayau, wénde fá wéi mé mer témorwén yáne áyárghét.
english: For Herod himself had sent out and arrested John and bound him in prison for the sake of Herodias , his brother Philip ’s wife , for he had married her .
For John had said to Herod , “ It is not lawful for you to have your brother’ s wife .”
Herodias set herself against him and desired to kill him , but she couldn’ t ,
for Herod feared John , knowing that he was a righteous and holy man , and kept him safe . When he heard him , he did many things , and he heard him gladly .

nama: Ámb efghon Erodene áráfégh efogh téménd nawerai, yémon ewarawai yánjo tuk ásáfogh ár a fiyaré sénko ár a Galili yumén limánégh ár. 22 Njam Erodiasene yámérés nélawai téménd sifayat ermángégh nufngoi, warsagh ár Erod a yáne wan téfnárafene merotro.
english: Then a convenient day came when Herod on his birthday made a supper for his nobles, the high officers, and the chief men of Galilee .
When the daughter of Herodias herself came in and danced , she pleased Herod and those sitting with him . The king said to the young lady, “ Ask me whatever you want , and I will give it to you .”

nama: Yéndon efalo si némndetan fém ndené witmé karéf méngotu so kémafarorén, njam fém ménde ném."
english: He swore to her , “ Whatever you ask of me , I will give you , up to half of my kingdom.”

nama: Mérés néngtoryéng a yátmé yémndai, "Yéndo némat so tamnendangén?" Yatmam yawangoi, "Jon walitogh ároene sénkotǃ"
english: She went out and said to her mother , “ What shall I ask ?” She said , “ The head of John the Baptizer.”

nama: Mérés wékeye néngangoi a Erode yaufroi, "Yénd ménde wém sénonjo kwaram Jon walitogh ároene sénko merekinan kwawafél."
english: She came in immediately with haste to the king and requested, “ I want you to give me right now the head of John the Baptizer on a platter .”

nama: Warsagh ár Erod ghérghérsisé nawerai ndernáye té yémndai. Wénde fá méndefnar témorwén yánjo si sái tarafarngai ménamén fá némé té norayai yánjo wan téfnárafene sáfrére. 27 Táf fété yémon ewáfáretai fiyaré Jonene sénko néfghét kwéfkwéf méngot. 28 Fiyaram sénko yénmaflayénd merekinan mérsoe taramangi. Féyo mérsom tafnamongé yatmafaf. 29 Njam Jonene waitogh árém náyárayénd ngimén, fá nuwanoyénd yáne fifi résaghét a yélawayénd mbéwé méngon. Yesum emanjnam 5,000 ár
english: The king was exceedingly sorry , but for the sake of his oaths and of his dinner guests, he didn’ t wish to refuse her .
Immediately the king sent out a soldier of his guard and commanded to bring John ’s head ; and he went and beheaded him in the prison ,
and brought his head on a platter , and gave it to the young lady; and the young lady gave it to her mother .
When his disciples heard this , they came and took up his corpse and laid it in a tomb .

nama: Yesuene muyafé ár nénangotaménd Yesuefaf, yémofem taufrotawét yáyot yéfene ásáfoghmén a watameghmén. 31 Wénde tárfár ár tanmorwén a tangmorwén Yesuefaf a yáne muyafé árfefaf yéfeyot ámb féneféne yau témorwén nénet. Féyo Yesum emndai, "Kuwanongém métar sifayat enaghét."
english: The apostles gathered themselves together to Jesus , and they told him all things , whatever they had done , and whatever they had taught .
He said to them , “ Come away into a deserted place , and rest awhile.” For there were many coming and going , and they had no leisure so much as to eat .

nama: Fá néngwanoyénd yéfembia boute métar sifayat. 33 Wénde tárfár árém ewinjoyénd fá a néngwaitoyénd yéfefaf a tárfár tesenmén ár wérseye kérsawét tunamé kétán Yesuefaf. 34 Njam Yesu nurtoyéng boutta, yémon ewinjoi tárfár ár mérén tanmorwén ndenanit wanjengégh árofnar sif. Yesu ghérghérsisé nawerai árfefaf a fá watamegh ewafngoi tárfár yammén.
english: They went away in the boat to a deserted place by themselves .
They saw them going , and many recognized him and ran there on foot from all the cities . They arrived before them and came together to him .
Jesus came out , saw a great multitude , and he had compassion on them because they were like sheep without a shepherd ; and he began to teach them many things .

nama: Séitefifiyan Yesuene waitogh ár enmormén yáfaf a yémndayénd, "Yéné sifayé siyém yauyau sifayé yém a séite té namndé. 36 Ewafarnai ár kaka méngotuot a witmé mband karéf áronjaghét yéfendio njamket."
english: When it was late in the day , his disciples came to him and said , “ This place is deserted , and it is late in the day .
Send them away, that they may go into the surrounding country and villages and buy themselves bread, for they have nothing to eat .”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Fémofem tawaramangi némndafi nénet." Wénde yémofem yémotayénd Yesu, "Fém ménde ném yéndfem 10,000 kinaye yéfe njamke résaghét?"
english: But he answered them , “ You give them something to eat .” They asked him , “ Shall we go and buy two hundred denarii + 6:37 200 denarii was about 7 or 8 months wages for an agricultural laborer. worth of bread and give them something to eat ?”

nama: Féyo Yesum emotai, "Nderé tárfár njamke ewam? Tangém kénufénmangi." Fá nénangoyénd a yaufroyénd ndené, "Téfene em 5 féskaf flawé a sómbio wagif."
english: He said to them , “ How many loaves do you have ? Go see .” When they knew , they said , “ Five , and two fish .”

nama: Yesum emndai yánjo waitogh ár ménát ár mérénmérne ámnjoghét yusan. 40 Féyo fá námnjotaménd ámb 100 e, ámb 50 e. 41 Yesum ewerai 5 féskaf flawé a sómbio wagif, a euyoi njafar tukét, kánjo si yaramai Ngánjáne a tawatfotau. Féyo eramai waitogh árfefaf tawarametawét árét. Yémon wéi tawafalotau sómbio wagif yéfeyot méinyotio. 42 Méinyotio árém enetaménd a eremngoi, 43 a Yesuene waitogh árém ekafayénd 12 yáf afoghare njamke mbarmbar a wagif. 44 Kété tamorwén 5,000 ár emofem yéné njamke enetaménd. Yesu tiotau nu tukma
english: He commanded them that everyone should sit down in groups on the green grass .
They sat down in ranks , by hundreds and by fifties .
He took the five loaves and the two fish ; and looking up to heaven , he blessed and broke the loaves, and he gave to his disciples to set before them , and he divided the two fish among them all .
They all ate and were filled .
They took up twelve baskets full of broken pieces and also of the fish .
Those who ate the loaves were five thousand men .

nama: Yesum emndai yánjo waitogh ár tekofnar uflighét bout kénjút a néngwanoyénd Betsaidat, njam ár mérén engwafarnai. 46 Soramé fá engéfrangoi, fá néngwanoi witmé karéf mband tunakfot Ngánjánafé orayéghét.
english: Immediately he made his disciples get into the boat and go ahead to the other side , to Bethsaida, while he himself sent the multitude away.
After he had taken leave of them , he went up the mountain to pray .

nama: Njam sémbár náyátoi, bout témorwén arakaf néndkéfan, fá táf témorwén yambia tunan. 48 Yémon ewinjoi yánjo waitogh ár bout yéta baraye térayawét, wénde mbormboram mé tawangotau. Faurghétro témorwén wénde kwéfkwéf mé témorwén, Yesu yéfefaf ténmorwén nu tukmé awaingéghtro témorwén. 49 Yémofem njam yinjoyénd Yesu nu tukma álighan, fá kéma kemnawét ndené némndafi bérsebérse kar témorwén. Fá férfére nutnaménd, 50 ménamén yémofem njam yinjoyénd ngernger tamorwén.
english: When evening had come , the boat was in the middle of the sea , and he was alone on the land .
Seeing them distressed in rowing , for the wind was contrary to them , about the fourth watch of the night he came to them , walking on the sea ; and he would have passed by them ,
but they , when they saw him walking on the sea , supposed that it was a ghost , and cried out ;
for they all saw him and were troubled . But he immediately spoke with them and said to them , “Cheer up ! It is I ! Don’ t be afraid .”

nama: Féyo Yesu boutot nuflai, mbormbor táf nékmboi. Fá minde sélngwél emormén. 52 Yémofem yau yáyámngoyénd Yesuene wafté 5,000 ár manjarghan ménamén yéfene tikéf mé táikér tamorwén. Yesum mer táyátotau enjne téfnár Ganasaretén
english: He got into the boat with them ; and the wind ceased , and they were very amazed among themselves , and marveled;
for they hadn’ t understood about the loaves, but their hearts were hardened .

nama: Yesu a yánjo waitogh ár nurtoyénd witmé karéf sawot a bout yékmayénd Ganasaret tesen kaka. 54 Njamandio fá nurtoyénd boutta, árém táf yáyámngoyénd Yesu. 55 Ár ghanyafé nenngoyénd méinyotio tesenot a tanérsawét méinyotio enjnefé ár tataye kétán ánde Yesu témorwén. 56 Méinyotio méngotu, tesen, ndau sifayé, marat sifayé árkamé Yesu tiotau, árém tangérsawét enjne téfnár. Yémofem yamnendayénd Yesu yáne sáláme fétfét yanjaghétro, a méinyotio árém emofem sáláme fétfét táyanjawét mer káyátotawét.
english: When they had crossed over , they came to land at Gennesaret and moored to the shore .
When they had come out of the boat , immediately the people recognized him ,
and ran around that whole region , and began to bring those who were sick on their mats to where they heard he was .

Wherever he entered — into villages , or into cities , or into the country— they laid the sick in the marketplaces and begged him that they might just touch the fringe of his garment ; and as many as touched him were made well .

nama: Farasi ár a nák watamegh ár efe enmormén Jerusalemta Yesufé náumendayénd. 2 Yémofem ewinjoyénd ámb Yesuene waitogh ár ngángé umbarghofnar tamorwén néneyan.
english: Then the Pharisees and some of the scribes gathered together to him , having come from Jerusalem .
Now when they saw some of his disciples eating bread with defiled , that is unwashed, hands , they found fault.

nama: Farasi ár a méinyotio Ju ár yéfekiafene watamegh si efalo táyátotawét. Yémofem túmén ngángé taumbnawét soramé njamke tánetawét. 4 Njam fá kénangotawét marat sifayata yémofem yau njamke tánetawét fronde ngángé taumbnawét. Yémofem ákiafene yam mé tawaitotawét, yéné rokar umbarghan, kafusi, ketol, sin a merekin.
english: ( For the Pharisees and all the Jews don’ t eat unless they wash their hands and forearms, holding to the tradition of the elders .

They don’t eat when they come from the marketplace unless they bathe themselves , and there are many other things which they have received to hold to : washings of cups , pitchers , bronze vessels , and couches.)

nama: Farasi ár a nák watamegh árém Yesu yémotayénd, "Némamén fene waitogh ár yau ndenáye emor téfene ákiafene watamegh ndernáye témorwén? Némamén yémofem njamke enetat yéfene ngángé umbarghofnar?"
english: The Pharisees and the scribes asked him , “ Why don’ t your disciples walk according to the tradition of the elders , but eat their bread with unwashed hands ?”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Aisayane si efalo témorwén njam fá kafrotau féfenemén ndené fém efe farun mer néretati wénde kénjún yau. Ndenaye fété si kés yéfarotaménd, "Ngánján noraye, yéné árém wutémndat yénd mé mbérmbérero, wénde yéfene tikéf em nayu ta tambén.
english: He answered them , “ Well did Isaiah prophesy of you hypocrites , as it is written , ‘ This people honors me with their lips , but their heart is far from me .

nama: Yémofem wáwefnotat ta fifiofnar yéfene watamegh em ár wafroghmén."
english: They worship me in vain , teaching as doctrines the commandments of men.’ + 7:7 Isaiah 29:13

nama: Fémofem ekarotati Ngánjánene si wénde nawertati ár wafroghmén sian."
english: “ For you set aside the commandment of God , and hold tightly to the tradition of men — the washing of pitchers and cups, and you do many other such things .”

nama: Yesu wéikor korayau yéfefaf, "Fém mer em Ngánjánene si kenaghan wénde fémofem ewaitotati féfenjo ákiafene watamegh siǃ 10 Moses norayai, 'Eutémanuwé ferafé a fetmé, a 'Emo njam yárefé a yátmé yaufi si emndéwé fáyo so kéran kakmangé.' 11 Wénde fémofem ewatametati ár a emndetati yárefé a yatmaf, "Yéndon eweretan rokar a ewáutárwan féfe wénde yénándené noraye korban yáne fifi Ngánján Yuré yém." 12 Féyo yénémamén yau so tumyongé némndafi wafroghét yárefé a yatmafet. 13 Fémofem ekarotati Ngánjánene si ménaye féfene ákiafene watamegh yame. Fémofem ewafrotati tárfár ndenanit."
english: He said to them , “Full well do you reject the commandment of God , that you may keep your tradition .
For Moses said , ‘ Honor your father and your mother ;’ and , ‘ He who speaks evil of father or mother , let him be put to death .’
But you say , ‘ If a man tells his father or his mother , “ Whatever profit you might have received from me is Corban ,”’” that is to say , given to God ,
“ then you no longer allow him to do anything for his father or his mother ,
making void the word of God by your tradition which you have handed down . You do many things like this .”

nama: Yesum emotai ár tárfár yáfafaftio a emndai, "Kénáyárangi tafaf, méinyotio mat kamndangi. 15-16\~ Fémon némé enete a kénjút yéngém, yémo yau mámáfi tiyátongé. Wénde némé kénjuta kéntorngé farut yémo mámáfi ár yiyátote."
english: He called all the multitude to himself and said to them , “Hear me , all of you , and understand .
There is nothing from outside of the man that going into him can defile him ; but the things which proceed out of the man are those that defile the man .
If anyone has ears to hear, let him hear!”

nama: Yéné soramé ár mérén efrangoi a nénglawayénd méngo kénjút, yáne waitogh ár namotayénd yéné si rengerengemén. 18 Yesum ewawangoi, "Fém mat fiyátam yéndon némamén emndetan. Fém mat fiyátam fémon némé enete sénféneye yémo yau mámáfi niyátote. 19 Yéné yau yiota fene tikfot, wénde fene futot, a fene fifiot." Ndenayo Yesu norayai, "Méinyotio njamke em nénemén."
english: When he had entered into a house away from the multitude , his disciples asked him about the parable .
He said to them , “ Are you also without understanding ? Don’ t you perceive that whatever goes into the man from outside can ’ t defile him ,
because it doesn’ t go into his heart , but into his stomach , then into the latrine, making all foods clean ?”

nama: Yesu norayai, "Némé kéntorngé tikéfta yémo kényátongé mámáfi. 21 Némé kéntorngé tikéfta yaufi mwighé, walyam, oro, ár ngi, amafanyo wanégh, 22 nité, yaufi wafroghyam, unyégh, wáiwáiofnar yam wafrogh, méndero yifote, wátaranégh, ndimbalndimbal mwighé a mwighafnar yam wafrogh. 23 Méinyotio yéné yaufiyam néntonat ároene tikéfta, ár tiyátongé yaufi." Téndo amafoene ndimbal mwighé
english: He said , “ That which proceeds out of the man , that defiles the man .
For from within , out of the hearts of men , proceed evil thoughts , adulteries, sexual sins, murders , thefts ,
covetings, wickedness , deceit , lustful desires, an evil eye , blasphemy, pride , and foolishness.
All these evil things come from within and defile the man .”

nama: Yesum yéné sifayé yéfrangoi a nuwanoi Taire tesenot, kété télawangérwén méngo kénjún. Yesu méndefnar témorwén ár mat sái káyátongayénd ndené fá méngo kénjún yélau wénde fá mat náyátoyénd tekofnar. 25 Amaf endene mérés yaufi mbérmbéram tasérmbotau yénmormén Yesuene kafkafrére nuyai. 26 Fá témorwén téndo amaf Fonisian náráftam Siria yuwon. Yémon yamnendai Yesu yaufi mbérmbér wifarghét yámersoeta.
english: From there he arose and went away into the borders of Tyre and Sidon. He entered into a house and didn’ t want anyone to know it , but he couldn’ t escape notice .
For a woman whose little daughter had an unclean spirit , having heard of him , came and fell down at his feet .
Now the woman was a Greek , a Syrophoenician by race . She begged him that he would cast the demon out of her daughter .

nama: Wénde Yesu norayai, "Ambum fronde njamkeye témanjnangiǃ Yau mer nérete yéfene njamke ághafet manjarghét."
english: But Jesus said to her , “ Let the children be filled first , for it is not appropriate to take the children ’s bread and throw it to the dogs .”

nama: Amafom yawangoi, "Yuré, Ambumtértrafene njamke mbarmbar nénguitat, ágham enetat kitaré mbanmbanan."
english: But she answered him , “ Yes , Lord . Yet even the dogs under the table eat the children ’ s crumbs .”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Efalo yéné yémǃ Fém nguwano sénonjo. Yaufi mbérmbéram fene mérés té yéfrango."
english: He said to her , “ For this saying , go your way . The demon has gone out of your daughter .”

nama: Njam amaf néngangoi méngot, yémon yinjoi yámérés tékmangérwén yameyan, yaufi mbérmbér frangoghkaf témorwén. Yesum mer yiyátoi téngan méngu a babé ár
english: She went away to her house , and found the child having been laid on the bed , with the demon gone out .

nama: Yesum yéfrangoi Taire a néngwanoi Sidon a Dekafolis tesenamé nufaryéng Galili arakaffaf. 32 Ámb árém yénérsaménd yáfaf ár efe téngan méngu a babé témorwén. Yémofem yamnendayénd Yesu yanjaghétro.
english: Again he departed from the borders of Tyre and Sidon , and came to the sea of Galilee through the middle of the region of Decapolis .
They brought to him one who was deaf and had an impediment in his speech . They begged him to lay his hand on him .

nama: Soramé Yesum yéngutoryéng téndot ár mérénta, Yesum ngángé efayoi ároene ténganan. Ndenéyameyo mbérém efayoi ngángayan a yayanjai yáne kánké. 34 Fá néwewoi njafarot a kénjkam ghérghérsisafé yémndai, "Efataǃ" yáne fifi yém 'Kasawérǃ' 35 Táf fété ároene téngan nasawéryénd, a si mere néngufngoi.
english: He took him aside from the multitude privately and put his fingers into his ears ; and he spat and touched his tongue .
Looking up to heaven , he sighed , and said to him , “ Ephphatha !” that is , “ Be opened !”
Immediately his ears were opened, and the impediment of his tongue was released , and he spoke clearly.

nama: Yesum ekmboi fá yau néngafrotati ámb árfefaf. Yémon mé takmbotau yau nafrotati némé yéndon tafrotan, wénde árém ménjtaye mé ngafrotawét yánemén. 37 Ár sélngwél emormén a fá norayayénd, "Yémon tafrote yéné ásáfogh merfifi. Yémon mer yiyáto téngan méngu a babé ár."
english: He commanded them that they should tell no one , but the more he commanded them , so much the more widely they proclaimed it .
They were astonished beyond measure , saying , “ He has done all things well . He makes even the deaf hear and the mute speak !”

nama: Tekofnaye ámb efghon ár mérén náumendaménd. Kétánotio yéfene njamke nefoyénd yau ámb nénet. Yesum emotayéng yánjo waitogh ár a emndai, 2 "Yénd ghérghérsisé wém yéné árfenemén, Fá té tam yéndfé nambio efogh némndafi njamke yau ewaramayénd. 3 Yéndon njam tawatemban siogh méngotuot fá so ngawambangi álighan, ménamén fá enmormén nayuta."
english: In those days , when there was a very great multitude , and they had nothing to eat , Jesus called his disciples to himself and said to them ,
“ I have compassion on the multitude , because they have stayed with me now three days and have nothing to eat .
If I send them away fasting to their home , they will faint on the way , for some of them have come a long way .”

nama: Yánjo waitogh árém yawangoyénd, "Wénde ánde yéné yauyau sifayan árké árom téu tanwawanangé féskaf flawé yéfe manjarghét?"
english: His disciples answered him , “ From where could one satisfy these people with bread here in a deserted place ?”

nama: Yesum emotayéng, "Njénamb féskaf flawé em féfefaf?" Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Sefenro"
english: He asked them , “ How many loaves do you have ?” They said , “ Seven .”

nama: Yesum emndai ár mérén ámnjoghét mbandan. Yémo njam sefen féskaf flawé ewerai kánjo si yaramai Ngánjáne, yémon etfotam a eramayéng yánjo waitogh árfefaf awafghét ár mérnat ndernáye emndayéng. 7 Yéfene tawamorwén nambio némbne wagifro. Yémo kánjo si yaramai yéné wagifmén ndenéyameyo a emndayéng yánjo waitogh ár wagif wafghét árét. 8 Árém njam enetaménd eremngoyéng. Yéné soramé yáne waitogh árém ekafayénd sefen yáf afoghare njamke mbarmbar árké nafrangoyénd. 9 4,000 ár tamorwén. A Yesum engwatembai méngotuot. 10 Fá nénguflayénd ngárndot yánjo waitogh árfé néngwanoyénd Dalmanuta witmé karéf mbandot. Farasi árém yémotayénd njafarmén sélngwélafé yamot.
english: He commanded the multitude to sit down on the ground , and he took the seven loaves. Having given thanks , he broke them and gave them to his disciples to serve , and they served the multitude .
They also had a few small fish . Having blessed them , he said to serve these also .
They ate and were filled . They took up seven baskets of broken pieces that were left over .
Those who had eaten were about four thousand . Then he sent them away.
Immediately he entered into the boat with his disciples and came into the region of Dalmanutha .

nama: Farasi ár enmormén a mogh yafngoyénd Yesu. Ménát yá ufoghét, yémofem Yesu yémotayénd sélngwélafé yam wafroghét ménát so tufarotangé nde Ngánjánam yéné wafté yaram. 12 Yémon kénjún tékrát yiyárayéng a norayai, "Némamén yéné ár mérnam némndendat sélngwélafé yamot? Yéndon féfe ewaufrotan efaloe, yau so sélngwélafé yam tawaramangén." 13 Féyo yémon enéfrangoi fá, boutfaf nénangoi uflighét a néngférmai witmé karfot. Farasi árfene a Erodene minaghmén
english: The Pharisees came out and began to question him , seeking from him a sign from heaven and testing him .
He sighed deeply in his spirit and said , “ Why does this generation seek a sign ? Most certainly I tell you , no sign will be given to this generation .”
He left them , and again entering into the boat, departed to the other side .

nama: Yáne waitogh ár engwawalindai féskaf flawé résaghét. Wénde ámbiro yéfefaf boutan taflangérwén. 15 Yesum tamndetau fá, "Kor aem Farasi árfene a Erodene flawé minaghmén."
english: They forgot to take bread; and they didn’ t have more than one loaf in the boat with them .
He warned them , saying , “ Take heed : beware of the yeast of the Pharisees and the yeast of Herod .”

nama: Yémofem warunyéghét yiyátoyénd yénémamén yéfe kénjúnro fá norayayénd, "Ménamén yénd flawafnar yéném."
english: They reasoned with one another, saying , “ It ’ s because we have no bread.”

nama: Yesu mat náyátoi yéfene warunyéghmén, Yesum ewárnai fá, "Némamén fém norayati flawafnarmén? Fém somé ghékéf kwéfkwéf em a mwighé déudéu? Némé féfene tikéf mé táikér em? 18 Fém fété ghékfafé em wénde yau néretati, a ndenáyo ténganafé fété emo wénde yau náyáretati? Yau fém nawafarotati? 19 Yéndon njam 5 féskaf flawé etfotamén yéfe 5,000 árét, nderé tárfár yáf afoghare njamke mbarmbarafé wét ekafayénd fémofem?" Yémofem yawangoyénd "Tuwelf."
english: Jesus , perceiving it , said to them , “ Why do you reason that it ’ s because you have no bread? Don’ t you perceive yet or understand ? Is your heart still hardened ?
Having eyes , don’t you see? Having ears , don’t you hear? Don’t you remember ?
When I broke the five loaves among the five thousand , how many baskets full of broken pieces did you take up ?” They told him , “ Twelve .”

nama: "Yéndon njam sefen féskaf flawé etfotamén yéfe 4,000 árét, nderé tárfár yáf afoghare njamke mbarmbar ekafayénd fémofem?" Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Sefen."
english: “ When the seven loaves fed the four thousand , how many baskets full of broken pieces did you take up ?” They told him , “ Seven .”

nama: Fá norayai yéfefaf, "Némé féfene mwighé kwéfkwéfan mé ewam?" Yesum mer yiyátoi ghékéf kwéfkwéf ár Betsaidan
english: He asked them , “Don’t you understand yet ?”

nama: Fá enmormén kétán Betsaidat, a ámb árém yénémnjaménd ghékéf kwéfkwéf ár a Yesu yaunendayénd yá yanjaghét. 23 Yesum ngángayan yéngwerai a yéngémnjoi méngotu téndot. Njam yémon mbérme yéfarndai ároene ghékéf a Yesum táf ngángé efayoi yáfaf, a yémotai, "Fémo ámb rokar té efande?"
english: He came to Bethsaida. They brought a blind man to him and begged him to touch him .
He took hold of the blind man by the hand , and brought him out of the village . When he had spat on his eyes , and laid his hands on him , he asked him if he saw anything .

nama: Fá tukét néwewoi a norayai, "Yéndo ár efandan wénnit narendat."
english: He looked up , and said , “ I see men , but I see them like walking trees .”

nama: Ámbirotaro Yesum wéi ngángé efayoi yéné ároene ghékfan. Féyo táf yáne ghékéf nasawéryénd a yáne erégh nawafarnjaméng, a méinyotio rokar kwayaghan tafandau. 26 Yesum yéngwáfáretai méngot a témndangé, "Yau méngotuot kufar." Fité norayai Yesu siyém Keriso
english: Then again he laid his hands on his eyes . He looked intently , and was restored, and saw everyone clearly .
He sent him away to his house , saying , “Don’ t enter into the village , nor tell anyone in the village .”

nama: Yesu a yánjo waitogh ár néngwanoyénd tárfár méngotuamé yénamé Kaisaria Filifi yuwomé. Álighan Yesum engmotai yánjo waitogh ár, "Ár norayat yénd efe wém?"
english: Jesus went out , with his disciples , into the villages of Caesarea Philippi . On the way he asked his disciples , “ Who do men say that I am ?”

nama: Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Ámb norayat Jon walitogh ár, wéi ámb norayat Elaija, a mé ámb árém néngorayat, ndené ámb Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár."
english: They told him , “ John the Baptizer, and others say Elijah , but others , one of the prophets .”

nama: Yémon emotai, "Wénde fém wét ndernáye? Fém ndernáye norayati yénd efe wém?" Fitam yawangoi, "Fém fété ném Keriso."
english: He said to them , “ But who do you say that I am ?” Peter answered , “ You are the Christ .”

nama: Yesum ekmboi fá ende yau taufrongi efe yénd wém. Yesu korayau yánjo kérmén
english: He commanded them that they should tell no one about him .

nama: Féyo yémon watamegh ewafngoi ndené Ároene Ambum tárfár yamamé tékrát so yáyárete a so tékenangi sénko ár, limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a nák watamegh árém. Fá so yésmetat krotio. Wénde fá so wéi kanongé nambio efogh soramé. 32 Yesum safén tékmetau yénémamén a Fitam yéngwasroi téndot a sotafé si yémndai.
english: He began to teach them that the Son of Man must suffer many things , and be rejected by the elders , the chief priests, and the scribes , and be killed, and after three days rise again .
He spoke to them openly . Peter took him and began to rebuke him .

nama: Wénde njam Yesu nawengoi efandai yánjo waitogh ár, yémon sotafé si Fité yémndai, "Sáifér! Kitrémb ta tambén. Fene mwighé yau em Ngánjáneta, wénde árta."
english: But he , turning around and seeing his disciples , rebuked Peter , and said , “ Get behind me , Satan ! For you have in mind not the things of God , but the things of men .”

nama: Féyo yémon emotai ár mérén yáfaftio yánjo waitogh árfé a norayai, "Efe ta waitoghét njam kufngongé, fá so kakenangé fáyo a tanangé yánjo wafatarégh wén a yénd kwénmaitongé. 35 Yénémaménnde efe ménde njam yém yánjo ghérsé wanjarghét so yaghne, wénde emo yaghna tane téfnan a sioene téfnan so kunjarngé. 36 Némé mer em ároe yéné mband marat njam tanangé, wénde yánjo ghérsé so yaghne? Yau mer yém. 37 Ároe yau yém yánjo ghérsé térarghét. 38 Efe njam tanemén wáiwái yém a tane simén yéné ngánjánofnar a yaufi efghon, féyo Ároene Ambum wáiwái so yém yánemén njam yéném Yárefane ndimbal kwayaghafé njúnnjúnofnar njafar si résagh árfé."
english: He called the multitude to himself with his disciples and said to them , “ Whoever wants to come after me , let him deny himself , and take up his cross , and follow me .
For whoever wants to save his life will lose it ; and whoever will lose his life for my sake and the sake of the Good News will save it .
For what does it profit a man to gain the whole world and forfeit his life ?
For what will a man give in exchange for his life ?
For whoever will be ashamed of me and of my words in this adulterous and sinful generation , the Son of Man also will be ashamed of him when he comes in his Father ’s glory with the holy angels.”

nama: A yémon emndai fá, "Yéndon féfe efalo ewaufrotan, ámb ár efe yéna ewakai yémofem fronde so tinjongi Ngánján limánégh sái yéném ménáyafé waftafé soramé kér em." Yesu nafurnai
english: He said to them , “ Most certainly I tell you , there are some standing here who will in no way taste death until they see God ’s Kingdom come with power .”

nama: Siks efogh soramé Yesu Fité, Jems a Jon néwanoyénd mband tunakfot, ánde fáro méinyotio tamorwén. Kété fá nafurnai yéfene sáfrére. 3 Yáne sáláme nálálai kafe ngarot ánde yau so tinjo ndené kwayaghé yéné mbandan. 4 A kété nufareyayénd yéfe sáfrére Elaija a Moses fá korayawét Yesufé.
english: After six days Jesus took with him Peter , James , and John , and brought them up onto a high mountain privately by themselves , and he was changed into another form in front of them .
His clothing became glistening, exceedingly white , like snow, such as no launderer on earth can whiten them .
Elijah and Moses appeared to them , and they were talking with Jesus .

nama: Fité norayai Yesuefaf, "Watamegh ár, nderé mer yém téfeyot yéna sieném. Yéndfem so erametam nambio méngoméngo, feyot ámb, Elaijai ámb a Mosese ámb." 6 Fité mat yau náyátoi némé so korayangai, fá táf férfér témorwén.
english: Peter answered Jesus , “ Rabbi , it is good for us to be here . Let ’s make three tents : one for you , one for Moses , and one for Elijah .”
For he didn’t know what to say , for they were very afraid .

nama: Féyo yéné soramé njafar kwamkwamam ewafaryéng fá, a kém yénmormén njafar kwamkwamta. "Yéné siyém tane ambum efe yéndon yuwetan. Káyárangi yáfafǃ"
english: A cloud came , overshadowing them , and a voice came out of the cloud , “ This is my beloved Son . Listen to him .”

nama: Tekofnaye fá njam néngretayénd yémofem efe ámb yau yinjoyénd mé Yesuro.
english: Suddenly looking around , they saw no one with them any more , except Jesus only .

nama: Njamandio fá kénewonawét mband tunakéfta yuwot, Yesum ekmboi ende yau táf taufrongi némé fémofem té téfandati kétánotio Ároene Ambum kérta kanongé. 10 Yémofem tarambnotawét yam yéfenjo kénjúnro taruindawét némé 'kérta anoghmén' fifi témorwén.
english: As they were coming down from the mountain , he commanded them that they should tell no one what things they had seen , until after the Son of Man had risen from the dead .
They kept this saying to themselves , questioning what the “ rising from the dead ” meant .

nama: A yémofem yémotayénd fá, "Némamén nák watamegh árém norayat ndené, 'Elaija so yéném fronde soramé Keriso?'"
english: They asked him , saying , “ Why do the scribes say that Elijah must come first ?”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Efalo siyém, Elaija fronde so yém, ménát yémon méinyotio yam fronde so ewafrote. Fém té nemnati ndené yéfarotaménd Ároene Ambumom so tékrat yárarete a yékarotat. 13 Wénde yéndon ewaufrotan féfe, Elaija té yénmormén, a yémofem té yafrotaménd yáfaf méinyotio némat fá ménde tamorwén, ndenáye Buk si kés noraye." Yaufi mbérmbérafé ghakér ambumoene mer yátoghmén
english: He said to them , “ Elijah indeed comes first , and restores all things . How is it written about the Son of Man , that he should suffer many things and be despised ?
But I tell you that Elijah has come , and they have also done to him whatever they wanted to , even as it is written about him .”

nama: Njam Yesu a yánjo nambio waitogh árfé kénewonawét, yémofem ewinjoyénd ár mérén yáne waitogh ár ewarendayénd a kété nák watamegh árfé kéwitawét sian. 15 Tekofnaye njam méinyotio árém yinjoyénd Yesu, fá ndimbal kéráye sélngwél emormén yénémamén wérseye yanfetayénd fá áuwéghafé.
english: Coming to the disciples , he saw a great multitude around them , and scribes questioning them .
Immediately all the multitude , when they saw him , were greatly amazed , and running to him , greeted him .

nama: Yémon emotai, "Némamén fém néwitati yémafé?"
english: He asked the scribes, “ What are you asking them ?”

nama: Árom mérén kénjún yawangoi, "Watamegh ár, yéndon fefaf ténérsan tane ambum, efe yaufi mbérmbéram yasérmbotam siofnarot yéméindai. 18 Njamandio ngi yafngoi, fá mbandot yéntarmai a sén takérnau a féfam ewetoi táikéram yafrotam. Yéndon fene waitogh ár emotayén yaufi mbérmbér wifarghét, wénde féyotarofnar tamorwén wafroghét."
english: One of the multitude answered, “ Teacher , I brought to you my son , who has a mute spirit ;
and wherever it seizes him , it throws him down ; and he foams at the mouth, grinds his teeth , and becomes rigid. I asked your disciples to cast it out , and they weren’ t able .”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "O efalo yátoghofnar ár mérén, nderé teke yénd so wémor féfefaf? Nderé teke yénd so métar wém féfefaf? Ténmanend ghakér ambum tafaf."
english: He answered him , “Unbelieving generation , how long shall I be with you ? How long shall I bear with you ? Bring him to me .”

nama: Féyo yémofem yénmanayénd ambum yáfaf. Njam yaufi mbérmbéram yinjoi Yesu, táf fété ambumom sorar tatirnau. Fá yéntarmai mbandot, kaumnau, féfam tetotau.
english: They brought him to him , and when he saw him , immediately the spirit convulsed him and he fell on the ground , wallowing and foaming at the mouth.

nama: Yesum yárefé yémotai, "Nderé teke fá tém ndené siyém?" Yémon yawangoi, "Kétándmayo fá tosé. 22 Tárfár mbinotmé yéta yaufi mbérmbéram ngiot térametau fá fését unamngoghét a nuwan walitoghét. Njam téu yénmáutána fene ghérghérsisaye."
english: He asked his father , “ How long has it been since this has been happening to him ?” He said , “ From childhood .
Often it has cast him both into the fire and into the water to destroy him . But if you can do anything , have compassion on us and help us .”

nama: Yesu norayai, "Némamén ndené noraye, njam téu yénmáutána? Méinyotio yam áfrátro em yáyot emo efalo yiyátota."
english: Jesus said to him , “ If you can believe , all things are possible to him who believes .”

nama: Tekofnaye yéné ambumoe yárefam nuwangoi, "Yéndon efalo yiyátotan. Ta kwáutána ménát so yéndon efalo yiyátotan minde."
english: Immediately the father of the child cried out with tears, “ I believe . Help my unbelief!”

nama: Yesum njam ewinjoi ár mérén kénérsawét kaka, yémon yémndai yaufi mbérmbér. Fá norayai, "Fém téngan déudéu a babé mbérmbér, yéndon némndetan, kéntor yá tambén a yau kélau wéikor yáfaf."
english: When Jesus saw that a multitude came running together , he rebuked the unclean spirit , saying to him , “ You mute and deaf spirit , I command you , come out of him , and never enter him again !”

nama: Yaufi mbérmbér nutnayéng yaufi keyafé ambum yétarmai mbandot a nétoryéng. Ambum ndenanit néretai kar kér yémormén tárfár ár norayayénd, "Fá kér té tém." 27 Wénde Yesum yéngwerai ngángaye a yéngwakayoyéng.
english: After crying out and convulsing him greatly , it came out of him . The boy became like one dead , so much that most of them said , “ He is dead .”
But Jesus took him by the hand and raised him up ; and he arose .

nama: Soramé Yesu nénglawai, yánjo waitogh árém yémotayénd fá kwankwane, "Némamén yénd féyotarofnar ténmorwén yéné yaufi mbérmbér wifarghét?"
english: When he had come into the house , his disciples asked him privately , “ Why couldn’ t we cast it out ?”

nama: Yémon ewawangoi, "Némaye ámb yau mé Ngánjánafé oraighanro yaufi mbérmbér so ewifnati." Yesum wéikor korayau yánjo kérmén
english: He said to them , “ This kind can come out by nothing but by prayer and fasting.”

nama: Yémofem yéngéfrangoyénd yéné sifayé a Galili yu yéngwaindaménd. Yesu méndefnar témorwén ámb ár sái mat káyátongayénd ndené fá kété em, 31 ménamén yémon tawatametau yánjo waitogh ár. Fá norayai yéfefaf, "Ároene Ambum siyém sén so yérametat árfene ngángat. Yémofem so yésmetat fá, a nambio efogh soramé fá so kanongé." 32 Wénde fá yau mat namndayénd némé fá korayau, wénde fá férfér tamorwén ámoghét. Efe so ndimbal yém?
english: They went out from there and passed through Galilee . He didn’ t want anyone to know it ,

for he was teaching his disciples , and said to them , “ The Son of Man is being handed over to the hands of men , and they will kill him ; and when he is killed, on the third day he will rise again .”
But they didn’ t understand the saying , and were afraid to ask him .

nama: Fá engmormén kétán Káfenamét. Fá njam méngo kénjún télawangérwén, yémon emotai fá, "Némamén fém nénwitati endmé?" 34 Wénde fá métar nékmboyénd ménamén álighan fá kéwitawét efe ndimbal so kamndangé.
english: He came to Capernaum , and when he was in the house he asked them , “ What were you arguing among yourselves on the way ?”
But they were silent , for they had disputed with one another on the way about who was the greatest .

nama: Yesu námnjo a emotai 12 waitogh ár a tamndangé, "Njam ámb ár ménde yém frondeyot, fá táf némbnar kamndangé méinyotio árfene ásáfoghét."
english: He sat down and called the twelve ; and he said to them , “ If any man wants to be first , he shall be last of all , and servant of all .”

nama: Yémon yénémnjoi némbne ambum tosé yakayoi yéfe kénjún. A tambnangé a korayangé yéfefaf, 37 "Emon tumyongé ndené ambum tosé tane yétkwénan ndenéyameyo yénd kwumyongé, a emo yénd kwumyongé yau yénd kwumyongé wénde fá emo yénd kwémáfárete." Emofé yénd yau néuwitam fá sem téfene
english: He took a little child and set him in the middle of them . Taking him in his arms , he said to them ,
“ Whoever receives one such little child in my name receives me ; and whoever receives me , doesn’ t receive me , but him who sent me .”

nama: Jon norayai, "Watamegh ár, yéndfem yinjoyém ámb ár tawifnau yaufi mbérmbér fene yétkwénan, féyo yémndayém, 'Fém kékmbo,' ménamén fém yau téfene mérénmén ár ném."
english: John said to him , “ Teacher , we saw someone who doesn’ t follow us casting out demons in your name ; and we forbade him , because he doesn’ t follow us .”

nama: Yesum emndai, "Yau yékmbotati, ménamén emo yafrote sélngwélafé yam tane yétkwénan tekofnaye fá yau so noraye yaufi si tanemén. 40 Ménamén emofé yénd yau nasénam fá siyém téfene. 41 Yéndon ewaufrotan efalo, ámb árom emo njam kafusiafé nu fe kémaramangé tane yétkwénan ménamén fém ném Kerisoene, yémo so tanangé fai." Néméinde Yaufiot
english: But Jesus said , “Don’ t forbid him , for there is no one who will do a mighty work in my name and be able quickly to speak evil of me .
For whoever is not against us is on our side.
For whoever will give you a cup of water to drink in my name because you are Christ ’s, most certainly I tell you , he will in no way lose his reward .

nama: "Emo njam yéméinda totér ambum yaufiot, nderé mer yém kéman ndimbal wím sái yumbetat a yitat árakafot. Yáne fai siyém némbnar. Wénde Ngánjánam sái taramangé yéné ároe minde ndimbal. 43-44\~ Fene ngángayam njam néméinda fém yaufiot, yéné ngángé téngnéf. Njam ámbiro ngángafé nguwano njafar méngotuot, yéné siyém mer. Wénde sómbio ngángafé njam nguwano ambino tuot fését ánde yau so kékmbongé, yéné siyém mámáfi. 45-46\~
english: “ Whoever will cause one of these little ones who believe in me to stumble , it would be better for him if he were thrown into the sea with a millstone hung around his neck .
If your hand causes you to stumble , cut it off. It is better for you to enter into life maimed , rather than having your two hands to go into Gehenna, into the unquenchable fire ,
‘where their worm doesn’t die, and the fire is not quenched.’
If your foot causes you to stumble , cut it off. It is better for you to enter into life lame , rather than having your two feet to be cast into Gehenna, into the fire that will never be quenched—
‘where their worm doesn’t die, and the fire is not quenched.’

nama: Njam fene ghékfam néméinda fém yaufiot, tutor yéné. Njam ámbiro ghékfafé nguwano Ngánjánene limánéghét, yéné siyém mer. Wénde sómbio ghékfafé njam nguwano ambino tuot fését, yéné siyém mámáfi. 48 Ánde 'Yéfene sésfél yau so kér em, a fés yau so kékmbongé.'
english: If your eye causes you to stumble , throw it out . It is better for you to enter into God ’ s Kingdom with one eye , rather than having two eyes to be cast into the Gehenna of fire,
‘ where their worm doesn’ t die , and the fire is not quenched .’

nama: Méinyotio ár so njúnnjúnofnar eyátote fésam ndené fété solam ghéngén njúnnjúnofnar tiyátongé.
english: For everyone will be salted with fire , and every sacrifice will be seasoned with salt.

nama: Sol siyém mer, wénde yáne ménde njam kefongé, ndernáye fémon so yafarnje wéikor ndené méndetio? Yau, fém solnit aném, a mer métar ghérsé ámb árfé emor."
english: Salt is good , but if the salt has lost its saltiness, with what will you season it ? Have salt in yourselves , and be at peace with one another .”

nama: Féyo Yesum yéfrangoi yéné yu néngwanoi Judiat a néngférmai Joden wanje. Wéikor ár mérén enmormén kétán yáfaf, túmén yam áumengéghan, yémon tawatametau fá.
english: He arose from there and came into the borders of Judea and beyond the Jordan . Multitudes came together to him again . As he usually did , he was again teaching them .

nama: Ámb Farasi ár enmormén tufotawét ménaye ámoghe, "Féyotaro yém nákan árém so tatembangé yánjo amaf?
english: Pharisees came to him testing him , and asked him , “ Is it lawful for a man to divorce his wife ?”

nama: Yémon ewawangoi, "Ndernáye Mosesém tamndetau?"
english: He answered , “ What did Moses command you ?”

nama: Yémofem yémndayénd, "Mosesém ár tamndangai watembégh férén faroghét a amaf táf tangwatembangayénd watembégh férnafé."
english: They said , “ Moses allowed a certificate of divorce to be written , and to divorce her .”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Yéné témorwén ménamén féfene tikéf taikérmén Mosesém yéfarotam féfeyot, 6 wénde kété ufroghan Ngánjánam ewafroméng ghakér a mérés. 7 'Yéné téfnan árom so tatembangé yárefé yátmé a ámbiro kamndend amafofé. 8 A yéné sómbio so kamndend ámbiro fifi.' Féyo fá yau so sómbio ere, wénde ámbiro. 9 Yénémaménnde némé Ngánjánam ámbiro táyáte árké árom yau so tafale."
english: But Jesus said to them , “ For your hardness of heart , he wrote you this commandment .
But from the beginning of the creation , God made them male and female .
For this cause a man will leave his father and mother , and will join to his wife ,
and the two will become one flesh , so that they are no longer two , but one flesh .
What therefore God has joined together , let no man separate .”

nama: Fá njam méngo kénjún tamorwén wéikor, yáne waitogh árém yémotayénd Yesu yénémamén. 11 Yémon ewawangoi, "Árké árom yánjo amaf tatembangé a kawerangé ámb mérés amafanyo nák erafne yáne amafoefaf. 12 A njam amafom yánjar tatembangé a kawerangé ámb ár yémon amafanyo nák erafne." Ambum tértér a Yesu
english: In the house , his disciples asked him again about the same matter.
He said to them , “ Whoever divorces his wife and marries another commits adultery against her .
If a woman herself divorces her husband and marries another , she commits adultery .”

nama: Árém tanérsawét ambumtértér Yesuefaf yanjaghét, wénde yáne waitogh árém eusérmbotaménd fá. 14 Yesum njam ewinjoi, fá nékw nawerai yéfefaf. Yesum tamndangé fá, "Ambum tértér yau ekmbotati ménamén Ngánján limánégh siyém ndené árét yém. 15 Yéndon féfe efalo ewaufrotan, fémofem táf Ngánján limánégh tumyongi ambumtértérnit ménát fém táf so kélawangi." 16 Féyo Yesum ambumtértér tawambnangé ngángaye a frengégh ewafngoyéng. Wemár totér ár
english: They were bringing to him little children , that he should touch them , but the disciples rebuked those who were bringing them .
But when Jesus saw it , he was moved with indignation and said to them , “Allow the little children to come to me ! Don’ t forbid them , for God ’s Kingdom belongs to such as these .
Most certainly I tell you , whoever will not receive God ’s Kingdom like a little child , he will in no way enter into it .”
He took them in his arms and blessed them , laying his hands on them .

nama: Njamandio Yesu álighét nufngoi, ár nénenngoi yáfaf a budme niyai yá sáfrére. Yémon yémotai, "Mer watamegh ár, yéndon némé so yafrotan tuot ghérsé résaghét?"
english: As he was going out into the way , one ran to him , knelt before him , and asked him , “ Good Teacher , what shall I do that I may inherit eternal life ?”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Némamén fémon wémnde ndené mer? Yau efe mer yém, mé Ngánjánro fáro. 19 Fém mat ném náknák, 'Ár ngi yau, amafanyo wanégh yau, oro yau, unyégh si yau ewaufrota, wasogh yau, eutémanwé fene fetmé a ferafé.'"
english: Jesus said to him , “ Why do you call me good ? No one is good except one — God .
You know the commandments : ‘ Do not murder ,’ ‘ Do not commit adultery ,’ ‘ Do not steal ,’ ‘ Do not give false testimony ,’ ‘ Do not defraud,’ ‘ Honor your father and mother .’”

nama: Yémon témndangé, "Watamegh ár, yéné nák méinyotio yéndon taweretan kétándmayo yénd tosé kwémorwén."
english: He said to him , “ Teacher , I have observed all these things from my youth .”

nama: Yesum yéfandai áuwéghafé fá, a témndangé, "Ámbiro yam fefaf náláite, kuwano, etérna fene méinyotio rokar némé em a engwarameta méinyotio mani yauyau árét, a fene ngonjél so nawamndat njafaran. Féyo kénaf, yénd kwénmaito."
english: Jesus looking at him loved him , and said to him , “ One thing you lack . Go , sell whatever you have and give to the poor , and you will have treasure in heaven ; and come , follow me , taking up the cross.”

nama: Táf fété ár ghérghérsisafé nuwanoi, ménamén ndimbal wemár témorwén.
english: But his face fell at that saying , and he went away sorrowful , for he was one who had great possessions .

nama: Yesu néngretai a tamndangé yánjo waitogh ár, "Nderé táikér yém wemár ároe kétán élaughét Ngánján limánéghétǃ"
english: Jesus looked around and said to his disciples , “ How difficult it is for those who have riches to enter into God ’ s Kingdom!”

nama: Waitogh ár sélngwél emormén yáne sian. Wénde Yesum tamndangé kor, "Ambum, nderé táikér so yém kétán Ngánján limánégh élaughét. 25 Kértayafé yém kemoloe wét féneyan élaughét, wénde wemár ároe kérté yamam kétán élaughét Ngánján limánéghét so yáinde yéné!"
english: The disciples were amazed at his words . But Jesus answered again , “ Children , how hard it is for those who trust in riches to enter into God ’s Kingdom!
It is easier for a camel to go through a needle ’s eye than for a rich man to enter into God ’s Kingdom.”

nama: Waitogh ár minde sélngwél emormén a norayayénd yéfe kénjúnro, "Efe so féyotaro ngunjarngé?"
english: They were exceedingly astonished , saying to him , “ Then who can be saved ?”

nama: Yesum engfandayéng fá a norayai, "Yéné siyém ároe féyotarofnar yém, wénde yau Ngánjáne, méinyotio féyotaro em Ngánjáneyot.
english: Jesus , looking at them , said , “ With men it is impossible , but not with God , for all things are possible with God .”

nama: Fitam témndangé, "Yéndfem rokar méinyotio té tanéurotam a nénmaitongém fémǃ"
english: Peter began to tell him , “ Behold , we have left all and have followed you .”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Yéndon efalo ewaufrotan, árké árom tafrangongé méngo, yánaf o mérsof, yátmé, yárefé, ambumtértér o mband tanemén a mer simén 30 so tawinjongé minde tárfár sénonjo efghon, méngo tárfár, anaf, mérésof, tárfár amé, ambumtértér a mband, a ndenéyameyo kérté, a soramé efghon, so tanangi tuot ghérsé. 31 Wénde tárfár ár efe sénonjo fronde em so em kerkeran, a efe sénonjo kerkeran em fronde so kamndangi." Yesu kor norayai yánjo kérmén
english: Jesus said , “Most certainly I tell you , there is no one who has left house , or brothers, or sisters, or father , or mother , or wife, or children , or land, for my sake , and for the sake of the Good News ,
but he will receive one hundred times more now in this time : houses , brothers, sisters, mothers , children , and land, with persecutions ; and in the age to come eternal life .
But many who are first will be last , and the last first .”

nama: Fá tayotawéng endmé kétán Jerusalemét, a Yesum talimndau endmé yáne waitogh ár sélngwél emormén, ámb ár tangwaitotawét férfér tamorwén. Wéikor ewimndai 12 waitogh ár téndot fronde tawaufrotau ménamén némé so kufrotau yáfaf. 33 Yémon emndai, "Yénd yényota kétán Jerusalemét, a Ároene Ambum so sén téramangi kétán ghéngén wárogh sénko árfefaf a nák watamegh téfnárafefaf. Fá so korayangi fém so kér ném, a so kwafnamongi kétán téndo árfefaf, 34 emofem si so wawafrotat tayot a mbérme wéfarndat, wéfmotat a kérot kwékmangi yénd, nambio efogh soramé yénd so kanon." Yéfene ómnengégh Jems a Jon
english: They were on the way , going up to Jerusalem ; and Jesus was going in front of them , and they were amazed ; and those who followed were afraid . He again took the twelve , and began to tell them the things that were going to happen to him .
“ Behold , we are going up to Jerusalem . The Son of Man will be delivered to the chief priests and the scribes . They will condemn him to death , and will deliver him to the Gentiles .
They will mock him , spit on him , scourge him , and kill him . On the third day he will rise again .”

nama: Féyo Jems a Jon, Jefediene ambum engérmén kétán yáfaf. Yémofem yamnendangeyayénd, "Watamegh ár, yénd ménde yénre fémon so yénmawafrowé téfe némat njam fém kémamnendangem."
english: James and John , the sons of Zebedee , came near to him , saying , “ Teacher , we want you to do for us whatever we will ask .”

nama: Yesum emotangeyai, "Némé wafroghét fém ménde ere tafaf yéndon sái ewawafrowan féfe?"
english: He said to them , “ What do you want me to do for you ?”

nama: Yémofem yawangeyayénd, "So fémon féyotaro ténmumye yénd fene tambénta a ámb fatrata ámnjoghét táf fém njam kámnjo fene ndimbal kwayaghé kitarayan."
english: They said to him , “ Grant to us that we may sit , one at your right hand and one at your left hand , in your glory .”

nama: Yesum emndeyai, "Fém yau mat ere némamén fém namot, fém féyotaro ere ghafté kafusi nu nénet yéndon árkéméné so yénetan? O fém so ewalitot ndenáye yénd sái walitotat?"
english: But Jesus said to them , “ You don’ t know what you are asking . Are you able to drink the cup that I drink , and to be baptized with the baptism that I am baptized with ?”

nama: Yémofem yawangeyayénd, "Féyotaro yéndfem so."
english: They said to him , “ We are able .” Jesus said to them , “ You shall indeed drink the cup that I drink , and you shall be baptized with the baptism that I am baptized with ;

nama: Wénde kétán ámnjoghét tane tambénta a fatrata yénd waftafnar wém raméghét. Ngánjánro yém emo so tawaramangé yéné sifayé yéfeyot efe yémon té efrendaméng."
english: but to sit at my right hand and at my left hand is not mine to give , but for whom it has been prepared .”

nama: Njam ámb 10 waitogh árém náyárayénd yénémamén, fá nékwafé nafghetaménd yéfefaf Jems a Jon. 42 Féyo Yesum emotayéng fá méinyotio a eumendayéng, "Fém mat em ndené téndo árfene warsagh ár nawarsat a elimndat ár ménayeofnaye árét mer yau ewawafrotat. A yéfene tuk ásáfogh árém wafté euyafotat ménát árém so ewaitotat náknák. 43 Ndené yau nufrotati fá kés em. Wénde njam ámb ár ménde yém ndimbalot, fá táf némbnar kamndangé árfene ásáfoghét. 44 Njam ámb ár ménde yém frondeyot, fá táf némbnar kamndangé árfene ásáfoghét. 45 Ndené ende Ároene Ambum yau yénmormén árém sái yausáfotat, wénde yéfe wáusáfoghét a yánjo ghérsé yéramai tárfár ár wanjarghét." Ghékéf kwéfkwéf ár Batamayas néretai
english: When the ten heard it , they began to be indignant toward James and John .
Jesus summoned them and said to them , “ You know that they who are recognized as rulers over the nations lord it over them , and their great ones exercise authority over them .
But it shall not be so among you , but whoever wants to become great among you shall be your servant .
Whoever of you wants to become first among you shall be bondservant of all .
For the Son of Man also came not to be served but to serve , and to give his life as a ransom for many .”

nama: Féyo fá enmormén kétán Jerikot. Njam Yesu a yáne waitogh ár a ndimbal mérén káumendawét, yéngéfrangoyénd tesen, a ghékéf kwéfkwéf ár Batamayas, témorwén Tamayasene ambum, efe témorangérwén end téndon kómnendau. 47 Njam yémon náyárai ndené Najaretmén Yesu nawainde, fá kétán ke nufngoi, "Yesu Deifidene ambum, ghérghérsisé kwawer tafaf!"
english: They came to Jericho . As he went out from Jericho with his disciples and a great multitude , the son of Timaeus , Bartimaeus, a blind beggar , was sitting by the road .
When he heard that it was Jesus the Nazarene , he began to cry out and say , “ Jesus , you son of David , have mercy on me !”

nama: Tárfár árém tusérmbotawét, "Métar!" Wénde fá mé minde tukén kutnau, "Deifidene ambum, ghérghérsisé kawer tafaf!"
english: Many rebuked him , that he should be quiet , but he cried out much more , “ You son of David , have mercy on me !”

nama: Yesu nékmboi áligh a korayangé, "Téngmotangend."
english: Jesus stood still and said , “ Call him .” They called the blind man , saying to him , “Cheer up ! Get up . He is calling you !”

nama: Yémon yánjo awafarégh sáláme yéngwitam téndot, fá natnam a néwanoi Yesufaf,
english: He , casting away his cloak , sprang up , and came to Jesus .

nama: Yesum yémotayéng, "Némé ménde ném yéndon sái némawafrotan?" Ghékéf kwéfkwéf árom yémndai, "Watamegh ár, yénd ménde wém sái kéretangen."
english: Jesus asked him , “ What do you want me to do for you ?” The blind man said to him , “ Rabboni , + 10:51 Rabboni is a transliteration of the Hebrew word for “great teacher.” that I may see again .”

nama: Yesum yémndayéng, "Nguwano, fenjo ndimbal mwighayam mer té niyáto fém." Táf fété néretai a yéngwaitoi Yesu endmé.
english: Jesus said to him , “ Go your way . Your faith has made you well .” Immediately he received his sight and followed Jesus on the way .

nama: Njam fá ufarghétro téngmorwén Jerusalemét a engmormén kétán Betfage a Betani mband tunakéf yétkwén Olifén. Yesum ewáfáretangeyai yánjo sómbio waitogh ár, 2 emndeyai yéné si, "Nguwanend méngotuot féferére, njam fém ngélawénd, fémofem so tinjend umbéghkaf ndonki, árké ár yau yéfayongérmén, ténferend a yénémnjet yénan. 3 Njam emon tamotange fém, 'Némé fémofem yéna yafrot?' táf yá taufrend, 'Yuré ménde yém, so ténmangongé tekofnaye.'"
english: When they came near to Jerusalem , to Bethsphage and Bethany, at the Mount of Olives , he sent two of his disciples
and said to them , “ Go your way into the village that is opposite you . Immediately as you enter into it , you will find a young donkey tied , on which no one has sat . Untie him and bring him .
If anyone asks you , ‘ Why are you doing this ?’ say , ‘ The Lord needs him ;’ and immediately he will send him back here .”

nama: Fá néngwaneyayénd yinjeyayénd ndonki endén sémta umbéghkaf sésafnefaf. Njam yémofem téferwét, 5 ámb ár tawakayongérwén kété emotangeyayénd, "Némé fémofem yafrot, siyéferét yéné ndonki?" 6 Yémofem ewawangeyayénd ndernáye Yesum engémndeyai, féyo árém engéumieyayénd ndonki résaghét. 7 Njam yémofem yénémnjéménd ndonki Yesuefaf, yémofem tawiwét yéfenjo sáláme ndonki sémsotot, a Yesu yéné tukén nafayoi. 8 Tárfár árém wéi ndenéyameyo tangfiyangotawét yéfenjo sáláme endmé, ámb árém tangfiyangotawét wén njambam endmé árké yémofem tanénfetawét kéghatamé. 9 Fá efe tayotawéng endmé fronde a efe soramé nguwaitotawét ngutnawét, "Áuwégh yém!" "Efe yéném Yurane yétkwénan, frengéghkaf yém!"
english: They went away , and found a young donkey tied at the door outside in the open street, and they untied him .
Some of those who stood there asked them , “ What are you doing , untying the young donkey?”
They said to them just as Jesus had said , and they let them go .
They brought the young donkey to Jesus and threw their garments on it , and Jesus sat on it .
Many spread their garments on the way , and others were cutting down branches from the trees and spreading them on the road .
Those who went in front and those who followed cried out , “ Hosanna ! Blessed is he who comes in the name of the Lord !

nama: "Téfene áki Deifidene méngotu yéném, frengéghkaf yém!" "Áuwégh minde tukén!"
english: Blessed is the kingdom of our father David that is coming in the name of the Lord ! Hosanna in the highest !”

nama: Yesu nénglawai Jerusalemét a néngwanoyéng kétán wáwefnogh méngot. Fá néngretai méinyotio rokarfaf, wénde táf tamorwén efogh nawaindai, fá néngwanoi kétán Betanit 12 waitogh árfé. Fig wén
english: Jesus entered into the temple in Jerusalem . When he had looked around at everything , it being now evening , he went out to Bethany with the twelve .

nama: Ámb efghon yémofem Betani yéfrangoyénd, Yesu témorwén siogh. 13 Nayuta yéngwinjoi árau fig wénfaf néngwanoi ménát ndené mbwefé kar témorwén. Fá njam kaka néngaflai, mé árauro ewinjoi ménamén yau wérwér nawerai fig wénoe afoghét. 14 Féyo yénémamén fá norayai kétán fig wénfaf, "Emo yau fifi so yéngnete mbwe fe tambén wéikor." Yánjo waitogh árém fá yiyárayénd wafalngogh sian. Yesum tésámbunau wáwefnogh méngo
english: The next day , when they had come out from Bethany, he was hungry .
Seeing a fig tree afar off having leaves , he came to see if perhaps he might find anything on it . When he came to it , he found nothing but leaves , for it was not the season for figs .
Jesus told it , “ May no one ever eat fruit from you again !” and his disciples heard it .

nama: Fá njam néngufaryéng Jerusalemét, Yesu nénglawayéng wáwefnogh méngo sifayat a wifarégh ewafngoi fá emofem tatérnawét rokar kété. Yémon tangwengotau mani térarégh kitaré a árfene ámnjogh rokar, 16 a fá yau taumyotau ár rokar résaghét wáwefnogh méngo sifayat. 17 Fá norayai, "Buk si noraye, 'Tane méngo so yémndetat Ngánjánafé orayégh méngo méinyotio yuwon.' Wénde fémofem yiyátongi oro téfnárane átnogh méngo."
english: They came to Jerusalem , and Jesus entered into the temple and began to throw out those who sold and those who bought in the temple , and overthrew the money changers ’ tables and the seats of those who sold the doves .
He would not allow anyone to carry a container through the temple .
He taught , saying to them , “Isn’ t it written , ‘ My house will be called a house of prayer for all the nations ’? But you have made it a den of robbers !”

nama: Ghéngén wárogh sénko téfnár a nák watamegh ár náyárayénd yénémamén end ronjagh ewafngoyénd Yesue ngiot. Ghéngén wárogh sénko téfnár a nák watamegh ár férfér nufngoyénd Yesuenemén, ménamén méinyotio ár mérén tamorwén sélngwél yáne watameghan.
english: The chief priests and the scribes heard it , and sought how they might destroy him . For they feared him , because all the multitude was astonished at his teaching .

nama: Njam férégh yénmafngoi Yesu a yáne waitogh ár néngwanoyénd tesenot. Watameghyam fig wénmén
english: When evening came , he went out of the city .

nama: Tándái akwan táf fá néngwanoyénd endmé tangmorwéng, yémofem yinjoyénd fig wén uruyaghare kétándmayo tuk a sérémb. 21 Fité táf nawafarotayéng a norayai Yesuefaf, "Watamegh ár, kéreta! Yéné fig wén fémon siyafalngoi té kér tém!"
english: As they passed by in the morning , they saw the fig tree withered away from the roots .
Peter , remembering, said to him , “ Rabbi , look ! The fig tree which you cursed has withered away .”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Ndimbal mwighé a ewam Ngánján kénjún! 23 Yéndon féfe ewaufrotan efaloe, njam ámb árom témndangé yéné mband tunakéf, 'Kuwano, ngauwar fém arakafot' a tikéf déudéu yau yém wénde efalo yiyátote yéné fá némé noraye so wafroghan yém, so nufrote yáfaf. 24 Yénémaménnde yéndon emndetan némndafiot fém njam kómnendangi Ngánjánafé oraighan, efalo tiyátongi nde fémofem té yanangi a féfe so tawaramanga némat fém nómnendangi. 25-26\~ A njam némakai Ngánjánafé oraighan, fémon njam yereta némndafi yáne emafé nasnanét, fronde kémawalindangé yéfene yaufiyam, ménát Ferafam njafaran so kémawalindangé fene yaufiyam." Ámogh ménamén Yesuene si muyamén
english: Jesus answered them , “ Have faith in God .

For most certainly I tell you , whoever may tell this mountain , ‘ Be taken up and cast into the sea ,’ and doesn’ t doubt in his heart , but believes that what he says is happening , he shall have whatever he says .
Therefore I tell you , all things whatever you pray and ask for , believe that you have received them , and you shall have them .
Whenever you stand praying , forgive, if you have anything against anyone ; so that your Father , who is in heaven , may also forgive you your transgressions .
But if you do not forgive, neither will your Father in heaven forgive your transgressions.”

nama: Fá nénufaryénd wéikor Jerusalem kénjút, a njamandio Yesu karendau wáwefnogh méngo sifayamé, ghéngén wárogh sénko ár, nák watamegh ár a limánégh ár nénufaryénd yáfaf. 28 Fá namotayénd, "Endene yétkwénan fémon tawifne mani térarégh ár wáwefnogh méngota? Emo fe yéné si muyé némaram?"
english: They came again to Jerusalem , and as he was walking in the temple , the chief priests, the scribes , and the elders came to him ,
and they began saying to him , “ By what authority do you do these things ? Or who gave you this authority to do these things ?”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Yéndon fém so tamotangén ámbiro ámogh si. Kwawangongi ta, a yéndon so tawaufron féfe némé si muyayan yéndon yéné yam ewaufrotan. 30 Jonene walitogh árkamé yénmormén njafarta o árta? Ta kwaufrongi!"
english: Jesus said to them , “ I will ask you one question . Answer me , and I will tell you by what authority I do these things .
The baptism of John — was it from heaven , or from men ? Answer me .”

nama: Yémofem éwighét yiyátoyénd yéfe kénjúnro, a korayangi, "Njam yénd korayangém nde, 'Kétándmé njafarta' yémon so ténmotangé, 'Féyo némamén wét yau fémofem efalo yiyátongi Jon?' 32 Wénde yénd yau so korayangém árfene sáfrére, 'Kétándmé árta.'" Yémofem ár férférafé tafandawét ménamén méinyotio ár kemnawét ndené Jon fété témorwén Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár.
english: They reasoned with themselves , saying , “ If we should say , ‘ From heaven ;’ he will say , ‘ Why then did you not believe him ?’
If we should say , ‘ From men ’”— they feared the people , for all held John to really be a prophet .

nama: Féyo yémofem yawangoyénd Yesue, "Yénd mafina yéném." Yesu norayai, "Yéndon yau so tawaufron némé si muyayan yéndon ewafrotan yéné yam."
english: They answered Jesus , “ We don’ t know .” Jesus said to them , “ Neither will I tell you by what authority I do these things .”

nama: Féyo yémon yérnyayéng si yéfe rengerengeye, "Ámb árom yeitam géreif mbwe ménj ndau yurnam, yékw yétanam ménát mbwe tumángéghét wékwér étorghét. A ghékéf fayogh kitaré yérametam. Féyo yémon yéramai watmé géreif mbwe ménj ndau kétán ndau téfnárfefaf a fá néngwanoyéng nayu yuwot. 2 Arnogh efogh njam nawerai ámb ásáfogh ár yáfáretam ndau téfnárfefaf ámb mbwe kafghét géreif mbwe ménj ndaufaf. 3 Wénde yémofem yerayénd fá, tésmetawét a yéngwatembayénd némayafé ámb yau. 4 Féyo yémon ámb ásáfogh ár yáfáretam, yémofem wéi yétiaryénd sénkoyan wáiwáiafé yam yafrotaménd. 5 Yémon nambiomén kor yáfáretam, krot yésmetaménd. Yémon tárfáryo mé tawáfáretau, ámb tásmétawét kalot, ámb krot.
english: He began to speak to them in parables . “ A man planted a vineyard, put a hedge around it , dug a pit for the wine press , built a tower , rented it out to a farmer , and went into another country.
When it was time , he sent a servant to the farmer to get from the farmer his share of the fruit of the vineyard.
They took him , beat him , and sent him away empty .
Again , he sent another servant to them ; and they threw stones at him , wounded him in the head , and sent him away shamefully treated.
Again he sent another , and they killed him , and many others , beating some , and killing some .

nama: 'Yémon yéfrangoi ámbiro watembghét, ambum efe yémon minde tuwetau. Soraméfifi yémon fá yáfáretam yéné siafé, 'Yémofem so yutémndat tane ambum.'
english: Therefore still having one , his beloved son , he sent him last to them , saying , ‘ They will respect my son .’

nama: Wénde ndau téfnár norayayénd kété yéfe kénjúnro, 'Yéné siyém yárefane sifayé résagh ár ambum. Kénaflangi so yésmetam krotio ménát yéné ndau so kamndangé téfene.' 8 Féyo yémofem yerayénd a yésmetaménd krotio a yitaménd géreif mbwe ménj ndau tambén.
english: But those farmers said among themselves , ‘ This is the heir . Come , let ’s kill him , and the inheritance will be ours .’
They took him , killed him , and cast him out of the vineyard.

nama: Némé so wét géreif mbwe ménj ndau yuram yafrote? Fá so kénwanongé a esmeta yéné ndau téfnár a géreif mbwe ménj ndau so tawaramangé ámb árfeyot. 10 Té fémofem yéné Buk si yaftaménd nde, "Sérasér yékenayénd méngo ramégh árém soramé namndayéng néndkéf sérasér.
english: What therefore will the lord of the vineyard do ? He will come and destroy the farmers, and will give the vineyard to others .
Haven’ t you even read this Scripture : ‘ The stone which the builders rejected was made the head of the corner .

nama: Yuram yéné yafrotaméng, merfifi téfene ghékfan?""
english: This was from the Lord . It is marvelous in our eyes ’?” + 12:11 Psalms 118:22-23

nama: Féyo Ju sénko téfnáram end taronjawét yá werghét, ménamén fá mat náyátoyénd fá korayau yéné rengerengeye yéfenemén. Wénde fá férféram tafindau ár mérénafenemén. Féyo yénémamén yémofem yéfrangoyénd a néngwanoyénd. Mani kémégh kétán Kaisare
english: They tried to seize him , but they feared the multitude ; for they perceived that he spoke the parable against them . They left him and went away.

nama: Soramayo limánégh téfnáram engwáfáretaménd ámb Farasi ár a Erodene ár kétán Yesuefaf ménát werghét yánjo sian. 14 Fá nénaflayénd kétán yáfaf a norayayénd, "Watamegh ár, yénd mat yéném fém sném efalo si afrogh ár. Fém yau árém kénwendangi efe fém ném, wénde fémon ewatamete efalo si, némé Ngánjánene ménde yém árét. Ténmaufro mbarkánd yém Kaisare mani kémghét o yau? 15 Yéndfem so ekmetam o yau?"
english: They sent some of the Pharisees and the Herodians to him , that they might trap him with words .

When they had come , they asked him , “ Teacher , we know that you are honest, and don’ t defer to anyone ; for you aren’ t partial to anyone , but truly teach the way of God . Is it lawful to pay taxes to Caesar , or not ?
Shall we give , or shall we not give ?” But he , knowing their hypocrisy , said to them , “ Why do you test me ? Bring me a denarius , that I may see it .”

nama: Yémofem yénmawanayénd mani mbwe a yémon emotayéng fá, "Endene sáf yéné yém? A endene yétkwén yém?" Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Kaisarene."
english: They brought it . He said to them , “ Whose is this image and inscription ?” They said to him , “ Caesar ’s.”

nama: Féyo Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Kaisare taramangi némé yáne yém a Ngánjáne taramangi némé yáne yém." A fá emormén sélngwél yánemén. Awerégh kérta anoghan
english: Jesus answered them , “ Give to Caesar the things that are Caesar ’s, and to God the things that are God ’s.” They marveled greatly at him .

nama: Féyo Saduki ár, efe norayat ndené kété yau anogh yém enmormén yéné ámoghafé yáfaf. 19 Fá korayangi, "Watamegh ár, Mosesém yéfarotam nák téfeyot ndené njam yángnoene ané kér yém a tatembangé amaf wénde ambumofnar, yánngnom fété so kwiré tékayongé a ambum eunjeta yanai. 20 Kété tamorwén sefen ambum fronde sénkom nawerai a kér yémormén ambumofnar. 21 Yénamayo kwiré nawerai, wénde fá ndenéyameyo kér yémormén, yéfrangoyéng ambumofnar. Nambiomén ndenéyameyo yémormén. 22 Féyo yéné sefenam ambum yau efrangoyénd kéran. Soramé amaf kér yémormén. 23 Kérta anoghan endene amaf so yém, ménamén yéné sefenam yéta naweretaménd?"
english: Some Sadducees , who say that there is no resurrection, came to him . They asked him , saying ,
“ Teacher , Moses wrote to us , ‘ If a man ’s brother dies and leaves a wife behind him , and leaves no children , that his brother should take his wife and raise up offspring for his brother.’
There were seven brothers. The first took a wife , and dying left no offspring.
The second took her , and died , leaving no children behind him . The third likewise ;
and the seven took her and left no children . Last of all the woman also died .
In the resurrection, when they rise, whose wife will she be of them ? For the seven had her as a wife .”

nama: Yesum ewawangoyéng, "Fém sem norsotati ménamén fém kérté em Ngánjánene si a wafté? 25 Njam kér ár nganongé ghérsat. Fá yau so naweretat a fá ndené so néretat njafar si résagh árnit njafaran. 26 Kér téfnárafene anoghmén, fémofem té yaftaménd Mosesene bukan afrogh sian? Ngánján norayam yáfaf, 'Ebraam, Aisek a Jeikof yémofem sénonjo tayot wáwefnotat.' 27 Ngánján siyém ghérsé árfene Ngánján yau kér árfene Ngánján ménamén Ngánjánam efande méinyotio ár, efe naketat sénonjo a efe kér té enmormén. Fém srem norsotati kérta anogh árfenemén!" Ndimbal nák
english: Jesus answered them , “Isn’ t this because you are mistaken , not knowing the Scriptures nor the power of God ?
For when they will rise from the dead , they neither marry nor are given in marriage , but are like angels in heaven .

But about the dead , that they are raised , haven’ t you read in the book of Moses about the Bush, how God spoke to him , saying , ‘ I am the God of Abraham, the God of Isaac , and the God of Jacob ’?
He is not the God of the dead , but of the living . You are therefore badly mistaken .”

nama: Ámb nák watamegh ár yénmormén áyárghét fá warunyéghan tamorwén. Ndené kémnawét nde Yesum mer wawangogh kar so tawaramangai yéfe, yémon yémotai Yesu, "Árké Mosesene nák minde ndimbalfifi em?"
english: One of the scribes came and heard them questioning together , and knowing that he had answered them well , asked him , “ Which commandment is the greatest of all ?”

nama: Yesum yawangoyéng, "Minde ndimbalfifi nák siyém, káyárangi, Israil, Yuré téfene Ngánján, Yuré siyém ámbiro. 30 Yuweta fene Yuré Ngánján méinyotio fene tikfe, méinyotio fene mbérmbére, méinyotio fene mwighaye a méinyotio fene muyaye.' 31 Yénamayomén nák siyém, 'Yuweta fenjo kaka ár ndené fémyo ndernáye náuwéte.' Ánde ámb yau ndené yéné ndimbal nák ere."
english: Jesus answered, “ The greatest is : ‘Hear, Israel , the Lord our God , the Lord is one .
You shall love the Lord your God with all your heart , with all your soul , with all your mind , and with all your strength .’ This is the first commandment.
The second is like this : ‘ You shall love your neighbor as yourself .’ There is no other commandment greater than these .”

nama: Yéné árom yawangoyéng, "Mer noraye, watamegh ár, fémon mbarkándaye noraye ndené Ngánján siyém ámbiro kété siyém ámb yau efe yém wénde fáro. 33 Ménát sái yuweta fá méinyotio fene tikfe, méinyotio fene mwighaye kwayaghaye, méinyotio muyaye a sái yuweta fenjo kaka ár ndené fémyo, yéné uwégham ewainde méinyotio ramégh rokar a ghéngénghéngén yam."
english: The scribe said to him , “ Truly , teacher , you have said well that he is one , and there is none other but he ;

and to love him with all the heart , with all the understanding , all the soul, and with all the strength , and to love his neighbor as himself , is more important than all whole burnt offerings and sacrifices .”

nama: Njam Yesum téfandawang ndené yémon kwayaghaye tawawangotawéng merkéráye, fá norayai yáfaf, "Fém sném yau nayu ném kétándmé Ngánjánene limánéghta." Yéné soramé emo yau ámogh si yaramai férfér tamorwén. Endene ákimén Keriso Ngánjánene uyafoghmén ár yém
english: When Jesus saw that he answered wisely, he said to him , “ You are not far from God ’s Kingdom.” No one dared ask him any question after that .

nama: Njam Yesuf wáwefnogh méngo sifayan témorwén, yémo emotai, "Nák watamegh árém norayat ndené Keriso Ngánjánene uyafoghmén ár siyém Deifidene ákimén. Ndernáye fá norayat? 36 Ménamén Ngánján Mbérmbéram télimndau Deifid fáyo yéné siot, "Yuré noraye kétán tane Yurafaf, "Kámnjo yénandmé tane tambénta kétánotio yéndon fene mékw téfnár tákman fene kafkaf mbanmbanan."
english: Jesus responded , as he taught in the temple , “ How is it that the scribes say that the Christ is the son of David ?
For David himself said in the Holy Spirit , ‘ The Lord said to my Lord , “ Sit at my right hand , until I make your enemies the footstool of your feet .”’ + 12:36 Psalms 110:1

nama: Deifidém njam yémndeta Keriso yáne Yuré, ndernáye so Keriso yém yáne ambum? Ndimbal mérén náyáretaménd yáfaf méndefé. Yesum mat táyátotau ár nák watamegh árfenemén
english: Therefore David himself calls him Lord , so how can he be his son ?” The common people heard him gladly .

nama: Njam yémon tawatametau, Yesu norayai, "Mwighé sénté nák watamegh árfenemén. Yéfene méndefé yém tombé sálámefé sái narendat, árém sái áuwégh ewarametat marat sifayan yéfeyot, 39 a yémofem ewafenat ndimbal árfene sifayé áumengégh méngo kénjún a ndenéyameyo árém ewáfrendat yéfe mer sifayé téméndfaf. 40 Wénde yémofem unyéghe kwirafene méngo rokar ewarsat. Tombé Ngánjánefaf orayégh si norayat ménát árém so efandat. Ndené árfene tékrat siyém minde tukén soramé yuwon Ngánjáneta." Kwirane ramégh
english: In his teaching he said to them , “Beware of the scribes , who like to walk in long robes , and to get greetings in the marketplaces,
and to get the best seats in the synagogues and the best places at feasts ,
those who devour widows ’ houses , and for a pretense make long prayers . These will receive greater condemnation .”

nama: Yesu námnjoi kaka sifayan ánde ramégh rokar takmetawét Ngánjáneyot a tafandau ár mérnam tawitawét yéfenjo mani kémégh téruot. Tárfár wemár árém takmetawét ndimbal mani yétkwén. 42 Wénde yauyau kwiré yénmormén ekmeyai sómbio mani mbwero.
english: Jesus sat down opposite the treasury and saw how the multitude cast money into the treasury . Many who were rich cast in much .
A poor widow came and she cast in two small brass coins , which equal a quadrans coin.

nama: Yesum emotai yánjo waitogh ár, fá norayai, "Yéndon ewaufrotan féfe efalo, yauyau kwiram ewaindai méinyotio ár a yaramai ndimbal mani Ngánjáne. 44 Wemár árém takmetawét némbnare wénde yéfene mé tawamorwén tárfár, wénde yéné yauyau kwiram kétándmé áronjaghta ekmeyai méinyotio, yauyau kwirane némé tamorwén ghérsé ámnjoghét yéné eufeyai."
english: He called his disciples to himself and said to them , “ Most certainly I tell you , this poor widow gave more than all those who are giving into the treasury ,
for they all gave out of their abundance , but she , out of her poverty , gave all that she had to live on .”

nama: Njamandio Yesum yéfrangoi wáwefnogh méngo, ámb yáne waitogh árom norayai, "Watamegh ár, Kéreta! Némé ndimbal wíman méngo etnong!"
english: As he went out of the temple , one of his disciples said to him , “ Teacher , see what kind of stones and what kind of buildings !”

nama: Yesum yawangoyéng, "Té fémon téfande yéné ndimbal méngo? Yau so ámb wím efai ámb wíman, méinyotio so nironat."
