english: Jesus said to him , “ Do you see these great buildings ? There will not be left here one stone on another , which will not be thrown down .”

nama: Njam Yesu témorwén Olif Mband tunakfan witmé karéf kété wáwefnogh méngota, Fité, Jems, Jon a Endru yémotayénd, 4 "Ténmaufro njam yéné yam so ufroghan em wáwefnogh méngofaf? A némé yamam so ténmaufrongé ndené kaka méinyotio ufroghétro em?"
english: As he sat on the Mount of Olives opposite the temple , Peter , James , John , and Andrew asked him privately ,
“ Tell us , when will these things be ? What is the sign that these things are all about to be fulfilled ?”

nama: Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Mwighé sénté ámb árom yau so ewarsoté fém. 6 Tárfár ár so eném tane yétkwénan so norayat, "Yénd wém Ngánjánene wafaréghmén ár," a so tárfáryo ewarsotat. 7 Njam fém náyáretati mékmén a ndenáyo so néngafrotat mékmén, yau táf férfér em. Yéné yam fété so nufrotat, wénde yénayoene yátogh yam mé yéném. 8 Ámb yu so kokayongé ámb yuafé ásméghét a ndenéyameyo ámb ndimbal yu so kokayongé ámb ndimbal yuafé ásméghét. Kété so em sokrere fénaté yuwomé a káukáu. Yéné yam sem ndenanit fronde tékrat ambum áráfghan.
english: Jesus , answering , began to tell them , “ Be careful that no one leads you astray .
For many will come in my name , saying , ‘ I am he !’ and will lead many astray .
“ When you hear of wars and rumors of wars , don’ t be troubled . For those must happen , but the end is not yet .
For nation will rise against nation , and kingdom against kingdom. There will be earthquakes in various places . There will be famines and troubles. These things are the beginning of birth pains .

nama: Fém fété so fémyo nawarawene. Fém so kénramangi méngotu sénko téfnárafefaf a efmotat áumengégh méngo kénjún, fém so némakai tesen sénko ár a warsagh árfene sáfrére tane mer si téfnan. 10 Fronde yéné mer si so fété nafrotat méinyotio yuwomé soramé mbandoene yatogh. 11 Fém njam kémerangi moghét, yau táf mwighé néwérsotat némé si orayéghét. Mé koraya némé Ngánjánam kémramangé feyot yéné efghon, ménamén fém yau yéné noraye, wénde Ngánján Mbérmbér.
english: “ But watch yourselves , for they will deliver you up to councils . You will be beaten in synagogues . You will stand before rulers and kings for my sake , for a testimony to them .
The Good News must first be preached to all the nations .

When they lead you away and deliver you up , don’ t be anxious beforehand or premeditate what you will say , but say whatever will be given you in that hour . For it is not you who speak , but the Holy Spirit .

nama: Yanafem sén so yangnof taramangi krot, a yéferafafem sén so yéfe ambumof taramangi. Ambum so kénawengongi yéferafafefaf ménát krot so tákmangi. 13 Méinyotio árém so méndméndafé néfandat ménamén tanemén, wénde fá efe taikrataye yakai kétánotio yatoghfaf fá so kawanjarngé.
english: “Brother will deliver up brother to death , and the father his child . Children will rise up against parents and cause them to be put to death .
You will be hated by all men for my name ’s sake , but he who endures to the end will be saved .

nama: Fémofem so tinjongi minde mámáfi yam árké yamam so yaghne sifayé, so yiyangé nák sifayan. Wafégh ár mat fété so em. Yéné efghon Judian efe em fá fété so nérsat mband tunakfot. 15 Efe yánjo méngo sémsotan njam yéfai yau táf kéworngi yuwot méngo kénjút rokar utorghét, wénde kengongi. 16 Efe ndawan em yau táf kangongi fenjo sálámeyot, wénde kengongi. 17 Yéné efghon nderé mámáfiyafé so yém ambum suafé amafafet a mbrake amafafet! 18 Orayégh Ngánjánefaf yéné yam yau so nufrote mindefifi yunjéf néndkfan. 19 Ménamén yéné efogh so yém minde mámáfi féyotarofnaye. Kétándmé ufroghan njam Ngánjánam yafrotam mband, sénonjo a kétánotio soramé ndené mámáfi yam yau kor so nufrote. 20 Njam Yuram efogh yau ténfangai ndémbndémb, efe yau so naketat. Wénde ménamén fá nemne yáne waferégh ármén, yémon kwéf enfetaméng ténjfi. 21 Yéné kwéfon ámb árém njam korayangé fefaf, "Kéreta, Keriso siyém!" o "Kéreta, fá kés yém! Yau táf efalo eyátotati." 22 Yénémamén Keriso yétkwénan tárfár unyégh ár so eném. Ndenéyameyo Ngánjánene mat yátogh árfene yétkwénan tárfár unyégh ár so eném. Fá so nofarnat unyégh ásáfogh yéngufarotat a sélngwélafé unyégh ásáfogh so ewafrotat ménát yáne ár yénéménaye so ewarsotat Ngánjánene wafaréghkaf efe em, táf téu nufrota. 23 Yénémamén fém so nawarawenati. Fronde yéndon té enwaufrotamén soramé yam so nufrotat.
english: “ But when you see the abomination of desolation , spoken of by Daniel the prophet, standing where it ought not ” ( let the reader understand ), “ then let those who are in Judea flee to the mountains ,
and let him who is on the housetop not go down , nor enter in , to take anything out of his house .
Let him who is in the field not return back to take his cloak .
But woe to those who are with child and to those who nurse babies in those days !
Pray that your flight won’t be in the winter .
For in those days there will be oppression, such as there has not been the like from the beginning of the creation which God created until now , and never will be .
Unless the Lord had shortened the days , no flesh would have been saved ; but for the sake of the chosen ones, whom he picked out , he shortened the days .
Then if anyone tells you , ‘ Look , here is the Christ !’ or , ‘ Look , there !’ don’ t believe it .
For false christs and false prophets will arise and will show signs and wonders , that they may lead astray, if possible , even the chosen ones.
But you watch. “Behold, I have told you all things beforehand.

nama: Wénde tékrat kwéf soramé efghon, 'Efogh so yém kwéfkwéf, a ghéraream yau so yéramete kwayaghé,
english: But in those days , after that oppression, the sun will be darkened , the moon will not give its light ,

nama: kénd so nénatarnat kétándmé njafarta, a njafar fifi so nasámbnetat.'
english: the stars will be falling from the sky , and the powers that are in the heavens will be shaken .

nama: Yéné kwéfon árém so tinjongi Ároene Ambum, fá so yéném njafar kwamkwam kénjún ménáyafé ndimbal waftafé a njafarmén mer sáfafé. 27 A yémon so yánjo njafar si résagh ár tawafarnangé a yánjo waferégh ár wumengéghét kétándmé 4 mband kwéndkwénd tambén a kétánotio yéné mband min yatoghfaf kétán njafaroene mband min yatoghfaf.
english: Then they will see the Son of Man coming in clouds with great power and glory .
Then he will send out his angels, and will gather together his chosen ones from the four winds, from the ends of the earth to the ends of the sky .

nama: Tanang matyam fig wénta. Njamandio wén árau natarnat a mbambam éwiwogh kufngongi fém mat kamndang ndené efogh yu kaka yém. 29 Njam fémofem efandati yéné tékrát yam ufroghan, fém mat so kamndangi tane angogh siyém kaka yém, mé fétfétan. 30 Yéndon efalo ewaufrotan, fronde méinyotio yam so nufrotat soramé yéné ámb ár mérén so kefongi. 31 Njafar a mband so kefend wénde tane si yau so kefongongé. Efe ámb yau mat yém soramé efoghmén
english: “ Now from the fig tree , learn this parable . When the branch has now become tender and produces its leaves , you know that the summer is near ;
even so you also , when you see these things coming to pass , know that it is near , at the doors .
Most certainly I say to you , this generation will not pass away until all these things happen .
Heaven and earth will pass away , but my words will not pass away .

nama: Efe ámb yau mat yém tane angogh efoghmén, yau njafar si résagh ár, yau Ambum, wénde mé Afaro. 33 Kor aem! Oyarghafé! Fém mafina em njam yéné kwéf so kawerangé. 34 Ndenanit yém ár ándan yénau kuwanongé. Fronde yánjo faiofnar ásáfogh ár engékmai wanjengét ámbiroámbiro yéfenjo faiofnar ásáfogh ár fáro, a ámb yémndai méngo sésafne wanjengét, kor aem ghékéf sénté, soramé yémon yánjo méngo yéngéfrangoi.
english: “ But of that day or that hour no one knows — not even the angels in heaven , nor the Son , but only the Father .
Watch, keep alert, and pray; for you don’ t know when the time is .
“ It is like a man traveling to another country, having left his house and given authority to his servants , and to each one his work , and also commanded the doorkeeper to keep watch .

nama: Yénémaménnde kor aem ghékéf sénté ménamén fém mafina em njam méngo yuré so nénangote féréghan, sémbár néndkéfan o njam ghakér kowi kutnangé, o akwan. 36 Fá njam kufarngé sélngwéle, yau táf kéminjongé kémghan. 37 Némé yénd norayan féfefaf, yénd norayan méinyotio árfefaf: Kor aem ghékéf sénté!"
english: Watch therefore , for you don’ t know when the lord of the house is coming — whether at evening , or at midnight , or when the rooster crows, or in the morning ;
lest , coming suddenly , he might find you sleeping .
What I tell you , I tell all : Watch !”

nama: Ju árfene waingégh a minaghofnar flawé témndot sómbio efoghro néngafrangeyayénd. Ghéngén wárogh sénko ár a nák watamegh árém mwighé téronjawét Yesue ngiot. 2 Fá korayangi, "Yau téménd kénjún so terangém ménamén ár mété náumendat a nékw em téfefaf."
english: It was now two days before the Passover and the Feast of Unleavened Bread, and the chief priests and the scribes sought how they might seize him by deception and kill him .
For they said , “ Not during the feast , because there might be a riot among the people .”

nama: Njamandio fá témorangérwén Betanin, Yesum njamke tánetau Saimonene méngon efe yaufi ghéngan enjnefé témorwén. Amafom yénérsam a yétiaryéng minde tukén manimén wékwér ndarambafé Yesu yasuryéng sénkoyan.
english: While he was at Bethany, in the house of Simon the leper , as he sat at the table, a woman came having an alabaster jar of ointment of pure nard — very costly . She broke the jar and poured it over his head .

nama: Ámb ár káwatarnawét yéfenjo kénjúnro, "Némamén yéné amafom minde tukén manimén wékwér taghne? 5 Yémon miya 10,000 kinat tétérnangai a tawaramangai yauyau árétǃ" Yémofem yarnayénd amaf.
english: But there were some who were indignant among themselves , saying, “ Why has this ointment been wasted?
For this might have been sold for more than three hundred denarii and given to the poor .” So they grumbled against her .

nama: Wénde Yesum emndai, "Téfrangongiǃ Némamén mwighayam ewawérsote yánemén? Yémon yéné yam tafrote tafaf minde merfifi. 7 Yauyau árfé fém túmén so em a ewáutánati ámb efghon njam fém ménde em. Wénde yénd fémafé yau so túmén yéném. 8 Yémon yéné mer tafrote frondeyo wasurégh tane fifiyan mer wimafé wékwre tane kér yéfrenda. 9 Yéndon efalo emndetan, méinyotio sifayamé mband maratan árkamé téu árém néngafrotat mer si, yémofem so nafrotat némé amafom tafrote a so yéngwawafarotat yáne ásáfogh." Judas néngwanoi Yesue sénot
english: But Jesus said , “Leave her alone . Why do you trouble her ? She has done a good work for me .
For you always have the poor with you , and whenever you want to , you can do them good ; but you will not always have me .
She has done what she could . She has anointed my body beforehand for the burying .
Most certainly I tell you , wherever this Good News may be preached throughout the whole world , that which this woman has done will also be spoken of for a memorial of her .”

nama: Judas Iskariot, ámb témorwén Yesuene 12 waitogh ár, fá nuwanoi limánégh ghéngén wárogh árfefaf si frengéghét Yesue sénot. 11 Fá náuwetaménd yéné sian a yémofem efalo yiyátoyénd mani ramghét Judase. Féyo Judasém end táronjau Yesue ramghét. Yesuene ambinomén njamke
english: Judas Iscariot , who was one of the twelve , went away to the chief priests, that he might deliver him to them .
They , when they heard it , were glad , and promised to give him money. He sought how he might conveniently deliver him .

nama: Fronde efghon Minaghofnar flawé téméndmén, árké efghon túmén tásmétawét Waingégh sif tosé. Yesuene waitogh árém yémotayénd, "Yesu, ándan fene ménde yém yéndfem sái yéfrendam feyot Waingégh téménd njamke?"
english: On the first day of unleavened bread, when they sacrificed the Passover , his disciples asked him , “ Where do you want us to go and prepare that you may eat the Passover ?”

nama: Yesum emndeyai yáne sómbio waitogh ár, "Kuwanend tesenot, ár so téfangend endén nu ndarambafé. Táf téngwaitend. 14 Njam fá kélawangé méngot, méngo yuré témndend, 'Téfene watamegh ár ménde yém. Ánde yém tane wan ároene méngo saté, ánde yéndon so enetan Waingégh njamke tane waitogh árfé?' 15 Yuram so tawauyafe féfe ndimbal méngo saté, méinyotio teghkaf árké yém. Fémofem táf njamke yefrengéghét kété."
english: He sent two of his disciples and said to them , “ Go into the city , and there a man carrying a pitcher of water will meet you . Follow him ,
and wherever he enters in , tell the master of the house , ‘ The Teacher says , “ Where is the guest room , where I may eat the Passover with my disciples ?”’
He will himself show you a large upper room furnished and ready . Get ready for us there .”

nama: Fá néwaneyayénd rokar ewinjeyayénd ndenáye fété Yesum ndernáye tamndéwéng. Féyo yémofem yéfrengménd Waingégh njamke.
english: His disciples went out , and came into the city , and found things as he had said to them , and they prepared the Passover .

nama: Férégh njam namndai, Yesuf nufaryénd yánjo 12 árfé. 18 Njam yémofem njamke tánetawét, Yesum emndai, "Yéndon efalo emndetan, ámbiro ár yéna yém emo so sén wéramete yénd, yéné ár emafé yéndfé enwam njamke."
english: When it was evening he came with the twelve .
As they sat and were eating , Jesus said , “ Most certainly I tell you , one of you will betray me — he who eats with me .”

nama: Yéné siam eméindai waitogh ár mámé mwighat a fénatayero kawafenawét Yesuefaf, "Yénd yau?"
english: They began to be sorrowful , and to ask him one by one , “ Surely not I ?” And another said , “ Surely not I ?”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Yéna fété yém ámb 12 ármén emafé yéndfé enwam ámbiro merekinan. 21 Ároene Ambum kér so yém ndernáye yéfrotaménd Buk si yánemén. Wénde nderé mámáfi yém yéné ároe emo sén yéramete. Mer so témorwén fá yau fiya káráftau."
english: He answered them , “ It is one of the twelve , he who dips with me in the dish.
For the Son of Man goes as it is written about him , but woe to that man by whom the Son of Man is betrayed ! It would be better for that man if he had not been born .”

nama: Njamandio yémofem tánetawét, Yesum féskaf flawé yérai, kánjo si yaramai Ngánjáne a tawatfotau, a waitogh árfét tawarametau a norayai, "Ténetangi, yéné siyém tane fifi."
english: As they were eating , Jesus took bread, and when he had blessed it , he broke it and gave to them , and said , “ Take , eat . This is my body .”

nama: Féyo yémon yérai kafusi, kánjo si yaramai Ngánjáne a ewaramai yéfe a méinyotio árém nu enetaménd.
english: He took the cup , and when he had given thanks , he gave to them . They all drank of it .

nama: Yesum emndai, "Yéné siyém tane férék árké nertam tárfár árét. Ngánjánam si yéfrendai a yétetai tane férke. 25 Yéndon efalo emndetan fém, yéndon yaufifi so enetan yéné wéri nu kétánotio efogh kawerangé táf yéndon so ténetangén totér wéri nu Ngánjánene limánéghan."
english: He said to them , “ This is my blood of the new covenant , which is poured out for many .
Most certainly I tell you , I will no more drink of the fruit of the vine until that day when I drink it anew in God ’s Kingdom.”

nama: Táf yémofem Ngánjáneyot wagh eufaryénd a nuwanoyénd Olif Mband tunakfot. Yesu norayai Fitane kenaghmén
english: When they had sung a hymn , they went out to the Mount of Olives .

nama: Yesum emndai yánjo waitogh ár, "Méinyotio fém so kengongi a kwéfrangongi yéndro. Buk siam noraye, "Yéndon so tésmangén wanjengégh ár, táf sif so kófárnangi.' 28 Wénde yéné soramé yénd njam kanongén, yénd féfe frondeta so wéngém Galili yuwot."
english: Jesus said to them , “ All of you will be made to stumble because of me tonight, for it is written , ‘ I will strike the shepherd , and the sheep will be scattered .’
However, after I am raised up , I will go before you into Galilee .”

nama: Fité norayai, "Ámb árém njam fém kénéfrangongi, yéndon yaufifi so kénéfrangonǃ"
english: But Peter said to him , “ Although all will be offended , yet I will not .”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Yéndon efalo némndetan, sénonjo sémbáran, fém so koraya nambinotmé, 'Yénd mafina wém fá,' soramé ghakér kowi kutnangé sómbinotma."
english: Jesus said to him , “Most certainly I tell you that you today , even this night , before the rooster crows twice , you will deny me three times .”

nama: Wénde Fitam mé ménjtaye korayau, "Yénd fémafé kér so yénre, yéndon yau so korayangén, Yénd mafina wém fémǃ" Ámb árém ndené sáfotio si korayawét. Yesu oraighan Getsemanin
english: But he spoke all the more , “ If I must die with you , I will not deny you .” They all said the same thing .

nama: Yesu a yánjo waitogh ár nuwanoyénd yu yétkwén Getsemane. Yesum emndai yánjo waitogh ár, "Kámnjongi yéna njamandio yénd Ngánjánafé noraiwam." 33 Yesum ewasroi Fité, Jems a Jon yémafé álighét, a tikfan yáyárai ndené kértat nélawétan. 34 Yesum emndai fá, "Tane tikfan ghérghérsisé yém mindefifi wétumnde. Kámnjongi yéna a néretati."
english: They came to a place which was named Gethsemane . He said to his disciples , “ Sit here while I pray .”
He took with him Peter , James , and John , and began to be greatly troubled and distressed .
He said to them , “ My soul is exceedingly sorrowful , even to death . Stay here and watch .”

nama: Yesu néngwanoi nayuofnar, fá budme niyai mbandan Ngánjánafé koraiwét. 36 Fá Ngánjánafé koraiwét, "Afé, Afé! Méinyotio yam feyot sem áfrat. Téfnár yéné tékrát tafafta. Wénde tane ménde yau, wénde fene ménde so nufrote."
english: He went forward a little , and fell on the ground , and prayed that if it were possible , the hour might pass away from him .
He said , “Abba, Father , all things are possible to you . Please remove this cup from me . However, not what I desire , but what you desire .”

nama: Yesu nénangotam yánjo waitogh árfefaf a ewinjoi fá kémghan. Yesum yémndai Fité, "Saimon, némamén fém kémégh nékém? Némamén fém yau nérete ámbiro efoghféneféne yéndfé? 38 Kanongi a Ngánjánafé norayati ménát fém yau so ufogham tautfongé. Mbérmbér ménde yém meryam wafroghét, wénde fifi siyém njangén."
english: He came and found them sleeping , and said to Peter , “ Simon , are you sleeping ? Couldn’ t you watch one hour ?
Watch and pray , that you may not enter into temptation . The spirit indeed is willing , but the flesh is weak.”

nama: Ámbirotaro fá néngaflai Ngánjánafé oraighét yéné siyo tafértau. 40 Wénde njam Yesu kénangotau, yémon wéikor ewinjoi kémghan ménamén ghékéf tamorwén kérté. Fá yau mat tamorwén némé si so tawangongayénd yáyot.
english: Again he went away and prayed , saying the same words .
Again he returned and found them sleeping , for their eyes were very heavy ; and they didn’ t know what to answer him .

nama: Njam Yesu nambinotma nénangotam, yémon emndai, "Némé fém mé kémégh ekém a nenati? Féyo tamǃ Efogh té nawer. Kéretangi, Ároene Ambum yaufi árfene ngángat raméghét yafngong. 42 Kokayongiǃ Mato kuwanongémǃ Kéretangi tane sén téfnár snufaneǃ" Yesu yerayénd
english: He came the third time and said to them , “ Sleep on now , and take your rest. It is enough. The hour has come . Behold , the Son of Man is betrayed into the hands of sinners.
Arise ! Let’s get going. Behold , he who betrays me is at hand .”

nama: Yesu njam mé korayau, Judas nufaryéng efe témorwén ámbiro kétándmé 12 waitogh ármén. Tárfár árém tanérsawét timé a witmafé sénté naifafé enmormén kétán yáfaf yémofem engwáfáretaménd limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár, nák watamegh ár a Ju árfene sénko ár. 44 Judasém wéi mwighé yékmai yéfeyot, fá wéi emndai, "Ár yéndon efe tésnetangén fá fiyém. Yérayénd a yéngémnjoyénd fiyarafene ngángat yéngramayénd." 45 Judas néwanoi mbarkándaye Yesuefaf a yémndai, "Watamegh árǃ" Judasém táf yésnetai, 46 Árém yerayénd a yumbetaménd Yesu. 47 Kété tawakayongérwén ámb ár yá kaka witmafé sénté naifafé yanfai limánégh ghéngén wárogh ároene faiofnar ásáfogh ároene téngan.
english: Immediately , while he was still speaking , Judas , one of the twelve , came — and with him a multitude with swords and clubs , from the chief priests, the scribes , and the elders .
Now he who betrayed him had given them a sign, saying , “ Whomever I will kiss , that is he . Seize him , and lead him away safely.”
When he had come , immediately he came to him and said , “ Rabbi ! Rabbi !” and kissed him .
They laid their hands on him and seized him .
But a certain one of those who stood by drew his sword and struck the servant of the high priest, and cut off his ear .

nama: Yesu norayai ár mérnafefaf, "Némé yénd ámb féfene oro téfnár wém, árkémamén fém taném náifafé a timafé? 49 Méinyotio efghon yénd fémafé ténmorwén wáwefnogh méngon, fémofem yénd yau wérayénd. Wénde Buk si efalo náyáto." 50 Méinyotio Yesuene waitogh árém yéfrangoyénd a néngoyénd.
english: Jesus answered them , “ Have you come out , as against a robber , with swords and clubs to seize me ?
I was daily with you in the temple teaching , and you didn’ t arrest me . But this is so that the Scriptures might be fulfilled .”
They all left him , and fled .

nama: Ámb totér ár kété témorwén emo Yesu táitotau tawongérwén sáláme. Njam totér ár yerayénd sálámeyan, 52 sálámero teretawét fá firo nengoi. Yesu yénémnjoyénd ndimbal árfene sáfrére
english: A certain young man followed him , having a linen cloth thrown around himself over his naked body. The young men grabbed him ,
but he left the linen cloth and fled from them naked .

nama: Yémofem yénémnjoyénd Yesu limánégh ghéngén wárogh árfefaf, a méinyotio limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár, Ju árfene limánégh ár a nák watamegh ár nénáumendayénd. 54 Fité nayu kéráye mé kénwaitotau, a njam yémon kaka yiyátoi limánégh ghéngén wárogh ároene méngo saf, fá nufaryéng a námnjoi ámb wanjengégh árfé Fité fésén kafalau.
english: They led Jesus away to the high priest. All the chief priests, the elders , and the scribes came together with him .
Peter had followed him from a distance , until he came into the court of the high priest. He was sitting with the officers , and warming himself in the light of the fire .

nama: Limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a méinyotio Ju sénko árfene áumengégh ár yéta táronjawét ménát Yesum némé yaufi tawafrotau yémofem krot sái tékmangayénd. Wénde efe yau ár yinjoyénd. 56 Tárfár ár enmormén a nufroyénd unyégh si yánemén. Wénde yéfene afrogh si efalo yau yiyátoyénd.
english: Now the chief priests and the whole council sought witnesses against Jesus to put him to death , and found none .
For many gave false testimony against him , and their testimony didn’ t agree with each other .

nama: Féyo ámb ár kokayongi a yéné unyégh si norayayénd, 58 "Yéndfem fété yiyáráyém fá korayau yéné sian, 'Yéndon so yironan yéné ár ngángé raméghmén wáwefnogh méngo a nambio efogh soramé yéndon so yérametan ámb, yau so yém ár ngángé raméghmén.'" 59 Wénde yéfene afrogh si efalo yau yiyátoyénd.
english: Some stood up and gave false testimony against him , saying ,
“ We heard him say , ‘ I will destroy this temple that is made with hands , and in three days I will build another made without hands .’”
Even so , their testimony didn’ t agree .

nama: 'Limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár nokayoi árfene sáfrére a yémotai Yesu, "Fém némamén yau noraye féndio awomarogh si? Fémon té eyárete yéné ár kés norayat téfén yénmwitat fefaf? 61 Wénde métar namndai a yau ewawangoi. Wéikor limánégh ghéngén wárogh árom yémotai, "Fém ném Keriso? Yéndfem Ngánjáne yáwefnotam. Fém ném Yáne ambum?"
english: The high priest stood up in the middle , and asked Jesus , “ Have you no answer? What is it which these testify against you ?”
But he stayed quiet , and answered nothing . Again the high priest asked him , “ Are you the Christ , the Son of the Blessed ?”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "A, yénd fété wém, tekofnaye fémofem so tinjongi ámnjoghan Ároene Ambum yénd Ngánján wafté tambén ngángata, a so wéném njafar kwamkwam kénjún."
english: Jesus said , “ I am . You will see the Son of Man sitting at the right hand of Power , and coming with the clouds of the sky .”

nama: Ghéngén wárogh sénko árom yétiraryéng yánjo sáláme ménamén fá nékw nawerai a norayai, "Yénd méndefnar yéném ámb ghékéf fayogh ár. 64 Fémofem té yiyárangi yémon Ngánjánene sifayé résaghét yafngo! Fém ndernáye nemnati?"
english: The high priest tore his clothes and said , “ What further need have we of witnesses ?
You have heard the blasphemy! What do you think ?” They all condemned him to be worthy of death .

nama: Ámb árém Yesu mbérme farángégh yafngoyénd. Yémofem ghékéf yawamoyénd, yesmayénd sáfan a témndetawét, "Emon nésém fém? Korayaǃ" Ámb wanjengégh árém yéngwasroi Yesu ngiot. Fitam yékenayéng Yesu
english: Some began to spit on him , and to cover his face , and to beat him with fists , and to tell him , “ Prophesy !” The officers struck him with the palms of their hands .

nama: Njamandio Fité mé témorwén méngo sáfan, limánégh ghéngén wárogh ároene ásáfogh mérés yénmormén kétán. 67 Njam yémon yinjoi Fité fésén kafalau, kor téfandau merkéráye, "Fém ámb yéné kénmorwén Yesufé Najaretménǃ"
english: As Peter was in the courtyard below , one of the maids of the high priest came ,
and seeing Peter warming himself , she looked at him and said , “ You were also with the Nazarene , Jesus !”

nama: Wénde Fitam yanyotayéng a yémndai, "Yénd mafina wém némamén fém noraye," a fá néngaflai méngo sáf sésafneta.
english: But he denied it , saying , “ I neither know nor understand what you are saying .” He went out on the porch , and the rooster crowed .

nama: Njam ásáfogh mérsom kété yinjoi, yémon emndai kor efe tawakayongérwén, "Yéné ár ámb fiyémǃ" 70 Wéikor Fitam yányotayéng. Tekofnaye efe tawakayongérwén kaka Fitafé yémndayénd Fité, "Fém ámb fété ném. Fém ném Galili yuménǃ"
english: The maid saw him and began again to tell those who stood by , “ This is one of them .”
But he again denied it . After a little while again those who stood by said to Peter , “ You truly are one of them , for you are a Galilean , and your speech shows it .”

nama: Féyo Fité norayai, "Yénd soté efalo si norayan! Ngánjánam mété tékrátan kwékmangé táf njam nuindan. Yénd mat yau wém fém endenemén norayatiǃ"
english: But he began to curse and to swear , “ I don’ t know this man of whom you speak !”

nama: Táf fété ghakér kowi nutnam sómbinotma. Féyo Fité nawafarotai Yesuene si némé témndetau fá, "Frondeyo ghakér kowi njam kutnangé sómbinotma, fémon so kwékenang yénd nambinotmé." Táf Fité ye nufngoi.
english: The rooster crowed the second time . Peter remembered the words that Jesus said to him , “ Before the rooster crows twice , you will deny me three times .” When he thought about that , he wept .

nama: Tándái akwan, limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár, Ju árfene sénko ár, nák watamegh ár, a méinyotio áumengégh ár yéfenjo mwighé taufanawét. 'Némé so yafrotam Yesuefaf?' Yémofem yumbetaménd fá, yémnjoyénd, a yéramayénd Failetefaf.
english: Immediately in the morning the chief priests, with the elders , scribes , and the whole council , held a consultation , bound Jesus , carried him away , and delivered him up to Pilate .

nama: Failetém yémotai Yesu, "Fém fété ném Ju árfene warsagh ár?" Yesum yawangoi, "A yénd fété wém." 3 Limánégh ghéngén wárogh árém tárfár nékwmendafé si tafayotawét Yesue. 4 Wéikor Failetém yémotai, "Fém so féyotaro kuwango? Té yéfande njénambafé méndméndafé si némafayotat."
english: Pilate asked him , “ Are you the King of the Jews ?” He answered , “ So you say .”
The chief priests accused him of many things .
Pilate again asked him , “ Have you no answer? See how many things they testify against you !”

nama: Wénde Yesu métar náyátoi uwangofnar, a Failet sélngwélam yafrotam.
english: But Jesus made no further answer, so that Pilate marveled .

nama: Waingégh témndan gafana téngmorwén yunjfero kwéfkwéf méngo ár utorghét ende ménát ár nómnendayénd. 7 Ár yétkwén Barabas efe témorwén kwéfkwéf méngon Rom warsagh ár ngi téfnár tárfár árfé talawangérwén. 8 Ár mérén enmormén Failet témotangi yá utorghét némé túmén tawafrotau.
english: Now at the feast he used to release to them one prisoner , whomever they asked of him .
There was one called Barabbas, bound with his fellow insurgents, men who in the insurrection had committed murder .
The multitude , crying aloud, began to ask him to do as he always did for them .

nama: Failetém emotai, "Fém ménde em yéndon tutorén féfeyot Ju árfene warsagh ár." 10 Failet mat náyátoi nde limánégh ghéngén wárogh árém yéramayénd yáfaf Yesu méndménde.
english: Pilate answered them , saying , “ Do you want me to release to you the King of the Jews ?”
For he perceived that for envy the chief priests had delivered him up .

nama: Wénde limánégh ghéngén wárogh árém ewasemnayénd ár mérén Failetefaf Barabase utorghét. 12 Failetém emotai ár mérén, "Némé yéndon so yafrotan féfeyot yéné ároefaf fémofem efe yémndetati Ju árfene warsagh ár?"
english: But the chief priests stirred up the multitude , that he should release Barabbas to them instead .
Pilate again asked them , “ What then should I do to him whom you call the King of the Jews ?”

nama: Fá nutnayénd "Téngwamend wafatarégh wén tukén!"
english: They cried out again , “ Crucify him !”

nama: Failetém emotai, "Némamén? Némé yaufi yafrotam yémon?" Wénde fá kutnawét minde tukén, "Téngwamendǃ"
english: Pilate said to them , “ Why , what evil has he done ?” But they cried out exceedingly , “ Crucify him !”

nama: Failetém ménde ewawifoi ár mérnafene. Féyo yéngéumyoi Barabas yéfefaf. Failetém tamndangé Yesue fémoghét yéngwafnamoi tukét wamghét. Fiyarayam si tawafrotawét Yesue
english: Pilate , wishing to please the multitude , released Barabbas to them , and handed over Jesus , when he had flogged him , to be crucified .

nama: Fiyarayam yélimayénd Yesue kétán ndimbal ároene méngot, árké yém Fratoriyam, a emotai méinyotio fiyaré áumengéghét. 17 Yémofem yamanetaménd ndéndák ngarot sáláme warsagh árfene sálámenit, yéfayoyénd wétwétafé ákiki sénkoyan. 18 Fá téngémndetawét, "Ai, Ju árfene warsagh ár!" 19 Férghe téfértawét yémofem wéne Yesu sénkoyan a mbérme téfarndawét. Fá budme ningiayénd a tésmetawét. 20 Njam yémofem si tawafrotawét yáyot, ndéndák ngarot sáláme yáfitraryénd a yánjo sáláme yawoyénd wéikor. Féyo yémofem yélimayénd Yesu wamghét. Yesu wafatarégh wénan yénamndaménd
english: The soldiers led him away within the court, which is the Praetorium ; and they called together the whole cohort .
They clothed him with purple ; and weaving a crown of thorns, they put it on him .
They began to salute him , “ Hail , King of the Jews !”
They struck his head with a reed and spat on him , and bowing their knees , did homage to him .
When they had mocked him , they took the purple cloak off him , and put his own garments on him . They led him out to crucify him .

nama: Yémofem ár yétkwén Saimon yéfángoyénd endén efe témorwén tesenot kétándmé Sailenta, a fiyarayam táfáretawét fá Yesuene wafatarégh wén résaghét. Saimon ténmorwén Aleksenda a Rufusfene yéferafé. 22 Yémofem yéngémnjoyénd Yesu yéné sifayé yétkwén Golgota, yáne fifi sénko sot sifayé. 23 Féyo yémofem yauyafoyénd Yesue wéri nu ndémke wifogh murmurafé, wénde yémon mé yékenai.
english: They compelled one passing by , coming from the country, Simon of Cyrene , the father of Alexander and Rufus , to go with them that he might bear his cross .
They brought him to the place called Golgotha , which is , being interpreted , “ The place of a skull .”
They offered him wine mixed with myrrh to drink , but he didn’t take it .

nama: Yémofem yénamndaménd wafatarégh wénan a téfalotawét yáne sáláme ménaye ndais kembneye.
english: Crucifying him , they parted his garments among them , casting lots on them , what each should take .

nama: Efogh féneféne 9 akwan Yesu ténamndawét wafatarégh wénan. 26 Férén yéfarotaménd wén karfan árét wafghét Yesuenemén, 'Ju árfene warsagh ár.'
english: It was the third hour when they crucified him .
The superscription of his accusation was written over him : “ THE KING OF THE JEWS .”

nama: Yémofem enaménd sómbio oro téfnár Yesufé, ámb tambénta a fatrata. 28 (Yau siménj) 29 Ár endmé kawaindawét tasalitawét yéfene sénko tafnendawét sén krarghafé. Yémofem si tawafrotawét, "Fém korayawéng ndené 'Yéndon so wáwefnogh méngo yironan a nambio efghon so yérametan,' 30 kénewor wafatarégh wénta a kawanjar fémyoǃ"
english: With him they crucified two robbers , one on his right hand , and one on his left .
The Scripture was fulfilled which says, “He was counted with transgressors.”
Those who passed by blasphemed him , wagging their heads and saying , “ Ha ! You who destroy the temple and build it in three days ,
save yourself , and come down from the cross !”

nama: Ndenéyameyo limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a nák watamegh árém tasalitawét Yesu mé yéfe kénjúnro. Fá korayawét, "Yémon tawanjane ámb árro wénde fáyo yau nawanjaneǃ 32 Yéné Keriso, warsagh ár Israilmén, mato kénewor wafatarégh wénta ménát yéndfem so kéminjongém a efalo kényátongémǃ" Ár efe enaménd Yesufé yémofem tasaliwét. Yesuene Kérmén
english: Likewise , also the chief priests mocking among themselves with the scribes said , “ He saved others . He can ’ t save himself .
Let the Christ , the King of Israel , now come down from the cross , that we may see and believe him .” Those who were crucified with him also insulted him .

nama: Yéné séite méinyotio yu nénamndai kwéfitaro. Yéné kwéfitayam yérsam 3 aklok séite. 34 Yéné efoghféneféneyanyo Yesu minde nutnaméng, "Eli Eli, lama sabaktani?" Yéné sioene fifi siyém, 'Tane Ngánján, tane Ngánján, némamén yénd fémon wéfrango tambia?'
english: When the sixth hour had come , there was darkness over the whole land until the ninth hour .
At the ninth hour Jesus cried with a loud voice , saying , “ Eloi , Eloi , lama sabachthani ?” which is , being interpreted , “ My God , my God , why have you forsaken me ?”

nama: Ámb ár efe tawakayongérwén kaka yiyáráyénd Yesu, fá norayayénd, "Káyárangi, yémon yémote Elaija."
english: Some of those who stood by , when they heard it , said , “ Behold , he is calling Elijah .”

nama: Féyo ámbiro ár néngenngoi nguafé ghafté wéri nuan yukai wéne yéngwáuyoi Yesue nénet. Fá norayai, "Yambia téfrangend. Mato so yéfandam Elaijam téu ténmeworngaǃ" 37 Yesu minde nutnai soramé kér yémorméng.
english: One ran , and filling a sponge full of vinegar , put it on a reed and gave it to him to drink , saying , “ Let him be . Let ’s see whether Elijah comes to take him down .”
Jesus cried out with a loud voice , and gave up the spirit .

nama: Wáwefnogh méngon sénjté sáláme kété tamangérwén árkéménayam ár tawangotau Ngánjánefaf álighét, natiraryéng sómbio karéf kétándmé tuk kétánotio yu. 39 Njam Rom fiyaré sénko ár efe takayongérwén téfandau tukét ndernáye Yesu kér yémormén, fá norayai, "Efalo yéné árom yiyátoi Ngánjánene Ambum fété témǃ"
english: The veil of the temple was torn in two from the top to the bottom .
When the centurion , who stood by opposite him , saw that he cried out like this and breathed his last , he said , “ Truly this man was the Son of God !”

nama: Ámb amafam kétándmé nayuta ténfandawét. Ámb Meri Makdalin, Salome, ámb Meri efe témorwén Joses a yánngén Jems yéfetmé. 41 Yéné amafam Yesu táitotawét a tarawenawét fá njam Yesu témorwén Galili yuwon. Tárfáryo ámb amaf efe té enmormén Yesufé Jerusalemét kété tamorwén. Yesuene yátoghmén
english: There were also women watching from afar , among whom were both Mary Magdalene and Mary the mother of James the less and of Joses , and Salome ;
who , when he was in Galilee , followed him and served him ; and many other women who came up with him to Jerusalem .

nama: Afrengégh efogh Fraide, yéné efogh Safat frondeta, njam férghétro témorwén, 43 Josef Aramatiamén Ju sénko árfene áumengégh utmanégh ár, efe kawanjetau Ngánjánene limánégh efghot, yéngmormén férférofnar Failetefaf, namotai Yesuene fifiot. 44 Failet sélngwél yémormén njam náyárai, "Yesu kér té tém," yénémamén yémon yanmoi Rom fiyaré sénko ár a yémotai, "Yesu Fété kér tém?" 45 Rom fiyaré sénko árom efalo yaufroi, "Yesu fété kér tém," féyo Failetém Josefé fifi yéngwaumyoi. 46 Josefem fai yafrotam tombé sénjté sáláme, féyo yémon yéworyéng Yesuene fifi yuwot wafatarégh wénta, yéfiyanam sáláme a yélawai mbéwé méngon árké té yénfétaménd wímmén. Féyo yémon yéngfetayénd wím sésafne wamghét. 47 Meri Makdalin a Josese yátmé Meri téfandawét ánde Yesuene fifi yélawayénd.
english: When evening had now come , because it was the Preparation Day , that is , the day before the Sabbath ,
Joseph of Arimathaea, a prominent council member who also himself was looking for God ’s Kingdom, came . He boldly went in to Pilate , and asked for Jesus ’ body .
Pilate was surprised to hear that he was already dead ; and summoning the centurion , he asked him whether he had been dead long .
When he found out from the centurion , he granted the body to Joseph .
He bought a linen cloth , and taking him down , wound him in the linen cloth and laid him in a tomb which had been cut out of a rock . He rolled a stone against the door of the tomb .
Mary Magdalene and Mary the mother of Joses , saw where he was laid .

nama: Njam Safat nawaindai, Meri Makdalin, ámb Meri Jemse yátmé a Salome fai yafrotaménd mer wimafé wékwér ménát Yesuene fifi wasurghét. 2 Sande tándái akwan, totér efogh árnyéghan, fá nuwanoyénd kétán mbéwé méngofaf. 3 Álighan fáro namotayénd, "Emo so ténmafetangé wím téfeyot mbéwé méngo sésafneta?"
english: When the Sabbath was past , Mary Magdalene , and Mary the mother of James , and Salome bought spices, that they might come and anoint him .
Very early on the first day of the week , they came to the tomb when the sun had risen .
They were saying among themselves , “ Who will roll away the stone from the door of the tomb for us ?”

nama: Wénde njam fá néngretayénd tukét, yémofem yinjoyénd yéné wím, árké ndimbal témorwén té nitérmboi. 5 Njam amaf mbéwé méngon nélawayénd, yémofem yinjoyénd totér ár kwayaghé sáláme tawongérwén témorangérwén amafafene tambén ngángata, a amaf férféram ewifoi.
english: for it was very big . Looking up , they saw that the stone was rolled back.
Entering into the tomb , they saw a young man sitting on the right side , dressed in a white robe ; and they were amazed .

nama: Wénde njafar si résagh árom emndai, "Yau férfér em. Fémofem efe yéronjati Yesu Najaretmén efe yénamndaménd. Fá yéna yau yém, kérta té nano. Kéretangi kétán yáne fifi ánde yékmayénd. 7 Wénde kuwanongi, tawaufrongi yéné si yáne waitogh árfet a Fité, 'Féfe frondeta fá té yéngém Galili yuwot. Fémofem so tinjongi kété, ndernáye yémon fronde tamndetau."
english: He said to them , “Don’ t be amazed . You seek Jesus , the Nazarene , who has been crucified . He has risen ! He is not here . See the place where they laid him !
But go , tell his disciples and Peter , ‘ He goes before you into Galilee . There you will see him , as he said to you .’”

nama: Amaf nétoryénd a néngengoyénd mbéwé méngo tambén ménamén fá tamorwén ngernger mwighayan kowérsotawét. Fá némé si yau norayayénd ménamén férfér tamorwén. Tándáwár yátogh mer sifaf 16.9-20 Yesu nufaryéng Meri Makdalinefaf
english: They went out , and fled from the tomb , for trembling and astonishment had come on them . They said nothing to anyone ; for they were afraid .

nama: Njam Yesu nanoi kétándmé kérta Sande akwan, Yesu fronde nufaryéng Meri Makdalinefaf, ende tambén Yesum ewifnai 7 yaufi mbérmbér. 10 Amaf néwanoi Yesuene waitogh árfefaf, efe ghérghérsisé tamorwén a ye kendawét, a ewaufroi yéfe némé kufrotau. 11 Wénde njam yémon ewaufroi yéfe ndené Yesu ghérsé yém, té yinjon, yémofem efalo yau yiyátoyénd. Yesu nufaryéng sómbio waitogh árfefaf
english: Now when he had risen early on the first day of the week , he appeared first to Mary Magdalene , from whom he had cast out seven demons .
She went and told those who had been with him , as they mourned and wept .
When they heard that he was alive and had been seen by her , they disbelieved.

nama: Yéné soramé Yesu nufaryéng fénaté sáfot sómbio árfefaf njamandio fá tangérwén endmé ámb yuwot. 13 Fá néngwaneyayénd ámb waitogh árét ewafroyénd yéfeyot némé kufrotau, wénde yémofem yau efalo yiyátoyénd yénémamén. Yesu nufaryéng 11 waitogh árfefaf
english: After these things he was revealed in another form to two of them as they walked , on their way into the country.
They went away and told it to the rest . They didn’ t believe them , either .

nama: Soraméfifi Yesu nufaryéng 11 waitogh árfefaf njam yémofem njamke tánetawét. Yémon tamndetau ménamén ndimbal mwighé yau tawamorwén. Fá tikéf táikér tamorwén Yesue efalo yátoghét emofem téfandawét fá soramé kérta nanoi. 15 Yesum fá emndai, "Kuwanongi méinyotio yuwomé, mat engyátotati Mer si méinyotio árét. 16 Njam emofem efalo yiyátotat a fá so ewalitotat, Ngánjánam so tawanjarngé. Wénde njam yau efalo yiyátotat, Ngánjánam so tawaramangé yaufioene fai. 17 Yéndon so ewarametan wafté sélngwélafé yam wafroghét méinyotio efalo yátogh árét. Yémofem so yaufi mbérmbér ewifnat tane yétkwénan a fá so norayat ámb árfene sie árké yau kotametawét. 18 Yémofem ngángaye kamban so eweretat, a yémofem kér nu njam enetat, némé yau so nufrote. Yémofem ngángé njam efayotat enjne téfnárfefaf, fá so mer náyátotat."
english: Afterward he was revealed to the eleven themselves as they sat at the table; and he rebuked them for their unbelief and hardness of heart , because they didn’ t believe those who had seen him after he had risen .
He said to them , “ Go into all the world and preach the Good News to the whole creation .
He who believes and is baptized will be saved ; but he who disbelieves will be condemned .
These signs will accompany those who believe : in my name they will cast out demons ; they will speak with new languages ;
they will take up serpents ; and if they drink any deadly thing , it will in no way hurt them ; they will lay hands on the sick, and they will recover .”

nama: Njam Yuré Yesum si ewifoi yéfefaf, fá táf nénguyoi njafarot a námnjoi Ngánjánene tambén ngángata. 20 Féyo waitogh ár táf nofarnayénd méinyotio yuwomé, mat tangyátotawét mer si. Yuré kásáfotau yéfe kénjúmé a tárfár sélngwélafé yam tawafrotawét. Yéné yamam tuyafotau ndené yáne si efalo témorwén.
english: So then the Lord , after he had spoken to them , was received up into heaven and sat down at the right hand of God .
They went out and preached everywhere , the Lord working with them and confirming the word by the signs that followed . Amen.

nama: Fútar Tiafilus:
english: Since many have undertaken to set in order a narrative concerning those matters which have been fulfilled among us ,

nama: Yémofem yafrotaménd kétamé némé si té yinjoyénd ufroghan a emofem yéfarotaménd. 3 Yéndon té merkéráye téfandawan méinyotio yam kétándmé ufrogh, mer kéretau tayot faroghét ménát merkéráye ndenéfifi némé té kufrotau. Yéndon yafrotan feyot minde merfifi Tiafilus, 4 Yéndon yéné yafrotan ménát fém so mat ném efalo si méinyotio árkéméné fém té káyáretau. Jon walitogh ár yáne áráféghmén si afrogh
english: even as those who from the beginning were eyewitnesses and servants of the word delivered them to us ,
it seemed good to me also , having traced the course of all things accurately from the first, to write to you in order , most excellent Theophilus ;
that you might know the certainty concerning the things in which you were instructed .

nama: Yéné efghon Erod njam témorwén Judiamén warsagh ár, kété témorwén ghéngén wárogh ár yétkwén Jakaraya efe tafnyangérwén ghéngén wárogh ár Abiane mérén, yáne amaf Elisabet Aron ákimén. 6 Jakaraya a Elisabet Ngánjánene ghékfan mer ghérsaye tamorarwén, méinyotio Yurane nák tawaitoghét. 7 Wénde ambumofnar tarwén, ménamén Elisabetéf mwinu tárwén, a fá bulu náyáteyayénd.
english: There was in the days of Herod , the king of Judea , a certain priest named Zacharias , of the priestly division of Abijah. He had a wife of the daughters of Aaron, and her name was Elizabeth .
They were both righteous before God , walking blamelessly in all the commandments and ordinances of the Lord .
But they had no child , because Elizabeth was barren , and they both were well advanced in years .

nama: Ámb efghon Jakarayane mérénta ghéngén ásáfogh efogh nawerai, yémon ghéngén wárogh ásáfogh yérnyai Ngánján sáfrére. 9 Yéfene túmén témndan Ngánjánam taferngai ménát mer wimafé rokar wároghét Ngánján wáwefnogh méngo kénjút. 10 Njam efogh náwerai mer wimafé rokar wároghét, méinyotio ár náumendaménd wáwefnogh méngo sifayan Ngánjánafé oraighét.
english: Now while he executed the priest’s office before God in the order of his division
according to the custom of the priest’ s office , his lot was to enter into the temple of the Lord and burn incense .
The whole multitude of the people were praying outside at the hour of incense .

nama: Féyo Ngánjánene njafar si résagh ár nufaryéng yáfaf, nokayoyéng ghéngén wárogh séki tambénta. 12 Njam Jakarayam yinjoyéng, fá sélngwél yémormén a férféram yifoyéng. 13 Wénde njafar si résagh árom yémndayéng, "Yau férfér ném, Jakaraya, fene Ngánjánafé orayégh si té náyárang. Fene amaf Elisabet so nésle ghakér ambum, fémon táf yétkwén taram Jon. 14 Fá so yém áuwégh a remngogh feyot, a tárfár so náuwetat ménamén yáne éslaghmén. 15 Fá ndimbal so yém Ngánjánene ghékfan, wéri nénefnar a ámb táikér nu, a fá so yém Ngánján Mbérmbér wafoghkaf kétándmayo éslagh. 16 Tárfár ár Israilmén yémon so ewangote kétán Yuré yéfenjo Ngánjánefaf. 17 A fá so yéngém Yurane frondeta, mbérmbéran a waftayan ndenanit Elaija kés témorwén, ménát afafene tikéf wangoghét kétán yéfenjo ambumafefaf, a ayáréghofnaye ghérsata wangoghét kétán káfeté; efalo ghérsat táfrendau Yurai."
english: An angel of the Lord appeared to him , standing on the right side of the altar of incense .
Zacharias was troubled when he saw him , and fear fell upon him .
But the angel said to him , “Don’ t be afraid , Zacharias , because your request has been heard . Your wife , Elizabeth , will bear you a son , and you shall call his name John .
You will have joy and gladness , and many will rejoice at his birth .
For he will be great in the sight of the Lord , and he will drink no wine nor strong drink . He will be filled with the Holy Spirit , even from his mother ’ s womb .
He will turn many of the children of Israel to the Lord their God .

He will go before him in the spirit and power of Elijah , ‘ to turn the hearts of the fathers to the children ,’ and the disobedient to the wisdom of the just ; to prepare a people prepared for the Lord .”

nama: Jakarayam yémotai njafar si résagh ár, "Ndernáye wét yénd mat so kamndan yénémamén? Yénd swém bulu wém a tane amaf siyém ndenéyameyo ausé."
english: Zacharias said to the angel, “ How can I be sure of this ? For I am an old man , and my wife is well advanced in years .”

nama: Njafar si résagh árom yawangoi, "Yénd wém Geibrél. Yénd Ngánjáne kaka wakai a yénd kwénmáfárete siafé sái kémaufron yéné mer si. 20 A sénonjo fém kékmbo métar a yau noraya kétánotio yéné ufroghene efogh kawerangé ménamén fémo efalo yau tane si so táyáto. Árkéméné so efalo kénamndangi yánjo efghon."
english: The angel answered him , “ I am Gabriel , who stands in the presence of God . I was sent to speak to you and to bring you this good news .
Behold , you will be silent and not able to speak until the day that these things will happen , because you didn’ t believe my words , which will be fulfilled in their proper time .”

nama: Yéné tekan árém Jakaraya njam tanjetawét a mwighé uwérsoghan tamorwén ménamén tekfifi télawangérwén wáwefnogh méngo kénjún. 22 Njam fá nétoryéng, fá yau korayau yéfefaf. Yémofem yáyámngoyénd ménamén yémon ghékéf waingégh Ngánján yinjoi wáwefnogh méngo kénjún, fá siofnar namndai yéfeyot ngángayero tawaweindau. 23 Njam yáne wáwefnogh efogh nefoyénd, fá néngangoi méngot. 24 Soramé yáne amaf Elisabet namndai suafé a 5 ghérare méngo kénjúnro témorangérwén yau kétonau. 25 Elisabet norayai, "Yuram yéné tafrote tayot, yéné efghon Ngánjánam yauyafoi yáne ménde a yitérmboi tane wáiwáiafé yam árfe tambén." Yesuene áráféghmén si afrogh
english: The people were waiting for Zacharias , and they marveled that he delayed in the temple .
When he came out , he could not speak to them . They perceived that he had seen a vision in the temple . He continued making signs to them , and remained mute .
When the days of his service were fulfilled, he departed to his house .
After these days Elizabeth his wife conceived , and she hid herself five months , saying ,
“ Thus has the Lord done to me in the days in which he looked at me , to take away my reproach among men .”

nama: Táf Elisabetene 6 ghérareyan, Ngánjánam yáfáretam njafar si résagh ár Geibrél Najaret Galili yuwot, 27 yéné méinyo mérésoefaf efe yéreindaménd awerghét Josefefaf, Deifidene mérén kénjút, yáne yétkwén témorwén Meri. 28 Njafar si résagh ár yéngmormén Meri yémndai, "Mer frengégh siafé! Yuré siyém fefaf yém." 29 Meri ndimbal sélngwél yémorméng yáne sian a mwighé uwérsoghét yéméindai ndernáye yéné áuwéghfifi so yém. 30 Wénde njafar si résagh árom yémndai, "Yau férfér ném, Meri, fémon Ngánjánene ménde té yinjo. 31 Fém so ném ambumafé a fém so nésle ghakér ambum, a yétkwén táf taram Yesu. 32 Fá so yém ndimbal a so yémndetat Minde tukén Ambum. Yuré Ngánjánam so tiyátongé warsagh ár ndenáye fété yáne áki Deifid kés témorwén. 33 A fá so yém Israil limánégh ár tuotot. Yáne méngotu yau so yiyato!"
english: Now in the sixth month , the angel Gabriel was sent from God to a city of Galilee named Nazareth ,
to a virgin pledged to be married to a man whose name was Joseph , of David ’s house . The virgin ’s name was Mary .
Having come in , the angel said to her , “ Rejoice , you highly favored one ! The Lord is with you . Blessed are you among women!”
But when she saw him , she was greatly troubled at the saying , and considered what kind of salutation this might be .
The angel said to her , “Don’ t be afraid , Mary , for you have found favor with God .
Behold , you will conceive in your womb and give birth to a son , and shall name him ‘ Jesus .’
He will be great and will be called the Son of the Most High . The Lord God will give him the throne of his father David ,
and he will reign over the house of Jacob forever . There will be no end to his Kingdom.”

nama: Merim yémotai njafar si résagh ár, "Ndernáye so yéné yém, ménamén yénd swém méinyo mérés?"
english: Mary said to the angel, “ How can this be , seeing I am a virgin ?”

nama: Njafar si résagh árom yawangoi, "Efalo, Ngánján Mbérmbér fefaf so yéném, a Minde Tukén waftayam fém so kémafarngé. Yéné téfnan njúnnjúnofnar ambum so yémndetat Ngánjánene Ambum. 36 Elisabet fene mérénmén ambumafé so yém ausayan a efe témndetawét ndené mwiné téfnár yém, sénonjo suafé yém 6 ghérare kénjún. 37 Yénémamén Ngánjáneyot yau táikér yém."
english: The angel answered her , “ The Holy Spirit will come on you , and the power of the Most High will overshadow you . Therefore also the holy one who is born from you will be called the Son of God .
Behold , Elizabeth your relative also has conceived a son in her old age ; and this is the sixth month with her who was called barren .
For nothing spoken by God is impossible .”

nama: Merim yawangoi, "Yénd wém Yurane faiofnar ásáfogh ár. Féyotaro so nufrote némé té wémndé." Si soramé njafar si résagh árom yéfrangoi. Merim yiyafoi Elisabet
english: Mary said , “ Behold , the servant of the Lord ; let it be done to me according to your word .” Then the angel departed from her .

nama: Yéné efghon Meri wékeye álighét náfrendam tesenot Judia tunakéf yuwot. 40 Fá nélawai Jakarayane méngot a frengégh si yaramai Elisabete. 41 Njam Elisabet náyárai Meriene frengégh si, ambum táf nalinai fút kénjún, a táf Elisabet témorwén Ngánján Mbérmbér wafoghkaf. 42 Fá tuk kéme norayai, "Frengéghkaf ném méinyotio amaf kénjún, a frengéghafé ambum fémon so yéráfteǃ 43 Némamén yénd méndefé wém, tane Yurane amé sái yéném tafaf? 44 Njam fene frengégh si náyárai, táf ambum tane fút kénjún notanai áuwéghafé. 45 Nderé áuwéghafé yém yáyot si némé té norayai Ngánjánene efalo si sái nufrota yáfaf." Meriene wagh
english: Mary arose in those days and went into the hill country with haste , into a city of Judah ,
and entered into the house of Zacharias and greeted Elizabeth .
When Elizabeth heard Mary ’s greeting, the baby leaped in her womb ; and Elizabeth was filled with the Holy Spirit .
She called out with a loud voice and said , “ Blessed are you among women , and blessed is the fruit of your womb !
Why am I so favored, that the mother of my Lord should come to me ?
For behold , when the voice of your greeting came into my ears , the baby leaped in my womb for joy!
Blessed is she who believed , for there will be a fulfillment of the things which have been spoken to her from the Lord !”

nama: Meri norayai, "Tane tikfam Yuré yuwete
english: Mary said , “ My soul magnifies the Lord .

nama: a tane mbérmbér áuwéghan yém Ngánján tane Wanjarégh ár kénjún,
english: My spirit has rejoiced in God my Savior ,

nama: ménamén yémon yénd wafarotam yuwan ghérsafé yáne ásáfogh mérés! Yénandmé sénonjo méinyotio árém so wémndetat yénd ndené frengéghmén ném,
english: for he has looked at the humble state of his servant . For behold , from now on , all generations will call me blessed .

nama: ménamén Minde tukén waftafé sélngwélafé yam tayot yafrotam. Yáne yétkwén yém njúnnjúnofnar.
english: For he who is mighty has done great things for me . Holy is his name .

nama: Yáne ghérghérsisé so néngusamngote yéfeyot emofem férférafé yéfandat fá kétándmé ámb ár saté kétánotio ámb ár saté.
english: His mercy is for generations and generations on those who fear him .

nama: Yémon té yuyafotam muyé yánjo ngángaye, yémon té ewafarnai fá efe tuktuk mwighé emarghan tamorwén.
english: He has shown strength with his arm . He has scattered the proud in the imagination of their hearts .

nama: Yémon té eweworyéng yuwot limánégh ár yéfenjo limánégh ámnjogh sifayata, wénde euyoyéng tukét métar ár.
english: He has put down princes from their thrones , and has exalted the lowly .

nama: Yémon té eremngoi siogh ár tárfár rokare wénde engwatembayéng wemár ár sotro.
english: He has filled the hungry with good things . He has sent the rich away empty .

nama: Yémon té yáutánam yánjo faiofnar ásáfogh ár Israil yafarotai ghérghérsisaye.
english: He has given help to Israel , his servant , that he might remember mercy ,

nama: Ebraamefaf a yánjo mérénfaf tuot, ndernáye té nénorayayéng téfene afafefaf."
english: as he spoke to our fathers , to Abraham and his offspring + 1:55 or, seed forever .”

nama: Merif emorarmén Elisabetfé nambio ghérare soramé Meri néngangoi méngotuot. Jon walitogh ár yáne áráféghmén si
english: Mary stayed with her about three months , and then returned to her house .

nama: Elisabetene efogh njam nawerai yáne ambummén, fá náráftam ghakér. 58 Yáne kaka ár a fútaréf náyárayénd ndené Yuram ndimbal ghérghérsisé yuyafoi a fá káuwétawét yémafé.
english: Now the time that Elizabeth should give birth was fulfilled, and she gave birth to a son .
Her neighbors and her relatives heard that the Lord had magnified his mercy toward her , and they rejoiced with her .

nama: 8 efogh nawerayéng fá engmormén ghéngan néfghét a yémofem yétkwén yéramayénd yárefé Jakaraya soramé, 60 wénde yátmé norayai, "Yau! Yáne yétkwén so yém Jon."
english: On the eighth day , they came to circumcise the child ; and they would have called him Zacharias , after the name of his father .
His mother answered , “ Not so ; but he will be called John .”

nama: Yémofem yémndayénd, "Ámb yéné yétkwén yau yém féfene mérnan."
english: They said to her , “ There is no one among your relatives who is called by this name .”

nama: Yémofem ngángaye yéngwaghnyayénd yárefai ménát ambumoe yétkwén ramghét. 63 Fá namotayéng farogh fefat ngángé awaunyéghe, méinyotio ár sélngwél emorméng yémon yéfarotam, "Yáne yétkwén siyém Jon." 64 Táf fété Jakaraya si néngufngoi a tuwetau Ngánján. 65 Ár fútar Ngánján férféram ewifoi, Judia yu árém taruindawét yéné yammén. 66 Méinyotio ár efe náyárayénd mwighé uwérsoghan tamorwén, a namotayénd, "Efe yéné ambum so yém?" Ménamén Yurane ngángé kété témorwén. Jakarayane wagh
english: They made signs to his father , what he would have him called .
He asked for a writing tablet , and wrote , “ His name is John .” They all marveled .
His mouth was opened immediately and his tongue freed, and he spoke , blessing God .
Fear came on all who lived around them , and all these sayings were talked about throughout all the hill country of Judea .
All who heard them laid them up in their heart , saying , “ What then will this child be ?” The hand of the Lord was with him .

nama: Yárefé Jakaraya Ngánján Mbérmbéram yafoi si nufngoi,
english: His father Zacharias was filled with the Holy Spirit , and prophesied , saying ,

nama: "Áuwégh yém Yurai, Israilmén Ngánján! Fá té téném yánjo ár wanjarghét.
english: “ Blessed be the Lord , the God of Israel , for he has visited and redeemed his people ;

nama: Fá yénmáfáretam téfe wanjarégh ár yáne faiofnar ásáfogh ár Deifid yáne mérénmén.
english: and has raised up a horn of salvation for us in the house of his servant David

nama: Némé fá norayai yáne Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár kénjúmé tándái,
english: ( as he spoke by the mouth of his holy prophets who have been from of old),

nama: Wanjarégh yém kétándmé téfene mék téfnárafene ngángata emofem méndméndat yénfandat yénd.
english: salvation from our enemies and from the hand of all who hate us ;

nama: Ghérghérsisé yuyafoi téfene afafefaf a ewafarotai yánjo njúnnjúnofnar árnyégh.
english: to show mercy toward our fathers , to remember his holy covenant ,

nama: Wengéghofnar si norayai téfene afé Ebraamefaf.
english: the oath which he swore to Abraham our father ,

nama: Yénd yénmutoryéng kétándmé mék téfnárfene ngángata a yénméindai yénd yáyot férférofnar yam wafarerghét:
english: to grant to us that we, being delivered out of the hand of our enemies , should serve him without fear,

nama: njúnnjúnofnar a mbarkánd kér ro Ngánjáne sáfan méinyotio téfene efghon.
english: in holiness and righteousness before him all the days of our life.

nama: Fém, tane ambum, so ném Minde Tuk Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár, so ném Yurane sáfréré end frengéghét yáyot,
english: And you , child , will be called a prophet of the Most High ; for you will go before the face of the Lord to prepare his ways ,

nama: yánjo árét so ewaramete wanjarégh mat yéfene yaufi wányányégh kénjúmé.
english: to give knowledge of salvation to his people by the remission of their sins,

nama: Ménamén téfene Ngánjánene ghérghérsisé njafar tambén árnyégh efogh so yéném téfefaf.
english: because of the tender mercy of our God , by which the dawn from on high will visit us ,

nama: So télálángé fá efe kwéfkwéfan em a kér mbanmbanan efe em so engwambete téfene kafkaf krufrát endmé."
english: to shine on those who sit in darkness and the shadow of death ; to guide our feet into the way of peace .”

nama: Ambum nanotam a muyafé namndai mbérmbéran, a fá tékmangérwén fanfne yuwon kétánotio marataye nufaryéng Israilét.
english: The child was growing and becoming strong in spirit , and was in the desert until the day of his public appearance to Israel .

nama: Yéné efghon Kaisar Augustusam muyé si yéramai marataye yétkwén kayoghét Rom yuwon. 2 Yéné simormén frondefifi yam yétkwén kayoghét njam Kwirinius gafana témorwén Sirian. 3 Méinyotio ár nuwanoyénd yéfenjo tesenot yétkwén yáuwéghét.
english: Now in those days , a decree went out from Caesar Augustus that all the world should be enrolled.
This was the first enrollment made when Quirinius was governor of Syria .
All went to enroll themselves , everyone to his own city .

nama: Féyo, ménamén Josef siyém Deifidene ákimén, fá néngwanoi Najaret tesenta Galili yuwot kétán Betliem Judia kénjút, yéné tesen siyém ánde Deifid nanotam. 5 Fá nuwaneyayénd Merifé yétkwén kayoghét, efe té yémndayénd awerghét Josefefaf a táf áráféghétro témorwén ambum. 6 Njamandio tarwén kété, efogh nawerai ambum áráfghét, 7 a fá fronde sénko ambum náráftam. Sálámeye yéfiyaryéng ambum yéflayéng wérárafene njamke téruan ménamén kété yau sifayé témorwén yéfeyot méngon. Sif wanjengégh ár a njafar si résagh ár
english: Joseph also went up from Galilee , out of the city of Nazareth , into Judea , to David ’s city , which is called Bethlehem, because he was of the house and family of David ,
to enroll himself with Mary , who was pledged to be married to him as wife, being pregnant.
While they were there , the day had come for her to give birth .
She gave birth to her firstborn son . She wrapped him in bands of cloth and laid him in a feeding trough, because there was no room for them in the inn .

nama: A sif wanjengégh ár tékmangérwén kaka sifayan ghékéf tawafayotawét sifafet sémbáran. 9 Yurane njafar si résagh ár sélngwéle nufaryéng yéfefaf a Yurane ndimbal kwayaghayam etremngoi, a fá férfér tamorwén. 10 Wénde njafar si résagh árom emndai fá, "Férfér yau em. Yéndon enwarsan mer si féfeyot ndimbal áuwégh méinyotio árét. 11 Sénonjo Deifidene tesen kénjún Wanjarégh ár té káráfte féfeyot, fá yém Yuré Keriso. 12 Yéné siyém féfeyot wayamngoghét: fémofem so tinjongi ambum sáláme fiyaréghkaf wérárafene njamke téruan."
english: There were shepherds in the same country staying in the field, and keeping watch by night over their flock .
Behold, an angel of the Lord stood by them , and the glory of the Lord shone around them , and they were terrified .
The angel said to them , “Don’ t be afraid , for behold , I bring you good news of great joy which will be to all the people .
For there is born to you today , in David ’ s city , a Savior , who is Christ the Lord .
This is the sign to you : you will find a baby wrapped in strips of cloth, lying in a feeding trough.”

nama: Sélngwélafé minde tárfár njafar si résagh ár nufaryénd yéné njafar si résagh árfé, tuwetawét Ngánján a korayawét,
english: Suddenly , there was with the angel a multitude of the heavenly army praising God and saying ,

nama: "Áuwégh yém Ngánjáneyot minde tukén, yéné mbandan krufrát yém yéfeyot yáne méndefé árét."
english: “ Glory to God in the highest , on earth peace , good will toward men .”

nama: Njam njafar si résagh árém efrangoyénd a nuwanoyénd njafarot, sif wanjengégh ár fáro norayayénd, "Kuwanongém Betliemét fandaghét némé yam nufrote kété, árkémamén Yuram té yénmaufroi." 16 Sif wanjengégh ár nuwanoyénd wékeye ewinjoyénd Meri, Josef, a tosé efe tékmangérwén wérárafene téruan. 17 Yémofem njam yinjoyénd fá, si yétarnayénd némé njafar si résagh árom té ewaufroyéng yéné ambumoenemén. 18 Efe méinyotio náyárayénd sélngwél emormén némé sif wanjengégh árém ewafroyénd yéfeyot. 19 Meriene tikfan si tamorwén a mé kawafarotau. 20 Sif wanjengégh ár nangoyénd áuwéghafé tuwetawét Ngánján ménamén némé náyárayénd a ghékfe yinjoyénd, árkémamén té yéfe ewaufroyénd. Yesu témorwén wáwefnogh méngo kénjún
english: When the angels went away from them into the sky , the shepherds said to one another , “ Let ’ s go to Bethlehem, now , and see this thing that has happened , which the Lord has made known to us .”
They came with haste and found both Mary and Joseph , and the baby was lying in the feeding trough.
When they saw it , they publicized widely the saying which was spoken to them about this child .
All who heard it wondered at the things which were spoken to them by the shepherds .
But Mary kept all these sayings , pondering them in her heart .
The shepherds returned , glorifying and praising God for all the things that they had heard and seen , just as it was told them .

nama: Ménayan 8 efghon, efogh nawerayéng yáne ghéngan néfghét, yáne yétkwén Yesu, njafar si résagh árom fronde yétkwén yaramai soramé su nawanai.
english: When eight days were fulfilled for the circumcision of the child , his name was called Jesus , which was given by the angel before he was conceived in the womb .

nama: Njam efogh nawerai wányányégh téménd wafroghét ndernáye Mosesene nák témorwén, Josef a Meri ambum yérséménd Jerusalemét Yurafaf wateghét 23 Yurane nák ndernáye té yéfarotam, "Méinyotio fronde sénko ghakér ambum wateghét Yurafaf." 24 A fá nuwanoyénd ghéngén ramghét ménamén Yurane nák ndernáye noraye ménát sómbio mamuot o sómbio duf tosat. Simionene afrogh si
english: When the days of their purification according to the law of Moses were fulfilled, they brought him up to Jerusalem to present him to the Lord
( as it is written in the law of the Lord , “ Every male who opens the womb shall be called holy to the Lord ”),
and to offer a sacrifice according to that which is said in the law of the Lord , “ A pair of turtledoves , or two young pigeons .”

nama: Ár témorwén Jerusalem kénjún yétkwén Simion, efe témorwén mbarkándro a Ngánján férférafé ár. Fá kawanjetau ménát Israil wanjarghét, a témorwén Ngánján Mbérmbér wafoghkaf. 26 Ngánján Mbérmbéram mwighé yaramai, "Fém yau so kér ném fronde Yurane Keriso so tinjo." 27 Ngánján Mbérmbéram yimndai Simion kétán wáwefnogh méngo kénjút. Njam yárefafem ambum Yesu yérséménd kétán túmén yam wafroghfaf ánde témorwén nákan, 28 Simioném ambum yambnai ngángaye a áuwégh yawangoyéng Ngánjáne táf norayai,
english: Behold , there was a man in Jerusalem whose name was Simeon . This man was righteous and devout , looking for the consolation of Israel , and the Holy Spirit was on him .
It had been revealed to him by the Holy Spirit that he should not see death before he had seen the Lord ’ s Christ .
He came in the Spirit into the temple . When the parents brought in the child , Jesus , that they might do concerning him according to the custom of the law ,
then he received him into his arms and blessed God , and said ,

nama: "Wanjarégh ár Yuré, fémon némé té wémndai, sénonjo yénd fene faiofnar ásáfogh ár kér so wém áuwéghafé.
english: “ Now you are releasing your servant , Master , according to your word , in peace ;

nama: Ménamén tane ghékfam fene wanjarégh té yinjo,
english: for my eyes have seen your salvation ,

nama: ménát méinyotio árém so yéfandat árkéméné fémon té néusénam.
english: which you have prepared before the face of all peoples ;

nama: Fá so yém ndenanit kwayaghé sái yuyafotam fene efalofifi Téndo árét, a yémon so eméinde ár sái nemnat tukén Israil árfenemén."
english: a light for revelation to the nations , and the glory of your people Israel .”

nama: Ambumoe yárefé a yátmé sélngwél ermén némé Simion té norayai yánemén. 34 Simioném efrendai fá a yémndai Meri, yátmé, "Yéné ambumom so eméinde ámb Israil ár sái nékmbotat Ngánján efalo yiyátoghét, a tárfár ár so kawengongi Ngánjánefaf a fá so yém waufarogh ménát mat yátoghét árét wénde tárfár árém so yékenat fá. 35 Ménát tárfár árfene tikéfta yaufi mwighé so nufanat. Yaufi wafroghyam yémofem so ewafrotat yáfaf árkéménayam so tawaramangé ndimbal ghérghérsisé." Annane ghérsamén afrogh si
english: Joseph and his mother were marveling at the things which were spoken concerning him .
Simeon blessed them , and said to Mary , his mother , “ Behold , this child is appointed for the falling and the rising of many in Israel , and for a sign which is spoken against .
Yes , a sword will pierce through your own soul , that the thoughts of many hearts may be revealed.”

nama: Kété témorwén Ngánjánene mat yátogh amaf, Anna, Fanuelene mérés, Aserene mérénmén. Fá témorwén auséfifi, a fá enmorarmén yánjarfé sefen yunjfro. 37 A kwiré náyátoi kétánotio 84 yunjéf namndayéng. Yémon yau yéfrangoi wáwefnogh méngo wénde táwefnotau sémbár a efghon Ngánjánafé koraiwét a kawafarmetau. 38 Yéné efogh féneféneyan yénmormén yéfefaf, yémon kánjo yaramai Ngánjáne a ewaufroi ambumoenemén efe kawanjetawét Jerusalem wanjarghét.
english: There was one Anna, a prophetess , the daughter of Phanuel , of the tribe of Asher ( she was of a great age , having lived with a husband seven years from her virginity ,
and she had been a widow for about eighty-four years ), who didn’ t depart from the temple , worshiping with fastings and petitions night and day .
Coming up at that very hour , she gave thanks to the Lord , and spoke of him to all those who were looking for redemption in Jerusalem .

nama: Njam Yurane nák némé wafroghét tamorwén Merifém Josefé té ewifeyayénd, fá táf nangeyayénd Galili yuwot yéfenjo tesenot Najaret. 40 Ambum nanotam muyafé namndai, fá káfeté mwighé wafoghkaf témorwén, Ngánjánene ngárám yáfaf témorwén. Ghakér ambum Yesu wáwefnogh méngon
english: When they had accomplished all things that were according to the law of the Lord , they returned into Galilee , to their own city , Nazareth .
The child was growing, and was becoming strong in spirit , being filled with wisdom , and the grace of God was upon him .

nama: Méinyotio yunjfan yárefaf tayowéng Jerusalemét Waingégh téméndfaf. 42 Njam fá 12 yunjéf namndai, fá nuwanoyénd kétán, túmén yam wafarogh téméndfaf. 43 Téménd soramé njam yárefaf kénangowét méngotuot, ghakér ambum Yesu nawangsoi Jerusalemén, wénde mat yau tarwén ambumoenemén. 44 Fá kéma kemarwét ndené mérne kar álighan kénangotawét, ámbiro efogh eyoméng. Yémofem ronjagh yafngeyayénd yéfenjo mérén kénjún a fútarfefaf. 45 Njam yau fá yinjeyayénd, fá nangeyayénd Jerusalemét yá ronjaghét. 46 Nambio efogh soramé yémofem yinjeyayénd wáwefnogh méngon, témorangérwén watamegh téfnárafé, káyáretau yéfefaf a ámogh si tawarametau. 47 Méinyotio emofem tiyáretawét fá emormén sélngwél yáne uwangoghan mwighé kwayaghé térsawét. 48 Njam yárefafem yinjeyayénd fá, sélngwél ermén, a yatmam yémndai, "Ambum, ndené fémo némamén yénmafrowé? Yénd afafé ténre ndémkefé fe ronjaghan."
english: His parents went every year to Jerusalem at the feast of the Passover .
When he was twelve years old , they went up to Jerusalem according to the custom of the feast ;
and when they had fulfilled the days , as they were returning , the boy Jesus stayed behind in Jerusalem . Joseph and his mother didn’ t know it ,
but supposing him to be in the company , they went a day ’s journey ; and they looked for him among their relatives and acquaintances .
When they didn’t find him , they returned to Jerusalem , looking for him .
After three days they found him in the temple , sitting in the middle of the teachers , both listening to them and asking them questions .
All who heard him were amazed at his understanding and his answers.
When they saw him , they were astonished ; and his mother said to him , “ Son , why have you treated us this way ? Behold , your father and I were anxiously looking for you .”

nama: Yesum ewawangeyai, "Némémén yénd fémofem wéronjét? Fém mat fiya tarwén ndené yénd tane Afane méngo kénjún wém." 50 Wénde fá mé katambarwét némé si yémon té tamndéwéng.
english: He said to them , “ Why were you looking for me ? Didn’ t you know that I must be in my Father ’s house?”
They didn’ t understand the saying which he spoke to them .

nama: Fá nuwanoyénd Najaretét yárefafé a fá áyárégh ár náyátoi yárefafefaf. Wénde yatmam méinyotio si ewanai yánjo tikéf kénjút. 52 Yesu nanotam fifiyan a káfeté mwighayan a yáne ménde Ngánjánafé a ár.
english: And he went down with them and came to Nazareth . He was subject to them , and his mother kept all these sayings in her heart .
And Jesus increased in wisdom and stature , and in favor with God and men .

nama: Njam tuk warsagh ár Kaisar Tiberiusém télimndau Rom 15 yunjéf, táf Fontius Failet témorwén Judiamén gafana, Erod témorwén limánégh ár Galili yuwon, Erode yánngén Filif témorwén limánégh ár Itulia a Trakonitisan a Lisanias témorwén limánégh ár Abileneyan, 2 a táf Anas a Kayafas ghéngén wárogh sénko ár tarwén, Buk si yénmormén Jonefaf Jakarayane ambumoefaf fanfne yuwon. 3 Yémon yarendam méinyotio Joden yu, si táitotau walitoghmén a tawalitotau yaufita awengoghét. 4 Ndernáye yéfarotaménd Buk sian Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár Aisayane si, "Ámb ár ke nutne fanfne yuwon, 'End frengéghét Yuraye álighét, wafrogh mbarkánd end yáyot.
english: Now in the fifteenth year of the reign of Tiberius Caesar , Pontius Pilate being governor of Judea , and Herod being tetrarch of Galilee , and his brother Philip tetrarch of the region of Ituraea and Trachonitis , and Lysanias tetrarch of Abilene,
during the high priesthood of Annas and Caiaphas , the word of God came to John , the son of Zacharias , in the wilderness .
He came into all the region around the Jordan , preaching the baptism of repentance for remission of sins.
As it is written in the book of the words of Isaiah the prophet , “ The voice of one crying in the wilderness , ‘ Make ready the way of the Lord . Make his paths straight .

nama: Méinyotio yékwyékw wéfángéghét a méinyotio mband tunakéf fénarghét a fafatot. Méinyotio ménjuté end so em mbarkánd a yaufi end so em frengéghkaf.
english: Every valley will be filled . Every mountain and hill will be brought low . The crooked will become straight , and the rough ways smooth .

nama: A méinyotio árém so tinjongi Ngánjánene wanjarégh.'"
english: All flesh will see God ’s salvation .’”

nama: Jon norayai ár mérénfaf árké tanmorwén nuwot walitoghét yáfaf, "Fém kamban ghérsafé ár mérén! Emon fém emndai Ngánjánene nékwta sái kenngongi? 8 Yénayam so ewafrotati árkéménayam féfe so tayaufrongi ndené té nawengongi yaufita. A yau yaufi si kufngongi féfenjo kénjún ndené, 'Ebraam siyém téfene áki.' Yéndo emndetan fém ndené yéné wím tambén Ngánjánam so tautorngé ambum Ebraameyot. 9 Mbilé siyém frengéghkaf yém wén sérémb néfghét, a árké wénam yau njam mer mbwe yéfuna yéné wén siyém néfghét a fését wighét."
english: He said therefore to the multitudes who went out to be baptized by him , “ You offspring of vipers , who warned you to flee from the wrath to come ?

Therefore produce fruits worthy of repentance , and don’ t begin to say among yourselves , ‘ We have Abraham for our father ;’ for I tell you that God is able to raise up children to Abraham from these stones !
Even now the ax also lies at the root of the trees . Every tree therefore that doesn’ t produce good fruit is cut down and thrown into the fire .”

nama: Ár mérnam yémotayénd, "Némé yéndfem so yafrotam yénandmé?"
english: The multitudes asked him , “ What then must we do ?”

nama: Joném ewawangoi, "Ár efe sómbio sodafé njam yém ámb ároe so taramangé, a efe njamkefé yém ndenéyameyo so yafrote."
english: He answered them , “ He who has two coats , let him give to him who has none . He who has food , let him do likewise .”

nama: Mani kafégh ár ndenéyameyo enmormén nu walitoghét, fá namotayénd, "Watamegh ár, némé so yafrotam?"
english: Tax collectors also came to be baptized, and they said to him , “ Teacher , what must we do ?”

nama: Yémon emndai fá, "Yau féfenjo méndeye takafangi kétamé némé té engémndan." 14 Ámb fiyaram wéi yémotayéng, "Yéndfem némé so yafrotam?" Yémo ewawangoi, "Yau ewarémnati maniot ár o ekafetati unyéghe a eremngotati féfenjo fayam."
english: He said to them , “ Collect no more than that which is appointed to you .”
Soldiers also asked him , saying , “ What about us ? What must we do ?” He said to them , “Extort from no one by violence, neither accuse anyone wrongfully. Be content with your wages .”

nama: Ár kawanjetawét oyárghafé a méinyotio tikfan kéwérsotawét nde Jon némé Keriso namndé. 16 Joném ewawangoi méinyotioat, "Yéndon ewalitotan fém nue. Wénde efe tane soramé yéném tane muyé so taindangé, endene sandol ángégh fénaghét yénd féyotarofnar wém. Yémon so ewalitote fém Ngánján Mbérmbére a fése. 17 Fá siyém frengéghkaf yém njénro faloghét kétándmé fifiyafé mbwe yánjo foke. Kétándmé yémon so yésámbune saf, so euménde fifiyafé mbwe yánjo méngo kénjún, wénde so tawarongé njénro kémboghofnar fése." 18 A ámb tárfár sie Joném tawawéngsotau ár a mer si tawawaitotau yéfeyot.
english: As the people were in expectation , and all men reasoned in their hearts concerning John , whether perhaps he was the Christ ,

John answered them all , “ I indeed baptize you with water , but he comes who is mightier than I , the strap of whose sandals I am not worthy to loosen. He will baptize you in the Holy Spirit and fire .
His winnowing fan is in his hand , and he will thoroughly cleanse his threshing floor, and will gather the wheat into his barn; but he will burn up the chaff with unquenchable fire .”
Then with many other exhortations he preached good news to the people ,

nama: Wénde njam Joném yarnam Erod limánégh ár ménamén yémon nawerai yánngnoene amaf, Erodias a ámb yaufiyam ewafrotam, 20 Erodém yasamngoi yénandmé yéfefaf. Jon yélawayénd kwéfkwéf méngon. Yesuene walitoghmén
english: but Herod the tetrarch , being reproved by him for Herodias , his brother’s wife , and for all the evil things which Herod had done ,
added this also to them all , that he shut up John in prison .

nama: Njam méinyotio ár ewalitotam, Yesu wéi yálitotam. Njam fá Ngánjánafé oraighan témorwén njafar táf nasawéryéng, 22 a Ngánján Mbérmbér néneworyéng Yesuefaf men kénjúmé ndenanit mamu. Si yénmormén kétándmé njafarta, "Fém ném tane uwéghafé ambum, yénd minde náuwétan fefaf." Yesuene ákiafenemén
english: Now when all the people were baptized, Jesus also had been baptized and was praying . The sky was opened,
and the Holy Spirit descended in a bodily form like a dove on him ; and a voice came out of the sky , saying “ You are my beloved Son . In you I am well pleased .”

nama: Yesu namndai 30 yunjéf táf yánjo ásáfogh yérnyai. Yesu maratan nakmai ndené Josefene ambum yém Josef témorwén Eliene ambum,
english: Jesus himself, when he began to teach, was about thirty years old , being the son ( as was supposed ) of Joseph , the son of Heli ,

nama: Matatene ambum, Lefiene ambum, Melkiene ambum, Yanaiene ambum, Josefene ambum,
english: the son of Matthat , the son of Levi , the son of Melchi , the son of Jannai , the son of Joseph ,

nama: Matatiasene ambum, Amosene ambum, Nakumene ambum, Esliene ambum, Nagaiene ambum,
english: the son of Mattathias , the son of Amos, the son of Nahum , the son of Esli , the son of Naggai ,

nama: Matene ambum, Matatiasene ambum, Semeinene ambum, Josekene ambum, Jodene ambum,
english: the son of Maath , the son of Mattathias , the son of Semein , the son of Joseph , the son of Judah ,

nama: Joananene ambum, Resane ambum, Jerufafelene ambum, Sialtielene ambum, Neriene ambum,
english: the son of Joanan, the son of Rhesa , the son of Zerubbabel , the son of Shealtiel , the son of Neri ,

nama: Melkiene ambum, Adiene ambum, Kosamene ambum, Elmadamene ambum, Erene ambum,
english: the son of Melchi , the son of Addi, the son of Cosam , the son of Elmodam , the son of Er ,

nama: Josuane ambum, Elieserene ambum, Jorimene ambum Matatene ambum, Lefiene ambum.
english: the son of Jose, the son of Eliezer , the son of Jorim , the son of Matthat , the son of Levi ,

nama: Simionene ambum, Judane ambum, Josefene ambum, Jonamene ambum, Eliakimene ambum,
english: the son of Simeon , the son of Judah , the son of Joseph , the son of Jonan , the son of Eliakim ,

nama: Meliane ambum, Menane ambum, Matatane ambum, Natanene ambum, Deifidene ambum,
english: the son of Melea , the son of Menan , the son of Mattatha , the son of Nathan , the son of David ,

nama: Jesiene ambum, Obedene ambum, Boasene ambum, Samonene ambum, Nasunene ambum,
english: the son of Jesse , the son of Obed , the son of Boaz , the son of Salmon, the son of Nahshon ,

nama: Aminadafene ambum, Ramene ambum, Ejronene ambum, Feresene ambum, Judane ambum,
english: the son of Amminadab, the son of Aram, the son of Hezron , the son of Perez , the son of Judah ,

nama: Jeikofene ambum, Aisekene ambum, Ebraamene ambum, Terane ambum, Naorene ambum,
english: the son of Jacob , the son of Isaac , the son of Abraham, the son of Terah , the son of Nahor ,

nama: Serukene ambum, Reuene ambum, Felekene ambum, Eferene ambum, Selane ambum,
english: the son of Serug, the son of Reu , the son of Peleg , the son of Eber, the son of Shelah ,
