Keriso so tékrátan yém a kénanongé kétándmé kérta nambiomén efghon, 47 a yaufi awengoghmén a wányányéghmén so yaitotat yáne yétkwénan méinyotio yuwomé so térnyangi kétándmé Jerusalemta. 48 Fém em fandagh ár yéné yammén. 49 Yéndon ewáfáretan fém némat tane Afam unyéghofnar si norayai. Wénde tesenan so nawanjetati kétánotio njafar tukta waftaye kéneworngé féfefaf." Yesuene uyoghmén
english: Then he opened their minds , that they might understand the Scriptures .
He said to them , “ Thus it is written , and thus it was necessary for the Christ to suffer and to rise from the dead the third day ,
and that repentance and remission of sins should be preached in his name to all the nations , beginning at Jerusalem .
You are witnesses of these things .
Behold , I send out the promise of my Father on you . But wait in the city of Jerusalem until you are clothed with power from on high .”

nama: Yémon njam elimai Betani tesenta, Yesum ngángé euyoi a efrendai fá. 51 Njamandio fá táfrendawéng, yémon engfrangoi fá táf nénguyoi njafarot. 52 Féyo yémofem yáwefnoyénd Yesue a kangotawét Jerusalemét ndimbal áuwéghafé. 53 A fá túmén kawanjetawét wáwefnogh méngon méinyotio efghon, Ngánján tuwétawét. |IB04179gr.tif|col||by Farid Faadil. © Biblica, Inc. Used with permission. All rights reserved worldwide.|Yesu narmboi njafarot (Luk 24.50-51)|24.50-51
english: He led them out as far as Bethany, and he lifted up his hands and blessed them .
While he blessed them , he withdrew from them and was carried up into heaven .
They worshiped him and returned to Jerusalem with great joy ,
and were continually in the temple , praising and blessing God . Amen.

nama: Kété téfnan Si té kaketau; Si Ngánjánafé tárwén, a Si témorwén Ngánján. 2 Kétaméfifi téfén Si Ngánjánafé tárwén. 3 Yáne kénjúmé Ngánjánam ewafrotam méinyotio rokar; yau ámbiro rokar náláite méinyotio ufrogh kénjún yáyofnaye. 4 Si témorwén ghérsé téfén, a yéné ghérsé yam yénérsam kwayaghé kétán árét. 5 Kwayaghé nálále kwéfkwéfan, a kwéfkwéfam yau so taindangé.
english: In the beginning was the Word , and the Word was with God , and the Word was God .
The same was in the beginning with God .
All things were made through him . Without him , nothing was made that has been made .
In him was life , and the life was the light of men .
The light shines in the darkness , and the darkness hasn’ t overcome it .

nama: Ngánjánam yénmáfáretam yánjo si résagh ár, ár yétkwén Jon, 7 efe yénmormén kafrotau árfefaf kwayaghamén, ménát méinyotio so náyáretat si a efalo tiyátongi. 8 Fá fáyo yau kwayaghé témorwén; fá yénmormén kafrotau kwayaghamén. 9 Yénéf témorwén efalofifi kwayaghé árké kwayaghé yéném mband maratot a nálále méinyotio árfefaf.
english: There came a man sent from God , whose name was John .
The same came as a witness , that he might testify about the light , that all might believe through him .
He was not the light , but was sent that he might testify about the light .
The true light that enlightens everyone was coming into the world .

nama: Si té témorwén mband marat kénjún, a ndemamén Ngánjánam yafrotam mband marat yáne kénjúmé, wénde mband maratam yau yáyamngoyéng fá. 11 Fá yénmormén yá yuwot, wénde yánjo árém yau yumyoyénd fá. 12 Wénde ámb árém fété té yumyoyénd fá a efalo yiyátoyénd; yémon ewaramai muyé nénamndayénd Ngánjánene ambumtértér. 13 Fá yau náyátoyénd Ngánjánene ambumtértér fifie áráfghe o árfene méndeye o ménaye sái náráftat fifie afafe kénjúmé; wénde áráfégh árké yém Ngánjáneta.
english: He was in the world , and the world was made through him , and the world didn’ t recognize him .
He came to his own , and those who were his own didn’ t receive him .
But as many as received him , to them he gave the right to become God ’s children , to those who believe in his name :
who were born , not of blood, nor of the will of the flesh , nor of the will of man , but of God .

nama: Si náyátoi ár a témorangérwén téfe kénjún, ngárám a efalo afoghkaf. Yéndfem yinjoyém yáne ndimbal kwayaghé, árké yémon yanai ndené fété Afane féfét Ambum.
english: The Word became flesh and lived among us . We saw his glory , such glory as of the only born Son of the Father , full of grace and truth.

nama: Jon korayau yánemén. Fá nutnai, "Yéné fá fiyém yénd endenemén kénorayan táf njam korayan, 'Fá yéném ta soramé, wénde yénd wainde yémo, ménamén fá fronde kaketau yénd soramé náráftamén.'"
english: John testified about him . He cried out , saying , “ This was he of whom I said , ‘ He who comes after me has surpassed me , for he was before me .’”

nama: Yáne afoghkaf ngáráme yémo té yénfrendai yénd méinyotio, a yénmaramete téfe ámb frengégh yénamayo wéi ámb. 17 Ngánjánam yéramai nák Mosese kénjúmé, wénde ngárám a efalo yénmormén yá kénjúmé Yesu Keriso. 18 Emo ámb yau yinjoi Ngánján. Féfét Ambumomro, efe yém Ngánjányo a efe yém kaka Afafaf, yémo té safén yékmai fá. Jon walitogh ároenemén si
english: From his fullness we all received grace upon grace .
For the law was given through Moses . Grace and truth were realized through Jesus Christ .
No one has seen God at any time . The only born Son , who is in the bosom of the Father , has declared him .

nama: Ju sénko árém Jerusalemén ewáfáretaménd ámb ghéngén wárogh ár a Lefi mérénmén Jone moghét, "Fém Efe ném?"
english: This is John ’s testimony , when the Jews sent priests and Levites from Jerusalem to ask him , “ Who are you ?”

nama: Jon yau nakenai uwangoghét, wénde norayai marataye a safénro, "Yénd yau Keriso wém."
english: He declared , and didn’ t deny , but he declared , “ I am not the Christ .”

nama: Fá námotayénd, "Féyo fém efe ném? Efe ném Elaija?" Joném ewawangoi, "Yau, yénd yau fá wém." Fá namotayénd, "Fém ném yéné Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár?" Yémo ewawangoi, "Yau."
english: They asked him , “ What then ? Are you Elijah ?” He said , “ I am not .” “ Are you the prophet ?” He answered , “ No .”

nama: Fá korayangi, "Ténmaufro téfe fém efe ném? Yéndfem so uwangogh si yangotam yéfe emofem ténmáfáretat yénd. Némé fém noraye fenjomén?"
english: They said therefore to him , “ Who are you ? Give us an answer to take back to those who sent us . What do you say about yourself ?”

nama: Jon nuwangoi Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár Aisayane sian: "Yénd ámb ároene kém wém nutne fanfne yuwon: Tafrotangi mbarkánd end Yurai álighét!"
english: He said , “ I am the voice of one crying in the wilderness , ‘ Make straight the way of the Lord ,’ as Isaiah the prophet said .”

nama: Farasi ár mérén efe enwáfáretaménd, 25 wéi yémotayénd Jon, "Fém yau njam ném Keriso o Elaija o Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár, némamén fémon nuan walitogh ewafrote?"
english: The ones who had been sent were from the Pharisees .
They asked him , “ Why then do you baptize if you are not the Christ , nor Elijah , nor the prophet ?”

nama: Jon nuwangoi, "Yéndon ewalitotan nue, wénde féfefafényo yakai fá fiyém endenemén mat yau em. 27 Fá ta soramé yéném, wénde yénd féyotarofnar wém yáne sandol ángégh ferghét.
english: John answered them , “ I baptize in water , but among you stands one whom you don’ t know .
He is the one who comes after me , who is preferred before me , whose sandal strap I ’m not worthy to loosen.”

nama: Méinyotio yéné kété kufrotau Betanin kété Joden wanjen wér tambén, ánde Joném tawalitotau. Ngánjánene Sif tosé
english: These things were done in Bethany beyond the Jordan , where John was baptizing.

nama: Yénamayo efghon Joném yinjoi Yesu ténmorwén yáfaf, a norayai, "Téfandangi, yéné yém Ngánjánene Sif tosé, emo mband maratoene yaufi titrombongé! 30 Yéné fiyém fá yéndon efe tésérmbnan a yénd kénorayan, "Ár efe ta soramé yéném, yénd wainde yémo, ménamén fá fronde kaketau yénd soramé náráftamén." 31 Yénd yau mat náyátoyén yánemén, wénde yénd kwéném nue walitoghét ménát fá so safén kakmangé Israil árfefaf."
english: The next day , he saw Jesus coming to him , and said , “ Behold , the Lamb of God , who takes away the sin of the world !
This is he of whom I said , ‘ After me comes a man who is preferred before me , for he was before me .’
I didn’ t know him , but for this reason I came baptizing in water , that he would be revealed to Israel .”

nama: A Joném yéné si korayau: "Yéndon yinjon Ngánján Mbérmbér nénewor ndenanit mamu kétamé njafarta a nafai yáfaf. 33 Yénd so mé yau mat namndayén ndené fá fété témorwén, wénde Ngánjánam, emo kwémáfárete yénd ménát walitoghét nue, té noraya tafaf, 'Fémon so tinjo Ngánján Mbérmbér so kéneworngé kafayongé ároefaf; fá fiyém emo so ewalitote Ngánján Mbérmbére.' 34 Jon norayai, "Yéndon té téfandan yéné yam a yéndon ewaufrotan féfe ndené fá yéné féyém Ngánjánene Ambum." Fronde Yesuene waitogh ár
english: John testified , saying , “ I have seen the Spirit descending like a dove out of heaven , and it remained on him .
I didn’ t recognize him , but he who sent me to baptize in water said to me , ‘ On whomever you will see the Spirit descending and remaining on him is he who baptizes in the Holy Spirit .’
I have seen and have testified that this is the Son of God .”

nama: Yénamayo efghon Jon takayongérwén wéikor kété yémafé sómbio yáne waitogh ár kénjún, 36 njam yémo yinjoi Yesu álighan, fá norayai, "Téfandangi, ndené kés yém Ngánjánene Sif tosé!"
english: Again , the next day , John was standing with two of his disciples ,
and he looked at Jesus as he walked , and said , “ Behold , the Lamb of God !”

nama: Sómbio waitogh árém yiyáreyayénd fá norayai yéné a néngwanoyénd Yesufé. 38 Yesu nawengoyéng, ewinjeyai yá waitoghan, a namotai, "Némat fém nérét?" Yémofem yawangeyayénd, "Ánde fém némorang, Rabai?" Yéné yétkwénoene fifi siyém "Watamegh ár."
english: The two disciples heard him speak , and they followed Jesus .
Jesus turned and saw them following, and said to them , “ What are you looking for ?” They said to him , “ Rabbi ” ( which is to say , being interpreted , Teacher ), “ where are you staying ?”

nama: Fá nuwangoi, "Awe a fandaghét." Yéné táf témorwén 4 aklokotro séiteyan. Féyo fá néwaneyayénd yémafé a yinjeyayénd ánde fá témorangérwén a yifeyayénd yéné efogh yémafé.
english: He said to them , “ Come and see .” They came and saw where he was staying , and they stayed with him that day . It was about the tenth hour . + 1:39 4:00 p.m.

nama: Ámb fá témorwén Endru, Saimon Fita yánngén, emo yiyárai némé Jon té norayai a emo yáitoi Yesu, 41 Táf fété fá nuwanoi a yinjoi yánjo ané Saimon a yaufroi yá, "Yéndfem té yinjongém Mesaya." Yáne yétkwénoene fifi siyém Keriso. 42 Féyo yémon yéngémnjoi Saimon kétán Yesuefaf. Yesum yéfandai fá a norayai, "Fene yétkwén siyém Saimon Jonene ambum, wénde fém so némanmotat Sifas." Yéné sái yawengongi Fité a yáne fifi yém "wím." Yesum ewanmeyai Filif a Nataniel
english: One of the two who heard John and followed him was Andrew, Simon Peter ’s brother.
He first found his own brother, Simon , and said to him , “ We have found the Messiah !” ( which is , being interpreted , Christ ).
He brought him to Jesus . Jesus looked at him and said , “ You are Simon the son of Jonah. You shall be called Cephas ” ( which is by interpretation , Peter ).

nama: Yénamayo efghon Yesu nemnai álighét Galili yuwot. Yémo yinjoi Filif a norayai yáfaf, "Kwénmaito!" 44 Filif témorwén Betsaidamén, tesen ánde Endru a Fité tamorarwén. 45 Filifém yinjoi Nataniel a yaufroi yá, "Yéndfem té yinjongém fá endenemén Mosesém té yéfarotam nák bukan a endenemén Ngánjánene mat yátogh árém wéi té yéfarotaménd. Fá yém Yesu Josefene ambum Najaretmén."
english: On the next day , he was determined to go out into Galilee , and he found Philip . Jesus said to him , “Follow me .”
Now Philip was from Bethsaida, the city of Andrew and Peter .
Philip found Nathanael , and said to him , “ We have found him of whom Moses in the law and also the prophets , wrote : Jesus of Nazareth , the son of Joseph .”

nama: Nataniel namotai, "Ámb némé mer rokar so yéném Najaretta?" Filif nuwangoi, "Awe a téfanda."
english: Nathanael said to him , “ Can any good thing come out of Nazareth ?” Philip said to him , “ Come and see .”

nama: Njam Yesum yinjoi Nataniel ténmorwén kétán yáfaf, Yesu norayai yánemén, "Siyém efalo Israil ár; yáfaf unyégh yau yém!"
english: Jesus saw Nathanael coming to him , and said about him , “ Behold , an Israelite indeed , in whom is no deceit !”

nama: Natanielém yémotai fá, "Ndernáye fém mat ném yénd?" Yesu nuwangoi, "Yéndon néminjon fém njam wén yétkwén figh njaran ném soramayo Filifém némanmo fém."
english: Nathanael said to him , “ How do you know me ?” Jesus answered him , “ Before Philip called you , when you were under the fig tree , I saw you .”

nama: Nataniel nuwangoi, "Watamegh ár, fém sném Ngánjánene Ambum! Fém sném warsagh ár Israilmén!"
english: Nathanael answered him , “ Rabbi , you are the Son of God ! You are King of Israel !”

nama: Yesu norayai, "Fene efalo yátogh té yém ménamén yéndon fém korayangén ndené yéndo néminjoyén wén yétkwén figh njaran? Soramé fémo so efande minde ndimbal yam nufrotat árkéménayam so ewainde némé sénonjo efande!" 51 A fá norayai yéfefaf, "Yéndon ewaufrotan féfe efalo: fémofem so tinjongi njafar so kasawérngé a Ngánjánene njafar si résagh ár so nénguyotat a nénewonat Ároene Ambum kénjúmé."
english: Jesus answered him , “ Because I told you , ‘ I saw you underneath the fig tree ,’ do you believe ? You will see greater things than these !”
He said to him , “ Most certainly , I tell you all , hereafter you will see heaven opened, and the angels of God ascending and descending on the Son of Man .”

nama: Sómbio efogh soramé kété témorwén awerégh téménd Kana tesenan Galili yu kénjún. Yesue yátmé kété témorwén, 2 a Yesu a yáne waitogh ár enwarawayénd kétán awerégh téméndfaf. 3 Njam wéri nu nefoi, Yesue yátmé norayai yáfaf, "Yéfene wéri nu té nefo."
english: The third day , there was a wedding in Cana of Galilee . Jesus ’ mother was there .
Jesus also was invited , with his disciples , to the wedding .
When the wine ran out , Jesus ’ mother said to him , “ They have no wine .”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Amé, fémo némamén wémndete yénémamén? Tane efogh yau nawer."
english: Jesus said to her , “ Woman , what does that have to do with you and me ? My hour has not yet come .”

nama: Yesue yatmam emndai faiofnar ásáfogh ár, "Ewafrotati némé njam yémo emndeta."
english: His mother said to the servants , “ Whatever he says to you , do it .”

nama: Ju árfene nák kété tamorwén ménamén téménd umbaréghmén, a yénémamén 6 wím séfkwén nu wékwéghmén tamorwén kété, ámbiroámbiroe yéné nu werégh féyotaroan 80 o 120 lita. 7 Yesu norayai faiofnar ásáfogh árfefaf, "Tawararotangi yéné séfkwén ménaye nue." Yémofem ewararotaménd kétán sénfnetio, 8 a wéi yémo emndai fá, "Sénonjo tukangi ámb nu a téngwanangi kétán yéné ároefaf emo yánjete téménd." Yémofem nu yéngwanayénd yáfaf, 9 árké té nawengoi wéri nuot, a yémon yufoyéng. Fá yau mat namndai árkandmé yéné wéri nu yénmormén (wénde faiofnar ásáfogh ár emofem nu enéukayénd mat tamorwén), féyo yémon yanmoi awerégh ár 10 a norayai yáfaf, "Méinyotio árém enérsaménd fronde merfifi wéri nu. Njam árém enetaménd tárfár, féyo yémofem tawarametawét yuwanyo wéri nu. Wénde fém ném fénataye. Fémo té tamnde merfifi wéri nu yénanotio sénonjo!"
english: Now there were six water pots of stone set there after the Jews ’ way of purifying , containing two or three metretes apiece.
Jesus said to them , “ Fill the water pots with water .” So they filled them up to the brim.
He said to them , “ Now draw some out , and take it to the ruler of the feast.” So they took it .
When the ruler of the feast tasted the water now become wine , and didn’ t know where it came from ( but the servants who had drawn the water knew ), the ruler of the feast called the bridegroom
and said to him , “ Everyone serves the good wine first , and when the guests have drunk freely , then that which is worse . You have kept the good wine until now !”

nama: Yesum yafrotam yéné fronde ufarogh yam Kanan Galili yu kénjún; kété yémon yuyafoi yánjo ndimbal kwayaghé, a yánjo waitogh árém efalo yiyátoyénd fá.
english: This beginning of his signs Jesus did in Cana of Galilee , and revealed his glory ; and his disciples believed in him .

nama: Yéné soramé, Yesu a yánjo amé, néngnéf a waitogh ár engmormén kétán Káfenamét a emorangérmén tárfárofnar efogh. Yesu yéngmormén kétán wáwefnogh méngot
english: After this , he went down to Capernaum , he , and his mother , his brothers, and his disciples ; and they stayed there a few days .

nama: Efogh kakafifi témorwén ménát Waingégh témndot, féyo yénémamén Yesu yéngmormén kétán Jerusalemét. 14 Kété wáwefnogh méngo sifayan yémon ewinjoi ár tátérnawét kau, sif, a mamu a ndenáyo mani térarégh ár tamorangérwén yéfenjo kitarékitarayan. 15 Féyo yémon yafrotam téfél ángéghmén a wifarégh méinyotio ár ewafngoi wáwefnogh méngo sifayata, yéfene sif a kauafé; yémon tawatarnau yéfene mani mbwe a tawengotau yéfene mani térarégh kitaré, 16 a yémon emndai fá emofem tátérnawét mamu, "Tangéutorngi yénandmé! Kékmbongi tane Afane méngo yau yengotati marat sifayat!" 17 Yáne waitogh ár nawafarotayénd ndenénde si ménj noraye, "Tane uwégh fene méngot nakérne tafaf ndenanit fés."
english: The Passover of the Jews was at hand , and Jesus went up to Jerusalem .
He found in the temple those who sold oxen , sheep , and doves , and the changers of money sitting .
He made a whip of cords and drove all out of the temple , both the sheep and the oxen ; and he poured out the changers ’ money and overthrew their tables .
To those who sold the doves , he said , “ Take these things out of here ! Don’ t make my Father ’s house a marketplace!”
His disciples remembered that it was written , “ Zeal for your house will eat me up .”

nama: Ju sénko ár nénangoyénd ámoghafé yáfaf, "Némé ufarogh yam fémon so yafrote sái ténmauyafo téfe ndené fém waftafé ném yéné wafroghét?"
english: The Jews therefore answered him , “ What sign do you show us , seeing that you do these things ?”

nama: Yesu nuwangoi, "Tironangi yéné wáwefnogh méngo, a nambio efogh kénjún yéndon so tanongén yéné wéikor."
english: Jesus answered them , “ Destroy this temple , and in three days I will raise it up .”

nama: Yémofem yémotayénd, "Némé fémo so yéramete yéné wéikor nambio efogh kénjún? Yéné wáwefnogh méngo ramégham yérsam 46 yunjéf!"
english: The Jews therefore said , “ It took forty-six years to build this temple ! Will you raise it up in three days ?”

nama: Wénde Yesu njam norayai wáwefnogh méngo yánjo fifimén korayau 22 Féyo njam fá nanoi kérta, yáne waitogh árém nawafarotayénd nde fá té norayai yéné, a yémafem efalo yiyátoyénd Buk si a némé Yesu té norayai. Yesu mat yém árfene tikéf
english: But he spoke of the temple of his body .
When therefore he was raised from the dead , his disciples remembered that he said this , and they believed the Scripture and the word which Jesus had said .

nama: Táf Yesu témorwén Jerusalem kénjún táf Waingégh témndan, tárfáram efalo tiyátotawét fá ménamén yémofem téfandawét ufaroghafé yam tawafrotau. 24 Wénde Yesu yau kámyotau yéfefaf, ménamén fá mat témorwén méinyotio árfenemén. 25 Kété yau siot témorwén ménát yá sái taufrongayénd yéfenemén, ménamén fá fáyo mat témorwén némé yéfene tikfan tamorwén.
english: Now when he was in Jerusalem at the Passover , during the feast , many believed in his name , observing his signs which he did .
But Jesus didn’ t entrust himself to them , because he knew everyone ,
and because he didn’ t need for anyone to testify concerning man ; for he himself knew what was in man .

nama: Kété témorwén ámb Ju sénko ár yétkwén Nikodimas, efe témorwén Farasi mérénmén. 2 Ámb sémbár fá yéngmormén Yesuefaf a norayai yáfaf, "Watamegh ár, yénd mat yéném ndené fém ném watamegh ár efe nénmáfáretam Ngánjánam. Yau emo so ámb ufarogh yam ewafrote yéné fémon sewafrote táfandro Ngánjánafé njam fém ere."
english: Now there was a man of the Pharisees named Nicodemus , a ruler of the Jews .
He came to Jesus by night and said to him , “ Rabbi , we know that you are a teacher come from God , for no one can do these signs that you do , unless God is with him .”

nama: Yesu nuwangoi, "Yéndon efalo némaufrotan fe: emo yau so tinjongé Ngánjánene limánégh táfandro njam wéikor náráfta."
english: Jesus answered him , “ Most certainly I tell you , unless one is born anew, he can ’ t see God ’s Kingdom.”

nama: Nikodimas namotai, "Ndernáye so anoghkaf ár náráfte wéikor? Fá yau so kélawangé yátmane kafkalot a sái náráfta sómbinotma!"
english: Nicodemus said to him , “ How can a man be born when he is old ? Can he enter a second time into his mother ’s womb and be born ?”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Yéndon némaufrotan efalofifi, efe ámb yau so kélawangé Ngánján limánéghét táfandro njam náráfta nue a Ngánján Mbérmbére. 6 Ár siyém náráfte fifiyan afafeta, wénde náráfte mbérmbéran Ngánján Mbérmbére. 7 Fém yau táf sélngwél ném ménamén yéndon némaufrotan fe ndené fém so fété méinyotio náráftati kor. 8 Mbormbor yéfnje kétán ándan té ménde yém; fémon yéné rér ke náyárete árké yafrote, wénde fém yau mat ném árké tambén yéném o ándan wéi yéngém. Yéné ndené fiyém yéfe méinyotio efe náráftat Ngánján Mbérmbére.
english: Jesus answered , “ Most certainly I tell you , unless one is born of water and Spirit , he can ’ t enter into God ’s Kingdom.
That which is born of the flesh is flesh . That which is born of the Spirit is spirit .
Don’t marvel that I said to you , ‘ You must be born anew.’
The wind blows where it wants to , and you hear its sound , but don’ t know where it comes from and where it is going . So is everyone who is born of the Spirit .”

nama: Nikodimas namotai, "Ndernáye yéné yém?"
english: Nicodemus answered him , “ How can these things be ?”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Fém sném ndimbal watamegh ár Israil kénjún, a fém yau mat ném yénémamén? 11 Yéndon némaufrotan fe efalo: yéndfem norayam némé yénd mat yéném a yufanam némé yéndfem té téfandam, wénde somé ámb yau fém ménde em téfene si umyoghét. 12 Fene efalo yátogh yau yém tafaf njam yéndon némaufrotan fe ménamén yéné mbandmén rokarmén; ndernáye so fémon efalo wiyátote yénd njam yéndon némaufrotan njafar rokarmén? 13 A yaufifi efe ámb yéngmormén tukét kétán njafarot mé Ároene Ambumro, efe yénmormén yuwot njafarta."
english: Jesus answered him , “ Are you the teacher of Israel , and don’ t understand these things ?
Most certainly I tell you , we speak that which we know and testify of that which we have seen , and you don’ t receive our witness .
If I told you earthly things and you don’ t believe , how will you believe if I tell you heavenly things ?
No one has ascended into heaven but he who descended out of heaven , the Son of Man , who is in heaven .

nama: Ndené fété Mosesém kés yuyoi tot téfén kamban sérasrafé fanfne yuwon, ndenéyameyo Ároene Ambum so fété tuyongi tukét. 15 Yéné fifiyan, méinyotio emofem fá efalo yiyátotat so em tuot ghérsafé. 16 Ménamén Ngánjánam yuwetam mband marat mindefifi, féyo yémon yéramai yáne féfét Ambum, ménát méinyotio emofem fá efalo yiyátotat fá yau so kér em wénde so em tuot ghérsafé. 17 Ménamén Ngánjánam yau yénmáfáretam yánjo Ambum yénan mband maratot ménát sái yém mogh ár, wénde ménát sái fá yém yá wanjarégh ár.
english: As Moses lifted up the serpent in the wilderness , even so must the Son of Man be lifted up ,
that whoever believes in him should not perish, but have eternal life .
For God so loved the world , that he gave his only born Son , that whoever believes in him should not perish, but have eternal life .
For God didn’ t send his Son into the world to judge the world , but that the world should be saved through him .

nama: Fá emofem efalo yiyátotat Ambum yau moghan em; wénde fá emofem yau efalo yiyátotat em moghan, ménamén yémofem yau efalo yiyátongi Ngánjánene féfét Ambum. 19 Ndené yéné féyém ásáfogh moghan: kwayaghé té téném mband maratot, wénde árém méndefé yéfandat kwéfkwéf a yau kwayaghé, ménamén yéfene yam sem yaufi. 20 Emofem yaufi ewafrotat méndméndat yéfandat kwayaghé a yau so eném kwayaghfaf, ménamén fá méndefnar em yéfene yaufiyam sái kakmangi sáfét. 21 Wénde emofem ewafrotat némé em efalo eném kétán kwayaghafaf ménát ámb árém so efandat ndené yémofem yéné yafrotat némat Ngánján ménde yém. Yesu a Jon
english: He who believes in him is not judged . He who doesn’ t believe has been judged already , because he has not believed in the name of the only born Son of God .
This is the judgment , that the light has come into the world , and men loved the darkness rather than the light , for their works were evil .
For everyone who does evil hates the light and doesn’ t come to the light , lest his works would be exposed .
But he who does the truth comes to the light , that his works may be revealed , that they have been done in God .”

nama: Yéné soramé, Yesu a yánjo waitogh ár enmormén kétán Judia yuwot, kété fá ámb efogh yémorangérmén yémafé a ewalitotam nuan. 23 Joném ndenáyo tawalitotau Aenon yu kénjún yau nayu kétándmé Salim yuta, ménamén kété tamorwén nu tárfár yéné sifayan. Ár tangmorwén yáfaf a yémon mé tawalitotau fá. 24 Táf yéné soramayo, Jon yélawayénd kwéfkwéf méngot.
english: After these things , Jesus came with his disciples into the land of Judea . He stayed there with them and baptized.
John also was baptizing in Enon near Salim , because there was much water there . They came and were baptized;
for John was not yet thrown into prison .

nama: Ámb Jonene waitogh ár nufngoyénd éwigh yémafé Ju árofé ménamén téménd umbaréghmén. 26 Féyo fá enmormén kétán Jonefaf a yaufroyénd yá, "Watamegh ár, fém kawafarota yéné ároenemén emofé fém tárwén kété wer tambén kété Joden wanje, fá fiyém fém endenemén korayau? Féyo yémon sénonjo ewalitote, a méinyotio ár yáfaf engém!"
english: Therefore a dispute arose on the part of John ’s disciples with some Jews about purification .
They came to John and said to him , “ Rabbi , he who was with you beyond the Jordan , to whom you have testified , behold , he baptizes, and everyone is coming to him .”

nama: Jon nuwangoi, "Efe yau rokarafé so yém táfandro Ngánjánam njam taramangé yáyot. 28 Fém fémyo em tane ghékéf fandagh ár ndernáye yénd norayayén, 'Yénd fá yau wém Keriso, wénde Ngánjánam yénd té frondeyo kwémáfárete yá fronde.' 29 Totér aweréghét ár yéné yém fá totér awerégh mérésoe, wénde awerégh ároene fútar, efe nawanjete a náyárete yáfaf, fá áuwéghan táf yém njam yémon náyárete awerégh ároene kém. Yéné áuwégh siyém tane té nafo. 30 Fá so káyátongé ndimbal wénde yénd so káyátongén yuwan. Fá efe yénmormén Njafarta
english: John answered , “ A man can receive nothing unless it has been given him from heaven .
You yourselves testify that I said , ‘ I am not the Christ ,’ but , ‘ I have been sent before him .’
He who has the bride is the bridegroom ; but the friend of the bridegroom , who stands and hears him , rejoices greatly because of the bridegroom ’ s voice . Therefore my joy is made full .
He must increase, but I must decrease .

nama: Fá efe yénmormén tukta ewainde méinyotio rokar. Fá efe yém mband maratmén mband maratoene yém a noraye mband yammén, wénde fá efe yém njafarmén fá siyém méinyotio tukén. 32 Yémon nafrote némé yémon té téfande a káyárete, wénde yau emon ámb yumyong yáne si. 33 Wénde emon njam té yumyong yáne si yénaye efalo tiyátongé nde Ngánján siyém efalofifi. 34 Fá efe Ngánjánam yénmáfáretam noraye Ngánjánene si, ménamén Ngánjánam yaramete yá afoghkaf Ngánján Mbérmbér. 35 Yárefam yuwete yánjo Ambum a té ekmayéng méinyotio rokar yáne waftayan. 36 Emon efalo tiyátongé Ambum fá siyém tuot ghérsafé; emon njam tékenangé Ambum yáyot yau so ghérsafé yém, wénde so kafrangongi Ngánjánene nékwot.
english: “ He who comes from above is above all . He who is from the earth belongs to the earth and speaks of the earth . He who comes from heaven is above all .
What he has seen and heard, of that he testifies ; and no one receives his witness .
He who has received his witness has set his seal to this , that God is true .
For he whom God has sent speaks the words of God ; for God gives the Spirit without measure .
The Father loves the Son , and has given all things into his hand .
One who believes in the Son has eternal life , but one who disobeys the Son won’ t see life , but the wrath of God remains on him .”

nama: Farasi ár náyárayénd ndené Yesum taméindau ár yándio waitoghét a minde tárfár ár tawalitotau a yáne ár tárfár káyátotawét a tawaindawét Jonene waitogh ár. 2 Wénde, Yesum yémonyo yau efe ámb yálitotam; mé yáne waitogh árémro. 3 Njam Yesu náráyai yéné si, yémon yéfrangoi Judia a néngangoi kétán Galili yuwot; 4 yáne angogh témorwén yénamé Samaria yuamé.
english: Therefore when the Lord knew that the Pharisees had heard that Jesus was making and baptizing more disciples than John
( although Jesus himself didn’ t baptize, but his disciples ),
he left Judea and departed into Galilee .
He needed to pass through Samaria .

nama: Kété Samaria kénjún nufaryéng kétán tesen yétkwén Sikar, árkéméné yau nayu témorwén kétándmé yéné mbandta Jeikofém árkéméné yaramai yánjo ambumoe Josefe. 6 Jeikofene nu yékw kétéf témorwén, féyo Yesu, fifi sakér nawerai ménamén álighmén, námnjoi kété nu yékwfaf efogh méf kakayan. 7-8\~ Yáne waitogh ár néngwanoyénd tesenot ménát njamke résaghét. Féyo Samariamén amaf ámb nénwanoi kétán nu ukwét, féyo Yesu norayai yáfaf, "Ta nu kwaram."
english: So he came to a city of Samaria called Sychar , near the parcel of ground that Jacob gave to his son Joseph .
Jacob ’s well was there . Jesus therefore , being tired from his journey , sat down by the well . It was about the sixth hour .
A woman of Samaria came to draw water . Jesus said to her , “ Give me a drink .”
For his disciples had gone away into the city to buy food .

nama: Amafom yawangoi, "Fém sném Ju ár, a yénd swém Samariamén ámaf-yénémamén nde ndernáye so fémon wamnende yénd nuot?" Ménamén Ju ár yau so nafghetat Samaria árfé kafusi a merekinamé néneyan.
english: The Samaritan woman therefore said to him , “ How is it that you , being a Jew , ask for a drink from me , a Samaritan woman ?” ( For Jews have no dealings with Samaritans.)

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Njam té fém mat kénmorwén némé Ngánjánene ramégh yém a efe fá yém emon némamnende nuot, fémon so támnenda fá, a yémon so kémaramangé ghérsé akegh nu."
english: Jesus answered her , “ If you knew the gift of God , and who it is who says to you , ‘ Give me a drink ,’ you would have asked him , and he would have given you living water .”

nama: Amaf norayai, "Ndimbal, fém sném ukwégh rokarofnar, a yékw siyém kénjkam. Ánde so fémon ténman yéné ghérsé akegh nu? 12 Téfene ákim Jeikofém yénmaramai téfe yéné nu yékw; fá a yánjo ambumtértér a yánjo mánjarégh wérár mérén méinyotio nu yénaf tánetawét. Fémo yáinde afé Jeikof?"
english: The woman said to him , “ Sir , you have nothing to draw with , and the well is deep. So where do you get that living water ?
Are you greater than our father Jacob , who gave us the well and drank from it himself, as did his children and his livestock ?”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Méinyotio emofem yéné nu yénetat mé so em nu ménde, 14 wénde emon njam yéneta yéné nu yéndon sewarametan yaufifi so efinde nuam. Néméwét, nu yéné yéndon sewarametan yéfe so kamndangé éfnogh nu yéfene kénjún so efrone akegh ghérsé nue a so tawaramangé tuot ghérsé."
english: Jesus answered her , “ Everyone who drinks of this water will thirst again ,
but whoever drinks of the water that I will give him will never thirst again ; but the water that I will give him will become in him a well of water springing up to eternal life .”

nama: Amaf norayai yáfaf, "Ndimbal, kwaram ta yéné nu ménát yau yénd so nuam wéfinde a yau so wéném yénan nu ukéghét."
english: The woman said to him , “ Sir , give me this water , so that I don’ t get thirsty , neither come all the way here to draw.”

nama: Yesum yémndai amaf, "Kuwano, fenjar ténmasro a kénango."
english: Jesus said to her , “ Go , call your husband, and come here .”

nama: Amaf nuwangoi, "Tanjar yau wém."
english: The woman answered , “ I have no husband.” Jesus said to her , “ You said well , ‘ I have no husband,’

nama: Wénde efalo siyém, fém té némasroyénd 5 árém, a ár sénonjo emafé emorare yau fenjarfifi yém. Fémo efalo té waufro."
english: for you have had five husbands; and he whom you now have is not your husband. This you have said truly.”

nama: Amaf norayai, "Ndimbal, yénd mat namndan ndené fém sném Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár. 20 Téfene ákifem yéné mband tunakfan táwefnotawét Ngánjáne, wénde fém Ju ár norayati ndené Jerusalem yéné yu fiyém ánde yéndfem so yáwefnotam Ngánjáne."
english: The woman said to him , “ Sir , I perceive that you are a prophet .
Our fathers worshiped in this mountain , and you Jews say that in Jerusalem is the place where people ought to worship .”

nama: Yesu norayai yáfaf, "Amaf, Efalo kwiyáto yénd, efogh yéna yéném ánde fémofem yau so yáwefnotati Afai yéné mband tunakfan o kété Jerusalemén. 22 Fém Samariamén ár yau mat em fémofem endefifi yáwefnotati, wénde yénd Ju ár mat yéném yéndfem ende yáwefnotam, ménamén wanjarégh siéném Ju árfeta. 23 Wénde efogh yéna yéném a té efogh nufar, ánde efalo wáwefnogh árém so yáwefnotat Afai ménaye Ngánján Mbérmbére a efaloe, ménamén ndené wáwefnogh árfaf Afé ménde fiyém. 24 Ngánján siyém Mbérmbér, yáne wáwefnogh árém so yáwefnotat Ngánján Mbérmbére a efaloe."
english: Jesus said to her , “ Woman , believe me , the hour is coming when neither in this mountain nor in Jerusalem will you worship the Father .
You worship that which you don’ t know . We worship that which we know ; for salvation is from the Jews .
But the hour comes , and now is , when the true worshipers will worship the Father in spirit and truth, for the Father seeks such to be his worshipers .
God is spirit , and those who worship him must worship in spirit and truth.”

nama: Amaf norayai, "Yénd mat wém ndené Keriso so yéném. Njam fá yéném so yénmawafene méinyotio yam téfeyot."
english: The woman said to him , “ I know that Messiah is coming , he who is called Christ . When he has come , he will declare to us all things .”

nama: Yesu nuwangoi, "Yénd faf wém, efe yénd norayan fefaf."
english: Jesus said to her , “ I am he , the one who speaks to you .”

nama: Yéné efghonyo, nénangoyénd Yesuene waitogh ár, a sélngwél emormén syinjoyénd amafofé skoraiwét. Wénde yau efe ámb namotai, "Némé ménde ném fém?" o "Némat fém norayet amafofé?"
english: Just then , his disciples came . They marveled that he was speaking with a woman ; yet no one said , “ What are you looking for ?” or , “ Why do you speak with her ?”

nama: Féyo amafom noroi yánjo nu séfkwén, néngangoi kétán tesenot a ewaufroi árét, 29 "Awe, téfandangi yéné ár emon waufrote méinyotio yam yéndon árké té tawafrotan. Mé té fá yém Keriso?" 30 Féyo fá néwanoyénd tesenta a tayotau kétán Yesuefaf.
english: So the woman left her water pot, went away into the city , and said to the people ,
“ Come , see a man who told me everything that I have done . Can this be the Christ ?”
They went out of the city , and were coming to him .

nama: Yéné efoghféneféneyan waitogh árém yémndayénd Yesu, "Watamegh ár, njamke ámb koneta!"
english: In the meanwhile , the disciples urged him , saying , “ Rabbi , eat .”

nama: Wénde fá norayai yéfefaf, "Tane té njamke yém nénet yéné árkémamén fém mat yau em."
english: But he said to them , “ I have food to eat that you don’ t know about .”

nama: Féyo waitogh ár kamotangi yéfenjo kénjún, "Mété emon táf yénmarsa yá njamke?"
english: The disciples therefore said to one another , “ Has anyone brought him something to eat ?”

nama: Yesu norayai, "Tane njamke yéné yém sái yáne ménde yafrotan emon kwémáfárete yénd a sái tifon yéné faiofnar ásáfogh árké té waramai ta wafroghét. 35 Fém túmén norayati, '4 ghérarero em kétán wau yu.' Yéndon ewaufrotan féfe, tasawérngi féfenjo ghékéf téfandangi ndau sifayé! Fá sem wau em ménát targhét. 36 A fá emon etane wau yuwon fai tawanangé a euménde njamke rokar ndené eumendat ár kétán tuot ghérsat, féyo ménát yégh téfnár a tarégh ár so áuwéghan ere mérne. 37 Ménamén si ndenáye yém efaloe, 'Ámb árom eite a ámb árom wéi etane.' 38 Yéndon tanwáfáretan fém ménát fraréghét yéné árkéménát fém yau kásáfotati; ámb árém té tafrotat táikér ásáfogh, a fémofem yéfandati frengégh yéfene ásáfoghta."
english: Jesus said to them , “ My food is to do the will of him who sent me and to accomplish his work .
Don’ t you say , ‘ There are yet four months until the harvest ’? Behold , I tell you , lift up your eyes and look at the fields , that they are white for harvest already .
He who reaps receives wages and gathers fruit to eternal life , that both he who sows and he who reaps may rejoice together .
For in this the saying is true , ‘ One sows , and another reaps .’
I sent you to reap that for which you haven’ t labored . Others have labored , and you have entered into their labor .”

nama: Tárfár Samariamén árém yéné tesenan efalo yiyátoyénd Yesu ménamén amafoene efalo simén, "Yémon kaufrote ta méinyotio yam némé yéndon té tawafrotan." 40 Féyo njam Samariamén ár enmormén yáfaf, yémofem yamnendayénd ámnjoghét yémafé, a Yesu yémorangérmén sómbio efogh kété. 41 Tárfáram mé yém efalo yiyátoyénd ménamén yánjo simén.
english: From that city many of the Samaritans believed in him because of the word of the woman , who testified , “ He told me everything that I have done .”
So when the Samaritans came to him , they begged him to stay with them . He stayed there two days .
Many more believed because of his word .

nama: Yémofem norayayénd amafofefaf, "Yéndfem yau efalo yiyátongém ménamén fémon némé noraya; sénonjo yéndio téfé náyáretam, a yénd mat yéném ndené yéné ár efalo fété yém mband maratoene Wanjarégh ár. Yesum mer yiyátoi gafaman ásáfogh ároene ambum
english: They said to the woman , “ Now we believe , not because of your speaking ; for we have heard for ourselves, and know that this is indeed the Christ, the Savior of the world .”

nama: Sómbio efogh soramé Yesu nuwanoi a yéngmormén kétán Galili yuwot. 44 Té Yesu fáyo norayai, "Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár sem yau eutémndat yéfenjo yuwon." 45 Njam fá nufaryéng Galili yuwot, árém kété yumyoyénd fá, ménamén fá té engmormén kétán Waingégh téméndfaf Jerusalemét a té téfandawét méinyotio yam némé yémon tafrotau téméndfaf.
english: After the two days he went out from there and went into Galilee .
For Jesus himself testified that a prophet has no honor in his own country .
So when he came into Galilee , the Galileans received him , having seen all the things that he did in Jerusalem at the feast , for they also went to the feast .

nama: Féyo Yesu néngangoi kétán Kana Galili yu kénjút, ánde yémon té yengoi nu wéri nuot. Warsagh ároene ásáfogh ár kété témorwén endene ambum enjne témorwén Káfenamén. 47 Njam yéné árom náyárai nde Yesu té nufar Galili yuwot kétamé Judiata, fá yéngmormén kétán yáfaf a yamnendai Yesu ménát sái téngmorwén kétán a mer tiyátongai yáne ambum, efe témorwén kaka krotro.
english: Jesus came therefore again to Cana of Galilee , where he made the water into wine . There was a certain nobleman whose son was sick at Capernaum .
When he heard that Jesus had come out of Judea into Galilee , he went to him and begged him that he would come down and heal his son , for he was at the point of death.

nama: Yesu norayai yáfaf, "Emon ámb yau efalo so tiyáto táfandro fémon sái yéfanda ufarogh yam a sélngwélafé yam."
english: Jesus therefore said to him , “ Unless you see signs and wonders , you will in no way believe .”

nama: Gafaman ásáfogh ár nuwangoi, "Ndimbal, awe yéndfé mété táf tane ambum kér yém."
english: The nobleman said to him , “ Sir , come down before my child dies.”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Nguwano; fene ambum so ghérsé yém."
english: Jesus said to him , “ Go your way . Your son lives .” The man believed the word that Jesus spoke to him , and he went his way .

nama: Njam mé téngmorwén endmé, yánjo faiofnar ásáfogh árém yéfángoyénd fá yéné ghanyafé ndené yáne ghakér ambum ghérsé mé yém. 52 Yémon emotai fá árké efghe namndai mer, yémofem yawangoyénd, "Wawenagh enjneyam yéfrongé fá káye séite táf wan aklok."
english: As he was going down , his servants met him and reported , saying “ Your child lives !”
So he inquired of them the hour when he began to get better . They said therefore to him , “ Yesterday at the seventh hour , the fever left him .”

nama: Féyo yárefé nawafarotai nde yéné efghe fifi Yesum yémndai, "Fene ambum so ghérsé yém." Féyo fá a yánjo méinyotio mérén efalo yiyátoyénd Yesu.
english: So the father knew that it was at that hour in which Jesus said to him , “ Your son lives .” He believed , as did his whole house .

nama: Yéné yémormén sómbiomén ufarogh yam Yesum árké yafrotam soramé táf sinmormén Judiata kétán Galili yuwot.
english: This is again the second sign that Jesus did , having come out of Judea into Galilee .

nama: Yéné soramé, Yesu yéngmormén kétán Jerusalem ménát ámb Ju árfene témndot. 2 Sifafene sésafne kaka kété Jerusalem kénjún kété témorwén némbne arakaf, yéné árké yémndetat Ibru sie Betsaida a 5 rautoghkaf kitarékitaré méngo warengéghkaf tamorwén. 3 Yéné rautoghkaf kitarékitaré méngomé minde tárfár tákmangérwén-ghékéf kwéfkwéf ár, wawér enjne ár a aknyégh ár. 4 Njafar si résagh so ngéwérngai nu yékwfaf ámb efghon a térmenau nu. Njam yéné kufrotau, méinyotio enjne téfnár kufngongayénd némbne arakaffaf égharghét. Fronde ár efe kuwarngai némbne arakaffaf mer kamndangai, némé enjnefé njam témorwén.{p{ ...f* {p{5.4 Yéné siménj yau Joném yéfarote, wénde ámb watamegh ár nemnat yéné ende.
english: After these things , there was a feast of the Jews , and Jesus went up to Jerusalem .
Now in Jerusalem by the sheep gate, there is a pool , which is called in Hebrew , “Bethesda”, having five porches .
In these lay a great multitude of those who were sick , blind , lame , or paralyzed, waiting for the moving of the water;
for an angel went down at certain times into the pool and stirred up the water. Whoever stepped in first after the stirring of the water was healed of whatever disease he had.

nama: Ár ámb kété témorwén efe 38 yunjéf témorwén enjne. 6 Njam Yesum yinjoi fá stékmangérwén kété a mat namndai ndené fá yéné enjne kértayan stémorwén yu tombé, yémon yémndai fá, "Té fém ménde ném sái mer kamndé?"
english: A certain man was there who had been sick for thirty-eight years .
When Jesus saw him lying there , and knew that he had been sick for a long time , he asked him , “ Do you want to be made well ?”

nama: Enjne téfnár nuwangoi, "Ndimbal, tayot efe ámb yau yém ménát yénd sái wáutána némbne sawét égharghét táf njam nu narémne. Njam yénd yéta kufngon kétán sái kégharén, ámb ár frondeyo táf nguwarngé."
english: The sick man answered him , “ Sir , I have no one to put me into the pool when the water is stirred up , but while I ’m coming , another steps down before me .”

nama: Féyo Yesu norayai yáfaf, "Kano! Tékaf fenjo yame a áligh." 9 Táf fété ár mer namndai; yémon yékafai yánjo yame a nuwanoi.
english: Jesus said to him , “ Arise , take up your mat , and walk .”
Immediately , the man was made well , and took up his mat and walked . Now that day was a Sabbath .

nama: féyo Ju sénko árém norayayénd yéné ároefaf efe té mer yiyátoi, "Yéné siyém Safat; yéné siyém téfene nákan fémon yau so yérse fenjo yame."
english: So the Jews said to him who was cured , “ It is the Sabbath . It is not lawful for you to carry the mat .”

nama: Wénde fá nuwangoi, "Ár emon yénd mer wiyáto wémnde yénd, 'Tékaf fenjo yame a kuwano.'
english: He answered them , “ He who made me well said to me , ‘ Take up your mat and walk .’ ”

nama: Féyo yémofem yémotayénd fá, "Efe yéné ár yém emon némnde fém kafghét a álighét?"
english: Then they asked him , “ Who is the man who said to you , ‘ Take up your mat and walk ’ ?”

nama: Ár efe té mer namndai yau mat témorwén efe témorwén, ménamén Yesu té wékeyero yéngmormén ár mérén kénjút kété stamorwén.
english: But he who was healed didn’ t know who it was , for Jesus had withdrawn, a crowd being in the place .

nama: Soramé Yesum yinjoi fá kété wáwefnogh méngo sifayan a norayai yáfaf, "Téfanda, fém sném merot té nango. Kékmbo yaufiyam wafrogh o minde mámáfi mété nufrota fefaf." 15 Yéné ár néngwanoi a ewaufroi Ju sénko árét ndené Yesum mer yiyátoi fá. Ambumoene muyé
english: Afterward Jesus found him in the temple and said to him , “ Behold , you are made well . Sin no more , so that nothing worse happens to you .”
The man went away, and told the Jews that it was Jesus who had made him well .

nama: Féyo ménamén Yesum tawafrotau yéné yam Safatan yénémamén Ju sénko árém tusérmbotawét fá. 17 Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Tane Afé siyém túmén násáfote, a yénd wéi so fété násáfotan." 18 Yéné téfnan ndimbal kéráye térametawét ménát sái tésmetawét fá; yau ménaménro wéi yémon kés táráfnau Safat nák wénde té yémon korayau nde Ngánján yáne Afé témorwén a yéné ende té náyátoi fáyo ámb rérero Ngánjánafé.
english: For this cause the Jews persecuted Jesus and sought to kill him , because he did these things on the Sabbath .
But Jesus answered them , “ My Father is still working , so I am working , too.”
For this cause therefore the Jews sought all the more to kill him , because he not only broke the Sabbath , but also called God his own Father , making himself equal with God .

nama: Yesum ewaramai yéfe yéné uwangogh, "Yéndon ewaufrotan efaloe ndené Ambumom yau so némé yafrote yambiyaye, yémon so yénaro ewafrote némé yémon efande Afam árké ewafrote, ménamén némé njam Afam yafrota wéi Ambumom fété so yafrote. 20 Ménamén Afam yuwete Ambum a yauyafote yá méinyotio yémon némé ewafrote. A Afam so yauyafote ndimbal yam yémo sái ewafrota, árkéménayam so yáinde ásáfogh yémo árké té ewafrote, a fém so sélngwél em. 21 Ndené fété Afam kés ewanote kér ár a tawaramangé yéfe ghérsé, ndenéyameyo Ambumom tawaramangé ghérsé yéfeyot yáne ménde endefaf em. 22 Ménamén Afam yau mogh yam yafrote endefaf, wénde té yéramai méinyotio mogh yam kétán Ambumoefaf, 23 ménát méinyotio árém so yutémndat Ambum ndené fété yémofem kés yutémndat Afé. Emon njam yau yutémnda Ambum yau yutémnde Afé, emon yénmáfáretam fá.
english: Jesus therefore answered them , “Most certainly , I tell you , the Son can do nothing of himself , but what he sees the Father doing . For whatever things he does , these the Son also does likewise .
For the Father has affection for the Son , and shows him all things that he himself does . He will show him greater works than these , that you may marvel .
For as the Father raises the dead and gives them life , even so the Son also gives life to whom he desires .
For the Father judges no one , but he has given all judgment to the Son ,
that all may honor the Son , even as they honor the Father . He who doesn’ t honor the Son doesn’ t honor the Father who sent him .

nama: Yéndon ewaufrotan féfe efalo, emon njam káyárangé tane si a efalo tiyátongé fá emon kwénmáfárete yénd yéfe so yém tuot ghérsé a yau so em moghan wénde té néférmangi kérta kétán ghérsat. 25 Yéndon ewaufrotan féfe efalo, efogh yéna yéném a té efogh nufar ánde so kér ár káyárangi Ngánjánene Ambumoene kém a emofem njam káyárangi, fá so ghérsafé kénáyátongi. 26 Ndené fété Afafaf kés yém ghérsé yánjo kénjún, ndenéyameyo yémon té yaramai Ambumoe ménát Ambumoefaf so yém ghérsé yánjo kénjún. 27 A yémon té yaramai yá muyé moghét ménamén fá siyém Ároene Ambum.
english: “ Most certainly I tell you , he who hears my word and believes him who sent me has eternal life , and doesn’ t come into judgment , but has passed out of death into life .
Most certainly I tell you , the hour comes , and now is , when the dead will hear the Son of God ’s voice ; and those who hear will live .
For as the Father has life in himself , even so he gave to the Son also to have life in himself .
He also gave him authority to execute judgment , because he is a son of man .

nama: Yau táf sélngwélam erameta yénémamén, ménamén efogh yéna yéném ánde méinyotio efe em mbéwé méngo kénjún so káyárangi yáne kém, 29 a so nénurtotat yéfenjo mbéwata: fá emofem mer té tafrotat fá so nanotat ghérsat, a fá emofem tafrotat yaufi fá so nanotat a tákmangé kérot. 30 Yéndon féyotarofnar wém wafroghét tanjo muyayé yéndon mogh yafrotan yénaro Ngánjánam ndernáye kwémndangé yénd, yénémamén tane mogh siyém mbarkánd, ménamén yéndon yau yafrotan tanjo ménde wénde yáne emon wénmáfáretam yénd. Efalo si afrogh Yesuenemén
english: Don’ t marvel at this , for the hour comes in which all who are in the tombs will hear his voice
and will come out ; those who have done good , to the resurrection of life ; and those who have done evil , to the resurrection of judgment .
I can of myself do nothing . As I hear, I judge ; and my judgment is righteous , because I don’ t seek my own will , but the will of my Father who sent me .

nama: "Yénd njam nafrotan tanjomén, árém so nemnat ndené tane si yau efalo témorwén. 32 Wénde ámb ár yéna yém efe nafrote tane téfnan, a yénd mat wém ndené fá némé noraye tanemén siyém efalo.
english: “ If I testify about myself , my witness is not valid.
It is another who testifies about me . I know that the testimony which he testifies about me is true .

nama: Fémofem té téngwáfáretati si résagh ár kétán Jonefaf a yémon té norayai efalomén. 34 Yau wénde yénd námyotan árfene afroghfaf; wénde yénd norayan yéné ménát fém so wanjarégham tawanangé. 35 Jon témorwén lambefanit kánetau a kálálau kwayaghé, a fém kámyotawét tekofnar wayamneghét yáne kwayaghayan.
english: You have sent to John , and he has testified to the truth.
But the testimony which I receive is not from man . However , I say these things that you may be saved .
He was the burning and shining lamp , and you were willing to rejoice for a while in his light .

nama: Wénde yénd so norayan tanjomén ámbmén árkéméné so yáinde Jonene si, ménamén yéndon té tawafrotan némé Afam waramai wafroghét, a yéné yam árkéméné yéndon ewaufrotan efaloe si afrogh ndené Afam yénd fété kwénmáfárete. 37 A Afé, emon kwénmáfárete yénd, wéi efalo si nafrote tanemén. Fémofem té yaufifi káyáretati yáne kém a yaufifi téfandati yáne sáf, 38 a yau yáne si féfene tikfan yém, ménamén fémofem yau efalo yiyátotati fá efe yémon ténmáfárete. 39 Fémofem yaftati Buk si merkéráye, ménamén fém nemnati ndené yéné kénjún fémofem so tinjongi tuot ghérsé. Yéné Buk si noraye tanemén! 40 Wénde fém nakenati tafaf sái eném ménát tuot ghérsé résaghét.
english: But the testimony which I have is greater than that of John ; for the works which the Father gave me to accomplish , the very works that I do , testify about me , that the Father has sent me .
The Father himself , who sent me , has testified about me . You have neither heard his voice at any time , nor seen his form .
You don’ t have his word living in you , because you don’ t believe him whom he sent .
“ You search the Scriptures , because you think that in them you have eternal life ; and these are they which testify about me .
Yet you will not come to me , that you may have life .

nama: Yénd yau néretan kétán árfene áuwéghfaf. 42 Wénde yénd mat wém féfenemén, yénd mat wém ndené féfefaf yau yém Ngánjánene uwégh féfene tikfan. 43 Yénd té kwéném tane Afane yétkwénan, a fémofem yénd yau wumyongi; wénde njam efe yéném fá yánjo yétkwénan, fémofem so tumyongi fá. 44 Fém ménde em fémro-fémro sái náuwetati. Árkéménáyam eméinde áuwéghét. Wénde fémofem yau ewafrotati meryam ménát efe fáro yém Ngánjánamro sái euwete fém. Yéné téfnan fémofem yau so efalo wiyátotati.
english: I don’t receive glory from men.
But I know you , that you don’ t have God ’ s love in yourselves .
I have come in my Father ’s name , and you don’ t receive me . If another comes in his own name , you will receive him .
How can you believe , who receive glory from one another , and you don’ t seek the glory that comes from the only God ?

nama: Wénde yéndo yau so témndan Afé ndené fémofem té yarsotangi. Yau ndené nemnati yéndo so yafrotan yéné. Yau, fá yémormén Moses emo so yafrote yéné. Fém kamnang em ndené Moses kar yém emo so ewáutáne féfe. Wénde fá yéné yém emo so tayauyafongé féfene awarsénégh. 46 Njam té efalo tiyátongayénd Moses, fémofem so efalo kwiyátongayénd yénd, ménamén yémon yéfarotam tanemén. 47 Wénde ndené yau kés kor yiyátotati némé yémon yéfarotam, ndernáye wéi so fémofem efalo tiyátongi némé yénd norayan?
english: “Don’ t think that I will accuse you to the Father . There is one who accuses you , even Moses , on whom you have set your hope .
For if you believed Moses , you would believe me ; for he wrote about me .
But if you don’ t believe his writings , how will you believe my words ?”

nama: Yéné soramé kétamé Yesu néférmai kétán nayu arakaf téndot Galili arakafan, árkéméné yém Tiberias Arakaf. 2 A ndimbal ár mérnam táitotawét fá, ménamén yémofem té téfandawét yáne wafroghyam tawafrotau táf mer stayátotau fá efe enjne tamorwén. 3 Yesu néwanoi mband tunakfot a námnjoyénd yémafé yánjo waitogh árfé. 4 Ju árfene Waingégh témndot kaka témorwén.
english: After these things , Jesus went away to the other side of the sea of Galilee , which is also called the Sea of Tiberias .
A great multitude followed him , because they saw his signs which he did on those who were sick.
Jesus went up into the mountain , and he sat there with his disciples .
Now the Passover , the feast of the Jews , was at hand .

nama: Yesu néngretai a ewinjoi ndimbal mérén tanmorwén yáfaf, féyo yémotai Filif, "Ánde yéndfem so tawanangém féyotaroan njamke ménát sái emanjnam méinyotio yéné ár?" 6 Yémon norayai yéné ménát Filif yufotam, wénde fá mat témorwén némé yémon so tafrotau.
english: Jesus therefore , lifting up his eyes and seeing that a great multitude was coming to him , said to Philip , “ Where are we to buy bread, that these may eat ?”
He said this to test him , for he himself knew what he would do .

nama: Filifém yawangoi, "Ménát méinyotio árém sái némbnare tánetangi, ndenanit yém ndené 200 Denarion{q{ ...f* {q{6.7 200 Denarion Yéné siyém 200 efoghmén fai , árké em 200 efoghmén fai so tawanangayénd flawé ménát sái féyotaro yém."
english: Philip answered him , “ Two hundred denarii worth of bread is not sufficient for them , that every one of them may receive a little .”

nama: Ámb yáne waitogh ár, Endru, efe Saimon Fitane yánngén, norayai, 9 "Ghakér ambum siyém yéna endefaf em 5 féskaf flawé a sómbio némbnar wagif. Wénde yéné yau féyotaro so em yéné ár tárfárét.
english: One of his disciples , Andrew, Simon Peter ’s brother, said to him ,
“ There is a boy here who has five barley loaves and two fish , but what are these among so many ?”

nama: Yesu norayai, "Tamndangi ár ámnjoghét." Kété yéné sifayé témorwén yusafé ámnjoghét, féyo méinyotio ár námnjoyénd, ndené 5,000 ár ghakér ár mérénfaf. 11 Yesum ewerai féskaf flawé, yaramai kánjo Ngánjáne a tawawaftau árét efe tamorangérwén kété. Ndenéyameyo tawawaftau wagif, a yémofem méinyotio yam enetaménd kétán fá nderé ménde tamorwén.
english: Jesus said , “ Have the people sit down.” Now there was much grass in that place . So the men sat down, in number about five thousand .
Jesus took the loaves, and having given thanks , he distributed to the disciples , and the disciples to those who were sitting down , likewise also of the fish as much as they desired .

nama: Njam fá méinyotio eremngoi néneyan, Yesu norayai yánjo waitogh árfefaf, "Takafetangi a taumendangi mbarmbar. Yau némé ámb so ewaghnam." 13 Féyo yémofem eumendaménd méinyotio a ewafoyénd 12 mbaf yáf ménaye mbarmbar árkéméné nafrangoyénd 5 flawata árém árké enetaménd.
english: When they were filled , he said to his disciples , “ Gather up the broken pieces which are left over , that nothing be lost.”
So they gathered them up , and filled twelve baskets with broken pieces from the five barley loaves, which were left over by those who had eaten.

nama: Téfandawét yéné fénataye yam wafrogh Yesum árké yafrotam, ár kété norayayénd, "Efalo fété yéné siyém Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár efe so ténmorwén mband maratot!" 15 Yesu mat namndai nde yémofem mwighaye tékwnawét fá ménát warsagh ár sái tiyátongayénd yéfenjo méndeye féyo fá néngwanoi wéikor mband tunakfot yambia. Yesu tiotau nu tukmé
english: When therefore the people saw the sign which Jesus did , they said , “ This is truly the prophet who comes into the world .”
Jesus therefore , perceiving that they were about to come and take him by force to make him king , withdrew again to the mountain by himself .

nama: Njam séite nawerai, yáne waitogh ár engmormén kétán sawét, 17 kété fá nuflayénd boutan, a néngangoyénd witmé karéf arakaf Káfenamét. Sémbár yéfertai, a Yesu yau somé nufaryéng yéfefaf. 18 Féyo ndimbal mbormbor téfnjau a nu namndai manumanuafé. 19 Njam waitogh ár ngarayawét 5 o 6 kilomité nayu, yémofem yinjoyénd Yesu ténmorwén nu tukmé álighe bout kaka tényátoyau; a fá semormén férfér. 20 Yesum emndai fá, "Yau férfér em; yénd wém." 21 Féyo fá áuwéghafé tamorwén Yesu yaflayénd boutot, a táf fété bout néngaméghai tunat ándan fá tayotau. Árém téronjawét Yesu
english: When evening came , his disciples went down to the sea .
They entered into the boat , and were going over the sea to Capernaum . It was now dark , and Jesus had not come to them .
The sea was tossed by a great wind blowing .
When therefore they had rowed about twenty-five or thirty stadia, they saw Jesus walking on the sea and drawing near to the boat ; and they were afraid .
But he said to them , “ It is I . Don’ t be afraid .”
They were willing therefore to receive him into the boat . Immediately the boat was at the land where they were going .

nama: Yénamayo efghon ár mérén árké té efrangoyénd kété arakaf witmé karfan mat namndayénd ndené ámbiro boutro kété témorwén. Fá mat tamorwén ndené Yesu yau nuflai kété yánjo waitogh árfé, wénde yáne waitogh ár nuwanoyénd yéfembia yémafé yau. 23 Féyo ámb bout tamorwén Tiberiasmén nénamghayénd kaka kété yéné sifayafaf ánde árém tánetawét féskaf flawé yéné soramé Yuram njam kánjo yangoi. 24 Njam yéné ár mérnam mat namndayénd ndené Yesu a yáne waitogh ár yau tamorwén kété, fá nuflitaménd yéné boutamé a engmormén kétán Káfenamét Yesue ronjaghét. Ghérsé féskaf flawé Yesu
english: On the next day , the multitude that stood on the other side of the sea saw that there was no other boat there , except the one in which his disciples had embarked, and that Jesus hadn’ t entered with his disciples into the boat , but his disciples had gone away alone .
However, boats from Tiberias came near to the place where they ate the bread after the Lord had given thanks .
When the multitude therefore saw that Jesus wasn’ t there , nor his disciples , they themselves got into the boats and came to Capernaum , seeking Jesus .

nama: Njam yémofem yinjoyénd Yesu kété arakaf witmé karfan, yémofem yémotayénd fá, "Watamegh ár, njam fém nufar yénan?"
english: When they found him on the other side of the sea , they asked him , “ Rabbi , when did you come here ?”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Yéndon ewaufrotan efaloe, fémofem yénd wéronjati, yau ménamén fémofem tafandati ufarogh yam yéndo tawafrotan wénde ménamén fémofem enetaménd féskaf flawé a fém eremngoi. 27 Yau táf násáfotati ménát njamket árkéméné so kamndangé yaufi, wénde násáfotati yéné njamket árkéméné nakete tuot ghérsat, árkéméné Ároene Ambumom so tawaramangé féfe. Ménamén yáfaf Afé Ngánjánam té yéfrendai yánjo efalo yátogh.
english: Jesus answered them , “ Most certainly I tell you , you seek me , not because you saw signs , but because you ate of the loaves and were filled .
Don’ t work for the food which perishes, but for the food which remains to eternal life , which the Son of Man will give to you . For God the Father has sealed him .”

nama: Féyo yémofem yémotayénd Yesu, "Némé yéndfem so yafrotam ménát sái yafrotam némé Ngánjánene ménde yém téfeyot wafroghét?"
english: They said therefore to him , “ What must we do , that we may work the works of God ?”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Némé ménde Ngánján yém féfeyot wafroghét siyém efalo tiyátongi fá efe yémon ténmáfárete."
english: Jesus answered them , “ This is the work of God , that you believe in him whom he has sent .”

nama: Féyo yémofem yémotayénd Yesu, "Némé ufarogh yam so fémon yafrote ménát yéndfem sái tinjongém yéné a efalo kényátongém fém? Némé so fémon yafrote? 31 Téfene ákifem yénetaménd mana kété fanfne yuwon, ndené fété kés yéfarotaménd: 'Yémon ewaramai yéfe njafarmén féskaf flawé nénet.'"
english: They said therefore to him , “ What then do you do for a sign , that we may see and believe you ? What work do you do ?
Our fathers ate the manna in the wilderness . As it is written , ‘ He gave them bread out of heaven to eat .’”

nama: Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Yéndon ewaufrotan féfe efalo, némé Mosesém ewaramai féfe yau njafarmén féskaf flawé, wénde tane Afam ewaramete féfe efalo féskaf flawé njafarmén. 33 Ménamén Ngánjánene féskaf flawé fá yém efe yénmewéryéng kétándmé njafarta a ghérsé yéramete kétán mband maratot."
english: Jesus therefore said to them , “ Most certainly , I tell you , it wasn’ t Moses who gave you the bread out of heaven , but my Father gives you the true bread out of heaven .
For the bread of God is that which comes down out of heaven and gives life to the world .”

nama: Fá norayayénd, "Ndimbal, túmén yénmarameta téfe yéné féskaf flawé."
english: They said therefore to him , “ Lord , always give us this bread.”

nama: Féyo Yesum ewaufroi yéfe, "Yénd wém ghérsé féskaf flawé. Fá efe eném tafaf yaufifi so siogh em; fá emofem efalo wiyátotat fá yau so nuam efinde. 36 Wénde ndené fété yéndon kés tawaufrotan, fémofem té kwéfandati yénd wénde yau efalo wiyátongi. 37 Méinyotio efe Afam waramete ta so eném tafaf, a efe njam eném tafaf yaufifi so ewifnan. 38 Ménamén yénd té néneworyén njafarta yau ménát tanjo ménde wafroghét wénde ménát sái yafrotan yáne ménde emon kwénmáfárete. 39 A yéné féyém yáne ménde emon kwénmáfárete yénd, ndené yéndon yau so ámbiro yétarnan kétamé méinyotio Afam árké té waram ta wénde fá so tawanon kérta kerker efghon. 40 Ménamén tane Afane ménde ndené yém méinyotio ár efe néretat kétán Ambumefaf a yiyátotat efalo fá so em tuot ghérsafé, a yéndon so tawanon kérta kerker efghon."
english: Jesus said to them , “ I am the bread of life . Whoever comes to me will not be hungry , and whoever believes in me will never be thirsty .
But I told you that you have seen me , and yet you don’t believe .
All those whom the Father gives me will come to me . He who comes to me I will in no way throw out .
For I have come down from heaven , not to do my own will , but the will of him who sent me .
This is the will of my Father who sent me , that of all he has given to me I should lose nothing , but should raise him up at the last day .
This is the will of the one who sent me , that everyone who sees the Son and believes in him should have eternal life ; and I will raise him up at the last day .”

nama: Ju ár nufngoyénd áwátaranégh Yesuenemén ménamém fá norayai ndené, "Yénd wém féskaf flawé árkéméné nénewor njafarta." 42 Fá norayayénd, "Yéné ár fiyém Yesu, Josefene ambum, endene afé a amé yénd mat yéném. Ndernáye fá noraye sénonjo, 'Yénd néneworyén kétándmé njafarta?"
english: The Jews therefore murmured concerning him , because he said , “ I am the bread which came down out of heaven .”
They said , “Isn’ t this Jesus , the son of Joseph , whose father and mother we know ? How then does he say , ‘ I have come down out of heaven ’?”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Kékmbongi áwátaranégh féfenjo kénjún. 44 Yau efe ámb mé so yéném tafaf táfandro Afam emon yénd kwénmáfárete so yénémnje tafaf, a yéndon so tawanon kérta kerker efghon. 45 Ámb Ngánjánene mat yátogh árém té yéfarotaménd, 'Méinyotio ár so ewatamete Ngánjánam.'{r{ ...f* {r{6.45 Aisaya 54:13
english: Therefore Jesus answered them , “Don’t murmur among yourselves.
No one can come to me unless the Father who sent me draws him ; and I will raise him up in the last day .
It is written in the prophets , ‘ They will all be taught by God .’ Therefore everyone who hears from the Father and has learned , comes to me .

nama: Emo yau ámb yinjoi Afé mé yémonro efe yém Ngánjáneta; mé yémonro té yinjoi Afé. 47 Yéndon ewaufrotan féfe efalofifi, yémo emon efalo tiyátongé yém tuot ghérsafé. 48 Yénd swém ghérsé féskaf flawé. 49 Féfene ákifem enetaménd mana kété fanfne yuwon, wénde fá kér emormén. 50 Wénde yéné féskaf flawé siyém árké nénewor kétándmé njafarta, árkéméné so árém enetat a yau so kér em. 51 Yénd swém ghérsé féskaf flawé árkéméné néneworyéng njafarta. Emon yéneta yéné féskaf flawé so nakete tuot. Yéné féskaf flawé siyém tane fifi, árkéméné yéndon so tawaraman ménát mband maratoe ghérsé akeghét.
english: Not that anyone has seen the Father , except he who is from God . He has seen the Father .
Most certainly , I tell you , he who believes in me has eternal life .
I am the bread of life .
Your fathers ate the manna in the wilderness and they died .
This is the bread which comes down out of heaven , that anyone may eat of it and not die.
I am the living bread which came down out of heaven . If anyone eats of this bread, he will live forever . Yes , the bread which I will give for the life of the world is my flesh .”

nama: Féyo Ju ár nufngoyénd éwigh tékrátaye yéfenjo kénjún, "Ndernáye so yéné árom ténmaramangé téfe yánjo fifi ménát nénet?"
english: The Jews therefore contended with one another , saying , “ How can this man give us his flesh to eat ?”

nama: Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Yéndon ewaufrotan féfe efalo, yau njam fémofem yénetati Ároene Ambumoene fifi a yénetati yáne férék, fém yau ghérsafé em féfenjo kénjún. 54 Emon njam té yéneta tane fifi a tane férék so tuot ghérsafé yém, a yéndon so tawanon kérta kerker efghon. 55 Ménamén tane fifi siyém efalo njamke a tane férék siyém efalo nu nénet. 56 Emofem yenetat tane fifi a tane férék fá so tane kénjún em, a yénd yéfene kénjún. 57 Ndené fété ghérsé Afam kwénmáfárete yénd a yénd naketan ménamén Afanemén, féyo emon wéneta yénd so fá nakete ménamén tanemén. 58 Yéné fiyém féskaf flawé árkéméné néneworyéng kétándmé njafarta. Féfene ákifem enetaménd mana a kér emormén, wénde fá emo yenete yéné féskaf flawé so nakete tuot." 59 Yesum norayam yéné táf watameghan áumengégh méngon Káfenamén. Tárfár waitogh árém yéfrangoyénd Yesu
english: Jesus therefore said to them , “Most certainly I tell you , unless you eat the flesh of the Son of Man and drink his blood, you don’ t have life in yourselves .
He who eats my flesh and drinks my blood has eternal life , and I will raise him up at the last day .
For my flesh is food indeed , and my blood is drink indeed .
He who eats my flesh and drinks my blood lives in me , and I in him .
As the living Father sent me , and I live because of the Father , so he who feeds on me will also live because of me .
This is the bread which came down out of heaven — not as our fathers ate the manna and died . He who eats this bread will live forever .”
He said these things in the synagogue , as he taught in Capernaum .

nama: Njam yéné náyáretaménd, tárfár yáne waitogh ár norayayénd, "Yéné siyém táikér watamegh. Efe so náyárete yéné sifaf?"
english: Therefore many of his disciples , when they heard this , said , “ This is a hard saying ! Who can listen to it ?”

nama: Yesu mat namndai nde yáne waitogh ár káwatarnawét yénémamén a norayai yéfefaf, "Némé yéné yam fém eméinde ékmboghét ta waitoghét? 62 Ndernáye so yém táf fémofem njam tinjongi Ároene Ambum sái karmbongé kétán ánde fá témorwén fronde? 63 Ngánján Mbérmbéram yéramete ghérsé; fifioene wafté siyém fifiofnar. Si árké yénd té korayan féfefaf eném Ngánján Mbérmbérta a yéramete ghérsé. 64 Wénde fém ámb sem yau efalo yiyátotati." Yesu mat témorwén kétándmayo rényégh emofem yau efalo tiyátotawét a emo so sén téramangai fá. 65 A fá mé korayau, "Yénémamén yéndon tawaufrotan féfe nde yau ámb so yéném tafaf wénde táfandro Afam féyotaro táyátongé fá ménát wafroghét"
english: But Jesus knowing in himself that his disciples murmured at this , said to them , “ Does this cause you to stumble ?
Then what if you would see the Son of Man ascending to where he was before ?
It is the spirit who gives life . The flesh profits nothing . The words that I speak to you are spirit , and are life .
But there are some of you who don’ t believe .” For Jesus knew from the beginning who they were who didn’ t believe , and who it was who would betray him .
He said , “ For this cause I have said to you that no one can come to me , unless it is given to him by my Father .”

nama: Yénémamén tárfár yánjo waitogh ár nawengoyénd sémta a yau táitotawét fá.
english: At this , many of his disciples went back and walked no more with him .

nama: Féyo Yesum emotai 12, "Fém ménde em frangoghét wéi?"
english: Jesus said therefore to the twelve , “ You don’ t also want to go away , do you ?”

nama: Saimon Fitam yawangoi yá, "Yuré, endefaf yénd so yéngém? Fém tuot ghérsé siafé ném. 69 Yéndfem efalo niyátotam a mat yéném ndené fém ném Njúnnjúnofnar Ár Ngánjáneta."
english: Simon Peter answered him , “ Lord , to whom would we go ? You have the words of eternal life .
We have come to believe and know that you are the Christ, the Son of the living God .”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Yéndon té ewaferyén fém 12. Wénde ámbiro yéna ném ndenanit Sáifér. 71 Fá korayau Judasenemén, Saimon Iskariotene ambum. Ndemamén fá témorwén 12 mén, soramé sén so téramangai fá.
english: Jesus answered them , “Didn’ t I choose you , the twelve , and one of you is a devil ?”
Now he spoke of Judas , the son of Simon Iscariot , for it was he who would betray him , being one of the twelve .

nama: Yéné soramé, Yesu karendau Galili yumé. Fá yau ménde témorwén Judiat sái tiotau ménamén Ju sénko ár ménde tamorwén yá ngiot. 2 Wénde kétándmé Ju árfene Méngoméngo Téménd kaka namndai, 3 Yesuene yánngnéfem yémndayénd ndené, "Koro yéné yu a kuwano Judiat, ménát fene waitogh árém kété so efandat fene wafroghyam. 4 Árém yau etnotat némé yémofem ewafrotat njam fá ménde em sái em mat yéfenjomén. Njam fémo ewafrota yéné yam, mband marat so yém mat fenemén." 5 Yau yánjoyo yánngnéfem efalo yiyátoyénd.
english: After these things , Jesus was walking in Galilee , for he wouldn’ t walk in Judea , because the Jews sought to kill him .
Now the feast of the Jews , the Feast of Booths , was at hand .
His brothers therefore said to him , “ Depart from here and go into Judea , that your disciples also may see your works which you do .
For no one does anything in secret while he seeks to be known openly . If you do these things , reveal yourself to the world .”
For even his brothers didn’ t believe in him .

nama: Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Tane efogh yau nawer; wénde féfene efogh túmén em frengéghkaf. 7 Mband maratam yau so méndméndat efande fém, wénde yénd méndméndafé wéfande, ménamén yénd nafrotan ndené yáne yam srem yaufi. 8 Fém téu engém yéné témndot. Yénd yau so wéngém yéné téméndfaf, ménamén tane efogh yau nawer tayot." 9 Yesu yéné si norayai, a Galili yu kénjún mé témorangérwén. Yesum tawatametau marataye wáwefnogh méngo sifayan
english: Jesus therefore said to them , “ My time has not yet come , but your time is always ready .
The world can ’ t hate you , but it hates me , because I testify about it , that its works are evil .
You go up to the feast . I am not yet going up to this feast , because my time is not yet fulfilled .”
Having said these things to them , he stayed in Galilee .

nama: Yéné soramé yánngnéf snéngwanoyénd téménd sifayat, Yesu wéi fété yéngmorméng, yau marataye, wénde átnoghe. 11 Téménd sifayé kénjún kété Yesu téronjawét Ju sénko árém a kamotawét, "Ánde yém fá?"
english: But when his brothers had gone up to the feast , then he also went up , not publicly , but as it were in secret .
The Jews therefore sought him at the feast , and said , “ Where is he ?”

nama: Mérén kénjún awawanjagh kété témorwén Yesuenemén.
english: There was much murmuring among the multitudes concerning him . Some said , “ He is a good man .” Others said , “ Not so , but he leads the multitude astray .”

nama: Emo yau marataye korayau ménamén fá férféram tafindau yéfenjo sénko árfenemén.
english: Yet no one spoke openly of him for fear of the Jews .

nama: Téménd njam néndkéfan náyátoi, Yesu nuwanoi wáwefnogh méngo sifayat a ewafngoi watamegh. 15 Ju sénko ár sélngwél emormén a norayayénd, "Ndernáye yéné ár minde mat yém táf nák skulot yau yiotam?"
english: But when it was now the middle of the feast , Jesus went up into the temple and taught .
The Jews therefore marveled , saying , “ How does this man know letters , having never been educated ?”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Yau tanjo watamegh yém, wénde kétándmé yéném emo wénmáfáretam. 17 Efe ménde yém wafroghét némé Ngánján ménde yém fá so mat yém ndené tane watamegh siyém Ngánjáne tambén o tanjo wafroghmén. 18 Fá efe norayat yéfenjo mwighé wutmanégh yénérsat yéfendio, wénde fá emofem yéronjat yéné wutmanégh emo fá ténmáfárete fá siyém efalo ár; kété yau unyégh yém yánemén. 19 Mosesém ewaramai nák féfefaf. Wénde emo yau tawarawene nák. Némamén fémofem wafngongi yénd ngiot?"
english: Jesus therefore answered them , “ My teaching is not mine , but his who sent me .
If anyone desires to do his will , he will know about the teaching , whether it is from God or if I am speaking from myself .
He who speaks from himself seeks his own glory , but he who seeks the glory of him who sent him is true , and no unrighteousness is in him .
Didn’ t Moses give you the law , and yet none of you keeps the law ? Why do you seek to kill me ?”

nama: Árém yawangoyénd, "Fefaf syém yaufi mbérmbér! Emo némafngo fém ngiot?"
english: The multitude answered, “ You have a demon ! Who seeks to kill you ?”

nama: Yesum emndai fá, "Yéndon tafrotan ámbiro sélngwélafé yam a fém méinyotio sunsun tam. 22 Ménamén Mosesém tamndangai fém féfenjo ambumafene ghéngan néfghét ndemamén efaloe yéné siyém yau Mosese tambén yém, wénde féfene ákiafene tambén, fémofem tafrotati ambum ghéngén néfghét Safatan. 23 Njam ghakér ambum ghéngan tanfangi Safatan ménát Mosesene nák yau so erafnat, némamén fém nékw em tafaf ménamén yéndon ároene fifi mer yiyáton Safatan? 24 Yau wafénmanégh farun yaman, wénde wafénmanégh merkéráye. Némé fá Keriso yém?
english: Jesus answered them , “ I did one work and you all marvel because of it .
Moses has given you circumcision ( not that it is of Moses , but of the fathers ), and on the Sabbath you circumcise a boy.
If a boy receives circumcision on the Sabbath , that the law of Moses may not be broken , are you angry with me because I made a man completely healthy on the Sabbath ?
Don’ t judge according to appearance , but judge righteous judgment .”

nama: Ámb ár Jerusalemmén korayawét, "Yéné ár fiyém efe ngiot yérametat. 26 Kéretangi! Fá noraye marataye, a némndafi si limángégh ár yau norayat yá tambén! O mété nemnat fá yém efalo Keriso. 27 Wénde Keriso njam yéném, efe ámb yau mat yém fá naimén yém. Wénde yénd méinyotio mat yéném árkamé yéné ár yéném."
english: Therefore some of them of Jerusalem said , “Isn’ t this he whom they seek to kill?
Behold , he speaks openly , and they say nothing to him . Can it be that the rulers indeed know that this is truly the Christ ?
However , we know where this man comes from , but when the Christ comes , no one will know where he comes from .”

nama: Yesum njamandio tawatametau wáwefnogh méngo sifayan, fá norayai marat kéme, "Fém matfifi té em yénd efe wém a árkamé wénmormén? Yénd yau wénmormén tanjo mwighé faroréghan. Wénde fá emo wénmáfáretam siyém efalo. Fém mat yau em fá, 29 wénde yénd mat fá wém, ménamén yénd wénmormén yá tambén a yémon yénd wénmáfáretam."
english: Jesus therefore cried out in the temple , teaching and saying , “ You both know me , and know where I am from . I have not come of myself , but he who sent me is true , whom you don’ t know .
I know him, because I am from him, and he sent me .”

nama: Féyo yémofem yéta werghét térametawét, wénde emo ámb yau ngángé efayoi yáfaf, ménamén yáne efogh somé yau nawer. 31 Wénde tárfár árém yéné mérén kénjún efalo fá yiyátoyénd. Fá norayayénd, "Yéné árém ewafrote minde tárfár sélngwélafé yam. Efaloe fá yém Keriso. Sélngwélafé yam yémo némé ewafrote ewainde ámb árfene. Wanjengégh árém engwáfáretaménd Yesue werghét
english: They sought therefore to take him ; but no one laid a hand on him , because his hour had not yet come .
But of the multitude , many believed in him . They said , “ When the Christ comes , he won’ t do more signs than those which this man has done , will he ?”

nama: Farasi árém eyárayénd ár mérén Yesuenemén káwáwanjawét yénémamén, féyo fá a limánégh ghéngén wárogh árém engwáfáretaménd ámb wanjengégh ár ménát yá werghét.
english: The Pharisees heard the multitude murmuring these things concerning him , and the chief priests and the Pharisees sent officers to arrest him .

nama: Yesu norayai, "Yénd fémofé so yéném némbne efoghfénefénetro, a yénd so wéi ngangon kétán emon yénd wénmáfáretam. 34 Fémofem yénd so kwéronjangi, wénde fémofem yau so kwinjongi yénd, ménamén fém yau kétán so engém yénd ánde so wém."
english: Then Jesus said , “ I will be with you a little while longer , then I go to him who sent me .
You will seek me and won’t find me . You can ’t come where I am .”

nama: Ju sénko ár namotayénd yéfenjo kénjúnro, "Fá ándan nufngo yéndfem fá yau sái tinjongém? Fá so nguwanongé kétán Grik tesenot kétán téfene ár kés emor, a so ewatamete Grikmén ár? 36 Fá ndené noraye yéndfem so yéronjam wénde yau so tinjongém fá, a yénd yau so kétán yénéngém fá ánde so yém. Némé yémo yésérmbne?" Ghérsé ramégh wérér nu
english: The Jews therefore said among themselves , “ Where will this man go that we won’ t find him ? Will he go to the Dispersion among the Greeks and teach the Greeks ?
What is this word that he said , ‘ You will seek me , and won’ t find me ;’ and ‘ Where I am , you can ’ t come ’ ?”

nama: Kété soramamén efghon ndimbalfifi témndan Yesu nokayoi a norayai marataye kéme, "Efe njam nuam néfinda, kénaf tafaf, 38 a emon njam efalo yénd kwiyátongé yémon so nu yénete. Ndené Buk si kés noraye, 'Ghérsé ramégh wérér nu so nasune yéfefaf kétándmé efalo árfene kénjúta.'" 39 Njam Yesu korayau yéné si, fá korayau ndené emofem efalo tiyátongi yémofem so tanangi Ngánján Mbérmbér. Yéné efghon Ngánján Mbérmbér yau yéramai yéfefaf, ménamén Yesu yau nénguyoi ndimbal kwayaghafaf. Afalogh ár kénjún
english: Now on the last and greatest day of the feast , Jesus stood and cried out , “ If anyone is thirsty , let him come to me and drink !
He who believes in me , as the Scripture has said , from within him will flow rivers of living water .”
But he said this about the Spirit , which those believing in him were to receive . For the Holy Spirit was not yet given, because Jesus wasn’ t yet glorified .

nama: Ámb árém mérén kénjún yiyárayénd fá korayau yéné a norayayénd, "Yéné ár siyém efalo yéné Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár!"
english: Many of the multitude therefore , when they heard these words , said , “ This is truly the prophet .”

nama: Ámb korayawét, "Fá siyém Keriso!"
english: Others said , “ This is the Christ .” But some said , “ What , does the Christ come out of Galilee ?

nama: Buk si noraye ndené Keriso so yém Deifidene ákimén a so náráfte Betliemén kété Deifid ánde témorangérwén." 43 Kété mwighayan afalogh tamorwén ár mérén kénjún Yesuenemén. 44 Ámb ár ménde tamorwén werghét, wénde emon yau ngángé efayoi yáfaf. Efalo yátoghofnar Ju sénko ár
english: Hasn’ t the Scripture said that the Christ comes of the offspring of David , and from Bethlehem, the village where David was ?”
So a division arose in the multitude because of him .
Some of them would have arrested him , but no one laid hands on him .

nama: Njam wanjengégh ár nénangoyénd, limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a Farasi árém emotayénd, "Némamén yau fémofem fyénémnjati fá?"
english: The officers therefore came to the chief priests and Pharisees ; and they said to them , “ Why didn’ t you bring him ?”

nama: Wanjengégh árém ewawangoyénd, "Efe ámb yau korayau ndené ende fá kés korayau!"
english: The officers answered, “ No man ever spoke like this man !”
