nama: Farasi árém emotayénd, "Yémo wéi té tawaweinde. 48 Yau ámb sénko ár o Farasi árém efalo yiyátoyénd fá? 49 Wénde yéné ár mérén yau mat em Mosesene nákmén. Fá sem Ngánjánene mogh mbanmbanan!"
english: The Pharisees therefore answered them , “ You aren’ t also led astray , are you ?
Have any of the rulers or any of the Pharisees believed in him ?
But this multitude that doesn’ t know the law is cursed .”

nama: Ámbiro Farasi ár kété témorwén fá Nikodimas, yéné ár efe yéngmormén a Yesu yinjoi fronde. Fá norayai kété ámb árfefaf, 51 "Téfene nákam yau yénmumyote nde ár kértat sái tékmangém, fronde so tiyárangém sian. Yau so yawaftam ámbro kétán mat kor kamndangém némé yam tawafrote."
english: Nicodemus ( he who came to him by night, being one of them ) said to them ,
“ Does our law judge a man unless it first hears from him personally and knows what he does ?”

nama: Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Nikodimas, fém wéi ném Galili yumén! Buk si tayamngota fém mat so kamndé ndené Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár yau kétándmé so yéném Galili yuta." 53 Méinyotio ár néngangotaménd méngot.{s{ ...f* {s{7.53 "Ámb matafé árém nemnat yéné si kété 7:53 kétán 8:11 Joném yau yéfarotam, wénde ámb árom yéfarotam soramayo."
english: They answered him , “ Are you also from Galilee ? Search and see that no prophet has arisen out of Galilee .”
Everyone went to his own house ,

nama: Wénde Yesu néngwanoi Olif Mband tunakfot. 2 Tándái ámb akwan fá yéngmormén wáwefnogh méngo sifayat. Tárfár ár yáfaf enmormén a Yesu námnjoi a watamegh ewafngoi. 3 Nák watamegh ár a Farasi ár yénémnjaménd amaf efe ewinjeyayénd ámb árofé efe yau yáne ár témorwén ár sáfan yakayoyénd. 4 Yémofem yémndayénd, "Watamegh ár, yéné amafom yafrote yaufi walot a yémofem yinjongi fá. 5 Mosesene nákam ndené yénmatamete, ndené sáfot amaf fiya wíme tafiyátotangi krot. Ndernáye so koraya?" 6 Yémofem ámogh si tarametawét ménát Yesu so terangayénd. Wénde Yesu náwefnoi a ngángaye farogh ewafngoi mbandan. 7 Njam yémofem mé témotawét fá, Yesu nokayoi a norayai yéfefaf, "Efe fém yaufiyam wafroghofnar ném tita fronde wím yáfaf." 8 Wéikor káwefnongé a mbandan afarogh kufnongé.
english: but Jesus went to the Mount of Olives .
Now very early in the morning , he came again into the temple , and all the people came to him . He sat down and taught them .
The scribes and the Pharisees brought a woman taken in adultery . Having set her in the middle ,
they told him , “ Teacher , we found this woman in adultery , in the very act .
Now in our law , Moses commanded us to stone such women . What then do you say about her ?”
They said this testing him , that they might have something to accuse him of . But Jesus stooped down and wrote on the ground with his finger .
But when they continued asking him , he looked up and said to them , “ He who is without sin among you , let him throw the first stone at her .”
Again he stooped down and wrote on the ground with his finger.

nama: Njam fá náyárayénd yéné si, fá méinyotio nofarnayénd, ámbiroámbiroero, ár ndimbal fronde a totér ár, kétánotio Yesufro efrangeyayénd amafofé mé tawakayarwén kété. 10 Yesu nokayoi a yémndai, "Amaf, ánde fá em? Efe ámb nafrango fe waghanghét?"
english: They , when they heard it , being convicted by their conscience , went out one by one , beginning from the oldest, even to the last . Jesus was left alone with the woman where she was , in the middle .
Jesus , standing up , saw her and said , “ Woman , where are your accusers ? Did no one condemn you ?”

nama: Amafom yawangoi, "Ámb ár yau yém, ndimbal." Yesum yémndai, "Yéndon wéi yau so némaghnan fém. Nguwano, wénde yaufi yau ewafrota wéikor" Yesu kwayaghé mband maratoe
english: She said , “ No one , Lord .” Jesus said , “ Neither do I condemn you . Go your way . From now on , sin no more .” + 8:11 NU includes John 7:53–John 8:11, but puts brackets around it to indicate that the textual critics had less confidence that this was original.

nama: Njam wéikor Yesu korayau árfefaf, fá ndené norayai, "Yénd wém kwayaghé mband maratoe. Emon kwénmaitongé yénd yau so yiote kwéfitayan a yáfaf so yém kwayaghé árké yém ghérsat."
english: Again , therefore , Jesus spoke to them , saying , “ I am the light of the world . He who follows me will not walk in the darkness , but will have the light of life .”

nama: Farasi ár norayayénd yáfaf, "Sénonjo fém té norayang fenjo yammén. Némé fém noraye muyafnar yém."
english: The Pharisees therefore said to him , “ You testify about yourself . Your testimony is not valid.”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Yau, ndemamén yénd norayan tanjomén, yénd némé norayan efalo yém, ménamén yénd mat wém árkamé yénd wénmormén a ándan yénd wiota. Fém mafina em yénd árkamé wénmormén a ándan yénd wiota. 15 Fémofem mogh tafrotati mbandoene ende yéndon yau yafnamotan mogh ámb ároefaf. 16 Wénde yéndo njam yafrotan mogh, tane mwighé wafrogh em efalo, ménamén yénd yau tambia wém; Afam emo yénd wénmáfáretam yéndfé yénre. 17 Kété yéfarotaménd féfene nákan ndené sómbio fandagh árém njam efalo tiatend, némé fá norayangénd yéné siyém efalo. 18 Yénd nafrotan tanjomén, a Afam emon yénd wénmáfáretam fá ndenáyo nafrote tanemén."
english: Jesus answered them , “ Even if I testify about myself , my testimony is true , for I know where I came from , and where I am going ; but you don’ t know where I came from , or where I am going .
You judge according to the flesh . I judge no one .
Even if I do judge , my judgment is true , for I am not alone , but I am with the Father who sent me .
It ’s also written in your law that the testimony of two people is valid.
I am one who testifies about myself , and the Father who sent me testifies about me .”

nama: Yémofem yémotayénd, "Ánde yém ferafé?" Yesum ewawangoi, "Fém mafina em tanemén o tane Afanemén. Fém njam mat em tanemén, fém mat so em Afanemén ndenáyo."
english: They said therefore to him , “ Where is your Father ?” Jesus answered , “ You know neither me nor my Father . If you knew me , you would know my Father also .”

nama: Yesum norayai méinyotio yéné si njam yémon tawatametau kété wáwefnogh méngo sifayan, kété yéné satayan ánde ramégh boks tékmangérwén. A emo yau yérai fá, ménamén yáne efogh yau somé nawerai. Fém yau kétán so engém yénd ándan wéngém
english: Jesus spoke these words in the treasury , as he taught in the temple . Yet no one arrested him , because his hour had not yet come .

nama: Wéi Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Yénd so kuwanongén; fémofem so wéronjati yénd, wénde fém so kér em féfenjo yaufiyan. Fém yau so engém kétán yénd ándan wéngém."
english: Jesus said therefore again to them , “ I am going away , and you will seek me , and you will die in your sins. Where I go , you can ’ t come .”

nama: Ndenaye Ju sénko ár norayayénd, "Fá norayai yénd yau so wéngém kétán fá ándan yéngém. Némé yéné sioene fifi yém, fáyo so násmete?"
english: The Jews therefore said , “ Will he kill himself , because he says , ‘ Where I am going , you can ’ t come ’ ?”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Fém sem yéné mband maratmén em yéné yuwan, wénde yénd swém tukmén wém. Fém sem yéné mband maratmén em, wénde yénd yau yéné mband maratmén wém. 24 Yénémamén yéndon fém té tamndetawén fém so kér em féfenjo yaufi kénjún. A fém so kér em féfenjo yaufi kénjún yau njam efalo yiyátotati ndené Yénd Wém Efe Yénd Wém."{t{ ...f* {t{8.24 Eksodés 3:14
english: He said to them , “ You are from beneath . I am from above. You are of this world . I am not of this world .
I said therefore to you that you will die in your sins; for unless you believe that I am he , you will die in your sins.”

nama: Yémofem yémotayénd fá, "Efe fém ném?"
english: They said therefore to him , “ Who are you ?” Jesus said to them , “ Just what I have been saying to you from the beginning.

nama: Tane em tárfár mogh féfefaf, árkéménayam so tákmangé kértat. Wénde emo yénd wénmáfáretam fá siyém efalo, a yéndon yaufrotan mband maratoe yénaro némé yéndon náyárayén yá tambén."
english: I have many things to speak and to judge concerning you . However, he who sent me is true ; and the things which I heard from him , these I say to the world .”

nama: Fá yau mat tamorwén ndené Yesu korayau Yárefanemén. 28 Féyo ndené norayai yéfefaf, "Njam fémofem tuyongi Ároene Ambum, fém so mat em ndené Yénd Wém Efe Yénd Wém; féyo fém so mat em ndené yéndon yau ewaufrotan tanjo muyaye, wénde yénd norayan mé yénaro Afam ndernáye wénémndetam siot. 29 Emon yénd wénmáfáretam fá siyém yéndfé yénré yémon yénd yau wéfrango tambia, ménamén yéndo túmén yáne ménde yawafrotan."
english: They didn’ t understand that he spoke to them about the Father .
Jesus therefore said to them , “ When you have lifted up the Son of Man , then you will know that I am he , and I do nothing of myself , but as my Father taught me , I say these things .
He who sent me is with me . The Father hasn’ t left me alone , for I always do the things that are pleasing to him .”

nama: Tárfár ár efe náyárayénd Yesu korayau yénémamén efalo yiyátoyénd fá. Efaloyam so yuwek kényátongé
english: As he spoke these things , many believed in him .

nama: Yesum ár emndai efe ndimbal mwighafé em yáfaf, "Fém njam námyotati tane watamegh sifaf, fém efalo tane waitogh ár so em; 32 fém mat so em efalo, a efaloyam so yuwek táyátongé."
english: Jesus therefore said to those Jews who had believed him , “ If you remain in my word , then you are truly my disciples .
You will know the truth, and the truth will make you free .”

nama: Fá néwangoyénd yáfaf, "Yénd siéném Ebraamene ákiambum, a yénd yau ténmorwén ámb ároene faiofnar ásáfogh ár. Ndernáye wét yém ndené fém kés noraye, 'Fém so káyátongi yuwek'?"
english: They answered him , “ We are Abraham’s offspring, and have never been in bondage to anyone . How do you say , ‘ You will be made free ’ ?”

nama: Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Yéndon emndetan efaloe: méinyotio ár emon yaufiyam sái yafrota fá siyém yaufiyamoene faiofnar ásáfogh ár yém. 35 Faiofnar ásáfogh ároene ambino sifayé yau yém mérén kénjún, wénde ambum yéné mérénmén fifi yém tuot. 36 Féyo Ambumom njam yuwek kényátongé, fém fété so yuwek kamndé. 37 Yénd mat wém ndené fém sem Ebraamene áki mérén. Wénde fémofem ngiot wérametati yénd, ménamén tane si yau féfene tikfan em. 38 Yéndon norayan tane Afam némé kwaufrongé ta, wénde fémofem yafrotati féferafam némé té fe némaufrotam."
english: Jesus answered them , “Most certainly I tell you , everyone who commits sin is the bondservant of sin.
A bondservant doesn’ t live in the house forever . A son remains forever .
If therefore the Son makes you free , you will be free indeed .
I know that you are Abraham’s offspring, yet you seek to kill me , because my word finds no place in you .
I say the things which I have seen with my Father ; and you also do the things which you have seen with your father .”

nama: Fá nowangoyénd yáfaf, "Téfene afé siyém Ebraam!"
english: They answered him , “ Our father is Abraham.” Jesus said to them , “ If you were Abraham’s children , you would do the works of Abraham.

nama: Yéndon némé méinyotio tawafrotan yéndon efalo ewaufrotan féfe némé kénáyáretan Ngánjánta, wénde ngiot wérametati yénd. Ebraamém némé yau ndené tawafrotau! 41 Wénde fémofem ewafrotati némé féferafam tawafrotau. Fá nowangoyénd, "Ngánjánro siyém téfene Afé, a yénd siéném yáne efalo ambumtértér."
english: But now you seek to kill me , a man who has told you the truth which I heard from God . Abraham didn’ t do this .
You do the works of your father .” They said to him , “ We were not born of sexual immorality . We have one Father , God .”

nama: Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Ngánján njam féfene Afé yém, fémofem so yénd wuwetati, ménamén yénd wénmormén Ngánjáne tambén a sénonjo yénd yéna wém. Yénd yau kwéném tane mwighé faroréghan, wénde yémon kwénmáfárete. 43 Fémofem némamén yau kor ersati tane si némé norayan? Ménamén fémofem yau so kor tane si ersati. 44 Fém srem féfenjo afane ambumtértér, efe yém Sáifér, a fém ménde em féfenjo afane mwighé sái yaitotati. Kétándmé rényéghta fá témorwén ngi téfnár, fá yau efalo témorwén ménamén yáne kénjú efalo yau yém. Njam unyéghe noraye, fá nauyafote efe fá yém, ménamén fá unyégh ár yém a unyéghoe afé. 45 Wénde yéndo efalo si emndetan, a némamén fémofem efalo yau wiyátotati! 46 Emo ámb so kafrongé tane yaufimén? Efe ámb yau. Yéndon njam efalo si ewaufrotan, némamén yau efalo kwiyátongi? 47 Efe Ngánjánene em fá so náyáretat Ngánjánene si. Wénde fém efe yau Ngánjánene em, yénémamén fém yau náyáretati." Yesu a Ebraam
english: Therefore Jesus said to them , “ If God were your father , you would love me , for I came out and have come from God . For I haven’ t come of myself , but he sent me .
Why don’ t you understand my speech ? Because you can ’ t hear my word .

You are of your father the devil , and you want to do the desires of your father . He was a murderer from the beginning, and doesn’ t stand in the truth, because there is no truth in him . When he speaks a lie , he speaks on his own ; for he is a liar , and the father of lies.
But because I tell the truth, you don’ t believe me .
Which of you convicts me of sin? If I tell the truth, why do you not believe me ?
He who is of God hears the words of God . For this cause you don’ t hear, because you are not of God .”

nama: Yesu yémotayénd, "Némé yénd mbarkánd yéném ndené snorayangém nde fém sném Samariamén ár a ndenénde fefaf yaufi mbérmbér yélau!"
english: Then the Jews answered him , “Don’ t we say well that you are a Samaritan , and have a demon ?”

nama: Yesu norayai, "Tane kénjún ámb yau yaufi mbérmbér yém. Yéndo yutémndan tane Afé, wénde féfene wutmanégh yau yém tafaf. 50 Yéndo yau yéronjan tandio wutmanégh, wénde Ngánjánam so wutémnde yénd. Fá fiyém efalofifi mogh ár. 51 Yéndo emndetan efalo si: emon náyárete tane si fá yaufifi kér so yém."
english: Jesus answered, “ I don’ t have a demon , but I honor my Father and you dishonor me .
But I don’ t seek my own glory . There is one who seeks and judges .
Most certainly , I tell you , if a person keeps my word , he will never see death .”

nama: Yémofem yémndayénd fá, "Sénonjo yénd mat yéném efalo fém sném yaufi mbérmbérafé ném! Ebraam kér té yémormén, a Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár wéi kér té emormén, wénde fém noraye emo fene watamegh náyáreta fá yau so kér yém. 53 Fémo yáinde téfene afé Ebraam, efe kér té yémormén? Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár kér té emormén. Fémo ndernáye nemne efe fém ném?"
english: Then the Jews said to him , “ Now we know that you have a demon . Abraham died , as did the prophets ; and you say , ‘ If a man keeps my word , he will never taste of death .’
Are you greater than our father Abraham, who died ? The prophets died . Who do you make yourself out to be ?”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Táf yéndo njam wutmanégh yangotan tandio, yéné wutmanégh siyém fifiofnar. Wénde emo yénd wutémnde siyém tane Afé, yéné efalo fifi yém fémon efe yémndete fene Ngánján. 55 Fém yau mat em fá, wénde yénd mat wém fá. Yénd njam té korayan ndené yénd yau mat wém yánemén, yénd táf unyégh ár sof wém ndené fém kés em. Wénde yénd mat wém fá a yénd námyotan yáne sian. 56 Fene afé Ebraam fá áuwéghan témorwén ménamén yémo efogh té yinjoi tane álighmén; yémo yinjoi a fá áuwéghan témorwén."
english: Jesus answered , “ If I glorify myself , my glory is nothing . It is my Father who glorifies me , of whom you say that he is our God .
You have not known him , but I know him . If I said , ‘ I don’ t know him ,’ I would be like you , a liar . But I know him and keep his word .
Your father Abraham rejoiced to see my day . He saw it and was glad .”

nama: Fá norayayénd yáfaf, "Fém ámb yau 50 yunjéf réran ném, a fémon kés yinjoi Ebraam?"
english: The Jews therefore said to him , “ You are not yet fifty years old ! Have you seen Abraham?”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Yéndon emndetan fém efalo, Ebraam náráftam soramayo, Yénd Wém Efe Yénd Wém{u{ ...f* {u{8.58 Yénd Wém Efe Yénd Wém Eksodés 3:14 ."
english: Jesus said to them , “Most certainly, I tell you , before Abraham came into existence, I AM . ”

nama: Féyo yémofem ekafayénd wím yáfaf wighét, wénde Yesu fá nofatoi a yéfrangoi wáwefnogh méngo sifayé.
english: Therefore they took up stones to throw at him , but Jesus hid himself and went out of the temple , having gone through the middle of them , and so passed by .

nama: Njam Yesu téngmorwén, yémon yinjoi ár ghékéf kwéfkwéf kétándmayo áráfégh. 2 Yánjo waitogh árém yémotayénd Yesu, "Watamegh ár, endene yaufiyam yéméindai ghékéf kwéfkwéfot ndené fá kés náráftam? Yánjo yaufiyamam yéméindai o yárefafene yaufiyamam?"
english: As he passed by , he saw a man blind from birth .
His disciples asked him , “ Rabbi , who sinned, this man or his parents , that he was born blind ?”

nama: Yesu norayai, "Yau yánjo yaufiyammén o yárefafene yaufiyammén, wénde yéné nufrotam ménát Ngánjánene ásáfogh so yéfandat yáne kénjúmé. 4 Njamandio mé yém efogh, yéndfem so fété yafrotam yáne ásáfogh emon yénd kwénmáfárete. Sémbár siyém yéném, ánde yau efe so násáfote. 5 Njamandio yénd wém mband marat kénjún, yénd wém mband maratoene kwayaghé.
english: Jesus answered, “ This man didn’ t sin, nor did his parents , but that the works of God might be revealed in him .
I must work the works of him who sent me while it is day . The night is coming , when no one can work .
While I am in the world , I am the light of the world .”

nama: Soramé norayai yéné, yémon yéfarndai mbérme mband, yafrotam ámb ngénd ménaye mbérme, a yasénam yéné ároene ghékéf. 7 Yémon yémndai, "Kénéngém, kumbar kété Siloam minde marat nu yékwén. Yéné yetkwnoene fifi siyém "Téngwáfáreta." Féyo yéné ár yéngmormén a nénumbnaméng, a nénangoi méngot ghékéf sauréghare a kénretau.
english: When he had said this , he spat on the ground , made mud with the saliva, anointed the blind man ’s eyes with the mud ,
and said to him , “ Go , wash in the pool of Siloam ” ( which means “ Sent ”). So he went away , washed , and came back seeing.

nama: Yáne kaka fútaréf a emofem té túmén téfandawét fá ómnengéghan namotayénd, "Yéné ár yém efe kámnjongai a kémnendau. Efalo fété yém? 9 Ámb korayawét, "Fá fété yém." Ámb korayawét, "Yau, fá yau; fá mé yanitro nérete." Wénde fá fáyo norayai, "Yénd féu wém yéné ár."
english: Therefore the neighbors and those who saw that he was blind before said , “Isn’ t this he who sat and begged ?”
Others were saying , “ It is he .” Still others were saying , “ He looks like him .” He said , “ I am he .”

nama: Yémofem yémotayénd, "Ndernáye wét fene ghékéf nasawéryénd?"
english: They therefore were asking him , “ How were your eyes opened ?”

nama: Yémon ewawangoi, "Yéné ár yétkwén Yesu, yémon yafrotam ngénd a wasénam tane ghékéf a wémndai yénd kétán álighét Siloamét umbarghét. Yénd wéngmormén, a njamandio numbnamén, yéndon fandagh ewafngoyén.
english: He answered , “ A man called Jesus made mud , anointed my eyes , and said to me , ‘ Go to the pool of Siloam and wash .’ So I went away and washed , and I received sight .”

nama: Yémofem yémotayénd fá, "Ánde yém yéné ár?" Fá norayai, "Yénd yau mat wém." Farasi árém namotawét némé kufrotawét ghékéf kwéfkwéfefaf
english: Then they asked him , “ Where is he ?” He said , “ I don’t know .”

nama: Yémofem yénémnjaménd kétán Farasi árfefaf yéné efe té témorwén ghékéf kwéfkwéf. 14 Yéné efogh stémorwén Safat árké Yesum yafrotam ngénd a yasawéryéng yéné ároene ghékéf. 15 Féyo Farasi árém wéikor yémotayénd ndernáye té néretai. Yémon ewafroi, "Yémon yéfai ngénd tane ghékfan; yénd numbnamén a sénonjo yéndon efandan."
english: They brought him who had been blind to the Pharisees .
It was a Sabbath when Jesus made the mud and opened his eyes .
Again therefore the Pharisees also asked him how he received his sight . He said to them , “ He put mud on my eyes , I washed , and I see.”

nama: Ámb Farasi norayayénd. "Yéné ár yau yéném Ngánjáneta, ménamén yémon yau yutémnde Safat nák." Wénde ámb namotayénd, "Ndernáye so yaufi árom yafrote ndené ufarogh yam?" Féyo fá fété mwighan afalogh nufngoyénd.
english: Some therefore of the Pharisees said , “ This man is not from God , because he doesn’ t keep the Sabbath .” Others said , “ How can a man who is a sinner do such signs ?” So there was division among them .

nama: Féyo Farasi árém yémotayénd yéné ár wéikor, "Némé fém norayai ámb yánemén ménamén yémo esawéryéng fene ghékéf?" Yéné árom ewawangoi, "Fá siyém Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár."
english: Therefore they asked the blind man again , “ What do you say about him , because he opened your eyes ?” He said , “ He is a prophet .”

nama: Wénde yéné Ju árém mé so yau efalo tiyátotawét ndené fá témorwén ghékéf kwéfkwéf a té néretai fandaghét, kétánotio yémofem emotayénd yáne yárefaf 19 a namotayénd, "Fété yéné féfene ambum yém? Fété yém fá fém snorayet ndené náráftam ghékéf kwéfkwéf? Ndernáye sénonjo efande?"
english: The Jews therefore didn’ t believe concerning him , that he had been blind and had received his sight , until they called the parents of him who had received his sight ,
and asked them , “ Is this your son , whom you say was born blind ? How then does he now see?”

nama: Yárefafem ewawangeyayénd, "Yénd mat yénre nde téfene ambum yém, a yénd mat yénre ndené ghékéf kwéfkwéf fá náráftam. 21 Wénde yénd yau mat yénre ndernáye fá siyém sénonjo féyotaro yém fandaghét, a yénd yau mat yénre emon yéfrendai fá yánjo ghékéf kwéfkwéfta. Témotangi fáyo; fá siyém ndimbal féyotaro, a fá so noraye yandio!" 22 Yáne yárefaf norayangeyayénd yéné ménamén fá tárwén férfér Ju sénko árfenemén, emofem té yiyátoyénd ndené emon korayau ndené Yesu témorwén Keriso so tutorngayénd áumengégh méngota. 23 Yénémamén yárefaf ndené norayangeyayénd, "Fá siyém ár ndimbal yém, témotangi fáyo."
english: His parents answered them , “ We know that this is our son , and that he was born blind ;
but how he now sees , we don’ t know ; or who opened his eyes , we don’ t know . He is of age . Ask him . He will speak for himself .”
His parents said these things because they feared the Jews ; for the Jews had already agreed that if any man would confess him as Christ , he would be put out of the synagogue.
Therefore his parents said , “ He is of age . Ask him .”

nama: Féyo limánégh téfnár norayayénd yéné ároefaf efe ghékéf kwéfkwéf témorwén. Yémofem yémndayénd fá, 'Ngánjánene sáfrére, unyéghofnar si koraya ndené fém so noraye mé efalo yamménro. Yénd mat yéném yéné ár yaufi ár.'
english: So they called the man who was blind a second time , and said to him , “ Give glory to God . We know that this man is a sinner.”

nama: Yémon ewawangoi, "Yénd yau mat wém fá yaufiyam ár yém o yau. Ámbiro yam yénd mat wém: yénd kwénmorwén ghékéf kwéfkwéf wénde sénonjo yéndon efandan!"
english: He therefore answered, “ I don’t know if he is a sinner. One thing I do know : that though I was blind , now I see .”

nama: Féyo yémofem yémotayénd fá, "Némé yémon tafrote fefaf? Ndernáye yémon némasawér fene ghékéf?"
english: They said to him again, “ What did he do to you ? How did he open your eyes ?”

nama: Yémon nuwangoi, "Yéndon té ewaufron fronde a fémofem yau náyárangi. Némat fém ménde em sái káyárangi kor? Té fém wéi ménde em sái kénamndangi yáne waitogh árot?"
english: He answered them , “ I told you already , and you didn’t listen. Why do you want to hear it again ? You don’t also want to become his disciples , do you ?”

nama: Féyo yémofem sotafé si tawitawét yáfaf, a norayayénd, "Fém fai yéné ároene waitogh ár ném! Yénd siéném Mosesene waitogh ár! 29 Yénd mat yéném Ngánján korayau Mosesefaf, wénde yéné ároenemén, yénd yaufifi mat yéném árkandmé fá yénmormén."
english: They insulted him and said , “ You are his disciple , but we are disciples of Moses .
We know that God has spoken to Moses . But as for this man , we don’ t know where he comes from .”

nama: Yéné árom ewawangoi, "Yéné sélngwélafé yém! Fém yau mat em naimén fá yém, wénde yémon wasawéryéng tane ghékéf. 31 Yénd mat yéném Ngánján táf yau náyárete kétán yaufiyam árfefaf. Fá náyárete kétán emofem yutémndat a yafrotat yáne ménde. 32 Yau emo ámb náyáretam ménamén ghékéf sawéréghmén ndené ároenemén efe té náráftam ghékéf kwéfkwéf. 33 Njam yéné ár yau ténmorwén Ngánjáneta, yémon yau so némé tafrotau."
english: The man answered them , “ How amazing ! You don’ t know where he comes from , yet he opened my eyes .
We know that God doesn’ t listen to sinners, but if anyone is a worshiper of God and does his will , he listens to him .
Since the world began it has never been heard of that anyone opened the eyes of someone born blind .
If this man were not from God , he could do nothing .”

nama: Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Fém náráftam a nanotam yaufi kénjún. Fémon yau so yénmatamete yénd!" Féyo yémofem yutoryénd. Mbérmbére ghékéf kwéfkwéf
english: They answered him , “ You were altogether born in sins, and do you teach us ?” Then they threw him out .

nama: Yesu náyárai ndené yémofem té yitrongi fá, a njam yinjoi yéné ár, Yesum yémndai, "Té fémon yiyátote Ároene Ambum?"
english: Jesus heard that they had thrown him out , and finding him , he said , “ Do you believe in the Son of God ?”

nama: Yéné árom yawangoi, "Efe yém fá, ndimbal? Ta kwaufro ménát yéndon so efalo tiyátongén fá."
english: He answered , “ Who is he , Lord , that I may believe in him ?”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Fémon té téfande fá, a fá yéné féyém emofé fém norayet sénonjo."
english: Jesus said to him , “ You have both seen him , and it is he who speaks with you .”

nama: Féyo yéné árom yawangoi, "Yuré, yéndon efalo niyátotan sénonjo," a budme niyai yá sáfrére.
english: He said , “ Lord , I believe !” and he worshiped him .

nama: Yesu norayai, "Yénd kwéném yéné mbandot ménát moghét, ménát ghékéf kwéfkwéf árém so efandat a fá emofem efandat so káyátongi ghékéf kwéfkwéf."
english: Jesus said , “ I came into this world for judgment , that those who don’ t see may see; and that those who see may become blind .”

nama: Ámb Farasi ár efe tamorwén yémafé yiyárayénd fá snorayai yéné a namotayénd, "Némé fété yénd ghékéf kwéfkwéf yéném ndenáyo?"
english: Those of the Pharisees who were with him heard these things , and said to him , “ Are we also blind ?”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Njam fém tamorwén ghékéf kwéfkwéf, fém yau so tékmangé kértayan yaufimén, wénde fém mé norayati ndené fémofem fété efandati, féfene kérté mé so yém."
english: Jesus said to them , “ If you were blind , you would have no sin; but now you say , ‘ We see.’ Therefore your sin remains .

nama: Yesu norayai, "Yéndon fém efalo emndetan: efe yau kélawangé sifafene áráke sésafnemé, wénde narmbote ámb endmé, fá fiyém oro téfnár a résagh ár. 2 Ár efe kélawangé sésafnemé fá fiyém sifafene wanjengégh ár. 3 Sésafne wanjengégh árém tasawérngé sésafne yáyot, ndenáyo sifam káyárangi yáne kém njam yémon emote yétkwéne yánjo sif, a yémo so tangéutorngé. 4 Njam yémon méinyotio yánjomén tangéutorngé, fá fronde yéngém, sifam yénamayo taitongi, ménamén fá mat em yáne kém. 5 Yémofem yau so taitongi ámb ár, wénde fá so nérsat yéné ároeta, ménamén fá yau yáne kém mat em."
english: “Most certainly , I tell you , one who doesn’ t enter by the door into the sheep fold, but climbs up some other way , is a thief and a robber .
But one who enters in by the door is the shepherd of the sheep .
The gatekeeper opens the gate for him , and the sheep listen to his voice . He calls his own sheep by name and leads them out .
Whenever he brings out his own sheep , he goes before them ; and the sheep follow him , for they know his voice .
They will by no means follow a stranger, but will flee from him ; for they don’ t know the voice of strangers.”

nama: Yesum tawaufrotau yéné rengerenge si, wénde yémofem yau térsawét némé yémo korayau. Yesu mer sif wanjengégh ár
english: Jesus spoke this parable to them , but they didn’ t understand what he was telling them .

nama: Féyo Yesu kor wéi norayai, "Yéndon fém efalo emndetan: yénd swém sifafene sésafne. 8 Méinyotio ámb efe taném tane fronde fáfem oro téfnár a résagh ár, wénde sif yau káyáretat yéfefaf. 9 Yénd swém sésafne. Efe njam élawangé ta kénjúmé so kunjarngé; fá so nélawetat a néngtonat ménát mer yusafé sifayat. 10 Oro téfnár yéném résaghétro, ngiot a wirorghét. Yénd kwéném ménát yéfe ghérsé ramghét a wafoghkaf ghérsat.
english: Jesus therefore said to them again , “Most certainly, I tell you , I am the sheep ’s door .
All who came before me are thieves and robbers , but the sheep didn’ t listen to them .
I am the door . If anyone enters in by me , he will be saved , and will go in and go out and will find pasture .
The thief only comes to steal , kill , and destroy. I came that they may have life , and may have it abundantly .

nama: Yénd swém mer sif wanjengégh ár, efe so kér yém sifafet. 12 Faikaf ár, efe yau wanjengégh ár yém a yuré yau yém siffaf, njam yémon tinjongé munjan ághé, yémon sif taurongé a kengongé; munjan ágham tawirorngi sif a kuférmongi. 13 Faikaf ár so kengongé ménamén fá mé fairo tafrote a fá yau so nemne ménamén sifmén. 14 Yénd swém mer sif wanjengégh ár; yénd mat wém tanjo sifmén a fá mat em tanemén, 15 ndené fété Afé mat kés yém tanemén a yénd mat wéi wém Afanemén, a yénd ménde fété wém kér sái wém yéfeyot. 16 Kété em ámb sif tane árké em árké yau em yéné sif áráke kénjún. Yéndon so enémnjan, fá so náyáretat tane kém, a fá wéi so kamndangi ámbiro mérén ámbiro wanjengégh árfé. 17 Afam wuwete yénd ménamén yénd ménde wém sái kér wém, a so ghérsé ténmangon wéi. 18 Emon ámb yau tane ghérsé so téngwanangé ta tambén. Yénd ménde wém sái kér wém. Yénd waftafé wém sái téngwangon a yénd waftafé wém sái ténmangon. Yéné fiyém némé tane Afam té kwénémndete yéndo sái yafrotan."
english: “ I am the good shepherd . The good shepherd lays down his life for the sheep .
He who is a hired hand , and not a shepherd , who doesn’ t own the sheep , sees the wolf coming , leaves the sheep , and flees . The wolf snatches the sheep and scatters them .
The hired hand flees because he is a hired hand and doesn’ t care for the sheep .
I am the good shepherd . I know my own , and I ’m known by my own ;
even as the Father knows me , and I know the Father . I lay down my life for the sheep .
I have other sheep which are not of this fold . I must bring them also , and they will hear my voice . They will become one flock with one shepherd .
Therefore the Father loves me , because I lay down my life , that I may take it again .
No one takes it away from me , but I lay it down by myself . I have power to lay it down , and I have power to take it again . I received this commandment from my Father .”

nama: Wéikor mé kété mwighan afalogh témorwén Ju árfé ménamén yéné simén. 20 Tárfár ndené wéi korayawét, "Fá siyém yaufi mbérmbérafé yém! Fá siyém onon! Némat fémofem yiyáretati fá?"
english: Therefore a division arose again among the Jews because of these words .
Many of them said , “ He has a demon and is insane ! Why do you listen to him ?”

nama: Wénde ámb korayawét, "Mato ár wét sái yaufi mbérmbérafé yém yau ndené so noraye! Ndernáye yaufi mbérmbéram so mer tayátongé ghékéf kwéfkwéf ár?" Yesu té yékenayénd
english: Others said , “ These are not the sayings of one possessed by a demon . It isn’ t possible for a demon to open the eyes of the blind , is it ?”

nama: Yunjéfan témorwén wafarogh téménd ndené téfene áki téramayénd wáwefnogh méngo Ngánjánefaf kété Jerusalemén. 23 Yesu karendau Solomonene setset wáwefnogh méngo sifayé kénjún, 24 Ju árém njam yarendayénd a yémotayénd, "Nderé teke fémon so yale si afroghét téfeyot? Fémo efalo si ténmaufro: fém sném Keriso?" 25 Yesu nuwangoi, "Yéndon yénau ewaufroyén, wénde fémofem efalo yau wiyátotati. Yéné ásáfogh árké yéndon ewafrotan Afane yétkwénan ewauyafote féfeyot efe yénd wém, 26 wénde fémofem efalo yau wiyátoti, ménamén fém yau tane sif em. 27 Tane sif náyáretat tane kém; yénd mat wém fá, a yénd waitotat. 28 Yéndon ewarametan tuot ghérsé, a yau kér so em. Wéi emo yau so tawanangé tane ngángata. 29 Tane Afam té eramai tafaf. Yémon engwainde méinyotio rokar, emon yau so tautorngé Afane ngángata. 30 Afé a yénd ámbiro yénre."
english: It was the Feast of the Dedication at Jerusalem .
It was winter, and Jesus was walking in the temple , in Solomon ’s porch .
The Jews therefore came around him and said to him , “ How long will you hold us in suspense ? If you are the Christ , tell us plainly .”
Jesus answered them , “ I told you , and you don’ t believe . The works that I do in my Father ’s name , these testify about me .
But you don’ t believe , because you are not of my sheep , as I told you .
My sheep hear my voice , and I know them , and they follow me .
I give eternal life to them . They will never perish, and no one will snatch them out of my hand .
My Father who has given them to me is greater than all . No one is able to snatch them out of my Father ’s hand .
I and the Father are one .”

nama: Wéi Ju árém kor ekafayénd wím ménát Yesue laighét. 32 Yesum emndai fá, "Yéndon tawafrotan tárfár meryam féfene sáfrére árké Afam enramai wafroghét; árké ásáfoghmén wíme so wafiyátotati?"
english: Therefore the Jews took up stones again to stone him .
Jesus answered them , “ I have shown you many good works from my Father . For which of those works do you stone me ?”

nama: Fá nowangoyénd, "Yau yénd ménde yéném yéndfem wíme sái nénamndam ménamén méinyotio mer wafroghyammén, wénde ménamén fene wutmanghofnar si! Fém ném ár fifi, wénde fémyo náyátote nde Ngánján kar ném!"
english: The Jews answered him , “ We don’ t stone you for a good work , but for blasphemy, because you , being a man , make yourself God .”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Yéna yéfarotaménd féfenjo nákan Ngánján norayai, 'Fém sém némbne ngánján.' 35 Yénd mat yéném ndené némé si noraye Bukan yéné siyém efalo a tuot; a Ngánjánam emndete yéné ár némbne ngánján, yéné ár endefefaf yánjo si eramai. 36 Ndené yénd, Afam yénd waferyéng ndené yánjomén a wémáfáretam yéné mband maratot. Némamén fém norayati ndené yéndon wutmanéghofnar si norayan, ménamén fété yénd norayan ndené yénd swém Ngánjánene Ambum? 37 Fémofem efalo yau wiyátotati ndemamén yéndon yafrotan tane Afane ásáfogh. 38 Wénde njam yéndo ewaufrotan yane ásáfogh, efalo yau wiyátotati, fémofem tane wafroghyam efalo táyátongi, ménát fém so mat káyátongi efaloe ndené Afé tane kénjún a yénd Afane kénjún."
english: Jesus answered them , “Isn’ t it written in your law , ‘ I said , you are gods ’?
If he called them gods , to whom the word of God came ( and the Scripture can ’ t be broken ),
do you say of him whom the Father sanctified and sent into the world , ‘ You blaspheme,’ because I said , ‘ I am the Son of God ’?
If I don’ t do the works of my Father , don’ t believe me .
But if I do them , though you don’ t believe me , believe the works , that you may know and believe that the Father is in me , and I in the Father .”

nama: Wéikor Yesu yéta yerayénd, wénde Yesu néngfénmai yéfene ngángata.
english: They sought again to seize him , and he went out of their hand .

nama: A Yesu wéikor néférmai Joden wanje kétán Joném ár ánde tawalitotau, a kété témorangérwén. 41 Tárfár ár tanmorwén yáfaf a korayawét yéfenjo kénjúnro, "Joném ámb ufarogh yam yau ewafrotam, wénde méinyotio yammén té korayau yéné ároenemén siyém efalo." 42 Tárfár árém kété efalo yiyátoyénd Yesu.
english: He went away again beyond the Jordan into the place where John was baptizing at first , and he stayed there .
Many came to him . They said , “ John indeed did no sign , but everything that John said about this man is true.”
Many believed in him there .

nama: Ár yétkwén Lajarus témorwén enjne. Fá témorwén Betanimén, yéfene méngotu Meri a yané Mata. 2 Yéné Meri, endene ghakér Lajarus tékmangérwén enjne, fáyo yéné témorwén emo soramé yasuryéng mer wimafé wékwér Yurane kafkafot a tawányányotau yánjo séfe. 3 Féyo yá mersofem si yéngwawatembayénd Yesue, "Yuré, fémon efe yuwete enjne yém."
english: Now a certain man was sick, Lazarus from Bethany, of the village of Mary and her sister, Martha .
It was that Mary who had anointed the Lord with ointment and wiped his feet with her hair , whose brother Lazarus was sick.
The sisters therefore sent to him , saying , “ Lord , behold , he for whom you have great affection is sick.”

nama: Njam fá náyárai yéné, Yesu norayai, "Yéné enjne siyém yau ménát krot. Yau, yéné siyém Ngánjánene ndimbal kwayaghat yém ménát Ngánjánene Ambum so yéngwiotat yéné kénjúmé."
english: But when Jesus heard it , he said , “ This sickness is not to death , but for the glory of God , that God ’s Son may be glorified by it .”

nama: Yesum táuwétau Mata a yánngén Meri a Lajarus. 6 Wénde njam fá náyárai ndené Lajarus enjne témorwén, fá kété mé yémorangérmén yéné sifayan wéikor sómbio efogh. 7 Féyo fá korayangé yánjo waitogh árfefaf, "Yénd so nangotam kétán Judiat."
english: Now Jesus loved Martha , and her sister, and Lazarus .
When therefore he heard that he was sick, he stayed two days in the place where he was .
Then after this he said to the disciples , “ Let ’s go into Judea again .”

nama: Fá korayangi, "Watamegh ár, tekofnar efghon kété Ju árém fém wíme wafiyátoghét némafngoyénd a wéi kétán fém nangote?"
english: The disciples asked him , “ Rabbi , the Jews were just trying to stone you . Are you going there again ?”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Kété em 12 efoghféneféne em ámbiro efghon. Ár efe yiota efghon fá yau so náutáne, ménamén yémo so yéfande mband maratoene kwayaghé. 10 Fá njam eyota sémbáran fá so néngáutánat, ménamén yáne yau yém kwayaghé. 11 Soramé fá norayai, yémon tawaufrotau yéfe, "Téfene fútar Lajarus kémégh yékém; wénde yénd kétán wéngém ménát yá wanoghét."
english: Jesus answered, “Aren’ t there twelve hours of daylight ? If a man walks in the day , he doesn’ t stumble , because he sees the light of this world .
But if a man walks in the night , he stumbles , because the light isn’ t in him .”
He said these things , and after that , he said to them , “ Our friend Lazarus has fallen asleep , but I am going so that I may awake him out of sleep .”

nama: Yánjo waitogh árém yawangoyénd, "Yuré, fá njam kémégh yékém, fá so mer káyátongé." 13 Yesu korayau yáne kérmén, wénde yáne waitogh ár kéma kemnawét fifie kéméghmén kar korayau.
english: The disciples therefore said , “ Lord , if he has fallen asleep , he will recover .”
Now Jesus had spoken of his death , but they thought that he spoke of taking rest in sleep .

nama: Yénémamén yémon kor ewaufroi mbarkándaye, "Lajarus fété kér tém, 15 a féfe téfnan yénd áuwéghan wém yénd yau kété kés kwém, ménát fémofem so efalo tiyátongi. Wénde so kuwanongém yénd yáfaf."
english: So Jesus said to them plainly then , “ Lazarus is dead.
I am glad for your sakes that I was not there , so that you may believe . Nevertheless , let ’s go to him .”

nama: Féyo Tomas efe yémndetat Didimas fá korayangé ámb waitogh árfefaf, "Yénd so kuwanongém, yénd wéi yémafé Yesufé kér so yéném." Yesu siyém anogh a ghérsé
english: Thomas therefore , who is called Didymus , said to his fellow disciples , “ Let ’s also go , that we may die with him .”

nama: Yáne ufarghan Yesum yinjoi Lajarus té mband yaramayénd a náyátoyénd 4 efogh. 18 Betani 3 kilomitaro témorwén kétándmé Jerusalemta, 19 tárfár Ju ár enmormén yéfefaf Mata a Meri, tawáutárwét ménamén yéfene ghakér Lajarus kér té yémormén. 20 Njam Mata náyárai Yesu ténmorwén, fá néwanoi a yéfángoi, wénde Meri mé yémorangérmén méngon.
english: So when Jesus came , he found that he had been in the tomb four days already .
Now Bethany was near Jerusalem , about fifteen stadia away.
Many of the Jews had joined the women around Martha and Mary , to console them concerning their brother.
Then when Martha heard that Jesus was coming , she went and met him , but Mary stayed in the house .

nama: Mata norayai Yesuefaf, "Yuré, fém yéna njam kénmorangérwén tane ghakér yau so kér témorwén. 22 Wénde yénd mat wém ndené sénonjo Ngánjánam so kémaramangé fém némat kómnenda."
english: Therefore Martha said to Jesus , “ Lord , if you would have been here , my brother wouldn’ t have died .
Even now I know that whatever you ask of God , God will give you .”

nama: Yesum korayangé yáfaf, "Fene ghakér wéi so kanongé."
english: Jesus said to her , “ Your brother will rise again.”

nama: Matam yawangoi, "Yénd mat wém fá wéi so kanongé soramé efghon."
english: Martha said to him , “ I know that he will rise again in the resurrection at the last day .”

nama: Yesu norayai yáfaf, "Yénd wém anogh a ghérsé. Yáyot emo efalo yénd kwiyátongé so ghérsé yém ndemamén téu kér yém, 26 a efe njam ghérsé yém a efalo kwiyátongé yénd fá yau so kér yém. Fémon efalo yéné té yiyátote?"
english: Jesus said to her , “ I am the resurrection and the life . He who believes in me will still live , even if he dies.
Whoever lives and believes in me will never die. Do you believe this ?”

nama: Matam yawangoi, "Néméwét, Yuré, yéndo efalo niyátotan ndené fém ném Keriso, Ngánjánene ambum, efe té yénmorwén yéné mband maratot.
english: She said to him , “ Yes , Lord . I have come to believe that you are the Christ , God ’ s Son , he who comes into the world .”

nama: Yéné soramé fá njam norayai yéné, fá nénangoi a yéngmotayéng yánngén Meri téndot a korayangé, "Watamegh ár yéna yém a fém nénémndete."
english: When she had said this , she went away and called Mary , her sister, secretly , saying , “ The Teacher is here and is calling you .”

nama: Njam Meri náyárai, fá wékeye nokayoi a néngwanoi yáfaf. 30 Yau Yesu mé nufaryéng méngotuot, wénde kété mé témorwén yéné sifayan ánde Matam yéfángoi. 31 Njam Ju ár efe tamorwén Merifé méngon, tawamarowét, fá tinjongi nderé wékeye fá nokayoi a néngtoryéng, yémofem yéngwaitoyénd, kemnawét ndené mbéwat kar néngwanoi yeyot.
english: When she heard this , she arose quickly and went to him .
Now Jesus had not yet come into the village , but was in the place where Martha met him .
Then the Jews who were with her in the house and were consoling her , when they saw Mary , that she rose up quickly and went out , followed her , saying , “ She is going to the tomb to weep there .”

nama: Njam Meri yéné sifayé nufaryéng ánde Yesu témorwén a yinjoi fá, fá nuyai yáne kafkafot a korayangé, "Yuré, fém yéna njam kénmorangérwén, tane ghakér yau so kér témorwén."
english: Therefore when Mary came to where Jesus was and saw him , she fell down at his feet , saying to him , “ Lord , if you would have been here , my brother wouldn’ t have died .”

nama: Njam Yesum yinjoi fá yeyan, a Ju ár yémafé efe enmormén fá wéi ndenéyameyo kendawét, Yesu kénjkam ghérghérsisayam yifoi tikfan. 34 Yémo emotai, "Ánde fémofem mband yaramayénd?" Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Kénaf a téfanda, Yuré."
english: When Jesus therefore saw her weeping , and the Jews weeping who came with her , he groaned in the spirit and was troubled ,
and said , “ Where have you laid him ?” They told him , “ Lord , come and see .”

nama: Yesu ye nufngoi. 36 Féyo Ju ár norayayénd, "Téfandangi nderé uwégh tuwete fá!"
english: Jesus wept .
The Jews therefore said , “ See how much affection he had for him !”

nama: Wénde ámb korayawét, "Yémo ghékéf kwéfkwéf ár mer táyátote. Némamén yau Lajarus yanjaryéng kérta?" Yesum yanoi Lajarus kétándmé kérta
english: Some of them said , “Couldn’ t this man , who opened the eyes of him who was blind , have also kept this man from dying?”

nama: Yesu kénjkam ghérghérsisayam yifoi tikfan, nénaflai mbéwéfaf. Yékw témorwén a wím yéfayoyénd sésafnen. 39 Fá korayangé, "Titrembongi yéné wím." Mata, kér téfnárane mérés norayai, "Yuré, sénonjo yaufi wim so yém, ménamén fá té náyáto 4 efogh."
english: Jesus therefore , again groaning in himself , came to the tomb . Now it was a cave , and a stone lay against it .
Jesus said , “Take away the stone .” Martha , the sister of him who was dead , said to him , “ Lord , by this time there is a stench , for he has been dead four days .”

nama: Wénde Yesu norayai, "Yéndon ewaufrotamén fémon so yéfande Ngánjánene ndimbal kwayaghé njam fémon efalo tiyáto."
english: Jesus said to her , “Didn’ t I tell you that if you believed , you would see God ’s glory ?”

nama: Yénémamén yémofem yitrémboyénd wím. Féyo Yesu néwewoi tukét a korayangé, "Afé, yéndon kánjo némarametan fémon yénd té wiyáré. 42 Yénd mat wém ndené fémon túmén wiyárete yénd, wénde yénd yéné néngorayan árfe téfnan swakai yéna, ménát yémofem so efalo yiyátotat ndené fémon yénd wénmáfáretam."
english: So they took away the stone from the place where the dead man was lying. Jesus lifted up his eyes and said , “ Father , I thank you that you listened to me .
I know that you always listen to me , but because of the multitude standing around I said this , that they may believe that you sent me .”

nama: Njam fá norayai yéné, Yesu nutnai ndimbal keye, "Lajarus, kéntor!" 44 Kér téfnár néntoryéng, yáne ngángé a kafkaf mbéwé sáláme fiyaréghkaf tamorwén a sáláme umbéghkaf sénkoyamé warengéghare. Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Tafenangi mbéwé sáláme a tumyongi álighét." Kwankwane mwighé wafrogh Yesue ngiot
english: When he had said this , he cried with a loud voice , “ Lazarus , come out !”
He who was dead came out , bound hand and foot with wrappings , and his face was wrapped around with a cloth . Jesus said to them , “ Free him , and let him go .”

nama: Yénémamén tárfár Ju ár efe té enmormén yafoghét Meriefaf, a wéi tafandawét némé Yesum tawafrotau, efalo yiyátoyénd fá. 46 Wénde ámb ár engmormén Farasi árfefaf a tawaufrotawét némé Yesum tawafrotau. 47 Féyo limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a Farasi árém yanmoyénd Ju sénko árfene áumengégh.
english: Therefore many of the Jews who came to Mary and saw what Jesus did believed in him .
But some of them went away to the Pharisees and told them the things which Jesus had done .
The chief priests therefore and the Pharisees gathered a council , and said , “ What are we doing ? For this man does many signs .

nama: Yéndfem njam mé yéngéumyotam engwafrota yéné yam, méinyotio árém fá so efalo yiyátotat, a wéi Rom ár so eném ewasérmbotat téfene wáwefnogh méngo a téfene yu."
english: If we leave him alone like this , everyone will believe in him , and the Romans will come and take away both our place and our nation .”

nama: Ámb ár yétkwén Kayafas, efe témorwén limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár yéné yunjéfan, norayai yéfefaf, "Fém mafina em yénémén! 50 Fém mat yau em ndené ámbiro ár sái kér yém árét, ménaye ndené yau so méinyotio Ju ár nawaghne."
english: But a certain one of them , Caiaphas , being high priest that year , said to them , “ You know nothing at all ,
nor do you consider that it is advantageous for us that one man should die for the people , and that the whole nation not perish.”

nama: Fá yau norayai yánjo méndeye, wénde ménamén fá témorwén limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár yéné yunjfan, fá norayai soramé yumén si ndené Yesu kér so yém Ju árfeyot, 52 a yau Ju árfetro, wénde yémafayo wéi efe em éfáranégh ambum Ngánjánene ménát so enwangote a ámbiro tanyátongé. 53 Féyo kétánotio yéné efogh yémofem mwighé yéfrendaménd Yesue ngiot.
english: Now he didn’ t say this of himself , but being high priest that year , he prophesied that Jesus would die for the nation ,
and not for the nation only , but that he might also gather together into one the children of God who are scattered abroad .
So from that day forward they took counsel that they might put him to death.

nama: Yesu yénémamén kor yau marataye tiotau Ju árfefafmé. Wénde fá naweghai a nuwanoi kétán tesen yétkwén Efaraim, árké témorwén fanfne yu kaka, ánde fá tamorangérwén yánjo waitogh árfé.
english: Jesus therefore walked no more openly among the Jews , but departed from there into the country near the wilderness , to a city called Ephraim . He stayed there with his disciples .

nama: Kaka kénáyátotau Ju árfene Waingégh Téménd sái karnyangai. Tárfár ár tangmormén yéfene nayu sifayata kétán Jerusalemot. Fá kétán tangmormén ménát so káyátotawét fá njúnnjúnofnar Ngánjánene sáfrére soramé so tangmorwén téméndfaf. 56 Yémofem ménjtaye ronjagh yafngoyénd Yesu, a njam fá tawakayongérwén wáwefnogh méngo sifayan, fáro kénjún ámogh nufngoyénd, "Fém ndernáye nemnati? Némé fá so yéném yéné téménd kénjút efalo?" 57 Wénde limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a Farasi árém mat si yéramayénd ndené emo njam tinjongé Yesu ánde yém, yémo fété so ténmaufrongé ménát yémofem so terangayénd.
english: Now the Passover of the Jews was at hand . Many went up from the country to Jerusalem before the Passover , to purify themselves .
Then they sought for Jesus and spoke with one another as they stood in the temple , “ What do you think — that he isn’ t coming to the feast at all ?”
Now the chief priests and the Pharisees had commanded that if anyone knew where he was , he should report it , that they might seize him .

nama: 6 efogh frondeta kétán Waingégh téméndfaf Yesu nufaryéng Betanin, ánde Lajarus témorangérwén efe Yesum yanoi kérta. 2 Njamke kété efrendaménd Yesue, Matam tangwaflitau njamke a Lajaruséf ámb tamorwén efe tamorangérwén Yesufé njamke kitarafaf. 3 Merim yéngwanai ndimbal manimén botruafé mer wimafé wékwér yémndetat ámb mbumbu wén yétkwén nada yawasuryéng Yesuene kafkaf a tawányányotau yáne kafkaf yánjo séfe. Féyo mer méndefé wimam nofayoi méngo.
english: Then , six days before the Passover , Jesus came to Bethany, where Lazarus was , who had been dead , whom he raised from the dead .
So they made him a supper there . Martha served , but Lazarus was one of those who sat at the table with him .
Therefore Mary took a pound of ointment of pure nard , very precious , and anointed Jesus ’ feet and wiped his feet with her hair . The house was filled with the fragrance of the ointment .

nama: Ámb yáne waitogh ár, Judas Iskariot, emo so sén térametau soramé, norayai, 5 "Némamén yéné mer wimafé wékwér yau yéramayénd 300 Denarion, árké em 300 efoghmén fai a tawaramangayénd mani yauyau árét?" 6 Fá ndené norayai, kor yau yémon tawanjete yauyau ár wénde ménamén fá témorwén oro téfnár. Yémon térsau mani yáf a fáyo kawáutánau yénaye.
english: Then Judas Iscariot , Simon’s son, one of his disciples , who would betray him , said ,
“ Why wasn’ t this ointment sold for three hundred denarii and given to the poor ?”
Now he said this , not because he cared for the poor , but because he was a thief , and having the money box , used to steal what was put into it .

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Téfrangongi fá yambiayo! Yémon té tamnde yéné mer wimafé wékwér yéné efghot tane mband raméghfaf. 8 Fém túmén so em yauyau árfé, wénde yénd yau kor so wém féfefaf."
english: But Jesus said , “Leave her alone . She has kept this for the day of my burial .
For you always have the poor with you , but you don’ t always have me .”

nama: Tárfár Ju ár té náyárayénd ndené Yesu témorwén Betanin, té engmormén kétán, ménát Yesue fandaghét a Lajaruse fandaghét ndenáyo, efe Yesum kérta yanoi. 10 Limánégh ghéngén wárogh árém mwighé téfaronawét Lajaruse ngiot ndenáyo, 11 ménamén yáne téfnan tárfár Ju ár kawewetawét Ju sénko árfaf a efalo tiyátotawét Yesu. Yesu nélawai Jerusalemét ndenanit warsagh ár
english: A large crowd therefore of the Jews learned that he was there ; and they came , not for Jesus ’ sake only , but that they might see Lazarus also , whom he had raised from the dead .
But the chief priests conspired to put Lazarus to death also ,
because on account of him many of the Jews went away and believed in Jesus .

nama: Yénamayo efghon ndimbal ár mérén efe té enmormén Waingégh témndot náyárayénd nde Yesu yéném Jerusalemét. 13 Yémofem tangérsawét nginar árau, a néngwanoyénd yá wanfégh, ngutnawét, "Áuwégh Ngánjáne! Frengéghkaf fá yém efe yéném Yurane yétkwénan! Frengéghkaf yém warsagh ár Israilmén!"
english: On the next day a great multitude had come to the feast . When they heard that Jesus was coming to Jerusalem ,
they took the branches of the palm trees and went out to meet him , and cried out , “ Hosanna ! Blessed is he who comes in the name of the Lord , the King of Israel !”

nama: Yesum tinjongé totér ndonki a nafayoi kété, ndené fété Buk si kés yéfarotaménd,
english: Jesus , having found a young donkey , sat on it . As it is written ,

nama: "Yau férfér em, ndimbal yu Jaion{v{ ...f* {v{12.15 Jaion Yéné siyém Jerusalem ! kéretangi, féfene warsagh ár yéném, yénfayong totér ndonki tukén."{w{ ...f* {w{12.15 Jekaria 9:9
english: “Don’ t be afraid , daughter of Zion . Behold , your King comes , sitting on a donkey ’s colt .”

nama: Yesuene waitogh ár yau mat náyátoyénd méinyotio yénémamén yéné efghon. Wénde fá mat náyátoyénd soramé Yesu témorwén ndimbal kwayaghafé. Féyo fá mat táf náyátoyénd ndené ámb árom té efarotam yéné yammén Bukan.
english: His disciples didn’ t understand these things at first , but when Jesus was glorified , then they remembered that these things were written about him , and that they had done these things to him .

nama: Ár efe tamorwén Yesufé táf yémon njam Lajarus yémotai mbéwata a yanoi fá kérta nafroyénd némé té kufrotau. 18 Tárfár ár ménamén fá té náyárayénd Yesum té yafrotam yéné sélngwélafé yam, néngtoryénd a néngwanoyénd yá wanféghét. 19 Farasi ár korayangi yéfe kénjúnro, "Té yéfandati ámb yau ándan nufanam méinyotio árém yéné mband maratan yaitotat Yesu!" Yesu korayau yánjo kérmén
english: The multitude therefore that was with him when he called Lazarus out of the tomb and raised him from the dead was testifying about it .
For this cause also the multitude went and met him , because they heard that he had done this sign .
The Pharisees therefore said among themselves , “ See how you accomplish nothing . Behold , the world has gone after him .”

nama: Ámb Grikmén ár kété tamorwén yéfe kénjún efe engmormén wáwefnoghét téméndfaf. 21 Fá enmormén Filifefaf, efe témorwén kétamamén Betsaida Galili yuwon, fá norayayénd, "Ndimbal, yénd ménde yéném sái tinjongém Yesu." 22 Filif yéngmormén taufrongé Endrue, Endru a Filif nénwaneyayénd tauférend Yesue.
english: Now there were certain Greeks among those who went up to worship at the feast .
Therefore , these came to Philip , who was from Bethsaida of Galilee , and asked him , saying , “ Sir , we want to see Jesus .”
Philip came and told Andrew, and in turn, Andrew came with Philip , and they told Jesus .

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Efogh té nawer Ároene Ambum sái yuyotat. 24 Yéndon féfe ewaufrotan efalo, táfandro mbwe njam kuyangé flawane kétán mbandot a kér yém, mé so yém ámbiro mbwe, wénde njam kér yém, yémon so eráfte tárfár mbwe. 25 Árom emo yuwete yánjo ghérsé so yétarne, njam árké árom méndméndat yéfanda yánjo ghérsé yéné mband maratan so yamnde tuot ghérsat. 26 Emo njam tayot wásáfota so waitote. Féyo yémafé yénd so yénre kété yénd ánde wém. Tane Afam so yuwete fá emo ta kwásáfote.
english: Jesus answered them , “ The time has come for the Son of Man to be glorified .
Most certainly I tell you , unless a grain of wheat falls into the earth and dies, it remains by itself alone . But if it dies, it bears much fruit .
He who loves his life will lose it . He who hates his life in this world will keep it to eternal life .
If anyone serves me , let him follow me . Where I am , there my servant will also be . If anyone serves me , the Father will honor him .

nama: Sénonjo tane tikéf uwérsoghan yém, a némé so yénd norayan? Afé, kwanjar yénd yéné efoghta? Yau, mé yéné téfnan yénd wénmormén yéné efghot. 28 Afé, yuyota fenjo yétkwén!"
english: “ Now my soul is troubled . What shall I say ? ‘ Father , save me from this time ’? But I came to this time for this cause .
Father , glorify your name !” Then a voice came out of the sky , saying, “ I have both glorified it and will glorify it again .”

nama: Ár mérén kété efe tamorwén, náyáretaménd a norayayénd ndené aruruke tém; ámb norayayénd njafar si résagh árom séno yénémndete fá.
english: Therefore the multitude who stood by and heard it said that it had thundered . Others said , “ An angel has spoken to him .”

nama: Yesu norayai, "Yéné kém stém féfe téfnan, yau tane téfnan. 31 Sénonjo efogh yém mbandoe moghét; sénonjo limánégh ár yéné mbandmén so yitat téndot. 32 Yénd njam wuyotat yéné mbandta, yéndon so eméindan méinyotio ár sái eném tafaftio." 33 Fá norayai yéné ménát yufarotai ndernáye ende fá so kér témorwén.
english: Jesus answered , “ This voice hasn’ t come for my sake , but for your sakes .
Now is the judgment of this world . Now the prince of this world will be cast out .
And I , if I am lifted up from the earth , will draw all people to myself .”
But he said this , signifying by what kind of death he should die .

nama: Ár mérén norayayénd, "Yénd té náyárayém Buk sita ndené Keriso so nakete tuot. Némamén fém noraye Ároene Ambum fété so yuyotat? Efe yém yéné Ároene Ambum?"
english: The multitude answered him , “ We have heard out of the law that the Christ remains forever . How do you say , ‘ The Son of Man must be lifted up ’ ? Who is this Son of Man ?”

nama: Féyo Yesum tamndangé, "Féfefaf so yém kwayaghé tekofnaye. Eyota njamandio féfefaf yém kwayaghé, ménát kwéfitayam yau ewainde fém. Ár efe yiota kwéfitayan yau mat yém ándan fá yéngém. 36 Ekmetati féfenjo mwighé kwayaghafaf njamandio féfefaf yém, ménát fém táf so kénamndangi kwayaghane ambum." Njam yémon si ewifoi, Yesum efrangoi a néngatnoi yéfe tambén. Ju ár mé katambnawét
english: Jesus therefore said to them , “ Yet a little while the light is with you . Walk while you have the light , that darkness doesn’ t overtake you . He who walks in the darkness doesn’ t know where he is going .
While you have the light , believe in the light , that you may become children of light .” Jesus said these things , and he departed and hid himself from them .

nama: Ndemamén Yesum méinyotio tawafrotau yéné sélngwélafé wafroghyam yéfe rére, wénde yémofem yau efalo tiyátotawét fá. 38 Yéné kufrotau Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár Aisayam némamén té korayau: "Yuré, emo ámb téfene si té efalo eyáto? Fém té nauyafo nderé wafté kér ro ném fém, wénde efe ámb yau kor mat náyáto."
english: But though he had done so many signs before them , yet they didn’t believe in him ,
that the word of Isaiah the prophet might be fulfilled , which he spoke : “ Lord , who has believed our report ? To whom has the arm of the Lord been revealed?” + 12:38 Isaiah 53:1

nama: Yéné téfnan yémofem yau efalo yiyátoyénd, ménamén Aisayam wéi té korayau:
english: For this cause they couldn’t believe , for Isaiah said again :

nama: "Yuram kwéfkwéf eyátoi yéfene ghékéf a tikéf táikér wéi ndenáyo, ménát fá yau so néretat yéfenjo ghékfe, yau so mat náyátotat yéfenjo tikfan, yau so nawengotat a yéndon sái mer eyátotan fá."
english: “ He has blinded their eyes and he hardened their heart , lest they should see with their eyes , and perceive with their heart , and would turn , and I would heal them .” + 12:40 Isaiah 6:10

nama: Aisaya norayai yéné ménamén yémon yinjoi Yesuene ndimbal kwayaghé a korayau yánemén.
english: Isaiah said these things when he saw his glory , and spoke of him .

nama: Wénde sénko ár kénjún tárfáram efalo yiyátoyénd Yesu. Wénde ménamén Farasi árfenemén yau yémofem kafrotawét yéfenjo ndimbal mwighamén férfér téfnan ménamén mété táf tautonawét áumengégh méngota, 43 ménamén yémofem áuwégh térsawét árta mindefifi yau Ngánjáneta.
english: Nevertheless , even many of the rulers believed in him , but because of the Pharisees they didn’ t confess it , so that they wouldn’ t be put out of the synagogue,
for they loved men ’s praise more than God ’s praise .

nama: Yesu norayai marat kéme, "Njam árom efalo kwiyátongé yénd, yémon yau yéndro efalo wiyátote, wénde fá wéi emon yénd wénmáfáretam. 45 Njam emo wefanda yénd, yémo yéfande fá emo yénd wénmáfáretam. 46 Yénd té wénmormén kwayaghé yéné mbandot, ménát emo njam efalo wiyátota fá yau so yém kwéfitayan.
english: Jesus cried out and said , “ Whoever believes in me , believes not in me , but in him who sent me .
He who sees me sees him who sent me .
I have come as a light into the world , that whoever believes in me may not remain in the darkness .

nama: Árké árom náyárete tane si a yau ewarawene, yéndon yau mogh yafrotan yáfaf. Ménamén yénd yau wénmormén ménát mband marat moghét, wénde sái tawanjarén. 48 Kété fété yém mogh ár árét emo yénd wékene a yau efalo eyátote tane si; yéné si árké yénd kénorayan so tawafalngongé kerker efghon. 49 Yénd yau norayan tanjo si, wénde Afam emo yénd wénmáfáretam wénémndai yénd orayéghét némé té korayan. 50 Yénd mat wém nde yáne wafarégh siam yénlimnde kétán tuot ghérsat. Féyo némé yénd norayan mé ndené fété ndernáye Afam wénémndetam yénd siot.
english: If anyone listens to my sayings and doesn’ t believe, I don’ t judge him . For I came not to judge the world , but to save the world .
He who rejects me , and doesn’ t receive my sayings , has one who judges him . The word that I spoke will judge him in the last day .
For I spoke not from myself , but the Father who sent me gave me a commandment , what I should say and what I should speak .
I know that his commandment is eternal life . The things therefore which I speak , even as the Father has said to me , so I speak .”

nama: Kaka témorwén Waingégh téménd. Yesu mat náyátoi ndené efogh té nawer yáyot yéné mband marat frangoghét a angoghét Yárefaf. Yémon tauwetau yánjo waitogh ár yéné mband maratan, yémon tauwetau fá mindefifi kétánotio yatoghfaf.
english: Now before the feast of the Passover , Jesus , knowing that his time had come that he would depart from this world to the Father , having loved his own who were in the world , he loved them to the end .

nama: Séite njamkeyan, Sáifram frondeyo té yéméindai Judas, Saimon Iskariotene ambum, emo mwighé yafrotam Yesue sén ramghét. 3 Yesu mat náyátoi nde Yárefam méinyotio rokar eramai yáne wafté mbanmbanot, a fá yénmormén Ngánjánta a álighétro témorwén Ngánjánefaf. 4 Féyo fá nokayoi njamke néne tambén, faru sáláme yéfitaryéng, a naumbai karatayan taberoe. 5 Yéné soramé, yémon nu yasuryéng disan a umbarégh ewawafngoi yánjo waitogh árfene kafkaf, féyo tawawányányotau yéné taberoe árké tumbangérwén yáfaf.
english: During supper , the devil having already put into the heart of Judas Iscariot , Simon ’s son, to betray him ,
Jesus , knowing that the Father had given all things into his hands , and that he came from God and was going to God ,
arose from supper , and laid aside his outer garments . He took a towel and wrapped a towel around his waist.
Then he poured water into the basin , and began to wash the disciples ’ feet and to wipe them with the towel that was wrapped around him .

nama: Fá yénmormén Saimon Fitafaf, emo yémndai fá, "Yuré, fémon tane kafkaf so waumbne? Yénd yau ménde wém"
english: Then he came to Simon Peter . He said to him , “ Lord , do you wash my feet ?”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Sénonjo fémon yau yáyamngo yéndo némé yafrotan, wénde soramé fém mat so káyáto."
english: Jesus answered him , “ You don’t know what I am doing now , but you will understand later .”

nama: Fité norayai, "Yau, fémon yaufifi so waumbne tane kafkaf, yau sénonjo o tuot!" Yesum yawangoi, "Yéndon yau njam némaumbnan fene kafkaf, fém tane waitogh ár yau so ném."
english: Peter said to him , “ You will never wash my feet !” Jesus answered him , “ If I don’ t wash you , you have no part with me .”

nama: Saimon Fitam yawangoi, "Féyo, Yuré, yau mé tane kafkafro wénde tane ngángé a tane sénko ndenéyameyo."
english: Simon Peter said to him , “ Lord , not my feet only , but also my hands and my head !”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Efe té kumbnat mé yéfene kafkafro umbarghét em; yéfene méinyotio fifi siyém njúnnjúnofnar. Fém njúnnjúnofnar em wénde yau fém méinyotio." 11 Fá norayai ndené ménamén fá mat náyátoi emo so sén téramangai fá, a yéné téfnan fá norayai méinyotio njúnnjúnofnar tamorwén wénde ámbiro yau.
english: Jesus said to him , “Someone who has bathed only needs to have his feet washed , but is completely clean . You are clean , but not all of you .”
For he knew him who would betray him ; therefore he said , “ You are not all clean .”

nama: Njam yémon ewifoi yéfene kafkaf umbarégh, yémon yánjo sáláme nawoi a nangoi námnjoi yánjo sifayan. Yesum emotai, "Fém mat té namndangi némé yéndon féfe ewawafrotan? 13 Fémofem wémndetati, 'Watamegh ár' a 'Yuré,' a fém fété norayati mbarkánde, yénd yéné fété wém. 14 Ndené fété yénd, féfene Yuré a Watamegh ár, téfé ewaumbnan féfene kafkaf ndenéyameyo fémofem so ewambnatati kafkaf fémro fémro. 15 Yéndo ufarogh yam fiyafrotan ménát fémofem so ewafrotati ndenéyameyo yéndon némé fiyafrotan féfeyot. 16 Yéndon féfe ewaufrotan efalo, faiofnar ásáfogh árom yau so yáinde yánjo yuré, a si résagh árom yau so yáinde fá emo ténmáfárete. 17 Sénonjo fém mat té namndangi yéné yammén, fém so frengan em njam fémofem ewafrotati. Yesu kafrotau yánjo sén raméghmén
english: So when he had washed their feet , put his outer garment back on , and sat down again , he said to them , “ Do you know what I have done to you ?
You call me , ‘ Teacher ’ and ‘ Lord .’ You say so correctly , for so I am .
If I then , the Lord and the Teacher , have washed your feet , you also ought to wash one another ’ s feet .
For I have given you an example , that you should also do as I have done to you .
Most certainly I tell you , a servant is not greater than his lord , neither is one who is sent greater than he who sent him .
If you know these things , blessed are you if you do them .

nama: Yénd yau norayan méinyotio féfenemén, yénd mat wém efe yéndon ekafayén. Wénde yéné ménát yém Buk si efalo sái káyátongé, 'Fá emafé tane féskaf flawé feném, fá yém tane sén téfnár.'
english: I don’ t speak concerning all of you . I know whom I have chosen ; but that the Scripture may be fulfilled , ‘ He who eats bread with me has lifted up his heel against me .’

nama: Yéndon ewaufrotan féfe sénonjo frondeyo soramé nufrota, ménát njam nufrota, fémofem so efalo kwiyátongi ndené Yénd yéné fwém efe Yénd wém. 20 Yéndon féfe ewaufrotan efalo: emon njam tumyongé ár efe yéndon yéngwáfáretan kumyongé yénd; a emo njam kumyongé yénd tumyongé fá emo yénd wénmáfáretam."
english: From now on , I tell you before it happens , that when it happens , you may believe that I am he .
Most certainly I tell you , he who receives whomever I send , receives me ; and he who receives me , receives him who sent me .”

nama: Soramé Yesu njam norayai yéné si, fá mbérmbéran nawayamngoi a norayai yánjo waitogh árfefaf, "Yéndon féfe ewaufrotan efalo, ámb féfene árom sén so kwéramangé."
english: When Jesus had said this , he was troubled in spirit , and testified , “ Most certainly I tell you that one of you will betray me .”

nama: Yáne waitogh ár afandagh nufngoyénd fáro fáro, ménamén fá mafina tamorwén efe Yesum tésérmbnau. 23 Ámb yánjo waitogh ár efe Yesum tuwetau témorangérwén Yesue kaka. 24 Saimon Fitam ngángaye yaunyai a norayai yéné waitogh ároefaf, "Témota fá árké ár yémon yésérmbne?"
english: The disciples looked at one another , perplexed about whom he spoke .
One of his disciples , whom Jesus loved, was at the table, leaning against Jesus ’ chest.
Simon Peter therefore beckoned to him , and said to him , “ Tell us who it is of whom he speaks .”

nama: Féyo yéné waitogh ár néngamghai Yesuefaf, yémon yémndai Yesu, "Yuré, efe yéné ár yém?"
english: He , leaning back, as he was , on Jesus ’ chest , asked him , “ Lord , who is it ?”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Fá yéné so fiyém ende sái taraman féskaf flawé karéfkaréf njam yukan disan. Féyo yémon yukai féskaf flawé karéfkaréf yaramai Judas, Saimon Iskariotene ambum. 27 Njamandio Judasém yanayéng féskaf flawé, Sáifér nélawai yáfaf. Yesum yémndai, "Némé fémon wafroghét yafngo, wékeye tafrota." 28 Wénde téménd kénjún emo yau yáyamngoi némamén Yesum yémndai fá. 29 Ménamén Judasém yéngérsam yéfene mani yáf, ámb kéma kemnawét ndené Yesum kar témndetau téménd rokar résaghét, o ámb rokar ramghét yauyau árét. 30 Njamandio Judasém yéngwanai féskaf flawé, fá néngtoryéng. A sémbár témorwén. Yesu kafrotau Fitane kenaghmén
english: Jesus therefore answered, “ It is he to whom I will give this piece of bread when I have dipped it .” So when he had dipped the piece of bread, he gave it to Judas , the son of Simon Iscariot .
After the piece of bread, then Satan entered into him . Then Jesus said to him , “ What you do , do quickly .”
Now nobody at the table knew why he said this to him .
For some thought , because Judas had the money box , that Jesus said to him , “Buy what things we need for the feast ,” or that he should give something to the poor .
Therefore having received that morsel , he went out immediately . It was night .

nama: Njamandio fá néngwanoi, Yesu norayai, "Sénonjo árém so tinjongi nderé ndimbal yém Ároene Ambum. Yéné téfnan, fá so wéi tinjongi nderé ndimbal yém Ngánján. 32 Njam Ngánjánene ndimbal kwayaghé yém yáne kénjún, Ngánjánam so ndimbal kwayaghé yaramete Ambumoe yánjo kénjúnyo, a so ndimbal kwayaghé taramangé yá tekofnar.
english: When he had gone out , Jesus said , “ Now the Son of Man has been glorified , and God has been glorified in him .
If God has been glorified in him , God will also glorify him in himself , and he will glorify him immediately .

nama: Tane ambumtértér, yénd fémafé so yéna yéném tekofnaye. Fémofem so wéronjati, a sénonjo yéndon emndetan fém, némé yéndon tamndetan Ju ár: Ándan yénd wiota, fém kétán yau so eyota.
english: Little children , I will be with you a little while longer . You will seek me , and as I said to the Jews , ‘ Where I am going , you can ’ t come ,’ so now I tell you .

nama: Totér nák ewaraman féfe, euwetati ámb ár, ndené fété yéndon euwetamén fém, yénémamén fém náuwetati fémro fémro. 35 Yénayan méinyotio ár mat so kamndangi ndené fém sem tane waitogh ár, fém njam náuwetati fémro fémro.
english: A new commandment I give to you , that you love one another. Just as I have loved you , you also love one another.
By this everyone will know that you are my disciples , if you have love for one another .”

nama: Saimon Fitam yémotai fá, "Yuré, fém ándan niota?" Yesum yawangoi, "Ándan yénd wiote, fémo yau so kwénmaito sénonjo, wénde soramé so néngwaitote."
english: Simon Peter said to him , “ Lord , where are you going ?” Jesus answered , “ Where I am going , you can ’t follow now , but you will follow afterwards .”

nama: Fitam yémotai, "Yuré, némamén yéndon yau so néngmaitotan fém sénonjo? Yénd afrengéghkaf wém feyot kérot."
english: Peter said to him , “ Lord , why can ’ t I follow you now ? I will lay down my life for you .”

nama: Wénde Yesum yawangoi, "Fém so efalo tayot kér ném? Efaloe yéndo némndetan fe, fémon yénd fronde so kwékenang nambinotmé, soramé ghakér kowi kutnangé!"
english: Jesus answered him , “ Will you lay down your life for me ? Most certainly I tell you , the rooster won’ t crow until you have denied me three times .

nama: Yau táf féfene tikéf néwérsotat. Efalo yiyátotati Ngánján a efalo wiyátotati ndenáyo yénd. 2 Tane Afane méngo siyém tárfár satafé; yau njam efalo témorwén, yénd yau so kafrotawén ndené yénd wéngém kétán ménát sifayé frengéghét féfeyot. 3 Yénd njam wéngém féfene sifayé frengéghét, yénd so nénangotan a tangwasron tafaftio ménát fém so em kété ánde yénd wém. 4 Fém mat em end yéné sifayat ándan yénd wiota." Yesu end yém kétán Afafaf
english: “Don’ t let your heart be troubled . Believe in God . Believe also in me .
In my Father ’s house are many homes. If it weren’ t so , I would have told you . I am going to prepare a place for you .
If I go and prepare a place for you , I will come again and will receive you to myself ; that where I am , you may be there also .
You know where I go , and you know the way .”

nama: Tomasém yémndai fá, "Yuré, yénd mafina yéném ándan fém nuwanote, ndernáye yénd mat so yéném end?"
english: Thomas said to him , “ Lord , we don’ t know where you are going . How can we know the way ?”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Yénd wém end a efalo a ghérsé. Yau tayofnaye ámb ár so yéngém Afafaf, mé ta kénjúmaro. 7 Njam fémofem yénd té wayamngoyénd, fémofem ndenéyameyo so tayamngongi tane Afé. Yénamé sénonjo fém mat em fá a té yinjongi."
english: Jesus said to him , “ I am the way , the truth, and the life . No one comes to the Father , except through me .
If you had known me , you would have known my Father also . From now on , you know him and have seen him .”

nama: Filif norayai, "Yuré, téfeyot ténmauyafo Afé a yénd yénanotro ménde yéném."
english: Philip said to him , “ Lord , show us the Father , and that will be enough for us .”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Fém táf mat ném yénd, Filif, yénd fémafé ténmorwén tekefifi. Árké árom yénd té winjoi yémon té yinjo Afé. Fém némamén noraye, 'Téfe Afé ténmauyafo'? 10 Yau fémon efalo yiyátote nde yénd wém Afane kénjún, a Afé siyém tane kénjún? Si yénd kés norayan féfefaf yau tanjoyo em. Wénde yéné siyém Afé tane kénjún yémor, emo ewafrote yánjo ásáfogh. 11 Yénd efalo wiyátotati njam ndené norayan yénd wém Afane kénjún a Afé siyém tane kénjún. Njam yau, efalo wiyátotati ménamén yéndon tanwafrotan yam. 12 Yéndon féfe ewaufrotan efalo, árké árom yénd efalo wiyátota so ewafrote yéné yam yéndon némé tanwafrotan. A wafroghyam yémo so ewafrote so engwainde minde ndimbal yam ndené yéndon kés tawafrotan, ménamén yénd nuwanotan Afafaf. 13 A yéndon so ewaufrotan némat fém njam nómnendati tane yétkwénan, ménát Afane ndimbal kwayaghé so nauyafote Ambumoene kénjúmé. 14 Fém so nómnendati tafaf némat téu tane yétkwénan, a yéndon so yafrotan. Unyéghofnar si Ngánján Mbérmbéroenemén
english: Jesus said to him , “ Have I been with you such a long time , and do you not know me , Philip ? He who has seen me has seen the Father . How do you say , ‘ Show us the Father ’?
Don’ t you believe that I am in the Father , and the Father in me ? The words that I tell you , I speak not from myself ; but the Father who lives in me does his works .
Believe me that I am in the Father , and the Father in me ; or else believe me for the very works ’ sake .
Most certainly I tell you , he who believes in me , the works that I do , he will do also ; and he will do greater works than these , because I am going to my Father .
Whatever you will ask in my name , I will do it , that the Father may be glorified in the Son .
If you will ask anything in my name , I will do it .

nama: Fémofem njam wuwetati yénd, fém so námyotati tane nákfaf. 16 A yéndon so tamnendangén Afé, a yémon so tawaramangé ámb Wáutárégh ár. Yéné Wáutárégh ár so yémor fémofafé tuot. 17 Fá siyém Efaloene Ngánján Mbérmbér. Mband maratam yau so tumyongé, ménamén yémon yau so yéfande o yau so tayamngongé fá. Wénde fém mat em fá ménamén fémafé emor a so yém féfene kénjún. 18 Yéndon yau so tauron séfarékw ambumnit, yénd so mé wéném féfefaf. 19 Mé tekofnaye, mband maratam yau so wéfande, wénde fémofem so wéfandati. Ménamén yénd naketan, fém ndenéyameyo so naketati. 20 Yéné efghon fém mat so em ndené yénd wém tane Afane kénjún, a fém em tane kénjún a yénd wém féfene kénjún. 21 Endefaf em tane nák a ewaitotat, fá yéné féyém emofem yénd wuwetat, méinyotio ár emofem yénd wuwetat so wéi euwete tane Afam, a yéndon so euwetan fá a yénd nauyafotan yéfefaf."
english: If you love me , keep my commandments .
I will pray to the Father , and he will give you another Counselor, that he may be with you forever :
the Spirit of truth, whom the world can ’ t receive , for it doesn’ t see him and doesn’ t know him . You know him , for he lives with you and will be in you .
I will not leave you orphans . I will come to you .
Yet a little while , and the world will see me no more ; but you will see me . Because I live , you will live also .
In that day you will know that I am in my Father , and you in me , and I in you .
One who has my commandments and keeps them , that person is one who loves me . One who loves me will be loved by my Father , and I will love him , and will reveal myself to him .”

nama: Judas (yau Judas Iskariot) norayai, "Yuré, fém fémyo némamén so nauyafote téfefafro wénde yau mband maratfaf?"
english: Judas ( not Iscariot ) said to him , “ Lord , what has happened that you are about to reveal yourself to us , and not to the world ?”

nama: Yesum yéwawangoi, "Táf emo njam wuweta yénd, yémo so ewaitote tane watamegh. Tane Afam fá so yuwete, a tane Afé a yénd so yénre yáfaf a yénmor yémafé tuot. 24 Fá emo yau njam wuweta yénd yau so ewaitote tane watamegh. Yéné si fémofem kés náyáretati yau em tanjoyo, yáne em Afane emo yénd kwénmáfárete. 25 Yéné yammén yéndon té kénorayan féfefaf njam fémafé mé téném. 26 Wénde Wáutárégh ár, Ngánján Mbérmbér, efe Afam so yénmáfárete tane yétkwénan, so ewatamete méinyotio yaman. Yémon so eutáne fém sái ewafarotati méinyotio yéndon némé kénorayawén féfefaf. 27 Krufrat ghérsé norotan féfefaf; tane krufrát ghérsé yéndon ewarametan féfé yau ndené mband maratam kés ewaramete yéndon ewarametan. Yau eumyotati féfenjo tikéf uwérsoghan a yau férfér em.
english: Jesus answered him , “ If a man loves me , he will keep my word . My Father will love him , and we will come to him and make our home with him .
He who doesn’ t love me doesn’ t keep my words . The word which you hear isn’ t mine , but the Father ’s who sent me .
“ I have said these things to you while still living with you .
But the Counselor, the Holy Spirit , whom the Father will send in my name , will teach you all things , and will remind you of all that I said to you .
Peace I leave with you . My peace I give to you ; not as the world gives , I give to you . Don’ t let your heart be troubled , neither let it be fearful .

nama: Fémofem té kwiyáretati yénd korayan, yénd so kuwanon a so nénangotan féfefaf wéikor. Fémofem njam yénd wuwetati, fém so áuwéghan em tane álighmén kétán Afafaf; ménamén Afam wainde yénd. 29 Yéndon té tawaufrotan soramé so nufrote, ménát njam nufrota fémofem so efalo tiyátongi. 30 Yénd yau so norayan ndenayu, ménamén yéné mband maratoene limánégh ár yéném. Wénde fá siyém waftafnar yém tafaf, 31 wénde mband marat mat so yém ndené yéndon yuwetan tane Afé a ewaufrotan ndenéfifi ndernáye tane Afam wénémndetam yénd. "Kénaflangi, téfrangongém yéné sifayé.
english: You heard how I told you , ‘ I am going away , and I will come back to you .’ If you loved me , you would have rejoiced because I said ‘ I am going to my Father ;’ for the Father is greater than I .
Now I have told you before it happens so that when it happens , you may believe .
I will no more speak much with you , for the prince of the world comes , and he has nothing in me .
But that the world may know that I love the Father , and as the Father commanded me , even so I do . Arise , let ’s go from here .

nama: Yénd wém efalo wénménj, a tane Afé siyém ndau téfnár. 2 Yémo enfete méinyotio kafekafe tane kénjún árkéménayam yau efunat mbwe, a yémon méinyotio kafe ewaine árkéménayam efunat mbwe, ménát so minde mbweyafé em. 3 Fém em wafroghkaf ménamén simén yéndon árké tanémndetawén fém. 4 Mia em tane kénjún, a yénd wéi mé so wém féfene kénjún. Yau ámb kafeyam mé so yéfune mbwe yémonyo táfandro wénménjan njam yurau. Ndenéyameyo fémofemyo yau so yéfunati mbwe táfandro ta kénjún njam mé em.
english: “ I am the true vine, and my Father is the farmer .
Every branch in me that doesn’ t bear fruit , he takes away. Every branch that bears fruit , he prunes , that it may bear more fruit .
You are already pruned clean because of the word which I have spoken to you .
Remain in me , and I in you . As the branch can ’ t bear fruit by itself unless it remains in the vine, so neither can you , unless you remain in me .

nama: Yénd wém wénménj, a fém em kafekafe. Ár njam mé yém ta kénjún a yénd wém yá kénjún, yémon so yéfune tárfár mbwe tayofnaye fémon yau némé so yafrote. 6 Fém yau njam mé ném ta kénjún, fém ndenanit ném kafekafe yénau engtarnat a sérét nufrotat. Árém ekafetat, ewitat kétán fését a nakernat. 7 Fém njam mé em ta kénjún, a tane si mé em féfe kénjún, namotati némat fém ménde em, a so yafrote féfe. 8 Yéné siyém tane Afane ndimbal kwayaghé ménaye fémofem efunati tárfár mbwe, a nauyafotati fémyo em tane waitogh ár.
english: I am the vine. You are the branches . He who remains in me and I in him bears much fruit , for apart from me you can do nothing .
