If a man doesn’ t remain in me , he is thrown out as a branch and is withered ; and they gather them , throw them into the fire , and they are burned .
If you remain in me , and my words remain in you , you will ask whatever you desire , and it will be done for you .
“ In this my Father is glorified , that you bear much fruit ; and so you will be my disciples .

nama: Ndené fété Afam yénd uwetam, a yéndon euwetamén fém, sénonjo mé aem tane uwéghan. 10 Njam fém námyotati tane sifaf, fém mé so em tane uwéghan, ndené fété yénd té kamyotawén Afane sifaf a mé wéném yáne uwéghan. 11 Yéndon té ewaufron yéné ménát tane áuwégh so yém féfefaf a ménát féfene áuwégh so wéi yém afoghare.
english: Even as the Father has loved me , I also have loved you . Remain in my love.
If you keep my commandments , you will remain in my love, even as I have kept my Father ’s commandments and remain in his love.
I have spoken these things to you , that my joy may remain in you , and that your joy may be made full .

nama: Yéné siyém tane nák: Nauwetati fémro fémro ndené fété yéndon kés euwetamén fém. 13 Minde tukén uwégh fene fútarét siyém sái téram fenjo ghérsé yéfeyot. 14 Fém em tane fútaréf njam fémofem ewafrotati némat yéndon emndetan. 15 Yéndon yau ndené emndetan faiofnar ásáfogh ár, ménamén faiofnar ásáfogh ár yau so mat yém yáne yurane ásáfoghmén, wénde yéndo emndayén fútaréf, ménamén méinyotio némé mat nénáyátoyén Afata yéndon mat té tanyátotan fém. 16 Fémofem yau yénd wékafayénd, wénde yéndon ekafayén fém a ewaferyén ménát fém so engém mbwe funaghét, mbwe árkéméné so naketat. A némat fém njam nómnendati tane yétkwénan, Afam so tawaramangé féfe. 17 Yéné siyém tane nák: Nauwetati fémro fémro. Mbandam tékrát efande Yesuene waitogh ár
english: “ This is my commandment , that you love one another , even as I have loved you .
Greater love has no one than this , that someone lay down his life for his friends .
You are my friends if you do whatever I command you .
No longer do I call you servants , for the servant doesn’ t know what his lord does . But I have called you friends , for everything that I heard from my Father , I have made known to you .

You didn’ t choose me , but I chose you and appointed you , that you should go and bear fruit , and that your fruit should remain ; that whatever you will ask of the Father in my name , he may give it to you .
“ I command these things to you , that you may love one another.

nama: Njam mband maratam méndméndat efanda, táf nawafarotati ndené yénd té méndméndat kwéfandau fronde. 19 Njam fém mband maratoene ném, so némuete ménamén fém yáne ném. Wénde fém yau mband maratoene em, a yéndon té ewaferyén kétamé mband maratta. Yéné téfnan mband maratam méndméndat efande fém. 20 Nawafarotati si yéndon kés tamndetawén fém: 'Faiofnar ásáfogh ár yáinde yánjo yuram.' Njam yémofem wasérmbotat yénd, wéi so ewasérmbotat fém ndenéyameyo. Njam tane watameghfaf náyáretat fá, wéi so náyáretat féfene watameghfaf. 21 Yémofem so ewasérmbotat ndenáye tane yétkwén téfnan ménamén fá mafina em emo yénd wénmáfáretam. 22 Yénd yau njam kwénmorwén a korayawén yéfefaf, fá yau so yaufiyam kértafé tamorwén; wénde sénonjo fá yau so norayat ndené yéndfem yau tawafrotam yaufi. 23 Emo yénd méndméndat wéfande wéi méndméndat yéfande tane Afé ndenéyameyo. 24 Yéndon yau njam tawafrotan ufarogh yam yéfefaf árké ámb árom yau ewafrotam, fá yau so tamorwén yaufiyam kértafé. Wénde ndenáye yém yémofem té yinjoyénd a yémafem mé méndméndat ténfandat yénd a tane Afé. 25 Wénde yéné siyém sái efalo tiyátongi némé yéfarotaménd yéfene nákan, "Yémofem méndméndat wéfandat mé fifiofnar."
english: If the world hates you , you know that it has hated me before it hated you .
If you were of the world , the world would love its own . But because you are not of the world , since I chose you out of the world , therefore the world hates you .
Remember the word that I said to you : ‘ A servant is not greater than his lord .’ If they persecuted me , they will also persecute you . If they kept my word , they will also keep yours .
But they will do all these things to you for my name ’s sake , because they don’ t know him who sent me .
If I had not come and spoken to them , they would not have had sin; but now they have no excuse for their sin.
He who hates me , hates my Father also .
If I hadn’ t done among them the works which no one else did , they wouldn’ t have had sin. But now they have seen and also hated both me and my Father .
But this happened so that the word may be fulfilled which was written in their law , ‘ They hated me without a cause .’

nama: Njam Wáutárégh ár yéném, efe yéndon so yénmáfáretan kétamé Afata, Efaloene Njánján Mbérmbér efe so yéném Afata, fá so néngafrote tanemén. 27 Fém wéi ndenéyameyo so néngafrotati tanemén, ménamén yéndfé fém té téném rényéghta.
english: “ When the Counselor has come , whom I will send to you from the Father , the Spirit of truth, who proceeds from the Father , he will testify about me .
You will also testify , because you have been with me from the beginning.

nama: Méinyotio yéné yéndon té tawaufrotan féfe ménát fém yau so kékmbongi ndimbal mwighata. 2 Yémofem so eutonat áumengégh méngota, efogh yéna yéném njam fá emo esmetat krot fém so nemne kar yéné yame ásáfogh yafrote Ngánjáneyot. 3 Yémofem so ewafrotat yéné yam ménamén fá mafina em Afé o yénd. 4 Yéndon té tawaufrotawén yéné, ménát njam yéné efogh kufarngé yéfeyot yéné yam wafroghét, fém so kawafarotangi némé yéndon tanémndetan. Ásáfogh Ngánján Mbérmbéroene
english: “ I have said these things to you so that you wouldn’t be caused to stumble .
They will put you out of the synagogues. Yes, the time is coming that whoever kills you will think that he offers service to God .
They will do these things because they have not known the Father nor me .
But I have told you these things so that when the time comes , you may remember that I told you about them . I didn’ t tell you these things from the beginning, because I was with you .

nama: Wénde sénonjo yénd nuwanotan yáfaf emo wénmáfáretam yénd, wénde ámb árom yau wémota, 'Ándan fém niota?' 6 A sénonjo yéndon té ewaufron yénémamén, féfene tikéf té ewafo ndimbal ghérghérsisam. 7 Wénde yéndon féfe ewaufrotan efalo, yéné siyém féfene merot yénd kés nuwanotan. Ménamén yénd njam yau kuwanon, Wáutárégh ár mé yau so yéném féfefaf, wénde yénd njam kuwanon, yéndon so yénmáfáretan fá féfefaf. 8 A fá njam yéném, yémon so tawauyafongé yéné mband marat árét ndené fá ndernáye em. Yémon tawauyafongé ndené fá mámáfi em. Fá yau mat em némé yaufi yém, fá yau mat em efe mbarkánd em Ngánjánefaf, a fá yau mat em Ngánjánene moghmén. 9 Fá yau mat em mbarkánde némé yaufiyam yém, ménamén yémofem yau efalo wiyátotat yénd; 10 fá yau mat em mbarkándmén Ngánjánefaf, ménamén yénd nuwanotan Afafaf. A fémofem yau kor so wéfandati wéi. 11 A fá yau mat em moghmén, ménamén sénonjo yéné mbandmén limánégh ár té moghan yém.
english: But now I am going to him who sent me , and none of you asks me , ‘ Where are you going ?’
But because I have told you these things , sorrow has filled your heart .
Nevertheless I tell you the truth: It is to your advantage that I go away ; for if I don’ t go away , the Counselor won’ t come to you . But if I go , I will send him to you .
When he has come , he will convict the world about sin, about righteousness , and about judgment ;
about sin, because they don’t believe in me ;
about righteousness , because I am going to my Father , and you won’ t see me any more ;
about judgment , because the prince of this world has been judged .

nama: Tafaf tárfár yamafé em sái norayan féfefaf, wénde sénonjo so em tárfárfifi féfeyot yátoghét. 13 Wénde njam fá, efaloene Ngánján Mbérmbér yéném, yémon so ewatamete méinyotio efalo fifiyamé. Fá yau so noraye yánjomén. Fá so yénaro noraye némé fá nénáyárete, a yémon so ewaufrote némé so néngufrotat soramé. 14 Yémon so yénérse ndimbal kwayaghé tafaf, ménamén yémon so engérse némé yéndon norayan a so ewaufrote féfe. 15 Méinyotio némé em Afane sem tane em. Yéné téfnan yénd norayan ndené Ngánján Mbérmbéram so engérse némé em tane a engwaufrota féfeyot. Ghérghérsisé so kawengongé áuwéghét
english: “ I still have many things to tell you , but you can ’t bear them now .

However , when he , the Spirit of truth, has come , he will guide you into all truth, for he will not speak from himself ; but whatever he hears, he will speak . He will declare to you things that are coming .
He will glorify me , for he will take from what is mine and will declare it to you .
All things that the Father has are mine ; therefore I said that he takes of mine and will declare it to you .

nama: Tekofnaye yénd yau so wéfandati, wéikor tekofnaye, a fémofem wéi so wéfandati. 17 Ámb yáne waitogh ár norayayénd fáro, "Némé yémon yésérmbne ndenáye kés noraye ndené, 'mé tekofnaye, fémofem yau so wéfandati wéikor a tekofnaye soramé so kwinjongi,' a 'ménamén yénd wiota Afafaf'?" 18 Fá mé kamotawét, "Némé yémon yésérmbne ndené mé tekofnaye? Yéndfem kor yau yérsam némé fá noraye!"
english: “ A little while , and you will not see me . Again a little while , and you will see me .”

Some of his disciples therefore said to one another , “ What is this that he says to us , ‘ A little while , and you won’ t see me , and again a little while , and you will see me ;’ and , ‘ Because I go to the Father ’ ?”
They said therefore , “ What is this that he says , ‘ A little while ’ ? We don’ t know what he is saying .”

nama: Yesu mat témorwén némamén fá ménde témorwén moghét térametawét fá, yénémamén fá norayai yéfefaf, "Némamén fém namotati fémro yéndon némé yésérmbnan táf yénd njam norayangén ndené, 'mé tekofnaye, fémofem yau so wéfandati wéikor a tekofnaye soramé so kwinjongi wéikor'? 20 Yéndon féfe ewaufrotan efalo, fém so nendati a ghérghérsisé em wénde mband marat fá mé yém áuwéghan. Fém so ghérghérsisé em wénde soramé féfene ghérghérsisé so kawengongé áuwéghét. 21 Amaf njam náráfte ambum kété yém tékrát ménamén yáne efogh té nawer; wénde táf amafom njam ambum téráftangé, fá tawalindangé ndémke yáne áuwégh téfnan ménamén ambum té nufar yéné mband maratot. 22 Féyo féfefaf: Sénonjo siyém féfene ghérghérsisé efogh, wénde yéndon so tawinjon fém wéikor a fém so náuwétati, a árké árom yau tangwanangé féfene uwégh. 23 Yéné efghon fémofem yau so wémotati némé rokarot. Yéndon féfe ewaufrotan efalo: tane Afam so ewaramete némat njam namotati tane yétkwénan. 24 Kétamayo sénonjo fém ámb yau kamotati tane yétkwénan; kamotangi a fémofem so tanangi a féfene áuwégh so afoghkaf yém.
english: Therefore Jesus perceived that they wanted to ask him , and he said to them , “ Do you inquire among yourselves concerning this , that I said , ‘ A little while , and you won’t see me , and again a little while , and you will see me ’?
Most certainly I tell you that you will weep and lament , but the world will rejoice . You will be sorrowful , but your sorrow will be turned into joy .

A woman , when she gives birth , has sorrow because her time has come . But when she has delivered the child , she doesn’ t remember the anguish any more , for the joy that a human being is born into the world .
Therefore you now have sorrow , but I will see you again , and your heart will rejoice , and no one will take your joy away from you .
“ In that day you will ask me no questions. Most certainly I tell you , whatever you may ask of the Father in my name , he will give it to you .
Until now , you have asked nothing in my name . Ask, and you will receive , that your joy may be made full .

nama: Yéndon té korayan waufarogh si, ménát waferghét féfefaf yénd némamén té korayawén, efogh yéna yéném ánde yéndon yau so néngorayan yéné waufarogh si, wénde so ewaufrotan mé safénro tane Afanemén. 26 Yéné efghon fém so namotati tane yétkwénan, yénd yau ndené norayan yéndo sái yémotan Afé féfenemén. 27 Yau, Afam yémonyo euwete fém ménamén fémofem yénd té wuwetaménd a té efalo wiyátoyénd ndené yénd wénmormén Ngájáneta. 28 Yénd wénmormén Afata a nufaryén mband maratot, sénonjo yéndon yéfrangotan mband marat a nangotan kétán Afafaf."
english: “ I have spoken these things to you in figures of speech . But the time is coming when I will no more speak to you in figures of speech , but will tell you plainly about the Father .
In that day you will ask in my name ; and I don’ t say to you that I will pray to the Father for you ,
for the Father himself loves you , because you have loved me , and have believed that I came from God .
I came from the Father and have come into the world . Again , I leave the world and go to the Father .”

nama: Féyo Yesuene waitogh ár norayayénd, "Sénonjo fém noraye mé sáfanro téfefaf a yau waufarogh si noraye ánde yau kor kénérsawém. 30 Sénonjo yéndfem té yinjongém ndené fém mat ném méinyotio rokar, fém yau ménde ném efe yéramai amogh si fefaf. Yéné téfnan, yéndfem efalo niyátotam fém efaloe té nénmormén Ngánjáneta."
english: His disciples said to him , “ Behold , now you are speaking plainly , and using no figures of speech .
Now we know that you know all things , and don’t need for anyone to question you . By this we believe that you came from God .”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Fémofem té efalo wiyátongi sénonjo? 32 Wénde efogh yéna yéném, a yéna yém, ánde so fém nofarnati féfenjo méngotuot fémofem so kwéfrangongi tambia, wénde yénd yau tambia wém, tane Afafé yénd yénre. 33 Yéndon té tawaufrotan yénémamén ménát tane kénjún féfefaf so yém krufrát yam. Yéné mband maratan féfefaf so em kérté yam, wénde mwighé táikér aem! Yéndon té yáindayén mband marat.
english: Jesus answered them , “ Do you now believe ?
Behold , the time is coming , yes, and has now come , that you will be scattered , everyone to his own place , and you will leave me alone . Yet I am not alone , because the Father is with me .
I have told you these things , that in me you may have peace . In the world you have trouble ; but cheer up ! I have overcome the world .”

nama: Soramé Yesu norayai yéné, fá néretai njafarot a norayai:
english: Jesus said these things , then lifting up his eyes to heaven , he said , “ Father , the time has come . Glorify your Son , that your Son may also glorify you ;

nama: Fémon wafté yaramai yá méinyotio árét, ménát yémon so tawaramangé tuot ghérsé méinyotio yéfe fémon efe yaramai yáyot. 3 Tuot ghérsane fifi siyém fém mat sái kényátongi, mé efalo Ngánján, a mat sái káyátongi Yesu Keriso, efe fémon yénmáfáretam. 4 Yéndon té yénérsamén feyot ndimbal kwayaghé mband maratot ménáyan kés yifoyén ásáfogh fémon némé té waramai wafroghét. 5 Afé, kwaram ta ndimbal kwayaghé fene sáfrére sénonjo, ndené sáfétio ndimbal kwayaghé kwaram yéndfé kés yénmare fémafé soramé mband marat yafrotam. Yesuf koraiwét Ngánjánefaf yánjo waitogh árfenemén
english: even as you gave him authority over all flesh , so he will give eternal life to all whom you have given him .
This is eternal life , that they should know you , the only true God , and him whom you sent , Jesus Christ .
I glorified you on the earth . I have accomplished the work which you have given me to do .
Now , Father , glorify me with your own self with the glory which I had with you before the world existed .

nama: "Yéndon té kémuyafotan fém yéfefaf fémon efe té waramai yéné mband maratan. Fá tamorwén fené fémon eramai fá tafaf. Yémofem té tarawenat fene si. 7 Sénonjo fá mat em ndené méinyotio fémon kwaramete eném fe tambén. 8 Yéndon ewaramayén yéné si fémon waramai, a yémofem umyoyénd. Fá mat náyátoyénd ndené yéné siyém efalo yénd wénmormén fe tambén, a yémofem efalo wiyátoyénd ndené fémon yénd kwénmáfárete. 9 Yénd norayan Fefaf Ngánján yéfenemén. Yénd norayan Fefaf yau yéné mband maratmén, wénde yéfenemén fémon efe té waramai, ménamén fá sem fene. 10 Méinyotio tane némé em fene em, a fene méinyotio némé em tane em; a tane ndimbal kwayaghé nálále yéfe kénjúmé. 11 Yénd yau so yéné mband maratan ndenayu wémor, wénde fá mé so emor yéné mband maratan, a yénd angoghét nénufngon fefaf. Njúnnjúnofnar Afé, ewarawena fá fene waftafé yétkwéne, árké yétkwén ta waramai, ménát fá so em ámbiro ndené fété yénd ámbiro kés yénre. 12 Njam yénd ténmorwén yémafé, yéndon tawarawenawén fá ménaye fene wafté yétkwéne, fémon árké waramai. Yéndon tawarawenawén a ámb yau nolindai mé ámbiroro wénde efe té yékmayénd, ménát Buk siam sái efalo tiyátongé.
english: “ I revealed your name to the people whom you have given me out of the world . They were yours , and you have given them to me . They have kept your word .
Now they have known that all things whatever you have given me are from you ,
for the words which you have given me I have given to them ; and they received them , and knew for sure that I came from you . They have believed that you sent me .
I pray for them . I don’ t pray for the world , but for those whom you have given me , for they are yours .
All things that are mine are yours , and yours are mine , and I am glorified in them .
I am no more in the world , but these are in the world , and I am coming to you . Holy Father , keep them through your name which you have given me , that they may be one , even as we are .
While I was with them in the world, I kept them in your name . I have kept those whom you have given me . None of them is lost except the son of destruction, that the Scripture might be fulfilled .

nama: "Yénd angogh nénufngon fefaf sénonjo, wénde yéndon néngorayan yéné yammén njamandio mé wém yéné mband maratan ménát méinyotio tane áuwégh so yém yéfefaf. 14 Yéndon ewaramayén fene si, wénde mband maratam méndméndat tafandawéng fá, ménamén fá yau yéné mband maratmén em ndené fété yénd yau wém yéné mband maratmén. 15 Tane orayégh yau yém ménát fémon sái tawitrémb yéné mband maratta, wénde ménát so ewarawene yaufi ároe tambén. 16 Fá yau em yéné mbandmén, yénd wéi ndenáyo yau wém yéné mband maratmén. 17 Njúnnjúnofnar fá táyáto ménaye fene efalo sié fene si siyém efalo. 18 Fémon kés kwénmáfárete yénd yéné mband maratot, yéndon wéi engwáfáretan yéné mband maratot. 19 Yéfeyot yénd narametan yéndio fefaf, ménát fá wéi so efaloe taramangé fefaf. Yesu Ngánjánafé koraiwét méinyotio efalo yátogh árfenemén
english: But now I come to you , and I say these things in the world , that they may have my joy made full in themselves .
I have given them your word . The world hated them because they are not of the world , even as I am not of the world .
I pray not that you would take them from the world , but that you would keep them from the evil one .
They are not of the world , even as I am not of the world .
Sanctify them in your truth. Your word is truth.
As you sent me into the world , even so I have sent them into the world .
For their sakes I sanctify myself , that they themselves also may be sanctified in truth.

nama: "Tane orayégh yau yéfeyotro yém. Yénd wéi norayan yéfeyot emofem so efalo wiyátotat yéfene si waitogh kénjúmé, 21 ménát fá méinyotio so em ámbiro, Afé, ndené fété fém ném tane kénjún a yénd wém fene kénjún. Fá wéi so em téfene kénjún ménát mband maratam so efalo yiyátote ndené fémon té wénmáfáretam yénd. 22 Yéndon ewaramayén yéné ndimbal kwayaghayo árké fémo waramai, ménát fá so em ámbiro, ndené yénd ámbiro kés yénre. 23 Yénd yéfene kénjún a fém tane kénjún, ménát fá so kamndangi mé ámbirofifi, ménát mband marat sái mat yiyátotat ndené fémon yénd kwénmáfárete a euwetam fá ndenéyameyo yénd kés uwetam.
english: “ Not for these only do I pray , but for those also who will believe in me through their word ,
that they may all be one ; even as you , Father , are in me , and I in you , that they also may be one in us ; that the world may believe that you sent me .
The glory which you have given me , I have given to them , that they may be one , even as we are one ,
I in them , and you in me , that they may be perfected into one , that the world may know that you sent me and loved them , even as you loved me .

nama: "Afé! Yénd ménde wém fá efe waramai ta so em yéndfé kété yénd ánde wém, a so yéfandat tane ndimbal kwayaghé, yéné ndimbal kwayaghé fémon árké té waramai ménamén fémon yénd uwetam, soramé yu yafrotam.
english: Father , I desire that they also whom you have given me be with me where I am , that they may see my glory which you have given me , for you loved me before the foundation of the world .

nama: "Mbarkánd Afé! Mband maratam yau némé yamngo, wénde yénd mat wém fém, a efalo yátogh ár mat em ndené yénd fémon kwénmáfárete. 26 Yéndon fém mat niyátoyén fene yétkwén yéfefaf, a mé so yéngwasamngotan mat sái néngayátotan ménát fene uwégh kés yém tayot so yém yéfene kénjún, a yénd yéndio wéi so wém yéfene kénjún."
english: Righteous Father , the world hasn’ t known you , but I knew you ; and these knew that you sent me .
I made known to them your name , and will make it known ; that the love with which you loved me may be in them , and I in them .”

nama: Njam yémon yifoi Ngánjánafé orayégh, Yesuf nuwanoyénd yánjo waitogh árfé kéférmetawét Kidron tétkafe. Kétamé karfan témorwén olif wén ndaufaf, fá a yánjo waitogh ár engmormén kétán.
english: When Jesus had spoken these words , he went out with his disciples over the brook Kidron , where there was a garden , into which he and his disciples entered .

nama: Judas, emo sén yérametam, mat náyátoi yéné sifayé ménamén Yesuf yánjo waitogh árfé táf túmén kafángotawét yéné sifayan. 3 Féyo Judas yénmormén kétán olif wén ndaufaf tanlimndau fiyaré mérén a wáwefnogh méngo wambégh ár kétamé sénko ghéngén wárogh ár a Farasi árta. Yémofem tanérsawét lambefé, ghi a mék rokar.
english: Now Judas , who betrayed him , also knew the place , for Jesus often met there with his disciples .
Judas then , having taken a detachment of soldiers and officers from the chief priests and the Pharisees , came there with lanterns , torches , and weapons .

nama: Yesu, mat témorwén méinyotio némé so kufrotau yáfaf, néngaflai a emotai fá, "Efe fémofem yénronjati?"
english: Jesus therefore , knowing all the things that were happening to him , went out and said to them , “ Who are you looking for ?”

nama: Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Yesu Najaretmén." Yesu norayai, "Yénd féu Wém."
english: They answered him , “ Jesus of Nazareth .” Jesus said to them , “ I am he .” Judas also , who betrayed him , was standing with them .

nama: Táf njam Yesu norayai, "Ndené Yénd fété Wém," fá táf kwémbkwémbe nangoyénd a nuyáyénd mbandot.
english: When therefore he said to them , “ I am he ,” they went backward and fell to the ground .

nama: Wéikor Yesum emotai, "Efe fémofem yénronjati?
english: Again therefore he asked them , “ Who are you looking for ?” They said , “ Jesus of Nazareth .”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Yéndon té ewaufron ndené yénd fété wém. Fémofem njam wéronjati yénd, tangéumyongi tane waitogh ár nguwanongi." 9 Yesu norayai yéné ménamén frondeyo té korayau yénémamén, "Yéndo yau ámb tétarnam yéné ár fémo efe ta kwaramai." Yénayam yafrote némé fá té korayau frondeyo yéné fété kufrotau.
english: Jesus answered , “ I told you that I am he . If therefore you seek me , let these go their way ,”
that the word might be fulfilled which he spoke , “ Of those whom you have given me , I have lost none .”

nama: Féyo Saimon Fité témorwén witmafé sénté náifé. Yémo yérai a yéngwanetai limánégh ghéngén wárogh ároene faiofnar ásáfogh ár. Yémo yénfai tambén téngan yéné faiofnar ásáfogh ároene. Yéné faiofnar ásáfogh ároene yétkwén témorwén Malkus. 11 Wénde Yesum yémndai Fité, "Tango fenjo witmafé sénté náifé yánjo njénfaf. Yéndon téu yénetan yéné ndémkemén kafusita Afam árké té waramai." Yesu yéngwasroyénd Anasefaf
english: Simon Peter therefore , having a sword , drew it , struck the high priest’ s servant , and cut off his right ear . The servant ’ s name was Malchus .
Jesus therefore said to Peter , “ Put the sword into its sheath . The cup which the Father has given me , shall I not surely drink it ?”

nama: Féyo fiyaré a yéfene sénko ár a wawefogh méngo wanjengégh ár yémofem yerayénd Yesu. Yémofem yumbetaménd. 13 A yénémnjoyénd fronde Anasefaf. Kayafasém endene mérés nawerai, Kayafas témorwén tuk wárogh ár yéné yunjéf. 14 Kayafas fá yéné témorwén emo tamndetau Ju ár ndené mer so yém njam ámbiro ár kér yém méinyotio árét. Fitane fronde kenagh
english: So the detachment, the commanding officer , and the officers of the Jews seized Jesus and bound him ,
and led him to Annas first , for he was father-in-law to Caiaphas , who was high priest that year .
Now it was Caiaphas who advised the Jews that it was expedient that one man should perish for the people .

nama: Saimon Fité a ámb yánjo waitogh ár yéngwaiteyayénd Yesu. Limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár mat témorwén yéné Yesuene waitogh ároenemén, féyo fá engérmén Yesufé kénjút kétán limánégh ghéngén wárogh ároene méngo sifayat, 16 wénde Fité mé takayongérwén téndon sésafnefaf, wénde ámb Yesuene waitogh ár efe limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár mat témorwén, fá nénangoi, témndangé mérés efe témorwén sésafne wanjengégh ár, a yényawai Fité kénjút.
english: Simon Peter followed Jesus , as did another disciple . Now that disciple was known to the high priest, and entered in with Jesus into the court of the high priest;
but Peter was standing at the door outside . So the other disciple , who was known to the high priest, went out and spoke to her who kept the door , and brought in Peter .

nama: Mérés efe témorwén sésafnefaf yémon yémotai Fité, "Fém ámb yéné ném yáne waitogh ár, efalo fété ném?" Wénde Fitam yawangoi, "Yénd yau."
english: Then the maid who kept the door said to Peter , “ Are you also one of this man ’s disciples ?” He said , “ I am not .”

nama: Krufér témorwén, faiofnar ásáfogh ár a wáwefnogh méngo wanjengégh ár nokayoyénd fés téndomé árké yétayaménd afaloghét. Fité fá takayogérwén kafalau fés árenjén. Limánégh ghéngén wárogh árom témotau Yesu
english: Now the servants and the officers were standing there , having made a fire of coals, for it was cold . They were warming themselves . Peter was with them , standing and warming himself .

nama: Yénamayo, limánégh ghéngén wárogh árom yémotai Yesu yánjo waitogh ármén a yánjo watameghmén.
english: The high priest therefore asked Jesus about his disciples and about his teaching .

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Yénd té korayan marataye yéné mband maratot, yéndon túmén tawatametan áumengégh méngomé a wáwefnogh méngo sifayan, ánde méinyotio Ju ár kénáumendawét ámbiro sifayat, yénd ámb yau korayan kwankwane. 21 Némamén wémote yénd? Emotati fá emofem kwiyáretawét yénd, fá mat em némé yénd korayawén."
english: Jesus answered him , “ I spoke openly to the world . I always taught in synagogues and in the temple , where the Jews always meet . I said nothing in secret .
Why do you ask me ? Ask those who have heard me what I said to them . Behold , they know the things which I said .”

nama: Njam norayai yéné, ámb wáwefnogh méngo wanjengégh ár efe takayongérwén yá kaka ngángaye yésmai sáfan a norayai, "Fém yau táf noraya limánégh ghéngén wárogh ároe yéné ende."
english: When he had said this , one of the officers standing by slapped Jesus with his hand , saying , “ Do you answer the high priest like that ?”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Yénd njam té norayayén mámáfie, mé koraya ánde yém mámáfi. Wénde táf yénd njam té norayayén efaloe, némamén fémon wesem yénd?"
english: Jesus answered him , “ If I have spoken evil , testify of the evil ; but if well , why do you beat me ?”

nama: Féyo Anasém yéngwafnamoi Yesu umbéghkaf Kayafasefaf limánégh ghéngén wárogh ároefaf. Fitam yékenai Yesu wéikor
english: Annas sent him bound to Caiaphas , the high priest.

nama: Njamandio Saimon Fité takayongérwén fésén kafalau, fá yémotayénd, "Fém mété ném ámb yáne waitogh ár." Fá nawanyotai a norayai, "Yénd yau."
english: Now Simon Peter was standing and warming himself . They said therefore to him , “ You aren’ t also one of his disciples , are you ?” He denied it and said , “ I am not .”

nama: Ámb ghéngén wárogh ároene faiofnar ásáfogh ár, yá mérén endene téngan Fitam yanfai, yémon yémotai fá, "Némé yéndon yau fém ewinjeyayén yémafé kété ndawan?" 27 Wéikor Fité nawanyotayéng, yéné efoghféneféneyan ghakér kowi táf nutnayéng. Yesu Failete sáfrére
english: One of the servants of the high priest, being a relative of him whose ear Peter had cut off , said , “Didn’ t I see you in the garden with him ?”
Peter therefore denied it again , and immediately the rooster crowed .

nama: Féyo Ju árém yélimayénd Kayafasene méngota Rom gafanane méngofaf. Táf témorwén tándái akw, wénde fá mé yau nényawayénd méngo kénjút, ménamén fá táf so káyátongayénd mámáfi, yau táf so taumyongayénd Waingégh téménd njamke nénet. 29 Féyo Failet néntoryéng yéfefaf a namotai, "Némé mámáfi si fém noraye yéné árom tafrote?"
english: They led Jesus therefore from Caiaphas into the Praetorium . It was early , and they themselves didn’ t enter into the Praetorium , that they might not be defiled , but might eat the Passover .
Pilate therefore went out to them and said , “ What accusation do you bring against this man ?”

nama: Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Fá yau njam témorwén yaufiyam wafrogh ár, yéndfem yau táf so téramangayém féfefaf."
english: They answered him , “ If this man weren’t an evildoer , we wouldn’t have delivered him up to you .”

nama: Failet korayangé, "Téngwasrongi fémofemyo a yémotati féfenjo náke."
english: Pilate therefore said to them , “ Take him yourselves , and judge him according to your law .” Therefore the Jews said to him , “ It is illegal for us to put anyone to death,”

nama: Yéné kufrotau ménamén Yesu némé si korayau ndernáye kér so témorwén.
english: that the word of Jesus might be fulfilled , which he spoke , signifying by what kind of death he should die .

nama: Failet táf néngangoi méngo kénjút, yanmoi yáfafétio Yesu a témotangé, "Némé fém warsagh ár ném Ju árfene?"
english: Pilate therefore entered again into the Praetorium , called Jesus , and said to him , “ Are you the King of the Jews ?”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Némé yéné ámogh si fe tambén yéném, o té ámb árém kafrotat tanemén?"
english: Jesus answered him , “ Do you say this by yourself , or did others tell you about me ?”

nama: Failetém yawangoi, "Yénd yau wém Jumén. Fene áryo a yéfene limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár yémofem nénramangi tafaf. Némé fémon tafrote?"
english: Pilate answered, “ I ’m not a Jew , am I ? Your own nation and the chief priests delivered you to me . What have you done ?”

nama: Yesu norayai, "Tane limángégh sifayé siyém yéné mband maratmén yau yém. Njam témorwén, tane faiofnar ásáfogh árém so kásmetawét a kwambetawét yénd kétamé Ju árfene weréghta. Wénde sénonjo tane limánégh sifayé siyém ámb yumén yém."
english: Jesus answered, “ My Kingdom is not of this world . If my Kingdom were of this world , then my servants would fight, that I wouldn’ t be delivered to the Jews . But now my Kingdom is not from here .”

nama: Failet norayai, "Féyo, fém ném warsagh ár, féyotaro?" Yesum yawangoi, "Fém ném mbarkánd ndené kés noraya yénd fété wém warsagh ár. Mbarkándaye, yéné téfnan yénd náráftamén a wénmormén yéné mband maratot sái kafrotawén efalomén. Méinyotio efaloe tambénta ár efe em náyáretat tafaf."
english: Pilate therefore said to him , “ Are you a king then ?” Jesus answered , “ You say that I am a king . For this reason I have been born , and for this reason I have come into the world , that I should testify to the truth. Everyone who is of the truth listens to my voice .”

nama: Failetém yémotai, "Némé yém efalo?"
english: Pilate said to him , “ What is truth?” When he had said this , he went out again to the Jews , and said to them , “ I find no basis for a charge against him .

nama: Wénde yéné siyém féfenjo túmén yam tayot ménát yéndon sái téngutorén féfefaf ámbiro kwéfkwéf méngo ár yéné Ju árfene awafarogh Waingégh efogh. Fém ménde té em yéndon sái tutorén warsagh ár Ju árfene?"
english: But you have a custom that I should release someone to you at the Passover . Therefore , do you want me to release to you the King of the Jews ?”

nama: Yémofem keye yawangoyénd, "Yau fá, wénde Barabas!" Barabas témorwén usérmbogh téfnár.
english: Then they all shouted again , saying , “ Not this man , but Barabbas!” Now Barabbas was a robber .

nama: Failetém ewáfáretai fiyaré Yesue fémoghét. 2 Fiyaram engérsaménd ámb tékértékérafé ménj a yémofem yafrotaménd ákiki Yesue. Yémofem yafayoyénd yáne sénkoyan. Féyo yémofem yéngwanayénd ndéndák ngarot sodé a yémofem yéné yéfayoyénd yáfaf. Yémofem yéné méinyotio yafrotaménd ndené fá kar témorwén warsagh ár 3 a tangmorwén, aférghe korayawét, "Ei, warsagh ár Ju árfene!" A yémofem mé yesmayénd sáfan.
english: So Pilate then took Jesus and flogged him .
The soldiers twisted thorns into a crown and put it on his head , and dressed him in a purple garment .
They kept saying , “ Hail , King of the Jews !” and they kept slapping him .

nama: Ambinomén Failet néntoryéng a korayangé Ju árfefaf, "Kénretangi, yéndon fá wéikor yénémnjan féfefaf ménát fém so mat táyáton ndené yéndon yau yinjon ámb mámáfi árkémamén fai so tanangé yémon." 5 Njam Yesu néntoryéng tafayongérwén wétwétafé ákiki sénkoyan a tawongérwén ndéndák ngarot sáláme, Failetém tamndangé fá, "Siyém yéné ár!"
english: Then Pilate went out again , and said to them , “ Behold , I bring him out to you , that you may know that I find no basis for a charge against him .”
Jesus therefore came out , wearing the crown of thorns and the purple garment . Pilate said to them , “ Behold , the man!”

nama: Njam sénko ghéngén wárogh ár a wáwefnogh méngo wanjengégh árém yinjoyénd Yesu, fá nutnayénd, "Ténamndangi wafatarégh wénan! Ténamndangi wafatarégh wénan!" Wénde Failetém ewawangoi, "Fémofem téngwasrongi a téngwamangi. Ndené tayot, yéndon yau yinjon ámb mámáfi árkémamén fai so tanangé yémon."
english: When therefore the chief priests and the officers saw him , they shouted, saying , “ Crucify ! Crucify !” Pilate said to them , “ Take him yourselves and crucify him , for I find no basis for a charge against him .”

nama: Ju ár yawangoyénd, "Téfefaf yéna nák yém, a yéné nákan fá so kér yém, ménamén fá kawarsau ndené fá kar témorwén Ngánjánene Ambum."
english: The Jews answered him , “ We have a law , and by our law he ought to die, because he made himself the Son of God .”

nama: Njam Failet náyárai yéné, fá mindefifi férféram yifoi, 9 a fá táf néngnyawai méngot. Yémon yémotai Yesu, "Árkamé fém nénmormén?" Wénde Yesum yau ámb yaramai uwangogh. 10 Failetém yémndai, "Yau ménde ném siot tafaf? Nawafarotati tafaf yém muyé. Yéndon so ngémumyon fém nguwano, o yéndo so taumyon fá kémamangi wawatarégh wénan"
english: When therefore Pilate heard this saying , he was more afraid .
He entered into the Praetorium again , and said to Jesus , “ Where are you from ?” But Jesus gave him no answer.
Pilate therefore said to him , “Aren’ t you speaking to me ? Don’ t you know that I have power to release you and have power to crucify you ?”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Fefaf yau so témorwén yéné wafté ta waingéghét ndemamén kémaramangai fe njafarta. Yénémaménnde fá emo yénd wéram fefaf, yáne yaufiyamam yáinde fene yaufiyam."
english: Jesus answered, “ You would have no power at all against me , unless it were given to you from above. Therefore he who delivered me to you has greater sin.”

nama: Féyo yénamé Failetém yéta utorghét térametau Yesu, wénde Ju ár ménjtaye mé kutnawét, "Njam fémon téngéumyo yéné ár nguwanongé, fém yau so fútar ném ndimbal warsagh ár Kaisarene. Árké ár efe nawarsat ndené fá sái em warsagh ár yékarotat Kaisar."
english: At this , Pilate was seeking to release him , but the Jews cried out , saying , “ If you release this man , you aren’ t Caesar ’s friend ! Everyone who makes himself a king speaks against Caesar !”

nama: Njam Failetém náyárai yéné, yémon yénémnjoi Yesu a námnjoi mogh árfene ámnjogh kitarayan. Yéné ámnjogh kitaré témorwén yéné sifayan yémndetat Marat wém, Ibru sie Gabata. 14 Yéné efogh témorwén afrengégh efogh Waingégh téméndmén; yéné témorwén efoghméfe. Failet korayangé Ju árfefaf, "Féfene warsagh ár siyém!"
english: When Pilate therefore heard these words , he brought Jesus out and sat down on the judgment seat at a place called “ The Pavement ”, but in Hebrew , “ Gabbatha .”
Now it was the Preparation Day of the Passover , at about the sixth hour . He said to the Jews , “ Behold , your King !”

nama: Wénde fá nutnayénd, "Tésmetangi! Tésmetangi! Ténamndangi wafatarégh wénan!" Failetém emotai, "Némé yéndon so yénamndan féfene warsagh ár wafatarégh wénan? Sénko ghéngén wárogh árém yawangoyénd, "Téfene ámb yau yém warsagh ár wénde Kaisarro!"
english: They cried out , “Away with him ! Away with him ! Crucify him !” Pilate said to them , “ Shall I crucify your King ?” The chief priests answered , “ We have no king but Caesar !”

nama: Ambinomén Failetém yéngwafamai yéfefaf ménát wafatarégh wénan namghét. Wamégh
english: So then he delivered him to them to be crucified . So they took Jesus and led him away.

nama: Téngérsau yánjo wafatarégh wén, yéné sifayat yémndetat sénko sot sifayé, yéné Ibru árfene sie árké yémndetat Golgota. 18 Kété yémofem yénamndaménd Yesu wafatarégh wénan. Yémofem ekmeyayénd ámb sómbio ár wafatarégh wénan Yesue kaka. Fá tárwén Yesue téndota a Yesu yéfe néndkéfan.
english: He went out , bearing his cross , to the place called “ The Place of a Skull ”, which is called in Hebrew , “ Golgotha ”,
where they crucified him , and with him two others , on either side one , and Jesus in the middle .

nama: Failetém wéi yéfarotam férén a yékayoyénd wafatarégh wénan. Ndenaye yéfarotam: "Yesu Najaretmén, Ju árfene Warsagh ár." 20 Tárfár Ju árém taftawét yéné férén, ménamén kété yéné sifayan ánde Yesu yénamndaménd wafatarégh wénan kétamé nayuofnar témorwén tesenot, yéné férén yéfarotaménd Ibru sie, Latin sie a Grik sie. 21 Ju sénko ghéngén wárogh ár engmormén Failetefaf a korayat, 'Yau efarota ndené, 'Ju árfene warsagh ár.' Wénde, téfarota, 'Yéné ár korayé ndené fá yém warsagh ár Ju árfene.'"
english: Pilate wrote a title also , and put it on the cross . There was written , “ JESUS OF NAZARETH , THE KING OF THE JEWS .”
Therefore many of the Jews read this title , for the place where Jesus was crucified was near the city ; and it was written in Hebrew , in Latin , and in Greek .
The chief priests of the Jews therefore said to Pilate , “Don’ t write , ‘ The King of the Jews ,’ but , ‘ he said , “ I am King of the Jews .”’”

nama: Failetém ewawangoi, "Némé yéndon téfarotan, yéndon yéné fété téfarotan."
english: Pilate answered, “ What I have written , I have written .”

nama: A njam fiyaram yénamndaménd wafatarégh wénan Yesu, yémofem yéfitraryénd sáláme a efaloyénd fo mérne kénjún a ámbiroero nawaftamend fiyaré. Yémofem yéné yafrotaménd a féyo yémofem yanayénd tombé sáláme árkéméné tawongérwén kénjún a yinjoyénd ndené sáláme namofnar témorwén tárfár karfan, wénde yéné yafrotaménd ámbiro karéfta kétamé tuk kétán yu.
english: Then the soldiers , when they had crucified Jesus , took his garments and made four parts , to every soldier a part ; and also the tunic . Now the tunic was without seam, woven from the top throughout .

nama: Fá norayayénd yéfe kénjúnro, "Yau so tétirarngém, yénd so nambnam dais kembne a nafandam emo so tanangé." Yéné nufrotam ménát si so efalo káyátongai árké noraye, "Yémofem kawaftawét tane sáláme yéfenjo kénjúnro a dais kembne kambnawét tane sálámeyot."{x{ ...f* {x{19.24 Sams 22:18 Féyo yéné fété fiyaram tafrotawét.
english: Then they said to one another , “ Let ’s not tear it , but cast lots for it to decide whose it will be ,” that the Scripture might be fulfilled , which says , “ They parted my garments among them . They cast lots for my clothing .” + 19:24 Psalms 22:18 Therefore the soldiers did these things .

nama: Yesuene wafatarégh wén kaka nokayoyénd yánjo yátmé, amafoene yánngényo, a Meri efe témorwén amaf Klofasene, a Meri Makdalin. 26 Njam Yesum yinjoi yánjo yátmé kété, yánjo waitogh ár efe yémon tuwetau takayongérwén yá kaka, fá norayai yánjo yatmafaf, "Amaf, fene ambum yéné féyém." 27 Féyo fá norayai yéné waitogh ároefaf, "Siyém fene amé." Kétamé yéné efoghta, yéné Yesuene waitogh árom tanjetau Yesue yátmé yánjo méngon. Yesuene Kérmén
english: But standing by Jesus ’ cross were his mother , his mother ’s sister, Mary the wife of Clopas , and Mary Magdalene .
Therefore when Jesus saw his mother , and the disciple whom he loved standing there , he said to his mother , “ Woman , behold , your son !”
Then he said to the disciple , “ Behold , your mother !” From that hour , the disciple took her to his own home .

nama: Yéné soramé, Yesu mat náyátoi ndené yémo té ásáfogh yifo. A ménát sái Buk si efalo káyátongé, fá norayai, "Yénd nuam wéramete." 29 Kété témorwén ghafté wéri nu{y{ ...f* {y{19.29 ghafté wéri nu Mt, Mk, Lk checked it again
english: After this , Jesus , seeing that all things were now finished , that the Scripture might be fulfilled , said , “ I am thirsty !”
Now a vessel full of vinegar was set there ; so they put a sponge full of the vinegar on hyssop , and held it at his mouth .

nama: Njam yémon yénetai yéné wéri nu, Yesu norayai, "Kés nefo!" Yéné siafé táf sénko yéraweryéng a kér yémormén.
english: When Jesus therefore had received the vinegar , he said , “ It is finished !” Then he bowed his head and gave up his spirit .

nama: Yéné témorwén afrengégh efghon, a yénamayomén efogh ténmorwén Safat. Ménamén Ju ár méndefnar tamorwén kérwén sái mé tawamangérwén wafatarégh wénan táf Safatan, yémofem yémotayénd Failet ménát ghambér rafarghét ménát wékeye kérot a fifi wewérghét. 32 Féyo fiyaré engmormén kétán. Yémofem ewarafareyayénd sómbio árfene ghambér efe Yesue téndon tarwén wafatarégh wénan. 33 Wénde njam fá nénaflayénd Yesuefaf a yinjoyénd ndené fá kér té yémormén yémofem yau yáne ghambér yarafaryénd. 34 Wénde ámb fiyaram yékunyai Yesu kwasayan fimbe, táf fété, férék a nu nasureyayénd. 35 Ár emo yinjoi yéné yam yéméindam afroghét, a yáne afrogh si siyém efalofifi. Fá mat yém ndené yémon nafrote efaloe, a fá wéi nafrote ménát fémofem wéi so efalo yiyátotati. 36 Yéné yam nufrotam ménát Buk si so efalo káyátongai: "Yau ámb yáne sot so tarafarngayénd,"{z{ ...f* {z{19.36 Eksodés 12:46; Némbérs 9:12; Sams 34:20
english: Therefore the Jews , because it was the Preparation Day , so that the bodies wouldn’ t remain on the cross on the Sabbath ( for that Sabbath was a special one ), asked of Pilate that their legs might be broken and that they might be taken away.
Therefore the soldiers came and broke the legs of the first and of the other who was crucified with him ;
but when they came to Jesus and saw that he was already dead , they didn’ t break his legs .
However, one of the soldiers pierced his side with a spear , and immediately blood and water came out .
He who has seen has testified , and his testimony is true . He knows that he tells the truth, that you may believe .
For these things happened that the Scripture might be fulfilled , “ A bone of him will not be broken .”

nama: a ámb Buk si noraye, "Fá so néretat yáfaf efe yékunyayénd fimbe."{a{ ...f* {a{19.37 Jakaraya 12:10 Mband ramégh Yesue
english: Again another Scripture says , “ They will look on him whom they pierced .”

nama: Soramé, Josef kétamamén Aramatia tesenmén yamnendai Failet Yesuene fifiot. Josef témorwén Yesuene waitogh ár, wénde kwankwane témorwén ménamén férférafé tafandau Ju ár. Failetene umyoghanyo, fá yénmormén a yéngwanai Yesuene fifi. 39 Nikodimas, efe fronde yéngmormén Yesuefaf sémbáran, yémo yénérsam ndené 34 kilogram mer wimafé wékwér miré a aloe wénmén. 40 Yéné sómbio árém téngérséwét a yéfyarménd Yesuene fifi sálámeye ménáyafé mer wimafé wékwérafé, yéné yafrotaménd ndenáye Ju árfene mband raméghan túmén témorwén. 41 Yéné sifayan ánde Yesu wafatarégh wénan yénamndaménd, kété témorwén ndau, yéné ndau kénjún témorwén totér mband raméghmén féne wíman, ánde ámb ároe yau mband yaramayénd. 42 Ménamén Ju árfene afrengégh efogh témorwén a kaka wéi témorwén mbéwé, yémofem Yesu yényawayénd kété.
english: After these things , Joseph of Arimathaea, being a disciple of Jesus , but secretly for fear of the Jews , asked of Pilate that he might take away Jesus ’ body . Pilate gave him permission . He came therefore and took away his body .
Nicodemus , who at first came to Jesus by night , also came bringing a mixture of myrrh and aloes, about a hundred Roman pounds .
So they took Jesus ’ body , and bound it in linen cloths with the spices, as the custom of the Jews is to bury .
Now in the place where he was crucified there was a garden . In the garden was a new tomb in which no man had ever yet been laid .
Then , because of the Jews ’ Preparation Day ( for the tomb was near at hand ), they laid Jesus there .

nama: Tándái Sande akwan, njam kwéfkwéf mé témorwén, Meri Makdalin yéngmormén kétán mbéwafaf a yinjoi wím té nitérmboi sésafneta. 2 Féyo fá kénérsau a yéfande Saimon Fité a ámb Yesuene waitogh ár, efe Yesum tuwetau, a norayai, "Yémofem Yuré yéngutorngi mbéwata, a yénd mafina yéném ánde yémofem yékmangi fá!"
english: Now on the first day of the week , Mary Magdalene went early , while it was still dark , to the tomb , and saw that the stone had been taken away from the tomb .

Therefore she ran and came to Simon Peter and to the other disciple whom Jesus loved , and said to them , “ They have taken away the Lord out of the tomb , and we don’ t know where they have laid him !”

nama: Féyo Fité a ámb waitogh ár nuwaneyayénd mbéwéfaf. 4 Fá mérne nengeyayénd, wénde ámb Yesuene waitogh árom yéngwaindam Fité a néngengoi frondeyo mbéwéfaf. 5 Fá náwefnoi a néngretai kénjút sáláme tékmangérwén kété wénde yau néngnyawai kénjút. 6 Féyo Saimon Fité efe yá soramé nguwaitotau néngufaryéng a nényawai mbéwéfaf yinjoi sáláme tékmangérwén kété. 7 Yémo wéi yinjoi sáláme árkéménaye yéfiyaryénd Yesuene sénko. Yéné sáláme naknam fáyo fénatayo kétándmé ámb sálámeta. 8 Féyo yéné waitogh ár, efe fronde nufaryéng mbéwéfaf wéi fá néngnyawai, yémo yinjoi a efalo yiyátoi. 9 Fá yau kor mat náyáteyayénd Buk si ndené Yesu so kanongé kétamé kérta. 10 Féyo Yesuene waitogh ár néngangotaménd yéfenjo méngot. Yesu nufaryéng Meri Makdalinefaf
english: Therefore Peter and the other disciple went out , and they went toward the tomb .
They both ran together . The other disciple outran Peter and came to the tomb first .
Stooping and looking in , he saw the linen cloths lying there ; yet he didn’ t enter in .
Then Simon Peter came , following him , and entered into the tomb . He saw the linen cloths lying ,
and the cloth that had been on his head , not lying with the linen cloths, but rolled up in a place by itself .
So then the other disciple who came first to the tomb also entered in , and he saw and believed .
For as yet they didn’ t know the Scripture , that he must rise from the dead .
So the disciples went away again to their own homes.

nama: Wénde Meri mé takayongérwén téndo mbéwata ye kendau. Njam mé kendau, fá néngáwefnoi fandaghét mbéwéfaf 12 a ewinjeyai sómbio njafar si résagh ár kafe ngarot sáláme umaneghkaf, tárwén kété Yesuene fifi ánde té tékmangérwén, ámb sénko tambén ámb kafkaf tambén.
english: But Mary was standing outside at the tomb weeping . So as she wept , she stooped and looked into the tomb ,
and she saw two angels in white sitting , one at the head and one at the feet , where the body of Jesus had lain .

nama: Yémofem yémotangeyayénd, "Amaf, némamén fém nende?"
english: They asked her , “ Woman , why are you weeping ?” She said to them , “ Because they have taken away my Lord , and I don’ t know where they have laid him .”

nama: Yénamé, fá nawengoi a yinjoi Yesu takayongérwén kété, wénde yémo kor yau yáyamngoi ndené Yesu témorwén.
english: When she had said this , she turned around and saw Jesus standing , and didn’ t know that it was Jesus .

nama: Fá korayangé, "Amaf, némamén fém nende? Efe fémo yéronje?" Fá kéma kemnau nde ndau téfnár kar témorwén, fá norayai, "Ndimbal, táf fémon njam fá té yéngwan, kwaufro ánde fémon yékém fá a yéndo so ténmanan."
english: Jesus said to her , “ Woman , why are you weeping ? Who are you looking for ?” She , supposing him to be the gardener , said to him , “ Sir , if you have carried him away , tell me where you have laid him , and I will take him away .”

nama: Yesum témndangé fá, "Meri." Fá nawengoi Yesue tambén a norayai Ju árfene sie, "Raboni!" Yáne fifi watamegh ár.
english: Jesus said to her , “ Mary .” She turned and said to him , “ Rabboni !” + 20:16 Rabboni is a transliteration of the Hebrew word for “great teacher.” which is to say , “ Teacher !” + 20:16 or, Master

nama: Yesu norayai, "Yau mé wereta yénd, ménamén yénd yau mé narmbon Afafaf. Nguwano tane mérnafefaf a tawaufro, 'Yénd armboghét nufngon kétán tane Afafaf a fene Afafaf, tane Ngánjánefaf a fene Ngánjánefaf."
english: Jesus said to her , “Don’ t hold me , for I haven’ t yet ascended to my Father ; but go to my brothers and tell them , ‘ I am ascending to my Father and your Father , to my God and your God .’”

nama: Meri Makdalin yéngmormén a tawaufrongé Yesuene waitogh árét, "Yéndon té yinjon Yuré!" a yémon tawaufrotau yéfe yéné némé korayau Yesu yáfaf. Yesu nufaryéng yánjo waitogh árfefaf
english: Mary Magdalene came and told the disciples that she had seen the Lord , and that he had said these things to her .

nama: Njam séite témorwén yéné efghonyo Sandeyan Yesuene waitogh ár náumendaménd ámbiro sifayatro méngo kénjún namnaménd Ju árfene férfére, Yesu yénmormén nokayoi yéfe kénjún a norayai, "Krufrat so yém féfefaf!" 20 Soramé fá norayai yéné, yémon tauyafongé yéfefaf yánjo ngángé a kwasé. Yáne waitogh ár áuwégh nufngoyénd njam yémofem yinjoyénd Yuré.
english: When therefore it was evening on that day , the first day of the week , and when the doors were locked where the disciples were assembled, for fear of the Jews , Jesus came and stood in the middle and said to them , “ Peace be to you .”
When he had said this , he showed them his hands and his side . The disciples therefore were glad when they saw the Lord .

nama: Wéikor Yesu norayai, "Krufrat so yém féfefaf! Ndené fété Afam yénd wénmáfáretam, yéndon wéi ewáfáretan fém." 22 Yénamé ambone téngwayangé yéfefaf a korayangé, "Téngwanangi Ngánján Mbérmbér. 23 Njam fémofem tawawainangi ámb ároene yaufiyam, yéné so tawainangé. Njam fémofem yau tawawainangi yéfene yaufiyam, yéné yau so tawainangé." Yesu nufaryéng Tomasefaf
english: Jesus therefore said to them again , “ Peace be to you . As the Father has sent me , even so I send you .”
When he had said this , he breathed on them , and said to them , “ Receive the Holy Spirit !
If you forgive anyone ’s sins, they have been forgiven them . If you retain anyone ’s sins, they have been retained .”

nama: Wénde Tomas(efe yémndetat Didimas), ámb Yesuene 12 mén waitogh ár, yau témorwén kété ámb Yesuene waitogh árfefaf njam Yesu yénmormén. 25 Féyo ámb Yesuene waitogh árém yaufroyénd, "Yéndfem té yinjongém Yuré!" Wénde fá norayai yéfefaf, "Táfandro yéndon njam tawinjon tot mbor yáne ngángayan a tane ngángaye tayanjangén ánde ténamndawét, a tanyawan ngángé yáne kwasayan ánde fimbe yékunyayénd, yéndon yau efalo so tiyáton."
english: But Thomas , one of the twelve , called Didymus , wasn’ t with them when Jesus came .

The other disciples therefore said to him , “ We have seen the Lord !” But he said to them , “ Unless I see in his hands the print of the nails , put my finger into the print of the nails , and put my hand into his side , I will not believe .”

nama: Ámb Safat soramé Yesuene waitogh ár témorwén méngo kénjút wéikor, a Tomas kété témorwén yéfefaf. Yéta fété sésafne emnaménd Yesu mé nényawai nokayoi yéfe néndkéfan a norayai, "Krufrat so yém féfefaf!" 27 Féyo korayangé Tomasefaf, "Tafai fene ngángé tot mboran yéna, tafanda tane ngángé tanwatemb. Fenjo ngángé a télau tane kwasayan. Yau natambna efalo tiyáto."
english: After eight days , again his disciples were inside and Thomas was with them . Jesus came , the doors being locked , and stood in the middle , and said , “ Peace be to you .”
Then he said to Thomas , “ Reach here your finger , and see my hands . Reach here your hand , and put it into my side . Don’ t be unbelieving, but believing .”

nama: Tomasém témndangé Yesu, "Tane Yuré a tane Ngánján!"
english: Thomas answered him , “ My Lord and my God !”

nama: Féyo Yesum témndangé Tomas, "Ménamén fémon té winjo yénd, fémon yénémamén efalo wiyáto, frengéghkaf em fá emofem yau wéfandat wénde ndimbal mwighaye mé efalo wiyátotat."
english: Jesus said to him , “ Because you have seen me , you have believed . Blessed are those who have not seen and have believed .”

nama: Yesum ámb tárfár ufrogh yam tawafrotau njam yánjo waitogh árfé tamorwén, árké yau ekai yéné Bukan. 31 Wénde yéné faroghmén em ménát fémofem so efalo yiyátoti ndené Yesu fété yém Keriso, Ngánjánene Ambum, a efalo njam yiyátotati, féfene so yém ghérsé yáne yétkwénan.
english: Therefore Jesus did many other signs in the presence of his disciples , which are not written in this book ;
but these are written that you may believe that Jesus is the Christ , the Son of God , and that believing you may have life in his name .

nama: Yéné soramé Yesu nufaryéng wéikor kétán yánjo waitogh árfefaf, kété Galili arakafan, a ndené nufrotam. 2 Saimon Fité, Tomas(ámb yétkwén Didimas), Nataniel kétamamén Kana Galili yuwon, sómbio ambum Jefediene a sómbio ámb Yesuene waitogh ár efe tamorwén méinyotio kété. 3 Saimon Fitam tamndangé fá, "Yénd nuwanotan wagif rényéghét." Fá korayangi yáfaf, "Yénd so wéngém fefaf." Féyo fá nénwanoyénd a nuflayénd boutan, wénde yéné sémbáran yémofem yau ámb ernayénd.
english: After these things , Jesus revealed himself again to the disciples at the sea of Tiberias . He revealed himself this way .
Simon Peter , Thomas called Didymus , Nathanael of Cana in Galilee , and the sons of Zebedee , and two others of his disciples were together .
Simon Peter said to them , “ I ’m going fishing.” They told him , “ We are also coming with you .” They immediately went out and entered into the boat . That night , they caught nothing .

nama: Tándái akwan, Yesu nokayoi arakaf téndofaf, wénde yánjo waitogh árém yau yáyámngoyénd ndené Yesu témorwén.
english: But when day had already come , Jesus stood on the beach; yet the disciples didn’ t know that it was Jesus .

nama: Fá nénutnai yéfefaf, "Fútaréf, féfene wagif ámb té ewam? Yémofem yénmawangoyénd, "Yau."
english: Jesus therefore said to them , “ Children , have you anything to eat?” They answered him , “ No .”

nama: Fá korayangé, "Titangi féfenjo net boutoene tambénta a so tarnyangi ámb wagif." Njam yafrotaménd, fá féyotarofnar tamorwén net okaughét boutot waflighét ménamén minde tárfár wagif numetaménd.
english: He said to them , “ Cast the net on the right side of the boat , and you will find some .” They cast it therefore , and now they weren’ t able to draw it in for the multitude of fish .

nama: Waitogh ár efe Yesum tuwetau norayai Fitafaf, "Yéné siyém Yuré!" Njamandio Saimon Fité yiyárai norayai, "Yéné siyém Yuré," Saimon Fitam yumbayéng faru soda árké fá nafitraryéng ménát ásáfoghét naumbai yánjo fifiyamé a natnam nuot, a kakmetau masot. 8 Wénde ámb Yesuene waitogh ár kénwaitotawét boutafé ténroghawét net wagif afoghare. A fá nayuofnar tamorwén tunat a tamorwén ndené 100 mité arakaf téndot. 9 Njam fá namghayénd, yémofem yinjoyénd fés árenj wagif tafayongérwén, a ámb féskaf flawé.
english: That disciple therefore whom Jesus loved said to Peter , “ It ’ s the Lord !” So when Simon Peter heard that it was the Lord , he wrapped his coat around himself ( for he was naked ), and threw himself into the sea .
But the other disciples came in the little boat ( for they were not far from the land , but about two hundred cubits away ), dragging the net full of fish .
So when they got out on the land , they saw a fire of coals there , with fish and bread laid on it .

nama: Yesu korayangé yéfefaf, "Ténmanangi ámb wagif árkéméné fémofem té ernyangi. 11 Saimon Fété nuflai boutot a roghau yénmafngoyénd net arakaf téndofaf. Yéné témorwén afoghare ndimbal wagifafé, 153 méinyotio wénde net yau naftéraryéng. 12 Yesum tamndangé fá, "Kénaflangi a tánetangi njamke." Wénde yánjo waitogh ár férfér tamorwén yá moghét, "Efe fém ném?" Fá mat náyátoyénd ndené fá témorwén Yuré. 13 Yesu nénaflai, yékafai féskaf flawé a tawaramangé yéfe, a wéi ndenéyameyo ewafrotam wagif. 14 Yéné fiyémormén nambiomén Yesu snufaryéng yánjo waitogh árfefaf, soramé kérta anoghan. Yesu a Fité
english: Jesus said to them , “ Bring some of the fish which you have just caught .”
Simon Peter went up , and drew the net to land , full of one hundred fifty-three great fish . Even though there were so many , the net wasn’ t torn .
Jesus said to them , “ Come and eat breakfast!” None of the disciples dared inquire of him , “ Who are you ?” knowing that it was the Lord .
Then Jesus came and took the bread, gave it to them , and the fish likewise .
This is now the third time that Jesus was revealed to his disciples after he had risen from the dead .

nama: Njam yémofem ewifoyénd njamke néne, Yesu norayai Saimon Fitafaf, "Saimon Jonene ambum, fene uwégham tayot té ewainde yéné ámb waitogh árfene uwégh tayot?" Fá norayai, "Néméwét, Yuré, fém mat ném ndené yéndon némuwetan fém." Yesu korayangé, "Emanjna tane sif tosé."
english: So when they had eaten their breakfast, Jesus said to Simon Peter , “ Simon , son of Jonah, do you love me more than these ?” He said to him , “ Yes , Lord ; you know that I have affection for you .” He said to him , “ Feed my lambs.”

nama: Wéikor Yesu korayangé, "Saimon Jonene ambum, fémon efalo té wuwete yénd? Yémon yawangoi, "Néméwét, Yuré, fém mat ném ndené yéndon némuwetan." Yesum témndangé, "Ewanjeta kor tane sif."
english: He said to him again a second time , “ Simon , son of Jonah, do you love me ?” He said to him , “ Yes , Lord ; you know that I have affection for you .” He said to him , “Tend my sheep .”

nama: Nambiomén Yesum témndangé fá, "Saimon Jonene ambum, fémon efalo té wuwete yénd?" Fité ndémkefé yéfghetam ménamén Yesum yémotai fá nambinotma, "Té wuwete yénd?" Fá korayangé, "Yuré, fém mat ném méinyotio yam; fém mat ném yéndon némuwetan fém."
english: He said to him the third time , “ Simon , son of Jonah, do you have affection for me ?” Peter was grieved because he asked him the third time , “ Do you have affection for me ?” He said to him , “ Lord , you know everything . You know that I have affection for you .” Jesus said to him , “ Feed my sheep .

nama: Yéndon némndetan efalo, fém njam mé totér ár kénmorwén fém té kumanetau fémyo a kéngmorwén ándan fém ménde té kénmorwén. Wénde fém njam té kénamndé bulu fémo so ngángé tawio, a ámb árém so kémambangi fém a nélimndat fém ándan yau ménde ném álighét." 19 Yesu korayau yéné ménát tauyafotau ndernáye Fité kér so témorwén a ánde Fitam yéné kére so tuyotau Ngánján. Féyo fá norayai yáfaf, "Kwénmaito yénd!"
english: Most certainly I tell you , when you were young , you dressed yourself and walked where you wanted to . But when you are old , you will stretch out your hands , and another will dress you and carry you where you don’ t want to go .”
Now he said this , signifying by what kind of death he would glorify God . When he had said this , he said to him , “ Follow me .”

nama: Fité nawengoi a yinjoi Yesuene waitogh ár efe Yesum tuwetau tanwaitowéng fá. Yéné fá témorwén efe néngamghai Yesuefaf kété férégh njamke néneyan a té norayai, "Yuré, emo so sén néramete fém?" 21 Njam Fitam yinjoi fá, yémon kamotangé, "Yuré, ndernáye wét fá?"
english: Then Peter , turning around , saw a disciple following . This was the disciple whom Jesus loved, the one who had also leaned on Jesus ’ chest at the supper and asked , “ Lord , who is going to betray you ?”
Peter , seeing him , said to Jesus , “ Lord , what about this man ?”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Yénd ménde njam wém fá sái mé yém ghérsé kétánotio yénd nénangotan, ndernáye wét yém yéné fefaf? Fémon táf waitota yénd." 23 Yénémamén si marat náyátoi yánjo fútar kénjún ndené yéné Yesuene waitogh ár yau so kér yém. Wénde Yesu yau ndené norayai ndené fá sái kér témorwén, fá mé ndenáye norayai, "Yénd ménde njam wém fá sái yém ghérsé kétánotio yénd nénangotan yéné wét ndernáye yém fefaf?"
english: Jesus said to him , “ If I desire that he stay until I come , what is that to you ? You follow me .”

This saying therefore went out among the brothers that this disciple wouldn’ t die. Yet Jesus didn’ t say to him that he wouldn’ t die, but , “ If I desire that he stay until I come , what is that to you ?”

nama: Yéné Yesuene waitogh ár témorwén efe kafrotau yénémamén a emo téfarotau. Yénd mat yéném ndené yáne afrogh siyém efalo.
english: This is the disciple who testifies about these things , and wrote these things . We know that his witness is true .

nama: Yesum tangwafrotau tárfár yam wéi ndenáyo, njam ményotio yammén téfarotawét, kété yau so témorwén féyotarofnar sifayé yéné mband maratan ménát sái Buk takmetawét
english: There are also many other things which Jesus did , which if they would all be written , I suppose that even the world itself wouldn’t have room for the books that would be written .

nama: Tane fronde bukan, Tiafilus, yéndo yéfarotamén ménamén méinyotio Yesum némé wafrogh ewafngoi a watamegh 2 a tawarametau yánjo muyafé árét efe yémo té ewaferyéng watamegh yam Ngánján Mbérmbér kénjúmé, a féyo efogh nawerai fá njam yéngwanayéng njafar tukét. 3 Yáne tékrát soramé, fá auyafogh nufngoi fáyo yéné árfefaf a efalo si waufrogh ewafngoi ndené yénd ghérsé wém. Fá njam nufaryéng yéfefaf safét 40 efogh soramé a korayau Ngánjánene limánéghmén. 4 Ámb efghon, yémofem njam njamke tánetawét yémafé, yémo emndai, "Yau téfrangongi Jerusalem, wénde nawanjetati yéné merot tane Afam némé unyéghofnar si té emndai, fémofem té káyáretawét némamén yénd korayawén. 5 Joném nuwan tawalitotau, wénde nambio efogh soramé fém so Ngánján Mbérmbére ewalitote."
english: The first book I wrote, Theophilus , concerned all that Jesus began both to do and to teach ,
until the day in which he was received up, after he had given commandment through the Holy Spirit to the apostles whom he had chosen .
To these he also showed himself alive after he suffered , by many proofs , appearing to them over a period of forty days and speaking about God ’s Kingdom.
Being assembled together with them , he commanded them , “Don’ t depart from Jerusalem , but wait for the promise of the Father , which you heard from me .
For John indeed baptized in water , but you will be baptized in the Holy Spirit not many days from now .”

nama: Féyo njam fá nafángoyénd Yesufé, yémofem yémotayénd fá, "Yuré, fém féyotaro ném yéné efghon Israil yu sái yérameta wéikor?"
english: Therefore , when they had come together , they asked him , “ Lord , are you now restoring the kingdom to Israel ?”

nama: Yémo emndai fá, "Yéné féfeyot yau mat efogh o efoghféneféne em, wénde Ngánjánro mat yém. 8 Wénde fémofem so tawinjongi wafté táf Ngánján Mbérmbér njam yéném féfefaf, a fém so em tane si ghékéf fandagh ár Jerusalem kénjún, méinyotio Judian a Samarian a kétánotio mband marat árkamé yiyato."
english: He said to them , “ It isn’ t for you to know times or seasons which the Father has set within his own authority .
But you will receive power when the Holy Spirit has come upon you . You will be witnesses to me in Jerusalem , in all Judea and Samaria , and to the uttermost parts of the earth .”

nama: Yéné soramé fá njam yéné si norayai, fá táf nuwanoi yéfene méinyotio ghékfanro, njafar kwamkwamam yéngwamoi yéfene ghékéfta.
english: When he had said these things , as they were looking , he was taken up , and a cloud received him out of their sight .

nama: Fá mé tawewotawét njafarot fá njam téngmorwén, sélngwéle sómbio ár kwayaghé sálámefé nokayeyayénd yéfe téndota. 11 Fá norayangeyayénd, "Ár Galili yumén, fém némamén yéna ewakai néwewetati njafarot? Yéné Yesuyo efe té yéngwanang féfe tambén njafarot, so nénangote yéné endmayo fémofem kés yéfandati néngwano njafarot." Yémofem yaferyénd Matias
english: While they were looking steadfastly into the sky as he went , behold , two men stood by them in white clothing ,

who also said , “ You men of Galilee , why do you stand looking into the sky ? This Jesus , who was received up from you into the sky , will come back in the same way as you saw him going into the sky .”

nama: Féyo fá nénangoyénd Jerusalemét kétándmé mband tunakéf Olif tambén nayuofnar kétán Jerusalemét. 13 Fá njam nufaryénd, narmboyénd ámb saté méngo kénjút ánde fá tamorangérwén. Fá kété tamorwén Fité, Jon, Jems a Endru, Filif a Tomas, Batolome a Metyu, Jems Alfasene ambum a Saimon efe ménde témorwén ndené Ju ár so kawanjetawét fáyo yau Rom waftayan, a Judas Jemsene ambum. 14 Fá méinyotio túmén káumendawét Ngánjánafé orayéghét méinyotio amaf a Yesuene amé Meri a Yesuene nénngnéf.
english: Then they returned to Jerusalem from the mountain called Olivet , which is near Jerusalem , a Sabbath day ’ s journey away .

When they had come in , they went up into the upper room where they were staying , that is Peter , John , James , Andrew, Philip , Thomas , Bartholomew, Matthew , James the son of Alphaeus, Simon the Zealot, and Judas the son of James .
All these with one accord continued steadfastly in prayer and supplication, along with the women and Mary the mother of Jesus , and with his brothers.

nama: Yéné efghon Fité nokayoi 120 efalo yátogh ár mérén kénjún 16 a norayai, "Fútaréf, Buk si so nufrote árkéméné Ngánján Mbérmbér korayau fronde Deifidene mbírmbírta némé korayau Judasenemén, efe náyátoyéng wambégh ár yéfeyot emofem Yesu yerayénd, 17 Judas ámb tém téfene kénjún a si waitogh ár."
english: In these days , Peter stood up in the middle of the disciples ( and the number of names was about one hundred twenty ), and said ,
“Brothers, it was necessary that this Scripture should be fulfilled , which the Holy Spirit spoke before by the mouth of David concerning Judas , who was guide to those who took Jesus .
For he was counted with us , and received his portion in this ministry .

nama: Judasém mani ewanai yaufi ásáfoghmén, yémon yanayéng mband, kété numai yáne fifi néfnoi marataye a yáne ghérghér nétoryénd. 19 Méinyotio ár Jerusalemén náyárayénd yénémamén, féyo yémofem yéné sifayé témndetawét yéfenjo sie Akeldama, yáne fifi siyém "Férék sifayé."
english: Now this man obtained a field with the reward for his wickedness; and falling headlong , his body burst open and all his intestines gushed out .
It became known to everyone who lived in Jerusalem that in their language that field was called ‘Akeldama,’ that is , ‘ The field of blood.’

nama: Fité norayai, "Fété yékai Sams bukan, 'Yáne sifayé so yém fanfnero, efe yau so yémor yáne sifayan,' a 'Ámb árom téngwanangé yáne limánégh sifayé.'
english: For it is written in the book of Psalms , ‘ Let his habitation be made desolate . Let no one dwell in it ;’ + 1:20 Psalms 69:25 and , ‘ Let another take his office .’ + 1:20 Psalms 109:8

nama: Yénémamén so fété tékafangém ámb ár efe yéndfé té téném méinyotio efghon njam Yuré Yesufé yénd tényotau, 22 kétamé yéné efghon Joném njam nue yálitotam Yesu kétánotio fá néngwanoi téfe tambén. Ámbiro so kénamndangé ghékéf fandagh ár yéndfé Yesuene anoghmén."
english: “ Of the men therefore who have accompanied us all the time that the Lord Jesus went in and out among us ,
beginning from the baptism of John to the day that he was received up from us , of these one must become a witness with us of his resurrection.”

nama: Féyo sómbio ár euyafeyayénd, Matias a Josef Barsabas efe témorwén yétkwén Jéstus. 24 Féyo fá Ngánjánjafé koraiwét, "Yuré, fém mat ném méinyotio árfene tikéf. Ténmauyafo téfe yéné sómbiota fémo efe té yékaf 25 ménát téngwanangé Yesuene muyafé ásáfogh, árkéméné Judasém yéfrango a yéngém kétán ánde kérté so tanangé." 26 Féyo yémofem wén kembne yérnyayénd ménát so tinjongayénd efe Ngánjánam yafer, a wén nuyáyéng Matiasefaf, féyo fá nafghayéng kétán ámb 11 Yesuene muyafé ár kés tamorwén.
english: They put forward two : Joseph called Barsabbas, who was also called Justus , and Matthias .
They prayed and said , “ You , Lord , who know the hearts of all men , show which one of these two you have chosen
to take part in this ministry and apostleship from which Judas fell away , that he might go to his own place .”
They drew lots for them , and the lot fell on Matthias ; and he was counted with the eleven apostles.

nama: Njam Fentikost efogh yénmormén, fá náumendaménd ámbiro sifayat. 2 Sunsune ke yénmormén ndenanit ndimbal mbormbornit njafarta a yafoi méinyotio méngo ánde fá tamorangérwén. 3 Féyo yémofem yinjoyénd némé kéretau ndenanit fés kánkékánkénit árkéméné nófarnayénd a námnjoyénd ámbiroámbiro árfefaf kété. 4 Méinyotio ár tamorwén Ngánján Mbérmbér wafoghkaf a Ngánján Mbérmbéram eméindai nufngoyénd si fénatayero orayégh. |IB04181gr.tif|col||Farid Faadil. © Biblica, Inc. Used with permission. All rights reserved worldwide.|Fetikos efogh: fés kankékanké efalo yátogh árfene sénkoyan (Acts 2.3)|2.3
english: Now when the day of Pentecost had come , they were all with one accord in one place .
Suddenly there came from the sky a sound like the rushing of a mighty wind , and it filled all the house where they were sitting .
Tongues like fire appeared and were distributed to them , and one sat on each of them .
They were all filled with the Holy Spirit and began to speak with other languages , as the Spirit gave them the ability to speak .

nama: Kété tamorangérwén Jerusalemén Ngánján férférafé Ju ár fénaté ndimbal yumén mband maratan. 6 Yémofem njam yéné ke náyárayénd, ár mérén enmormén nafghayénd mwighé déudéuafé, ménamén ámbiroámbiro ár káyáretawét yéfenjo sie korayawét. 7 Minde sélngwélafé, fá korayangi, "Yéné ár efe norayat ndenanit Galili yumén ár em. 8 Ndernáye so náyáretam téfenjo si yéfe tambén? 9 Yénd yéné yéném Farsiamén, Medemén, Elammén, Mesofotamiyamén, Judiamén, Kafadokiamén, Fontosmén, Esiamén, 10 Frigiamén, Famfiliamén, Ijifmén, Sailen kaka Libiamén, wan ár kétándmé Rommén, 11 Ju ár a fénaté yumén wáwefnogh ár, Kéretamén a Arabmén, yéndfem eyáretam fá norayat téfenjo sie, yéné ndimbal yammén némé Ngánjánam tawafrotauǃ" 12 Sélngwélafé a mwighé déudéuafé, fá namotayénd ámbiroámbiroe, "Némé fifi yém?"
english: Now there were dwelling in Jerusalem Jews , devout men , from every nation under the sky .
When this sound was heard, the multitude came together and were bewildered , because everyone heard them speaking in his own language .
They were all amazed and marveled , saying to one another , “ Behold , aren’ t all these who speak Galileans ?
How do we hear, everyone in our own native language ?
Parthians , Medes , Elamites , and people from Mesopotamia , Judea , Cappadocia , Pontus , Asia ,
Phrygia , Pamphylia , Egypt, the parts of Libya around Cyrene , visitors from Rome , both Jews and proselytes ,
Cretans and Arabians— we hear them speaking in our languages the mighty works of God !”
They were all amazed and were perplexed , saying to one another , “ What does this mean ?”

nama: Wénde ámb árém tawértawét a emndayénd, "Yémofem tánetat totér wéri nu." Fitam si táitotau ár mérnat
english: Others , mocking , said , “ They are filled with new wine .”

nama: Féyo Fité nokayoi 11 waitogh árfé, yáne kém narmboi a si kafrotau ár mérnan, "Fém Judiamén ár a méinyotio efe emor Jerusalem kénjún, yéndon so ewawafenan yéné yam féfeyot, káyárangi merkéráye yéndon némé norayan. 15 Yéné ár sem wéri yau em, ndené kés nemnati. Sénonjo siyém 9 aklokro akwǃ 16 Wéndende, némé té kufrote téfefaf yém Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár Joel némé korayau,
english: But Peter , standing up with the eleven , lifted up his voice and spoke out to them , “ You men of Judea and all you who dwell at Jerusalem , let this be known to you , and listen to my words .
For these aren’ t drunken , as you suppose , seeing it is only the third hour of the day .
But this is what has been spoken through the prophet Joel :

nama: "Ngánján noraye, 'Sénonjo kerker efghon, yéndo so téngwasurén tane Mbérmbér méinyotio árfefaf, a féfene ambum a mérésmérés so nafrotat Ngánjánene si, a féfene totér árém ghékéf waingégh yam so efandat, a féfene ákif onjo so ekém.
english: ‘ It will be in the last days , says God , that I will pour out my Spirit on all flesh . Your sons and your daughters will prophesy . Your young men will see visions . Your old men will dream dreams .

nama: Wénde tane faiofnar ásáfogh árfet, ár a amaf, yéndon so téngwasurén tane Mbérmbér yéné efghon, fá so nafrotat Ngánjánene si.
english: Yes, and on my servants and on my handmaidens in those days , I will pour out my Spirit , and they will prophesy .

nama: Yéndon so sélngwélafé yam ewauyafotan njafaran a ufarogh yam mband mbanmbanan, férék, fés a sénjté kwam.
english: I will show wonders in the sky above , and signs on the earth beneath : blood, and fire , and billows of smoke .

nama: Efogh so kawengongé kwéfitat a ghérare so kawengongé férkot yéné soramé Yurane efogh yéném ndimbal a ndimbal kwayaghafé.
english: The sun will be turned into darkness , and the moon into blood, before the great and glorious day of the Lord comes .

nama: A méinyotio ár efe kómnendangi Yurane yétkwénan, fá so kawanjarngi.'
english: It will be that whoever will call on the name of the Lord will be saved .’

nama: "Israilmén ár, káyárangi yénémamén, Yesu Najaretmén ár témorwén Ngánjánam efe yuyafoi féfeyot fénataye wafroghyamafé, sélngwélafé yam a ufarogh yamafé, árkéméné Ngánjánam tawafrotau féfefaf yáne kénjúmé ndené fété fém mat em féfenjomén. 23 Ngánján fá mat témorwén némé kufrotau, a yáne fronde mwighé yanayénd njam Yesu ngi yafngoyénd, a fémofem yékmayénd krot yénamndaménd wafatarégh wénan Téndo árém. 24 Wénde Ngánjánam yanoi kérta, yaloi kér tékrát tambén, ménamén kéram yau so terangé. 25 Deifid norayai yánemén, "'Yéndo yéfandan Yuré túmén ta frondeta. Ménamén fá tane kaka yém, yénd yau so nasambnetan.
english: “ Men of Israel , hear these words ! Jesus of Nazareth , a man approved by God to you by mighty works and wonders and signs which God did by him among you , even as you yourselves know ,
him , being delivered up by the determined counsel and foreknowledge of God , you have taken by the hand of lawless men , crucified and killed;
whom God raised up , having freed him from the agony of death , because it was not possible that he should be held by it .
For David says concerning him , ‘ I saw the Lord always before my face, for he is on my right hand , that I should not be moved .

nama: Féyo tane tikéf siyém nasnete a tane kánké náuwete, tane fifi so ndenéyameyo nene kamnangan,
english: Therefore my heart was glad , and my tongue rejoiced . Moreover my flesh also will dwell in hope ,

nama: ménamén fémo yau so kwéfrango kér árfé, o tumyo fene njúnnjúnofnar ár sái nornda mbéwé méngon.
english: because you will not leave my soul in Hades, neither will you allow your Holy One to see decay .

nama: Fém mat té náyátoi tafaf ghérsé endmén, fémo yénd so kwafo ménaye áuwéghe fene sáfrére.'
english: You made known to me the ways of life . You will make me full of gladness with your presence .’ + 2:28 Psalms 16:8-11

nama: "Fútaréf, yéndon so ewaufrotan efaloe ndené áki Deifid kér yémormén a yiyatotaménd a yáne mbéwé méngo yéna yém yéné efghon. 30 Wénde fá témorwén Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár a mat namndai ndené Ngánjánam némé yémndetam ndené yáne áki so kámnjongé yáne limánégh ámnjogh sifayan. 31 Deifidém téfandau soramé yu a korayau Kerisoene anoghmén, fá ndené korayau Ngánjánam yau so téfrangongé kér kénjún o yau so tumyongé yáne fifi kérkfot mbéwé méngon. 32 Ngánjánam té yanoyéng Yesu ghérsat, a yénd yéné yéném fandagh ár efaloe. 33 Fá té yuyoi Ngánjánene tambén ngángat, ndené fété Ngánjánam némé té norayai, yémon té yumyoi Afé tambén Ngánján Mbérmbér a té yénmasuryéng némé fémofem sénonjo yéfandati a náyáretati. 34 Ménamén Deifid yau yáfáretam njafarot, wénde fáyo norayai, 'Yuré norayai tane Yurafaf, "Kámnjo tane tambén ngángata
english: “Brothers, I may tell you freely of the patriarch David , that he both died and was buried , and his tomb is with us to this day .
Therefore , being a prophet , and knowing that God had sworn with an oath to him that of the fruit of his body, according to the flesh, he would raise up the Christ to sit on his throne ,
he foreseeing this , spoke about the resurrection of the Christ , that his soul wasn’ t left in Hades, and his flesh didn’ t see decay .
This Jesus God raised up, to which we all are witnesses .
Being therefore exalted by the right hand of God , and having received from the Father the promise of the Holy Spirit , he has poured out this which you now see and hear.
For David didn’ t ascend into the heavens , but he says himself , ‘ The Lord said to my Lord , “ Sit by my right hand

nama: kétánotio yéndo so tákman fene mék téfnár fene kafkaf mbanmbanan."'
english: until I make your enemies a footstool for your feet .”’

nama: "Féyo méinyotio Israil ár mat kamndangi ndené fémofem yéné Yesu té ténamndati wafatarégh wénan, wénde Ngánjánam té yiyátoi Yuré a Keriso."
english: “ Let all the house of Israel therefore know certainly that God has made him both Lord and Christ , this Jesus whom you crucified .”

nama: Njam árém Fité yiyárayénd yéné si snorayai, fá táf nuyáyénd tikfan a norayayénd Fitafaf a ámb Yesuene muyafé árfefaf, "Fútaréf, némé yéndfem so ewafrotam?"
english: Now when they heard this , they were cut to the heart , and said to Peter and the rest of the apostles, “Brothers, what shall we do ?”

nama: Fitam ewawangoi, "Kawengongi walitoghét, fém méinyotio, Yesu Kerisoene yétkwénan ménát féfene yaufiyam so mwighafnar tawayangé. A Ngánjánam so tawaramangé Ngánján Mbérmbér. 39 Yéné unyéghofnar si sem féfeyot a féfene ambumafet a méinyotio efe nayu em, ndenáyo méinyotio efe Yuram téfene Ngánjánam so tamotangé yandio."
english: Peter said to them , “ Repent and be baptized, every one of you , in the name of Jesus Christ for the forgiveness of sins, and you will receive the gift of the Holy Spirit .
For the promise is to you and to your children , and to all who are far off, even as many as the Lord our God will call to himself .”

nama: Fitam tárfár sie tawawéngsotau fá, a yémon tamndetau, "Fém kawanjarngi yéné yaufi saté árta." 41 Fá emofem yáne si waitogh yumyoyénd walitogh ewafngoi, a táf 3,000 ár farun nafayoyénd yéné efghon. Efalo yátogh árfene áumengégh
english: With many other words he testified and exhorted them , saying , “ Save yourselves from this crooked generation !”
Then those who gladly received his word were baptized. There were added that day about three thousand souls .

nama: Fá naramayénd ámb efogh Yesuene muyafé árfefaf watameghét a áumengéghét, féskaf flawé faloghét a Ngánjánafé orayéghét. 43 Méinyotio ár férféram ewifoi a tárfár sélngwélafé yam a ufarogh yam téfandawét Yesuene muyafé árfefaf. 44 Méinyotio efalo yátogh ár náumendayénd a tafalotawét yéfenjo rokar. 45 Yémofem tawafnamotawét yéfenjo ásáfogh sifayé a méndefé rokar, yémofem tawarametawét yéfeyot efe káronjawét. 46 Méinyotio efghon fá túmén káumendawét wáwefnogh méngo sifayan. Yémofem tatfotawét féskaf flawé yéfenjo méngo kénjún a mérne tánetawét áuwéghafé a mer tikfe, 47 Ngánjáne wagh tawerémndawét a tayamnetawét mer méinyotio árém. A Yuram farun ámb ár efayoi méinyotio efghon fá efe ewanjaryéng.
english: They continued steadfastly in the apostles’ teaching and fellowship , in the breaking of bread, and prayer .
Fear came on every soul , and many wonders and signs were done through the apostles.
All who believed were together , and had all things in common .
They sold their possessions and goods , and distributed them to all , according as anyone had need .
Day by day , continuing steadfastly with one accord in the temple , and breaking bread at home , they took their food with gladness and singleness of heart ,
praising God and having favor with all the people . The Lord added to the assembly day by day those who were being saved .
