He who searches the hearts knows what is on the Spirit ’s mind , because he makes intercession for the saints according to God .

nama: Yénd mat yéném ndené méinyotio yaman Ngánján násáfote merot yéfeyot emofem yuwetat fá, efe té emotai yáne ménde wafroghét. 29 Ngánján fá mat yém túmén efe em yáne waferéghkaf, yémon té mwighé yéfaronam fá sái táyátongai ndenanit yánjo Ambumnit, ménát yáne Ambum so kénamndangai fronde sénko tárfár néngénfefaf. 30 Ngánjánam té ewaferyéng yéné ár sái em yáne ambumtértér. Yéné téfnan, yémo emote sái eném yáfaf. Yémo eumyote yéné ár ndené mbarkánd yémafé. A yéné efe eumyote, yémo wéi eméinde fá so kénamndangi ndimbal yétkwén. Ngánjánene uwégh Keriso Yesu kénjún
english: We know that all things work together for good for those who love God , for those who are called according to his purpose .
For whom he foreknew , he also predestined to be conformed to the image of his Son , that he might be the firstborn among many brothers.
Whom he predestined , those he also called . Whom he called , those he also justified . Whom he justified , those he also glorified .

nama: Féyo, ménamén méinyotio yam Ngánjánam kés ewafrote téfeyot, yénd so norayam ndené: Njam Ngánján té násáfota téfeyot, árké árom yau so ewafrote ámb yam téfe ásénanéghét. 32 Yémo efe yau yangoi yánjo Ambum, wénde yénramai yánjo Ambum kérot méinyotio téfe téfnan. Yénémamén, Ngánjánam so ténmarangé mérne yane Ambumafé méinyotio rokar némé ménde yéném. 33 Efe ár so noraye ndené Ngánjánene ár sem kértafé. Ngánjánam yémonyo té yénmumyoi yénd ndené fété mbarkánd yémafé. 34 Féyo efe yau so noraye ndené Ngánjánam so mé tékratan yénékmete yénd. Efe yau. Ménamén Keriso Yesu fáyo té kér yémormén téfene téfnan. A Ngánjánam yanoi ghérsat téfeyot. Sénonjo Keriso siyém yémor Ngánjánene tambénta njafaran. Fá fáyo Ngánjánefaf noraye téfene téfnan.
english: What then shall we say about these things ? If God is for us , who can be against us ?
He who didn’ t spare his own Son , but delivered him up for us all , how would he not also with him freely give us all things ?
Who could bring a charge against God ’s chosen ones? It is God who justifies .
Who is he who condemns ? It is Christ who died , yes rather , who was raised from the dead, who is at the right hand of God , who also makes intercession for us .

nama: Emo so yénfalote yénd kétamé Kerisoene uwéghta? Féyotaro táikéryam o kérté yamam o ngiyam o siogh o firoyam o kér kakayam o witmafé sénté náifé? 36 Ndené Buk si noraye, "Fene téfnan yéndfem kér yéfandam méinyotio efghon; yénd ndenéyame yéném sif ngiot tawafngongi."
english: Who shall separate us from the love of Christ ? Could oppression, or anguish , or persecution , or famine , or nakedness , or peril , or sword ?
Even as it is written , “ For your sake we are killed all day long . We were accounted as sheep for the slaughter .” + 8:36 Psalms 44:22

nama: Yau, méinyotio yéné yam tambén yénd mindefifi waingégh ár yéném Yesue kénjúmé emo yénmuwetam yénd! 38 Yénd mat wém némé yam yau so ténfalongé Ngánjánene uwéghta, yau ghérsé yam o kéram, yau njafar si résagh árém o sénko árém njafarmén o tukén wafté njafarmén, yau sénonjoyam o soramé yumén, 39 yau njafar tukmén o mband yuwan, yau kétamé méinyotio wafrogh rokarta, so ténfalongé kétamé Ngánjánene uwéghta árké té yényátoi Keriso Yesuene kénjúmé téfene Yuré.
english: No , in all these things we are more than conquerors through him who loved us .
For I am persuaded that neither death , nor life , nor angels, nor principalities, nor things present , nor things to come , nor powers ,
nor height , nor depth, nor any other created thing will be able to separate us from God ’ s love which is in Christ Jesus our Lord .

nama: Yéndon nafrotan efalo si Keriso kénjún, yénd yau nuindan, tane emarégh efalo yiyátote Ngánján Mbérmbéramé. 2 Tafaf yém ndimbal ghérghérsisé a túmén kérté yém tane tikfan 3 yéfeyot tane árét, tane Ju fútaréf. Yéndio kemnawén ndené so tuot mbawar tanangayén, kanfangayén kétamé Kerisoeta, njam téu yéné yam tawanjarngé fá. 4 Israilmén ár, ewaferyéng sái em Ngánjánene rényégh ambumot. Ngánjánam yuyafotam yánjo ndimbal kwayaghé yéfefaf. Yémo árnyégh yam yafrotam yémafé a ewaramai yáne nák. Yémo ewaramai féyotaroe ménát yá wáwefnoghét a umyoghét yáne merfifi unyéghofnar si. 5 Yéfene ákif tamorwén tukfifi yétkwén, a yéné fifie áki kénjúmé yénmormén Keriso, efe fá yém Ngánján, a fá emo yélimnde méinyotio rokar, a yém tuot utmanégh áuwégh! Efalo.
english: I tell the truth in Christ . I am not lying , my conscience testifying with me in the Holy Spirit
that I have great sorrow and unceasing pain in my heart .
For I could wish that I myself were accursed from Christ for my brothers’ sake , my relatives according to the flesh
who are Israelites ; whose is the adoption , the glory , the covenants , the giving of the law , the service , and the promises ;
of whom are the fathers , and from whom is Christ as concerning the flesh , who is over all , God , blessed forever . Amen.

nama: Ngánján unyéghofnar si norayai mer rokarot Israil árét. Wénde yénd yau norayan ndené némé Ngánján unyéghofnar si norayai yau nufrotam. Yéné safénro yém ndené yau méinyotio Israil ár em Ngánjánene efalo ár. 7 Yau méinyotio em efaloe Ebraamene ákimén. Ngánjánam yémndai Ebraam, "Fáro yém fene ambum Aisek yéndon so yémndetan fene ákiambumafene yéferafé.'
english: But it is not as though the word of God has come to nothing . For they are not all Israel that are of Israel .
Neither , because they are Abraham’s offspring, are they all children . But , “ your offspring will be accounted as from Isaac .”

nama: Yéné fifi yém ndené yau em mé fifie ambum kétamé fifie ákita efe emndetat Ngánjánene ambum, wénde yáne efalo áki ambum fá em efe náráftat yáne unyéghofnar sian. 9 Yéné yém némé Ngánján unyéghofnar si norayai Ebraamefaf, "Kété kaféghmén efghon yénd so wéném, a Sara so yém ambumafé."
english: That is , it is not the children of the flesh who are children of God , but the children of the promise are counted as heirs.
For this is a word of promise : “ At the appointed time I will come , and Sarah will have a son .”

nama: Wéikor ewafarot yéné: Soramé, Aisekene amaf, Rebekam néslam sómbioe ambum. Yéné sómbio ambumafene tawarwén ámbiro afé, efe témorwén téfene áki, Aisek. 11 A Ngánján norayai Rebekafaf soramé sómbioe ambum eunjeyai, a fronde soramé ambumofem té ewafrotaménd némé yam téu mer o mámáfi. Ngánjánam yéné yafrotam yuyafotam safét ndené yémon ámbiro ambum yaferyéng. Yémo yau yaferyéng ámb ménamén yéné árom némé tawafrotau. Yémonyo mwighé yéfaronam yémo efe so taferngai. 12 Ngánjánam yémndai Rebeka, "Fronde sénkom so yásáfote yángnoe." 13 Ndené fété Buk si noraye, "Jeikof yéndon yuwetan, wénde Esau yéndo méndméndat yéfandan."
english: Not only so , but Rebekah also conceived by one , by our father Isaac .
For being not yet born , neither having done anything good or bad , that the purpose of God according to election might stand , not of works , but of him who calls ,
it was said to her , “ The elder will serve the younger .”
Even as it is written , “ Jacob I loved, but Esau I hated .”

nama: Ndernáye so norayam? Némé Ngánján yau yém mbarkánd? Yaufifi. 15 Ménamén fá té norayai Mosesefaf, "Tane mer yam so yém yáfaf endefaf mer yam yém, a tane ghérghérsisé so yém yáfaf endefaf ghérghérsisé yém."
english: What shall we say then ? Is there unrighteousness with God ? May it never be !
For he said to Moses , “ I will have mercy on whom I have mercy , and I will have compassion on whom I have compassion .”

nama: Yau kété nufrote ároene méndefaf o ásáfoghan, wénde Ngánjánene ghérghérsisayan. 17 Ménamén Buk si noraye Farawanemén, "Yéndon némakayoyén fém yénat, yéndon so yuyafotan tane waftaye fém ménát ár méinyotio mband maratan so yuyotaménd tane yétkwén." 18 Yénémaménnde, Ngánján yém ghérghérsisafé yáyot endeyot fá ménde yém ghérghérsisafé, a yémon wéi térmbat eyátote fá endefefaf fá ménde yém térmbatot.
english: So then it is not of him who wills , nor of him who runs , but of God who has mercy .
For the Scripture says to Pharaoh , “ For this very purpose I caused you to be raised up , that I might show in you my power , and that my name might be proclaimed in all the earth .”
So then , he has mercy on whom he desires , and he hardens whom he desires .

nama: Ámb so norayati fém tafaf, "Ngánjánam túmén ewafrote yéné némat fá ménde yém wafroghét. Árké árom yau so tawengongé némé Ngánjánam wafroghét tawafngongé. Féyo, Ngánján yau so noraye ndené árém té tawafrotat mámáfiyam." 20 Wénde fém em ménd ár. Féfefaf yau em muyé siot kétán Ngánjánefaf ndené kés. Ngánjánam té ewafrotam fém. Ngénd wafroghmén sin yau so noraye yéné ároefaf emo tafrote yéné! Yénayam yau so témotangé, 'Némamén fémo yénd kwafrote ndenáye?' 21 Ámb árom emo ewafrote ngéndmén sin so taferngé némé sáfot sin so ewafrote. Yémon so yénayo ngénd mbarmbare ewafrowé sómbio fénataye sin. Ámb sin sái yém ménát fénaté témndot. Ámb sin sái yém ménát njúnnjúnafé rokarot. 22 Ndernáye wét yénmatamete yénd Ngánjánenemén? Ámb ár em ndenanit ngénd wafroghmén sin árké em afrengéghkaf Ngánjáneyot wirorghét. Ngánján siyém ndené árfefaf nékwafé yém. Fá afrengéghkaf yém sái yuyafota yánjo wafté yéfefaf. Wénde yémo té yaferyéng ménát sái nawanjeta métare. Yémo yamnde yánjo nékw soramatau. 23 Ámb ár ndenanit em mer wafroghmén ngénd sin árkéméné Ngánjánam té ewaferyéng wafroghét. Ngánján ménde yém merro sái yém ndené árfefaf. Fá ménde yém yémo sái eméinda ménát so engwauyafotat árét nderé ndimbal yém fá. Yémo té efrendam fá ménát sái em yémafé fénataye témndot kété njafaran. 24 Yénd yéné ár yéném! Ngánjánam té yénmaferyéng yénd sái yéném yáne ár. Yau fá ewaferyéng Ju árro. Yémo wéi ewaferyéng Téndo ár. 25 Ngánján noraye Osiane Buk kénjún; 'Yénd so norayan árfefaf efe yau tamorwén tane ár, "Sénonjo fém em tane ár." Yénd so norayan árfefaf yéndo yau euwetan fém, "Yéndo euwetan."'
english: You will say then to me , “ Why does he still find fault ? For who withstands his will ?”
But indeed , O man , who are you to reply against God ? Will the thing formed ask him who formed it , “ Why did you make me like this ?”
Or hasn’ t the potter a right over the clay , from the same lump to make one part a vessel for honor , and another for dishonor?
What if God , willing to show his wrath and to make his power known , endured with much patience vessels of wrath prepared for destruction,
and that he might make known the riches of his glory on vessels of mercy , which he prepared beforehand for glory —
us , whom he also called , not from the Jews only , but also from the Gentiles ?
As he says also in Hosea , “ I will call them ‘ my people ,’ which were not my people ; and her ‘beloved,’ who was not beloved.” + 9:25 Hosea 2:23

nama: 'Ngánján té norayai yéfefaf, 'Fém yau em tane ár.' Yéné sifayanyo ánde fá norayai ndené, árém so sénonjo emndetat fá "Ngánjánene ambumtértér, efe túmén so em ghérsé."'
english: “ It will be that in the place where it was said to them , ‘ You are not my people ,’ there they will be called ‘ children of the living God .’” + 9:26 Hosea 1:10

nama: Aisaya kutnau Israil ár téfnan: "Ndemamén Israil ár em tárfár ndenanit mirinit arakaf téndon, mé nambio árro so kunjarngi;
english: Isaiah cries concerning Israel , “ If the number of the children of Israel are as the sand of the sea , it is the remnant who will be saved ;

nama: Yuré Ngánjánam so tifongé yánjo ásáfogh wékeye. Yémo té tawawéngsote yánjo ár némé yémo so ewafrote. A yémo so tékratan tákmangé fá féyotio.'
english: for he will finish the work and cut it short in righteousness, because the Lord will make a short work upon the earth .” + 9:28 Isaiah 10:22-23

nama: Ndené fété Aisaya ndernáye norayai tándái, "Yau njam wafté kér ro Yuram ténéfrangongai yénd nambio, yénd so ténmalindangai ndenanit Sodom yénd so ténmalindangai ndenanit Gomora." Ndimbal mwighafnar Israil ár
english: As Isaiah has said before , “ Unless the Lord of Armies + 9:29 Greek: Sabaoth (or Hebrew: Tze’va’ot) had left us a seed , we would have become like Sodom , and would have been made like Gomorrah .” + 9:29 Isaiah 1:9

nama: Némé wét yénd so norayam? Téndo ár yéta kufotawét ménát sái kamndangayénd mbarkánd Ngánjánafé. Wénde ámb yéfe tambén té nénamndayénd mbarkánd yémafé. Ngánjánam té eumyoi fá mbarkándmén, ménamén yémofem té efalo tiyátotawét Yesu Keriso. 31 Wénde Israil ár yéta kufotawét ménát sái tawinjongayénd nák káyátongayénd mbarkánd Ngánjánafé. Wénde fá nuyayénd sái kénamndangayénd mbarkánd Ngánjánafé. 32 Fá nuyayénd ménamén fá kakenawét ménát efalo sái tiyátowét Keriso. Wénde yémofem taufotawét ámb yam wafrogh ménát Ngánjánam so taumyongai fá. Yéné téfnan fá nuyayénd mbandot. Yéfene kafkafam tasmetawét wím árkéménayam eméinde ár uighét. 33 ndené fété Buk si noraye, "Kéretangi, yéndo yékmetan fénataye wím kété Jaion. Yéné wímam so eméinde ár uighét mbandot. Yéné wím yém árkéménayam so eméinde fá uighét. Wénde árké árom emo efalo yiyátota yau so mwighayan kuyangé.'
english: What shall we say then ? That the Gentiles , who didn’ t follow after righteousness , attained to righteousness , even the righteousness which is of faith ;
but Israel , following after a law of righteousness , didn’t arrive at the law of righteousness .
Why ? Because they didn’ t seek it by faith , but as it were by works of the law. They stumbled over the stumbling stone ,

even as it is written , “ Behold , + 9:33 “Behold”, from “ἰδοὺ”, means look at, take notice, observe, see, or gaze at. It is often used as an interjection. I lay in Zion a stumbling stone and a rock of offense ; and no one who believes in him will be disappointed .” + 9:33 Isaiah 8:14; 28:16
Brothers, my heart ’s desire and my prayer to God is for Israel, that they may be saved .
For I testify about them that they have a zeal for God , but not according to knowledge .
For being ignorant of God ’s righteousness , and seeking to establish their own righteousness , they didn’ t subject themselves to the righteousness of God .
For Christ is the fulfillment of the law for righteousness to everyone who believes .

nama: Mosesém yéfarotam ménamén ndernáye Ngánjánene nákam so ewáutáne ár ménát sái em mbarkánd Ngánjánafé. Fá norayai, "Njam árém ewaitota Ngánjánene méinyotio nák, féyo fá so yémor yénaye." 6 Wénde Buk si noraye wéi ámb ende. Yéné yufane ndernáye so kénamndangé mbarkánd Ngánjánafé ménamén fémo efalo yiyátota fá. Ndené noraye: 'Fémonyo yau noraya, "Ámb ár so fété kuwanongé tukét njafarot."' (Ndené táf yém: 'Ámb árom so ténmewérngé Keriso kétamé tukta.') 7 'Yau táf fémyo noraya wéi, "Ámb ár so fété yéngém mband marat mbanmbanot."' (Ndené táf yém: 'Ámb árom so fété ténmanongé Keriso yéné sifayata ánde kér téfnár em.') 8 Wénde Buk si noraye: "Ngánjánene si siyém kaka fefaf, fene mbírmbíran yém a fene tikfan." Yéné si siyém ménamén ndimbal mwighamén árké yéndfem néngafrotam: 9 Fém táf noraya safénro ndené Yesu siyém Yuré. Wéi ndenéyameyo fémo táf efalo yiyátota kénjkame fenjo kénjún ndené Ngánjánam yanoi fá kérta. Féyo Ngánjánam kémanjarngé fém. 10 Yéné siyém efalo yátoghe fene tikfan ndené fém té mbarkánd náyátend Ngánjánafé. A njam fém noraya safén ndené Yesu siyém Yuré, Ngánjánam kémanjarngé fém. 11 Ndené Buk si kés noraye, "Árké árom njam efalo yiyátote Yesu yau so wáiwái yém."
english: For Moses writes about the righteousness of the law , “ The one who does them will live by them .”
But the righteousness which is of faith says this , “Don’ t say in your heart , ‘ Who will ascend into heaven ?’ ( that is , to bring Christ down );
or , ‘ Who will descend into the abyss?’ ( that is , to bring Christ up from the dead .)”
But what does it say ? “ The word is near you , in your mouth and in your heart ;” that is , the word of faith which we preach :
that if you will confess with your mouth that Jesus is Lord and believe in your heart that God raised him from the dead , you will be saved .
For with the heart one believes resulting in righteousness ; and with the mouth confession is made resulting in salvation .
For the Scripture says , “ Whoever believes in him will not be disappointed .”

nama: Ndené noraye 'méinyotio ár.' Kété yau yém fénataye Ju ár a Téndo ár. Kété yém yénayo Yuré méinyotio yéfeyot. Yémo ewáutáne méinyotio árét emofem yamnendat fá ménaye tárfár mer rokare. 13 Ndené kés noraye Buk sian, "Yuré Ngánjánam so tawanjarngé méinyotio ár efe nomnendati yáfaf wáutárghét.'{b{ ...f* {b{10.13 Joel 2:32
english: For there is no distinction between Jew and Greek ; for the same Lord is Lord of all , and is rich to all who call on him .
For , “ Whoever will call on the name of the Lord will be saved .”

nama: Wénde ndernáye wét so nutnat yáfaf emofem yau efalo yiyátoyénd fá? A ndernáye so yémofem efalo yiyátotat fá endenemén yau náyárayénd? A ndernáye fá so káyárangayénd yánemén yau njam ámb ár ngafrotau yéfefaf? 15 A ndernáye so ámb ár yéngém waufroghét táf yau njam yéngwáfáretat? Buk siam yénémamén noraye, "Nderé mer em yéfene kafkaf emofem yénérsat mer si!"
english: How then will they call on him in whom they have not believed ? How will they believe in him whom they have not heard? How will they hear without a preacher ?

And how will they preach unless they are sent ? As it is written : “ How beautiful are the feet of those who preach the Good News of peace, who bring glad tidings of good things !” + 10:15 Isaiah 52:7

nama: Wénde yau méinyotio Israil árém yumyotat mer si. Aisaya Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár norayai, "Yuré, emo ámb efalo yiyáto téfene si?" 17 Yénémaménnde, ndimbal mwighé táf kétamé yéném njam náyárete si, a si káyárangém táf kétamé yéném Kerisoene sita.{c{ ...f* {c{10.17 Yénémaménnde, ndimbal mwighé táf kétamé yéném njam náyárete si, a si táf káyárangém si kénjúmé Kerisoenemén. Need be change: Therefore, by heyaring the message, people come to have faith, and by someone's preaching about Christ the people hear the message.
english: But they didn’ t all listen to the glad news . For Isaiah says , “ Lord , who has believed our report?”
So faith comes by hearing, and hearing by the word of God .

nama: Wénde ndernáye wét Israil árfenemén? Némé yémofem té wét náyárayénd si? Néméwét, yémofem té náyátayénd: "Yéfene si té tiotau méinyotio árfefaf yéné mband maratan, a yéfene siam té yarafnam mband kwéndkwéndot."
english: But I say , didn’ t they hear? Yes, most certainly , “ Their sound went out into all the earth , their words to the ends of the world .” + 10:18 Psalms 19:4

nama: Wénde Israilmén ár yau mat tamorwén? Néméwét, fronde Moses korayau, "Yéndon so táyáton waramnjagh ár ménamén ármén efe yau em tane ár. Yéndon so eméindan nékwafé ménamén ármén efe yau em mat tanemén."
english: But I ask , didn’t Israel know ? First Moses says , “ I will provoke you to jealousy with that which is no nation . I will make you angry with a nation void of understanding.” + 10:19 Deuteronomy 32:21

nama: Wéi soramé Aisaya marataye norayai, "Yénd yémofem winjoyénd yéné árém emofem yénd yau kwénronjawét; yénd nauyafoyén yéndio yéfefaf efe yau kamotawét tanemén."
english: Isaiah is very bold and says , “ I was found by those who didn’ t seek me . I was revealed to those who didn’ t ask for me .” + 10:20 Isaiah 65:1

nama: Wénde Israil árfenemén yémon norayai, "Méinyotio efghon yéndon tane ngángé tasafotan yéfefaf, wénde fá yau káyáretat tafaf a kamronam yéndfé."
english: But about Israel he says , “ All day long I stretched out my hands to a disobedient and contrary people .”

nama: Féyo, yénd namotan ndené: Némé Ngánjánam ekene yánjo ár? Yaufifi! Yéndio wéi wém Israilmén ár, Ebraamene áki ambum, yéné mérénmén Benjamin. 2 Ngánjánam yau ekene yánjo ár, efe té ekafai tándái. Fém mat em ndernáye Buk si noraye yánemén Elaija, ndernáye fá kawatarnau Ngánjánefaf Israil árfe téfnan, 3 "Yuré, yémofem té tasmetat fene mat yátogh ár a taftérnat ghéngén wárogh kitaré. Yéndonro ámbiro nafrangon, a yémofem yéta wérametat ngiot." 4 A némé wét Ngánjánene uwangogh témorwén yáfaf? "Yéndon té euron tandio 7,000 ár emofem yau budme táwefnotat Baal mewangoe." 5 Wéi sénonjo efghon yéna em yáne árfifi ekafai ngáráme. 6 Yénayam yuyafote ndené Ngánjánam yau ewaferyéng fá ménamén ámb mer yammén ndené yémofem kés tawafrotat. Yéné njam témorwén efalo, yénd yau so korayawém ndené Ngánján témorwén kwénjtafnar yéfefaf. Yéné yau so témorwén yáne ramégh.
english: I ask then , did God reject his people ? May it never be ! For I also am an Israelite , a descendant of Abraham, of the tribe of Benjamin.
God didn’ t reject his people , whom he foreknew . Or don’ t you know what the Scripture says about Elijah ? How he pleads with God against Israel :
“ Lord , they have killed your prophets . They have broken down your altars . I am left alone , and they seek my life .”
But how does God answer him ? “ I have reserved for myself seven thousand men who have not bowed the knee to Baal.”
Even so too at this present time also there is a remnant according to the election of grace .
And if by grace , then it is no longer of works ; otherwise grace is no longer grace . But if it is of works , it is no longer grace ; otherwise work is no longer work .

nama: Féyo, ndenáye so norayam: Israil árém méinyotio yau yinjoyénd némat kéretawét. Mé yéné árémro efe Ngánjánam ewaferyéng yanayénd yémofem. Wénde ámb Israil ár féyotarofnar emormén ménát sái mat káyátongayénd Ngánjánene si. 8 Ndené fété Buk si noraye, "Ngánjánam té ewaramai kémégh kér. Sénonjo tawétio yémon té ewawamoi yéfene ghékéf ménát fá yau so néretat a ewawembái yéfene téngan ménát fá yau so náyáretat."
english: What then ? That which Israel seeks for , that he didn’ t obtain , but the chosen ones obtained it , and the rest were hardened .
According as it is written , “ God gave them a spirit of stupor , eyes that they should not see, and ears that they should not hear, to this very day .”

nama: Deifid noraye, "Yéfene njamke kitaré so kénamndangé ndénndén a urér. Yéfene frengégham yéfune yéfeyot usérmbogh, a so tawanangi yémofem némat ménde em.
english: David says , “ Let their table be made a snare , a trap , a stumbling block , and a retribution to them .

nama: Yéfene ghékéf so kwéfkwéf náyátotat ménát fá yau so néretat, a yéfene sémsot so ewáwefno tuot!" Israil árfene kenagh yau yém ambino
english: Let their eyes be darkened , that they may not see. Always keep their backs bent.” + 11:10 Psalms 69:22,23

nama: Féyo, sénonjo yénd namotan ndené: 'Njam Israil ár nuyayénd Yesu Kerisoe umyoghét, té fá nafaloyénd kétamé Ngánjáneta tuot? Yau, yéné yau yém efalo. Ménamén yéfene áyáréghofnarmén, Ngánjánam ewanjane Téndo ár. Ngánjánam yéné yafrote ménát Israil ár so kénamndangi waramnjaghafé. 12 Téndo ár njam té namndayénd wemár ménamén Israil árém ámb ende tengotawét Ngánjánene ramégh awanjarghét, kemnangi nderé ndimbalfifi frengégh so tawanangayénd mband maratan táf njam Israil árém ambino tumyongayénd.
english: I ask then , did they stumble that they might fall ? May it never be ! But by their fall salvation has come to the Gentiles , to provoke them to jealousy .
Now if their fall is the riches of the world , and their loss the riches of the Gentiles , how much more their fullness !

nama: Yénd sénonjo norayan Téndo ár féfeyot. Ngánjánam té wékaf yénd nénamndan Yesuene muyafé ár Téndo árét, yéndon yérsan tuktuk tane ásáfoghmén. 14 Tane méghmégh yém ndené tane ásáfogh féfene kénjún Téndo ár eméinde tanjo ár sái em waramnjaghafé. Yéné fifiyan, ámb yéfe kénjún so nawengotat Ngánjánefaf ménát yémo so tawanjarngé. 15 Njam Ngánján nawengoi kétamé Israil árfeta, yémo wéi eumyoi ámb ár mband maratan yáne fútarot. Yénémamén, njam Ngánjánam eumyota Israil ár, yéné fai so yém mer! Ndené so yém kér ár efe té nénano ghérsat wéikor.
english: For I speak to you who are Gentiles . Since then as I am an apostle to Gentiles , I glorify my ministry ,
if by any means I may provoke to jealousy those who are my flesh , and may save some of them .
For if the rejection of them is the reconciling of the world , what would their acceptance be , but life from the dead ?

nama: Táf fémo njam taram fronde féskaf flawé karéf Ngánjáne, féyo méinyotio féskaf flawé so yém Ngánjáne. Táf wén sérémb njam em Ngánjáne, féyo kafekefe wéi so em Ngánjáne.
english: If the first fruit is holy, so is the lump . If the root is holy, so are the branches .

nama: Israil ár ndenanit em olif wén árké ndau téfnáram eite. Wénde Ngánjánam eráfne ámb wén kafe. Féyo tanangé kafe kétamé kéghat olif wénta. Yémo tékmangé yéné kéghat wén kafe kétán ndau téfnárafene wénfaf, ménát so kénamndangé yéné wén sáf. Fém Téndo ár ndenanit em kéghat wén kafe. Sénonjo fémofem yérsati njamke sérémbta ndau téfnárafene wénta, ménát eyátote muyafé. 18 Israil ár ndenanit em kafe Ngánjánam té eráfar. Wénde fém yau táf nemnati ndené fémofem kar ewaindati yéné kafe. Nawafarotati ndené fém em mé kafero. Fémofem yau yafrotati sérémb taikrot. Yau, yéné yém sérémb árkéménayam némérete a neyátote fém muyafé.
english: But if some of the branches were broken off , and you , being a wild olive , were grafted in among them and became partaker with them of the root and of the richness of the olive tree ,
don’ t boast over the branches . But if you boast , remember that it is not you who support the root , but the root supports you .

nama: Fém mété norayati, "Ngánjánam tarafarngé kafe ménát yénd so kénamndan yéné wénoene." 20 Néméwét, wénde ewafarota yéné kafe, fá narafaryénd ménamén yau yémofem efalo tiyátotawét Keriso, a fém kété em ménamén ndimbal mwighamén. Féyo yau nemnati minde tukén féfenjo kénjún, wénde férférafé yéfandati némé so nufrote. 21 Ngánjánam yau njam té tawarawenau frondemén kafe, fém wéi ndenéyameyo yau so ewarawene?
english: You will say then , “ Branches were broken off , that I might be grafted in .”
True ; by their unbelief they were broken off , and you stand by your faith . Don’ t be conceited , but fear ;
for if God didn’ t spare the natural branches , neither will he spare you .

nama: Féyo, fém mat so em ndernáye Ngánján yém mer, wénde wéi tékratan ekmete ár. Yémo tékratan takmete Israil ár, ménamén fá nawengoyénd yá tambén. Fá té tém mer féfefaf. Wénde fém miya engém ménát tanangi yáne mer ramégh. Njam yéné yafrotati, yémo so erafne fém kétándmé yánjo wénta ndenáyo. 23 A Israil ár njam kawengongi yéfenjo akenaghta, Ngánjánam so tanwangongé wénfaf wéikor, fá waftafé yém wafroghét. 24 Ngánjánam enfete fém ndenanit kafe kétamé kéghat olif wénta. Féyo yémo tákmangé fém kétán ndau téfnárafene olif wénfaf ménát fém so kénamndangi yénayo. Yémo so ewafrote yéné ndenamén yau tém féfenjoyo wén fronde. Féyo Ngánjánam so ewafrote yéné yéfeyot Israil árét. Yémo so afrátaye tákmangé fá kétánotio yéfenjoyo wénfaf, frondeyan kés tamorwén. Ngánjánene ghérghérsisé méinyotio árfefaf
english: See then the goodness and severity of God . Toward those who fell , severity; but toward you , goodness , if you continue in his goodness ; otherwise you also will be cut off .
They also , if they don’ t continue in their unbelief, will be grafted in , for God is able to graft them in again .

For if you were cut out of that which is by nature a wild olive tree , and were grafted contrary to nature into a good olive tree , how much more will these , which are the natural branches, be grafted into their own olive tree ?

nama: Tane fútaréf, yénd ménde wém sái ewáutánan féfe mat kamndangi yéfenemén Israil árfenemén. Yéné siyém kwankwane yam ndené Ngánjánam té tuyafote téfeyot. Táf fémofem njam mat tiyátongi, fém yau so em tuktukan ndené fém em mwighé sénté. Tárfár Israil ár té nakenayénd té efalo tiyátotawét Keriso. Fá mé so engém sái yéngkenat fá kétánotio Téndo árém kor efalo tiyátongi waféghfaf árké Ngánján mwighé yéfaronam. 26 A yéné ende méinyotio Israil ár so kunjarngi. Ndené Buk si noraye, "Wanjarégh ár so yéném kétamé Jaion, a yémon so ewengote Israil kétamé méinyotio Ngánjánofnar ghérsé tambén.
english: For I don’ t desire you to be ignorant , brothers, of this mystery , so that you won’ t be wise in your own conceits , that a partial hardening has happened to Israel , until the fullness of the Gentiles has come in ,
and so all Israel will be saved . Even as it is written , “ There will come out of Zion the Deliverer , and he will turn away ungodliness from Jacob .

nama: A yéndon so yafrotan yéné árnyégh yémafé njam yéndon ewawitan yéfene yaufiyam."
english: This is my covenant with them , when I will take away their sins.” + 11:27 Isaiah 59:20-21; 27:9; Jeremiah 31:33-34

nama: Tárfár Israil ár sénonjo sem mék téfnár mer sifaf, a yéné yémormén féfe téfnan. Té Ngánjánam ewaramai yáne tambén féfe Téndo árfet, wénde Israil ár mé em yáne kafegh ár ménamén yáne unyéghofnar si yéfene ákiffaf. 29 Ngánjánene tambén a ke yau so kitrongé. 30 Té fém Téndo ár fronde tamorwén áyáréghofnar Ngánjánefaf, wénde ménamén Israil árém yékenayénd yáne ghérghérsisé, wénde Ngánján nénamndai ghérghérsisafé féfefaf. 31 Ndené yameyo, Israil ár sénonjo nénamndayénd áyáréghofnar Ngánjánefaf a Ngánjánene ghérghérsisé té yénmormén féfefaf, wénde ámb efghon yémofem wéi so tawanangayénd Ngánjánene ghérghérsisé. 32 Ngánjánam té eyátoi méinyotio ár áyáréghofnar, ménát mé yáne ghérghérsisé so yém yéfefaf méinyotio. Áuwégh Ngánjánefef
english: Concerning the Good News , they are enemies for your sake . But concerning the election , they are beloved for the fathers ’ sake .
For the gifts and the calling of God are irrevocable.
For as you in time past were disobedient to God , but now have obtained mercy by their disobedience,
even so these also have now been disobedient, that by the mercy shown to you they may also obtain mercy .
For God has bound all to disobedience, that he might have mercy on all .

nama: O, nderé merfifi Ngánján yém téfene! Nderé kénjkam em yáne káfeté mwighé a matyam! Nderé táikér yém téfeyot mat yiyátongém yáne mwighé farorégh a yáne end! 34 "Efe ámb mat yém Yurane mwighé? Efe ámb yém yáne mwighé wáutárégh ár?
english: Oh the depth of the riches both of the wisdom and the knowledge of God ! How unsearchable are his judgments , and his ways past tracing out !
“ For who has known the mind of the Lord ? Or who has been his counselor ?” + 11:34 Isaiah 40:13

nama: Emo ámb némé yaram Ngánjáne, ménát Ngánjánam sái fai taramangé?
english: “ Or who has first given to him , and it will be repaid to him again ?” + 11:35 Job 41:11

nama: Yá tambén a yáne kénjúmé a yáyotro méinyotio rokar em. Yáyotro so yém ndimbal yétkwén tuot! Efalo.
english: For of him and through him and to him are all things . To him be the glory for ever ! Amen.

nama: Yénémaménnde, tane fútar, yéndon ewamnendan fém Ngánjánene ghérghérsisé kénjún, ménát sái erametati féfenjo fifi ndené fété ghérsé ghéngénghéngén, njúnnjúnofnar a remngongafé Ngánjánefaf. Yéné siyém efalo a mer wáwefnogh ásáfogh. 2 Yau yaitotati féfene yam wafrogh a mband maratoene túmén yam wafrogh, wénde Ngánjánam a eyátota totér ár ménaye mwyghé wengoghe kétámé fém ndérmayé nemnati. Féyo fém mat so em Ngánjánene ménde féfeyot, árkéméné yém mer a méndefé a féwénféwénofnar.
english: Therefore I urge you , brothers, by the mercies of God , to present your bodies a living sacrifice , holy, acceptable to God , which is your spiritual service .
Don’ t be conformed to this world, but be transformed by the renewing of your mind , so that you may prove what is the good , well-pleasing , and perfect will of God .

nama: Ndené fété Ngánjánene si résagh ár, yéndon ewarametan féfe yéné mat si: Yau fémyo nawawindati a nawarmbotati fifiofnare. Fémofem táf mwighé efaronati fém fifi efe em yénaye ndimbal mwighaye árké Ngánjánam ewaramai. 4 Ndené fété téfene em ámbiro fifi tárfár fifi kafekafeyafé, a yéné fifi kafeyafene sem yau ámbiro ásáfogh ewam, 5 Kerisoene fififaf. Yénd méinyotio yéném yáne ásáfogh ár ámbiro fifiyan, téfeyot sem fénatayero em ásáfogh wafroghét, a ndené fété yénd ámbirofifi yéném Keriso kénjún, yénd yéndio so náfrendam, a yéndfem méndefé so efandam ámb ár. 6 Téfene em fénatayero tambén, yéné féyotaro ngárám kés yénmaramai téfe. Njam ároene tambén noraya yéné yam ufroghét, so yafrotati yáne ndimbal mwighé féyotaroye 7 njam násáfoghta ár wáutárghét so fété ewáutánati; njam yém watameghét, so fété ewatametati. 8 Njam yém wawéngsoghét, so fété ewawéngsotati. Njam yém ramégh kétán yéné árfene ménde némat em, so fété tangwaram marataye. Njam yém limánégh ár ayém táikér ásáfogh ár. Njam ghérghérsisé yuyafota, so yafrotati ásneghafé. Uwégh
english: For I say through the grace that was given me , to everyone who is among you , not to think of yourself more highly than you ought to think ; but to think reasonably, as God has apportioned to each person a measure of faith .
For even as we have many members in one body , and all the members don’ t have the same function ,
so we , who are many , are one body in Christ , and individually members of one another ,
having gifts differing according to the grace that was given to us : if prophecy , let ’ s prophesy according to the proportion of our faith ;
or service , let’s give ourselves to service ; or he who teaches , to his teaching ;
or he who exhorts , to his exhorting ; he who gives , let him do it with generosity; he who rules, with diligence ; he who shows mercy , with cheerfulness .

nama: Uwégh ayém unyéghofnar. Méndméndat yéfandati yaufi. Kawerangi kétán némé yém mer. 10 Nauwetati fémro kénjún ménaye mérén áuwéghe. Eutémndati méinyoto ár féfenjo kénjún. 11 Yau sakér aem féfenjo ásáfoghmén, wénde mbérmbére ásáfogh ayafrotati Yurane muyaye. 12 Áuwéghafé aem méghméghan. Métar aem kértayan, a túmén aem oraighan Ngánjánefaf. 13 Erametati rokar Ngánjánene árfé efe ménde em, a merot frengégh yam ewarametati.
english: Let love be without hypocrisy. Abhor that which is evil . Cling to that which is good .
In love of the brothers be tenderly affectionate to one another ; in honor prefer one another ,
not lagging in diligence , fervent in spirit , serving the Lord ,
rejoicing in hope , enduring in troubles , continuing steadfastly in prayer ,
contributing to the needs of the saints, and given to hospitality .

nama: Efrendati fá emofem némusérmbotat fém. Frengéghro tawaram yau tawafalngo. 15 Náuwétati yémafé efe náuwetat, a nendati yémafé efe nendat. 16 Emor ámbiro mwighaye méinyotio árfé. Yau tuktuk yéngfandé, wénde yéné árfé táf nawareindati efe em yuwon ghérsafé. Yau nemnati fém mat kar em méinyotio.
english: Bless those who persecute you ; bless , and don’ t curse .
Rejoice with those who rejoice . Weep with those who weep .
Be of the same mind one toward another . Don’ t set your mind on high things , but associate with the humble . Don’ t be wise in your own conceits .

nama: Yau tawango yaufie yaufi téfnan ámb ároe. Kor aem yam wafrogh némé mbarkánd yém méinyotio ár ghékéf kénjún. 18 Féfendio ásáfogh yafrotati njam féyotaro em ménát so mer emor méinyotio árfé krufrátaye. 19 Tane fútaréf, yau fai tawawangongi korongi Ngánjánefaf, ménamén ndené Buk si noraye, "Yéndon so fai yangotan, yéndon so fai yangotan yéfefaf emofem tafrotat, Yuré noraye."
english: Repay no one evil for evil . Respect what is honorable in the sight of all men .
If it is possible , as much as it is up to you , be at peace with all men .
Don’ t seek revenge yourselves , beloved, but give place to God ’ s wrath . For it is written , “ Vengeance belongs to me ; I will repay, says the Lord .”

nama: Wénde ewafrotati yéné yam ndenáye Buk si noraye, "Féfene mék téfnár njam siogh em, emanjnati njamkeye. Njam nuam erameta, tawaramangi nu yéfe nénet, a fá so wáiwáiyam eramete ménamén némé yam té tafrotat féfefaf."
english: Therefore “ If your enemy is hungry , feed him . If he is thirsty , give him a drink ; for in doing so , you will heap coals of fire on his head .” + 12:20 Proverbs 25:21-22

nama: Yau taumyongi yaufiyamam sái fene ghérsé tawainde, wénde tawaindangi yaufiyam meryam wafroghe.
english: Don’ t be overcome by evil , but overcome evil with good .

nama: Méinyotio ár táf náyáretat gafanafefaf, ménamén yéné muyé yau em fáyo ufroghmén wénde Ngánjáneta yéné muyé árké násáfotat Ngánjánam té ekmetam. 2 Fá efe nakenat sái náyáretat muyé yéné mbandmén yékenat Ngánján sái yiyáretat, a kérté yam so mé ewaitote. 3 Limánégh árém yau férférafé eyátotat meryam wafrogh ár, wénde fá emofem ewafrotat yaufi. Fém ménde té em sái yuwek em férférofnar yéné limánégh árfe tambén? Táf ewafrotati merro táf yémofem so euwetati. 4 Ménamén fá siyém Ngánjánene ásáfogh ár merot sái násáfotati. Wénde fémofem njam ewafrotati yaufi, férfér so em ménamén mé téfnofnar yau so témanangi witmafé sénté náifé. Fá siyém Ngánjánene faiofnar ásáfogh ár a nékw résagh ár ménát tákmangi tékrátan kérté yam wafrogh ár. 5 Yénémaménnde, mbarkánd yém sái náyáretam limánégh árfefaf, yau ménaménro tékrát yammén, wénde wéi fété mer mwghata.
english: Let every soul be in subjection to the higher authorities , for there is no authority except from God , and those who exist are ordained by God .
Therefore he who resists the authority withstands the ordinance of God ; and those who withstand will receive to themselves judgment .
For rulers are not a terror to the good work , but to the evil . Do you desire to have no fear of the authority ? Do that which is good , and you will have praise from the authority ,

for he is a servant of God to you for good . But if you do that which is evil , be afraid , for he doesn’ t bear the sword in vain ; for he is a servant of God , an avenger for wrath to him who does evil .
Therefore you need to be in subjection , not only because of the wrath , but also for conscience ’ sake .

nama: Yéné téfnan mani ekametati gafamanefaf. Limánégh ár em Ngánjánene faiofnar ásáfogh ár. Yémofem kakmangi méinyotio efogh ásáfoghan. 7 Tawaramangi méinyotio árfene némé fém ewaweretati yéfeyot. Njam gafaman mani kémghét féfeyot em, tékmangi gafaman mani. Njam ámb mani kémghét, féyo taramangi ámb mani. Njam em utmanégh, so fété em utmanégh, a yuyofotati wútmanégh a wafarerégh. Uwetati féfenjo kénjún
english: For this reason you also pay taxes , for they are servants of God ’s service, continually doing this very thing .
Therefore give everyone what you owe: if you owe taxes , pay taxes ; if customs , then customs ; if respect , then respect ; if honor , then honor .

nama: Yau táf árfene wafángogh mani{d{ ...f* {d{13.8 wafángogh mani what is meaning? ekmang féfefef, yanaro túmén fai so yém sái euwetati féfe kénjún, {e{ ...f* {e{13.8 Yau táf árfene wafángogh mani ekmang féfefef, yanaro túmén fai so yém sái euwetati féfe kénjún, need be BT and check the meaning.
english: Owe no one anything , except to love one another ; for he who loves his neighbor has fulfilled the law .

nama: Nák, "Yau awérghanyo wal. Yau ár ngi krot; yau oro. Yau mwighaye yérsa ároene rokar." Ámb nák yéné kés engém, méinyotio efghang yéné ámbiro nákan, "Yuweta fenjo kaka ár ndené fémyo." 10 Uwégham yau téfunangé mámáfi fútarefaf. Yénémaménnde uwéghan efalo táyátongé nák.
english: For the commandments , “ You shall not commit adultery ,” “ You shall not murder ,” “ You shall not steal ,” “ You shall not covet ,” and whatever other commandments there are , are all summed up in this saying , namely , “ You shall love your neighbor as yourself .”
Love doesn’ t harm a neighbor . Love therefore is the fulfillment of the law .

nama: A ndené fété mat sái yéném sénonjo efghon. Yéné efoghféneféne té téném féfeyot sái nanotati féfenjo kéméghta. Yéné ménamén yéné efghon wanjarégh mé témorwén nayu. Wénde sénonjo yéné efogh té téném a ndenanit yém kaka. 12 Sémbár siyém awaingétro yém, a efogh siyém kaka yém. Yénémamén yéndfem so ekmetam téndot kwéfitane yam wafrogh a tawerangém kwayaghane mék sáláme. 13 Yénd so nawarawenam efalofifie, ndené fété efghon kar yéném, yau yaufiyamafé téménd yam a wéri nu néne, yau máméghéraye wal, yau ásmégh a waramnjagh. 14 Wénde tumyongi Yuré Yesu Keriso limánégh kémafngongé fém, a yau eronjati end ménát sái yaufiyam ménde yifotati.
english: Do this , knowing the time , that it is already time for you to awaken out of sleep , for salvation is now nearer to us than when we first believed .
The night is far gone , and the day is near . Let ’s therefore throw off the deeds of darkness , and let ’s put on the armor of light .
Let ’s walk properly , as in the day ; not in reveling and drunkenness , not in sexual promiscuity and lustful acts, and not in strife and jealousy .
But put on the Lord Jesus Christ , and make no provision for the flesh , for its lusts .

nama: Tumyongi ámb efalo yátogh ár efe em muyafnar ndimbal mwighé, wénde yau nawasálitati fá némamén fá nemnat siyém mbarkánd o yau. 2 Ámb ár efe ndimbal mwighé yém sái eneta méinyotio njamke, wénde ámb ár endene ndimbal mwighé muyafnar yém enete mé ndau njamkero. 3 Yéné ár emo enete méinyotio rokar yau táf néreta yuwon yáfaf emo yau enete, a yéné ár emo yau enete méinyotio rokar yau táf yasalita yéné ár emo enete, ménamén Ngánjánam té yumyo. 4 Fém efe yém sái yasalita ámb árfene faiofnar ásáfogh ár? Yurafafétro yém yéfenemén, yémon so emndete némé mbarkánd fá em o yau, Yurane waftayam so ewáutáne fá sái ewafrotat féyotaroe.
english: Now accept one who is weak in faith , but not for disputes over opinions .
One man has faith to eat all things , but he who is weak eats only vegetables .
Don’ t let him who eats despise him who doesn’ t eat . Don’ t let him who doesn’ t eat judge him who eats , for God has accepted him .
Who are you who judge another ’ s servant ? To his own lord he stands or falls . Yes , he will be made to stand , for God has power to make him stand .

nama: Ndené yameyo, ámb ár nemnat ndené ámb efgham yáinde ámb efogh, táf ámb ár nemnat ndené méinyotio efogh fá ndenaro fété em. Méinyotio ár so fété efalo náyátotat yéfenjo mwighan. 6 Endefene yém fénaté efogh Ngánjáne wáwefnoghét yém yá utmanéghét. Fá emofem enetat fénatafénaté njamke ewafrotat mé Yurai utmanéghe, ménamén té Ngánján kánjo si taramangi fronde soramé enetat. A fá emofem yau enetat méinyotio rokar wéi ndenáyo yutémndat Yuré a kánjo yarametat Ngánjáne. 7 Yénd yéndio yau yémor ghérsé téfendio, a yénd yau kér yéném téfendio. 8 Njam yénd ghérsé yéném, yénd ghérsé ménát yéném sái yutémndam Yuré, a njam yénd kér yéngém, yénd so kér yéném Yurafé. Yénémaménnde, njam mé ghérsé yéném o kér yéném, yénd yéném Yurane. 9 Yéné téfnanfifi, Keriso kér yémormén a nanoi ghérsat ménát fá nénamndai Yuré kér árfet a ghérsé árfet. 10 Féyo, fém, némamén fémo moghan ekmete fenjo fútar? O némamén fém néretati yuwon fenjo fútarefaf? Ménamén yénd méinyotio so kokayongém Ngánjánene mogh ámnjogh kitarayan. 11 Ndené Buk si noraye, "Yuré noraye,'Yénd kés ghérsé wém, méinyotio ár budme so néneitat tafaf, méinyotio kankayam so yuyotat Ngánján.'"
english: One man esteems one day as more important. Another esteems every day alike. Let each man be fully assured in his own mind .

He who observes the day , observes it to the Lord ; and he who does not observe the day , to the Lord he does not observe it . He who eats , eats to the Lord , for he gives God thanks . He who doesn’ t eat , to the Lord he doesn’ t eat , and gives God thanks .
For none of us lives to himself , and none dies to himself .
For if we live , we live to the Lord . Or if we die, we die to the Lord . If therefore we live or die, we are the Lord ’ s .
For to this end Christ died, rose , and lived again , that he might be Lord of both the dead and the living .
But you , why do you judge your brother? Or you again , why do you despise your brother? For we will all stand before the judgment seat of Christ.
For it is written , “‘ As I live ,’ says the Lord , ‘ to me every knee will bow . Every tongue will confess to God .’” + 14:11 Isaiah 45:23

nama: Néméwét, yéndfem méinyotio so yarametam wangogh téfenjomén yáyot Ngánjáne.
english: So then each one of us will give account of himself to God .

nama: Yénémaménnde, yéndfem yau táf moghan ekmetam ár ndenayu. Wénde nemnati sái emor yéné ende fémofem yau ánde so yanawetati ámb efalo yátogh ároe end. 14 Yénd mat wém a safénro yéfandan Yuré Yesuene waftaye ndené njamkefaf yau yém mámáfi nénet, wénde ámb ár njam nemna ndené mámáfi yém, féyo yéné ároe yém mámáfi. 15 Njam fene fútarém tanang sotot ménamén fémo némé eneta, fém yau kor násáfota uwéghan. Yau mé fene njamke néneménro yasérmbotati fene fútar endeyot Keriso kér yémormén! 16 Yénémaménnde yau táf yumyotati fém némé nemnati ndené mer em yénamé ár kés norayat ndené mámáfi kar em. 17 Ngánján limánégh yau yém njamke néneye a nu, wénde mbarkánd yam, krufrát a áuwégh Ngánján Mbérmbér kénjún, 18 ménamén emo njam yiyátota Keriso ndené yam wafrogh yém áuwéghafé Ngánjáne a árém wéi efalo yiyátota.
english: Therefore let ’s not judge one another any more , but judge this rather , that no man put a stumbling block in his brother’s way , or an occasion for falling .
I know and am persuaded in the Lord Jesus that nothing is unclean of itself ; except that to him who considers anything to be unclean , to him it is unclean .
Yet if because of food your brother is grieved , you walk no longer in love. Don’ t destroy with your food him for whom Christ died .
Then don’ t let your good be slandered,
for God ’s Kingdom is not eating and drinking , but righteousness , peace , and joy in the Holy Spirit .
For he who serves Christ in these things is acceptable to God and approved by men .

nama: Yénémaménnde yéndfem méinyotio yam yénamé so ewafrotam árkéménayam yénlimnde krufrátfaf a ewáutána ámbiroámbiroe. 20 Yau yironati Ngánjánene ásáfogh mé njamke téfnanro. Méinyotio njamke sem mer, wénde yéné mámáfi yém ároe sái yéneta yéné njamke árkéménayam eméinde ámb ár yaufiot. 21 Merfifi yém yau so enetam wérárafene fenjén o wéri nu néne o ámb yam kés em árkéménayam so yéméinde fe fútar wighét. 22 Némé fémo njam efalo eyátota yéné yammén tané fenjo kénjút a Ngánján kés. Frengéghkaf yéné ár yém efe fáyo yau nawaghne ménáyan némé yémon taumyongé. 23 Wénde fá efe yém sómbio mwighafé nawaghne njam eneta, ménamén yáne njamke néne yau ndimbal mwighata yém, a méinyotio yau njam eném kétamé ndimbal mwighata siyém yaufiyam.
english: So then , let ’s follow after things which make for peace , and things by which we may build one another up .
Don’ t overthrow God ’s work for food ’s sake . All things indeed are clean , however it is evil for that man who creates a stumbling block by eating .
It is good to not eat meat , drink wine , nor do anything by which your brother stumbles , is offended , or is made weak.
Do you have faith ? Have it to yourself before God . Happy is he who doesn’ t judge himself in that which he approves .
But he who doubts is condemned if he eats , because it isn’ t of faith ; and whatever is not of faith is sin.
Now to him who is able to establish you according to my Good News and the preaching of Jesus Christ, according to the revelation of the mystery which has been kept secret through long ages,
but now is revealed, and by the Scriptures of the prophets, according to the commandment of the eternal God, is made known for obedience of faith to all the nations;
to the only wise God, through Jesus Christ, to whom be the glory forever! Amen.

nama: Yénd efe yéném muyafé ndimbal mwighayan so fété ewáutánam yéné efalo yátogh ár endene ndimbal mwighé yém muyafnar a yau yéndro so méndefé nafandam. 2 Yéndfem so fété mer ewawafrotam téfe kaka árfet yéfene merot, ménát ár muyafé eyátotam ndimbal mwighayan. 3 Yau Keriso fáyo méndefé kafandau. Ndené Buk si noraye, "Wasáligh yéfene emofem ewasalitat fem té nafayongi tafaf." 4 Méinyotio némé té efarotaménd tándái efarotaménd watameghét téfeyot. A Buk siam yénmarameta méghmégh a uwangsogh ndené fété yéndfem ewanjetam métare Ngánjánene unyéghofnar si ménát sái efalo eyátote. 5 Ngánján emo ewaramete wamarogh a uwangsogh tawaramangé féfe mérne afégh mbérmbér féfenjo kénjún njam yaitotati Keriso Yesu, 6 ménát ámbiro tikfe a mbírmbíre fémofem so yuyotati Ngánján a téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene Yárefé.
english: Now we who are strong ought to bear the weaknesses of the weak, and not to please ourselves .
Let each one of us please his neighbor for that which is good , to be building him up .
For even Christ didn’ t please himself . But , as it is written , “ The reproaches of those who reproached you fell on me .”
For whatever things were written before were written for our learning , that through perseverance and through encouragement of the Scriptures we might have hope .
Now the God of perseverance and of encouragement grant you to be of the same mind with one another according to Christ Jesus ,
that with one accord you may with one mouth glorify the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ .

nama: Eumyotat ámbiroámbiro, ndené Kerisom ndernáye eumyoi fém, ménát áuwégh sái yérsati Ngánjáne. 8 Yéndon emndetan fém Keriso té nénamndai faiofnar ásáfogh ár Israil árfeyot Ngánjáne efalo si téfnan, ménát sái efalo táyátongai si mbarkánd yéfene ákiafefaf árké eramai, 9 ménát ndené Téndo árém so yuyotat Ngánján yáne ghérghérsisamén, ndené Buk si noraye, "Yénémaménnde yéndon so némarsan Téndo árfefafmé. Yéndon so wafnyagh wagh engrametan fene yétkwénot."
english: Therefore accept one another , even as Christ also accepted you , to the glory of God .
Now I say that Christ has been made a servant of the circumcision for the truth of God , that he might confirm the promises given to the fathers ,
and that the Gentiles might glorify God for his mercy . As it is written , “ Therefore I will give praise to you among the Gentiles and sing to your name .” + 15:9 2 Samuel 22:50; Psalms 18:49

nama: Wéikor ndené noraye, "Náuwétati, fém Téndo ár, Ngánjánene árfé!"
english: Again he says , “ Rejoice , you Gentiles , with his people .” + 15:10 Deuteronomy 32:43

nama: A wéikor, "Yarsati Yuré, méinyotio fémofem Téndo árém, Yuyotati fá, fém méinyotio ár."
english: Again , “ Praise the Lord , all you Gentiles ! Let all the peoples praise him .” + 15:11 Psalms 117:1

nama: A wéikor, Aisaya noraye, "Ámb ár kétamé Jesiene mérénta so kénamndangé waftafé, efe so kokayongé sái elimnda méinyotio mband marat, Téndo ár so em méghmégh yáfaf."
english: Again , Isaiah says , “ There will be the root of Jesse , he who arises to rule over the Gentiles ; in him the Gentiles will hope .” + 15:12 Isaiah 11:10

nama: Méghméghafé Ngánjánam so ewafote méinyotio áuwéghe a krufrát ménamén fémofem yiyátotati fá, ménát fém so afoghare em méghméghan Ngánján Mbérmbér waftayan. Folene misi ásáfogh Téndo árfeyot
english: Now may the God of hope fill you with all joy and peace in believing , that you may abound in hope in the power of the Holy Spirit .

nama: Tane fútaréf, yénd yéndio mat wém ndené fém fémyo em meryam wafrogh kér ro, méinyotio mat yémafé a féyotaro watameghét féfe kénjún méinyotio yéfenemén. 15 Yéndon té tangwafarotan marataye ámb sifayamén, sái mat táyátongayén yéfenemén wéikor, ménamén ngárámafé Ngánjánam árké waramai ta 16 sái wém misi Keriso Yesuene yéfe Téndo árfeyot ghéngén wárogh yémafé Ngánjánene si waitoghan, ménát Téndo ár so kénamndangi njúnnjúnofnar ghéngénghéngén umyoghafé Ngánjánefaf. Ngánján Mbérmbéram té ewafrote njúnnjúnofnar.
english: I myself am also persuaded about you , my brothers, that you yourselves are full of goodness, filled with all knowledge , able also to admonish others .
But I write the more boldly to you in part as reminding you , because of the grace that was given to me by God ,

that I should be a servant of Christ Jesus to the Gentiles , serving as a priest of the Good News of God , that the offering up of the Gentiles might be made acceptable , sanctified by the Holy Spirit .

nama: Yénémamén yénd nawarmbotan Keriso Yesuene kénjún tane ásáfoghmén Ngánjáneyot. 18 Yénd yau so nawarmbotan sái norayan némamén wénde némé Kerisom yafrotam ta kénjúmé Téndo árét limánéghét kétán Ngánján áyárghét Ngánján ménáyan némé yéndon té korayan a tawafrotan, 19 ménaye sélngwélafé wafroghyam a fénaté wafroghyame, Ngánján Mbérmérene wafté kénjúmé. Féyo kétamé Jerusalem méinyotio yénamé kétán Ilirikum, yéndon té méinyoe ténmaitotam Kerisoene mer si. 20 Tane ménde túmén yém ménát sái yaitotan mer si Kerisoenemén ánde yau kor náyárayénd yánemén, a kété ámb árom ánde Yesuene mérén yeitam. 21 Wénde ndené yéné noraye Buk siyan, "Endefeyot yau ewaufrotaménd yánemén so néretat a fá efe yau káyáretat so mat káyátongi." Folene mwighé álighét Romét
english: I have therefore my boasting in Christ Jesus in things pertaining to God .
For I will not dare to speak of any things except those which Christ worked through me for the obedience of the Gentiles , by word and deed ,
in the power of signs and wonders , in the power of God ’s Spirit ; so that from Jerusalem and around as far as to Illyricum , I have fully preached the Good News of Christ ;
yes , making it my aim to preach the Good News , not where Christ was already named , that I might not build on another ’s foundation .
But , as it is written , “ They will see , to whom no news of him came . They who haven’t heard will understand .” + 15:21 Isaiah 52:15

nama: Yéné téfnan, tárfár mbinotmé, yénd kénawanetan kétamé sái kwénmorwén féfefaf. 23 Wénde sénonjo yéndon té tifon tane ásáfogh yéné yuwon, a soramé yéndon té wanjetan yéné tombé yunjfan, yénd yéta ménde wém féfe fandaghét. 24 Féyo, yéndon té mwighé téfaronan sái wéngém Sfeinét. Njam té wéngém, yénd so kékmbon Romén, a njam fémofé ménde téngwifongém tekofnaye, fémofem so kwénmatembangi kétamé. 25 Wénde soramé so wéném, fronde so yénd wéngém Jerusalemét sái engwarsan rokar ramghét efalo yátogh árét kétán. 26 Makedoniamén ár a Akayamén ár náuwétaménd rokar aféghét yéfeyot ronjagh árét efe tamorwén Ngánjánene ár kété Jerusalemén. 27 Fá áuwéghan tamorwén wafroghét, a so fété yémofem fai yáfángotat yéfeyot. Ménamén Ju árém té tawaftat Téndo árét yéfene mbérmbér frengégh a yéné fao so yáfángotat fifiye frengégh awafégh Ju árfet. 28 Njam yéndon tawaraman yéné mani a ténmifon yéné meryam yéfene, yénd so wéném fandaghét féfefaf tane álighan kétán Sfeinét. 29 Yénd mat wém njam yénd wéném féfefaf, yénd so wéném Kerisoene ndimbal frengéghafé féfeyot.
english: Therefore also I was hindered these many times from coming to you ,
but now , no longer having any place in these regions , and having these many years a longing to come to you ,
whenever I travel to Spain , I will come to you . For I hope to see you on my journey , and to be helped on my way there by you , if first I may enjoy your company for a while .
But now , I say, I am going to Jerusalem , serving the saints.
For it has been the good pleasure of Macedonia and Achaia to make a certain contribution for the poor among the saints who are at Jerusalem .

Yes , it has been their good pleasure , and they are their debtors . For if the Gentiles have been made partakers of their spiritual things , they owe it to them also to serve them in material things .
When therefore I have accomplished this , and have sealed to them this fruit , I will go on by way of you to Spain .
I know that when I come to you , I will come in the fullness of the blessing of the Good News of Christ .

nama: Fútaréf, yéndon ewamnendan fém téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoe a Ngánján Mbérmbéroene uwéghan, ménát sái kényufnyangi tafaf tane ásméghfaf Ngánjánafé orayégh tayot. 31 Ngánjánafé norayati ménát yénd so kwanjarngé kétamé efalo yátoghofnar árfetambén kété Judian. Ngánjánafé norayati wéikor ndene efalo yátogh ár kété so ménde yém sái yumyoyénd yéné ramégh yéndo yérsan Jerusalemét. 32 Féyo Ngánjánene méndeyan yénd so wéném féfefaf áuwéghafé a yénd so nenam fémafé. 33 Krufrátafé Ngánján so yém féfefaf méinyotio. Efalo.
english: Now I beg you , brothers, by our Lord Jesus Christ and by the love of the Spirit , that you strive together with me in your prayers to God for me ,
that I may be delivered from those who are disobedient in Judea , and that my service which I have for Jerusalem may be acceptable to the saints,
that I may come to you in joy through the will of God , and together with you , find rest .
Now the God of peace be with you all . Amen.

nama: Yéndon yérametan féfefaf téfene mérés Fobe, efe yém ásáfogh ár yéné Yesuene mérnan árké yém Kenkrian. 2 Yéndon ewamnendan fém sái tumyongi Fobe Yurane kénjún minde tukén utmanéghafé fémofem Kerisoene árém a yáutánati némé wáutárégh ménde njam yém yáyot féfeta, ménamén mérés fáyo témorwén ndimbal wáutáréghafé tárfár árfefaf, a yénd wéi kwáutánau.
english: I commend to you Phoebe , our sister, who is a servant of the assembly that is at Cenchreae,
that you receive her in the Lord in a way worthy of the saints, and that you assist her in whatever matter she may need from you , for she herself also has been a helper of many , and of my own self.

nama: Áuwégh tawaraménd Frisila a Akwila, tane mérne ásáfogh ár Keriso Yesuene kénjún. 4 Yémofem ekmetat yéfenjo ghérsé ta wanjarégh téfnan. Yénd erametan kanjo si yéfefaf, yau yéndro, wénde méinyotio Téndo árfene Yesuene mérén wéi. 5 Áuwégh wéi si tawaramangi Yesuene mérnot sái náumendat yéfene méngon.
english: Greet Prisca and Aquila, my fellow workers in Christ Jesus ,
who risked their own necks for my life , to whom not only I give thanks , but also all the assemblies of the Gentiles .
Greet the assembly that is in their house . Greet Epaenetus , my beloved, who is the first fruits of Achaia to Christ .

nama: Áuwégh si taramangi Merie, efe kásáfote mindefifi féfeyot. 7 Áuwégh si tawaraménd yéfe Andronikus a Junias, tane sómbio mérénmén emofé yéndfé mérne tényawangérwén kwéfkwéf méngon. Fá ámb em utmanéghafé Yesuene muyafé ár kénjún, a fá frondeyo tamorwén Keriso kénjún yénd soramé.
english: Greet Mary , who labored much for us .
Greet Andronicus and Junia , my relatives and my fellow prisoners , who are notable among the apostles, who were also in Christ before me .

nama: Áuwégh si taramangi Ámbliatuse, efe yéndon yuwetan Yurane kénjún. 9 Áuwégh si taramangi Urbanuse, téfene mérne ásáfogh ár Kerisoene kénjún, a tane áuwéghafé fútar Stákis. 10 Áuwégh si taramangi Afelese, mer ár efe yém efalo yátoghkaf Kerisoene kénjún. Áuwégh si tawaramangi yéfe efe em Arostobulusene méngon. 11 Áuwégh si taramangi Erodion, tane mérénmén. Áuwégh si tawaramangi yéfe efe em Narkisusene méngon efe em Yurane kénjún.
english: Greet Amplias, my beloved in the Lord .
Greet Urbanus , our fellow worker in Christ , and Stachys , my beloved.
Greet Apelles, the approved in Christ . Greet those who are of the household of Aristobulus.
Greet Herodion , my kinsman . Greet them of the household of Narcissus , who are in the Lord .

nama: Áuwégh si tawaraménd yéfe Trifena a Trifosa, yéné amaf efe mindefifi kásáfotat Yurane kénjún. Áuwégh si taramangi tane áuwéghafé fútare Fersis, ámb amaf efe mindefifi kásáfotau Yurane kénjún. 13 Áuwégh si taramangi Rufuse, yékafayénd Yurane kénjún, a yáne amé, efe témorwén tayot amanit wéi. 14 Áuwégh si taramangi Asinkrituse, Flegon, Ermas, Fatrobas, Ermas, a yéfene mérén kés em yémafé. 15 Áuwégh so taramangi Filologus, Julia, Nereus a yáne mérés, a Olimfas a méinyotio Yurane ár kés em yémafé.
english: Greet Tryphaena and Tryphosa , who labor in the Lord . Greet Persis , the beloved, who labored much in the Lord .
Greet Rufus , the chosen in the Lord , and his mother and mine .
Greet Asyncritus, Phlegon , Hermes , Patrobas , Hermas , and the brothers who are with them .
Greet Philologus and Julia , Nereus and his sister, and Olympas , and all the saints who are with them .

nama: Áuwégh tawaramangi féfe kénjún ménaye njúnnjúnofnar sénéghégh. Méinyotio efalo yátogh árfene Yesuene mérnam yénan engwawatembangi yéfene áuwégh si.
english: Greet one another with a holy kiss . The assemblies of Christ greet you .

nama: Tane fútar, yéndon emndetan fém ménát sái nawarawenati yéfe tambén emofem yéfunat afalogh yam a yéru yénawetat fene ghérsé áligh kénjún fénataye watamegh kétamé fém némé mat em. Nayu aem yéfetambén. 18 Ndené árém yau yásáfotat téfene Yuré Keriso, wénde yéfenjo amanjarghét futot. Ménaye méndefé sie a frengéghafé sie yémofem ewarsotat ménd ár. 19 Méinyotio ár té káyáretawét féfene áyárégh kér ro mer simén, yénémamén minde áuwéghafé wém féfefaf. Yénd ménde wém fém sái em káfeté kétán némé yém mer a ménd ár so kétán némé yém yaufi. 20 Krufrát Ngánjánam wékeye so tésenangé Sáifér féfene kafkaf mbanmbanan. Téfene Yuré Yesuene ngárám so yém féfefaf.
english: Now I beg you , brothers, look out for those who are causing the divisions and occasions of stumbling , contrary to the doctrine which you learned , and turn away from them .
For those who are such don’ t serve our Lord Jesus Christ , but their own belly ; and by their smooth and flattering speech they deceive the hearts of the innocent.
For your obedience has become known to all . I rejoice therefore over you . But I desire to have you wise in that which is good , but innocent in that which is evil .
And the God of peace will quickly crush Satan under your feet . The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you .

nama: Timoti, yéndfé mérne ásáfogh ár, engwawatemb yánjo áuwégh si féfeyot, ndenáyo wéi yémofem Lukius, Jason a Sosifata, tane mérnam.
english: Timothy , my fellow worker , greets you , as do Lucius , Jason , and Sosipater , my relatives .

nama: Yénd, Tertius, emo yéfarotam yéné férén ménat Fol, áuwégh si ewarametan Yurane kénjún.
english: I , Tertius , who write the letter , greet you in the Lord .

nama: Gaius, endene waráuwéghan yénd a méinyotio Yesuene mérén yéna náuwétam, yémon engwawatemb yánjo áuwégh si. Erastus, efe yém ndimbal tesenan mani wanjángégh ár, a téfene fútar Kuartus engwatembangi féfeyot yéfene áuwégh si. 24 Téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene ngárám so yém méinyotio féfefaf. Efalo.
english: Gaius , my host and host of the whole assembly , greets you . Erastus , the treasurer of the city , greets you , as does Quartus , the brother.
The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you all ! Amen.

nama: Ngánjánam so eyátote muyafé, ndené fété mer si ndernáye noraye. Yéné si Yesu Kerisoenemén té nákmang safét yáne mwighé farorégh féfe Téndo árét, yéné mwighé farorégh árké tétnongérwén kétamé rényégh. 26 Wénde sénonjo safén yém a mat náyátoyém Ngánjánene mat yátogh árfene farogh férnan ndené akegh Ngánjánam té tawafaretam ménát méinyotio ár yéné mband maratan so efalo yiyátotat a yiyáretat fá. {f{ ...f* {f{16.26 Wénde sénonjo safén yém a mat náyátoyém Ngánjánene mat yátogh árfene farogh férnan ndené akegh Ngánjánam té tawafaretam ménát méinyotio ár yéné mband maratan so efalo yiyátotat a yiyáretat fá. check it again.
Mé yáfafetro káfeté Ngánjánefaf so yém ndimbal kwayaghé tuot yáne kénjúmé Yesu Keriso! Efalo.
Yéné férén siyém kétándmé Fol, efe té yémotayéng sái yém Keriso Yesuene muyafé ár Ngánjánene méndeyan, a kétándmé téfene fútar Sostenes,
english: Paul , called to be an apostle of Jesus Christ through the will of God , and our brother Sosthenes ,

nama: Yéndon yéfarotan yéné férén kétán Ngánjánene Yesuene mérnot Korint kénjún, yéfefaf efe efghayéng Keriso Yesu kénjún a efe té emotayéng yáne njúnnjúnofnar ár sái em mérne yémafé méinyotio árfé, emofem yáwefnotat téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoe, yéfene Yuré a téfene.
english: to the assembly of God which is at Corinth — those who are sanctified in Christ Jesus , called saints, with all who call on the name of our Lord Jesus Christ in every place , both theirs and ours :

nama: So Ngánján téfene Afam a Yuré Yesu Kerisom tawaramangé féfe ngárám a krufrát. Frengégh Keriso kénjún
english: Grace to you and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ .

nama: Yéndon túmén kánjo yarametan tane Ngánjánoe féfeyot ménamén ngárámmén féfe té ewaramayéng Keriso Yesue kénjúmé. 5 Ménát Keriso kénjún fém té namndangi wemár méinyotio rokar kénjún, yéné efghangi méinyotio orayégh a méinyotio matyam. 6 Yéné si Kerisoenemén té efalo namndai féfe kénjún 7 ndené fém yau náláitayénd umyoghét ámbiro frengéghét, ndené fété fém kawanjetati téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoe ménát sái kufarngai. 8 Yémon so ndenéyameyo ewerete fém taikrataye kétánotio yatogh, ménát fém so em téfnofnar téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene efghon. 9 Ngánján siyém ndimbal mwighé kér ro yém, emo emotai yémafé fútar yamot yáne Ambum Yesu Keriso téfene Yuré. Afalogh yam Yesuene mérén kénjún
english: I always thank my God concerning you for the grace of God which was given you in Christ Jesus ,
that in everything you were enriched in him , in all speech and all knowledge —
even as the testimony of Christ was confirmed in you —
so that you come behind in no gift , waiting for the revelation of our Lord Jesus Christ ,
who will also confirm you until the end , blameless in the day of our Lord Jesus Christ .
God is faithful , through whom you were called into the fellowship of his Son , Jesus Christ our Lord .

nama: Tane fútaréf, ménaye téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene si muyaye, yénd nómnéndan méinyotio féfefaf ménát ámbiro mwighé tiyátongi némé fém norayati, ménát kété yau so afalogh yém féfefaf. Mé méinyotio kafghangi ámbiro mwighé aem, a ámbiro emarghafé. 11 Tane fútaréf, ámb ár kétándmé Kloene mérnam waufroyénd ta ndené mé safénro kété em éwigh yam féfe kénjún. 12 Yéndon ndené ende so tékman, ámbiroámbiro árém norayat fénatayero. Ámb noraye, "Yéndon yaitotan Fol," ámb, "Yéndon yaitotan Afolos," ámb, "Yéndon yaitotan Fité", a ámb "Yéndon yaitotan Keriso." 13 Keriso té téfalotati mérénmérnot? Wét Fol yamayénd wafatarégh wénan féfeyot? Némé fém ewalitotaménd Folene yétkwénan? Yau. 14 Yéndon kánjo yarametan Ngánjáne ndené yéndon efe ámb yau ewalitotamén mé Krisfus a Gaius, 15 féyo efe ámb yau so noraye nde fém némaritotamend tane yétkwénan. 16 (Néméwét, yéndon ndenéyameyo yalitotamén Stefanas a yáne mérén, wénde yénd yau nawafrotan té o yau yéndon té namalitotamén efe ndafi.) 17 Kerisom yau kwémáfárete yénd walitoghét. Yémon kwémáfárete yénd mer si sái nafrotan yau árfene matyam sie, ménát Kerisoene kér wafatarégh wénan yau so sotro tiyátongi yánjo waftata. Keriso wafté a káfeté mwighé Ngánjáneta
english: Now I beg you , brothers, through the name of our Lord , Jesus Christ , that you all speak the same thing , and that there be no divisions among you , but that you be perfected together in the same mind and in the same judgment .
For it has been reported to me concerning you , my brothers, by those who are from Chloe ’s household, that there are contentions among you .
Now I mean this , that each one of you says , “ I follow Paul ,” “ I follow Apollos,” “ I follow Cephas ,” and , “ I follow Christ .”
Is Christ divided ? Was Paul crucified for you ? Or were you baptized into the name of Paul ?
I thank God that I baptized none of you except Crispus and Gaius ,
so that no one should say that I had baptized you into my own name .
( I also baptized the household of Stephanas ; besides them , I don’ t know whether I baptized any other .)
For Christ sent me not to baptize, but to preach the Good News — not in wisdom of words , so that the cross of Christ wouldn’ t be made void .

nama: Yéné si Kerisoene kérmén wafatarégh wénan siyém fifiofnar yém yéfeyot efe olingéghkaf em, wénde téfeyot siyém efe té nunjaryém yéné siyém Ngánjánene wafté. 19 Buk si noraye, "Yéndon so yironan káfeté mwighé yéfene endefene matyam ewam a yéndon so tafalon yéfene efe mwighé sénté em wafénmanégh ár em."
english: For the word of the cross is foolishness to those who are dying, but to us who are being saved it is the power of God .
For it is written , “ I will destroy the wisdom of the wise . I will bring the discernment of the discerning to nothing.” + 1:19 Isaiah 29:14

nama: Ánde wét káfeté mwighé ár yém? Ánde wét nák watamegh ár yém? Ánde wét matyam kér ro éwigh ár yém yéné mband maratan? Ngánjánam té yuyafoyéng yéné mbandoene káfeté mwighé siyém fifiofnar!
english: Where is the wise ? Where is the scribe ? Where is the debater of this age ? Hasn’ t God made foolish the wisdom of this world ?

nama: Ngánjánam yánjo káfeté mwighé kénjúmé yafrotam táikér árét yá wayamngongét ménaye fai yéfenjo káfeté mwighaye. Wénde ménaye "fifiofnar" sie yéndfem kafrotam, Ngánjánam mwighé yaitotam yéfe ghérsé urtoghét emofem efalo yiyátoyénd. 22 Ju ár ménde em sélngwélafé yam ufaroghét, a Grik ár néretat káfeté mwighat. 23 Wénde ndené téfeyot siyém, yéndfem marataye si yaitotam Kerisoenemén efe yénamndaménd, yéné si siyém nétér Ju árfet a Téndo árfet siyém fifiofnar, 24 wénde yéfe siyém efe Ngánjánam té emotayéng, sómbio mérén Ju ár a Téndo ár, yéné si siyém Keriso, efe yém Ngánjánene wafté a Ngánjánene káfeté mwighé. 25 Mbandmén ár túmén nemnat ndene Ngánjánene emarégh yém fifiofnar, wénde Ngánjánene emargham ewainde mbanmén árfene emarégh, a némé ndené nérete Ngánjánene njangénnjangén kar yém, wénde yáne wafroghyam árké em minde muyafé ewainde árfene muyé.
english: For seeing that in the wisdom of God , the world through its wisdom didn’ t know God , it was God ’s good pleasure through the foolishness of the preaching to save those who believe .
For Jews ask for signs , Greeks seek after wisdom ,
but we preach Christ crucified , a stumbling block to Jews and foolishness to Greeks,
but to those who are called , both Jews and Greeks , Christ is the power of God and the wisdom of God ;
because the foolishness of God is wiser than men , and the weakness of God is stronger than men .

nama: Tane fútaréf, kawafarotangi némé fém tamorwén njam Ngánjánam emotayéng fém. Kétándmé árfene matyam wafroghta tárfárofnar fém em káfeté mwighafé o wafté kér ro o tukén yétkwénafé. 27 Wénde Ngánjánam takafangé mwighafnar rokar yéné mbandmén ménát wáiwáiot sái tékmangé matyam téfnár, a yémon takafangé muyafnar rokar yéné mbandmén ménát wáiwáiot sái tékmangé muyé kér ro ár. 28 Yémon takafangé yuwan rokar yéné mbandmén a kenaghkaf rokar a yéné rokar árkéméné yau em ménát sái tawirorngi yéné rokar árkéméné mbandam nemne yéné mer yém. 29 Yéné sioene fifi ndené yém efe yau so nawarmbote Ngánján sáfrére. 30 Wénde Ngánjánam té nénmanai fém ámbiro namndayénd Keriso Yesufé, a Ngánjánam té yiyátoi Keriso sái yém téfene káfeté mwighé. Ménamén fété fá, Ngánjánam yénd té yénékmai mbarkánd yémafé a yénd nénamndangém njúnnjúnofnar a yénmanjaryéng. 31 Yénémaménnde, Buk siam noraye ndené, "Efe njam ménde yém sái nawarmbote so nawarmbote ménamén Yuram némé té yafrotam."
english: For you see your calling , brothers, that not many are wise according to the flesh , not many mighty , and not many noble ;
but God chose the foolish things of the world that he might put to shame those who are wise . God chose the weak things of the world that he might put to shame the things that are strong .
God chose the lowly things of the world , and the things that are despised , and the things that don’ t exist , that he might bring to nothing the things that exist ,
that no flesh should boast before God .
Because of him , you are in Christ Jesus , who was made to us wisdom from God , and righteousness and sanctification, and redemption,
that , as it is written , “ He who boasts , let him boast in the Lord .”

nama: Tane fútaréf, njam yénd nénaflayén féfefaf Ngánjánene warambnogh efalo afroghét, yénd yau korayan minde wafté kér ro si a ndimbal matyame. 2 Yénd njam kwémorwén fémafé, yénd nemnayén tane mwighayan méinyotio rokarmén wawalighét wénde mé Yesu Keriso, emo yénamndaménd wafatarégh wénan. 3 Féyo njam yénd nénaflayén féfefaf, yénd kwémorwén njangénnjangén a ngernger kwémorwén a férfér. 4 A tane watamegh a si ramégh tamorwén yau árfene káfeté mwighé tambnafé, wénde tafrotawén ufrogh yamafé Ngánján Mbérmbér waftaye, 5 ménát fene ndimbal mwighé yau so namyote ároene káfeté mwighayan, wénde Ngánjánene waftayan. Ngánjánene káfeté mwighé
english: When I came to you , brothers, I didn’ t come with excellence of speech or of wisdom , proclaiming to you the testimony of God .
For I determined not to know anything among you except Jesus Christ and him crucified .
I was with you in weakness, in fear , and in much trembling .
My speech and my preaching were not in persuasive words of human wisdom , but in demonstration of the Spirit and of power ,
that your faith wouldn’ t stand in the wisdom of men , but in the power of God .

nama: Wénde yénd norayam káfeté mwighafé si anoghkaf árfefaf. Wénde yéné yau yém káfeté mwighé yéné mbandmén o yáne limánégh árfeta, efe eyota yauyawét. 7 Yéné káfeté mwighé yénd nafrotam Ngánjánene warambnogh káfeté mwighé yém, árké té yétnoi árfe tambén, wénde Ngánjánam yékafai téfeyot ndimbal kwayaghat soramé mband marat yafrotam. 8 Efe ámb yau limánégh ár yéné mbandmén mat náyátoyénd yéné. Fá njam mat tamorwén, yémofem yau so yénamndamén ndimbal kwayaghé Yuré wafatarégh wénan. 9 Wénde, bukam noraye, "Némé ghékfam yau té yinjoi, némé ténganam yau náyárai, a némé yau ároene mwighayam yáyamngoi nde so yéné nufrote. Wénde yéné yém némé Ngánjánam yéfrendam yéfeyot emofem yuwetat fá."
english: We speak wisdom , however , among those who are full grown, yet a wisdom not of this world nor of the rulers of this world who are coming to nothing .
But we speak God ’s wisdom in a mystery , the wisdom that has been hidden, which God foreordained before the worlds for our glory ,
which none of the rulers of this world has known . For had they known it , they wouldn’ t have crucified the Lord of glory .
But as it is written , “ Things which an eye didn’ t see , and an ear didn’ t hear, which didn’ t enter into the heart of man , these God has prepared for those who love him .” + 2:9 Isaiah 64:4

nama: Wénde yéné syémormén téfeyot Ngánjánam safén yékmayéng yáne warambnoghmén yam Ngánján Mbérmbére. Ngánján Mbérmbér náronje méinyotio yamot, fá wéi mat yém Ngánjanene warambnoghmén mwighé. 11 Mé téfene mbérmbérero mat yém méinyotio téfene kénjúmén. Ndené endeyo mé Ngánjánene Mbérmbérero mat yém méinyotio Ngánjánenemén. 12 Yéndfem yau yanayém yéné mbandmén mbérmbér, wénde Ngánján Mbérmbér Ngánjánam árké yénmáfáretam, ménát yénd mat so náyátotam méinyotio Ngánjánam té yénmaramai téfe.
english: But to us , God revealed them through the Spirit . For the Spirit searches all things , yes , the deep things of God .
For who among men knows the things of a man except the spirit of the man which is in him ? Even so , no one knows the things of God except God ’s Spirit .
But we received not the spirit of the world , but the Spirit which is from God , that we might know the things that were freely given to us by God .

nama: Yénd yau korayawém ár watamegh káfeté mwighé, wénde Ngánján Mbérmbér watamegh sie. Yéné ende yéndfem tafénawén mbérmbére efalo si yéfe Ngánján Mbérmbérafé em. 14 Efe Ngánján Mbérmbérofnar em yau so tawanangi ramégh tambén árké eném kétándmé Ngánjánene Mbérmbérta wénde yéné yam yém fifiofnar yéfefaf a féyotarofnar em wayamngoghét ménamén fá féyotaro em wayamngoghét Ngánján Mbérmbérero. 15 Efe Ngánján Mbérmbérafé em, yémofem so yafénmetat méinyotio yam, wénde fá emon yau so yafénmete. 16 Ndené fété buk kés noraye, "Efe mat yém Yurane mwighé? Efe so kamndangé yá wawanjaghét? Wénde yénd yéném Kerisoene mwighafé.
english: We also speak these things , not in words which man ’s wisdom teaches but which the Holy Spirit teaches, comparing spiritual things with spiritual things .
Now the natural man doesn’ t receive the things of God ’s Spirit , for they are foolishness to him ; and he can ’ t know them , because they are spiritually discerned.
But he who is spiritual discerns all things , and he himself is to be judged by no one .
“ For who has known the mind of the Lord that he should instruct him ?” But we have Christ ’ s mind .

nama: Tane fútaréf, yénd yau so norayan féfefaf ndené árfefaftro yénd fété so norayan efe em Ngánján Mbérmbéran, wénde yénd fété so norayan féfefaf ndené fété fém kar em yéné mbandmén, o ndené fété fasri Keriso kénjún. 2 Yéndon fété so emanjnam fém nono wékwre, yau táikér njamkeye, ménamén fém yau afrengéghkaf yénat. Efalo yéné yém, fém téfé yau afrengéghkaf em yénat. 3 Ménamén fém mé emor ndené yéné mbandmén ár. Njam kété yém waramnjagh féfe kénjún a fém namronati féfe kénjún. Yéné yamam eufane ndené fém em yéné mbandmén. A fém emor yéné mband matyame emor. 4 Njam ámb fém koraya, "Yéndon yaitotan Fol," a ámb, "Yéndon Afolos yaitotan,"féfene wafroghyam ndenanit yém mband ár.
english: Brothers, I couldn’t speak to you as to spiritual , but as to fleshly, as to babies in Christ .
I fed you with milk , not with solid food , for you weren’t yet ready . Indeed , you aren’t ready even now ,
for you are still fleshly . For insofar as there is jealousy , strife , and factions among you , aren’t you fleshly , and don’t you walk in the ways of men ?
For when one says , “ I follow Paul ,” and another , “ I follow Apollos,” aren’t you fleshly?

nama: Némnat mbarkánde, efe yém Afolos? A efe yém Fol? Yénd siyénre mé Ngánjánene faiofnar ásáfogh árro, emofem fém elimánménd kétán efalo yátoghfaf. Yéndfem ásáfogh yafrowam árké Yuram taramangé yá wafroghét: 6 Yéndon mbwe eitamén, Afolos wén nue ewasune, wénde Ngánján témorwén emon téméindau wén anoghét. 7 Emon eite a emon nue ewasune némndafi yéné yau yém, wénde mé Ngánjánro, ménamén yémon eméinde wén anoghét. 8 Kété fénaté yau yém yéfe kénjún emon eite a emon nue ewasuné. Ngánjánam so fai ámbiro ewafrowam yéné ásáfoghan ndernáye yémofem té tawafrowam. 9 Yénd siyénre mérne ásáfogh ár Ngánjáneyot a fém sem Ngánjánene ndau a Ngánjánene méngo.
english: Who then is Apollos, and who is Paul , but servants through whom you believed , and each as the Lord gave to him ?
I planted . Apollos watered . But God gave the increase.
So then neither he who plants is anything , nor he who waters , but God who gives the increase.
Now he who plants and he who waters are the same , but each will receive his own reward according to his own labor .
For we are God ’s fellow workers . You are God ’s farming, God ’s building .

nama: Ngánjánam waramai ta ngárám wafroghét, yéndon tafrotan ásáfogh ndené fété káfeté mwighafé méngo ramégh ár a sérasér taitan, a ámb árém téu yarametat yéné tukén. Wénde ámbiroámbiro so fété nawarawenat ndernáye so méngo yéramete. 11 Ngánjánam tándái té yékmai Yesu Keriso ámbiro a mé fáro sérasér, a yau ámb sérasér so tékmangé. 12 Ámb árém so yarametat méngo gole, silfaye o tukén faimén wíme sérasér tukén, ámb árém so yarametat wéne o yuse a tafaye. 13 Ámbiroámbiro árfene ásáfogh sáf so yéfandat njam Kerisoene efogh kufarngé. Yéné efghon fésam so safén ekmete ámbiroámbiro árfene ásáfogh, fésam so eufote a tauyafongé ásáfogh kémbun. 14 Táf némé té tamorwén raméghan sérasér tukén fés wakraran kinamongé, méngo ramégh árom fai so tanangé. 15 Wénde fene ásáfogh njam té kakerne, fémo so yétarné wénde fém fémyo té nawanjar, táf fém té nawanjar fés kénjúmé.
english: According to the grace of God which was given to me , as a wise master builder I laid a foundation , and another builds on it . But let each man be careful how he builds on it .
For no one can lay any other foundation than that which has been laid , which is Jesus Christ .
But if anyone builds on the foundation with gold , silver, costly stones , wood , hay , or straw ,
each man ’s work will be revealed . For the Day will declare it , because it is revealed in fire ; and the fire itself will test what sort of work each man ’s work is .
If any man ’s work remains which he built on it , he will receive a reward .
If any man ’s work is burned , he will suffer loss , but he himself will be saved , but as through fire .

nama: Efaloe fém mat em ndené fém Ngánjánene wáwefnogh méngo em a Ngánjánene Mbérmbér yémor féfene kénjún! 17 Ngánjánam so tirorngé fá emon tirorngé yáne wáwefnogh méngo. Ménamén Ngánjánene wáwefnogh méngo siyém njúnnjúnofnar, a fém fémyo em yáne wáwefnogh méngo.
english: Don’ t you know that you are God ’s temple and that God ’s Spirit lives in you ?
If anyone destroys God ’s temple , God will destroy him ; for God ’s temple is holy, which you are .

nama: Fém yau nawawinda fémyo.
