Táf fété fém njam nemna ndené fém káfeté mwighafé ném mband yamoene mate, fém so kamndangé fifiofnar, ménát so kamndangé efalo káfeté mwighafé. 19 Ménamén némé yéné mbandam mwighé yekwne nde káfeté mwighé yém táf fifiofnar yém Ngánjanene ghékfan. Buk si noraye, "Ngánjánam tawerangé káfeté mwighafé ár yéfenjo matyaman."
english: Let no one deceive himself . If anyone thinks that he is wise among you in this world, let him become a fool that he may become wise .
For the wisdom of this world is foolishness with God . For it is written , “ He has taken the wise in their craftiness .”

nama: A ámb Buk si noraye, "Yuré mat yém káfeté mwighé árfene emarégh siyém fifiofnar." 21 Féyo efe yau téu nawarmbotat ménamén némé árém sái yafrotat. Méinyotio rokar sem féfene yém. 22 Fol o Afolos o Fité, yéné mband, ghérsé a kér, sénonjo a soramé yu, méinyotio yéné sem féfene, 23 a fém Kerisoene a Keriso siyém Ngánjánene.
english: And again , “ The Lord knows the reasoning of the wise , that it is worthless .”
Therefore let no one boast in men . For all things are yours ,
whether Paul , or Apollos, or Cephas , or the world , or life , or death , or things present , or things to come . All are yours ,
and you are Christ ’s, and Christ is God ’s.

nama: Fém so nemnati téfenemén ndené Kerisoene ásáfogh ár, efe té ekmayénd ásáfoghét Ngánjánene warambnoghmén efalo si afroghét. 2 Ár emo yásáfota yáne yurane ásáfogh fété so em ndimbal mwighé kér ro. 3 Yénd yau méinyotio mwighayan ménamén féfene moghmén o ámb fénataye árfene matyame yénd yéndio yau wékman moghan. 4 Tane emarégh siyém safén, wénde yéné yamam yau efalo yiyátote ndené yénd mbarkánd wém. Yuramro kwafrote mogh yénd. 5 Féyo fémofem yau yafrotati mogh ámb árfefaf táf mbarkánd efogh wufarégh frondeta. Nawanjeta féfene wifoghmén mogh ámb árfefaf kétánotio Yuré nénangota. Yémon so enérse kwayaghat némé atnogh yém kwéfkwéfan a yufarote árfene ménde tikfan. A féyo yémofem so ewinjetat Ngánjáneta áuwégh.
english: So let a man think of us as Christ ’s servants and stewards of God ’s mysteries .
Here , moreover , it is required of stewards that they be found faithful .
But with me it is a very small thing that I should be judged by you , or by a human court . Yes , I don’t even judge my own self .
For I know nothing against myself . Yet I am not justified by this , but he who judges me is the Lord .

Therefore judge nothing before the time , until the Lord comes , who will both bring to light the hidden things of darkness and reveal the counsels of the hearts . Then each man will get his praise from God .

nama: Tane fútaréf, féfene téfnan yéndon té ewangen méinyotio yam Afolosefaf a yéndio, yéndfem sómbioyam ewafrowém féfe ufénmanéghét, ménát fém so wéi notametati téfefafta orayéghoene kémbun, "Tékém kaka némé nák efrotaménd." Féyo fém efe yau so nawarmbotati ámb ároenemén a ámb yékarotati. 7 Emon fém eyáto ndimbal ámb árét. Ngánjánam ewaramai némé méinyotio fene em. Féyo, ndernáye fém so nawarmbotati, a ndenanit némé té fene em yau kar ramégh yém?
english: Now these things , brothers, I have in a figure transferred to myself and Apollos for your sakes , that in us you might learn not to think beyond the things which are written , that none of you be puffed up against one another .
For who makes you different? And what do you have that you didn’t receive ? But if you did receive it , why do you boast as if you had not received it ?

nama: Fém tándái méinyotio fene méndefé rokarafé té namndangi! Fém nemnati fém wémár tém! Fém té limánégh yérnyangi téfeyofnaye! Yénd ménde wém fém sái yém limángéh ár efaloe. Fém njam témorwén, yénd so wéi yéném limánégh ár a yéndfem fémafé so yélimndam méinyotio rokar. 9 Ndené nérete tafaf Ngánjánam té yénmaramai kerker sifayé téfeyot Yesuene muyafé ár, ndenanit ár tékmangi krot marat sifayan ménát méinyotio mband maratam a njafar si résagh árém a árém so yafandat. 10 Kerisoene téfnan yénd yéném fifiofnar, wénde fém em káfeté mwighafé Keriso kénjún! Yénd njangénnjangén yéném, wénde fém em muyafé! Yénd kenagh ár yéném, wénde fém eutémndat! 11 Yénanotio sénonjo yénd yényota siogh a nuofnar, yénd siyéném sáláme féndérféndér yénmawo, yénd yénésmetat, yénd noyamndam kétándmé ámb yu kétán ámb yu. 12 Yénd taikrataye násáfotam téfenjo ngángaye. Njam yénd yénmafalngotat, yéndfem téfrendangém. Njam yénd yénésmetat, yénd tawaindangém. 13 Njam yénd yénmasalitat, yéndfem tawangongém mer sie. Yénd namndayém ndenanit wérár a mérmér yéné mband maratmén yénanotio sénonjo.
english: You are already filled . You have already become rich . You have come to reign without us . Yes, and I wish that you did reign , that we also might reign with you !
For I think that God has displayed us , the apostles, last of all , like men sentenced to death . For we are made a spectacle to the world , both to angels and men .
We are fools for Christ ’s sake , but you are wise in Christ . We are weak, but you are strong . You have honor, but we have dishonor.
Even to this present hour we hunger , thirst , are naked , are beaten, and have no certain dwelling place.
We toil , working with our own hands . When people curse us , we bless . Being persecuted , we endure.
Being defamed, we entreat . We are made as the filth of the world , the dirt wiped off by all , even until now .

nama: Yéndon yéné yéfarotan féfefaf, yau ménát yéndon sái tákman wáiwáiot, wénde fém ewawanjan ndené fété tane tikfafé ambumtértér. 15 Téu fene 10,000 watamegh ár em Keriso kénjún, féfene afé siyém mé ámbiro. Ménamén Yesu Keriso kénjún yénd té nénamndan féfene afé mer si kénjúmé. 16 Yéndon ewanendan fém ménát so ewaitotati tane waufarogh. 17 Yéné téfnan yéndon yánmatembetan féfefaf Timoti, efe yém tane tikfafé a ndimbal mwighé kér ro ambum efalo yátogh árfene ghérsé kénjún. Yémon so kor mwighé ewangote fém tane wafroghyammén árké yéndon yaitotan totér ghérsé kénjún Yesu Keriso kénjún a méné yéndon tawatametan méinyotio Yesuene mérén kénjúmé marataye.
english: I don’t write these things to shame you , but to admonish you as my beloved children .
For though you have ten thousand tutors in Christ , you don’ t have many fathers . For in Christ Jesus , I became your father through the Good News .
I beg you therefore , be imitators of me .
Because of this I have sent Timothy to you , who is my beloved and faithful child in the Lord , who will remind you of my ways which are in Christ , even as I teach everywhere in every assembly .

nama: Ámb ár namndangi tuktuk ménamén fá té kemnati nde yénd kar yau so kénaflangayén féfefaf yafoghét. 19 Wénde táf njam Yuré ménde yém, yénd so kénaflen tekofnaryo, a féyo yéndon so táronjangé tandio yéné waftamén árkéméné yéné tuktuk árfene ewam, yau mé siero némé fá norayat. 20 Ngánján limánégh siyém yau mé siero, wénde wafté. 21 Árké ménde em? So wét kénaflen féfafaf téfélafé, o uwégh a métar mbérmbérafé?
english: Now some are puffed up , as though I were not coming to you .
But I will come to you shortly , if the Lord is willing . And I will know , not the word of those who are puffed up , but the power .
For God ’s Kingdom is not in word , but in power .
What do you want ? Shall I come to you with a rod , or in love and a spirit of gentleness ?

nama: Efaloe korayat ndené kété siyém yaufi wal féfe kénjún yaufi kéráye ndené yau yém yéné yaufi wal efalo yátoghofnar árfefaf. Ta waufroyénd ndené ár ekmare yárefane amafofé! 2 Féyo ndernáye fém so nawarmbotati? Fém fiya ghérghérsisayam tawafongé, a fété tutorngi féfenjo mérénta ár emon té tafrote yéné yam. 3 A ndemamén yénd wém nayu kétándmé féfe tambén fifie, yénd mé wém kété féfefaf mbérmbére. Ndené nde kété kar kwémorwén fémafé, téfene Yuré Yesuene yétkwénan yéndon té yáindayén mogh yam yifoyén yéné ároefaf emon té yafrotam yaufi wal. 4 Féyo njam fém kafángongi a yénd ngafghangén fémafé mbérmbéran, a téfene Yuré Yesuene wafté yéna yém, 5 téramangi yéné ár kétán Sáiféroene ngángat ménát ndené yáne fifi wasérmboghét, ménát ndené yáne mbérmbér so kunjarngé Yurane efghon.
english: It is actually reported that there is sexual immorality among you , and such sexual immorality as is not even named among the Gentiles , that one has his father ’ s wife .
You are arrogant , and didn’ t mourn instead , that he who had done this deed might be removed from among you .
For I most certainly , as being absent in body but present in spirit , have already , as though I were present , judged him who has done this thing .
In the name of our Lord Jesus Christ , when you are gathered together with my spirit with the power of our Lord Jesus Christ ,
you are to deliver such a one to Satan for the destruction of the flesh , that the spirit may be saved in the day of the Lord Jesus .

nama: Yau mbarkánd yém féfeyot sái nawarmbotati! Fém mat em si, "Némbne fénjfénj flawé minaghmén fakam yémine flawé kofékofé." 7 Fémofem so titrombongi tándáwár flawé minagh fak ménát fém so em njúnnjúnofnar. Féyo fém ndenanit so em totér flawé minagh fakofnaye, ndené fém fété em. Téfene Waingégh téménd frengéghkaf yém, sénonjo Keriso, téfene Waingégh Sif tosé, té tésmetat. 8 Kamyongém yénd téfene Waingégh témndot, yau minagh fakafé flawé árké yém mámáfi yamafé a yaufiyamafé, wénde fak minaghofnar flawé árké yém njúnnjúnofnar a efalo.
english: Your boasting is not good . Don’ t you know that a little yeast leavens the whole lump ?
Purge out the old yeast , that you may be a new lump , even as you are unleavened. For indeed Christ , our Passover , has been sacrificed in our place .
Therefore let ’s keep the feast , not with old yeast , neither with the yeast of malice and wickedness , but with the unleavened bread of sincerity and truth.

nama: Ámb férénan yéndon yéfarotamén féfeyot a engemndayén fém ndené yau nawarendati yémafé yaufi wal kér ro árfé. 10 Wénde yéndon yau esérmbnan efalo yátoghofnar ár efe em yaufi wal téfnár, o kwanjté ár o oro téfnár, o mewang wáwefnogh ár. Ménát etérmbogh ndené méinyotio árta, fém so fété kétorngi yéné mband maratta. 11 Sénonjo yéndon norayan féfefaf ndené fém yau nawarendati yéné árofé efe namndete féyo ndené efalo yátogh ár wénde yém yaufi walyam téfnár o kwanjté o mewang wáwefnogh ár o unyégh ár o wéri téfnár o oro téfnár. Yau táf námnjotati nénet ndené árfé.
english: I wrote to you in my letter to have no company with sexual sinners;
yet not at all meaning with the sexual sinners of this world , or with the covetous and extortionists, or with idolaters , for then you would have to leave the world .

But as it is , I wrote to you not to associate with anyone who is called a brother who is a sexual sinner, or covetous , or an idolater , or a slanderer, or a drunkard , or an extortionist. Don’ t even eat with such a person .

nama: Tane ásáfogh yau yém sái norayan efe Yesuene mérén kénjún yau em. Ngánjánam mogh so yafrote yéfefaf. Wénde yau mogh yafrotati fenjo mérénmén árfefaf. 13 Ndené fété Buk si noraye, "Tawitrombongi yaufiyamafé ár fenjo mérénta."
english: For what do I have to do with also judging those who are outside ? Don’ t you judge those who are within ?
But those who are outside , God judges . “Put away the wicked man from among yourselves .”

nama: Njam ámb fém éwighan ere ámb efalo yátogh árfé, ndernáye fém kuwano ngánjánofnar sénko árfé sáfrére moghét némamén yau namyo Ngánjánene árfefaf kérté frengéghét? 2 Fém mat yau em nde Ngánjánene árém mband marat moghan so tékmangi? Féyo njam fémofem mband moghan tékmangi, fém yau féyotaro em némbne kértamén moghét? 3 Fém mat yau em ndené yéndfem njafar si résagh ár moghan so tékmangém? Féyo nderé tárfár kérté yéndfem so efrendam yéné ghérsamén! 4 Féyo njam ndené kérté eném, fémofem so engérsati frengéghét yéné árfefaf efe yau ewakai Yesuene mérnan? 5 Wáiwái aem! Yéna fété em ámbiro káfeté mwighé ár yéfnayéng féfene mérnan emon so ewafrende éwigh kérté féfe kénjúnro. 6 Yau ndené, ámb fútar kuwanongé ámb árfé moghét a tumyongé efalo yátoghofnar kérté moghét!
english: Dare any of you , having a matter against his neighbor , go to law before the unrighteous, and not before the saints?
Don’ t you know that the saints will judge the world ? And if the world is judged by you , are you unworthy to judge the smallest matters ?
Don’t you know that we will judge angels? How much more , things that pertain to this life?
If then you have to judge things pertaining to this life, do you set them to judge who are of no account in the assembly ?
I say this to move you to shame . Isn’ t there even one wise man among you who would be able to decide between his brothers?
But brother goes to law with brother, and that before unbelievers!

nama: Yéné yam ndené fém snufrotati moghét féfe kénjúro nauyafote ndené fém té kawewonati. Yau mer nérete fém mámáfi náyátotati? Yau mer nérete fém néwáwendati? 8 Yau fém fémyo mámáfi náyátotati ámbiroámbiroe a néwáwendati féfenjo efalo yátogh ár! 9 Fété fém mat em ndené yaufiyamafé ár yau so tanangé Ngánján limánégh. Yau nawawérsotati fémyo. Ár efe em yaufi walwalro o ewáwefnotat mewangat o em amafanyo o áranyo walwalro a ár ghakér ro wal téfnár 10 o efe oro téfnár o em nité o em wéri téfnár o efe unyégh ár or ngi téfnár-yéné yam wafrogh árém yau so tanangi Ngánján limánégh. 11 Ámb fém ndenanit tamorwén. Wénde fém té eumbaryéng kétándmé yaufita, fém té eramayéng Ngánjánefaf, fém té eyátoyéng mbarkánd Ngánjánafé Yuré Yesu Kerisoene yétkwén kénjúmé a ménaye fai téfene Ngánjánene Mbérmbére. Fenjo fifi yérametat Ngánjánene ndimbal kwayaghat
english: Therefore it is already altogether a defect in you that you have lawsuits one with another . Why not rather be wronged? Why not rather be defrauded?
No , but you yourselves do wrong and defraud, and that against your brothers.
Or don’t you know that the unrighteous will not inherit God ’s Kingdom? Don’t be deceived . Neither the sexually immoral , nor idolaters , nor adulterers , nor male prostitutes, nor homosexuals,
nor thieves , nor covetous , nor drunkards , nor slanderers, nor extortionists, will inherit God ’s Kingdom.
Some of you were such , but you were washed. You were sanctified. You were justified in the name of the Lord Jesus , and in the Spirit of our God .

nama: Ámb ár so korayangé, "Yénd namyotan némndafi rokar wafroghét," wénde yau méinyotio rokar mer em feyot. Yénd so korayangén, "Yénd namyotan némndafi rokar wafroghét," wénde yénd yau so kamndan némndafioene faiofnar ásáfogh ár. 13 Ámb árom so korayangé, "Njamke siyém fútoe, a fút siyém njamkeyoe." Yéné efalo yém, wénde Ngánjánam so ewasérmbowé sómbio. Ároene fifi siyém yau so yimndé yaufi wal yamot, wénde ménát Yurane ásáfoghét, a Yuram so wéi násáfote fifioe. 14 Ngánjánam yanoyéng Yuré kétándmé kérta, a yémon so ndenáyo ténmanongé yénd yáne waftaye.
english: “ All things are lawful for me ,” but not all things are expedient . “ All things are lawful for me ,” but I will not be brought under the power of anything .
“ Foods for the belly , and the belly for foods ,” but God will bring to nothing both it and them . But the body is not for sexual immorality , but for the Lord , and the Lord for the body .
Now God raised up the Lord , and will also raise us up by his power .

nama: Fém mat té em nde féfenjo fifi sem Kerisoene fifioene kafe. So wét yéndon tanén Kerisoene fifi kafe a tiyáton yaufi walot? Féyotarofnar! 16 Fém mafina em ndené yéné ár emon fifi yánjo tékayongé amafaf kamndend ámbiro yémafé? Buk si noraye mé safénro, "Sómbio so kamndend ámbiro fifi." 17 Wénde fá efe kakayongé fáyo Yurafaf kamndangé mbérmbére ámbiro yémafé.
english: Don’ t you know that your bodies are members of Christ ? Shall I then take the members of Christ and make them members of a prostitute ? May it never be !
Or don’ t you know that he who is joined to a prostitute is one body ? For , “ The two ”, he says , “ will become one flesh .”
But he who is joined to the Lord is one spirit .

nama: Witérmbogh yaufi wal yam. Méinyotio ámb yaufiyam árom sewafrote yau yaghne yáne fifi; wénde yaufiyam ár emon amafanyo wal ewafrote, yaghne yánjo fifi. 19 Fém mat té em ndené féfene fifi sem Ngánján Mbérmbéroene wáwefnogh méngo, efe yémor féfene kénjún, a yaramayéng féfeyot Ngánjánam. Fém yau fenjoyo em. 20 Ngánjánam té nénmayayéng faye, féyo fenjo fifi yérametati Ngánjánene ndimbal yétkwénat.
english: Flee sexual immorality ! “ Every sin that a man does is outside the body ,” but he who commits sexual immorality sins against his own body .
Or don’ t you know that your body is a temple of the Holy Spirit who is in you , whom you have from God ? You are not your own ,
for you were bought with a price . Therefore glorify God in your body and in your spirit , which are God ’s.

nama: Sénonjo, so yéfandam yéné yammén fémofem árké yéfarotaménd: "Mer nérete árom yau sái yafrota walyam amafofé." 2 Wénde ménamén kété siyém minde yaufi wal, ámbiroámbiro ár fété so yém yáténafé, a ámbiroámbiro amaf fété so yém yánjarafé. 3 Yánjarém so yafrote yáne ásáfogh ndené fété yánjar, a ndenéyameyo yátnom ndené fété yátén. 4 Amaf yau yáne yuré yém yánjo fififaf, wénde yánjar yém, ndenéyameyo yánjar siyém yau yuré yém yáne fififaf, wénde yátén yém. 5 Yau so fém nakarot fémro, táfandro fémofem fronde mwighé so téfghend wafroghét tekofnaye ménát efoghféneféne so ténfend Ngánjánafé orayéghét, wénde térnyénd awarnyégh. Ménát fém yau so Sáiféroene wufoghan ere ménamén féfene awamaroghofnarmén.
english: Now concerning the things about which you wrote to me: it is good for a man not to touch a woman .
But , because of sexual immoralities , let each man have his own wife , and let each woman have her own husband.
Let the husband give his wife the affection owed her , and likewise also the wife her husband.
The wife doesn’ t have authority over her own body , but the husband does. Likewise also the husband doesn’ t have authority over his own body , but the wife does.

Don’ t deprive one another , unless it is by consent for a season , that you may give yourselves to fasting and prayer , and may be together again , that Satan doesn’ t tempt you because of your lack of self-control.

nama: Yéndon ewaufrotan féfe yéné yau wáfaregh yém, wénde mé mwigharo yém. 7 Yénd nemnan méinyotio fém kar ndené yam yénd kés wém. Wénde ámbiroámbiro féne fénataye fok Ngánjánam árké té yéramai yá, ámb ároe ámb fok, ámb ároe yéné.
english: But this I say by way of concession , not of commandment .
Yet I wish that all men were like me . However , each man has his own gift from God , one of this kind , and another of that kind .

nama: Sénonjo, yénd norayan aweréghofnar árfefaf a kwirafefaf, mer nérete féfeyot miya engérnyang ámnjoghan féfembia ndené fété yénd swém. 9 Wénde njam yau fém nawamarotati, féyo mer yém téu naweretati, yau táf mwighayan nuitati.
english: But I say to the unmarried and to widows , it is good for them if they remain even as I am .
But if they don’t have self-control , let them marry . For it ’s better to marry than to burn with passion.

nama: Awerégh árét táfaf yéna sotafé si em árkéméné tanjoyo yau em wénde Yurane. Yátén yau so kafalongé yánjarta. 11 Wénde téu téfrangongé, fá so yémor strewar ámnjogh o kawafarotangé fá yánjarefaf. A yánjarém yau so tatembangé yatén.
english: But to the married I command — not I , but the Lord — that the wife not leave her husband
( but if she departs, let her remain unmarried, or else be reconciled to her husband), and that the husband not leave his wife .

nama: Ámb árfefaf yénd norayan. Yéné si yau yém Yurata, wénde yénd norayan tane mwighé. Yéné yém, njam efalo yátogh ár yém yáténafé efe yau efalo yátogh amaf yém a fá kuwanongé ménát sái mé engmorare yémafé, yémon yau táf tatembangé fá. 13 A njam efalo yátogh amaf aweréghkaf yém árfaf efe yau efalo yátogh ár yém a kuwanongé ménát sái mé engmorare yémafé, amafom yau táf tatembangé fá. 14 Ménamén efalo yátoghofnar yánjar Ngánjánam tumyongé ménáyan fá sái kafghend efalo yátogh yátnofé, a efalo yátoghofnar amaf Ngánjánam tumyongé ménaye sái kafghend fá efalo yátogh yánjarfé. Yau njam yéné yam yém, yéfene ambumtértér ndenanit so em ngánjánofnar ambumtértér, wénde ndené kés yém, fá sem umyoghkaf em Ngánjánefaf. 15 Wénde njam efalo yátoghofnar ár kuwanongé, ndenáye so fété yém. Efalo yatogh ár a amaf yau so taumbe ndené yamam. Ngánjánam té ewanmoi fém krufrát ámnjoghét. 16 Ndernáye wét mat so kamndang, efalo yátogh yatén, ndené fémon so ghérsé turto fenjo fenjar? O ndernáye wét fém mat so kamndang, efalo yátogh yánjar, ndené fémon so ghérsé turto fetén? Ndenaye aemor Ngánjánam emotai fém
english: But to the rest I — not the Lord — say , if any brother has an unbelieving wife , and she is content to live with him , let him not leave her .
The woman who has an unbelieving husband, and he is content to live with her , let her not leave her husband.
For the unbelieving husband is sanctified in the wife , and the unbelieving wife is sanctified in the husband. Otherwise your children would be unclean, but now they are holy.
Yet if the unbeliever departs, let there be separation. The brother or the sister is not under bondage in such cases, but God has called us in peace .
For how do you know , wife , whether you will save your husband? Or how do you know , husband, whether you will save your wife ?

nama: Ámbiroámbiro fém so yémorang ndenáye Yuram némé ghérsé ewarametam féfe, a ndené fété fém Ngánjánam té emotai. Yéné fiyém si téfén yéndon árké táitotawén méinyotio Yesuene mérnamé. 18 Njam ghéngan néfégh árom tumyongé Ngánánene mogh, yémo yau so titérmbongé ghéngan néfégh mbor. Njam ghéngan néféghofnar árom tumyongé Ngánjánene mogh, fá yau so ghéngan yénfetat. 19 Téu o yau ár ghéngan yénfetat wénde yéné siyém fifiofnar. Némé mwighé yém siyém amyogh Ngánjánene náknák wafroghét. 20 Ámbiroámbiro fém so mé kámnjo ndenáye fém kés témorwén njam fémofem yumyoyénd Ngánjánene mogh. 21 Fém táf témorwén faiofnar ásáfogh ár njam Ngánján némotai fém? Mwighayam yau ewawérsota, wénde fémo njam yanai yuwek ghérsé, mé yafrotati. 22 Faiofnar ásáfogh ár efe Yuram té emotai siyém Yurane yuwek ár, ndené endeyo yuwek ár efe Kerisom té emotai siyém yáne faiofnar ásáfogh ár. 23 Fém sem Ngánjánam té ewanai faye, féyo yau kamndangi árfene faiofnar ásáfogh ár. 24 Tane fútaréf, ámbiroámbiroero fém ménj mé so ernyangé Ngánjánafé awarnyéghan ndené yamot fém témorwén njam fém emotai. Ámogh si aweréghofnar árfenemén a kwirafenemén
english: Only , as the Lord has distributed to each man , as God has called each , so let him walk . So I command in all the assemblies .
Was anyone called having been circumcised ? Let him not become uncircumcised . Has anyone been called in uncircumcision? Let him not be circumcised .
Circumcision is nothing , and uncircumcision is nothing , but what matters is keeping God ’s commandments .
Let each man stay in that calling in which he was called .
Were you called being a bondservant? Don’t let that bother you , but if you get an opportunity to become free , use it .
For he who was called in the Lord being a bondservant is the Lord ’ s free man . Likewise he who was called being free is Christ ’ s bondservant.
You were bought with a price . Don’t become bondservants of men .
Brothers, let each man , in whatever condition he was called , stay in that condition with God .

nama: Ámb si némé fémofem yafarotaménd aweréghofnar árfenemén. Yénd wafaréghofnar wém Yurata, wénde yéndon yarametan tane mwigharo, ménamén yáne ghérghérsisayan Yuram yénd té wiyátoi efe nafrotan efalo si.
english: Now concerning virgins , I have no commandment from the Lord , but I give my judgment as one who has obtained mercy from the Lord to be trustworthy .

nama: Ménamén sénonjo kértamén, yénd ndené nemnan mer yém ár sái yémor ndernáye fá yém. 27 Fém feténafé ném? Féyo yau nemna fetén watembéghét. Fém aweréghofnar ném? Féyo yau néreta ménát fetnot. 28 Wénde njam fém kawer, fémon yau yaufi yafrote, a njam aweréghofnar amaf kawerangé, yémon yau yaufi yafrote. Wénde yémofem efe naweretat so efángotat tárfár kérté yéné ghérayan, a yénd ménde wém ménát féfe wambghét.
english: Therefore I think that because of the distress that is on us, it ’s good for a man to remain as he is .
Are you bound to a wife ? Don’t seek to be freed. Are you free from a wife ? Don’t seek a wife .
But if you marry , you have not sinned. If a virgin marries , she has not sinned. Yet such will have oppression in the flesh , and I want to spare you .

nama: Fútaréf, ndené yéndon norayan yéné si, yau tárfár efoghféneféne ninamongi, a yénandmé sénonjo awerégh ár fiya tamorang ndené fá yau kar amaf naweretaménd. 30 Fá efe ye nendat, ndené fété fá yau kar, a fá efe áuwéghafé em, ndené fété fá yau kar. Fá emofem rokar ersat, ndené fété yau kar yéfene wamangét ewam. 31 Fá efe ernyang mband marat mer rokarfaf, ndenanit yau kár eremngotat yéné rokaram. Ménamén nderé sáfot yéné mband sénonjo yém yau so nakete teke.
english: But I say this , brothers: the time is short . From now on , both those who have wives may be as though they had none ;
and those who weep , as though they didn’ t weep ; and those who rejoice , as though they didn’ t rejoice ; and those who buy, as though they didn’ t possess ;
and those who use the world , as not using it to the fullest. For the mode of this world passes away .

nama: Yénd ménde wém fém sái em yuwek kétándmé mwighé uwérsoghta. Aweréghofnar ár fáyo nemne Yurane ásáfoghménro, ménamén fá ménde yém áuwéghét Yuré sái yéméinda. 33 Wénde awerégh ár fáyo nemne mband marat yamménro, ménamén fá nemne yáténoene ménde so yawifoté. 34 Féyo yénémamén fá siyém sómbio mwighayam yélimnde. Aweréghofnar o yuwagia mérés fáyo nemne Yurane ásáfoghménro, ménamén fá ménde yém araméghkaf sái sómbio kénjún yém fifiyan a mbérmbéran. Wénde awerégh amaf fáyo nemne mband marat yamménro, ménamén yémon ménde yánjarene yawifote.
english: But I desire to have you to be free from cares. He who is unmarried is concerned for the things of the Lord , how he may please the Lord ;
but he who is married is concerned about the things of the world , how he may please his wife .

There is also a difference between a wife and a virgin . The unmarried woman cares about the things of the Lord , that she may be holy both in body and in spirit . But she who is married cares about the things of the world — how she may please her husband.

nama: Yénd norayan yéné ménamén yénd ménde wém féfe wáutárghét. Yéndon yau kémbogh yénérsan féfefaf. Wénde yénd ménde wém fémofem sái yafrotati némé yém mbarkánd a utmanéghafé, a sái fémyo karamangi méinyotio Yurane ásáfoghét ékmboghofnaye.
english: This I say for your own benefit , not that I may ensnare you , but for that which is appropriate , and that you may attend to the Lord without distraction.

nama: Njam ár noraye unyégh si sai amaf kawerangé méroefaf a kemnangé ndené fá yau merkéráye yuyafote mérsefaf, a njam yáne méndeyam minde tanangé ndené fá so kawerangé, féyo fá fété so kawerend, ndenáye fété fá ménde kés yém. Yémo yau yaufi yafrote. Fá fété so káwerend. 37 Wénde njam ár taikrataye nemna yau yaweréghét ménaye wawérmanoghofnar wafroghét, a njam yémon téu yánjo ménde yamarota a némé té yaito yánjo mwighayan némé wafroghét, féyo yémon mer yafrote yau awerghét totér amafot. 38 Féyo ár emon kawerangé mer yafrote, wénde ár emon yau kawerangé yafrote ménde merfifi.
english: But if any man thinks that he is behaving inappropriately toward his virgin , if she is past the flower of her age , and if need so requires, let him do what he desires . He doesn’ t sin. Let them marry .
But he who stands steadfast in his heart , having no urgency, but has power over his own will , and has determined in his own heart to keep his own virgin , does well .
So then both he who gives his own virgin in marriage does well , and he who doesn’ t give her in marriage does better .

nama: Awerégh amaf siyém yau yuwek yém táf njam yánjar ghérsé yém. Wénde njam yánjar kér yém, féyo fá so yuwek yém fá so kawerangé ámb ár yáne méndefé, wénde fá táf efalo yátogh ár njam yém. 40 Wénde tane mwighé kénjún fá so yém minde áuwéghafé yém njam fá yémor ndené fá yém. Yénd nemnan yéndon wéi wém Ngánjánene Mbérmbérafé.
english: A wife is bound by law for as long as her husband lives ; but if the husband is dead , she is free to be married to whomever she desires , only in the Lord .
But she is happier if she stays as she is , in my judgment , and I think that I also have God ’ s Spirit .

nama: Sénonjo yénd so norayan ménamén njamke raméghmén mewangfaf.
english: Now concerning things sacrificed to idols : We know that we all have knowledge . Knowledge puffs up , but love builds up .

nama: Fá efe nemnat ndené fá mat em nauyafote ndené fla efalo yau mat em ndené fété fá so mat em. 3 Wénde njam ár uweta Ngánján, féyo Ngánján efaloe mat yém yéné ár.
english: But if anyone thinks that he knows anything , he doesn’t yet know as he ought to know .
But anyone who loves God is known by him .

nama: Féyo ménamén njamke nénemén mewangfaf raméghmén. Yénd mat yéném ndené mewang siyém yau efalofifi ngánján a kété siyém mé ámbiro Ngánján yém. 5 Njam kété em tárfár "ngánján" njafar kénjún o mbandan, a yéné em tárfár "njánján" a tárfár "yuré, " 6 wénde téfeyot siyém ámbiro Afé Ngánján, kétándmé ende tambén méinyotio rokar nufrotaménd a endeyot yénd naketam. A ámbiro Yuré, Yesu Keriso, ende kénjúmé méinyotio rokar nufrotaménd, a ende kénjúmé yénd naketam.
english: Therefore concerning the eating of things sacrificed to idols , we know that no idol is anything in the world , and that there is no other God but one .
For though there are things that are called “ gods ”, whether in the heavens or on earth — as there are many “ gods ” and many “ lords ”—
yet to us there is one God , the Father , of whom are all things , and we for him ; and one Lord , Jesus Christ , through whom are all things , and we live through him .

nama: Wénde méinyotio ár yau mat em yéné matyam. Ámb ár ménj té em mewangfaf sénonjo tawotio njam enetat ndené sáfot njamke yémofem yéné mé ewafarenat mewangoene njamke árké em; ménamén yéfene emarégh siyém njangénnjangén, yéné siyém mámáfi ewayatote. 8 Wénde njamke yam yau so kaka yényátote Ngánjánefaf. Yéndfem yau so ewaghnam némndafi táf yéndfem yau njam enetam, yéndfem némndafi mer yau so ewinjotam njam yéndfem njamke enetam.
english: However , that knowledge isn’ t in all men . But some , with consciousness of an idol until now , eat as of a thing sacrificed to an idol , and their conscience , being weak, is defiled .
But food will not commend us to God . For neither , if we don’ t eat are we the worse , nor if we eat are we the better .

nama: Aya kor aem, yau eumyotati féfenjo yuwek yimángégh fá eméinde efe njangénnjangén ndimbal mwighayan nuitat yaufiyamot. 10 Njam ár endene emarégh yém njangénnjangén yéné yaman kénminjongé fém, endene matyam té yém, nénéyan sái kénminjongé mewang wáwefnogh méngon, yéné yam so téméindangé fá njamke nénet mewang ramégh njamket. 11 Féyo yéné njangénnjangén ár, fe fútar endeyot Keriso kér yémormén, so yaghne ménamén fene matyammén! 12 A yéné ende fémofem so yaufiyam yafrotati Kerisoefaf ménaye yaufiyam ewafrotati ámb efalo yátogh árfefaf a ewaghnati yéfene njangénnjangén emarégh. 13 Féyo njam njamke yam yéméinde efalo yátogh ár yaufiyamot, yéndon yaufifi so yénetan fenjen wéikor, ménát yau so yéméindan efalo yátogh ár sái kuyangé yaufiyamot.
english: But be careful that by no means does this liberty of yours become a stumbling block to the weak.
For if a man sees you who have knowledge sitting in an idol ’ s temple , won’ t his conscience , if he is weak, be emboldened to eat things sacrificed to idols ?
And through your knowledge , he who is weak perishes, the brother for whose sake Christ died .
Thus , sinning against the brothers, and wounding their conscience when it is weak, you sin against Christ .
Therefore , if food causes my brother to stumble , I will eat no meat forever more , that I don’ t cause my brother to stumble .

nama: Yénd yuwek ár wém. Yénd Yesuene muyafé ár wém. Yéndon té yinjoyén Yesu téfene Yuré. A fém em tane ásáfogh mbwe Yurai. 2 Táf ámb árém yau njam kumyongi yénd ndené fété Yesuene muyafé ár, yénd mé fété wém féfeyot! Ménamén fém em tane fagharéghkaf em yénd wém Yesuene muyafé ár.
english: Am I not free ? Am I not an apostle? Haven’ t I seen Jesus Christ , our Lord ? Aren’ t you my work in the Lord ?
If to others I am not an apostle, yet at least I am to you ; for you are the seal of my apostleship in the Lord .

nama: Njam árém waruindat yénd, yéné siyém ndenáye yénd nawémarotan yéndio. 4 Tane mbarkánd yém njamke a nu nénet ménamén tane ásáfoghmén. 5 Yénd mbarkánd wém efalo yátogh amaf wasroghét yéndfé tane álighan, ndenanit ámb Yesuene muyafé ár, Yurane yánngnéf a Fité. 6 A Banabas a yénd wéi mbarkánd yénre yau ásáfoghét ghérsé ámnjoghmén. 7 Némé fiyaré násáfotat yéfenjo fai kémghét ásmégh mérén kénjún? Némé ndau téfnáram yau so enete géreif mbwe kétándmé yánjo géreif mbwe ménj ndauta? Némé sif wanjengégh árém etrone nono kétándmé yéfenjo sifta?
english: My defense to those who examine me is this :
Have we no right to eat and to drink ?
Have we no right to take along a wife who is a believer, even as the rest of the apostles, and the brothers of the Lord , and Cephas ?
Or have only Barnabas and I no right to not work ?
What soldier ever serves at his own expense ? Who plants a vineyard, and doesn’ t eat of its fruit ? Or who feeds a flock , and doesn’ t drink from the flock ’s milk ?

nama: Yénd yau norayan ár mwighata yéné méinyotio efogh wafrogh yammén, ménamén nákam noraye ndené yam ménáyo. 9 Yéndfem yaftam Mosesene nák kénjún ndené, "Yau yumbeta kau sénféneyan njam etumnda flawé mbwe." Némé Ngánján mwighé yém kaumén? 10 Efalo fá noraye yénémamén téfefaf. Fété yéné yéfarotaménd téfeyot ménamén emo njam yétana a emo njam eita so yéfenjo ásáfogh yafrotat yéné mwighayan nde yéndfem so ámb tawanangém yéné njamke. 11 Yéndfem té eitamém mbérmbére mbwe féfefafmé. Némé mindefifi táf yéndfem tatanam fifie rokar féfe tambén? 12 Táf ámb árfene té ewam mbarkánd wamaroghét kétándmé féfe tambén, téfene mbarkánd siyém minde ndimbalfifi. Wénde yéndfem yau yaman yékmangém yéné mbarkánd. Wénde yéndfem yumyoyém méinyotio ménát yénd yau so nétér yéném Kerisoene mer sifaf.
english: Do I speak these things according to the ways of men ? Or doesn’ t the law also say the same thing ?
For it is written in the law of Moses , “ You shall not muzzle an ox while it treads out the grain.” Is it for the oxen that God cares ,
or does he say it assuredly for our sake ? Yes , it was written for our sake , because he who plows ought to plow in hope , and he who threshes in hope should partake of his hope .
If we sowed to you spiritual things , is it a great thing if we reap your fleshly things ?
If others partake of this right over you , don’ t we yet more ? Nevertheless we didn’ t use this right , but we bear all things , that we may cause no hindrance to the Good News of Christ .

nama: Fém mat em ndené yéné ár efe násáfotat wáwefnogh méngon so ersat njamke kétándmé yéné wáwefnogh méngota a fá emofem erametat ghéngén kitarayan némé yémofem ersat ghéngén kétándio. 14 Ndené endeyo, Yuram té yénémndayéng ndené fá emofem mer si yaitotat yémofem so tawanangi yéfenjo ghérsé ámnjoghét kétándmé mer sita.
english: Don’ t you know that those who serve around sacred things eat from the things of the temple , and those who wait on the altar have their portion with the altar ?
Even so the Lord ordained that those who proclaim the Good News should live from the Good News .

nama: Wénde yénd yau tane mbarkándan kásáfotan. A yéndon yéné yau yéfarotan sénonjo ménát ewatnan tanjo mbarkánd tandio. Yénd so kér wém fronde! Árké árom yau so tengongé tane mbarkánd fifiofnarot. 16 Njam yéndon yaitotan mer si, yénd féyotarofnar awarmboghét wém, ménamén yénd naneghan si waitoghét. Nderé mámáfi yém tayot njam yéndon yau yaitotan mer si! 17 Njam yéndon mé tafrotan tanjo méndeye, féyo yénd kéma kawanjetan faiot, wénde yéndon tafrotan yéné ásáfogh ménamén Ngánjánam té yumyoi yéné ásáfogh tafaf. 18 Némé fai so yéndon tanan? Mé yénaro yém: Mer si yafroghro yénd so karaman faiofnaye, a yau so tafrotangén tane mbarkánd ndené fété mer si waitogh ár.
english: But I have used none of these things , and I don’ t write these things that it may be done so in my case ; for I would rather die, than that anyone should make my boasting void .
For if I preach the Good News , I have nothing to boast about , for necessity is laid on me ; but woe is to me if I don’t preach the Good News .
For if I do this of my own will , I have a reward . But if not of my own will , I have a stewardship entrusted to me .
What then is my reward ? That when I preach the Good News , I may present the Good News of Christ without charge , so as not to abuse my authority in the Good News .

nama: Yénd wém yuwek ár, árké ároene yau, wénde yénd náyátotan yéndio méinyotio árfene faiofnar ásáfogh ár ménát tárfáram so efalo tiyátongi mer si. 20 Njamandio yénd násáfotan Ju árfé, yénd ndenanit so wémor Ju árnit ménát yémofem so efalo tiyátongi mer si, ndemamén yénd yéndio yau so Mosesene nák mbanmbanan wém. Yénd ndené fété so wémor ndernáye yénd wém, njam yénd násáfotam yémafé ménát yémofem efalo so tiyátongi mer si. 21 Ndené ende, njam Téndo árfé yénd yanmor ndenanit Téndo ár kés em, Ju árfene nák téndota, ménát yémofem efalo so tiyátongi mer si. Yéné yau ndené yém ndené yéndon yau Ngánjánene nák náyáretan, yénd efalofifi swém Kerisoene nák mbanmbanan wém. 22 Muyafnar árét yénd kénáyáton muyafnar ménát muyáfnar ár sái ersan. Yénd méinyotio yamamé wafnyé ménát ámb ár wanjarghét Kerisoene sie.
english: For though I was free from all , I brought myself under bondage to all , that I might gain the more .
To the Jews I became as a Jew , that I might gain Jews ; to those who are under the law , as under the law , that I might gain those who are under the law ;
to those who are without law , as without law ( not being without law toward God , but under law toward Christ ), that I might win those who are without law .
To the weak I became as weak, that I might gain the weak. I have become all things to all men , that I may by all means save some .

nama: Méinyotio yéné ásáfogh yéndon sewaufrotan siyém mer si téfnan, ménát yéndon so yéné frengégh tawanan. 24 Fém mat em ndené kembneyan tárfár wérse téfnáram sifayé ersat wérset, wénde ámbiro áromro so tanangé yánjo fai tombemén. Ersati ménat sái tanangi fai. 25 Méinyotio kembne téfnár osaréghan so keworngé yuwot sotafé watameghét. Yémofem yéné yafrotati ménát so tanangi ákiki árkéméné yau so nakete, wénde yéndfem yafrotam ménát so tanangém ákiki árkéméné so nakete tuot. 26 Yénémamén yénd nérsan mbarkánde kétán wifogh fufaf. Yéné téfnan yénd wém faisé ásmégh árnit emon yau ewanete yánjo utarégh ásmégh muyé. 27 Yéndon tanjo fifi táikér yiyátotan tékráte ménát so méinyotio yém awamaroghan, yéndio ménát yau so kolangén kembnet.
english: Now I do this for the sake of the Good News , that I may be a joint partaker of it .
Don’ t you know that those who run in a race all run , but one receives the prize ? Run like that , so that you may win .
Every man who strives in the games exercises self-control in all things . Now they do it to receive a corruptible crown , but we an incorruptible.
I therefore run like that , not aimlessly. I fight like that , not beating the air,
but I beat my body and bring it into submission, lest by any means , after I have preached to others , I myself should be disqualified.

nama: Tane fútaréf, Yénd ménde wém mé kawafrotangi némé nufrotam téfene ákiafefaf emofem Moses táitotawét. Fá tamorwén méinyotio njafar kwamkwam warawerégh mbanmbanan, a méinyotio néférmayénd merro Férkat Arakaf kénjúmé. 2 Njafar kwamkwam kénjúmé a arakaf kénjúmé fá méinyotio ewalitotaménd ndené fété Mosesene waitogh árot. 3 Méinyotioyam enetaménd ámbiro sáfot mbérmbére féskaf flawé 4 a enetaménd ámbiro sáfot mbérmbére nu. Yémofem nu enetaménd kétándmé mbérmbére wímta árké tayotawéng yémafé, a yéné wím témorwén Keriso fáyo. 5 Wénde Ngánján témorwén yau kéuwetawéng tárfár árfefaf, yénémamén yéfene kérwén fifi wafaranéghe tamorwén fanfne yuwan.
english: Now I would not have you ignorant, brothers, that our fathers were all under the cloud , and all passed through the sea ;
and were all baptized into Moses in the cloud and in the sea ;
and all ate the same spiritual food ;
and all drank the same spiritual drink . For they drank of a spiritual rock that followed them , and the rock was Christ .
However with most of them , God was not well pleased , for they were overthrown in the wilderness .

nama: Méinyotio yéné siyém matyamot téfeyot ménát matot aya yau so mwighé ekwnam yaufiyam, ndené yémofem takwnawét, 7 yau so ewáwefnotati mewangat, ndené ámb ár kés kufrotat, méné Buk si noraye, "Ár námnjoyénd témndot wéri nu nénet a nokayoyénd wagh ermangét a walot." 8 Yéndfem yau so yaufi wal yafrotam ndené ámb árém kés tafrotawét, a ámbiro efogh kénjún 23,ooo ár mérén kér emormén. 9 Yéndfem yau so yékmetam Yuré ufoghan, ndené fété ámb árém kés yafrotaménd, a fá tásmetau kambanam. 10 Yénd yau so nawatarnam, ndené ámb ár kés kufrotawét, a fá kér résagh árém esmetaméng.
english: Now these things were our examples , to the intent we should not lust after evil things as they also lusted .
Don’ t be idolaters , as some of them were . As it is written , “ The people sat down to eat and drink , and rose up to play .”
Let ’s not commit sexual immorality , as some of them committed , and in one day twenty-three thousand fell .
Let ’ s not test Christ , as some of them tested , and perished by the serpents .
Don’ t grumble , as some of them also grumbled , and perished by the destroyer .

nama: Méinyotio yéné yam kufrotawét yéfefaf ndené matyamot téfeyot, a yéfarotaménd matot téfeyot efe yénmor yéné efoghon mbandoene yatogh wifoghétro yam.
english: Now all these things happened to them by way of example , and they were written for our admonition , on whom the ends of the ages have come .

nama: Njam fém nemnati ndené fém taikrataye ewakayong mer em fém so nawarawene ndené fém yau so kuyangi. 13 Méinyotio ufogh fémofem kés efángotati fá ndené fété eném túmén árfefaf. Wénde Ngánján yakai yánjo unyéghofnar sian yém, a yémon yau so kémumyongé fém ufoghét árké ewainde féfene muyé. Wénde njam ufogh yéném féfeyot, Ngánjánam so muyé tawaramangé féfe awamaroghét.
english: Therefore let him who thinks he stands be careful that he doesn’ t fall .

No temptation has taken you except what is common to man . God is faithful , who will not allow you to be tempted above what you are able , but will with the temptation also make the way of escape , that you may be able to endure it .

nama: Tane tikfafé fútaréf, mewang wáwefnoghta kékmbongi. 15 Fém mwighafé ár em, féyo Yénd norayan féfefaf yéné. Fém fété so wafénmanetati féfembia némé si yénd norayan. 16 Yéné frengégh kafusi yéndfem árkémamén kánjo yarametam Ngánjáne, yéndfem té yéfalotam Kerisoene férék kénjún. A yéné féskaf flawé yéndfem yatfotam, yéndfem yéfalotam Kerisoene fifi njam yéndfem yénetam. 17 Ménamén kété siyém mé ámbiro flawé kofékofé yénd méinyotio sieném mé ámbiro fifi yéném, ndemamén tárfár yéném, ménamén yéndfem yéfalotam yéné kofékofayo.
english: Therefore , my beloved, flee from idolatry .
I speak as to wise men . Judge what I say .
The cup of blessing which we bless , isn’ t it a sharing of the blood of Christ ? The bread which we break , isn’ t it a sharing of the body of Christ ?
Because there is one loaf of bread, we , who are many , are one body ; for we all partake of the one loaf of bread.

nama: Mé kemnangi Israil árfenemén. Emofem enetat némé erametat ghéngénot kafghangi ghéngén kitaré ásáfoghan Ngánjáne. 19 Yéndon némé norayan siyém ndené némé yém mewang o njamke ramégh kétán mewangfaf? 20 Yau némndafi! Némé yénd norayan féfefaf siyém ndené némé efayotat ngánjánofnar árfene ghéngén kitareyan erametat yaufi mbérmbrafefaf, yau Ngánjáne. A yénd méndefnar wém fém sái em awarnyégh ár yaufi mbérmbérafé. 21 Fém féyotarofnar em nu nénet kétándmé Yurane kafusita a ndenáyo kétándmé yaufi mbérmbérafeta; fém féyotarofnar em njamke nénet Yurane kitarayan a ndenáyo yaufi mbérmbérafene kitarayan. 22 O yéndfem yafngongém Yuré waramnjaghét? Yénd ndené nemnam ndené téfene muyé yam kar yáinde yáne muyé?
english: Consider Israel according to the flesh . Don’ t those who eat the sacrifices participate in the altar ?
What am I saying then ? That a thing sacrificed to idols is anything , or that an idol is anything ?
But I say that the things which the Gentiles sacrifice , they sacrifice to demons and not to God , and I don’ t desire that you would have fellowship with demons .
You can ’t both drink the cup of the Lord and the cup of demons . You can ’t both partake of the table of the Lord and of the table of demons .
Or do we provoke the Lord to jealousy ? Are we stronger than he ?

nama: Féyo fá ndené norayat."Yénd féyotaro yéném méinyotio yam wafroghét, " Yéné siyém efalo yém, wénde yau méinyotio yam em wáutáréghafé. 24 Efe yau so náronje yéfenjo merot, wénde náronja ámb árfene merot.
english: “ All things are lawful for me ,” but not all things are profitable . “ All things are lawful for me ,” but not all things build up .
Let no one seek his own , but each one his neighbor ’s good .

nama: Fém sem yuwek em némndafi téu enetati wérár fenjen maket téraréghmén, yau némndafimén namotati, ménamén féfenjo mwighé. 26 Buk si noraye ndené, "Yéné mband marat a méinyotio rokar yéné kénjún sem mé Yuranero em."
english: Whatever is sold in the butcher shop, eat , asking no question for the sake of conscience ,
for “ the earth is the Lord ’ s , and its fullness .”

nama: Táf ámb efalo yátoghofnar árom fém sái tanwarawangi séite nénet a fém kemnangi álighét, enetati némé féfene sáfrére sái em, yau táf kamotangi némndafimén ménamén féfenjo emarégh so yarawenati. 28 Wénde táf ámb árom njam kémaufrongé féfe ndené, "Yéné njamke yém mewangafefaf wateghmén, " féyo yau táf némé njamke enetati, ménamén ároene téfnanro emon fe némaufro a yáne emarégh téfnan- 29 yéné siyém, yau féfene emarégh yém, wénde ámb ároene emarégh.
english: But if one of those who don’ t believe invites you to a meal, and you are inclined to go , eat whatever is set before you , asking no questions for the sake of conscience .

But if anyone says to you , “ This was offered to idols ,” don’ t eat it for the sake of the one who told you , and for the sake of conscience . For “ the earth is the Lord ’s, with all its fullness.”
Conscience , I say , not your own , but the other ’s conscience . For why is my liberty judged by another conscience ?

nama: Táf yéndon kánjo yarametan Ngánjáne ménamén tane njamkemén, némamén wét ámb árém waruindat yénd ménamén njamkemén árkémamén yéndon kánjo yarametan?
english: If I partake with thankfulness , why am I denounced for something I give thanks for ?

nama: Merfifi, fémofem némé njam yafrotati, njamke yenetati o nu yenetati, yafrotati ménát yuyoghét Ngánjáne yétkwén. 32 Yau yéméinda ámb ár wuyéghét, téu em Ju ár, Téndo ár o Ngánjánene Yesuene mérén. 33 Yéndon yéné mwighé yaitotan mato méinyotio ár áuwéghét eméindan méinyotio yaman. Yéndon sewafrotan, yau nemnan tanjo mermén wénde méinyotio árfene merot, ménát fá so ghérsé kewortongi.
english: Whether therefore you eat or drink , or whatever you do , do all to the glory of God .
Give no occasion for stumbling, whether to Jews , to Greeks , or to the assembly of God ;
even as I also please all men in all things , not seeking my own profit , but the profit of the many , that they may be saved .

nama: Wufénmametati tafaf ndené fété yénd nufénmetan Kerisoefaf. Wafarégh sénko wáwefnogh kénjún
english: Be imitators of me , even as I also am of Christ .

nama: Yénd náuwetan féfefaf ménamén fémofem túmén yénd wamarotati a ewaitotati tane watamegh si árkéméné efermayén féfefaf. 3 Wénde yénd ménde wém fém sái mat em ndené Keriso siyém fronde sénko yém méinyotio ár ghakrafefaf, amafoe yánjar siyém sénko yém yaténoefafá, a Ngánján siyém sénko yém Kerisoefaf. 4 Féyo njam ár ghakér Ngánjánafé oraighan yém o Ngánjánene si waitoghan yém maratan wáwefnogh kénjún sénko wafaréghafé yéné yame wáiwáiyot yékmete Keriso. 5 A árké amaf efe Ngánjánafé oraighan yém o Ngánjánene si yaitote marat wáwefnogh sifayan sénko wafaréghofnaye wáiwáiot yékmete yánjar. Kété siyém yau ámb fénatayo yém fá a amaf endene sénko séf té yétértaménd. 6 Táf amafom njam yau tafarngé yánjo sénko, mer yém yémon yánjo séf tanfangé, a táfyo wáiwáiafé yam yém amafoe yánjo sénko weranégh o séf térégh, yémon so tafarngé yánjo sénko. 7 Ár ghakrom yau so tafarngé yánjo sénko, ménamén fá yém mbanmban a ndimbal kwayaghé Ngánjánene. Wénde amaf yém ár ghakroene ndimbal kwayaghé. 8 Ménamén ár ghakér yau yafrotam kétándmé amafoeta, wénde amaf yafrotam kétándmé ár ghakroeta. 9 Yau ár ghakér yafrotam amafoe téfnan, wénde amaf yafrotam ár ghakroe téfnan. 10 Mé njafar si résagh árfene téfnanro, féyo, amafoene sénko so fété wafaréghkaf yém ménát yuyafote ndené fá siyém si wafté mbanmban yém. 11 Wénde Yurane árfene kénjún, amaf yau yambia yém ár ghakérta, o ár ghakér yau ár ghakér yambia yém amafoeta. 12 Ménamén amaf yafrotam kétándmé ár ghakéroeta, ndené endeyo ár ghakér siyém náráfte amafoeta, wénde méinyotio rokar eném Ngánjáneta.
english: Now I praise you , brothers, that you remember me in all things , and hold firm the traditions , even as I delivered them to you .
But I would have you know that the head of every man is Christ , and the head of the woman is man , and the head of Christ is God .
Every man praying or prophesying , having his head covered , dishonors his head .
But every woman praying or prophesying with her head uncovered dishonors her head . For it is one and the same thing as if she were shaved .
For if a woman is not covered , let her hair also be cut off . But if it is shameful for a woman to have her hair cut off or be shaved , let her be covered .
For a man indeed ought not to have his head covered , because he is the image and glory of God , but the woman is the glory of the man .
For man is not from woman , but woman from man ;
for man wasn’ t created for the woman , but woman for the man .
For this cause the woman ought to have authority over her own head , because of the angels.
Nevertheless , neither is the woman independent of the man, nor the man independent of the woman , in the Lord .
For as woman came from man , so a man also comes through a woman ; but all things are from God .

nama: Yafénmetati yéné yam féfendio ndené mer nérete amafoe sái noraya Ngánjánefaf maratan wáwefnogh kénjún táf némndafi yau njam yéfai yáne sénkoyan. 14 Némamén Ngánjánene wafroghyamam ematamete fém ndené tombé séf ár ghakroefaf sem wáiwáiafé yém, 15 wénde njam amaf tombé séfafé me, yéné siyém yáne merro yém yáne sénkoyan. Njam Ngánjánam ewaramete tombé séf yáfaf, yémon yaramete ménát yáné sénko wafaréghmén. 16 Wénde efe njam éwighét kufngongé yénémamén, téfene ámb wafroghyam yau yém a Ngánjánene Yesuene mérnoene yau yém. Yurane njamke
english: Judge for yourselves . Is it appropriate that a woman pray to God unveiled?
Doesn’ t even nature itself teach you that if a man has long hair , it is a dishonor to him ?
But if a woman has long hair , it is a glory to her , for her hair is given to her for a covering .
But if any man seems to be contentious , we have no such custom , neither do God ’ s assemblies .

nama: Yénamayo watamegh sian, yéndon yau náuwétan féfefaf, ménamén féfene áumengégham wáwefnoghét yafrote minde tékrat, wénde yau mer yafrote. 18 Fronde sifayan, yénd náyáretan ndené njam fém naumendat ndené fété Yesuene mérén, kété afalogh em féfe kénjúnro, a yéné yéndon efalo yiyátotan ámb mé ewam. 19 Yau mwighé déudéu em yéné séno afalogh féfe kénjún yém ménát fá efe mbarkandan yém so safénro kawinjongi. 20 Njam fém nafángotati mérne, yéné siyém yau Yurane njamke yenetati. 21 Ndené njamke nénean, fém ámbiroámbirom fété so féfenjo njamke enetati, féyo ámb ár siogh em táfandio ámb wériafé em. 22 Féfene méngo yau té ewam njamke nénet a nu nénet? O fém ménde em wáiwáiafé Ngánjánene Yesuene mérén yiyátote a fá efe áronjaghan em? Némé so yénd korayangén féfefaf? Yéndon so áuwétan fém? Yéndon yaufifi!
english: But in giving you this command I don’ t praise you , because you come together not for the better but for the worse .
For first of all , when you come together in the assembly , I hear that divisions exist among you , and I partly believe it .
For there also must be factions among you , that those who are approved may be revealed among you .
When therefore you assemble yourselves together , it is not the Lord ’s supper that you eat .
For in your eating each one takes his own supper first . One is hungry , and another is drunken .

What , don’ t you have houses to eat and to drink in ? Or do you despise God ’ s assembly and put them to shame who don’ t have enough? What shall I tell you ? Shall I praise you ? In this I don’ t praise you .

nama: Yéndon yanayén Yurata yéné watamegh yéndon árké yafnamoyén féfefaf. Yuré Yesu, sémbáran fá sén yérametaménd, ewanai féskaf flawé ndimbul, 24 a kánjo si yaramai Ngánjáne, yétfoi, norayai, "Yéné siyém tane fifi, árké yém féfeyot. Yafrotati awafaroghét tanemén." 25 Ndené endeyo, séite njamke néne soramé yémon kafusi yerai a emndai, "Yéné kafusi siyém Ngánjánene totér árnyégh fémofé, yetetai tane férke. Njam fémofem yéné nu yenetati, wafarotati yénd."
english: For I received from the Lord that which also I delivered to you , that the Lord Jesus on the night in which he was betrayed took bread.
When he had given thanks , he broke it and said , “ Take , eat. This is my body , which is broken for you . Do this in memory of me .”
In the same way he also took the cup after supper , saying , “ This cup is the new covenant in my blood. Do this , as often as you drink , in memory of me .”

nama: Njam fémofem yenetati yéné féskaf flawé a nu yenetati yéné kafusita, fémofem yaitotati Yurane kérmén kétánotio fá nénangota. 27 Féyo táf árké árém Yurane féskaf flawé o nu yenetat yéné kafusian yéné ende yau utémndat fá, fém yaufi yafrote Yurane fififaf a férékfaf. 28 Féyo mer yém fém so néwasufetati fémyo fronde, féyo soramé féskaf flawé a nu enetati kétándmé yéné kafusita. 29 Fá emofem enetat féskaf flawé a nu Yurane fifi awasufoghofnaye enérsat mogh yéfendio. 30 Ndené téfnan tárfár fém em enjne a njangénnjangén, a tárfár ár kér té emormén. 31 Wénde njam yéndio fronde nawasufetam merkéráye, yénd yau so Ngánjánene mogh mbanmbandan yéném. 32 Wénde yénd yénmote téfél yénramete Yuram, ménát ndené yénd yau so ténkmangé tékrat mérne yémafé mband árfé.
english: For as often as you eat this bread and drink this cup , you proclaim the Lord ’ s death until he comes .
Therefore whoever eats this bread or drinks the Lord ’ s cup in a way unworthy of the Lord will be guilty of the body and the blood of the Lord .
But let a man examine himself , and so let him eat of the bread and drink of the cup .
For he who eats and drinks in an unworthy way eats and drinks judgment to himself if he doesn’ t discern the Lord ’s body .
For this cause many among you are weak and sickly, and not a few sleep .
For if we discerned ourselves , we wouldn’t be judged .
But when we are judged , we are disciplined by the Lord , that we may not be condemned with the world .

nama: Féyo, tane fútaréf, njam kufngongi mérne áumengéghét Yurane njamke nénet, fronde nawanjenati ámbiroámbiro árot. 34 Táf ámb ár siogh njam yém, fronde yémon so enete njamke méngon, ménát ndené fém yau so Ngánjánene mogh mbanmbanan em njam fém nafángotati mérne. Ndené ámb yammén, yéndon so téngfrendangén táf yénd njam kénaflen.
english: Therefore , my brothers, when you come together to eat , wait for one another .
But if anyone is hungry , let him eat at home , lest your coming together be for judgment . The rest I will set in order whenever I come .

nama: Tane fútaréf, sénonjo mwighé ménamén fokmén Ngánján Mbérmbéroeta.
english: Now concerning spiritual things , brothers, I don’ t want you to be ignorant.

nama: Fém mat em ndené njam fém mé tamorwén Téndo ár, fém talimndawét a tawarsotawét ghérsafnar mewangot. 3 Yénd ménde wém fém so mat kamndangi ndené ámbiro efe yau Ngánján Mbérmbéram yélimnde so korayangé "Afalngogh yém Yesuefaf!" a ámb yau so marataye korayangé ndené "Yesu siyém Yuré, " táfandro Ngánján Mbérmbéram yau njam nélimnda.
english: You know that when you were heathen , you were led away to those mute idols , however you might be led.
Therefore I make known to you that no man speaking by God ’ s Spirit says , “ Jesus is accursed.” No one can say , “ Jesus is Lord ,” but by the Holy Spirit .

nama: Kété em fénaté sáfot mbérmbére fok, wénde ndenéyameyo Ngánján Mbérmbéram ewaramete. 5 Kété em fénaté ásáfogh, wénde ndenéyameyo Yurai násáfote. 6 Kété em fénaté ásáfogh wafroghét, wénde ndenéyameyo Ngánjánam ewaramete fok méinyotio árfefaf, ménát yéfenjo ásáfoghét. 7 Ngánján Mbérmbéroene wafté nauyafote ámbiroámbiro árfaf fénaté ende méinyotio árfene merot. 8 Ngánján Mbérmbéram yaramete ámbiro ároe káfeté mwighé afoghkaf si, njamandio ámb ároe yéné Ngánján Mbérmbéram yaramet matyam afoghkaf si. 9 Ámb ároe yéné Ngánján Mbérmbéram yaramete ndimbal mwighé, ndenéyameyo ámb ároe yémon yaramete wafté mer yátoghét. 10 Ngánján Mbérmbéram ámb ároe yaramete wafté sélngwélafé yam wafroghét, ámb ároe yaramete fok Ngánjánene si wafroghmén, a wéi ámb árét, yéné fok ménát mat sái yém fénaté sáfot mbérmbér. Ámbiro ároe yaramete fok ménát fénaté sáfot kanké si orayéghét a ámb ároe fok yaramete ménát némé noraye kankaye yéné si waferghét. 11 Wénde yéné siyém ámbiro a yéné Ngánján Mbérmbéryo emo yéné méinyotio yafrote ásáfogh ndené fété fá nemne, yémon ewaramete fénaté fok ámbiroámbiro árét. Ámbiro fifi tárfár fifi kafeyafé
english: Now there are various kinds of gifts , but the same Spirit .
There are various kinds of service , and the same Lord .
There are various kinds of workings, but the same God who works all things in all .
But to each one is given the manifestation of the Spirit for the profit of all .
For to one is given through the Spirit the word of wisdom , and to another the word of knowledge according to the same Spirit ,
to another faith by the same Spirit , and to another gifts of healings by the same Spirit ,
and to another workings of miracles , and to another prophecy , and to another discerning of spirits , to another different kinds of languages , and to another the interpretation of languages .
But the one and the same Spirit produces all of these , distributing to each one separately as he desires .

nama: Keriso siyém ndenanit ámbiro fifi, árké yém tárfár kafeyafé, wénde mé yém ámbiro fifi, ndemamén yafrote fénataye kafeyam. 13 Ndené endeyo, méinyotio yénd, Ju ár o Téndo ár, faiofnar ásáfogh ár a yuwek ár, té yénmalitotam ámbiro fifi kénjút yéné Ngánján Mbérmbére, a yénd méinyotio té yénramayéng yéné ámbiro Ngánján Mbérmbére nu nénet.
english: For as the body is one and has many members , and all the members of the body , being many , are one body ; so also is Christ .
For in one Spirit we were all baptized into one body , whether Jews or Greeks , whether bond or free ; and were all given to drink into one Spirit .

nama: Fifi fáyo siyém yau yafrote mé ámbiro fifi kafeyam, wénde tárfár fifi kafeyam. 15 Njam kafkaf korayangé, "Ménamén yénd yau ngángé wém, yénd yau wafnyang fifiyan, " yéné yam yau yékmbote kafkaf sái yém fifi kafe. 16 A njam téngan korayangé, "Ménamén yénd yau wém ghékéf, yénd yau wafnyang fifiyan, " yéné yam yau yékmbote téngan sái yém fifi kafe. 17 Njam méinyo fifi yém mé ghékéfro, ndernáye so náyárete? A njam mé ténganro yém, ndernáye so nomnde? 18 Ndené fété Ngánjánam ekmetam fénaté kafe fifiyan yánjo méndeyan. 19 Njam méinyotio mé ámbiro fifi kafe yém, ánde yém fifi? 20 Ndené fété kété em tárfár kafe wénde ámbiro fifi.
english: For the body is not one member , but many .
If the foot would say , “ Because I ’m not the hand , I ’m not part of the body ,” it is not therefore not part of the body .
If the ear would say , “ Because I ’m not the eye , I ’m not part of the body ,” it ’s not therefore not part of the body .
If the whole body were an eye , where would the hearing be ? If the whole were hearing, where would the smelling be ?
But now God has set the members , each one of them , in the body , just as he desired .
If they were all one member , where would the body be ?
But now they are many members , but one body .

nama: Féyo, ghékfam yau so korayangé ngángéfaf ndené, "Yénd méndefnar wém fém!" Yau sénko so korayangé kafkaffaf, "Mer, yénd méndefnar wém fém!" 22 Atéraréghe, yéndfem yau so némé ewafrotam yéné fifi kafeyofnaye árkéméné em njangénnjangénnit, 23 a yéné fifi kafemén ndené yénd nemnam ndené yau mer em wénde yéndfem árkéméné ewarawenam ndimbal kéráye, yéné fifi kafe árkéméné yau mer néretat fénaté utmanégh, 24 ndené warawerégh yau yém minde mer fifi kafeyat. Ngánjánam té fifi efghai yéné ende ndené sái ewarameta ndimbal utmanégh yéné fifiyat árkéméné fifiofnar néretat. 25 Féyo kété siyém yau falogh yém fifiyan, wénde méinyotio fénataye fifi kafe ámbiroámbiroe ndenáyo mwighafé nafandat. 26 Njam ámbiro fifi kafe kawambangé, méinyotio ámb fifi kafe wéi kawambangi. Njam ámb fifi kafe náuwéta, méinyotio ámb fifi kafe áuwéghan em yémafé.
english: The eye can ’ t tell the hand , “ I have no need for you ,” or again the head to the feet , “ I have no need for you .”
No , much rather , those members of the body which seem to be weaker are necessary.
Those parts of the body which we think to be less honorable , on those we bestow more abundant honor ; and our unpresentable parts have more abundant modesty,
while our presentable parts have no such need . But God composed the body together , giving more abundant honor to the inferior part ,
that there should be no division in the body , but that the members should have the same care for one another .
When one member suffers , all the members suffer with it . When one member is honored , all the members rejoice with it .

nama: Fém méinyotio sem Kerisoene fifi, a fém ámbiroámbiro sném fifi kafe ném. 28 Yesuene mérén kénjún Ngánjánam té ekmetaméng méinyotio yéfenjo sifayan: fronde sifayan Yesuene muyafé ár, yénamayo sifayan Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár, a nambiomén sifayan watamegh ár, féyo fá emofem sélngwélafé ásáfogh ewafrotat, wafté mer yátoghét enjneta, o ámb ár wáutárghét, o ámb wambghét o ámb orayéghét fénatayo kanké sie. 29 Yénd ményotio yau em Yesuene muyafé ár, o Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár, o watamegh ár. Yau méinyotio árém so sélngwélafé yam ewafrotat, 30 o ménát enjneta mer yátoghét, o ménát sái norayat kanké si, o ménát sái yéfenat némé noraye. 31 Tikfe tékwnat minde tukén fok. Yéndon so kénmauyafon fá minde mer end.
english: Now you are the body of Christ , and members individually .
God has set some in the assembly : first apostles, second prophets , third teachers , then miracle workers, then gifts of healings , helps, governments , and various kinds of languages .
Are all apostles? Are all prophets ? Are all teachers ? Are all miracle workers?
Do all have gifts of healings ? Do all speak with various languages ? Do all interpret ?
But earnestly desire the best gifts . Moreover , I show a most excellent way to you .

nama: Njam yénd féyotaro wém so norayan árfene a njafar si résagh árfene sie, wénde tané uwégh yau, tane orayégh siyém mé sotro ndenanit sin kwar nau yaraunete ke kér ro o bel nau yaraunete. 2 Njam yénd wém yéné fokafé sái nafrotan Ngánjáne tambén si a yénd so méinyotio matyamafé a mwighé kwayaghé efandan méinyotio kwankwane yam, a yénd njam so ndimbal mwighafé mband tunakéf witérmboghét, wénde njam yénd uwéghofnar wém, yénd swém fifiofnar. 3 Njam yénd so ewaramayén méinyotio tanemén yauyau árét a tane fifi téraman fésén wakrarghét, wénde táf yénd wém uwéghofnar, yénd swém fifiofnar.
english: If I speak with the languages of men and of angels, but don’ t have love, I have become sounding brass or a clanging cymbal .
If I have the gift of prophecy , and know all mysteries and all knowledge , and if I have all faith , so as to remove mountains , but don’ t have love, I am nothing .
If I give away all my goods to feed the poor, and if I give my body to be burned , but don’ t have love, it profits me nothing .

nama: Uwégh siyém métar, uwégh siyém mer. Uwégh siyém yau waramnjagh, tuktuk yam, awarmbogh yam. 5 Uwégh siyém wafareréghofnar yam, o awamanjarégh{g{ ...f* {g{13.5 awamanjarégh check it again , o nékwofnar wékeye, uwéghan siyém ámb wafarsogh yam yau yém.{h{ ...f* {h{13.5 uwéghan siyém ámb wafarsogh yam yau yém what is meaning?
english: Love is patient and is kind . Love doesn’ t envy . Love doesn’ t brag , is not proud ,
doesn’ t behave itself inappropriately, doesn’ t seek its own way, is not provoked , takes no account of evil ;

nama: Uwégh siyém yau náuwéte yaufiyaman wénde náuwéte efalo yaman. 7 Uwégh túmén warawerégh yém, túmén ndimbal mwighé yém, túmén méghmégh yém, a túmén métar.
english: doesn’ t rejoice in unrighteousness, but rejoices with the truth;
bears all things , believes all things , hopes all things , and endures all things .

nama: Uwégh yaufifi kuyangé. wénde kété em Ngánjáne si afroghmén, wénde fá so kékmbongi, a kété em kanké si, fá so kolindangi, a kété em matyam, yéné so kawaindangi. 9 Yénd mat yéném ámbro a yéndfem norayam ámb Ngánjáne tambén siro, 10 wénde njam kénwanongé féwénféwénofnar wafté, némé yém féwénféwénafé so kolindangé.
english: Love never fails . But where there are prophecies , they will be done away with . Where there are various languages , they will cease . Where there is knowledge , it will be done away with .
For we know in part and we prophesy in part ;
but when that which is complete has come , then that which is partial will be done away with .

nama: Njam yénd kwémorwén tosé, tane orayégh, tane emarégh ndenanit tosanit, a mwighé méinyotio tamorwén tosétosanitro. Wénde yénd njam namndayéng ár sotafé, yéndon ekmayén tosétosafene yam wafrogh tane sémta. 12 Sénonjo yéndfem yéfandam ndenanit mbanmban glasan, ámb káye sáfenro so kawafotangém. Némé yénd mat wém siyém mbarmbar, féyo yénd so méinyo mat wém, ndené fété Ngánján mat yém tanemén mbarkánde.
english: When I was a child , I spoke as a child , I felt as a child , I thought as a child . Now that I have become a man, I have put away childish things .
For now we see in a mirror , dimly, but then face to face . Now I know in part , but then I will know fully , even as I was also fully known .

nama: Sénonjo yéné nambioro nafrangongi: ndimbal mwighé, méghmégh, a uwégh. Wénde minde ndimbalfifi siyém uwégh.
english: But now faith , hope , and love remain — these three . The greatest of these is love.

nama: Uwégh fiyém árkéméné fémofem so yafarenati tikfe Wénde fém wéi yafarenati ámb fok árké Ngánján Mbérmbéram ewaramai, fénatayero fok Ngánjáne si afroghmén. 2 Fá efe norayat kankaye yau norayat ámb árfefaf wénde kétán Ngánjánefaf, ménamén yau ámbiroámbirom mwighé kwayaghaye yau yérse. Fá norayat némé kwankwane efalo si em Ngánján Mbérmbéroene waftaye. 3 Wénde yémofem efe Ngánjáne si nafrotat, yáne si yéngém kétán árfefaf a ewarametat wáutárégh, wawéngsogh, a wamarogh. 4 Fá efe norayat kankaye nawáutánat mé fáro, wénde fá emofem Ngánjáne si nafrotat ewáutánat méinyo Yesuene mérén.
english: Follow after love and earnestly desire spiritual gifts, but especially that you may prophesy .
For he who speaks in another language speaks not to men , but to God , for no one understands, but in the Spirit he speaks mysteries .
But he who prophesies speaks to men for their edification , exhortation , and consolation .
He who speaks in another language edifies himself , but he who prophesies edifies the assembly .

nama: Yénd ménde wém ménát méinyotio fémofem so norayati kankaye si, wénde yénd minde nemnan nde féfefaf yéné fok yém Ngánjáne si wafroghmén. Yéné ár emo Ngánjáne si nafrote siyém minde waftafé, yau yéné ár emon noraye kankaye siyém némbne waftafé, táfandro kété njam ámb ár yau yém emon so si yéfene némé noraye, ménát wáutárégh méinyo Yesuene mérnot so yém. 6 Tane fútaréf, féyo njam yénd kénaflen féfefaf, némé mer yéndon so yafrotan féfefaf, táf yénd snorayan kankaye? Táfandro yéndon njam yau enwarsan Ngánjánam némé eufane tafaf o ámb matyam o ámb Ngánjáne si wafroghmén o ámb watamegh.
english: Now I desire to have you all speak with other languages , but even more that you would prophesy . For he is greater who prophesies than he who speaks with other languages , unless he interprets , that the assembly may be built up .
But now , brothers, if I come to you speaking with other languages , what would I profit you unless I speak to you either by way of revelation, or of knowledge , or of prophesying , or of teaching ?

nama: Mé kemnangi ghérsafnar rokarafene kém rérkemén árké ewaufetat ndené fété mburaré o sifrafér ke sem. Ndernáye ámb ár so mat káyátongé árké ke nambnat, táfandro njam wayangoghe nutnat? 8 Wéikor njam suféroene ke yau njam nutne merkéráye, efe so nafrende ménát mékot? 9 Ndené endeyo, ndernáye so ámb ár mat kamndangé némé fém noraye ménamén fene si afrogh kankaye yau safén? Fene si so kolindangi tukén! 10 Kété sem tárfár sitéfén yéné mband maratan, wénde ámbiro sitéfén yau fifiofnar yém. 11 Wénde njam yénd mafina wém yéné sitéfén árké norayat, fá efe yéné sitéfén norayat, fá so kamndangi dábi tayot, a yénd kamndan dábi yéfefaf. 12 Táf fene ndimbal ménde njam némé Ngánján Mbérmbéroene fokot, fém táf yafarenati minde tukén yéné fokot árké ménáyam so yanote Yesuene mérén.
english: Even lifeless things that make a sound , whether pipe or harp , if they didn’ t give a distinction in the sounds , how would it be known what is piped or harped ?
For if the trumpet gave an uncertain sound , who would prepare himself for war ?
So also you , unless you uttered by the tongue words easy to understand , how would it be known what is spoken ? For you would be speaking into the air.
There are , it may be , so many kinds of languages in the world , and none of them is without meaning.
If then I don’ t know the meaning of the language , I would be to him who speaks a foreigner, and he who speaks would be a foreigner to me .
So also you , since you are zealous for spiritual gifts, seek that you may abound to the building up of the assembly .

nama: Féyo yéné téfnan yéné ár efe noraye kankaye so fété ngánjánafé noraye ménát yémon so yéfene némé fá noraye. 14 Ménamén njam yénd Ngánjánafé norayan kankaye, tane mbérmbér Ngánjánafé noraye, wénde tane mwighé siyém mbweyofnar yém. 15 Féyo yéné téfnan némé yéndon so yafrotan? Yénd so Ngánjánafé norayan tane mbérmbére ndenéyameyo yénd wéi so norayan tane mwighé. Yéndon so eufanan wagh tané mbérmbére, ndenéyameyo yéndon wéi so eufanan wagh tane mwighaye. 16 Njam fémon yaramete kánjo Ngánjáne mbérmbérero, wét ndernáye so matyamofnar ár áumengéghan korayangé ndené "Efalo" fene kánjo ramégh Ngánjánefaf táf njam yau mat yém némé fém korayé mbérmbére. 17 Táf fene kánjo ramégh Ngánjánefaf minde merro yém, ámb árét yaufifi wáutárégh yém.
english: Therefore let him who speaks in another language pray that he may interpret .
For if I pray in another language , my spirit prays , but my understanding is unfruitful.
What should I do ? I will pray with the spirit , and I will pray with the understanding also . I will sing with the spirit , and I will sing with the understanding also .
Otherwise , if you bless with the spirit , how will he who fills the place of the unlearned say the “Amen” at your giving of thanks , seeing he doesn’ t know what you say ?
For you most certainly give thanks well , but the other person is not built up .

nama: Yéndon kánjo Ngánjáne yarametan némé yénd norayan kankaye yáinde fémofem méinyotio némé ewafrotati. 19 Wénde yéndon so tawaferén Yesuene mérén wáwefnoghan yénd norayan 5 si ménát eném so tanangi kwayaghaye ménát ámb ár watameghét, yau tárfár 10,000 si kanké sie árkéméné ámb árém yau yérsat kwayaghé.
english: I thank my God , I speak with other languages more than you all .
However, in the assembly I would rather speak five words with my understanding , that I might instruct others also , than ten thousand words in another language .

nama: Fém yau so em ndenanit ambumtértér féfene mwighayan. Aem ndenanit ambumtértér yaufimén, wénde. anoghkaf ár aem káfeté mwighamén. 21 Buk si noraye, "Yuré norayai, Ámb árfene kanké sie yénd so norayan tane árfefaf, Yénd so norayan dábi árfene mbírmbíre, wénde nde yémofem yénd yau so wiyáretat."
english: Brothers, don’ t be children in thoughts, yet in malice be babies, but in thoughts be mature .
In the law it is written , “ By men of strange languages and by the lips of strangers I will speak to this people . They won’ t even listen to me that way , says the Lord .”

nama: Féyo fok kankaye si orayégh siyém efalo yátoghét yém efalo yátoghofnar árfet, yau efalo yátogh árfet, fok Ngánjánene si wafroghmén siyém efalo yátoghét yém efalo yátogh árfet, yau efalo yátoghofnar árfet.
english: Therefore other languages are for a sign , not to those who believe , but to the unbelieving; but prophesying is for a sign , not to the unbelieving, but to those who believe .

nama: Yénémaménnde, táf Yesuene mérén méinyotio njam kafángongi a méinyotio ár kufngongi orayégh kankaye a ámb ár efe fokofnar em o ámb efalo yátoghofnar ár kénlawangi, fá so korayangi nde fém em onon. 24 Wénde táf méinyotio árém so Ngánjánene si so nafrotat njam ámb efalo yátoghofnar ár o fokofnar ár kénlawangi, fá so mé kawayamngongi yéfenjo yaufiyammén ménáyan némé fá sái náyáretat. 25 Njam fá náyáretat, yéfene kwankwane mwighé so kénakmangi safét, a yémofem so tarámnjongi a táwefnongi Ngánjáne, yéné siafé, "Efalo Ngánján siyém yéna yém féfe kénjún!" Wáwefnogh nák Yesuene mérén kénjún
english: If therefore the whole assembly is assembled together and all speak with other languages , and unlearned or unbelieving people come in , won’ t they say that you are crazy?
But if all prophesy , and someone unbelieving or unlearned comes in , he is reproved by all , and he is judged by all .
And thus the secrets of his heart are revealed . So he will fall down on his face and worship God , declaring that God is among you indeed .

nama: Tane fútaréf, yéné fiyém némé yéndon norayan. Njam fém nafángotati ménát wáwefnoghét, ámbiro ároene wagh so yém, ámb ároene watameghét, ámb ároene so yém uyafoghét kétándmé Ngánjáneta, ámb ároene so yém kanké simén, a mé so yém ámb ároene waferéghét némé sái noraya. Méinyotio yam so yém wáutárégh Yesuene mérnot. 27 Njam ámb ár kufngongé kankaye siot, sómbio o nambio ámbiroámbiroero so norayat, a ámb árom fété so yéfene yéné si. 28 Wénde njam yau kété yém emon so kanké si yéfene, féyo fá efe noraye kanké si fété mé kékmbongé Yesuene mérnan a noraya mé yéfefetio a Ngánjánefaf. 29 Taumiyénd sómbio o nambio Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár orayéghét, njamandio ámb árém ewafénmetat némé si fá norayat. 30 Wénde njam ámb ár kété yémor áumengégh sifayan si Ngánjánam taramangé yéné ámbiro efe noraye so kékmbongé. 31 Méinyotio fémofem Ngánjánene si so nafrotati, ámbiroámbiroero, ménát méinyotio ár mat so ewatametat a wáutáréghafé so yém yéfeyot. 32 Ngánjánene si wafroghmén árfene mbérmbér so yém Ngánjánene mat yátogh ároene limánégh mbanmbanan, 33 ménamén Ngánján yau ménde yém yénd sái yisramboghe yéném wénde afrengéghan a krufrátan.
english: What is it then , brothers? When you come together , each one of you has a psalm , has a teaching , has a revelation, has another language , or has an interpretation . Let all things be done to build each other up .
If any man speaks in another language , let there be two , or at the most three , and in turn ; and let one interpret .
But if there is no interpreter , let him keep silent in the assembly , and let him speak to himself and to God .
Let two or three of the prophets speak , and let the others discern .
But if a revelation is made to another sitting by , let the first keep silent .
For you all can prophesy one by one , that all may learn and all may be exhorted .
The spirits of the prophets are subject to the prophets ,
for God is not a God of confusion but of peace , as in all the assemblies of the saints.

nama: amaf métar so ekmbotat Yesuene mérén áumengégh kénjúmé. Fá yau eumyotat orayéghét, ndené fété Ju árfene nák snoraye, yémofem yau so ersat sifayé siot. 35 Táf fá njam ménde em ámoghét matot, yémofem so emotat yéfenjaréf kété méngon. Yéné siyém wáiwáiafé yém amafoe sái noraya Yesuene mérén áumengégh kénjún.
english: Let the wives be quiet in the assemblies , for it has not been permitted for them to be talking except in submission, as the law also says ,
if they desire to learn anything . “ Let them ask their own husbands at home , for it is shameful for a wife to be talking in the assembly .”

nama: O fém nemnati ndené Ngánjánene si yénmormén féfe tambén? O fémro fété em endefefafmé yénmormén? 37 Táf ámb ár njam nemna nde fá siyém Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár o Ngánján Mbérmbéroene fokafé, fá fété kawayamngongé ndené némé yéndon yafarotan féfefaf siyém Yurane si muyé. 38 Wénde njam fá yau ménde em sái yumyoi yéné si, Ngánjánam yau so eumyoi fá.
english: What !? Was it from you that the word of God went out ? Or did it come to you alone ?
If any man thinks himself to be a prophet or spiritual , let him recognize the things which I write to you , that they are the commandment of the Lord .
But if anyone is ignorant, let him be ignorant.

nama: Féyo, tane fútaréf, yafarenati Ngánjánene si wafroghét, wénde yau kékmbongi kanké orayégh. 40 Méinyotio yam miya ewafrotati merkéraye a mbarkándero.
english: Therefore , brothers, desire earnestly to prophesy , and don’ t forbid speaking with other languages .
Let all things be done decently and in order .

nama: Sénonjo, tane fútaréf, yénd ménde wém mwighat fém so ewangotan mer simén árké yéndon yaitotamén féfeyot, árké fémofem yáneyénd, a árké tukén féfene ndimbal mwighé a yiyang ndérndérafé. 2 Yéné fiyém mer si yéndon yaitotamén féfeyot. Fém nawanjaryénd mer sie njam fém mé naweretati taikrataye yéné sian-njam yéné yau em, féfene efalo yátogh so yém fifiofnar.
english: Now I declare to you , brothers, the Good News which I preached to you , which also you received , in which you also stand ,
by which also you are saved , if you hold firmly the word which I preached to you — unless you believed in vain .

nama: Yéndon yafnamotan féfefaf némé yéndon yumyoyén, árké yém minde ndimbal yam: ndené Keriso kér yémormén téfene yaufiyammén, ndené fété Buk si norayé. 4 Fá té yiyatotaménd a té nanoyéng ghérsat nambio efogh kénjún, ndené fété Buk si norayé. 5 Fá nufaryéng Fitafaf a kétán méinyotio 12 Yesuene muyafé árfefaf. 6 Yéné soramé, fá nufaryéng tárfár árfefaf ndené 500 efalo yátogh ár, tárfáryo ghérsé mé em, ndemamén ámb kér emormén. 7 Yéné soramé, fá nufaryéng Jemsefaf, a wéi yénamayo méinyotio Yesuene muyafé árfefaf.
english: For I delivered to you first of all that which I also received : that Christ died for our sins according to the Scriptures ,
that he was buried , that he was raised on the third day according to the Scriptures ,
and that he appeared to Cephas , then to the twelve .
Then he appeared to over five hundred brothers at once , most of whom remain until now , but some have also fallen asleep .
Then he appeared to James , then to all the apostles,

nama: Soraméfifi fá nufaryéng ndenáyo tafaf, ámbrérero yénd wém ndené fété ámb ár endene áráfégh yau mer yémormén. 9 Yénd némbne wém méinyotio Yesuene muyafé árfeta, a féyotarofnar wém sái wémotai Yesuene muyáfé ár, ménamén yéndon máméghéraye tésmetawén Ngánjánene Yesuene mérén. 10 Wénde Ngánjánene ngáráme yénd yénéf wém némé yénd wém, a ngárám yémon ta waramayéng yau témorwén fifiofnar. Wénde tane wafroghyamam ewainde ámb Yesuene muyafé árfene wafroghyam, wénde yénd yau násáfotan yéné ásáfogh yénd yéndio.
