Ngánjánam fáyo yéramete ngárám tafaf a wéramete yáne muyé a féyo yéndon násáfotan yéné ásáfogh. 11 Féyo kétándmé ta tambén o yéfe tambén yénmormén, yéné féyém némé yéndfem méinyotio yaitotam a yéné féyém némé fémofem efalo yiyátotati. Téfene anogh
english: and last of all , as to the child born at the wrong time , he appeared to me also .
For I am the least of the apostles, who is not worthy to be called an apostle, because I persecuted the assembly of God .
But by the grace of God I am what I am . His grace which was given to me was not futile , but I worked more than all of them ; yet not I , but the grace of God which was with me .
Whether then it is I or they , so we preach , and so you believed .

nama: Wénde njam ndené nafrotat ndené Keriso té nanoyéng kétándmé kérta, ndernáye wét fém ámb norayati ndené kér ár yau so nanotat ghérsat? 13 Táf efalo njam yém, yéné fifi ndené yém Yesu yau nanoyéng. 14 A njam yau Keriso kanongai kétándmé kérta, féyo téfene si waitogh fifiofnar yém a ndenéyameyo féfene ndimbal mwighé. 15 A yéné yém tukén ndené, yénd nauyafotam ndené nuindam Ngánjánenemén, ménamén yénd norayam ndené Ngánjánam yanoi Keriso kérta. Wénde njam yéné efalo témorwén ndené kér ár yau nanoyénd ghérsat, táf ndené yémon yau yanoi Keriso. 16 Njam yau kér ár nanotat kérta, féyo Keriso yau kanongai kérta. 17 Njam Keriso yau kanongai, féyo féfene ndimbal mwighé sof yém fifiofnar yém a fém wéi sem mé orsoghan féfenjo yaufiyan em. 18 A ár efe efalo yiyátotat Keriso a efe té kémégh nékakmetaménd ndenéyameyo orsoghan em. 19 Njam téfene méghmégh Keriso kénjún mer yém mé yéné ghérsatro, yéndfem so minde ghérghérsisé tawinjongém yémofem efe méinyotio mband maratan em.
english: Now if Christ is preached , that he has been raised from the dead , how do some among you say that there is no resurrection of the dead ?
But if there is no resurrection of the dead , neither has Christ been raised .
If Christ has not been raised , then our preaching is in vain and your faith also is in vain .
Yes , we are also found false witnesses of God , because we testified about God that he raised up Christ , whom he didn’ t raise up if it is true that the dead are not raised .
For if the dead aren’t raised , neither has Christ been raised .
If Christ has not been raised , your faith is vain ; you are still in your sins.
Then they also who are fallen asleep in Christ have perished.
If we have only hoped in Christ in this life , we are of all men most pitiable.

nama: Wénde efalo si siyém ndené Keriso té nanoyéng kétándmé kérta. Keriso yém fronde ár féyo fá efe kémégh té nakmetaménd, fá ndenéyameyo so nanotat kérta. 21 Ndené kér yénmormén ámbiro ár kénjúmé, ndenéyameyo anogh kétándmé kérta so yéném ámbiro ár kénjúmé. 22 Ndené fété méinyotio ár kér kés em Edémene kénjún, ndené endeyo méinyotio ár so nanotat ghérsat Keriso kénjún. 23 Wénde ámbiroámbiro ár so nanotat ndenéyameyo Keriso fronde, féyo yáne angoghan fá efe yáne em. 24 Féyo yatogh so yéném, Kerisom so tawaindangé méinyotio mbérmbére limánégh ár, si muyé, a wafté, a so tafnamongé limánégh kétán Afé Ngánjánefaf. 25 Kerisom so yalimnde kétánotio Ngánjánam tawaindangé méinyotio mék téfnár a fá tékmangé yáne kafkaf mbanmbanan. 26 Soramé mék téfnár waingéghét siyém kér. 27 Buk si noraye, "Ngánjánam ekmete méinyotio rokar yáne kafkaf mbanmbanan." Mé safénro yéné si kés em ndené, "méinyotio rokar" yau kété yafnyang Ngánján fáyo, emon ekmete méinyotio rokar Kerisoene mbanmbanan. 28 Wénde njam méinyotio rokar té ekmayéng Kerisoene limánégh mbanmbanan, féyo fá fáyo, Ambum, kakmangé Ngánjánene mbanmbanan, emo ekmete méinyotio rokar yáne mbanmbanan, ménát Ngánján so yém méinyotio kénjún.
english: But now Christ has been raised from the dead . He became the first fruit of those who are asleep .
For since death came by man , the resurrection of the dead also came by man .
For as in Adam all die, so also in Christ all will be made alive .
But each in his own order : Christ the first fruits, then those who are Christ ’s at his coming .
Then the end comes , when he will deliver up the Kingdom to God the Father , when he will have abolished all rule and all authority and power .
For he must reign until he has put all his enemies under his feet .
The last enemy that will be abolished is death .
For , “ He put all things in subjection under his feet .” But when he says , “ All things are put in subjection ”, it is evident that he is excepted who subjected all things to him .
When all things have been subjected to him , then the Son will also himself be subjected to him who subjected all things to him , that God may be all in all .

nama: Némamén wét yéné ár efe ewalitote kér árfet? Némé yéfene méghmégh yém ufroghét? Njam yéné efalo yém, ndené fété ámb norayat, kér ár yau so nanotat ghérsat, némamén yéné ár ewalitotaménd kér árfet? 30 A téfeyot siyém, némamén yéndfem kérté yérsam méinyotio efoghfénefénen? 31 Tane fútaréf, yéndon kér yafángotan méinyotio efghon! Yéné tuktuk tane swém féfene kénjún siyém téfene ghérsé Keriso kénjún, Yesu téfene Yuré, ndernáye yénd mat yényátote. 32 Njam yénd té nasémwam "munjan tékrat wérárafé" yéna Efesos kénjún áfrátaye kétándmé árfene mwighata, némé mer yéndon so tanan? Wénde njam kér ár yau nanotat ghérsat, féyo, ndené si kés yiyota, "Kamyongém njamke a nu nénet, ménát yénd kér so yéném káye."
english: Or else what will they do who are baptized for the dead ? If the dead aren’ t raised at all , why then are they baptized for the dead ?
Why do we also stand in jeopardy every hour ?
I affirm , by the boasting in you which I have in Christ Jesus our Lord , I die daily .
If I fought with animals at Ephesus for human purposes, what does it profit me ? If the dead are not raised , then “ let ’s eat and drink , for tomorrow we die.”

nama: Yau nawawérsotati fém: "Mámáfi mérnam ewaghnat mer wafroghyam." 34 Féfenjo mbarkánd mwighét kénangongi a kékmbongi féfenjo yaufita. Yénd norayan yéné ndené fém wáiwái aem ménamén ámb fém mafina em Ngánján. Anoghmén fifi
english: Don’t be deceived ! “ Evil companionships corrupt good morals .”
Wake up righteously and don’t sin, for some have no knowledge of God . I say this to your shame .

nama: Ámb árom so kémotangé, "Ndernáye kér ár so nanotat ghérsat? Némé sáf fifi so yéfene ewam?" 36 Fém onon! Njam fémon tiang wén mbwe mband kénjún, yau mé so káfyarngé mbém ghérsat, táfandro kér njam tramngongé. 37 A némé fémon tiang siyém mbwe, némé sái kénafyarngé siyém fénataye kun o ámb mbwe. 38 Ngánján nuséne mbwe fifiyafé ndernáye fá ménde yém, a ámbiroámbiro mbweyot yémon eramete fénatayo fifi.
english: But someone will say , “ How are the dead raised ?” and , “ With what kind of body do they come ?”
You foolish one , that which you yourself sow is not made alive unless it dies.
That which you sow , you don’ t sow the body that will be , but a bare grain , maybe of wheat , or of some other kind .
But God gives it a body even as it pleased him , and to each seed a body of its own .

nama: Méinyotio fifi sem yau ámbiro sáfot em. Árfene sewam ámb sáf fifi, wérárafene fénatayo, menafene fénatayo a wagifafene fénatayo.
english: All flesh is not the same flesh , but there is one flesh of men , another flesh of animals, another of fish , and another of birds .

nama: A kété em njafarmén fifi a mbandmén fifi. Merafé yam njafarmén fifi sem fénatayo a kétándmé mbandmén fifi sem fénatayo merafé yam. 41 Efogh siyém yánjo merafé yam, ghérare fénatayo merafé yam, a kénd sem fénatayo merafé yam.Kété em fénaté sáfot merafé yam kéndan
english: There are also celestial bodies and terrestrial bodies ; but the glory of the celestial differs from that of the terrestrial .
There is one glory of the sun , another glory of the moon , and another glory of the stars; for one star differs from another star in glory .

nama: Ndené so em njam kér ár kanongé ghérsat. Njam fifi eyatotat, táf siyém kérwén, wénde njam kérta kanongé táf sem kérofnar fifi. 43 Njam fifi tiyatongi táf siyém merofnar a njangénnjangén, wénde njam kérta kanongé táf siyém merafé yam a muyafé. 44 Njam fifi tiyatongi mbandan táf siyém mbandmén fifi, wénde njam anoghan yém, táf siyém mbérmbérmén fifi. Kété siyém mbandmén fifi féyo kété wéi so yém mbérmbérmén fifi. 45 Yénémamén Buk si noraye, "Fronde ár Edém, Ngánjánam yafrotaméng ghérsé ár." Wénde soramé Edém siyém ghérsé ramégh Mbérmbér. 46 Mbérmbérmén ár yau fronde yéném, wénde fifimén, a soramé mbérmbérmén ár. 47 Fronde Edém, yafrotaméng mbandmén, yénmormén kétándmé mband maratta, yénamayo Edém yénmormén kétándmé njafarta. 48 Fá efe yéné mband maratmén yém ndenanit ámbiro efe yafrotaméng mband maratta, a fá efe njafarmén ndenanit yém ámbiro efe yénmormén kétán njafarta. 49 Sénonjo ndené fété yénd kés yéném fifi ndenanit mbandmén árnit, féyo yénd ámb káye téfene fifi so em ndené njafarmén ár kés yém.
english: So also is the resurrection of the dead . The body is sown perishable ; it is raised imperishable.
It is sown in dishonor; it is raised in glory . It is sown in weakness; it is raised in power .
It is sown a natural body ; it is raised a spiritual body . There is a natural body and there is also a spiritual body .
So also it is written , “ The first man Adam became a living soul .” The last Adam became a life-giving spirit .
However, that which is spiritual isn’ t first , but that which is natural , then that which is spiritual .
The first man is of the earth , made of dust. The second man is the Lord from heaven .
As is the one made of dust, such are those who are also made of dust; and as is the heavenly , such are they also that are heavenly .
As we have borne the image of those made of dust, let ’s also bear the image of the heavenly .

nama: Tane fútáréf, némé yéndon norayan siyém némé yafrotam fifie a férke yau so tanangé Ngánján limánégh, a némé kérafé fifi yau so tanangé kérofnar yam. 51 Káyárangi yéné kwankwane si: Yénd yau so méinyotio kér yéném, wénde yénd so kafurnangém. 52 Yéné nufrotam wékeye ndené ghékéf nau taumbérto a tasawér. Féyo sufér njam kutnangé, kér ár so nanotat, yaufifi so wéikor kér em, a yénd méinyotio so kafurnangém. 53 Némé kérafé yém so kafurnangé ménát kérofnarot. Némé kérafé yém so kafurnangé kérofnarot. 54 Féyo njam yéné yamam nufrota, kérafé fifi so kafurnangé kétán kérofnare fifiot, táf so Buk si efalo káyátongé ndené: "Kér té yiror, waingégh té yifogh!"
english: Now I say this , brothers, that flesh and blood can ’ t inherit God ’s Kingdom; neither does the perishable inherit imperishable.
Behold , I tell you a mystery . We will not all sleep , but we will all be changed,
in a moment, in the twinkling of an eye , at the last trumpet . For the trumpet will sound and the dead will be raised incorruptible, and we will be changed.
For this perishable body must become imperishable, and this mortal must put on immortality.
But when this perishable body will have become imperishable, and this mortal will have put on immortality, then what is written will happen : “ Death is swallowed up in victory .”

nama: "Kér! Fene waingégh ánde yém? Kér! Fene wafté ánde yém ngiot?"
english: “ Death , where is your sting ? Hades, + 15:55 or, Hell where is your victory ?” + 15:55 See Hosea 13:14

nama: Kéram yérse yánjo wafté ngiot kétándmé yaufita, a yaufiyam yérse yánjo wafté kétándmé Ngánjánene nákta. 57 Wénde Ngánjáne kánjo yarametat emo yénmaramet téfe waingégh muyé téfene Yuré Yesu Keriso kénjúmé!
english: The sting of death is sin, and the power of sin is the law .
But thanks be to God , who gives us the victory through our Lord Jesus Christ .

nama: Yénémaménnde, tane tikfafé fútaréf, kokayongi taikrataye a ndernder. Mia em túmén ásáfoghan Yurai, ménamén fém mat em ndené Yurane kénjún fifiofnar ásáfogh yau so násáfotati.
english: Therefore , my beloved brothers, be steadfast , immovable, always abounding in the Lord ’ s work , because you know that your labor is not in vain in the Lord .

nama: Sénonjo, yénd so norayan féfe ménamén mani womengét Ngánjánene árét wáutárghét Judia kénjún. Fémofem yafrotati némé yéndon engémndayan Yesuene mérén Galasia kénjún wafroghét. 2 Ámbiroámbrio Sandeyan fémofem so ekmetati téndon ámb mani, kétándmé némé fémofem ewinjotati, a eumendati ménát yau so mani womengégh yangém táf njam wéném féfefaf. 3 Soramé yénd so wéném, yéndon so tangwaraman mat yátogh férén yéfeyot emofem té yiyátongi, a engwatembetan ménát fémofem so engérsati féfenjo ramégh rokar kétán Jerusalemét. 4 Táf mer njam yém tayot álighét, yémafé yénd so kuwanongén. Folene mwighé farorégh
english: Now concerning the collection for the saints: as I commanded the assemblies of Galatia , you do likewise .
On the first day of every week , let each one of you save as he may prosper , that no collections are made when I come .
When I arrive , I will send whoever you approve with letters to carry your gracious gift to Jerusalem .
If it is appropriate for me to go also , they will go with me .

nama: Yéndo so wéném féfefaf soramé yénd so wéngém yénamé Makedonia, yéné soramé yénd so wéngém yénamé Makedonia. 6 Yénd so ngámnjon ámb efogh fémofé o tengwifon yunjéf fémofé, féyo fémofem fété so kwáutánati ménát tane áligh wasamngon, árkémé njam yénd nguwanon. 7 Yénd ménde wém féfe fandaghét mindefifi yau sái mé tangwaindangén. Yénd nemnan tekeyo ámnjoghét fémofé, táf Yuram njam kumyongé.
english: I will come to you when I have passed through Macedonia , for I am passing through Macedonia .
But with you it may be that I will stay with you , or even winter with you , that you may send me on my journey wherever I go .
For I do not wish to see you now in passing , but I hope to stay a while with you , if the Lord permits .

nama: Yénd so wémor yénan Efesos kénjún kétánotio Fentikos efogh kawerangé. 9 Yéné siyém ndimbal sésafne té nasawér tayot ásáfoghét, a karogh ár wéi sem tárfár em.
english: But I will stay at Ephesus until Pentecost ,
for a great and effective door has opened to me , and there are many adversaries.

nama: Njam Timoti yéném, fia nemne ndené té wumyongi féfe kénjút, ménamén fá siyém Yurai násáfote, ndené fété yénd swém. 11 Árké árom yau so yékarote fá, wénde fémofem mé ténmáutánangi yáne álighan krufráte, ménát fá so nénangote tafaf. Ménamén yénd nawanjetan yáyot ámb Yesuene efalo yátogh árfé.
english: Now if Timothy comes , see that he is with you without fear , for he does the work of the Lord , as I also do .
Therefore let no one despise him . But set him forward on his journey in peace , that he may come to me ; for I expect him with the brothers.

nama: Sénonjo fútar Afolosenemén: yéndo taikratye yawéngsotan fá féfe yafoghét ámb efalo yátogh árfé. Fá méndefnar tamorwén álighét sénonjo, wénde fá so yéngém njam kété yém féneféne. Soramamén si
english: Now concerning Apollos the brother, I strongly urged him to come to you with the brothers, but it was not at all his desire to come now ; but he will come when he has an opportunity .

nama: Mwighé sauréghkaf aem, kokayongi taikrataye ndimbal mwighé kénjún, miya ndernder ewakai, miya táikér em. 14 Ewafrotati méinyotio féfenjo ásáfogh uwégh kénjún.
english: Watch ! Stand firm in the faith ! Be courageous! Be strong !
Let all that you do be done in love.

nama: Fém mat em Stefanas a yáne mérén. Fá em fronde efalo yátogh ár Akaya yumén a naramayénd Ngánjánene árét ásáfoghét. Yéndon ewamnendan fém, tane fútaréf 16 ménát sái namyotati ndené árfefaf a méinyotio árfefaf efe nufeindat yéné ásáfoghét a násáfotat yénayan.
english: Now I beg you , brothers— you know the house of Stephanas , that it is the first fruits of Achaia, and that they have set themselves to serve the saints—
that you also be in subjection to such , and to everyone who helps in the work and labors .

nama: Yénd áuwéghan wém yéfene wáfareghmén Stefanas, Fotunatus, a Akaikus, ménamén yémofem té ténmafrotat yéné wafrogh féfene yukéra. 18 Yémofem tane mwighé ásneghét yanoyénd a féfene ndenáyo. Fémofem sái tawayamngongi ndené ár.
english: I rejoice at the coming of Stephanas , Fortunatus , and Achaicus; for that which was lacking on your part , they supplied.
For they refreshed my spirit and yours . Therefore acknowledge those who are like that .

nama: Yéné Yesuene mérén Esia yuwan enwawatembangi féfe yéfene áuwégh. Akwila a Frisila a Yesuene mérén árké nafángotat yéfenjo méngon engwawatembangi efalo yátogh árfene áuwégh. 20 Méinyotio fútarém yéné sem engwawatembangi áuwégh. Nafángotati fútarafé ásneghafé.
english: The assemblies of Asia greet you . Aquila and Priscilla greet you warmly in the Lord , together with the assembly that is in their house .
All the brothers greet you . Greet one another with a holy kiss .

nama: Tanjo ngángaye yéndon yéné yafarotan: Áuwégh Foleta.
english: This greeting is by me , Paul , with my own hand .

nama: Emon njam yau uwetat Yuré so yém wafalngogh yáne! Marana ta, yáne fifi, téfene Yuré, Kénaf!
english: If any man doesn’ t love the Lord Jesus Christ , let him be cursed. Come , Lord !

nama: Yuré Yesuene ngárám so yém féfefaf.
english: The grace of the Lord Jesus Christ be with you .

nama: Tane uwégh so yém féfefaf méinyotio Keriso Yesu kénjún.
english: My love to all of you in Christ Jesus . Amen.

nama: Yéné férén siyém Foleta, Keriso Yesuene muyafé ár Ngánjánene méndeyan, a kétándmé téfene fútar Timoti, Yéndon yéfarotan kétán Ngánjánene Yesuene mérnot Korint kénjún, a kétán Ngánjánene árfefaf Akaya yuwomé.
english: Paul , an apostle of Christ Jesus through the will of God , and Timothy our brother, to the assembly of God which is at Corinth , with all the saints who are in the whole of Achaia:

nama: So Ngánján téfene Afé a Yuré Yesu Keriso yéramet féfe ngárám a krufrát. Folém yaramete kánjo Ngánjáne
english: Grace to you and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ .

nama: Áwégh Ngánjáneot a Afé Yuré Yesu Kerisoene, ghérghérsisé kér ro Afé, Ngánján ende tambén méinyotio áwéghafé a muyé yéném. 4 Yémon yénmáutáne téfe méinyotio téfene kérté kénjúmé, ménát yéndfem so ewáutánam ámb ár endefene fénatayero kérté ewam, wáutárégh ndenéyameyo yéndfem árké ewanayém kétándmé Ngánjáneta. 5 Ndené fété yénd yéném Kerisoene tárfár tékratan, féyo wéi Keriso kénjúmé yénd yéném Ngánjánene ndimbal wáutáréghan. 6 Njam yénd tékratan yéném, yéné siyém ménát féfe wáutárghét a wanjarghét. Njam yénd yénmáutáne, wéi fém so ewáutáne a muyé so tawaramangé awamaroghét métare ndené sáfotyo tékrat yénd kawamarotam. 7 Féyo téfene méghmégh féfe kénjún yau násambnete, ménamén yénd mat yéném ndené fété fém ewafnyang téfene tékratan, fém wéi ewafnyang téfene wáutáréghan Ngánjáneta.
english: Blessed be the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ , the Father of mercies and God of all comfort ,
who comforts us in all our affliction , that we may be able to comfort those who are in any affliction , through the comfort with which we ourselves are comforted by God .
For as the sufferings of Christ abound to us , even so our comfort also abounds through Christ .

But if we are afflicted , it is for your comfort and salvation . If we are comforted , it is for your comfort , which produces in you the patient enduring of the same sufferings which we also suffer .
Our hope for you is steadfast, knowing that , since you are partakers of the sufferings , so you are also of the comfort .

nama: Fútaréf, yéndfem mat eyátotam fém kértamén yénd sténmorwén Esia yuwan. Yéné kérté téfayongérwén téfefaf tamorwén ndimbalfifi a yénd mwighayan nuyángém téfene ghérsamén.{i{ ...f* {i{1.8 yénd mwighayan nuyángém téfene ghérsamén. need to BT
english: For we don’ t desire to have you uninformed, brothers, concerning our affliction which happened to us in Asia : that we were weighed down exceedingly, beyond our power , so much that we despaired even of life .

nama: Yénd nemnayém ndené kér so ténmorwén. Wénde yéné nufrotam ménát yéndyo yau so kamyotawém, wénde Ngánjáne fáfetro, emon ewanote kér ár. 10 Yémon té yénmanjaryéng yaufififi kérta, a wéi so ténmanjarngé. Yéndfem té ekmayém yáfaf téfene kamnang ménát yémon so ténmanjarngé. 11 A fémofem mé yénmáutánati Ngánjánafé orayéghe téfeyot. So yém uwangogh yénayan tárfár Ngánjánafé orayéghe téfeyot a Ngánjánam yénd so yénéfrende a tárfár árém so ewiyotat yéfenjo kém Ngánjánefaf kánjo raméghafé téfeyot. Folene wéikor mwighé farorégh
english: Yes, we ourselves have had the sentence of death within ourselves , that we should not trust in ourselves , but in God who raises the dead ,
who delivered us out of so great a death , and does deliver , on whom we have set our hope that he will also still deliver us ,
you also helping together on our behalf by your supplication ; that , for the gift given to us by means of many , thanks may be given by many persons on your behalf .

nama: Yénd nawarsam ndérnáye yénd yénmor téfene ghérsé yéné mband maratan ndené fété téfene mwighayam yufote.Téfene fútaryam fémafé té yafrotam Ngánjánene njúnnjúnofnar a unyéghofnar yamam. Yénd té yafrotam ménaye Ngánjánene ngáráme a yau árfene káfeté mwighaye. 13 Yéndfem yau yéfarotam féfeyot ámb árkéméné fémofem yau so yaftati o mat yiyátotati. A yénd ndené nemnan, 14 ndenéyameyo fém té mat náyátongi ámb, fém so kor mat fifi káyátongi ánde so nawarsati téfenemén ndené yénd nawarsam féfenemén yéné efghot Yuré Yesuene.
english: For our boasting is this : the testimony of our conscience that in holiness and sincerity of God , not in fleshly wisdom but in the grace of God , we behaved ourselves in the world , and more abundantly toward you .
For we write no other things to you than what you read or even acknowledge , and I hope you will acknowledge to the end —
as also you acknowledged us in part — that we are your boasting , even as you also are ours , in the day of our Lord Jesus .

nama: Yénd mwighé taikér kwémorwén méinyotio yénémamén ndené yéndon mwighé yafrotamén fronde ménát féfe yafoghét, ménát fém so frengéghan em sómbio mbinotmé. 16 Yénd ménde kwémorwén féfefaf sái tayafongayénd tane álighan Makedoniat a wéi sái kénangon féfefaf kétamé Makedoniata, a fémofem so kwéngwatembangi yénd kétán Judiat. 17 Yénd yéné mwighé yau yéfarotan amyoghofnar. Yéndon yau tane mwighé yéfarotan nité yamta, ndené fété ámb ár efe mafina em Ngánján. Yéndo yau norayan, 'A,' a féyo yénd norayan tekofnare "Yau'. 18 Ngánján túmén némé fá noraye yémon so yafrote. Yénémamén, tane unyéghofnar si féfefaf yau témorwén "A" a "Yau." 19 Timoti, Sailes a yéndio yéndfem féu táitotawém féfefafmé Yesu Keriso Ngánjánene Ambumoenemén, fá yéné yau fiyém "A" a "Yau." Wénde fá siyém Ngánjánene "A." 20 Méné nderé tárfár unyéghofnar si Ngánjánam ewafrote, fá sem mé "A" yáne fifi siyém ndené Yesu Keriso kénjúmé efe yém téfene "Efalo" yénémamén yénd norayam kétán Ngánjánene ndimbal kwayaghat. 21 Ngánjánam emo yényátoi méinyotio fém a yénd sái yénmakai taikrataye Keriso kénjún. Yémo yénfagharyéng yénd, 22 té yéntenai yénd, a yényawai yáne Mbérmbér téfene tikéfan kétán féyotaroe némé so yéném.
english: In this confidence , I was determined to come first to you , that you might have a second benefit ,
and by you to pass into Macedonia , and again from Macedonia to come to you , and to be sent forward by you on my journey to Judea .
When I therefore planned this , did I show fickleness? Or the things that I plan, do I plan according to the flesh , that with me there should be the “ Yes , yes ” and the “ No , no ?”
But as God is faithful , our word toward you was not “ Yes and no .”
For the Son of God , Jesus Christ , who was preached among you by us — by me , Silvanus , and Timothy — was not “ Yes and no ,” but in him is “ Yes .”
For however many are the promises of God , in him is the “ Yes .” Therefore also through him is the “Amen”, to the glory of God through us .
Now he who establishes us with you in Christ and anointed us is God ,
who also sealed us and gave us the down payment of the Spirit in our hearts .

nama: Yéndon yémotan Ngánján ndené fété tane ghékfe fandagh ár. Ngánján mat yém tane tikéf. Yéné téfnan yéndon ewarawenayén fém mwighé yafrotamén yau álighét Korintét. 24 Yéndfem yau ewafaretam fémofem némé so efalo yiyátotati. Yénd mat yéném fém taikrataye ewakai ndimbal mwighayan. Wénde yénd násáfotam fémafé féfene áuwéghét.
english: But I call God for a witness to my soul , that to spare you , I didn’ t come to Corinth .
We don’ t control your faith , but are fellow workers with you for your joy . For you stand firm in faith .

nama: Féyo yéndon mwighé yéfarotan yau álighét féfefaf wéikor ménamén áuwéghofnar mété táyátongayén. 2 Yéndon njam eyátotan áuwéghofnar, efe so wiyátote yénd áuwéghafé? Efaloe yau yém yéné ár yéndon efe eyáton áuwéghofnar. 3 Yéné téfnan yéndon yéfarotamén tane férén féfefaf. Yénd yau ménde wém sái wéném féfefaf a táyáton áuwéghofnar ménaye ámb árém sái yénd áuwéghafé kwiyátongi. Yénd mwighé taikér wém ndené njam yénd áuwéghafé wém, féyo fém wéi méinyotio áuwéghan em. 4 Yéndon yéfarotan féfefaf ndimbal kértafé a tikéf ndémkefé a tárfár yengamafé. Tane mwighé yam témorwén yau ménát áuwéghofnar táyátongayén, wénde ménát mat so káyátongayénd nderé minde yéndon fém euwetan méinyotio. wawalindangégh emon néméinde kérta
english: But I determined this for myself , that I would not come to you again in sorrow .
For if I make you grieve , then who will make me glad but he who is made to grieve by me ?
And I wrote this very thing to you , so that when I came , I wouldn’ t have sorrow from them of whom I ought to rejoice ; having confidence in you all that my joy would be shared by all of you .
For out of much affliction and anguish of heart I wrote to you with many tears , not that you should be made to grieve , but that you might know the love that I have so abundantly for you .

nama: Njam árké árom té kénméinde áuwéghofnarot, yau tafrote tafaf, wénde méinyotio féfefaf. Yénd norayayén yéné ménamén yau ménde wém sái minde nékw wém yáfaf. 6 Yéné kérté yafayoyénd yáfaf tárfár árém féyotaro yéné fyémormén. 7 Féyo sénonjo fémo fiya tawalindangi a yawéngsotati, ménát yau so áuwéghofnar káyátongé a kékmbongé féyotio. 8 A yéndon ewamnendan fém mat tiyátongi ndené féfene uwégh mé yém yáyot. 9 Yéndon yafarotamén féfe yéné férén ménamén yénd ménde wém ménát sái tawinjon nderé mer fém tawakai yéné ufogh yaman a túmén afrengéghkaf em áyárghét tane watamegh sifaf. 10 Njam fémofem tawalindangi ároene yaufiyam némé yémofem té tanwafrotat, yéndon wéi tawalindangen. Njam yéndon tawalindangen, kété njam ámb em walindangégh, yéndon yafrotan Kerisoene sáfrére ménamén féfenemén, 11 ménát yéndfem yau so sifayé yarametam Sáiférefaf. Ménamén yénd mat yéném némé Sáiféroene mwighé a wafrogh yém ndené. Folene mwighé wawérsogh Troasén
english: But if any has caused sorrow , he has caused sorrow not to me , but in part ( that I not press too heavily) to you all .
This punishment which was inflicted by the many is sufficient for such a one ;
so that , on the contrary , you should rather forgive him and comfort him , lest by any means such a one should be swallowed up with his excessive sorrow .
Therefore I beg you to confirm your love toward him .
For to this end I also wrote , that I might know the proof of you , whether you are obedient in all things .
Now I also forgive whomever you forgive anything . For if indeed I have forgiven anything , I have forgiven that one for your sakes in the presence of Christ ,
that no advantage may be gained over us by Satan , for we are not ignorant of his schemes .

nama: Njam yénd néngufaryén Troasét mer si waitoghét Kerisoenemén, yéndon yinjoyén ndené Yuram yésauwéryéng end ménát kété ásáfoghét. 13 Wénde kénjkam mwighé wawérsoghan kwémorwén, ménamén yéndon yau yinjoyén tane fútar Taitus. Féyo yénd norayayén yawo árfefaf kété a néngwanoyén Makedonia yuwot. Waingégh Keriso kénjúmé
english: Now when I came to Troas for the Good News of Christ , and when a door was opened to me in the Lord ,
I had no relief for my spirit , because I didn’ t find Titus my brother, but taking my leave of them , I went out into Macedonia .

nama: Wénde kánjo Ngánjáne, emo túmén yénlimnde yénd waingéghét Keriso kénjún. Ngánjánam yénd yényátote wafaranéghét yáne matyam méinyotio yuwomé ndenanit méndefé wimafé wékwér. 15 Yénd yéném Kerisoene méndefé wimafé wékwér Ngánjanene sáfrére, yémafé efe té ewanjaryéng a efe olingéghkaf tamorwén. 16 Yénd yéném méndefé wimafé wékwér yéfeyot efe olingéghkaf tamorwén a méndefé wimafé ghékér yéfefaf efe té ewanjaryéng. Efe so féyotaro yém yéné ásáfoghét? 17 Yénd yau yéném ndené tárfár ár kés yém, emofem Ngánjánene si yaitotat ménát yéfendio merot. Yénd nafrotam Ngánjanene si efalo yátogh kér ro a ndené fété Ngánjánene ásáfogh ár.
english: Now thanks be to God who always leads us in triumph in Christ , and reveals through us the sweet aroma of his knowledge in every place .
For we are a sweet aroma of Christ to God in those who are saved and in those who perish:
to the one a stench from death to death , to the other a sweet aroma from life to life . Who is sufficient for these things ?
For we are not as so many , peddling the word of God . But as of sincerity , but as of God , in the sight of God , we speak in Christ .

nama: Yéné kém ndené yém yénd kar nawarmbotam téfenjomén? Fété nérete ndenáye ámb árnit, yénd ménde yéném yátogh férén féfefaf o féfeta? Yau. 2 Fém fémyo em téfene férén, té efarotamém téfene tikfan ménát méinyotio ár matot a wafghét. 3 Yéné siyém mé safénro ndené Kerisom yémonyo yéfarotam yéné férén a yatambangém yéndfemyo. Yéné férén siyém, yau kayogh wékwre wénde akegh Ngánjánene Mbérmbére, yau wím tukén wénde árfene tikfan.
english: Are we beginning again to commend ourselves ? Or do we need , as do some , letters of commendation to you or from you ?
You are our letter , written in our hearts , known and read by all men ,
being revealed that you are a letter of Christ , served by us , written not with ink , but with the Spirit of the living God ; not in tablets of stone , but in tablets that are hearts of flesh .

nama: Yénd norayam ménamén sotafé yéném Ngánján kénjún Keriso kénjúmé. 5 Téfe kénjún némndafi yau em amyoghét féyotaro yéném wafroghét yéné ásáfoghét. Yéné wafté téfefaf siéném kétándmé mé Ngánjáneta. 6 Fá yém emo téfe yénaramayéng ásáfoghét totér árnyéghmén, árké yém Ngánján Mbérmbére, yau yém faroghe náke ménamén faroghe nákam yénérse kér, wénde Ngánján Mbérmbéram yénmaramete ghérsé.
english: Such confidence we have through Christ toward God ,
not that we are sufficient of ourselves to account anything as from ourselves ; but our sufficiency is from God ,
who also made us sufficient as servants of a new covenant , not of the letter but of the Spirit . For the letter kills, but the Spirit gives life .

nama: Yéné nák témorwén faroghkaf férén wíman, a Ngánjánene ndimbal kwayaghé nufaryéng njam yéramayéng. Ndemamén Mosesene sáfan kwayaghé kolindau, minde muyafé Israil ár féyotarofnar tamorwén ghékfe fandaghét yáfaf. Njam nákam, árkaménáyam yénérse kér yém wafareghan, yénmormén ndimbal kwayaghafé, 8 nderé ndimbal kwayaghé yém Ngánján Mbérmbéroene ásáfoghfaf! 9 Njam yéné ásáfogham árké yénérse kértafé témorwén ndimbal kwayaghé, nderé ndimbal kwayaghé ásáfogh yém árkéménayam yénérse mbarkánd yam! 10 Némé témorwén ndimbal kwayaghé sénonjo yau ndimbal kwayaghé yém njam yétémndam totér ndimbal kwayaghafé. 11 A njam té témorwén ndimbal kwayaghé árké yémormén tekofnaye, nderé ndimbal kwayaghé yém árkéméné nakete tuot!
english: But if the service of death , written engraved on stones , came with glory , so that the children of Israel could not look steadfastly on the face of Moses for the glory of his face , which was passing away ,
won’ t service of the Spirit be with much more glory ?
For if the service of condemnation has glory , the service of righteousness exceeds much more in glory .
For most certainly that which has been made glorious has not been made glorious in this respect , by reason of the glory that surpasses .
For if that which passes away was with glory , much more that which remains is in glory .

nama: Ménamén téfene yém yéné méghmégh, yénd siéném mbénmbénate norayam. 13 Yénd yau yéném ndené Moses, emon so tafarngai sálámeye yáne sáf ménát Israil árém yau so tefandawét kwayaghé kawaindau a kolindau. 14 Yéfene mwighé ewam déudéu, sénonjo tawétio yéné efghon, yéfene mwighé sem wafaréghkaf yéné sálámeyeyo yémofem njam yaftat tándáwár árnyégh buk. Yéné sáláme so kitérmbongé ménáyero efalo yátoghe Keriso. 15 Ndené sénonjo, njam yémofem yaftat Mosesene nák, sálámeyam mé ewafne yéfene mwighé. 16 Wénde njam árké ár kawengongé Yurafaf, yéné sáláme táf kafnarngé. 17 Yuré siyém Mbérmbér, a ánde yém Yurane Mbérmbér, kété yém yuwek. 18 Méinyotio yénd, efe yéném so sáf awafaréghofnar yélalam Yurane ndimbal kwayaghé, a so ofnamoghe yáné sáffaf armboghanro ndimbal kwayághafé, árké yéném Yurata, efe yém Mbérmbér.
english: Having therefore such a hope , we use great boldness of speech ,
and not as Moses , who put a veil on his face so that the children of Israel wouldn’ t look steadfastly on the end of that which was passing away .
But their minds were hardened , for until this very day at the reading of the old covenant the same veil remains , because in Christ it passes away .
But to this day , when Moses is read, a veil lies on their heart .
But whenever someone turns to the Lord , the veil is taken away .
Now the Lord is the Spirit ; and where the Spirit of the Lord is , there is liberty .
But we all , with unveiled face seeing the glory of the Lord as in a mirror , are transformed into the same image from glory to glory , even as from the Lord , the Spirit .

nama: Ngánjánam té yénmaramai ásáfogh yánjo ghérghérsisé kénjúmé wafroghét, féyo yénd yau so nawewonam. 2 Yéndfem ekmayém téndot méinyotio kwankwane a wáiwáiafé wafroghyam. Yéndfem yau kawaindam, o yau Ngánjánene si unyéghe táitotam. Efalo si kwayaghé kénjún yénd yénmor Ngánjanene ghékfan a narametam yéndio méinyotio árfene mer mwighat. 3 Njam mer si yéndfem árké táitotam ténoghan yém, ténoghe yém mé yéfeta efe olinghéghkaf em. 4 Sáifér, efe yém yéné mbandmén yaufi ngánjánam, mwighé kwéfkwéf eyátotate efalo yátoghofnar árfene, ménát yémofem yau so yéfandat mer sioene kwayaghé árké yéramete Kerisoene ndimbal kwayaghé, efe yém Ngánjánene mbanmban. 5 Yénd yau nafrotam téfenjomén, wénde yénd nafrotam Yesu Kerisoenemén ndené fété Yuré, a yéndio ndené fété féfene faiofnar ásáfogh ár Yesuene téfnan. 6 Ngánján, emo emndai, "Kwéfitata kwayaghé so nálálat, " yéné féyém yénayo Ngánján emon yafrote yánjo kwayaghé nálálat téfene tikéfan, ménát sái yénnérse téfe matyam Ngánjanene ndimbal kwayaghé nálálat Kerisoene sáfan.
english: Therefore , seeing we have this ministry , even as we obtained mercy , we don’ t faint .

But we have renounced the hidden things of shame, not walking in craftiness nor handling the word of God deceitfully , but by the manifestation of the truth commending ourselves to every man ’s conscience in the sight of God .
Even if our Good News is veiled , it is veiled in those who are dying,
in whom the god of this world has blinded the minds of the unbelieving, that the light of the Good News of the glory of Christ , who is the image of God , should not dawn on them .
For we don’t preach ourselves , but Christ Jesus as Lord , and ourselves as your servants for Jesus ’ sake ,
seeing it is God who said , “ Light will shine out of darkness ,” who has shone in our hearts to give the light of the knowledge of the glory of God in the face of Jesus Christ .

nama: Wénde yénd efe yéném yéné mbérmbére ngonjél ngénd sinan, ménát so nauyafote ndené yéné minde tukén wafté siyém Ngánjánefaf yém, yau téfefaf yém. 8 Yénd túmén kértayan yéném, wénde yau kirorngém. Ámb káye mwighé déudéu yéném, wénde yau wirorghé. 9 Kété em tárfár mék téfnár, wénde yénd yau fútarofnaye yéném, a mámáfi yéném ámb efghon, wénde yénd yau wasérmboghkaf yéném. 10 Méinyotio efghon yéndfem yérsam téfenjo fifie Yesuene kér, ménát ndené Yesuene ghérsé so yéfandat téfene fifi kénjún. 11 Téfene ghérsé sem yénd túmén kéramé yényote Yesuene téfnan, ménát ndené Yesuene ghérsé so yéfandat téfene kérmén fifiyan. 12 Yéné fifi ndené yém kér siyém ásáfoghan yém téfefaf, wénde ghérsé siyém ásáfoghan yém féfefaf.
english: But we have this treasure in clay vessels , that the exceeding greatness of the power may be of God and not from ourselves .
We are pressed on every side , yet not crushed ; perplexed, yet not to despair ;
pursued, yet not forsaken ; struck down , yet not destroyed;
always carrying in the body the putting to death of the Lord Jesus , that the life of Jesus may also be revealed in our body .
For we who live are always delivered to death for Jesus ’ sake , that the life also of Jesus may be revealed in our mortal flesh .
So then death works in us , but life in you .

nama: Buk si noraye, "Yénd norayan ménamén yéndo efalo yiyátotan." Ndené ndimbal mwighé mbérmbér kénjúmayo yénd ndenéyameyo norayam ménamén yéndfem efalo yiyátotam. 14 Yénd mat yéném ndené Ngánján, emo yanoyéng Yuré Yesu kérta ghérsat, so ndenéyameyo ténmanongé yénd Yesufé a téngmangéngé yénd mérne fémafé yánjo kénjút. 15 Yéné méinyotio siyém féfene téfnan, a ndené fété Ngánjánene ngárámam so engwarafne tárfár ár, yémofem so erametat kétán ndimbal kwayaghé Ngánjánefaf tárfár kánjo ramégh orayégh. Ámnjogh ndimbal mwighaye
english: But having the same spirit of faith , according to that which is written , “ I believed , and therefore I spoke .” We also believe , and therefore we also speak ,
knowing that he who raised the Lord Jesus will raise us also through Jesus , and will present us with you .
For all things are for your sakes , that the grace , being multiplied through the many , may cause the thanksgiving to abound to the glory of God .

nama: Yéné téfnan yénd yaufifi kuyangém mwighayan. Ménamén téfene fifi muyafnar néngayatote, wénde mbérmbére kénjún ár siyém túmén wéikor totér yiyátote. 17 A yéné némbne watmé kértayan yénd snawambetam so yénérse ndimbal a tuot ndimbal kwayaghé. Yéné yam ndené yénd so ewanangém ewaindat méinyotio yéné kérté. 18 Féyo yéndfem ghékéf eurawetam yau némé efandam, wénde némé yau efandam ménamén némé efandam tekofnar em, wénde némé yau efandam naketat tuot.
english: Therefore we don’ t faint , but though our outward person is decaying , yet our inward person is renewed day by day .
For our light affliction , which is for the moment , works for us more and more exceedingly an eternal weight of glory ,
while we don’ t look at the things which are seen, but at the things which are not seen. For the things which are seen are temporal , but the things which are not seen are eternal.

nama: Yénd mat yéném ndené njam yéné farai méngo yénd syénmor téfenjo fifie yéné mband maratan nirona, Ngánjánefaf méngo em njafaran téfeyot ámnjoghét, méngo yémonyo árké ewafrotam, árkéméné so naketat tuot. 2 Féyo yéné téfnan yénd ndémkefé yéném, yénémamén téfene ménde ndimbal yém ménát téfene méngo árké yém njafaran sái kafayongé téfefaf. 3 Sáláme wafarégh téfe so yém ménát yau so ténmingé firo. 4 Njamandio yénd yénmor yéné mbandmén farai méngo kénjún, yéndfem yafrotam kénjkam ke ndémkeyan máméghéraye, yau ndené yém yéndfem sái tawitérmbongém téfene mbandmén fifi, wénde ndené yénd ménde yéném yéné njafarmén fifi sái kafayongé téfefaf, ménát ndené némé mbandmén fifi yém so tengongé ghérsayam. 5 Ngánjánro yém emo yénd yénfrende yéné awengoghét, a yémon yénmaramayéng téfe yáne Mbérmbér amnyoghét kétán némé so yéném.
english: For we know that if the earthly house of our tent is dissolved , we have a building from God , a house not made with hands, eternal, in the heavens .
For most certainly in this we groan , longing to be clothed with our habitation which is from heaven ,
if indeed being clothed , we will not be found naked .
For indeed we who are in this tent do groan , being burdened, not that we desire to be unclothed , but that we desire to be clothed , that what is mortal may be swallowed up by life .
Now he who made us for this very thing is God , who also gave to us the down payment of the Spirit .

nama: Féyo yénd túmén yéném wawéngsoghan remngoghafé. Yénd mat yéném ndené nderé teke yénd yéna yénmorang méngon fifie yénd ukér yéném Yurane méngota. 7 Efaloe, yénd yéna yénmor ndimbal mwighayero, yau ménaye ghékéf fandaghe. 8 Yénd yéném wawéngsoghan remngoghafé, a nemnam sái nguwanongém fifita a yéném méngon Yurafé. 9 Féyo mété yénd yéném yéna fifie o yukér yéném yéné fifie, yéndfem áuwéghét so yéméindam fá. 10 Yénd so méinyotio yénmakai Kerisoene moghan yáne sáfrére, ámbiroámbiroam so ewinjote némé yémo tawafrote, mer o mámáfi, yéné fifie mband maratan. Ngánjánafé fútar Keriso kénjúmé
english: Therefore we are always confident and know that while we are at home in the body , we are absent from the Lord ;
for we walk by faith , not by sight .
We are courageous, I say , and are willing rather to be absent from the body and to be at home with the Lord .
Therefore also we make it our aim, whether at home or absent , to be well pleasing to him .
For we must all be revealed before the judgment seat of Christ that each one may receive the things in the body according to what he has done , whether good or bad .

nama: Yénd mat yéném fifi némé yém Yuré férfér, a mwighat eufanam ámb ár. Ngánján mat yém téfenemén ndené efe yénd fifi yéném, a yénd nemnan ndené fém mat em féfenjo tikéf kénjún tanemén safénro. 12 Yénd yau narametam yéndio wéikor féfefaf, wénde yéndfem ámb mer téfén ewarametam féfeyot ménát fém so em áuwéghan téfefaf, ménát fémofem so ewawangotati yéfeyot endefene áuwégh yém némé ghékfe yéfande, yau yéné némé tikéf kénjún em. 13 Táf yénd njam onon yéném, yéné siyém mé Ngánjanene téfnanro. O táf yénd mbarkánd mwighayan njam yéném, mé féfene téfnanro. 14 Kerisoene uwégham yénd yénlimnde, féyo yénd mat yéném ndené ámbiro ár kér yémormén méinyotio árét, yéné fifi ndené yém méinyotio ár kér emormén. 15 Fá kér yémormén méinyotio árét, ménát fá efe emor yau so emor yéfendio, wénde yáyot efe kér yémormén a yénwanoi kérta yéfene téfnan.
english: Knowing therefore the fear of the Lord , we persuade men , but we are revealed to God , and I hope that we are revealed also in your consciences .
For we are not commending ourselves to you again , but speak as giving you occasion of boasting on our behalf , that you may have something to answer those who boast in appearance and not in heart .
For if we are beside ourselves , it is for God . Or if we are of sober mind , it is for you .
For the love of Christ compels us ; because we judge thus: that one died for all , therefore all died .
He died for all , that those who live should no longer live to themselves , but to him who for their sakes died and rose again .

nama: Féyo yénandmé sénonjo yéndfem efe yau efalo eyatotam mband matyame. Táf yéndfem efalo yiyátotam Keriso yéné ende, yéndfem árké yau mé ewafrotam. 17 Njam árké ár kufnangé Kerisoefaf fá so yém totér ár. Tándáwár ár kitérmbongé a totér ár kamndangé. 18 Yéné méinyotio wafroghyam siyém Ngánjánene, emo Keriso kénjúmé yénd yénmengote kétándmé mék téfnárta yánjo fútarot a yémo yénmaramayéng ásáfogh ámb ár sái ewangotam yáne fútarot ndenáyo. 19 Téfene mer si ndené yém Ngánjánam táyátotawéng méinyotio ár yáne fútarot Keriso kénjúmé. Ngánjánam yau ewawerayéng yéfene yaufi, a yémon té yénmaramayéng téfe mer si árké yénmaufrote ndernáye yémon táyátongé fá yáne fútarot.
english: Therefore we know no one according to the flesh from now on . Even though we have known Christ according to the flesh , yet now we know him so no more .
Therefore if anyone is in Christ , he is a new creation . The old things have passed away . Behold , all things have become new .
But all things are of God , who reconciled us to himself through Jesus Christ , and gave to us the ministry of reconciliation ;
namely , that God was in Christ reconciling the world to himself , not reckoning to them their trespasses , and having committed to us the word of reconciliation .

nama: Féyo yénd norayam Kerisoe ndené fété Ngánjánam yéramete si téfe kénjúmé. Yénd noumnendam Kerisoene téfnan, tumyo Ngánján fém so kémengongé kétándmé mék téfnárta kétán yáne fútarot! 21 Keriso témorwén yaufiofnar, wénde mé téfe téfnan Ngánjánam yiyátoyéng fá téfene yaufi ménát fété yénd mérne yéném yémafé ménát yéndfem so yafalotam Ngánjánene mbarkánd yam.
english: We are therefore ambassadors on behalf of Christ , as though God were entreating by us : we beg you on behalf of Christ , be reconciled to God .
For him who knew no sin he made to be sin on our behalf , so that in him we might become the righteousness of God .

nama: Féyo, téfene ásáfogh kénjún mérne Ngánjánafé, yéndfem ewamnendam fém emofem té yanayénd Ngánjánene ngárám yau ménát sái nawaghna. 2 Káyárangi némé Ngánján noraye: "Njam kwéf nawerai tayot uyafoghét tane ménde, yéndon eyárayén fém. Njam efogh yéném tayot féfe wanjarghét, yéndon té ewáutánamén féfe." Káyárangi! Yéné fiyém efogh Ngánjánene ménde umyoghét. Sénonjo fiyém efogh wanjarghét.
english: Working together , we entreat also that you do not receive the grace of God in vain .
For he says , “ At an acceptable time I listened to you . In a day of salvation I helped you .” + 6:2 Isaiah 49:8 Behold , now is the acceptable time . Behold , now is the day of salvation .

nama: Yénd yau ménde yéném ámb árém sái yéfandat téfén téfene ásáfoghan, ménát téfene ásáfogh yau so yém nétér ámb ároene endén. 4 Wéndende méinyotio rokar kénjún yéndfem so yuyafotam ndené yénd yéném Ngánjanene ásáfogh ár ménaye métare eumyogh kérté, táikér yam, a mámé ndémkefé yam. 5 Yénd té ténsmetawét, kwéfkwéf méngon ténlawangayénd a ténéfmotawét; yénd ásáfoghanro ténmorwén a kuwanongayém kéméghofnaye o njamkefnaye. 6 A njúnnjúnofnar yam, matyam, métar, a meryam yénd té kauyafotam yéndio ndené fété Ngánjánene ásáfogh ár Ngánján Mbérmbére a ménaye téfene efalo uwégh. 7 Yénd yafrote efalo si afroghe. Ngánjánene waftayam násáfote téfene kénjún. Téfene fimb siyém mbarkánd yam, ménát ásméghét a téfendio awamaroghét. 8 Yénd yénmutemndat a wáiwáiot yénkametat, Yénd yénmasalitat a yénmuyotat. Yénd yénfandat ndené unyégh ár kar yéném, wénde efalo si yaitotam. 9 Méinyotio mat em téfenemén wénde yénfandat ndené mafina kar em, ndené kar kér yénmormén, wénde yénd mé ghérsé yéném. Ndemamén kértayan yénkmetat, wénde yau ténsmetat krot. 10 Ndemamén ghérghérsisat yénkmetat, wénde yénd túmén náuwetam. Yénd yauyaunit yéném, wénde yéndfem eyátotam tárfár ár wemár. Yénd rokarofnarnit yéném, wénde méinyotio rokar ewinjotam.
english: We give no occasion of stumbling in anything , that our service may not be blamed ,
but in everything commending ourselves as servants of God : in great endurance , in afflictions , in hardships, in distresses ,
in beatings , in imprisonments , in riots, in labors , in watchings, in fastings ,
in pureness, in knowledge , in perseverance , in kindness , in the Holy Spirit , in sincere love,
in the word of truth, in the power of God , by the armor of righteousness on the right hand and on the left,
by glory and dishonor, by evil report and good report , as deceivers and yet true,
as unknown and yet well known , as dying and behold — we live , as punished and not killed ,
as sorrowful yet always rejoicing , as poor yet making many rich , as having nothing and yet possessing all things .

nama: Téfene fútaréf Korint kénjún! Yénd norayam efalo siro féfefaf! Téfene tikéf té esawerngém marat féfeyot. 12 Yénd yau yénéf yéném emofem téfene tikéf emnam féfeyot, wénde fém yéné féyém emofem tikéf emnat téfeyot. 13 Yénd norayan sénonjo ndené fété fém em tane ambumtértér. Téfe ténmauyafongi ndenáyo emarégh téfene siyém féfeyot. Tasawérngi féfene tikéf marat! Yénd siéném akegh Ngánjánene wáwefnogh méngo
english: Our mouth is open to you , Corinthians . Our heart is enlarged .
You are not restricted by us , but you are restricted by your own affections .
Now in return— I speak as to my children — you also open your hearts.

nama: Yau kaféghangi ásáfoghét efalo yátoghofnar árfé, yau so nufrote. Ndernáye so mbarkánd a wafarsogh so awarnyéghan ere? Ndernáye so kwayaghé a kwéfité ere ámbiro? 15 Ndernáye so Keriso a Sáifér mwighé tafghend? Némé so efalo yátogh árom a efalo yátoghofnar árfé ewafrot? 16 Ndernáye wét Ngánján wáwefnogh méngo káyátend mewangafé? Ménamén yénd siéném wáwefnogh méngo akegh Ngánjánene! Ndené fété Ngánján fáyo kés norayai, "Yéndon so erametan tane méngo tane árfefaf a wémor yéfe kénjún. Yénd so kamndan yéfene Ngánján, a fá so kamndangi tane ár."
english: Don’t be unequally yoked with unbelievers, for what fellowship do righteousness and iniquity have ? Or what fellowship does light have with darkness ?
What agreement does Christ have with Belial? Or what portion does a believer have with an unbeliever?

What agreement does a temple of God have with idols ? For you are a temple of the living God . Even as God said , “ I will dwell in them and walk in them . I will be their God and they will be my people .”

nama: A féyo Yuré Méinyotio Wafté Afoghare noraye, "Fémofem so tafrangongi fá a kafalongi fémyo kétándmé yéfe tambén. Yau eyanjati némé em mámáfi, a yéndon so taumyon fém.
english: Therefore “‘ Come out from among them , and be separate,’ says the Lord . ‘Touch no unclean thing . I will receive you . + 6:17 Isaiah 52:11; Ezekiel 20:34,41

nama: Yénd so wém Féferafé, a fém so kamndangi tane ambum a mérésmérés."
english: I will be to you a Father . You will be to me sons and daughters ,’ says the Lord Almighty .” + 6:18 2 Samuel 7:14; 7:8

nama: Tane tikfafé fútaréf, ménamén yéné unyéghofnar si eramai téfefaf, yéndio nawainam kétándmé méinyotio yam némé ewafrotam fifi a mbérmbér njúnnjúnafé, a so yéném njúnnjúnofnar ménáyan sái yénmor Ngánján férfér kénjún. Folene áuwégh
english: Having therefore these promises , beloved, let ’ s cleanse ourselves from all defilement of flesh and spirit , perfecting holiness in the fear of God .

nama: Wafrogh ámb sifayé téfe féfene tikéf kénjún. Yéndfem yau taghnam ámb ár, yau tasérmbotam ámb ár, o yau kemnam mer résaghét ámb ároeta, 3 Yénd yau norayan yéné féfe waghnaghét. Yénd té néngorayangén fronde ndené fém sem téfene tikfan, a yénd téu yénmor o kér yéném mérne fémafé. 4 Yénd swém féyotaro wém féfenemén. Yéndon yérsan ndimbal tuktuk féfenemén! Méinyotio téfene kérté kénjún, yénd mé wém áuwéghafé a yénd nérsan áuwéghafé.
english: Open your hearts to us . We wronged no one . We corrupted no one . We took advantage of no one .
I say this not to condemn you , for I have said before that you are in our hearts to die together and live together .
Great is my boldness of speech toward you . Great is my boasting on your behalf . I am filled with comfort . I overflow with joy in all our affliction .

nama: Njam nufaryém Makedonia, yéndfem yau ewinjoyém enagh. Yénd ténmorwén kértayan méinyotio sifayamé, kété tamorwén amrorégh ámb árfé, a férfér téfene tikfan. 6 Wénde Ngánján, emo yénmamarotayéng njam tikfan nuyáyém yuwot, yénmamarotai yénd ménaye Taitusene ufarghe, 7 yau yáne ufarghero wénde yáne afrogh ndernáye yamarotayénd fá. Yémon yénmaufroi téfe ndernáye kawanjetawét ta fandaghét, nderé ghérghérsisé fém tamorwén, a nderé mere yénd fémofem wáutánaménd; yénémamén wéméindayéng yénd minde áuwéghét.
english: For even when we had come into Macedonia , our flesh had no relief, but we were afflicted on every side . Fightings were outside . Fear was inside .
Nevertheless, he who comforts the lowly , God , comforted us by the coming of Titus ,
and not by his coming only , but also by the comfort with which he was comforted in you while he told us of your longing , your mourning , and your zeal for me , so that I rejoiced still more .

nama: Táf ndené tane férnam taméinde fém áuwéghofnarot, yénd yau ghérghérsisé wém tané wafaroghmén. Yénd so ghérghérsisé kwémorwén yénémamén njam yéndon tinjongayén ndené yéné férnam eméinde fém áuwéghofnarot mé némbne efoghfénefénetro. 9 Wénde sénonjo yénd áuwéghan wém, yau ménamén yéndon taméindan áuwéghofnarot, wénde ménamén féfene áuwéghofnar yamam eméinda fém féfene yam wengoghét. Yéné áuwéghofnar yam yafrotam Ngánjánam, a féyo yéndfem yau yéfunayém féfefaf tékrat. 10 Yéné áuwéghofnar yam Ngánjánam yafrotam yéné ménaye yénérsam awengogh tikfot árké ménáyam yénlimnde wanjarghét, a kété ámb kenagh yau yém! Wénde mband yamoene ghérghérsisayam yéfune kér. 11 Téfandangi némé áuwéghofnar yaman Ngánjánam yafrotam téfune féfefaf. Nderé minde fém té eyátoi, nderé sotafé mwighayan fém eyátoi féfene téfnofnar! Nderé nékw yaufiyamfaf, nderé sélngwél yam, nderé emarégh, nderé aramégh, némé afrengégh yém ménát tékrat kéméghét yaufi yafrogh yam! Fém té kauyafotati fémyo ndené njúnjúnofnar ár em méinyotio yaman.
english: For though I grieved you with my letter , I do not regret it , though I did regret it . For I see that my letter made you grieve , though just for a while .
I now rejoice , not that you were grieved , but that you were grieved to repentance . For you were grieved in a godly way , that you might suffer loss by us in nothing .
For godly sorrow produces repentance leading to salvation , which brings no regret. But the sorrow of the world produces death .

For behold , this same thing , that you were grieved in a godly way , what earnest care it worked in you . Yes , what defense, indignation , fear , longing , zeal , and vindication! In everything you demonstrated yourselves to be pure in the matter .

nama: Féyo yéndon yéfarotamén yéné férén féfe, yéné yau témorwén yéné téfnan emo tafrote mámáfi o emo yafrotam mámáfi. Wénde yéndon efarotamén safén yékmayén féfe, Ngánjánene sáfrére, ndernáye kénjkam féfene aramégh yém téfeyot fifi. 13 Yéné téfnan yénd yénmawéngsotayéng.
english: So although I wrote to you , I wrote not for his cause that did the wrong, nor for his cause that suffered the wrong, but that your earnest care for us might be revealed in you in the sight of God .
Therefore we have been comforted . In our comfort we rejoiced the more exceedingly for the joy of Titus , because his spirit has been refreshed by you all .

nama: Yénd tuktukan wém féfenemén yáfaf, a fémofem yau yénd áuwéghofnar wiyátoyénd. Wénde ndené fété méinyotio yammén yénd túmén kénorayan féfefaf siyém efalo, tane tuktuk féfenemén Taitusefaf siyém efalo náyáto. 15 A yáne uwégh féfe kanotawéng muyafé njam yémo tawafarotau ndenáye fém afrengéghkaf tamorwén yáne wawanjarégh si wafroghét, ndernáye fémofem yumyoyénd fá férférafé a mwighé uwérsoghafé. 16 Yénd áuwéghan wém ménamén yénd efalo tiyátotan féfe fémofem sái yafrotati némé mbarkand yém.
english: For if in anything I have boasted to him on your behalf , I was not disappointed . But as we spoke all things to you in truth, so our glorying also which I made before Titus was found to be truth.
His affection is more abundantly toward you , while he remembers all of your obedience , how with fear and trembling you received him .
I rejoice that in everything I am confident concerning you .

nama: Téfene fútaréf, yénd ménde yéném fém sái kamndangi némé Ngánjánene ngárámam té tafrote Makedonia Yesuene mérnamé. 2 Fá té taufotat tárfár kérté yamam fá yéné kénjúmé tayota, wénde yéfene áuwégh mé tamorwén minde ndimbalfifi fá tamorwén tukén marataye yéfene ramégh kénjún, ndemamén fá tamorwén minde yauyau. 3 Yéndon mat eyátotan ndené yémofem eramayénd minde tukén yéfene mwighé féyotaroyan, a minde tukén yafrotaménd raméghan. Yéfenjo méndeye tarametawét. 4 Fá komnendawét téfefaf ménjtaye ménát wáutárghét Ngánjánene árét Judia kénjún. 5 Yéné témorwén minde tukén ndené yénd némat kemnawém! Fronde fá naramayénd fáyo Yurafaf, a féyo Ngánjánene méndeyan fá ndenéyameyo naramayénd fáyo téfefaf. 6 Féyo yéndfem yamnendayém Taitus, emo yérnayéng yéné ásáfogh, so tasamngongai a ewáutána fém wifoghét yéné uwégh ásáfoghan. 7 Fém em mámé wemár méinyotio rokar kénjún némé féfene ewam. Ndimbal mwighé kénjún, si waitoghan, a matyaman, féfene ménde wáutárghét a féfene uwégh téfeyot. A yénd ménde yéném fém sái em marataye wéi yéné uwégh ásáfoghan.
english: Moreover , brothers, we make known to you the grace of God which has been given in the assemblies of Macedonia ,
how in a severe ordeal of affliction , the abundance of their joy and their deep poverty abounded to the riches of their generosity.
For according to their power , I testify , yes and beyond their power , they gave of their own accord ,
begging us with much entreaty to receive this grace and the fellowship in the service to the saints.
This was not as we had expected , but first they gave their own selves to the Lord , and to us through the will of God .
So we urged Titus , that as he had made a beginning before , so he would also complete in you this grace .
But as you abound in everything — in faith , utterance , knowledge , all earnestness , and in your love to us —see that you also abound in this grace .

nama: Yéndo yau ámb nák ekmetan. Wénde yéndon ewauyafotan nderé ménde em ámb efalo yátogh ár sái wárametawét yéfene mani. Yéné ende, yéndon ménde wém yéronjan féfene uwégh fifi némé yém. 9 Fém mat té em téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene ngárám. Nderé wemár fá témorwén, wénde fá nénamndai yauyau féfe téfnan, ménát fém sái téméindangé wemár yáne yauyaue.
english: I speak not by way of commandment , but as proving through the earnestness of others the sincerity also of your love.
For you know the grace of our Lord Jesus Christ , that though he was rich , yet for your sakes he became poor , that you through his poverty might become rich .

nama: Yéndon so tawaraman tanjo mwighé yéné yammén némé yém mer féfeyot. Kétándmé yunjfan fém tamormén fronde ménde wáutárghét a yafrotaménd. 11 Sénonjo fémofem táf so tifongi némé fémofem té yérnyayénd a fém wéi kemnawét wáutárghét, féyo sénonjo yéfandam a tifongi yéné ásáfogh ndené fété fémofem mwighé kés téfaronati a tafngongi yénaye némé té ewam sénonjo. 12 Táf fém njam ménde em ramghét, Ngánjánam so taumyongé féfene ramégh yénayan féfene némé ewam ramghét, yau yénayan némé yau ewam.
english: I give advice in this : it is expedient for you who were the first to start a year ago , not only to do , but also to be willing .
But now complete the doing also , that as there was the readiness to be willing , so there may be the completion also out of your ability .
For if the readiness is there , it is acceptable according to what you have , not according to what you don’ t have .

nama: Téfene ménde yau ndenáye yém ámb ár sái em meran a fém so yérsat ndimbal kérté, wénde so em ámbrérero. 14 Yéné efghon njam fém rokarot néronjati a yéfene ewam tárfár, yémofem so ewáutánat fém. Yéné ende sómbio so nawáutárét ámbrérero. 15 Ndené fété Buk si noraye, "Ár emo eumendam tárfár yau tamorwén tárfárfifi, a ár emo eumendam némbnar yau tamorwén némbnarfifi." Taitus a yáne fútaréf
english: For this is not that others may be eased and you distressed,
but for equality . Your abundance at this present time supplies their lack , that their abundance also may become a supply for your lack , that there may be equality .
As it is written , “ He who gathered much had nothing left over , and he who gathered little had no lack .”

nama: Yéndfem kánjo yarametam Ngánjáne emo Taituse yélawai tikéfan yéné mwighéyo árké mwighé témorwén tafaf féfe wáutárghét! 17 Yau yénaro yémo yumyoi téfene ómnengégh; fá ménde témorwén wáutárghét, fá kemnau álighét féfefaf yánjo méndeye. 18 Yéndfem yéngwatembetam fútar efe minde tukén yutémndat méinyotio Yesuene mérnamé yáne mer si afroghmén. 19 A yénamé ndené, fá té yafaryénd méinyotio Yesuene mérénam ménát yéndfé arengét ndené fété yéné uwégh ásáfogh Yurane ndimbal kwayaghé téfnan a yéndfem yuyafotam ndené yénd ménde yéném sái ewáutánam.
english: But thanks be to God , who puts the same earnest care for you into the heart of Titus .
For he indeed accepted our exhortation , but being himself very earnest , he went out to you of his own accord .
We have sent together with him the brother whose praise in the Good News is known throughout all the assemblies .
Not only so , but he was also appointed by the assemblies to travel with us in this grace , which is served by us to the glory of the Lord himself , and to show our readiness .

nama: Yénd wéi nawarawenam yau táf nawatarna ménamén yéné marataye raméghmén. 21 Yénd nawarawenam sái yafrotam némé mbarkánd yém, yau mé Yurane ghékfanro, wénde ámb árfene ghékfan wéi.
english: We are avoiding this , that any man should blame us concerning this abundance which is administered by us .
Having regard for honorable things , not only in the sight of the Lord , but also in the sight of men.

nama: Féyo yéndfem yéngwatembetam téfene fútar yémafé. Yéndfem té tufotam fá tárfár mbinotmé a téfandam mer méndefé wáutárghét. A sénonjo ndené fá minde efalo tiyátoi fém, fá ménde yém wáutarghét mindefifi. 23 Ndené Taitus siyém, fá yém tane awarnyégh ár a ásáfogh fútar yéndfé ménát féfe wáutárghét, ndenáyo ámb fútaréf kés efe eyota yémafé, yéné tárfár Yesuene mérén yétkwénan a ndimbal kwayaghé yangotat Kerisoefaf. 24 Euyafotati féfene uwégh yéfeyot, ménát ndené méinyotio Yesuene mérnamé mat so em yénémamén a mat so kamndangi ndené yénd mbarkánd yéném tuktukan féfenemén.
english: We have sent with them our brother whom we have many times proved earnest in many things , but now much more earnest , by reason of the great confidence which he has in you .
As for Titus , he is my partner and fellow worker for you . As for our brothers, they are the apostles of the assemblies , the glory of Christ .
Therefore show the proof of your love to them before the assemblies , and of our boasting on your behalf .

nama: Kété siyém yau ménde yém tayot faroghét féfeyot ménát wáutárghét sái téngwatemban Ngánjánene árfefaf Judia kénjún. 2 Yénd mat wém ndené fém ménde em wáutárghét, a yénd tuktukan wém féfenemén yéné árfefaf Makedonia yuwon. Yénd norayan, "Efalo yátogh ár Akaya yuwon afrengéghkaf tamorwén wáutárghét kétándmayo ámb yunjéf." Féfene méndeyam té talimnde tárfár ár wáutárghét. 3 Sénonjo yéndon engwatembetan yéné efalo yátogh ár, ménát téfene tuktuk féfenemén yéné yammén yau so kawengongé fifiofnarot, wénde ndené yénd kés norayan, fém so nafrendati wáutárghét. 4 Njam ámb efalo yátogh ár kétándmamén Makedonia sái yéngém yéndfé a tawinjongém ndené fém yau afrengéghkaf em, yénd so yéném wáiwáiafé ménamén yéndfem efalo tiyátotam. A yénd nemnan ndené fém so em wáiwáiafé wéikor. 5 Yénémamén yénd kémnawén wawéngsoghét yéné efalo yátogh árfefaf ménát álighét ta frondeta a afrengéghét raméghmén árkémamén fémofem unyéghofnar si yafrotaménd. Féyo so frengéghkaf yém njam yénd kufarén, a tufarotangé ndené fém ménde em ramghét, yau fémofem so.
english: It is indeed unnecessary for me to write to you concerning the service to the saints,
for I know your readiness , of which I boast on your behalf to those of Macedonia , that Achaia has been prepared for the past year . Your zeal has stirred up very many of them .
But I have sent the brothers so that our boasting on your behalf may not be in vain in this respect , that , just as I said , you may be prepared ,
lest by any means , if anyone from Macedonia comes there with me and finds you unprepared, we ( to say nothing of you ) would be disappointed in this confident boasting .

I thought it necessary therefore to entreat the brothers that they would go before to you and arrange ahead of time the generous gift that you promised before , that the same might be ready as a matter of generosity, and not of greediness .

nama: Kawafarotangi yéné ár emo nambio mbwe tayangé so etane nambioro njamke, wénde yéné ár emo tayangé tárfár so etane tárfár. 7 Fémofem ámbiroámbiroero so fété erametati, ndené fémofem mwighé kés táitotati, yau akenagh mwighafé o wafrogh yam mwighaménro, ménamén Ngánjánene uwégh yém yéné ároe emo yéramete áuwéghafé. 8 A Ngánjánam so fété tawaramangé minde tukén féfenjo méndeyan, ménát ndené féfene mé so ewam túmén tárfáryo méinyotio mer ásáfoghét. 9 Ndené Buk si noraye, "Yémon ewaramete marataye yauyau árét. Yáne mbarkánd yam nakete tuot."
english: Remember this : he who sows sparingly will also reap sparingly . He who sows bountifully will also reap bountifully .
Let each man give according as he has determined in his heart , not grudgingly or under compulsion, for God loves a cheerful giver .
And God is able to make all grace abound to you , that you , always having all sufficiency in everything , may abound to every good work .
As it is written , “ He has scattered abroad . He has given to the poor . His righteousness remains forever .” + 9:9 Psalms 112:9

nama: A Ngánján, emon ewaramete mbwe yégh téfnárai a njamke nénet, yémon so ndenáyo ewaramete féfeyot méinyotio mbwe fém ménde kés em a so eméinde anoghét a funaghét minde tárfár kétándmé féfene marataye raméghta. 11 Yémon so fém eyátote wemár féyotaro ménát marataye raméghan em méinyotio efghon, ménát tárfár árém so kánjo yarametat Ngánjáne ménamén féfene raméghmén árké téfe tambénta ewinjongi. 12 Yéné ásáfoghmén fémofem árké tafrotati yau Ngánjánene árfene ménde wifoghétro, wénde wéi téfunati ramégh tárfár yame kánjo Ngánjáne. 13 A ménamén fém kayaufotati fémyo yéfefaf, féfene ásáfogham eméindai tárfár árét ndimbal kwayaghé so yawangotat Ngánjáne ménamén féfene wafroghyam Kerisoene mer simén, árkémamén norayati, a féfene marataye ramégh yémafé a méinyotio árfé. 14 A féyo kénjkam uwéghafé fá so Ngánjánafé norayat féfeyot ménamén yéné warafaréghofnar ngárám Ngánjánam ewaramai féfe. 15 Yéndfem kánjo yaramétam Ngánjáne ménamén yéné warafaréghofnar raméghmén!
english: Now may he who supplies seed to the sower and bread for food , supply and multiply your seed for sowing , and increase the fruits of your righteousness ,
you being enriched in everything for all generosity, which produces thanksgiving to God through us .
For this service of giving that you perform not only makes up for lack among the saints, but abounds also through much giving of thanks to God ,
seeing that through the proof given by this service , they glorify God for the obedience of your confession to the Good News of Christ and for the generosity of your contribution to them and to all ,
while they themselves also , with supplication on your behalf , yearn for you by reason of the exceeding grace of God in you .
Now thanks be to God for his unspeakable gift !

nama: Yéndo, Folém yérametan ómnengégh féfefaf efe métar wém njam yénd wém fémafé, wénde muyafé wém féfeyot njam yénd wém yukér. Ménaye Kerisoene métare a meryame 2 yéndon ewamnendan fémofem yau wéméindati muyat njam yénd wéném. Ménamén mat wém ndené yéndon so yafrotan muyafé yéfefaf efe norayat ndené yénd násáfotam kétándmé mband maratoene mwighata. 3 Efalo yéné yém ndené yénd mband maratan yénmor, wénde yéndfem yau yafrotam ásmégh kétándmé mband maratoene mwighata. 4 Yéné fimb yéndfem seweretam téfene ásmégh kénjún yau yéné em mband maratoene fimb, wénde Ngánjanene waftafé fimb, árkéméné yéndfem eweretam ménát wirorghét táikér awémarogh sifayé. Yéndfem ewironam unyégh amrorégh. 5 Yéndfem ewewonam yuwot méinyotio tuktuk yam árké nanote Ngánjánene matyam ngiot a yéndfem méinyotio mwighé ewangotam kétán Kerisoefaf. 6 A yéné soramé fém njam káyátongi efaloe, yénd so afrengéghkaf yéném tékratan kémghét fá efe náyáretat.
english: Now I Paul , myself , entreat you by the humility and gentleness of Christ , I who in your presence am lowly among you , but being absent am bold toward you .
Yes , I beg you that I may not , when present , show courage with the confidence with which I intend to be bold against some , who consider us to be walking according to the flesh .
For though we walk in the flesh , we don’t wage war according to the flesh ;
for the weapons of our warfare are not of the flesh , but mighty before God to the throwing down of strongholds ,
throwing down imaginations and every high thing that is exalted against the knowledge of God and bringing every thought into captivity to the obedience of Christ ,
and being in readiness to avenge all disobedience when your obedience is made full .

nama: Fém néretat faru rokaran. Efe naramangi fáyo kétán Kerisoefaf? Mer, fá so kemnangi wéikor yéfenjomén, ménamén yénd Kerisoefaf yéném ndené fété fá kés eném. 8 Yénd yau wáiwái wém, njam yénd tuktukan wém ámbmén mindefifi ménamén muyé árké Yuram yénmaramayéng téfe. Wénde téfene muyé eramai féfe tukét, yau tirarai féfe yuwot. 9 Yau nemnati ndené yéndo kar fém férférafé eyáton tane férne. 10 Ámb ár so korayangé, "Folene férén sem kértaye a muyafé, wénde njam fá yém yéna yéndfé fifie, fá siyém njangénnjangén a yáne si sem fifiofnar!" 11 Ndené ár so mat káyátongé ámb yau fénaté yénayan yém némé yéndfem yéfarotam téfenjo férnan njam yénd yukér yéném a némé yéndfem so ewafrotam njam yénd yéném kété fémofé.
english: Do you look at things only as they appear in front of your face ? If anyone trusts in himself that he is Christ ’s, let him consider this again with himself , that even as he is Christ ’s, so we also are Christ ’s.
For even if I boast somewhat abundantly concerning our authority , which the Lord gave for building you up and not for casting you down , I will not be ashamed,
that I may not seem as if I desire to terrify you by my letters .
For , “ His letters ”, they say , “ are weighty and strong , but his bodily presence is weak, and his speech is despised .”
Let such a person consider this , that what we are in word by letters when we are absent, such are we also in deed when we are present .

nama: Yénd yau nátémndam o naufotam yéndio yémafé efe nawarsat fáyo. Nderé matyamofnar em! Yémofem ewafarotat yéfenjo matyam aufoghét, a fá nawafénmetat fáyo yéfenjo matyame! 13 Wénde ndené yénd kés yéném, yénd yau so nawauyotam minde ámb sifayat, wénde so yém ásáfogh fúan Ngánjánam árké té yékmayéng téfeyot, a yénayan yafein téfene ásáfogh féfe kénjún. 14 A táf fém em yéné fúan, yénd yau néngférmetam yéné fú njam yénd yénmormén féfefaf, njam yéndfem yénérsam mer si Kerisoenemén. 15 Féyo yénd yau nawauyotam ásáfogh ndené ámb árém té tafrotat fú Ngánjánam árké té yékmai. Wénde yénd nemnam nde féfene ndimbal mwighé mé so nanote a yéndfem mé so yafrotam minde ndimbal ásáfogh féfe kénjún, túmén yéné fúan Ngánjánam árké té yénmakmayéng. 16 Féyo yéndfem fété so yaitotam mer si ámb ndimbal yuwomé néférmai fém. Yénd yau ménde wém sái nawauyotam ásáfoghmén árké té násáfotamém tándái ámb árfene yuwan.
english: For we are not bold to number or compare ourselves with some of those who commend themselves . But they themselves , measuring themselves by themselves , and comparing themselves with themselves , are without understanding .
But we will not boast beyond proper limits, but within the boundaries with which God appointed to us , which reach even to you .
For we don’ t stretch ourselves too much, as though we didn’ t reach to you . For we came even as far as to you with the Good News of Christ ,
not boasting beyond proper limits in other men ’ s labors , but having hope that as your faith grows, we will be abundantly enlarged by you in our sphere of influence,
so as to preach the Good News even to the parts beyond you , not to boast in what someone else has already done.

nama: Wénde ndené Buk si noraye, "Efe ménde yém tuktukot so tuktuk yéfande némé Ngánjánam ewafrote." 18 Efe efalo mer yém? Yéné yau yém ár efe nemna merro fáyo. Yéné yém ár efe Yuré nemne merro yánemén.
english: But “ he who boasts , let him boast in the Lord .”
For it isn’ t he who commends himself who is approved , but whom the Lord commends .

nama: Yénd nemnan fémofem so wamarotati yénd, táf njam yénd némbnare onon wém. Néméwét, yénd kwamarotangi! 2 Yénd naweramnjan féfeyot ngánjánene waramnjaye. Fém ndené em njúnnjúnofnar yuwagia mérésnit endefaf yénd unyéghofnar si norayayén awerghét kétán ámbiro ároefafetro, Kerisoefaf. 3 Yénd férfér wém ménamén féfene mwighé so em nawaghnat a fémofem so efrangotati féfenjo afoghkaf a njúnnjúnofnar aramégh yam kétán Kerisoefaf yéné end kénjúmé If té yarsotam Sáifram unyéghe. 4 Fémofem áuwéghafé tafángongi yéné ár efe yéném féfefaf a nafrotat fénaté Yesuenemén, yau yéné Yesu, endenemén yéndfem nafrotam. Fémofem yumyoyénd fénaté mbérmbér a mer si méinyo fénatayo kétándmé Ngánján Mbérmbér, a mer si fémofem árké té yumyoyénd téfeta!
english: I wish that you would bear with me in a little foolishness, but indeed you do bear with me .
For I am jealous over you with a godly jealousy . For I promised you in marriage to one husband, that I might present you as a pure virgin to Christ .
But I am afraid that somehow, as the serpent deceived Eve in his craftiness , so your minds might be corrupted from the simplicity that is in Christ .

For if he who comes preaches another Jesus whom we didn’ t preach , or if you receive a different spirit which you didn’ t receive , or a different “ good news ” which you didn’ t accept , you put up with that well enough .

nama: Yénd yau nemnan ndené yénd wém soramé yéfefaf efe emndetat "minde waftafé Yesuene muyafé ár!" 6 Yénd yau watametaménd siot, wénde táfaf yém matyam. Yéndfem té safén féfe tawakmetam féfe méinyotio efghon a méinyotio ende. 7 Yéndon yau faiot tawamenendan fém njam yéndon táitotan mer si Ngánjánene féfeyot. Yénd yuwan kawewonan ménát fém so eyátotan minde mer. Yéné mámáfi témorwén tayot? 8 Njamandio yénd kásáfotawén féfe kénjúmé, yénd fai kafrotawét ámb Yesuene mérnam. Yéndon oro tafrotawén yéfefaf, ménát siot, ménát féfe wáutárghét. 9 A yéné kwéfon yénd njam kwémorwén fémofé yéndon yau mámé mwighat taméindawén fém wáutárghét njam yénd maniot káronjawén. Efalo yátogh ár efe enmormén kétándmé Makedoniata yémofem enérsaménd tayot méinyotio rokar yénd némat ménde kwémorwén. Ndené frondeyan a soramé yénd yau so kérté wém féfeyot. 10 Ndené fété Kerisoene efalo si tane kénjún, yénd unyéghofnar si norayan ndené yéné tuktuk tane sian yau so métare yém yénamé méinyotio Akaya yuwomé. 11 Yénd norayan tane uwégh kar yau yém féfeyot? Yau, Ngánján mat yém tane uwégh féfeyot!
english: For I reckon that I am not at all behind the very best apostles.
But though I am unskilled in speech , yet I am not unskilled in knowledge . No , in every way we have been revealed to you in all things .
Or did I commit a sin in humbling myself that you might be exalted , because I preached to you God ’s Good News free of charge?
I robbed other assemblies , taking wages from them that I might serve you .

When I was present with you and was in need , I wasn’ t a burden on anyone , for the brothers, when they came from Macedonia , supplied the measure of my need . In everything I kept myself from being burdensome to you , and I will continue to do so .
As the truth of Christ is in me , no one will stop me from this boasting in the regions of Achaia.
Why ? Because I don’ t love you ? God knows .

nama: Yénd mé so wafroghan wéngém némé yéndon yafrotan sénonjo, ménát ndené so engénfetat ámb unyégh Yesuene muyafé árfene ásáfogh árkéméné fá tuktukan norayat nde fá násáfotat ndenéyameyo yéndfem kés ewafrotam. 13 Yéné ár sem unyégh Yesuene muyafé ár em, unyégh ásáfogh ár, efe nuindat yéfenjo ásáfoghmén a nafurnat ménát so néretat ndené Kerisoene muyafé ár kar em. 14 Yau néworsota, ménamén Sáifér fáyo so nafurne ndenanit Kwayaghane njafar si résagh ár kar yém fá. 15 Yau sélngwéle yéné yammén em njam yáne faiofnar ásáfogh ár ndenáyo nafurnat nde mbarkánd yamoene faiofnar ásáfogh ár kar em. Yéfene yatogh siyém ndené so yém ndernáye yéfene wafroghyam ewam. Folene tékrat ndené fété Yesuene muyafé ár
english: But what I do , that I will continue to do , that I may cut off opportunity from those who desire an opportunity, that in which they boast , they may be recognized just like us .
For such men are false apostles , deceitful workers , masquerading as Christ ’s apostles .
And no wonder , for even Satan masquerades as an angel of light .
It is no great thing therefore if his servants also masquerade as servants of righteousness , whose end will be according to their works .

nama: Yénd kor norayan, yau ámb ár so nemne yénd kar wém onon. Wénde njam téu warawenati, mé kumyongi onon árnit, tane némbnar tuktuk téfnan. 17 Némé norayan sénonjo siyém yau yéné némat Yuré ménde yém tafaf siot, wénde ndenanit onon árnit. 18 A ménamén tárfár ár efe em tuktukan mband maratoene yam yafroghan, yéndon so yafrotan ndenéyameyo. 19 Fém fémyo sem káfeté mwighafé, féyo fémofem eumyotati onon ár áuwéghafé! 20 Fémofem yénmiyotati ámb ár emo ewafarete fém o yérse mer féfenemén o tarnyangé fém o yuwot efanda fém o tasmangé sáfan. 21 Yénd wém wáiwái yénd so korayangén yénd ténmorwén njangénnjangén yéné yam wafroghét!
english: I say again , let no one think me foolish. But if so , yet receive me as foolish, that I also may boast a little .
That which I speak , I don’ t speak according to the Lord , but as in foolishness, in this confidence of boasting .
Seeing that many boast after the flesh , I will also boast .
For you bear with the foolish gladly , being wise .
For you bear with a man if he brings you into bondage , if he devours you , if he takes you captive, if he exalts himself , or if he strikes you on the face .
To my shame, I speak as though we had been weak. Yet in whatever way anyone is bold ( I speak in foolishness), I am bold also .

nama: Fá em Ibru ár? Yénd fété wém. Fá em Israil ár? Yénd fété wém. Fá em Ebaamene ákiambum? Yénd fété wém. 23 Fá fété em Kerisoene faiofnar ásáfogh ár? Yénd norayan mwighafnar árnit. Yénd fété wém tukényo. Yénd té kásáfotan mindefifi, yénd té kwélawangérwén kwéfkwéf méngon tárfár mbinotmé, yénd té wéfmotaménd minde tukén, a yénd té kwémorwén kér kaka túmén. 24 Faif mbinotmé 39ot wéfmotaménd Ju árém. 25 Nambinotmé yénd wéfmotaménd wéne Rom árém, a ámbirotaro wíme wéfiyátotaménd a nambinotmé yénd té wémormén bout olitogh kénjúmé, a ámbiro sémbár a efogh kwémorwén arakafan. 26 Tane tárfár arengégh kénjún yénd té kérté kéféramé kwémorwén a oro téfnárafeta, kértayan tanjo árta a Téndo árta. Kété kérté témorwén ndimbal yuwomé, kérté fanfne yuwomé, kérté tukén árakafamé, kérté kétándmé unyégh efalo yátogh árfeta. 27 Yénd násáfotan mindefifi a témbé, túmén yénd kwémorwén kéméghofnar. Yénd kwémorwén nu a njamke siogh a túmén tane njamke yau kor kwamorwén. Yénd minde krufér a firo kwémorwén. 28 A yau so eufanan ámb yam, méinyotio efogh yénd wém kérté yam wétumndat tane méghmégh siyém méinyotio Yesuene mérén árfenemén. 29 Njam ámb ár yém njangénnjangén, yénd ndenáyo wém njangénnjangén. Njam ámb ár yaufiyam kénjún yém, yénd tikfan kuyan.
english: Are they Hebrews ? So am I . Are they Israelites ? So am I . Are they the offspring of Abraham? So am I .
Are they servants of Christ ? ( I speak as one beside himself.) I am more so : in labors more abundantly , in prisons more abundantly , in stripes above measure , and in deaths often .
Five times I received forty stripes minus one from the Jews .
Three times I was beaten with rods . Once I was stoned . Three times I suffered shipwreck . I have been a night and a day in the deep .

I have been in travels often , perils of rivers , perils of robbers , perils from my countrymen , perils from the Gentiles , perils in the city , perils in the wilderness , perils in the sea , perils among false brothers;
in labor and travail , in watchings often , in hunger and thirst , in fastings often , and in cold and nakedness .
Besides those things that are outside, there is that which presses on me daily : anxiety for all the assemblies .
Who is weak, and I am not weak? Who is caused to stumble , and I don’t burn with indignation?

nama: Njam yénd tuktukan wém, yénd so tuktukan wém rokarmén árkéménayam yufane tane njangénnjangén. 31 Ngánján a Yuré Yesuene Afé, efe so yuwetam tuot, fá mat yém yénd nafrotan efalo. 32 Njam yénd kwémorwén Damaskos kénjún, ngafana Warsagh ár Aretasene mbanmbanan yémon ewakayoi Damaskosmén wanjengégh ár ndimbal tesen sésafneyan ménát ta werghét. 33 Wénde yénd kwéwonawét mbéf yafe yuwot wím warengégh áráke fénemé a nawanjaryén yá tambén.
english: If I must boast , I will boast of the things that concern my weakness.
