The God and Father of the Lord Jesus Christ , he who is blessed forever more , knows that I don’ t lie .
In Damascus the governor under King Aretas guarded the Damascenes ’ city , desiring to arrest me .
I was let down in a basket through a window by the wall , and escaped his hands .

nama: Yénd so tuktukan wém. Ndemamén némndafi yau yém winjoghét, yénd so norayan ghékfe waingéghmén a uyafoghmén árké waramayéng Yuram. 2 Yénd mat wém ámb efalo yátogh ár efe tamorwén 14 yunjéf frondeyo uyoyéng minde tukét njafarot. Yénd mat yau wém yéné fété nufrotam o mé ghékfe waingégh yémormén. Mé Ngánjánro mat yém. 3 Yénd mat wém yéné ár, yémormén fifie o fénataye kétamé fifita yénd yau mat wém, wénde mé Ngánjánro mat yém. 4 Fá yémormén yuyoi áuwégh méngotuot a kété si náyárai yéné rokarmén árkéméné sie yau so tékém, yéné rokarmén ároene mbírmbíram yau so noraye. 5 Féyo yénd so tuktukan wém yéné ároenemén, wénde yénd yau so tuktukan wém tanjomén, wénde yéné rokarménro árkéménayam uyafote yénd wém njangénnjangén. 6 Efaloe, yénd njam kemnawén yéndo awarmboghét tanemén, yénd yau so norayan ndenanit onon árnit, ménamén yénd so norayan. Wénde yénd nawewonan yéndio yau nawarmbotan. Yénd nemnan ndené mété táf ár nemnat tane simén a tane efalo wafroghmén a fá so norayat ménamén tane ámb wafroghyammén yéné árkéméné yau yémofem tafandat a yémofem so wuyotat a tane yétkwén so tukén yém fifiofnar.
english: It is doubtless not profitable for me to boast , but I will come to visions and revelations of the Lord .
I know a man in Christ who was caught up into the third heaven fourteen years ago — whether in the body , I don’ t know , or whether out of the body , I don’ t know ; God knows .
I know such a man ( whether in the body , or outside of the body , I don’ t know ; God knows ),
how he was caught up into Paradise and heard unspeakable words , which it is not lawful for a man to utter .
On behalf of such a one I will boast , but on my own behalf I will not boast , except in my weaknesses.
For if I would desire to boast , I will not be foolish; for I will speak the truth. But I refrain , so that no man may think more of me than that which he sees in me or hears from me .

nama: Wénde ménát sái kékmbon tuktukta ménamén tárfár mer rokar yéndon tafandawén, yénd kwémorwén waramayénd fifiyan ndémkefé wét, árké nufrote ndené Sáiféroene si résagh ár ménát ta ngiot a sái kwékmbongi kétándmé tuktukta. 8 Nambinotmé yéndon Ngánjánafé koraiwam Yurafaf yénémamén a yómnendayén fá ménát sái titérmbongai. 9 Wénde yáne wangogh yémormén, "Tane ngárám siyém féyotaro yém feyot, méné tane wafté siyém ndimbalfifi njam fém ném njangénnjangén." Yénd swém mindefifi náuwétan, sái wém tuktukan tane njangénnjangénmén, ménát yéndon so yayáretan Kerisoene wafté so násáfote tafaf. 10 Yénd náuwetan njangénnjangénmén, wasálighmén, táikér yammén, ngimén, náuwéghmén Kerisoene téfnan. Njam yénd wém njangénnjangén, féyo yénd muyafé wém. Folene emarégh efalo yátogh árfeyot Korintén
english: By reason of the exceeding greatness of the revelations, that I should not be exalted excessively , a thorn in the flesh was given to me : a messenger of Satan to torment me , that I should not be exalted excessively .
Concerning this thing , I begged the Lord three times that it might depart from me .
He has said to me , “ My grace is sufficient for you , for my power is made perfect in weakness.” Most gladly therefore I will rather glory in my weaknesses, that the power of Christ may rest on me .
Therefore I take pleasure in weaknesses, in injuries, in necessities, in persecutions , and in distresses , for Christ ’s sake . For when I am weak, then am I strong .

nama: Yénd nimndan ndenanit onon ár, wénde fémofem té kwénméindati yénd wafroghét. Fém sof em efe so nafrotati meryam tanemén. Yénd wém fifiofnar, wénde yénd nátémndan yémafé "efalo Yesuene muyafé árfé." 12 Tárfár sélngwélafé yam a sunsunafé yam, yéné yamam efalo yiyátote ndené yénd wém Yesuene muyafé ár yéndon tawafrotan féfene kénjún ndimbal métar yamafé. 13 Némé yéndo tafrotan ámb Yesuene mérnat ndené yéndon yau tafrotan féfeyot, yéndon yau kértan ekman fém mani wáutárghét? Kawayangi tane ménamén féfefaf tafrotan yaufi!
english: I have become foolish in boasting. You compelled me , for I ought to have been commended by you , for I am in no way inferior to the very best apostles, though I am nothing .
Truly the signs of an apostle were worked among you in all perseverance , in signs and wonders and mighty works .
For what is there in which you were made inferior to the rest of the assemblies , unless it is that I myself was not a burden to you ? Forgive me this wrong!

nama: Sénonjo yéné siyém nambiomén yénd wéikor kénangotan féfe yafoghét, a yénd yau so nómnendan ámb féfefaf, ménamén yénd ménde wém féfefaf, yau féfene mani. Ambumtértéram yau so nusénat yéfenjo afafet a amafet, wénde amaf a afafem so nusénat yéfenjo ambumtértérat. 15 Yénd so náuwetan sái ewitan némé méinyotio tane em, a yéndio karaman ndenáyo, ménát sái ewáutánan féfeyot. So féfene uwégh tayot yuwon so yém ménamén tane uwégh so yém mindefifi?
english: Behold , this is the third time I am ready to come to you , and I will not be a burden to you ; for I seek not your possessions, but you . For the children ought not to save up for the parents , but the parents for the children .
I will most gladly spend and be spent for your souls . If I love you more abundantly , am I loved the less ?

nama: Fém so kuwangongi ndené yénd yau kwémorwén kérté féfeyot. Wénde ámb árom so korayangé ndené yénd kwémorwén unyégh ár, a ernyayén fém unyégh sie. 17 Yéndon té térsan mer rokar féfe tambén yéné si ghany téfnárafeta yéndon árké té engwafaretamén? 18 Yéndon yamnendayén Taitus álighét, a yéndon yafaretayén ámb efalo yátogh ár yémafé. Fém nemnati Taitusém yanai mer rokar féfenemén? Fá a yénd ámbiro mwighaye ewafrowam ámbrérero!
english: Even so , I myself didn’t burden you . But you might say that being crafty , I caught you with deception.
Did I take advantage of you by anyone of those whom I have sent to you ?
I exhorted Titus , and I sent the brother with him . Did Titus take any advantage of you ? Didn’ t we walk in the same spirit ? Didn’ t we walk in the same steps ?

nama: Fém nemnati ndené méinyotio yénd mé nawamarotam yéndio féfe sáfrére. Yau! Yénd té kénorayam Ngánjánene sáfrére ndené fété efe em Kerisoene kénjún. Tikéfafé fútaréf, méinyotio yam yéndfem ewafrotam yéné kufrote féfe wáutárghét. 20 Yénd férfér wém njam yénd kufarén yéndo so tawinjon fém fénatayo kétándmé némat yénd ménde wém fém fiya tam a fémofem so kwinjongi yénd fénatayo kétándmé némat fém ménde em yénd fiya kwém. Yénd férfér wém ndené kété em amrorégh, waramnjagh, nékw, a awamanjarégh, yau si orayégh, warunyégh, tukal a isrambogh. 21 Yénd férfér wém ndené ámb káye yénd njam wéngém tane Ngánjánam so kwéworngé yénd féfene sáfrére, a yénd so ye nendan tárfár árfenemén efe yaufiyaman emormén tándái a yau nawengoyénd yémofem árké ewafrotaménd yéfenjo yaufi wal mwighé a yaufi walyam.
english: Again, do you think that we are excusing ourselves to you ? In the sight of God we speak in Christ . But all things , beloved, are for your edifying .

For I am afraid that perhaps when I come , I might find you not the way I want to , and that I might be found by you as you don’t desire , that perhaps there would be strife , jealousy , outbursts of anger , factions, slander , whisperings , proud thoughts, or riots,

that again when I come my God would humble me before you , and I would mourn for many of those who have sinned before now , and not repented of the uncleanness, sexual immorality , and lustfulness which they committed .

nama: Sénonjo siyém nambinotmé yénd wéikor kénangotan féfe yafoghét. Buk si noraye, "Némé awánangogh sái em so yém yénayan sómbio o nambio ghékéf fandagh árfene yátoghe." 2 Yéndon té mat engiyátoyén njam yénd fémafé témorwén yénamayo efghon. Sénonjo yéndon wéikor yéfertan njam yukér wém. Tane angoghan yéndo yau so ewarawenan fá emofem yaufiyam ewafrotaménd fronde o ámb kés em. 3 Yéndon so tawaraman féfe méinyotio téfén fém kés ménde em ndené Keriso sái noraya tane kénjúmé. Fá njam násáfota féfefaf, fá yau yém njangénnjangén, wénde tuyafongé yáne wafté féfe kénjún. 4 Ndemanén fá yékmayénd kéran wafatarégh wénan njangénnjangéne, wénde fá sénonjo ghérsé yém ménaye Ngánjánene waftaye. Keriso kénjún yénd yémafé ndenéyameyo njangénnjangén yéném, wénde téfene awarnyégh kénjún fémafé yéndfem yéfalotam Ngánjánene wafté yáne ghérsé kénjún.
english: This is the third time I am coming to you . “ At the mouth of two or three witnesses shall every word be established .”

I have warned previously, and I warn again , as when I was present the second time , so now , being absent, I write to those who have sinned before now and to all the rest that if I come again , I will not spare ,
seeing that you seek a proof of Christ who speaks in me who is not weak, but is powerful in you .
For he was crucified through weakness, yet he lives through the power of God . For we also are weak in him , but we will live with him through the power of God toward you .

nama: Kakmangi fémyo ufoghan a namotati fémyo, ménát winjoghét némé fém emor ndimbal mwighayan o yau. Efaloe fém mat em ndené Keriso Yesu siyém féfe kénjún yém? Táfandro fém njam kuyangi. 6 Yéndon efalo eyátotan fém mat em ndené yénd yau uyégh ár yéném. 7 Yénd Ngánjánafé noraiwém ndené fém yau so ewafrotati yaufi. Yéné yém yau ménaye yuyafotam kar yénd yéném féyotaro, wéndende fémofem so ewafrotati némé mbarkánd yam em, ndemamén yénd so yéném uyégh ár. 8 Yéndfem yau so ámb yam ewafrotam fénataye efalofaf wénde efaloyotro so. 9 Yénd náuwetam njam yénd njangénnjangén yéném wénde fém sem muyafé. A yénd wéi Ngánjánafé noraiwém ndené fém so féwénféwénofnar em. 10 Yéné téfnan yéndon yéfarotan yéné férén njamandio yénd yukér wém féfeta. Yéné yém ménát njam yénd kufarén yéndo yau so máméghéraye tawafngon fém yéné waftaye árké Yuram té waramayéng ta féfe wanoghét, yau ménát sái ewironan fém yuwot.
english: Examine your own selves , whether you are in the faith . Test your own selves . Or don’ t you know about your own selves , that Jesus Christ is in you ?— unless indeed you are disqualified.
But I hope that you will know that we aren’t disqualified.
Now I pray to God that you do no evil ; not that we may appear approved , but that you may do that which is honorable , though we may seem to have failed .
For we can do nothing against the truth, but for the truth.
For we rejoice when we are weak and you are strong . We also pray for this : your becoming perfect .
For this cause I write these things while absent, that I may not deal sharply when present , according to the authority which the Lord gave me for building up and not for tearing down .

nama: Ambinomén, tane fútaréf, yawo! Náuwetati! Nanotati sotafé. Náyáretati tane wawanjagh si. Miya em ámbiro mwighayan a krufrát emor. A Ngánjánene uwégh a krufrát so mé yém féfefaf.
english: Finally , brothers, rejoice ! Be perfected. Be comforted . Be of the same mind . Live in peace , and the God of love and peace will be with you .

nama: Áuwéghafé nafángotati féfe kénjún ásneghafé krufráte.
english: Greet one another with a holy kiss .

nama: Méinyotio Ngánjánene árém yéna enwawatembangi yéfenjo áuwégh.
english: All the saints greet you .

nama: Yuré Yesu Kerisoene ngárám, Ngánjánene uwégh a Ngánján Mbérmbéroene awarnyégh mé so yém féfefaf méinyotio.
english: The grace of the Lord Jesus Christ, God’s love, and the fellowship of the Holy Spirit be with you all. Amen.

nama: Yéné férén siyém ta tambén, Fol. Yénd wémotai ménát Yesuene muyafé árot. Yéné ásáfogh siyém yau yénmormén kétándmé ár mérénta o ároene si muyata, wénde kétamé Yesu Keriso a Afé Ngánján, emo Yesu yanoi kérta. 2 Yénd a tane fútar yénmatembangém yéné férén féfefaf, Yesuene mérén Galasia yuwomé.
english: Paul , an apostle— not from men , nor through man , but through Jesus Christ , and God the Father , who raised him from the dead —
and all the brothers who are with me , to the assemblies of Galatia :

nama: Afé Ngánján a Yuré Yesu Kerisom so tawaramangé féfe ngárám a krufrát. 4 Keriso fáyo naramai téfene yaufiyammén. Yémo yéné yafrote ménát yénd sái ténmanjarngé kétándmé sénonjo yaufi ár satata. Yéné fiyém némé téfene Afé Ngánján ménde témorwén yémo yafrotam. 5 Ngánjáne so yém minde ndimbal yétkwén tuot! Efalo. Yéna yém mé ámbiro mer si, yau ámb
english: Grace to you and peace from God the Father and our Lord Jesus Christ ,
who gave himself for our sins, that he might deliver us out of this present evil age, according to the will of our God and Father —
to whom be the glory forever and ever . Amen.

nama: Ngánjánam ewaferyéng fém ménát Kerisoene ngárám kénjún so emor. Wénde yénd áuwéghofnar namndayén féfenemén ménamén fémofem wékeyero yéngkenati a fémofem yumyotati ámb fénataye mer si. 7 Efaloe, yéna yau fénataye mer si yém, wénde yénd norayan ndené ménamén yéna em ámb ár emofem eméindat fém warsoghét a yéta erametat ménát wengoghét Kerisoene mer sita. 8 Wénde njam té yéndfem o njafar si résagh árom té táitote mer si árké yém fénataye kétándmé yéndfem kés táitotam mer si fronde, fá so tawafalngongé! 9 Yénd té kénorayam fronde, wénde sénonjo wéikor yénd norayan: Emo njam yáitota mer si féfefaf, wénde yéné yém fénatayo kétándmé yéndon kés ewaramayén féfe, fá so tawafalngongé!
english: I marvel that you are so quickly deserting him who called you in the grace of Christ to a different “ good news ”,
but there isn’ t another “ good news .” Only there are some who trouble you and want to pervert the Good News of Christ .
But even though we , or an angel from heaven , should preach to you any “ good news ” other than that which we preached to you , let him be cursed.
As we have said before , so I now say again : if any man preaches to you any “ good news ” other than that which you received , let him be cursed.

nama: Yénd njam norayan yéné yammén, yéndon yau áuwéghét eméindan ár, wénde Ngánjánro yéndo áuwéhgét yéméindan. Njam yéndon ár áuwéghétro eméindan, féyo yénd yau so wém Kerisoene faiofnar ásáfogh ár. Ndernáye Fol namndai Yesuene muyafé ár
english: For am I now seeking the favor of men , or of God ? Or am I striving to please men ? For if I were still pleasing men , I wouldn’ t be a servant of Christ .

nama: Tane fútaréf, yénd ménde wém fém sái mat em ndené yéné mer si árké yéndo yaitotan yau ár wafroghmén yém. 12 Yéndon yau yanayén árta, o emo yau yénd watametam. Yesu Keriso fáyo nauyafoi tafaf.
english: But I make known to you , brothers, concerning the Good News which was preached by me , that it is not according to man .
For I didn’t receive it from man, nor was I taught it , but it came to me through revelation of Jesus Christ .

nama: Fém mat em ndené yéndon némé tawafrotawén fronde, njam yéndon tawaitotawén Ju árfene wafrogh yam. Yéndon máméghéraye tawasérmbotawén Yesuene mérén a tarametawén wirorghét. 14 Yénd táf minde kásáfotawén tawaitotawén tane ákiafene wafroghyam. Ménayan tawaitotawén Ju árfene wafrogh yam, yéndo tawaindawén tane réremén ár efe tamorwén Ju ár a yéndo tawaitotawén minde taikre. 15 Wénde Ngánjánam yénd waferyéng amane fút kénjún a wémotai yénd yáne ngáráme. 16 Ngánjánam mwighé yéfaronam ménát safén yufaryéng yáne Ambum tafaf, ménát yéndon so yaitotan mer si yánemén kétán Téndo árfet. Njam Ngánjánam waferyéng ménát yéné ásáfoghét, yénd yau yénémamén korayawén ámb árfé. 17 Yénd yau wéngmormén Jerusalemét ménát sái tanfandawén efe fronde náyátoyénd Yesuene muyafé ár yénd soramé. Wénde yénd wékeye wéngmormén Arabia yuwot, a soramé nénangoyén Damaskos tesenot.
english: For you have heard of my way of living in time past in the Jews’ religion, how that beyond measure I persecuted the assembly of God and ravaged it .
I advanced in the Jews’ religion beyond many of my own age among my countrymen , being more exceedingly zealous for the traditions of my fathers .
But when it was the good pleasure of God , who separated me from my mother ’s womb and called me through his grace ,
to reveal his Son in me , that I might preach him among the Gentiles , I didn’ t immediately confer with flesh and blood,
nor did I go up to Jerusalem to those who were apostles before me , but I went away into Arabia. Then I returned to Damascus .

nama: Nambio yunjéf soramé yénd wéngmormén Jerusalemét ménát mat so káyáteyayém Fitafé, a kété yénmorarmén Fitafé sómbio Safat. 19 Wénde njam yénd kété kwémorwén, yéndo yau yinjoyén ámb Yesuene muyafé ár, wénde Jemsro, efe yém Yurane néngén. 20 Ngánján mat yém ndené némé yéndon yéfarotan féfefaf siyém efalofifi yém. Yénd yau nuindan féfefaf!
english: Then after three years I went up to Jerusalem to visit Peter , and stayed with him fifteen days .
But of the other apostles I saw no one except James , the Lord ’ s brother.
Now about the things which I write to you , behold , before God , I ’m not lying .

nama: Soraméfifi, yénd wiyotam kétán Siria a Silisia marat yuwot. 22 Yéné kwéfon ár Yesuene mérén kénjún kété Judian emo yau wéfángoi o yinjoi tane sáf. 23 Wénde fá mé siro káyáretawét tanemén: "Yéné ár Fol, emo yénd túmén ténmasérmbotau sénonjo si yaitote ménamén ndimbal mwighamén yéné árké fronde wirorghét térametau!" 24 Féyo yémofem tuyotawét Ngánján tanemén.
english: Then I came to the regions of Syria and Cilicia .
I was still unknown by face to the assemblies of Judea which were in Christ ,
but they only heard, “ He who once persecuted us now preaches the faith that he once tried to destroy .”
So they glorified God in me .

nama: 14 yunjéf soramé, yénd néwanoyém wéikor Jerusalemét Banabasfé, a Taitusfé mérne téngmorwén. 2 Yénd néwanoyén ménamén Ngánjánam wauyafoi ta ndené so kuwano. Njam yénd kété kwémorwén yéndfem áumengégh tanangayém Yesuene mérén sénko árfé a tawawafenawén yéné mer sioene fifi árké yéndon táitotawén Téndo árfet, ménat sái kwiyátongayénd. Yénd yau ménde wém tane ásáfogh sái em frondemén a sénonjomén fifiofnar. 3 Taitusfé yénd ténérwén, a ndemamén fá Grik ár témorwén, emo yau táfáretau ghéngan néfghét. 4 Yénd korayan féfefaf ménamén ámb unyégh ár kwankwane nufnyayénd téfene mérén kénjút. Yémofem tafénmetawét téfene yuwek ghérsamén árké yém téfefaf Yesu Keriso kénjún a yénd yénméindayénd sái faiofnar ásáfogh ár yéném yéfene nákfaf. 5 Wénde yénd yau namyoyém yéfefaf efoghféneféneyan, ménát sái mé yém mer sioene efalo féfefaf.
english: Then after a period of fourteen years I went up again to Jerusalem with Barnabas, taking Titus also with me .

I went up by revelation, and I laid before them the Good News which I preach among the Gentiles , but privately before those who were respected, for fear that I might be running , or had run , in vain .
But not even Titus , who was with me , being a Greek , was compelled to be circumcised .
This was because of the false brothers secretly brought in , who stole in to spy out our liberty which we have in Christ Jesus , that they might bring us into bondage ,
to whom we gave no place in the way of subjection , not for an hour , that the truth of the Good News might continue with you .

nama: Ámb ár, fá nemnat ndené limánégh ár kar em, yau némndafi yéfghayénd tane sifaf. Yéné yau nérete kértaye tafaf némé fá em ndimbalfifi o yau, ménamén Ngánjánam yau yénmaufénmete farutaye. 7 Wéndende, fá yayamngoyénd ndené Ngánjánam ásáfogh waramai mer si waitoghét Téndo árét, ndené fété Fitai kés ásáfogh yaramai mer si waitoghét Ju árét. 8 Ngánján kásáfotau Fitane kénjúmé sái tafrota yáne ásáfogh ndené Yesuene muyafé ár Ju árét, a Ngánján wéi kásáfotau ta kénjúmé sái tafrota tane ásáfogh ndené Yesuene muyafé ár Téndo árét. 9 Jems, Fité, a Jon, efe mat eyátoyénd limánégh árot, ewayamngoyénd ndené Ngánjánam waramai yéné fénaté ásáfogh, féyo yémofem yényátoyénd fútar ngángé raméghe. Yéndfem mwighé ámbiro yiyátoyém ndené Banabas a yénd so násáfowam Téndo árfefafmé a fá so násáfotat Ju árfefafmé. 10 Ámbiro yéfene ómnengégh témorwén ndené yéndfem so ewáutánam áronjagh ár yéfene mérén kénjún, árké yam fifiot yénd ménde kwémorwén wafroghét. Folém sote yénfai Fité
english: But from those who were reputed to be important— whatever they were , it makes no difference to me ; God doesn’ t show partiality to man — they , I say , who were respected imparted nothing to me ,
but to the contrary , when they saw that I had been entrusted with the Good News for the uncircumcised, even as Peter with the Good News for the circumcised —
for he who worked through Peter in the apostleship with the circumcised also worked through me with the Gentiles —

and when they perceived the grace that was given to me , James and Cephas and John , those who were reputed to be pillars , gave to Barnabas and me the right hand of fellowship , that we should go to the Gentiles , and they to the circumcision .
They only asked us to remember the poor — which very thing I was also zealous to do .

nama: Fité njam yénmormén Antiokét, yéndon sote yénfayén ár néndkéfan, ménamén yémon yaufi yafrotam safénro. 12 Njam fá fronde nufaryéng Antiokén, Fitam té njamke enetam Téndo efalo yátogh árfé. Féyo Jemsém ewáfáretam ámb Ju efalo yátogh ár Jerusalemta kétán Antiok. Wénde soramé yéné ár nufaryénd, Fité nimndai a njamke yau tánetawét Téndo árfé, ménamén fá férfér témorwén Jemsene ármén efe ménde tamorwén téndo efalo yátogh árém sái tanfetawét ghéngan. 13 Ámb Ju efalo yátogh ár nyufnyayénd Fitafé a Banabas wéi nyufnyai Fitane sómbio mwighafaf.
english: But when Peter came to Antioch, I resisted him to his face , because he stood condemned .
For before some people came from James , he ate with the Gentiles . But when they came , he drew back and separated himself , fearing those who were of the circumcision .
And the rest of the Jews joined him in his hypocrisy , so that even Barnabas was carried away with their hypocrisy .

nama: Njam yénd néretayén ndené yémofem yau yaitotat mer sioene efalo end, yénd norayan Fitafaf méinyotio ár sáfrére, "Fém ném Ju ár, wéndende fém kénmor ndenanit Téndo árnit, yau ndené Ju árnit. Ndernáye wéi fémon ewáfárete Téndo ár sái emor Ju árfene túmén yame?"
english: But when I saw that they didn’ t walk uprightly according to the truth of the Good News , I said to Peter before them all , “ If you , being a Jew , live as the Gentiles do , and not as the Jews do , why do you compel the Gentiles to live as the Jews do ?

nama: Yénd náráftamém ndené Ju ár a yau yaufiyamafé Téndo ár. 16 Wénde yénd mat yéném ndené ár yaufifi mbarkánd kakmangé Ngánjánafé wafroghe némé nák noraye, wénde mé ndimbal mwighaye Yesu Keriso kénjún. Yéndfem wéi efalo yiyátongém Keriso Yesu ménát mbarkánd kakmangém Ngánjánafé téfene ndimbal mwighé kénjúmé Keriso kénjún, a yau yéné wafroghe némé nák noraye. Ménamén efe yau so kakmangé mbarkánd Ngánjánafé ménaye wafroghe némé nák noraye. 17 Njam yénd kufngongém mbarkánd sái kamndangém Ngánjánafé Keriso kénjún, yénd so kawinjongém ndené yaufiyamafé ár yéném. Wét yéné fifi ndené yém Kerisom ásáfogh yafrote yaufi funaghét? Yaufifi! 18 Njam yéndo tafngon wéikor ramghét nákmén yam yéndon árké té yiroryén, yénd yéndio nauyafon sái wém ámb nák rafarégh ár. 19 Nák kénjúmé yénd kér yémormén nákfaf ménát yénd Ngánjáneyot so wémorang ghérsé. 20 Yénd té kér wémormén Kerisofé yáne wafatarégh wénan, a yénd yéné yau féwém efe ghérsé wém, wénde Keriso efe tafaf yémor. Yéné ghérsé yénd wémor sénonjo fifiyan, yénd swémor ndimbal mwighaye Ngánjánene Ambum kénjún, emon wuwetam yénd a waramai yánjo ghérsé tayot. 21 Yéndon yau yékmetan Ngánjánene ngárám téndot. Wénde njam nák ewéretam sái yényátota mbarkand Ngánjánafé, Kerisoene kér siyém fifiofnar!
english: “ We , being Jews by nature and not Gentile sinners,

yet knowing that a man is not justified by the works of the law but through faith in Jesus Christ , even we believed in Christ Jesus , that we might be justified by faith in Christ and not by the works of the law , because no flesh will be justified by the works of the law .
But if while we sought to be justified in Christ , we ourselves also were found sinners, is Christ a servant of sin? Certainly not !
For if I build up again those things which I destroyed , I prove myself a law-breaker.
For I through the law died to the law , that I might live to God .

I have been crucified with Christ , and it is no longer I who live , but Christ lives in me . That life which I now live in the flesh , I live by faith in the Son of God , who loved me and gave himself up for me .
I don’ t reject the grace of God . For if righteousness is through the law , then Christ died for nothing !”

nama: Fém mwighé ongén Galasia ár! Efe norayai ngamé si féfefaf? Féfene ghékfan safénro témorwén Yesu Kerisoene kér wafatarégh wénan. 2 Kwaufrongi ta yéné ámbiro yammén: Fémofem Ngánján Mbérmbér sianayénd ménaye nákoene ásáfoghe, o efalo yátoghe némé fém káyáretati? 3 Fém ndernáye minde mwighé ongén em! Fém njam fronde namndayénd Yurane ár, fém táf tamorangérwén Ngánján Mbérmbéroene waftaye, wénde sénonjo fém nufngongi ménát sái emor wéikor fifioene waftaye? 4 Méinyotio féfene matyam fifiofnar emormén? Efalofifi yéna fété yém! 5 Ngánjánam Ngánján Mbérmbér yéramai féfefaf a sélngwélafé yam tawafrotau féfene kénjún. Ngánjánam ewafrotam yéné ménamén fémofem ewaitotati nák, o ménamén fém náyárayénd mer si a efalo yiyátoyénd? 6 Kemnangi Ebraamenemén. Buk si noraye, "Yémon Ngánján efalo yiyátoi, a ménamén yáne ndimbal mwighamén Ngánjánam yumyoi fá mbarkánd ármén. 7 Féyo fém fiya kawayamngongi ndené Ebraamene efalo áki ambum yéné ár em endefene ewam ndimbal mwighé. 8 Buk si noraye ndené, soramé yuwon Ngánjánam so tákmangé Téndo ár mbarkánd yéfene ndimbal mwighamén. Buk si norayai yéné soramé yumén mer si Ebraamefaf, "Fe kénjúmé Ngánjánam so efrende méinyotio ár." 9 Yénémaménnde Ebraamém efalo yiyátoi a Ngánjánam yéfrendai, yénémamén méinyotio emofem efalo yiyátotat frengéghan em ndené Ebraam kés témorwén.
english: Foolish Galatians , who has bewitched you not to obey the truth, before whose eyes Jesus Christ was openly portrayed among you as crucified ?
I just want to learn this from you : Did you receive the Spirit by the works of the law , or by hearing of faith ?
Are you so foolish? Having begun in the Spirit , are you now completed in the flesh ?
Did you suffer so many things in vain , if it is indeed in vain ?
He therefore who supplies the Spirit to you and does miracles among you , does he do it by the works of the law , or by hearing of faith ?
Even so , Abraham “ believed God , and it was counted to him for righteousness .”
Know therefore that those who are of faith are children of Abraham.
The Scripture , foreseeing that God would justify the Gentiles by faith , preached the Good News beforehand to Abraham, saying , “ In you all the nations will be blessed .”
So then , those who are of faith are blessed with the faithful Abraham.

nama: Fá efe námyotat nák áyáréghan so emor Ngánjánene wafalngogh mbanmbanan. Féyo Buk si noraye, "Emon yau túmén náyárete méinyotio yam árké ekai nák bukan siyém Ngánjánene wafalngogh mbanmbanan!" 11 Mé safénro yém árké ár yau so Ngánjánam mbarkánd táyátongé yémafé ménaye náke, ménamén Buk si noraye, "Mbarkánd ár so emor ndimbal mwighaye." 12 Wénde nák yau yékai ndimbal mwighafaf. Wéndende Buk si noraye, "Emo njam ewafrota méinyotio yam nák ndernáye noraye so ghérsé yém." 13 Kerisom yénmanjaryéng kétamé nákoene wafalngoghta ménaye fá nénamndayéng wafalngogh téfeyot, ménamén Buk si noraye, "Efe njam tamangi wénan fá siyém Ngánjánene wafalngoghan." 14 Yémon yénmanjaryéng yénd ménát ndené frengégh árké yéramai Ebraame so yéném Téndo árfefaf Keriso Yesue kénjúmé, ménát ndimbal mwighaye yéndfem sái tanangém Ngánján Mbérmbér Ngánján árké unyéghofnar si norayai. Nák a unyéghofnar si
english: For as many as are of the works of the law are under a curse . For it is written , “ Cursed is everyone who doesn’ t continue in all things that are written in the book of the law , to do them .”
Now that no man is justified by the law before God is evident , for , “ The righteous will live by faith .”
The law is not of faith , but , “ The man who does them will live by them .”
Christ redeemed us from the curse of the law , having become a curse for us . For it is written , “ Cursed is everyone who hangs on a tree ,”
that the blessing of Abraham might come on the Gentiles through Christ Jesus , that we might receive the promise of the Spirit through faith .

nama: Tane fútaréf, yéndon so ténmanan méinyotio efoghmén wafroghyam. Njam sómbio ár kuwangend némé mwighé ámbiro tiyátend, emo yau so térafarngé o yau so téminangé. 16 Ngánjánam unyéghofnar si korayau Ebraamefaf a yánjo áki ambumoefaf. Buk si yau ndené noraye, "áki ambumafefaf, " yáne fifi tárfár ár, wénde 'áki ambumoefaf,' yáne fifi ámbiro ár efe yém Keriso. 17 Némé yéndon norayan yém ndené Ngánjánam norayai unyéghofnar si Ebraamefaf, a 430 yunjéf soramé, Ngánjánam yaramai nák Mosese, nákam yau so tengongé o talindangé Ngánjánene unyéghofnar si. 18 Raméghyam yau yém kétamé árém ewaitotat nák, wénde raméghyam yéném kétamé unyéghofnar sita. Ngánjánam yéramai yánjo raméghyam Ebraamefaf unyéghofnar si kénjúmé.
english: Brothers, speaking of human terms , though it is only a man ’s covenant , yet when it has been confirmed , no one makes it void or adds to it .
Now the promises were spoken to Abraham and to his offspring. He doesn’ t say , “ To descendants ”, as of many , but as of one , “ To your offspring”, which is Christ .
Now I say this : A covenant confirmed beforehand by God in Christ, the law , which came four hundred thirty years after , does not annul, so as to make the promise of no effect .
For if the inheritance is of the law , it is no more of promise ; but God has granted it to Abraham by promise .

nama: Yénd so namotam: Némamén Ngánjánam eramai yánjo nák kétán yáne árét? Yémo eramai yéné nák yéfeyot ménát so tawauyafotau yéfe némé yam tamorwén mámáfi. Ngánjánam ewaramai yéné nák kétánotio Ebraamene ámbiro ákiambum nufaryéng. Ngánjánam yéramai yéné nák njafar si résagh ár kénjúmé kétán Mosesefaf. Ngánjánam témndetau Moses, a Mosesém tawarametau Ngánjánene si árét. Fá namndai néndkéf ár Ngánján a ár. 20 Wénde Ngánjánam yaramai yánjo unyéghofnar si Ebraame mbarkánde. Fá méndefnar témorwén néndkéf ár.
english: Then why is there the law ? It was added because of transgressions , until the offspring should come to whom the promise has been made . It was ordained through angels by the hand of a mediator .
Now a mediator is not between one , but God is one .

nama: Némé yáne fifi yém ndenénde nák siyém Ngánjánene unyéghofnar siafé nasmét? Yaufifi! Ngánjánam yau ewaramai nák árkéménayam féyotaro so ghérsé yénérse, féyo ár yau so mbarkánd kamndangi Ngánjánafé ménaye nák áyáréghe. 22 Wénde Buk si noraye ndené mband marat siyém yaufioene wafté mbanmbanan, ménát Ngánjánam so tawaramangé némé unyéghofnar si norayai yéfe emofem efalo yiyátotat Yesu Keriso.
english: Is the law then against the promises of God ? Certainly not ! For if there had been a law given which could make alive , most certainly righteousness would have been of the law .
But the Scripture imprisoned all things under sin, that the promise by faith in Jesus Christ might be given to those who believe .

nama: Soramé yéné ndimbal mwighé yénmormén, nákam ténmeretau ndené fété kwéfkwéf méngo ár kétánotio yéné ndimbal mwighé sái safén kakmangé. 24 Féyo nák témorwén téfefaf waftafé kétánotio Kerisoene ufarégh, ménát mété yénd ndimbal mwighaye mbarkánd tényátongé Ngánjánafé. 25 Sénonjo ndimbal mwighé té yéném, yénd yau nák wanjengégh mbanmbanan yéném.
english: But before faith came , we were kept in custody under the law , confined for the faith which should afterwards be revealed.
So that the law has become our tutor to bring us to Christ , that we might be justified by faith .
But now that faith has come , we are no longer under a tutor .

nama: Féyo méinyotio fém em Ngánjánene ambumtértér njam fémofem efalo yiyátotati Keriso, 27 ménamén fém méinyotio efe té ewalitotaménd Keriso kénjút té numanetaménd sáláme fémyo yémafé Kerisofé. 28 Féyo kété ámb yau fénataye yém yéfe kénjún Ju ár a Téndo ár, yéfe kénjún faiofnar ásáfogh ár a yuwek ár, yéfe kénjún ár ghakér a amaf. Fém méinyotio sem ámbiro Keriso Yesue kénjún. 29 Ménamén fém Kerisoene em, féyo fém sem Ebraamene ákiambum a so tanangi némé té Ngánjánam unyéghofnar si norayai.
english: For you are all children of God , through faith in Christ Jesus .
For as many of you as were baptized into Christ have put on Christ .
There is neither Jew nor Greek , there is neither slave nor free man , there is neither male nor female ; for you are all one in Christ Jesus .
If you are Christ ’s, then you are Abraham’s offspring and heirs according to promise .

nama: Wénde némé yénd korayan siyém ndené, njam ámb ár ambumafé yém, soramé yéné ambumom sái tawanangé afane rokar. Yéné rokar so yém yane ambumoene, wénde ménamén ambum siyém tosé mé yém, fá féyotarofnar yém sái ewarawena yéné rokar, féyo fá ndenanit so yém faiofnar ásáfogh ár. 2 Yárefam so tékafangé ár ménát so ewarawene ambum a rokar, a fá so yém kétán karamangé kétánotio árké efogh yárefam yéfrendam. 3 Yéné endeyo, njam yénd ndenanit ténmorwén ambumtértér matyamofnar, yénd faiofnar ásáfogh ár ténmorwén limánégh mbérmbéran mband maratan. 4 Wénde njam yéné efogh yémo árké yéfrendam nawerai, Ngánjánam yénmáfáretam yánjoyo Ambum fifie amé kénjúmé a témorwén Ju árfene nák mbanmbanan. 5 Yéné ende yémo yényátoi yuwek nák muyata, ménát yénd sái kénamndangayém Ngánjánene ambumtértér. 6 Ménamén yénd yéném yáne ambumtértér, Ngánjánam yénmáfáretam yánjo Ambumoene Mbérmbér téfene tikéf kénjút, yéné Mbérmbér nutne, "Afé, tane Afé." 7 Yénémaménnde, fém yau ném faiofnar ásáfogh ár, wénde yáne ambum. Ndené fété fém kés ném yáne ambum, fémo so tawan méinyotio mer rokar árkémamén Ngánjánam norayai unyéghofnar si. Folene mwighé Galasia árét
english: But I say that so long as the heir is a child , he is no different from a bondservant, though he is lord of all ,
but is under guardians and stewards until the day appointed by the father .
So we also , when we were children , were held in bondage under the elemental principles of the world .
But when the fullness of the time came , God sent out his Son , born to a woman , born under the law ,
that he might redeem those who were under the law , that we might receive the adoption as children .
And because you are children , God sent out the Spirit of his Son into your hearts , crying , “Abba, Father !”
So you are no longer a bondservant, but a son ; and if a son , then an heir of God through Christ.

nama: Yéné efghon njam fém yau mat tamorwén Ngánján, fém tamorwén faiofnar ásáfogh ár kétán ámb akeghofnar ngánjánngánjánfaf. 9 Sénonjo fém mat namndangi Ngánján. O yénd korayangén, sénonjo ndené Ngánján mat namnda fém efe em. Némamén fém so ngangongi wéikor a wéi kénamndangi faiofnar ásáfogh ár kétán muyafnar a fifiofnar mbérmbérfaf yéné mband maratan? 10 Fémofem eutémndati wafarerégh kwéf, ghérare, wéréwéré, a yunjéf. 11 Yénd mámé mwighé kwém féfenemén. Yénd méndefnar wém tane kérté ásáfogh féfeyot sái yém fifiofnar.
english: However at that time , not knowing God , you were in bondage to those who by nature are not gods .

But now that you have come to know God , or rather to be known by God , why do you turn back again to the weak and miserable elemental principles , to which you desire to be in bondage all over again ?
You observe days , months , seasons , and years .
I am afraid for you , that I might have wasted my labor for you .

nama: Tane fútaréf, ndené aem yénd swém. Yéndon ewamnendan fém, ménamén yénd njam fémafé ténmorwén, yénd náyátoyén ndené fém. Fémofem némé yaufi yau tafrotati tafaf. 13 Fém táf nawafarotati ndené yénd wénmormén féfefaf fronde ménamén enjne kwémorwén. Yéné táf yémormén yéndo fronde yaitotamén mer si féfefaf. 14 Yéndo kértat ekmayén fém ménáyan enjne kwémorwén, fémofem yénd yau tékrátaye wéramayénd a wékenayénd. Wénde fémofem wumyoyénd ndené kar kwémorwén njafar si résagh ár Ngánjáneta, ndené yénd kar kwémorwén Keriso Yesu. 15 Fém minde áuwéghan tamorwén! Némé yam nufrotam? Yénd yéndio so korayangén ndené, yéné efghon, fém njam féyotaro tamorwén tautorngayénd féfenjo ghékéf, fémofem so tanramangayénd tafaf. 16 Wénde sénonjo yénd namndan féfene mék téfnár ménaye efalo si afroghe?
english: I beg you , brothers, become as I am , for I also have become as you are . You did me no wrong,
but you know that because of weakness in the flesh I preached the Good News to you the first time .
That which was a temptation to you in my flesh , you didn’ t despise nor reject ; but you received me as an angel of God , even as Christ Jesus .
What was the blessing you enjoyed? For I testify to you that , if possible , you would have plucked out your eyes and given them to me .
So then , have I become your enemy by telling you the truth?

nama: Yéné árém yuyafotat kénjkame tikéf féfene kénjún, wénde yéfene mwighé farorégh siyém yau kor mer yém. Yéfene ménde siyém fém sái tafalongi ta tambén, ménát fémofem so eyáretati fáro. 18 Efe njam ménde yém féfefaf meryam wafroghét, yéné féyotaro yém, a yémofem ayafrotat méinyotio efghon, yau táfandro yénd fémafé njam yéném. 19 Tane tikfafé ambumtértér, yénd nemnan ndené yénd wéikor wém ndenanit ambum áráfégh tékrát kénjún féfeyot kétánotio fém té nénamndayénd Kerisoene efalo waitogh ár. 20 Yénd minde ménde wém sái wém kété féfefaf sénonjo. Féyo yénd so mer mat wém némé so norayan féfefaf. Ndené fété, yénd mafina wém ndernáye so kor nemnan féfenemén. Ufarogh si yéfenemén Agar a Sara
english: They zealously seek you in no good way. No , they desire to alienate you , that you may seek them .
But it is always good to be zealous in a good cause , and not only when I am present with you .
My little children , of whom I am again in travail until Christ is formed in you —
but I could wish to be present with you now , and to change my tone , for I am perplexed about you .

nama: Kwaufrongi, fém efe ménde em nák mbanmbanan sái em, fém yau mat em ndernáye nák noraye? 22 Ndené noraye Ebraam témorwén sómbio ambumafé, ámb faiofnar ásáfogh amamén, ámb amaffifimén. 23 Faiofnar ásáfogh amamén ambum náráftam fifi ende, wénde yuwek amafmén ambum náráftam Ngánjánene unyéghofnar si kénjúmé. 24 Yéné sómbio amafam yufarot sómbio árnyégh. Fronde amaf, Agarém, yufarote Sainai mband tunakéf ánde árém nák ewanayénd yéné nák árkéménayam táyátotau faiofnar ásáfogh ár. 25 Agar, emo yufarote Sainai mband tunakéf Arabia yuwon, a yufarote sénonjo ndimbal tesen Jerusalem, ménamén fá yánjo ambumafé emor nákoene faiofnar ásáfoghan. 26 Wénde njafarmén Jerusalem siyém yuwek, a fá siyém téfene amé 27 Buk si noraye, "Áuwéghan aném, fém ambumofnar amaf! Nutna minde áuwéghafé, fémo emon ndémke yau yáraretam ambum áráfghan! Ménamén mwinu amafom so eráfte ambum a so ewainde amaf efe árafé yém."
english: Tell me , you that desire to be under the law , don’ t you listen to the law ?
For it is written that Abraham had two sons , one by the servant , and one by the free woman .
However , the son by the servant was born according to the flesh , but the son by the free woman was born through promise .
These things contain an allegory, for these are two covenants . One is from Mount Sinai , bearing children to bondage , which is Hagar.
For this Hagar is Mount Sinai in Arabia, and answers to the Jerusalem that exists now , for she is in bondage with her children .
But the Jerusalem that is above is free , which is the mother of us all .
For it is written , “ Rejoice , you barren who don’ t bear . Break out and shout, you who don’ t travail. For the desolate women have more children than her who has a husband.” + 4:27 Isaiah 54:1

nama: Tane fútaréf, fém em unyéghofnar simén ambum, ndené Aisek. 29 Yéné efghon ambum efe náráftam fifie tasérmbotawét ambum efe náráftam Ngánján Mbérmbér waftaye, wéi sénonjo ndenéyameyo fiyém. 30 Wénde ndernáye Buk si noraye? Ndené noraye, "Téngwatem faiofnar ásáfogh amaf a yánjo ambum, ménamén faiofnar ásáfogh amafoene ambumom yau so tawanangé yárefane rokar yémafé amaffifioene ambumofé." 31 Yénémaménnde, tane fútaréf, yénd yau yéném faiofnar ásáfogh amafoene ambum wénde amaffifioene ambum.
english: Now we , brothers, as Isaac was , are children of promise .
But as then , he who was born according to the flesh persecuted him who was born according to the Spirit , so also it is now .
However, what does the Scripture say ? “ Throw out the servant and her son , for the son of the servant will not inherit with the son of the free woman .”
So then , brothers, we are not children of a servant , but of the free woman .

nama: Kerisom té efalo yényátoyéng yuwek. Sénonjo kamndangi fém yuwek, a yau wéikor kaumbangi nákoene faiofnar sifayat.
english: Stand firm therefore in the liberty by which Christ has made us free , and don’ t be entangled again with a yoke of bondage .

nama: Káyárangi! Yéndo, Folém, emndetan ndené fém njam karamangi ghéngan néfghét, yáne fifi siyém Keriso so yém fifiofnar féfefaf. 3 Ámbirotaro yéndon emndetan efe ár kamyongé ghéngan néfghét, yémo so ewaitote méinyotio nák. 4 Fém efe njam kufngongi mbarkándot Ngánjánafé nák waitoghe, fém té nanfangi kétamé Kerisoe tambén. Fém sem téndon Ngánjánene ngárámta. 5 Wénde téfeyot, téfene méghmégh siyém Ngánjánam so mbarkánd yémafé tényátongé yénd. Yéné fiyém némat yénd nawanjetam ménaye Ngánján Mbérmbér násáfota téfene ndimbal mwighé kénjúmé. 6 Táf yénd njam yéném Keriso Yesue kénjún, Ngánján yau mwighé yém kétán yénd téu ghéngan yénénfetat o yau. Ndimbal yam siyém ndené téfene ndimbal mwigham Keriso kénjún so yéfune ménát sái euwetam ámb ár.
english: Behold , I , Paul , tell you that if you receive circumcision , Christ will profit you nothing .
Yes , I testify again to every man who receives circumcision that he is a debtor to do the whole law .
You are alienated from Christ , you who desire to be justified by the law . You have fallen away from grace .
For we through the Spirit , by faith wait for the hope of righteousness .
For in Christ Jesus neither circumcision nor uncircumcision amounts to anything , but faith working through love.

nama: Fém stam mere kérsati! Emo eméindai ekmboghét efalo waitoghta? 8 Ngánjánam, emo fém emotai, yéné yau yafrotam. 9 Ár norayayénd, "Némbne flawé minaghmén násáfote méinyotio flawayan." 10 Yéndo mwighafé yéfandan Yuré ménát sái ewarawena kétamé unyégh watameghta. Ngánjánam so moghan tékmangé yéné ár, efe njam yém, emo fém tawarsote.
english: You were running well ! Who interfered with you that you should not obey the truth?
This persuasion is not from him who calls you .
A little yeast grows through the whole lump .
I have confidence toward you in the Lord that you will think no other way . But he who troubles you will bear his judgment , whoever he is .

nama: Tane fútaréf, yénd mé njam néngorayan ndené fém so ghéngan enfetat, némamén Ju árém wasérmbotat? Njam yénd mé néngorayan ndené fém so ghéngan enfetat, féyo tane si waitogh Kerisoene wafatarégh wénmén yau so téfunau kérté. 12 Yénd ménde kwémorwén ndené fá emofem kérté efunat a erametat fém ghéngan néfghét fiya tanfetangi yéfenjo njénafayo.
english: But I , brothers, if I still preach circumcision , why am I still persecuted ? Then the stumbling block of the cross has been removed .
I wish that those who disturb you would cut themselves off.

nama: Tane fútaréf, Ngánjánam emotai fém sái em yuwek. Wénde yau eumyotati féfene yuwek ménát sái ewifotati féfene fifioene ménde. Wénde kásáfotati féfenjo kénjún uwéghan. 14 Méinyotio nák ewafne yéné ámbiro nákam: "Yuweta fenjo kaka ár ndené fété fémyo snáuwete." 15 Fém njam féfenjo kénjún ménjté em amrorghan a amndéghan, kor aem o fém fémyo so nawironati. Ngánján Mbérmbéroene end a fifioene end
english: For you , brothers, were called for freedom . Only don’ t use your freedom as an opportunity for the flesh , but through love be servants to one another .
For the whole law is fulfilled in one word , in this : “ You shall love your neighbor as yourself .”
But if you bite and devour one another , be careful that you don’t consume one another .

nama: Némé yénd norayan: aemor Ngánján Mbérmbéran, féyo fémofem yau so ewafrotati fifioene ménde. 17 Ngánján Mbérmbéroene méndayam yékarote fifioene ménde a fifioene méndeyam yékarote Ngánján Mbérmbéroene ménde. Fá túmén násmét yéfenjo kénjún, féyo fémofem yau so ewafrotati némat fém ménde em. 18 Wénde njam fém elimnda Ngánján Mbérmbéram, fém nák mbanmbanan yau em.
english: But I say , walk by the Spirit , and you won’t fulfill the lust of the flesh .
For the flesh lusts against the Spirit , and the Spirit against the flesh ; and these are contrary to one another , that you may not do the things that you desire .
But if you are led by the Spirit , you are not under the law .

nama: Fifioene wafroghyam safén em: yaufi walyam, wáiwáiyafé yam, yuwek wal, 20 mewang wáwefnogh, ghar, méndménd, amrorégh, waramnjagh, nékwro, a yandro yémanjone, ásnanégh, afalogh, 21 karogh, wériyam, yaufi téménd, a ámb mé kés engém. Yéndon ewawéngsotan sénonjo, ndené kés ewawéngsotamén fronde: emofem ewafrotat yéné yam Ngánjánam yau so tawaramangé Ngánjánene limánégh.
english: Now the deeds of the flesh are obvious , which are : adultery, sexual immorality , uncleanness, lustfulness,
idolatry , sorcery , hatred , strife , jealousies, outbursts of anger , rivalries, divisions , heresies,
envy , murders, drunkenness , orgies, and things like these ; of which I forewarn you , even as I also forewarned you , that those who practice such things will not inherit God ’s Kingdom.

nama: Wénde Ngánján Mbérmbéroene mbwe sem uwégh, áuwégh, krufrát, métar, ramégh, mer, ndimbal mwighé kér ro. 23 ngárámngárám, a yéndio awamarogh. Kété ámb nák yau yém ánde noraye ndené yéné yam sem mámáfi. 24 Fá efe em Yesu Kerisoene té enamndaménd kérot fifi yánjo méinyotio méndefé. 25 Ngánján Mbérmbéram té yénmaramai téfe ghérsé, yénémamén yéndfem fiya táitotangém Ngánján Mbérmbér. 26 Wénde yénd yau so nawarmbotam o nékwot naméindam o nawaramnjam téfe kénjún.
english: But the fruit of the Spirit is love, joy , peace , patience , kindness , goodness , faith ,
gentleness , and self-control . Against such things there is no law .
Those who belong to Christ have crucified the flesh with its passions and lusts .
If we live by the Spirit , let ’s also walk by the Spirit .
Let ’s not become conceited , provoking one another, and envying one another.

nama: Tane fútaréf, njam efe terangé yaufiyamam, fém efe em Ngánján Mbérmbéran so yangotati fá métare. Wénde kor fété, fém wéi so em ufoghan. 2 Mérne ersati ndimbal kérté, a yéné ende fémofem so efalo táyátongi Kerisoene nák. 3 Njam efe nemna ndené fá yém ár táf fá yéné yau yém, fá fáyo nawawinde. 4 Ámbiroámbiro árém so ewafénmetat yéfenjo wafroghyam. Féyo yémofem yéfenjo kénjún áuwégh so yéfandat, ménayofnar fáyo sái naufotat ámb árfefaf, 5 ménamén ámbiroámbiro árém so fété ersat yéfenjo kérté. 6 Emo njam ewatameta fém Ngánjánene si, fémofem so efénati méinyotio mer rokar yémafé.
english: Brothers, even if a man is caught in some fault , you who are spiritual must restore such a one in a spirit of gentleness , looking to yourself so that you also aren’ t tempted .
Bear one another ’s burdens, and so fulfill the law of Christ .
For if a man thinks himself to be something when he is nothing , he deceives himself .
But let each man examine his own work , and then he will have reason to boast in himself , and not in someone else .
For each man will bear his own burden .
But let him who is taught in the word share all good things with him who teaches .

nama: Fém fémyo yau nawawindati, emo yau so Ngánjáne yaweinde. Árom so yéférne némé yémo yeite. 8 Emon njam yeita yanjo fifi ménde wifoghét, kétamé yéné fifi méndeta so téfrarngé kérté. Emon njam yeita Ngánján Mbérmbéroene méndeyan, kétamé Ngánján Mbérmbérta so téfrarngé tuot akegh ghérsé. 9 Yénd ménj té so yéngém ménát meryam wafroghét a yau so sakér yéném, efogh so kufarngé wau yuwot. 10 Yénémaménnde, ánde yém téfeyot féneféne, yéndfem so mer ewafrotam méinyotio árfet, yéfeyot fifi efe em efalo yátogh ár mérén. Folene ambinomén wawanjagh si
english: Don’t be deceived . God is not mocked , for whatever a man sows , that he will also reap .
For he who sows to his own flesh will from the flesh reap corruption . But he who sows to the Spirit will from the Spirit reap eternal life .
Let ’s not be weary in doing good , for we will reap in due season if we don’ t give up .
So then , as we have opportunity , let ’ s do what is good toward all men , and especially toward those who are of the household of the faith .

nama: Téfandangi némé ndimbale férén yéndon tafarotan njam yéndon tafarotan féfefaf tanjo ngángaye. 12 Fá emofem yéta ewáfáretat ménát ghéngan néfghét ménde em mer sái néretat ámb árfefaf. Fá yau ménde em sái ewasérmbotat ménamén Kerisoene wafatarégh wénmén. 13 Fá fété ghéngan néféghkaf em, wénde yémofem yau ewaitotat nák. Fá ménde em fém sái ghéngan enfetat ménát fá so nawarsat ndené fém té námyo yéné fifi yamfaf. 14 Wénde tayot, yénd so nawarsan ménamén téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene wafatarégh wénménro. Ménamén ménaye yáne wafatarégh wéne mband marat kér té tém tayot, a yénd té kér kwém mband maratoe. 15 Féyotaro mé yém njam fém té ghéngan enfayénd o yau, ndimbal yam siyém ndené fém té namndangi totér ár. 16 Yéfeyot emofem ewaitotat yéné si yéfene ghérsayan, so yém krufrát a ghérghérsisé yéfefaf wéi méinyotio Ngánjánene árfefaf!
english: See with what large letters I write to you with my own hand .
As many as desire to make a good impression in the flesh compel you to be circumcised , just so they may not be persecuted for the cross of Christ .
For even they who receive circumcision don’ t keep the law themselves , but they desire to have you circumcised , so that they may boast in your flesh .
But far be it from me to boast except in the cross of our Lord Jesus Christ , through which the world has been crucified to me , and I to the world .
For in Christ Jesus neither is circumcision anything , nor uncircumcision, but a new creation .
As many as walk by this rule , peace and mercy be on them , and on God ’s Israel .

nama: Sénonjo yénandmé, yau emo táf kérté warameta, ménamén yéndo ersan tane fifiyan Yesuene mbor.
english: From now on , let no one cause me any trouble , for I bear the marks of the Lord Jesus branded on my body .

nama: Yuré Yesu Kerisoene ngárám so yém féfene mbérmbérfaf, tane efalo fútaréf. Efalo.
english: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with your spirit , brothers. Amen.

nama: Yénd wém Fol, Keriso Yesuene muyafé ár efe yém Ngánjánene méndeyan. Yéndon yéfarotan yéné férén féfefaf, Ngánjánene njúnnjúnofnar árfefaf Efesos kénjún, efe em ndimbal mwighafé Keriso Yesue kénjún.
english: Paul , an apostle of Christ Jesus through the will of God , to the saints who are at Ephesus , and the faithful in Christ Jesus :

nama: Ngánján téfene Afé a Yuré Yesu Kerisom so tawaramangé féfe ngárám a krufrát. Ngánjánam té ewafrote téfeyot mer yam Keriso kénjún
english: Grace to you and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ .

nama: Yuyotam Ngánján efe yém téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene Afé, emo yénéfrendai yénd méinyotio njafarmén mbérmbére frengéghe Keriso kénjún. 4 Kété frondeyan soramé mband marat yafrotam, Ngánjánam yénmaferyéng Keriso kénjúmé, ménát yénd so yéném njúnnjúnofnar a téfnofnar yáne sáfrére. Ménamén Ngánjánam yénmuwete, 5 Ngánjánam té mwighé yéfaronam Yesu Keriso kénjúmé yémon so tényátongé yáne ambum. Ngánjánam yáitoi yánjo áuwégh a ménde. 6 Yéndfem yuyotam Ngánján yáne ndimbalfifi ngárámmén, ménamén yémon yénmaramai ramégh maratae téfe yánjo áuwéghafé Ambum kénjúmé! 7 Kerisoene férke yénd yuwek yényátoi, a wéi téfene yaufiyam yawalindai yénamé Ngánjánene ndimbal ngáráme. 8 Yémon yénmaramai ndimbal kéráye ngárám méinyotio yánjo káfeté mwighaye a matyame. 9 Ngánjánam yafrotam némé yáne ménde témorwén, a safét yékmai téfefaf kwankwane mwighé farorégh yémon árké té yékmai wifoghét Kerisoe kénjúmé. 10 Ngánjánene mwighé farorégh so tifongé táf efogh njam kawerangé. Yéné efghon yémon so táyátongé ámbiro méinyotio rokar njafar a mbandan Kerisoene limángégh mbanmbanan.
english: Blessed be the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ , who has blessed us with every spiritual blessing in the heavenly places in Christ ,
even as he chose us in him before the foundation of the world , that we would be holy and without defect before him in love,
having predestined us for adoption as children through Jesus Christ to himself , according to the good pleasure of his desire ,
to the praise of the glory of his grace , by which he freely gave us favor in the Beloved.
In him we have our redemption through his blood, the forgiveness of our trespasses , according to the riches of his grace
which he made to abound toward us in all wisdom and prudence ,
making known to us the mystery of his will , according to his good pleasure which he purposed in him
to an administration of the fullness of the times , to sum up all things in Christ , the things in the heavens and the things on the earth , in him .

nama: Méinyotio yam nufrotat Ngánjánene mwighé faroréghan a méndeyan. Kerisoe kénjún Ngánjánam yénmaferyéng yánjo árot yánjo méndeyan. Yéné témorwén némé yémon mwighé yafrotam kétándmé rényéghan, 12 ménát ndené yénd yénmormén fronde ekmayém téfene méghmégh Keriso kénjún, yénd mété yéném Ngánjánene ndimbal yétkwén uyoghét!
english: We were also assigned an inheritance in him , having been foreordained according to the purpose of him who does all things after the counsel of his will ,
to the end that we should be to the praise of his glory , we who had before hoped in Christ .

nama: A fém namndayénd Ngánjánene ár táf fém njam náyárayénd efalo si, mer si árké ménáyam yénérse féfeyot wanjarégh. Fémofem efalo yiyátoyénd Keriso, a Ngánjánam yékmai yánjo yéru féfefaf, árké yém Ngánján Mbérmbér yémon árké té unyéghofnar norayai. 14 Ngánján Mbérmbér yéné féyém ménát yéndfem so tawanangém némé Ngánjánam té unyéghofnar si emndai yánjo ár, a yéné yam yénd yényátote efalo Ngánjánam so téramangé méinyoe yuwek kétán yéfeyot efe em yáne. Yéndfem so yuyotam yáne ndimbal yétkwén! Fol Ngánjánafé norayet efalo yátogh árfenemén Efesos kénjún
english: In him you also , having heard the word of the truth, the Good News of your salvation — in whom , having also believed , you were sealed with the promised Holy Spirit ,
who is a pledge of our inheritance , to the redemption of God ’s own possession , to the praise of his glory .

nama: Yéné téfnan, kétándmayo yénd náyárayén féfene ndimbal mwighamén Yuré Yesue kénjún a féfene uwéghmén méinyotio Ngánjánene árét, 16 yéndo túmén kánjo tarametan Ngánjáne féfenemén. Njam yénd Ngánjánafé koraiwém, yéndo túmén yamnendan féfe wáutárghét, 17 téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene Ngánján, minde ndimbal Afé, sái tawaramangé Ngánján Mbérmbér féfe. Ngánján Mbérmbéram so táyátongé fém káfeté mwighafé a safot tékmangé Ngánján féfefaf, ménát fémofem mat so tiyátongi. 18 Yéndon nómnendan ménát féfene mwighé so kásáwérngi, ménát fém so mat em némé méghmégh yém kétán fém kés emotai, nderé mer frengégh yém yémo unyéghofnar si kés norayai yánjo árfaf. 19 Fém wéi so mat em nderé minde ndimbal yém yáne wafté ásáfoghan téfe kénjún efe efalo yátogh ár yéném. Yéné wafté snásáfote téfe kénjún siyém ndenéménayo wafté kér ro muyé 20 árkéménaye Keriso yanoi kérta a yumnjoi fá yánjo tambén ngángata njafar limánéghan. 21 Kété, Kerisom elimnde méinyotio njafarmén limánégh ár, si muyé, wafté, a yuré. Yáfaf yém minde tukén yétkwén kétándmé méinyotio tukén waftafé yétkwénta yéné mband maratan a wéi soramé mband marat. 22 Ngánjánam méinyotio rokar ekmai Kerisoene wafté mbanmbanan. Yémo yékmai Keriso limánégh téfnár méinyotio rokaran. Yémo yéné yafrotam yánjo ár wáutárghét, Yesuene mérnat. 23 Yesuene mérén yém Kerisoene fifi, yáne wifoghmén emo méinyotio rokar ewifote méinyotio sifayamé.
english: For this cause I also , having heard of the faith in the Lord Jesus which is among you and the love which you have toward all the saints,
don’ t cease to give thanks for you , making mention of you in my prayers ,
that the God of our Lord Jesus Christ , the Father of glory , may give to you a spirit of wisdom and revelation in the knowledge of him ,
having the eyes of your hearts enlightened , that you may know what is the hope of his calling , and what are the riches of the glory of his inheritance in the saints,
and what is the exceeding greatness of his power toward us who believe , according to that working of the strength of his might
which he worked in Christ when he raised him from the dead and made him to sit at his right hand in the heavenly places,
far above all rule, authority , power , dominion , and every name that is named , not only in this age, but also in that which is to come .
He put all things in subjection under his feet , and gave him to be head over all things for the assembly ,
which is his body , the fullness of him who fills all in all .

nama: Tándái fém tamorwén kérwén féfenjo áyárghofnar a yaufiyammén. 2 Kété yéné efghon fémofem táitotawét mbandoene yaufi end, a fémofem tiyáretawét yaufi mbérmbér, waftafé limánégh ár fandaghofnar mband maratan, yéné mbérmbér emo sénonjo elimnde ár emofem yau yiyáretat Ngánján. 3 Frondeyo, Efaloe méinyotio yénd ténmorwén ndené fá kés em a ténmorangérwén téfenjo fifi méndeyan, tawafrotawém némé katémndawét téfene fifiyan a mwighayan. Téfene fifie yaman yénd, méinyotio ndené ámb kés em, Ngánjánene nékwan so yéném.
english: You were made alive when you were dead in transgressions and sins ,
in which you once walked according to the course of this world , according to the prince of the power of the air, the spirit who now works in the children of disobedience.
We also all once lived among them in the lusts of our flesh , doing the desires of the flesh and of the mind , and were by nature children of wrath , even as the rest .

nama: Wénde Ngánjánene ghérghérsisé siyém wáfáyoghofnar, a yáne uwégh téfeyot siyém minde ndimbal, 5 táf njam yénd kérwén ténmorwén téfene áyáréghofnar yam kénjún Ngánjánam yénmangoi ghérsat Kerisofé. Ngánjánene ngárámero ewanjaryéng fém. 6 Keriso Yesue kénjún Ngánjánam yénmanoi yénd yémafé ménát sái yélimndam yémafé njafaran. 7 Ménát yufarotam soramé yumén árét yáne témghofnar ndimbalfifi ngárám, yémon yuyafote yáne uwégh téfeyot Keriso Yesue kénjún. 8 Ndimbal mwighé kénjúmé, Ngánjánene ngáráme ewanjaryéng fém. Yéné wanjarégh siyém yau féfene wafroghyammén, wénde yéné wanjarégh siyém Ngánjánene ramégh. 9 Yémo yau ewanjaryéng fém ménamén féfene ásáfoghmén. Féyo efe ámb yau so tuktukan yém. 10 Ngánjánam té yénmafrotam yénd efe yéném, a Keriso Yesu kénjún Ngánjánam yénmafrotam yénd ménát mer ghérsé wafroghyamot, yéné Ngánjánam árké té efrendam téfe wafroghét. Kerisom té eyátotai Ju ár a téndo ár ámbiro
english: But God , being rich in mercy , for his great love with which he loved us ,
even when we were dead through our trespasses , made us alive together with Christ — by grace you have been saved —
and raised us up with him , and made us to sit with him in the heavenly places in Christ Jesus ,
that in the ages to come he might show the exceeding riches of his grace in kindness toward us in Christ Jesus ;
for by grace you have been saved through faith , and that not of yourselves ; it is the gift of God ,
not of works , that no one would boast .
For we are his workmanship , created in Christ Jesus for good works , which God prepared before that we would walk in them .

nama: Yau táf ewawalinda fém em téndo ár. Mbarkánde, ghéngan néfégh téfnaram ewanangotat ménamén fém ghéngan néféghofnar em. Yémofem yérsat tuktuk ghéngan néféghmén. 12 Yéné efghon fém nayu tamorwén Kerisoeta. Fém stanmorwén dábi a fém yau tawafnyangérwén Ngánjánene waferégh árfefaf. Féfene sifayé yau yém árnyéghan, árkéméné térnyangérwén Ngánjánene unyéghofnar si yánjo árfefaf, a fém stamorangérwén yéné mband maratan méghméghofnar a Ngánjánofnar. 13 Wénde sénonjo Keriso Yesuene kénjún fém, efe tamorwén táf nayu, Kerisoene férkam kaka té enwanai Ngánjánefaf.
english: Therefore remember that once you , the Gentiles in the flesh , who are called “uncircumcision” by that which is called “ circumcision ” ( in the flesh , made by hands ),
that you were at that time separate from Christ , alienated from the commonwealth of Israel , and strangers from the covenants of the promise , having no hope and without God in the world .
But now in Christ Jesus you who once were far off are made near in the blood of Christ .

nama: Kerisom yénmarsam krufrát ménaye Ju ár a Téndo ár ámbiro eyátoi. Yémon yiroryéng yéné mbákw árkéménayam tafalotau a awifarégh ár tamorwén. 15 Yánjo kére, yémo ewitérmboi Ju árfene nák yénayafé yánjo wafareghafé a náknákafé a sómbio mérén eyáteyai ámbiro totér mérén yánjo kénjún. Yéné ende Kerisom yafrotam krufrát Ju ár a Téndo ár kénjún. 16 Yáne kére wafatarégh wénan Kerisom yiroryéng yéfene mék yam a ámbiro eyáteyai sómbio ár mérén kétán ámbiro fifi a enwangotam Ngánjánefaf. 17 Keriso yénmormén a mer si táitotau krufrát ghérsamén méinyotio árfefaf. Fá korayau fém Téndo ár efe tamorwén nayu Ngánjáneta, a Ju ár, efe tamorwén kaka yáfaf. 18 Kerisoe kénjúmé, Ngánján Mbérmbéram yénmáutáne yénd méinyotio, Ju ár a Téndo ár, sái engém kétán Afafaf.
english: For he is our peace , who made both one , and broke down the middle wall of separation,
having abolished in his flesh the hostility , the law of commandments contained in ordinances , that he might create in himself one new man of the two , making peace ,
and might reconcile them both in one body to God through the cross , having killed the hostility through it .
He came and preached peace to you who were far off and to those who were near .
For through him we both have our access in one Spirit to the Father .

nama: Féyo fém Téndo ár yau em dábi o wan téfnár ndenayu. Fém sem sénonjo efghang yéné yu árfé yémafé Ngánjánene árfé a Ngánjánjene mérén em. 20 Fém ndenanit em méngo árké Ngánjánam yéramete yandio. Yesuene muyafé ár a yáne mat yátogh ár em ndenanit méngo sérasér. Yesu Keriso siyém ndenanit néndkéf sérasér. 21 Yémo yerete méinyo méngo a yiyátote anoghét ménát sái yém njúnnjúnofnar wáwefnogh méngo Yurai. 22 Yesuene kénjúmé fém Téndo ár wéi méinyotio raméghan em yémafé Ju efalo yátogh árfé kés em ménát sái káyátongi Ngánjánene ámnjogh méngo yánjo Mbérmbér kénjúmé.
english: So then you are no longer strangers and foreigners , but you are fellow citizens with the saints and of the household of God ,
being built on the foundation of the apostles and prophets , Christ Jesus himself being the chief cornerstone;
in whom the whole building , fitted together , grows into a holy temple in the Lord ;
in whom you also are built together for a habitation of God in the Spirit .

nama: Yéné téfnan, yénd, Fol, noraiwam Ngánjánafé. Yénd wém kwéfkwéf méngon wényau ménamén yénd násáfotan Yesu Kerisoe ménát wáutárghét féfe Téndo árét. 2 Fém té náyárangi ndené Ngánjánam yánjo ngáráme té waramang yéné ásáfogh sái ewawaitotan mer si féfe Téndo árfét. 3 Ngánjánam yékmai safét yánjo kwankwane mwighé farorégh a kwayaghayan yékmai tafaf. Fémofem njam yaftati némé té yéndon téfarotan ndémbndémbe yénémamén, 4 fém so mat náyátotati tane kénjkam mwighé Kerisoene kwankwane yam. 5 Tándái Ngánjánam yau tawaufrotau yéné kwankwane yam árfefaf, wénde sénonjo yémon té yékmai safét Ngánján Mbérmbére yánjo njúnnjúnofnar Yesuene muyafé árfefaf a Ngánjánene mat yátogh árfefaf. 6 Kwankwane yam yéné yém: mer si kénjúmé Téndo ár a Ju ár ámbiro mérén eyátoyéng. Féyo Keriso Yesuene kénjúmé Téndo árém so tawanangi Ngánjánene frengégh árké té norayai unyéghofnar si.
english: For this cause I , Paul , am the prisoner of Christ Jesus on behalf of you Gentiles ,
if it is so that you have heard of the administration of that grace of God which was given me toward you ,
how that by revelation the mystery was made known to me , as I wrote before in few words ,
by which , when you read, you can perceive my understanding in the mystery of Christ ,
which in other generations was not made known to the children of men , as it has now been revealed to his holy apostles and prophets in the Spirit ,
that the Gentiles are fellow heirs and fellow members of the body , and fellow partakers of his promise in Christ Jesus through the Good News ,

nama: Yénd náyátoyén mer sioene faiofnar ásáfogh ár Ngánjánene ramghe, yémon waramai ta yánjo waftafé ásáfogh kénjúmé. 8 Yénd wém némbnarfifi kétándmé méinyotio Ngánjánene árfeta, wénde Ngánjánam waramai yéné ngárám ménát Téndo árfefaf mer si résaghét ndimbal frengéghmén Yesu Kerisoeta, 9 a méinyotio árfet fandaghét ndernáye Ngánjánene kwankwane mwighé farorégh kakmangé ásáfoghan waftafé. Ngánján, efe yém méinyotio rokar Wafrogh ár, tarambnotau yánjo kwankwane mwighé farorégh rényéghta. 10 Wénde sénonjo fá ménde yéném, Yesuene mérén kénjúmé, limánégh ár a tukén waftafé ár njafar mband maratan so mat náyátotat yáne tárfár fénatarero káfeté mwighé. 11 Ngánjánam yéné yafrotam ndené fété yáne tuot mwighé farorégh témorwén, yémon árké té yifoyéng Keriso Yesu téfene Yuré kénjúmé. 12 Keriso kénjún a yáfaf téfene ndimbal mwighé kénjúmé yénd kaka so yéném Ngánjánefaf férférofnar a táikér mwighafé. 13 Féyo yéndon ewamnendan fém yau táf nuitati mwighayan ménamén yéndon tékrat yéfandan féfeyot, yéné méinyotio siyém féfene merot. Fol Ngánjánafé koraiwét Efesos árfenemén
english: of which I was made a servant according to the gift of that grace of God which was given me according to the working of his power .
To me , the very least of all saints, was this grace given , to preach to the Gentiles the unsearchable riches of Christ ,
and to make all men see what is the administration of the mystery which for ages has been hidden in God , who created all things through Jesus Christ,
to the intent that now through the assembly the manifold wisdom of God might be made known to the principalities and the powers in the heavenly places,
according to the eternal purpose which he accomplished in Christ Jesus our Lord .
In him we have boldness and access in confidence through our faith in him .
Therefore I ask that you may not lose heart at my troubles for you , which are your glory .

nama: Ménamén Ngánjánam té yafrotam méinyotio yéné féfeyot, yénd neitan budme a Afé Ngánjánafé noraiwam, 15 kétándmé endeta méinyotio mérnam njafaran a mband maratan ersat yéfenjo efalo yétkwén. 16 Yéndon yamnendan Ngánján yáne ndimbal yétkwén wemárta so tawaramangé féfe wafté yánjo Mbérmbér kénjúmé ménát muyafé so em kénjúe féfenjo kénjún. 17 A yénd ndené norayan Kerisom so yafrote yáne méngo féfene tikfan ndimbal mwighé kénjúmé. Yénd norayan ndené féfene so ewam sérémb a téfén uwégh kénjún, 18 ménát fém, mérne yémafé méinyotio Ngánjánene árfé, so em waftafé ménát mat so káyátongi nderé marat a tombé, nderé tuk a kénjkam, yém Kerisoene uwégh. 19 Yénd yau so mat kamndangém yáne uwégh méinyoe. Wénde yénd Ngánjánafé noraiwam fém so fété mat kamndangi Kerisoene uwégh, a yénémamén fém so tawafongé kétán méinyotio Ngánjánene afoghkaf kénjút.
english: For this cause , I bow my knees to the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ,
from whom every family in heaven and on earth is named ,
that he would grant you , according to the riches of his glory , that you may be strengthened with power through his Spirit in the inner person,
that Christ may dwell in your hearts through faith , to the end that you , being rooted and grounded in love,
may be strengthened to comprehend with all the saints what is the width and length and height and depth,
and to know Christ ’s love which surpasses knowledge , that you may be filled with all the fullness of God .

nama: Yuyotam Ngánján. Yáne wafté násáfote téfene kénjún. Yéné waftayam ewainde téfene matyam. Yéné wafté árkéméné nemnam a yamnendam yau so taindangé Ngánjánene wafté. 21 Yuyotam Ngánján ndimbalkéraye Yesuene mérnan a wéi Keriso Yesuene kénjún méinyotio ár sata kénjúmé, tuot! Efalo.
english: Now to him who is able to do exceedingly abundantly above all that we ask or think , according to the power that works in us ,
to him be the glory in the assembly and in Christ Jesus to all generations , forever and ever . Amen.

nama: Ndené yénd wém kwéfkwéf méngo ár ménamén yéndon Yurane ásáfogh yafrotan, yéndon ewamnendan fém, aemor yéné ghérsaye mere ndené Ngánjánam té yékmai njam fém ewanmoi. 2 Yuwan aem túmén, mer, a métar. Féfenjo uwégh euyafotati ménaye awarnyéghe ámbiroámbiro árfé. 3 Féfenjo mer ewafrotati ménát mé so yém ámbiro áyátogh Ngánján Mbérmbéram árkéméné yéramete krufrát kénjúmé árkéménayam táyátongé fém mérne. 4 Ámbiro fifi a ámbiro Ngánján Mbérmbér yém, ndené fété ámbiro méghmégh yém njam Ngánjánam té emotai fém. 5 Ámbiro Yuré yém, ámbiro ndimbal mwighé, ámbiro nu walitogh, 6 ámbiro Ngánján yém a ámbiro Afé méinyotio árfene, efe Yuré yém méinyotio árfene, fá násáfote méinyotio ár kénjúmé, a fá yém méinyotio ár kénjún.
english: I therefore , the prisoner in the Lord , beg you to walk worthily of the calling with which you were called ,
with all lowliness and humility , with patience , bearing with one another in love,
being eager to keep the unity of the Spirit in the bond of peace .
There is one body and one Spirit , even as you also were called in one hope of your calling ,
one Lord , one faith , one baptism,
one God and Father of all , who is over all and through all and in us all .

nama: Yénd ámbiroámbiroam té ewanayém tambén fénatayero Kerisoeta. 8 Ndené Buk si noraye, "Fá njam tukét nénguyoi, yémon engwasroi tárfár ár efe yémon té eumbai, yémon ewarametam tambén yáne árét."
english: But to each one of us , the grace was given according to the measure of the gift of Christ .
Therefore he says , “ When he ascended on high , he led captivity captive, and gave gifts to people .” + 4:8 Psalms 68:18

nama: Némé yáne fifi yém, "fá nénguyoi tukét"? Yáne fifi ndené yém fá fronde néneworyéng mband maratot minde yuwot. 10 Féyo fá efe té néneworyéng fáyo yéné féyém efe nuyoi tukét, minde tukét a engwaindai méinyotio njafar tuk, ménát yémon so tafarngé méinyotio mband marat yandio. 11 Fá yéné féyém emon "ewaramete tambén árét," ekafetam ámb Yesuene muyafé ár, ámb ménát Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár, ámb marataye si afrogh ár, ámb misi a watamegh ár. 12 Yémon méinyotio Ngánjánene ár efrendam Ngánjánjene ásáfogh wafroghét, ménát Kerisoene fifi sái yérametat. 13 Féyo yénd méinyotio so kamndangém ámbiro ndimbal mwighé kénjún a matyaman Ngánjánene Ambumoenemén. Yénd so kamndangém anoghkaf ár. Yénd so féyotaro yéném ndené Ngánjánene ménde ndernáye yém téfeyot sái yém, ndené fété Keriso fáyo kés yém. 14 Féyo yénd yau so yéném ndené ambumtértér. Yénd yau sái sófam yénérsa a mbormboram yéngérsa yéné warsogh kér ro árfene watameghan, emofem elimndat ámb ár kértat yéfenjo wafroghmén unyéghe. 15 Wéndende, yénd efalo sái norayam uwégh mbérmbére, yénd táf so nanotam Kerisoefaf méinyotio yaman, efe yém sénko. 16 Ndené fifioene sénko, yémo yáutáne méinyotio fifi ménát so nanote merkéraye. Ámb fifikafe eurau ámb fifikafefaf ménát méinyotio fifi so yém muyafé. Njam fénatafénaté kafekafeyam yéfenjo mer ásáfogh ewafrotat, yénd so náuwétam ámbiroámbiro kénjún mindefifi ndimbalkéráye. Yénmor totér ghérsaye Keriso kénjún
english: Now this , “ He ascended ”, what is it but that he also first descended into the lower parts of the earth ?
He who descended is the one who also ascended far above all the heavens , that he might fill all things .
He gave some to be apostles; and some , prophets ; and some , evangelists ; and some , shepherds and teachers ;
for the perfecting of the saints, to the work of serving , to the building up of the body of Christ ,
until we all attain to the unity of the faith and of the knowledge of the Son of God , to a full grown man , to the measure of the stature of the fullness of Christ ,
that we may no longer be children , tossed back and forth and carried about with every wind of doctrine , by the trickery of men , in craftiness , after the wiles of error ;
but speaking truth in love, we may grow up in all things into him who is the head , Christ ,

from whom all the body , being fitted and knit together through that which every joint supplies , according to the working in measure of each individual part , makes the body increase to the building up of itself in love.

nama: Yurane yétkwénan, yéndon emndetan fém: Yau táf emor ndenanit Ngánján matofnar ár, endefene mwighé em fifiofnar 18 a endefene mwighé em kwéfkwéfan. Fá sifayafnar em yéné ghérsayan Ngánjánam árké yéramete, ménamén yéfene tikéf kwéfkwéf em a tikéf táikér. 19 Wáiwái mwighé té ewawalinda a fá túmén karamangi kétán yaufiyam wafroghét a ewafrotat fénaté sáfot mámáfi yam ékmboghofnar.
english: This I say therefore , and testify in the Lord , that you no longer walk as the rest of the Gentiles also walk , in the futility of their mind ,
being darkened in their understanding , alienated from the life of God because of the ignorance that is in them , because of the hardening of their hearts .
They , having become callous, gave themselves up to lust, to work all uncleanness with greediness .

nama: Yau ndené fém notametaménd Kerisoenemén! 21 Fém té náyárayénd yánemén, a ndené fété yáne waitogh ár fém ewatametaménd efalomén árké yém Yesue kénjún. 22 Yénémamén, tándáwár ghérsé yam titérmbongi, árkéménayam fém taméinde ndené fété fronde ndernáye tamorangérwén-tándáwár ghérsé árké té yiroryéng yánjo yaufi wawérsogh mwighafayo. 23 Féfene tikéf a mwighé so fété káyátongi totér méinyoe, 24 a fémon tané totér ghérsé yam, árké yém Ngánjánene sáfot a nauyafote fáyo efalo ghérsayan árké yém mbarkánd a njúnnjúnofnar.
english: But you didn’ t learn Christ that way ,
if indeed you heard him and were taught in him , even as truth is in Jesus :
that you put away, as concerning your former way of life, the old man that grows corrupt after the lusts of deceit,
and that you be renewed in the spirit of your mind ,
and put on the new man , who in the likeness of God has been created in righteousness and holiness of truth.

nama: Féyo unyégh yau ndenayu! Fém ámbiroámbiro so nafrotati efalo si ámb efalo yátogh árfefaf, ménamén yénd méinyotio Kerisoene fifiyan ámbiro yéném. 26 Fém njam nékwam kémifongé, yau fenjo nékwam nélimnda yaufiyamot, a yau emor nékwafé kétán efogh kuyangé. 27 Yau Sáiféroe sifayé yarameta. 28 Fém njam oro kufrote, fém so kékmbo oro a térnyé ásáfogh, ménát mbarkánd ghérsé so némor a so ewáutáne yauyau ár. 29 Yau waghanéghafé si norayati, wénde wáutáréghafé siro, árkéménayam yafrote a yéramete, ménát fém némé noraye mer so yafrote yéfefaf emofem niyáretat fém. 30 Yau yéméindati Ngánján Mbérmbér áuwéghofnarot. Ngánjánam yéramayéng Ngánján Mbérmbér ménát yékmai yéru féfefaf korayau ndené fém em yáne kétánotio Ngánjánene wanjarégh efogh so yéném. 31 Ewitérmbotati méinyotio njérmat ghérsé, kwérnar a nékw. Yau ndenayu awaranégh{a{ ...f* {a{4.31 awaranégh what is meaning
english: Therefore , putting away falsehood , speak truth each one with his neighbor , for we are members of one another .
“ Be angry , and don’ t sin.” Don’ t let the sun go down on your wrath ,
and don’ t give place to the devil .
Let him who stole steal no more ; but rather let him labor , producing with his hands something that is good , that he may have something to give to him who has need .
Let no corrupt speech proceed out of your mouth , but only what is good for building others up as the need may be , that it may give grace to those who hear.
Don’ t grieve the Holy Spirit of God , in whom you were sealed for the day of redemption.
Let all bitterness , wrath , anger , outcry, and slander be put away from you , with all malice .

nama: Wéndende, mer a ghérghérsisé tikfafé aem ámb árfé, a mwighafnar yaufi ewitati ámb árfene, ndené fété Ngánján té yawalindai Kerisoe kénjúmé féfene yaufiyam.
english: And be kind to one another , tender hearted, forgiving each other , just as God also in Christ forgave you .

nama: Fém Ngánjánene tikfafé ambumtértér em, fémofem so fété ewafrotati ndené Ngánjánam kés ewafrote. 2 Féfene ghérsé ayélimnda uwégham, ndené fété Kerisom yénmuwetam yénd a yéramai yánjo ghérsé téfeyot nénamndai méndefé wimafé ghéngén ramégh Ngánjánene áuwéghafé.
english: Be therefore imitators of God , as beloved children .
Walk in love, even as Christ also loved us and gave himself up for us , an offering and a sacrifice to God for a sweet-smelling fragrance .

nama: Fém sem Ngánjánene ár, yau mbarkánd yém yaufi walyam, awasérmboghe yam o nité. Mété ámb árém emndetat fémofem yéné ewafrotati. 4 Yau mer yém sái norayati wáiwáiafé si, fifiofnar si o fénaté yaufi si wafrogh. Wénde fémofem so Ngánjáne kánjo yarametati. 5 Fém so fété mat em ndené efe em yaufiyamafé, njúnnjúnafé o kwénjtafé(ménamén nité siyém mewang yam yém) fá yau so kényawangi Keriso a Ngánjánene limánégh kénjút.
english: But sexual immorality , and all uncleanness or covetousness , let it not even be mentioned among you , as becomes saints;
nor filthiness, nor foolish talking , nor jesting , which are not appropriate, but rather giving of thanks .
Know this for sure , that no sexually immoral person , nor unclean person , nor covetous man ( who is an idolater ), has any inheritance in the Kingdom of Christ and God .

nama: Emo yau némarsota fém fifiofnar sie yéné téfnan Ngánjánene nékwam so tawanangé fá emofem yau yiyáretat fá. 7 Ndené árfé yau némé táf ewafrotati. 8 Fém té táf kwéfkwéfan tamorwén, wénde fém té namndangi Yurane ár, fém sem kwayaghayan. Yénémamén fém so fété emor ndené kwayaghane ambum. 9 Kwayaghane mbwe sem méinyotio mer yam, mbarkánd yam, a efalo. 10 Mato téronjangi Yuré árké yaman náuwete. 11 Némndafi yau ewafrotati kwéfkwéfoene mbwefnar yam, wénde ekmetati kwayaghat. 12 Wáiwáiafé yém sái norayat ménamén némé áyáréghofnar árém ewafrotat kwankwane. 13 Wénde méinyotio yam njam kénakmangi kwayaghan, méinyotio yam kénamndangi safén, 14 ménamén kwayaghayam eufane méinyotio yam. Yénémamén yéné si noraye, "Kano, kémégh téfnár, a kano kérta, a Keriso so nálále fefaf."
english: Let no one deceive you with empty words , for because of these things the wrath of God comes on the children of disobedience.
Therefore don’t be partakers with them.
For you were once darkness , but are now light in the Lord . Walk as children of light ,
for the fruit of the Spirit is in all goodness and righteousness and truth,
proving what is well pleasing to the Lord .
Have no fellowship with the unfruitful deeds of darkness , but rather even reprove them .
For it is a shame even to speak of the things which are done by them in secret .
But all things , when they are reproved , are revealed by the light , for everything that reveals is light .
Therefore he says , “ Awake , you who sleep , and arise from the dead , and Christ will shine on you .”

nama: Yénémaménnde, kor so fété em ménamén ndernáye fém emor. Yau emor ndenanit káfetafnar árnit, wénde káfeté árnit. 16 Ewafrotati merkéráye méinyotio ásáfogh féfene kés em, ménamén yéné sem yaufi efogh. 17 Yau aem fifiofnar, fété so mat náyátotati Yurane ménde némé yém féfe wafroghét.
english: Therefore watch carefully how you walk , not as unwise, but as wise ,
redeeming the time , because the days are evil .
Therefore , don’ t be foolish, but understand what the will of the Lord is .

nama: Yau wéri nu enetati wériot, yéné yamam fém so ewasérmbote, wénde Ngánján Mbérmbéram atawafongé. 19 Norayati féfenjo kénjún samse, wafnjagh waghe, a mbérmbére waghe. Wafnjagh wagh a sams wagh erametati Yurafaf áuwégh tikfe. 20 Téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene yétkwénan, Ngánján Afai túmén kánjo yarametati méinyotio yammén. Amaf a ár
english: Don’t be drunken with wine , in which is dissipation, but be filled with the Spirit ,
speaking to one another in psalms , hymns , and spiritual songs ; singing and making melody in your heart to the Lord ;
