giving thanks always concerning all things in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ to God , even the Father ;

nama: Náyáretati féfe kénjún ménamén fémofem yutémndati Keriso ndené fété féfene Yuré.
english: subjecting yourselves to one another in the fear of Christ .

nama: Amaf, náyáretati fém féfenjo árfefaf ndené fété Yurafaf kés náyáretati. 23 Ménamén yánjar siyém sénko yatnoefaf ndené fété Keriso siyém sénko Yesuene mérénfaf, a Keriso siyém fáyo Yesuene mérnoene Wanjarégh ár yém, yáne fifi. 24 Ndené fété Yesuene mérén kés fáyo náyárete Kerisoefaf, so fété amaf fáyo náyáretat yéfenjarfefaf.
english: Wives , be subject to your own husbands, as to the Lord .
For the husband is the head of the wife , as Christ also is the head of the assembly , being himself the savior of the body .
But as the assembly is subject to Christ , so let the wives also be to their own husbands in everything .

nama: Ár, euwetati féfetnof, ndené fété Kerisom yuwetam Yesuene mérén a yéramai yánjo ghérsé yáyot. 26 Yesum yafrotam yéné ménát yiyátoi Yesuene mérén njúnnjúnofnar. Yéné yémormén ndenanit yémo kar yénd yénmumbaryéng nue, njam yémo yénérsam Ngánjánene si téfefaf. 27 Yémo yafrote yéné ménát Yesuene mérén yénmanai yánjo sáfrére sariafé a njúnnjúnofnar a téfnofnar, mborofnar o ámb féréngférngofnar. 28 Árém so fété euwetat yéfetnof ndené fété kés euwetat yéfenjo fifi. Ár emon yuwete yátén náuwete fáyo. 29 Emon yau so méndméndat yéfande yánjo fifi. Wénde yéndfem emanjnam a ewarawenam, ndené fété Kerisom ndernáye yafrote Yesuene mérén, 30 ménamén Kerisoene fifi kafe yénd yéném. 31 Ndené Buk si noraye, "Yéné téfnan árom so téfrangongé yárefé a yátmé a yátnofé ámbiro káyátend, a sómbio so kamndend ámbiro." 32 Kété yém kénjkame kwankwane efalo yam yéné Buk sian yufane safét, wénde yénd norayan Kerisoenemén a Yesuene mérénmén. 33 Wénde yéné si wéi siyém féfeyot: méinyotio yéfenjarfem so euwetat yéfetnof ndené fáyo kés náuwetat, a méinyotio yéfetnofem so eutémndat yéfenjaréf.
english: Husbands, love your wives , even as Christ also loved the assembly and gave himself up for her ,
that he might sanctify her , having cleansed her by the washing of water with the word ,
that he might present the assembly to himself gloriously, not having spot or wrinkle or any such thing , but that she should be holy and without defect.
Even so husbands also ought to love their own wives as their own bodies . He who loves his own wife loves himself .
For no man ever hated his own flesh , but nourishes and cherishes it , even as the Lord also does the assembly ,
because we are members of his body , of his flesh and bones.
“ For this cause a man will leave his father and mother and will be joined to his wife . Then the two will become one flesh .”
This mystery is great , but I speak concerning Christ and the assembly .
Nevertheless each of you must also love his own wife even as himself ; and let the wife see that she respects her husband.

nama: Ambumtértér, eyáretati féfene afaf a amaf Yurane kénjún, yéné siyém mbarkánd. 2 Yéné siyém fronde nák unyéghofnar siafé "Eutémanwé fenjo afé a amé 3 ménát feyot merro so yéngém, a fémon so yayamnete tombé ghérsé ámnjogh mbandan."
english: Children , obey your parents in the Lord , for this is right .
“ Honor your father and mother ,” which is the first commandment with a promise :
“ that it may be well with you , and you may live long on the earth .”

nama: Afaf a amaf, yau eusérmbotati féfene ambumtértér yéné yame árké yamam so eméindat nékwot. Wénde ewanotati Yurane watameghe a wawéngsoghe. Faiofnar ásáfogh ár a yuraf
english: You fathers , don’ t provoke your children to wrath , but nurture them in the discipline and instruction of the Lord .

nama: Faiofnar ásáfogh ár, eyáretati féfenjo mbandmén yuré utmanéghafé a férférafé, utmanégh tikfe yafrotati ndené fété ndernáye fémon Keriso so yiyárete. 6 Yau ewafrotati yéné táfandro njam yémofem efandat, ménát fém ménde em yémofem sái efalo eyátotat, wénde méinyotio tikfe fémofem táf ewafrotati némat Ngánján ménde yém, ndené fété Kerisoene faiofnar ásáfogh ár. 7 Ewafrotati féfenjo ásáfogh ndené fété faiofnar ásáfogh ár áuwéghafé, ndené fété fémofem Yurane ásáfogh yafrotati, yau árfene. 8 Nawafarotati Yuram so fai yénmafrote yénd ámbiroámbiroe, faiofnar ásáfogh ár o yuwek ár, mer ásáfoghmén árké yéndfem ewafrotam.
english: Servants , be obedient to those who according to the flesh are your masters , with fear and trembling , in singleness of your heart , as to Christ ,
not in the way of service only when eyes are on you , as men pleasers, but as servants of Christ , doing the will of God from the heart ,
with good will doing service as to the Lord and not to men ,
knowing that whatever good thing each one does , he will receive the same good again from the Lord , whether he is bound or free .

nama: Yuraf, ndenéyameyo nawarawenati féfenjo faiofnar ásáfogh árfefaf a yau eusérmbotati. Nawafarotati ndené fém a féfene faiofnar ásáfogh árfé ámbiro Yuré ewam njafaran, emo yau yuyafote witmaro ménde yam a mogh. Méinyotio Ngánjánene asmégh rokar
english: You masters , do the same things to them , and give up threatening, knowing that he who is both their Master and yours is in heaven , and there is no partiality with him .

nama: Ambinomén, muyafé aem Yurane kénjún a yáne minde tukén wafté kénjún. 11 Numanetati Ngánjánene méinyotio asmégh rokare, ménát fém mé so ewakai Sáiféroene yaufi unyéghta. 12 Ménamén yénd yau nasmetam árfé, wénde ménáyafé yaufi mbérmbérafene waftafé njafar maratan, limánégh mbérmbér, muyafé mbérmbér, a mbérmbérafene wafté árkéménayam elimndat ár yéné kwéfkwéf mband maratan. 13 Yénémamén numanetati sénonjo Ngánjánene méinyotio asmégh rokare, ménát yaufi efogh njam yéném, fém mé so ewakai taikrataye. Njam fémofem méinyotio ewifongi, fém mé so ewakai taikrataye féfenjo sifayan.
english: Finally , be strong in the Lord and in the strength of his might .
Put on the whole armor of God , that you may be able to stand against the wiles of the devil .

For our wrestling is not against flesh and blood, but against the principalities, against the powers , against the world ’s rulers of the darkness of this age, and against the spiritual forces of wickedness in the heavenly places.
Therefore put on the whole armor of God , that you may be able to withstand in the evil day , and having done all , to stand .

nama: Méinyotio fém aewakai, ménáyafé efaloyafé ndené fété beles umbéghkaf féfene karatamé, mbarkánd yam ndené fété féfene wéf wambégh sáláme, 15 a ndené fété féfene sandol afrengéghkaf so em ménát krufrat mer si waitoghét. 16 Túmén efghon ersati ndimbal mwighé ndené fété awambégh mbakw, yénaye fém so féyotaro em yaufi ároene méinyotio fésafé fimb. 17 Tawanangi wanjarégh ndené fété asmégh walaf, a Ngánjánene si ndené fété Ngánján Mbérmbéroene witmafé sénté náifé. 18 Yafrotati méinyotio yéné Ngánjánafé orayégh kénjún nómnendati Ngánjánene wáutáréghét. Ngánjánafé norayati méinyotio yaman Ngánján Mbérmbéroene limánéghan. Yéné téfnan mwighé sénté aem a yau kékmbongi méinyotio Ngánjánene árét Ngánjánafé norayati. 19 Ngánjánafé norayati wéi tayot, ménát Ngánjánam so kwaramangé si táf njam yénd afrengéghkaf wém siyot, a ménát yénd so norayan férférofnar a sái mat eyátotan mer siyoene kwankwane yam. 20 Ngánjánam yénd wénmáfáretam ménát so tawaufrotawén árét mer si yánemén. A yéné téfnan yénd sénonjo kwéfkwéf méngon wélau. Ngánjánafé norayati ménát yénd férférofnar so mer si nafrotan ndené yéndon so fété. Ambinomén áuwégh si
english: Stand therefore , having the utility belt of truth buckled around your waist , and having put on the breastplate of righteousness ,
and having fitted your feet with the preparation of the Good News of peace ,
above all , taking up the shield of faith , with which you will be able to quench all the fiery darts of the evil one .
And take the helmet of salvation , and the sword of the Spirit , which is the word of God ;
with all prayer and requests , praying at all times in the Spirit , and being watchful to this end in all perseverance and requests for all the saints.
Pray for me , that utterance may be given to me in opening my mouth , to make known with boldness the mystery of the Good News ,
for which I am an ambassador in chains ; that in it I may speak boldly , as I ought to speak .

nama: Tukikus yém téfene tikfafé fútar a Yurane ndimbal mwighé kér ro faiofnar ásáfogh ár. Yémon so ewaufrote méinyotio si tanemén, ménát mat so em yéndon némé yafrotan a yénd ndernáye wém. 22 Yéné téfnan yéndon yénmáfáretan fá féfefaf, ndené fém mat so em yénd ndernáye yéném, a ndené fém so ewawéngsote.
english: But that you also may know my affairs , how I am doing , Tychicus , the beloved brother and faithful servant in the Lord , will make known to you all things .
I have sent him to you for this very purpose , that you may know our state and that he may comfort your hearts .

nama: Ngánján Afam a Yuré Yesu Kerisom méinyotio efalo yátogh árfet so tawaramangé krufrát a uwégh ndimbal mwighafé. 24 Ngánjánene ngárám so yém méinyotio yéfefaf emofem yuwetat téfene Yuré Yesu Keriso kérofnar uwéghe.
english: Peace be to the brothers, and love with faith , from God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ .
Grace be with all those who love our Lord Jesus Christ with incorruptible love. Amen.

nama: Yénd wém Fol, Timoti a yénd yénre Keriso Yesuene faiofnar ásáfogh téfnár. Yénd, Fol, yéfarotan yéné férén kétán méinyotio Ngánjánene njúnnjúnofnar ár Yesu Keriso kénjún kété Filifi, mérne yémafé Yesuene mérnafene sénko árfé a ndikun.
english: Paul and Timothy , servants of Jesus Christ , to all the saints in Christ Jesus who are at Philippi , with the overseers and servants :

nama: Ngánján téfene Afé a Yuré Yesu Kerisom so ewaramete ngárám a krufrát féfeyot. Folém kánjo yaramai Ngánjáne efalo yátogh árfenemén Filifiyan
english: Grace to you and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ .

nama: Méinyotio efoghfénefénean yéndon ewafarotan fém, yéndon kánjo yarametan tane Ngánjáne féfenemén. 4 Méinyotio efoghfénefénean yénd noraiwam Ngánjánafé féfeyot, yénd Ngánjánafé noraiwam áuwéghafé 5 ménamén fém tamorwén tane áwárnyégh ár mer sian kétamé fronde efogh yénanotio sénonjo. 6 Yénd efaloe mat wém ndené Ngánjánam yafngo mer ásáfogh féfene kénjún, a so mé yafrote yáne ásáfogh a so tifongé Yesu Kerisoene angogh efghon.
english: I thank my God whenever I remember you ,
always in every request of mine on behalf of you all , making my requests with joy ,
for your partnership in furtherance of the Good News from the first day until now ;
being confident of this very thing , that he who began a good work in you will complete it until the day of Jesus Christ .

nama: Yéné yém mbarkánd ménamén yénd nemnan yéné ende ménamén méinyotio féfenemén, ménamén fém em tane tikfan. Fém em Ngánjánene ngáráman yéndfé njam yénd wém umbéghkaf seine o yamarotan a efalo yiyátotan mer si. 8 Ngánján mat yém ndernáye yénd náronjan méinyotio féfenemén ménáye Yesu Kerisoene uwéghe.
english: It is even right for me to think this way on behalf of all of you , because I have you in my heart , because both in my bonds and in the defense and confirmation of the Good News , you all are partakers with me of grace .
For God is my witness , how I long after all of you in the tender mercies of Christ Jesus .

nama: Yénd túmén Ngánjánafé noraiwam ndené féfene uwégh mé so nénganote matyaman a kénjkam mwighéyan. 10 Féyo fém so mat náyátotati némé merfifi yém a so em njúnnjúnofnar a téfnofnar Kerisoene angogh efghon. 11 Fém túmén so em mbarkánd yam mbwe afoghkaf yéné árké Yesu Kerisom efune. A árém so yéfandat yéné a yuyotat Ngánjánene yétkwén. Némé ghérsane fifi yém Folefaf
english: This I pray , that your love may abound yet more and more in knowledge and all discernment,
so that you may approve the things that are excellent , that you may be sincere and without offense to the day of Christ ,
being filled with the fruits of righteousness which are through Jesus Christ , to the glory and praise of God .

nama: Tane fútaréf, yénd ménde wém fém mat sái em ndené némé kérté té kufrote tafaf té kwáutáne ménát mer si waitoghét. 13 Méinyotio ár yéna yémafayo méinyotio fiyaré warsagh árfene sifayé wambéghfaf, mat em ndené yénd wém seine umbéghkaf Kerisoene téfnan. 14 A tane seine umbéghmén, tárfár efalo yátogh ár nénamndangi mwighé kér ro a férférofnar ewaufrotat si.
english: Now I desire to have you know , brothers, that the things which happened to me have turned out rather to the progress of the Good News ,
so that it became evident to the whole palace guard , and to all the rest , that my bonds are in Christ ,
and that most of the brothers in the Lord , being confident through my bonds , are more abundantly bold to speak the word of God without fear.

nama: Yéné efalo yém ndené ámb árfem yéngwaitotat si Kerisoenemén kétamé áwáramnjaghta a awaingéghawaingégh ghérsata tanemén, wénde ámb árfem yéngwaitotat si Kerisoenemén ménaye mer tikfe. 16 Yéné árém yaitotat si ménamén yémofem uwetat yénd, ménamén fá mat em Yuram wénmuyafo yénd ménát sái yamarotan mer si. 17 Wénde ámb árém yéngwaitotat si Kerisoenemén nité ende, yau mer ende, nemnat ndené yémofem kérté so yéfunat tayot táf yénd seine umbéghkaf swém. 18 Wénde ámb yau némé yém! Ndimbal yam siyém ndené méinyotio ende téu mer o mámáfi téfnan, yémofem kés yéngwaitotat Kerisoenemén. Féyo yénd náuwetan a yénd mé so wéngém áuwéghan. 19 Ménamén yénd mat wém ndené fém norayati Ngánjánafé tayot a Yesu Kerisoene Mbérmbéram siyém wáutáne ta, Ngánjánam yénd so kwutorngé kwéfkwéf méngota. 20 Yénd nawanjetan a méghmégh wém ndené yénd yau so wáiwáiafé wém, wénde tafaf so yém awamarogh ndené yénd skwémorwén frondeyan. A yéndon efalo yiyátotan ndené tane ghérsaye so yuyotan Keriso, téu ghérsé wém o kér wém. 21 Keriso siyém tane méinyotio endeyot yénd so wémor. Wénde téu kér wém, yéné yém minde mer, ménamén yénd so yénre Yesufé. 22 Yénd njam mé wéngém ghérsé fifie, yéné so nérete mbwefé ásáfogh tayot. Wénde yénd mafina wém némé yéndo so taferén? 23 Yéné siyém táikér yém waferghét: Yénd ménde wém krot ménát Kerisofé so yénre, árké yém mindefifi mer. 24 Wénde féfeyot mer so yém ndené yénd ghérsé sái mé wém. 25 Yénd nemnan ndené yéné siyém efalo, féyo yénd mat wém ndené yénd so néngaketan, a fémafé yéngmor mé méinyotio ménát fém so nanotati a náyátotati áuwéghafé féfene ndimbal mwighayan. 26 Féyo, njam yénd nénangotan féfefaf, fém minde so náuwetati Keriso Yesu kénjún a yuyotam yáne yétkwén tane téfnan.
english: Some indeed preach Christ even out of envy and strife , and some also out of good will .
The former insincerely preach Christ from selfish ambition, thinking that they add affliction to my chains;
but the latter out of love, knowing that I am appointed for the defense of the Good News.
What does it matter? Only that in every way , whether in pretense or in truth, Christ is proclaimed . I rejoice in this , yes , and will rejoice .
For I know that this will turn out to my salvation through your prayers and the supply of the Spirit of Jesus Christ ,
according to my earnest expectation and hope , that I will in no way be disappointed, but with all boldness , as always , now also Christ will be magnified in my body , whether by life or by death .
For to me to live is Christ , and to die is gain .
But if I live on in the flesh , this will bring fruit from my work ; yet I don’ t know what I will choose.
But I am hard pressed between the two , having the desire to depart and be with Christ , which is far better .
Yet to remain in the flesh is more needful for your sake .
Having this confidence , I know that I will remain , yes, and remain with you all for your progress and joy in the faith ,
that your boasting may abound in Christ Jesus in me through my presence with you again .

nama: Ndimbal yam siyém ndené féfene ghérsé so yém ndené Kerisoene mer siam ndernáye emndete, ménát, téu o yau yénd wéngém a tawinjon fém. Yénd so káyáran ndené fém ewakai taikrataye ámbiro mwighayan a ámbiro méndeyan fém násmetati mérne ménát ndimbal mwighat mer simén. 28 Fém yau férfér em emofem ekarotat mer simén, túmén aem muyafé, a yéné so yém ufarogh yam yéfeyot ndené fá so kuyangi a fém so kawaindangi, ménamén Ngánján emo ewaramete féfe waingégh. 29 Ngánjánam ewaramai féfe yéné muyé ménátotro Keriso efalo yátoghét, wénde wéi tékratot yáne téfnan. 30 Féfefaf yém ásmégh ndenényameyo tafaf siyém. Njam yénd ténmorwén fémafé, fémofem téfandawét tane ásmégh, a fém náyáretati ménamén tane ásmégh sénonjo.
english: Only let your way of life be worthy of the Good News of Christ , that whether I come and see you or am absent, I may hear of your state , that you stand firm in one spirit , with one soul striving for the faith of the Good News ;
and in nothing frightened by the adversaries, which is for them a proof of destruction, but to you of salvation , and that from God .
Because it has been granted to you on behalf of Christ , not only to believe in him , but also to suffer on his behalf ,
having the same conflict which you saw in me and now hear is in me .

nama: Ménamén féfene ghérsé Keriso kénjún káyátongé muyafé, a yáne uwégham ewamarota. Fém em awarnyéghan Ngánján Mbérmbérafé, fém em kwénjtafnar a ghérghérsisé ámbiroámbiro árfefafmé. 2 Yénémaménnde, yéndo ewamnendan fém yénd áuwéghafé kwiyátongi ménaye ndené sáfotio mwighaye, a ndené sáfotio uwégh, a ámbiro káyátongém mbérmbéran a mwighayan. 3 Yau ewafrotati ámb nité yam o tuktuk yam, wénde sái em yuwan ghérsafé féfe kénjún, a túmén efandati ámb ár em merfifi, yau fémyo. 4 Yau táf nemnati féfenjo ghérsaménro, wénde nemnati wéi kétán ámb árfene ghérsamén.
english: If therefore there is any exhortation in Christ , if any consolation of love, if any fellowship of the Spirit , if any tender mercies and compassion ,
make my joy full by being like-minded, having the same love, being of one accord , of one mind ;
doing nothing through rivalry or through conceit , but in humility , each counting others better than himself ;
each of you not just looking to his own things , but each of you also to the things of others .

nama: Féfene yam wafrogh ndenéyameyo fiya tam Keriso Yesuene:
english: Have this in your mind , which was also in Christ Jesus ,

nama: Keriso témorwén efalofifi Ngánján, wénde fá yau kaneghau fáyo ménát ámbrérero sái tárwén Ngánjánafé.
english: who , existing in the form of God , didn’ t consider equality with God a thing to be grasped,

nama: Wénde yémo yénéfrangoi yánjo sifayé Ngánjánefaf a nénamndai fáyo yauyau. Fá té náráftam sái témorwén ár a nénamndai ndenanit faiofnar ásáfogh téfnár.
english: but emptied himself , taking the form of a servant , being made in the likeness of men .

nama: Fá nénamndai árfifi a témorwén yuwan ghérsafé, yémo taitotatau Ngánjánene ménde ndemamén kér tésérmbnau, fá kér yémormén wafatarégh wénan.
english: And being found in human form, he humbled himself , becoming obedient to the point of death , yes , the death of the cross .

nama: Féyo Ngánjánam yaramai Kerisoe tukénfifi sifayé a yaramai yétkwén árkéménayém ndimbalfifi, yéné yétkwénam ewainde ámb méinyotio yétkwén.
english: Therefore God also highly exalted him , and gave to him the name which is above every name ,

nama: Yénémamén, Yesuene yétkwénoe méinyotio ár so budéme yawefnetat, efe em njafaran, mbandan, a mbandoene mbanmbanan,
english: that at the name of Jesus every knee should bow , of those in heaven , those on earth , and those under the earth ,

nama: a méinyotio kankayam so yémndetat, "Yesu Keriso siyém Yuré!" ménát Afé Ngánjánene minde ndimbalot. Natremngotati ndenanit kénd kwayaghé mband maratan
english: and that every tongue should confess that Jesus Christ is Lord , to the glory of God the Father .

nama: Yénémaménnde, áuwéghafé fútaréf, ndené fém túmén káyáretawét tafaf njam yénd kwémorwén féfefaf, minde mer yém ndené fém náyáretati tafaf sénonjo njamandio yénd wém nayu féfeta. Mé néngásáfotati férférafé a ngerngerafé ménát so tifongi féfenjo wanjarégh. 13 Ngánján túmén násáfote féfene kénjún, tawaramangé ménde a wafté árkéménayam téremngongé fá.
english: So then , my beloved, even as you have always obeyed , not only in my presence , but now much more in my absence, work out your own salvation with fear and trembling .
For it is God who works in you both to will and to work for his good pleasure .

nama: Ewafrotati méinyotio yam áwátaranéghofnar o amroréghofnar. 15 Féyo fém so em kértafnar a njúnnjúnofnar ndené Ngánjánene féwénféwénofnar ambumtértér, efe emor yéné wasnengégh mband maratan a yaufi ár. Fém táf natremngotati yéfefaf ndenanit kénd nanetat njafaran. 16 Naweretati taikrataye kétán ghérsé sifaf. Njam fémofem ewafrotati, yénd so minde áuwéghan wém féfenemén Kerisoene angogh efghon, ménamén yéné yam so yuyafote ndené méinyotio tane ásáfogh féfe kénjún yau so yém fifiofnar. 17 Wénde Yénd so náuwetan njam yéndo ghérsé yétarnan, nasuna ndenanit ghéngén ramégh wékwér Ngánjánefaf, ndené fété féfene ndimbal mwighé kér ro ásáfoghmén yém ramégh Ngánjáne. 18 A fém fiya káuwetangi yénémamén a náuwetam yéndfé. Timoti a Efafroditus
english: Do all things without complaining and arguing ,
that you may become blameless and harmless, children of God without defect in the middle of a crooked and perverse generation , among whom you are seen as lights in the world ,
holding up the word of life , that I may have something to boast in the day of Christ that I didn’t run in vain nor labor in vain .
Yes, and if I am poured out on the sacrifice and service of your faith , I am glad and rejoice with you all .
In the same way, you also should be glad and rejoice with me .

nama: Yénd méghméghan wém Yuré Yesuene kénjún sái yafáretan Timoti kétán féfefaf wékeye, ndené tayot wéi so yém wawéngsogh njam fá nénangota a kwaufrongé féfenemén. 20 Tane ámb ár yau yém ndené Timoti kés yém, emo efalofifi ewarawene fém. 21 Méinyotio ámb ár néretat mé yéfenjo méndefafétro, yau Yesu Kerisoene méndefaf. 22 Wénde fém mat em ndené Timoti té kauyafote fáyo. Ndenanit yárefafé yénau ambumofé násáfot, yénd té kásáfowam mer sian. 23 Yénd méghméghan wém sái yéngwáfáretan Timoti féfefaf wékeye. Wénde fronde, yénd mat wém némé so nufrote tafaf. 24 Yéndo efalo yiyátotan Yuré ndené yénd yéndio so wéném wékeye féfefaf.
english: But I hope in the Lord Jesus to send Timothy to you soon , that I also may be cheered up when I know how you are doing.
For I have no one else like-minded, who will truly care about you .
For they all seek their own , not the things of Jesus Christ .
But you know that he has proved himself . As a child serves a father , so he served with me in furtherance of the Good News .
Therefore I hope to send him at once , as soon as I see how it will go with me .
But I trust in the Lord that I myself also will come shortly .

nama: Yénd nemnan yéndo táf so yéngwáfaretan Efafroditus sái néngangota féfefaf. Fá yém efalo fútar Keriso kénjún. Yéndfé té kásáfowam ménát Ngánjáneyot ásáfogh tafrowam mérne. Yénd kásáfowam minde, ndenanit fiyaré kés em. Njam yénd ménde kwém wáutárghét, fémofem té ténmáfáretati tafaf. Yémo té kwáutáne féfene téfnan. 26 Ménamén fá ménde yém mindefifi ménát sái tawinjongé méinyotio fém, fá siyém mwighayam yawérsote ménamén fém náyárayénd ndené fá enjne témorwén. 27 Néméwét, fá enjne témorwén, a kaka krotro, wénde Ngánján ghérghérsisé yémormén yáfaf a yénd wéi, ménát tafaf yau so yém minde ghérghérsisé. 28 Féyo yénd ménde wém mindefifi ménát sái yéngwáfáretan fá kétán féfefaf ménát njam fémofem tinjongi táf fém so áuwéghafé em, a yénd yau so wawérsote mwighayam féfenemén. 29 Tumyongi fá Yurane kénjún mindefifi áuwéghafé a taramangi utmanégh ndené ároe fá siyém. 30 Ménamén fá kér kaka yémormén Kerisoene ásáfogh téfnan, ménát sái kwaramangé ta wáutárégh ásáfoghét, ménamén fémofem yau so wáutánati ta.
english: But I thought it necessary to send to you Epaphroditus , my brother, fellow worker , fellow soldier , and your apostle and servant of my need ,
since he longed for you all , and was very troubled because you had heard that he was sick .
For indeed he was sick nearly to death , but God had mercy on him , and not on him only , but on me also , that I might not have sorrow on sorrow .
I have sent him therefore the more diligently , that when you see him again , you may rejoice , and that I may be the less sorrowful.
Receive him therefore in the Lord with all joy , and hold such people in honor ,
because for the work of Christ he came near to death , risking his life to supply that which was lacking in your service toward me .

nama: Ambinomén, tane fútaréf, náuwetati Yurane kénjún! Yénayam yau mwighat wawinde ta ménát yéfarotan ndenéyameyo yammén féfefaf yéndon kés yéfarotamén fronde, efaloe, yéné siyém féfenjoyo merot. 2 Kor aem yéfefaf emofem ewafrotat yaufi, efe ndenanit em ághé, efe norayat ménát sái enfetat ghéngan. 3 Wénde yénd yéném efalo Ngánjánene ár. A yau yéné yém ménamén ámb árém kar ghéngan ténénfetawét. Yéné siyém Ngánján Mbérmbéram árké yénlimnde ménát sái yáwefnotam Ngánjáne. Yéndfem kánjo yarametam Ngánjáne ménamén némé Keriso Yesum té yafrotam téfeyot. Yénd yau nemnam téfene fifi néféghét siyém ndimbalfifi. 4 Njam fifioene yam yém ndimbalfifi, féyo yénd táf so korayangén yénd wémor merkéráye. Yénd njam kwémorwén ámb ár emofem mwighé taikre yérsat fifioene yamta, yéndo so tawaindangén méinyotio fá. 5 Yénd ghéngan wénfayénd njam yénd 8 efogh namndayén, a yénd kétamamén wém Israil yumén a Benjaminene mérénmén a yénd wém efalofifi Ibru ár. Ndené fété Farasi ár, yéndon kor merkéráye ewaitotamén Mosesene nák. 6 A yénd ménde kwémorwén ndené yéndon tasérmbotawén Yesuene mérén. Yéndon tawafrotawén méinyotio ndernáye nák témorwén, yénd kwémorwén téfnofnar. 7 Yéné méinyotio yam tamorwén ndimbalfifi tayot, wénde sénonjo yéndon efandan fifiofnar ménamén Kerisoene téfnan. 8 Yau yéné yamro, wénde yénd mat wém ndené efalo yiyátotan tane Yuré Yesu Keriso siyém ndimbalfifi, féyo yéndo efandan méinyotio ámb rokar fifiofnar. Yéndo efalo yiyátotan Yesu, féyo yéndon té tatarnan méinyotio yéné rokar. Yéndon yéné tafandan mérmérnit a taikrataye kawaretan Yesu Kerisoefaf. 9 Yénd sái wém yáne, sénonjo yénd mbarkánd yénre Ngánjánafé, yau ménamén yéndon tanwaitotan nák, wénde ménamén yéndon efalo yiyátoyén Keriso. Ngánjánam tényátongé mbarkánd yémafé ndimbal mwighaye. 10 Méinyotio yénd ménde wém ménát mat so káyáton Keriso a sái térnon anogh wafté, a sái wafnyang yáne tékrátan a kamndan ndené fá yáne kéran, 11 yéné méghméghan yénd yéndio so kanon kétamé kérta. Ménjté ayéngém kétán fai résaghfaf
english: Finally , my brothers, rejoice in the Lord ! To write the same things to you , to me indeed is not tiresome, but for you it is safe .
Beware of the dogs ; beware of the evil workers ; beware of the false circumcision .
For we are the circumcision , who worship God in the Spirit , and rejoice in Christ Jesus , and have no confidence in the flesh ;
though I myself might have confidence even in the flesh . If any other man thinks that he has confidence in the flesh , I yet more :
circumcised the eighth day , of the stock of Israel , of the tribe of Benjamin, a Hebrew of Hebrews ; concerning the law , a Pharisee ;
concerning zeal , persecuting the assembly ; concerning the righteousness which is in the law , found blameless.
However, I consider those things that were gain to me as a loss for Christ .

Yes most certainly , and I count all things to be a loss for the excellency of the knowledge of Christ Jesus , my Lord , for whom I suffered the loss of all things , and count them nothing but refuse, that I may gain Christ
and be found in him , not having a righteousness of my own , that which is of the law , but that which is through faith in Christ , the righteousness which is from God by faith ,
that I may know him and the power of his resurrection, and the fellowship of his sufferings , becoming conformed to his death ,
if by any means I may attain to the resurrection from the dead .

nama: Yénd yau namndetan ndené yéndon té eyanjangén yéné yam o té nénamndan féwénféwénofnar. Yénd mé nawarafnan waingéghét ménát sái tanan fai árké Keriso Yesum té wiyátoi yénd yandio. 13 Tane fútaréf, yénd yau nemnan ndené yéndo té yanan, wénde ámbiro yam yéndon yafrotan siyém sái kwawalindangé némé yém tane sémta a yénd nufotan ménát tiyánjangén némé yém fronde. 14 Yénd nérsan mbarkánde yafarenan yatogh ménát sái kawaindangén fai résaghét, árkéménát Ngánjánam té wanmoi yénd Keriso Yesue kénjúmé kétán yéné ghérsat yémafé njafaran.
english: Not that I have already obtained , or am already made perfect ; but I press on , that I may take hold of that for which also I was taken hold of by Christ Jesus .
Brothers, I don’t regard myself as yet having taken hold , but one thing I do : forgetting the things which are behind and stretching forward to the things which are before ,
I press on toward the goal for the prize of the high calling of God in Christ Jesus .

nama: Méinyotio efe yénd yéném mbérmbére anoghkaf fai kemnangém yéné ende wéi. A njam fémofem nemnati fénatayero yéné yammén, Ngánjánam so ekmete safén féfeyot. 16 Wénde yéndfem fiya mé táitotangém efalo si árkéméné Ngánjánjam té yénmaramai.
english: Let us therefore , as many as are perfect , think this way . If in anything you think otherwise , God will also reveal that to you .
Nevertheless , to the extent that we have already attained , let’s walk by the same rule. Let’s be of the same mind.

nama: Tane fútaréf, méinyotio fém fiya kuwaitotangi tane wafrogh yamamé, a merkéraye efandati ámb ár efe tamorangérwén yéné ende yéndfem ewaufarotam féfe. 18 Yéndon tawaufrotan féfe yénémamén tárfár mbinotmé fronde, a sénonjo yéndon yéfértan yengamafé: yéna em tárfár ár emorang ndené mék téfnárnit Kerisoene wafatarégh wénfaf. 19 Kétán wifoghfaf, Ngánjánam so ewirone fá, yémofem ewafrotat yéfene fifioene ménde némat em, fá em tuktuk ménamén yéfene wáiwáiafé wafroghyammén, a fá nemnat mé ménamén mbandmén rokarménro. 20 Wénde téfene méngotu siyém njafar, a yénd nawanjetam yáyot téfene Wanjarégh ár Yuré Yesu Keriso, sái yéném kétamé njafarta. 21 Ménaye yáne waftaye sái elimnda méinyotio yam, yémon so tawengongé téfene njangén fifi a táyátongé ndené yánjoyo minde mer fifi.
english: Brothers, be imitators together of me , and note those who walk this way , even as you have us for an example .
For many walk , of whom I told you often , and now tell you even weeping , as the enemies of the cross of Christ ,
whose end is destruction, whose god is the belly , and whose glory is in their shame, who think about earthly things .
For our citizenship is in heaven , from where we also wait for a Savior , the Lord Jesus Christ ,
who will change the body of our humiliation to be conformed to the body of his glory , according to the working by which he is able even to subject all things to himself .

nama: Yénémaménnde, tane fútaréf, fém yéndon efe euwetan a karonjan fandaghét, tane áuwégh a ákiki, yakai taikrataye Yurane kénjún yéné endén.
english: Therefore , my brothers, beloved and longed for , my joy and crown , stand firm in the Lord in this way , my beloved.

nama: Yéndon emotangén Euodia a Sintike sái kamyeyayénd Yurane kénjún. 3 A yéndon emotangén fém, tane ndimbal mwighafé fútar, ménát sái ewáutárét yéné sómbio amaf, ménamén fémafé kásáfotam yéndfé mer si kénjún, mérne yémafé Klement a ámb ár emofé kásáfotawém yéndfé, endefene yétkwén ekai kété ghérsé bukan.
english: I exhort Euodia , and I exhort Syntyche , to think the same way in the Lord .
Yes , I beg you also , true partner, help these women , for they labored with me in the Good News with Clement also , and the rest of my fellow workers , whose names are in the book of life .

nama: Túmén miya náuwetati Yurane kénjún! Yénd norayan wéikor: Náuwetati! 5 Yuyafotati métare yam wafrogh ámb árfefaf a féyo méinyotio ár so mat káyátongi yénémamén. Yuré yéném tekofnar. 6 Yau mwighayam ewawérsotat rokarmén, wénde méinyotio féfene Ngánjánafé orayéghan yamnendati Ngánján némat fém ménde em, túmén yamnendati fá kánjo tikfe. 7 A Ngánjánene krufrátam, árké yém minde tukén yém árfene matyamta, so ewarawene féfene tikéf a mwighé Keriso Yesuene kénjún.
english: Rejoice in the Lord always ! Again I will say , “ Rejoice !”
Let your gentleness be known to all men . The Lord is at hand .
In nothing be anxious , but in everything , by prayer and petition with thanksgiving , let your requests be made known to God .
And the peace of God , which surpasses all understanding , will guard your hearts and your thoughts in Christ Jesus .

nama: Wifoghétro, tane fútaréf, tawafongi féfenjo mwighé mer yame. Nemnati yéné yammén árké em efalo, utmanégh, mbarkánd, féwénféwénofnar, uwégh a wafarerégh. 9 Mé ekmetati wafroghyaman méinyotio fém némé kotametati a tarsati yénamé ta tambén, tane sian a tane wafroghyaman. Féyo Ngánjánam emo yénmaramete téfe krufrát so yém féfefaf. Folene kánjo yéfene raméghmén
english: Finally , brothers, whatever things are true , whatever things are honorable , whatever things are just , whatever things are pure, whatever things are lovely , whatever things are of good report : if there is any virtue and if there is anything worthy of praise , think about these things .
Do the things which you learned , received , heard, and saw in me , and the God of peace will be with you .

nama: Yénd minde náuwetan Yurane kénjún ndené fém ménde em ménát tá sái wáutánati wéikor. Fém ménde tamorwén ta wáutárghét frondeyan. Wénde féfeyot yau ámb end yém tá wáutárghét. 11 Yénd yau norayan ménamén yénd náronjan. Yénd té notametamén remngoghét yénayan némé tane wam. 12 Ánde yau em rokar, yénd mat wém yénémén. Ánde em tárfár rokar, yénd wéi mat wém yénémamén. Yénd té notametamén yéné kwankwane yam, ménát méinyotio sifayan, árké efghon, yénd wém féyotaro, téu wém suafé o siogh, sái wam tárfár o nambioro. 13 Yéndon so ewafrotan méinyotio yéné Keriso kénjúmé emo waramete ta muyé.
english: But I rejoice in the Lord greatly that now at length you have revived your thought for me ; in which you did indeed take thought, but you lacked opportunity.
Not that I speak because of lack , for I have learned in whatever state I am , to be content in it .
I know how to be humbled , and I also know how to abound . In any and all circumstances I have learned the secret both to be filled and to be hungry , both to abound and to be in need .
I can do all things through Christ who strengthens me .

nama: Wénde yéné témorwén merfifi féfeyot sái tawafnyangérwén tane kértayan. 15 Fém Filifimén ár mat em ndené fémofem té wáutánaménd ta fronde. Yéné efghon njam yéndon yérnyayén mer si waitogh. Njam yéndon yénéfrangoyén Makedonia marat yu, fémro Yesuene mérén emormén emofem ta wáutánaménd manie. Yau ámb Yesuene mérnam ndené wafrotaménd. 16 Njam yénd Tesalonikan kwémorwén, tárfár mbinotmé fémofem ngwawatembetawét rokar njam yénd káronjawén wáutárghét kété. 17 Yéné yau ndenáye yém yéndon sái tawinjon féfene ramégh, wénde yénd ménde wém fémofem sái ewafrotati mer yam ménát Ngánjánam so efrende fém fai sái tawangongé. 18 A sénonjo tane em méinyotio rokar a minde tárfár! Tane em méinyotio yénd némé ménde kwém, ménamén Efafroditusém tanérse féfene ramégh yénan tafaf. Yéné ndenanit em méndefé wimafé ghéngén ramégh kétán Ngánjáne emo taumyongé, a em méndefé Ngánjánefaf. 19 A tane Ngánjánam so tawaramangé méinyotio némat fém ménde em yáne minde ndimbal wemárta Keriso Yesue kénjún. 20 Téfene Afé Ngánjánene yétkwén so yém ndimbalfifi tuot! Efalo. Folene ambinomén ásneghafé si
english: However you did well that you shared in my affliction .
You yourselves also know , you Philippians , that in the beginning of the Good News , when I departed from Macedonia , no assembly shared with me in the matter of giving and receiving but you only .
For even in Thessalonica you sent once and again to my need .
Not that I seek for the gift , but I seek for the fruit that increases to your account .
But I have all things and abound . I am filled , having received from Epaphroditus the things that came from you , a sweet-smelling fragrance , an acceptable and well-pleasing sacrifice to God .
My God will supply every need of yours according to his riches in glory in Christ Jesus .
Now to our God and Father be the glory forever and ever ! Amen.

nama: Tawaramangi tane ásneghafé si yéfe méinyotio efe em Ngánjánene ár Keriso Yesue kénjún. Efalo yátogh árém yéna yéndfé siéném engwawatembangi féfe yéfene ásneghafé si. 22 A méinyotio ámb Ngánjánene árém engwatembangi yéfenjo ásneghafé si wéi, fénataye yéfe efe násáfotat kété Tukén warsagh ár Kaisarene méngo sifayan.
english: Greet every saint in Christ Jesus . The brothers who are with me greet you .
All the saints greet you , especially those who are of Caesar ’s household .

nama: Téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene ngárám so yém féfefaf méinyotio. Efalo.
english: The grace of the Lord Jesus Christ be with you all . Amen.

nama: Yénd wém Fol, Keriso Yesuene muyafé ár Ngánjánene méndeyan, Timoti téfene fútarfé yénre.
english: Paul , an apostle of Christ Jesus through the will of God , and Timothy our brother,

nama: Yéndfem yéfarowam yéné férén kétán Ngánjánene njúnnjúnofnar árfefaf Kolosia kénjún, efe em téfene ndimbal mwighafé fútar Kerisoene kénjún: Téfene Afé Ngánjánam so tawaramangé ngárám a krufrát féfeyot. Folém kánjo si tarametau Ngánjáne Kolosia efalo yátogh árfenemén
english: to the saints and faithful brothers in Christ at Colossae : Grace to you and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ .

nama: Njam yénd Ngánjánafé norayam, yéndfem túmén kánjo si yaramwam téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene Afé Ngánjáne. 4 Yéndfem kánjo si yaramwam Ngánjáne ménamén yénd té náyáreyayém féfene ndimbal mwighé Keriso Yesuene kénjún a féfene uwégh yém méinyotio Kerisoene árét. 5 Féfene ndimbal mwighé a uwégh yéném kétamé méghmégh árké nawamnde kété njafaran féfeyot árkéméné fém té náyárayénd yéné efalo mer sian. 6 Yéné yénayo mer si árké yénmormén féfefaf té yéngém méinyotio mband maratamé, a mbwe néngafote méinyotio sifayamé engwengote árfene ghérsé, ndené fété tawengote féfene ghérsé kétamé yéné efoghta njam náyárayénd fronde a mat namndayénd efaloe Ngánjánene ngárám. 7 Fém té notametaménd yéné mer si yáfafta Efafras.Fá yém téfene uwéghafé faiofnar ásáfogh ár, efe yém ndimbal mwighé kér ro Kerisoene ásáfogh ár yéndfé. 8 Fá yém emo wéi ténmaufrote téfe ménamén uwégh ámb árét árkéméné Ngánján Mbérmbéran yéramai féfe.
english: We give thanks to God the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ , praying always for you ,
having heard of your faith in Christ Jesus and of the love which you have toward all the saints,
because of the hope which is laid up for you in the heavens , of which you heard before in the word of the truth of the Good News
which has come to you , even as it is in all the world and is bearing fruit and growing , as it does in you also , since the day you heard and knew the grace of God in truth,
even as you learned from Epaphras our beloved fellow servant , who is a faithful servant of Christ on your behalf ,
who also declared to us your love in the Spirit .

nama: Yéné téfnan, kétándmé yéné efogh yénd njam náyáreyayém féfenemén, yénd yau nékmbeyayém Ngánjánafé orayégh féfenemén. Túmén tamnengéwém Ngánján ménát sái tawafotau yáne méndeyoene matyame a Ngánján Mbérmbéram so ewaramete káfeté mwighé a mat yátogh yam. 10 A yénd Ngánjánafé norayam ménát fém so emor ndené Yuré ménde kés yém a so yéremngote méinyotio yaman. Fémofem efunati mbwe ménáyan méinyotio meryam wafroghan, a nanotati Ngánjánene matyaman. 11 A yénd Ngánjánafé wéi norayam ndené muyé raméghkaf so em Ngánjánene méinyotio ndimbal waftaye ménát féfefaf so yém ndimbal awamarogh a métar, 12 a kánjo ramégh áuwéghafé Afai. Fá fáyo té efalo eyátoi sái tawanangi méinyotio rokar némé ewáfrendam yánjo njúnnjúnofnar árét efe emor kwayaghane limánéghan. 13 Yémon té yénmanjaryéng yénd kétamé kwéfitane limánéghta a yénmufaryéng yénd kétán Ambumoene limánégh kénjút yémon efe yuwetam. 14 Yáne Ambumoene ásáfogh kénjúmé, Ngánjánam yénmanjaryéng a ewaindai téfene yaufi. Emofé yau so etmét Ngánjánene Ambumofé
english: For this cause , we also , since the day we heard this , don’ t cease praying and making requests for you , that you may be filled with the knowledge of his will in all spiritual wisdom and understanding ,
that you may walk worthily of the Lord , to please him in all respects , bearing fruit in every good work and increasing in the knowledge of God ,
strengthened with all power , according to the might of his glory , for all endurance and perseverance with joy ,
giving thanks to the Father , who made us fit to be partakers of the inheritance of the saints in light ,
who delivered us out of the power of darkness , and translated us into the Kingdom of the Son of his love,
in whom we have our redemption, the forgiveness of our sins.

nama: Ambum siyém mbanmban yém fandaghofnar Ngánjánene, fronde-sénko méinyotio ufroghmén rokarta. 16 Yáne kénjúnro Ngánjánam méinyotio rokar tawafrotau: rokar njafaran a mbandan, fandaghmén a fandaghofnar, némé téu limánégh ámnjogh sifayé o waftafé ár o limánégh ár o si muyé ár. Ngánjánam méinyotio rokar tawafrotau yáne Ambum kénjúmé a mé yáne Ambumotro. 17 Keriso siyém frondeyo yém méinyotio rokar sem soramé, a mé yáne kénjúnro méinyotio rokar naweretat. 18 A Keriso siyém Yesuene mérnoene sénko, yáne fifi. Fá wéikor siyém rényégh a fronde-sénko efe té nanoi kétamé kérta, ménát méinyotio rokaran fáro so yém fronde sifayan. 19 Ngánján ménde témorwén méinyotio yáne afoghkaf sái témorwén Keriso kénjún. 20 A yáne kénjúmé Ngánjánam sái tanwangongai yandro méinyotio rokar, némé rokar em mbandan o njafaran. Yesu kér yémorwén wafatarégh wénan a nertam yáne férék yéné kénjúmé yémo yafrotam krufrát yam.
english: He is the image of the invisible God , the firstborn of all creation .

For by him all things were created in the heavens and on the earth , visible things and invisible things , whether thrones or dominions or principalities or powers . All things have been created through him and for him .
He is before all things , and in him all things are held together .
He is the head of the body , the assembly , who is the beginning, the firstborn from the dead , that in all things he might have the preeminence .
For all the fullness was pleased to dwell in him ,
and through him to reconcile all things to himself by him , whether things on the earth or things in the heavens , having made peace through the blood of his cross .

nama: Tándái fém nayu té tamorwén Ngánjáneta a mék téfnár ménamén féfenjo mwighamén a féfenjo yaufi wafroghyammén. 22 Wénde sénonjo yémon té eyátoi fém yánjo fútar ménaye Kerisoene fifie kér kénjúmé ménát sái táyátongé njúnnjúnofnar Ngánjánene sáfrére, féwénféwénofnar a téfnofnar. 23 Féyo fém táf ménjté em ndimbal mwighayan a taikrataye ewakai. Yau násámbnetati féfene méghméghta ánde nawerayénd mer sian. Yéné mer si fiyém fémofem árké té náyárayénd a árké té téngwaitotawét méinyotio árét mband maratan, a árkéménaye yénd, Fol, nénáyátoyén faiofnar ásáfogh ár. Folene ásáfogh Yesuene mérnot
english: You , being in past times alienated and enemies in your mind in your evil deeds ,
yet now he has reconciled in the body of his flesh through death , to present you holy and without defect and blameless before him ,

if it is so that you continue in the faith , grounded and steadfast , and not moved away from the hope of the Good News which you heard, which was proclaimed in all creation under heaven , of which I , Paul , was made a servant .

nama: Yénd náuwetan tane tékrátmén ménát féfe wáutárghét, tane fifie tékrat kénjúmé yéndo ewáutánan wifoghét némé mé yém Kerisoene tékrat yáne fifi, Yesuene mérén téfnan. 25 Ngánjánam wékafai yénd sái kénamndangayén yáne faiofnar ásáfogh téfnár ménát wáutárghét Yesuene mérnot. Tane ásáfogh siyém sái ewatametan fém Ngánjánene si afoghare. 26 Tándái Ngánjánam yéné si yétnoi kwankwane méinyotio fronde ár satata, wénde yéné si sénonjo sauréghkaf yém Yurane árfefaf. 27 Ngánjánene mwighé farorégh siyém sái mat eyátota yánjo kwankwane yam yánjo árét, yéné wemár a minde ndimbal kwankwane yam árké yém yáne méinyotio árét. A kwankwane yam siyém ndené Keriso siyém féfene kénjún. A yéné téfnan, fém mat em ndené fém so emor Ngánjánjafé njafaran ámb kaye.
english: Now I rejoice in my sufferings for your sake , and fill up on my part that which is lacking of the afflictions of Christ in my flesh for his body ’s sake , which is the assembly ,
of which I was made a servant according to the stewardship of God which was given me toward you to fulfill the word of God ,
the mystery which has been hidden for ages and generations . But now it has been revealed to his saints,
to whom God was pleased to make known what are the riches of the glory of this mystery among the Gentiles , which is Christ in you , the hope of glory .

nama: Féyo yéndfem yéngwaitotam Keriso méinyotio árfefaf. Yéndfem ewawéngsotam a ewatametam méinyotio káfeté mwighafé ménát yéndfem so enérsam Ngánjánefaf féwénféwénofnarot Keriso kénjún. 29 Yéné téfnan yénd násáfotan minde taikrataye a násmetan méinyotio muyaye árké Kerisom yéramete a árké yém ásáfoghan tane kénjún.
english: We proclaim him , admonishing every man and teaching every man in all wisdom , that we may present every man perfect in Christ Jesus ;
for which I also labor , striving according to his working , which works in me mightily .

nama: Yénd ménde wém fém sái mat em nderé ndimbal kéráye násmetan féfeyot a fá Laodikia yuwon efe em, a méinyotio yéfeyot emofem yau yéfandat tane sáf. 2 Tane ménde siyém fá sái em wawéngsoghkaf tikfan a ámbiro uwéghan, féyo fá so em afoghare wemár árké efalo matyamam yénérse. Yéné ende fá so mat em Ngánjánene kwankwane yam, árké yém Keriso fáyo. 3 Fá siyém ki emo esaune méinyotio ténoghmén ngonjél Ngánjánene káfeté mwighé a matyam. 4 Yéndon ewaufrotan yéné ménát emo yau so ewasote. Yémofem téu ewatametat yéné mwighé árké mernit néretat, wénde yau eyáretati fá. 5 Ndemamén yénd yukér wém féfefaf fifie, wénde yénd fémafé yéném mbérmbére. A náuwetan njam yéndon efandan ndernáye fém so ámbiro féfenjo kénjún watameghan em a nderé muyafé féfene ndimbal mwighé yém Keriso kénjún. Ndernáye efalo yátogh ár so emor
english: For I desire to have you know how greatly I struggle for you and for those at Laodicea , and for as many as have not seen my face in the flesh ;

that their hearts may be comforted , they being knit together in love, and gaining all riches of the full assurance of understanding , that they may know the mystery of God , both of the Father and of Christ ,
in whom all the treasures of wisdom and knowledge are hidden.
Now I say this that no one may delude you with persuasiveness of speech.
For though I am absent in the flesh , yet I am with you in the spirit , rejoicing and seeing your order , and the steadfastness of your faith in Christ .

nama: Fémofem té yanayénd Keriso Yesu ndené fété Yuré. Yénémaménnde, ménjtaye aemor yáne kénjún. 7 Sérémb yéghkaf aem a erametati féfenjo ghérsé yáne kénjún, muyé résagh ndimbal mwighayan ndernáye fém té enwatametamén, a túmén aem kánjo ramégh ár.
english: As therefore you received Christ Jesus the Lord , walk in him ,
rooted and built up in him and established in the faith , even as you were taught , abounding in it in thanksgiving .

nama: Kor aem emo yau táf elimnda ménaye unyéghe a fifiofnar watameghe, árké em árfene wafroghmén a yéné mband maratmén wénde yau yéné eném Kerisoe tambén.
english: Be careful that you don’ t let anyone rob you through his philosophy and vain deceit, after the tradition of men , after the elemental spirits of the world , and not after Christ .

nama: Méinyotio Ngánjánene afoghare yam yém Keriso kénjún, yáne fifiyan 10 a Keriso kénjún fém té ewanayéng kétán wafogh ghérsafaf. Keriso siyém sénko méinyotio waftafé ár a si muyé ár. 11 Kerisoene kénjún fém té enfayénd ghéngan, yau yéné ghéngan néfghe syafrotaménd árém, wénde yéné ghéngan néfghe syafrotam Kerisom, árké yém yuwekot kétamé yéné yaufiyamoene waftata. 12 Njam fém ewalitotaménd, fém té eyatotaménd Kerisofé, a walitogh kénjún fém wéi té nanoyénd Kerisofé féfenjo ndimbal mwighé kénjúmé Ngánjánene waftayan, emo yanoi kérta. 13 Njam fém kérwén tamorwén féfenjo yaufiyam kénjún a ghéngan néfghofnar féfenjo fifiyan, Ngánjánam ghérsafé eyátoi mérne Kerisofé. Ngánján yawalindai téfene méinyotio yaufiyam. 14 Yémo yitérmboi téfene yaufiyammén férén a yénamndam wafatarégh wénan. 15 A wafatarégh wénan Kerisom engwayai wafté mbérmbére limánégh árta a si muyé árta. Fá nauyafoi kwayaghaye ndené yémo méinyotio té ewaindayéng. Sénonjo méinyotio árém té efandat ndené yéné yaufi mbérmbérafefaf yau yém wafté.
english: For in him all the fullness of the Deity dwells bodily ,
and in him you are made full , who is the head of all principality and power .
In him you were also circumcised with a circumcision not made with hands, in the putting off of the body of the sins of the flesh , in the circumcision of Christ ,
having been buried with him in baptism, in which you were also raised with him through faith in the working of God , who raised him from the dead .
You were dead through your trespasses and the uncircumcision of your flesh . He made you alive together with him , having forgiven us all our trespasses ,
wiping out the handwriting in ordinances which was against us . He has taken it out of the way , nailing it to the cross .
Having stripped the principalities and the powers , he made a show of them openly , triumphing over them in it .

nama: Yénémaménnde emo yau táf nák ewafrota ménamén fémofem némé enetati njamke o nu, o njúnnjúnofnar efoghmén o totér ghérare téméndmén o Safatmén. 17 Yéné yam em mbanmbanro kétán efalo némé so ténmorwén, wénde efalofifi siyém Keriso. 18 Yau eumyotati yéné ár efe norayat yaufi si féfefaf. Fá so norayat ndené yémofem efandat fénaté ghékéf waingégh a fémofem táf ewáwefnotati njafar si résagh árét. Fá nemnat fá kar em mer mat, wénde yéfene emarégh yéném yéné mbandmén. 19 Fá yau em Kerisoene, efe yém méinyotio fifioene sénko. Yesum ewáutáne yáne ár ménát sái karnyangi yémafé ndené fété fifioene sénkoyam méinyotio fifi kafekafe ewáutáne ménjérménjér árkamé em. Ndené ende yénd nanotam ndernáye Ngánján ménde yém yénd sái nanotam.
english: Let no one therefore judge you in eating or drinking , or with respect to a feast day or a new moon or a Sabbath day ,
which are a shadow of the things to come ; but the body is Christ ’s.
Let no one rob you of your prize by self-abasement and worshiping of the angels, dwelling in the things which he has not seen , vainly puffed up by his fleshly mind ,
and not holding firmly to the Head , from whom all the body , being supplied and knit together through the joints and ligaments , grows with God ’s growth.

nama: Fém kér té emormén Kerisofé a eyátoi yuwek kétamé limánégh mbérmbérafeta yéné mband maratmén. Yénémaménnde, némamén fém so emor ndené fém em yéné mband maratmén? Némamén fémofem ewaitotati yéné nák ndené, 21 "Yau yereta yéné! Yau tufo yéné! Yau tiyánja!"? 22 Yéné náknákam yufarotat ndenanit em mband maratmén rokar yénau engnetam a ngawaindangi, ménamén yéné sem ár wafroghmén náknákro, a watamegh em. 23 Yéné náknák ndenanit em kar nufrotat káfeté mwighayan, yéfenjo fifi ménde wáwefnogh yamafé, yéfene unyégh yuwan mwighafé a ewafrotat yaufi yéfene fifiyan, wénde ámb yau ewam yéfene wafté fifioene méndefaf waingéghét.
english: If you died with Christ from the elemental spirits of the world , why , as though living in the world , do you subject yourselves to ordinances ,
“Don’t handle , nor taste , nor touch ”
( all of which perish with use ), according to the precepts and doctrines of men ?
These things indeed appear like wisdom in self-imposed worship , humility , and severity to the body , but aren’ t of any value against the indulgence of the flesh .

nama: Fém té nanoyénd Kerisofé, yénémaménnde ewafarenati tikfe njafarmén rokar, ánde Keriso námnjoi Ngánjánene tambén ngángata. 2 Ewafarenati féfenjo mwighaye njafarmén rokar, yau yéna mband maratmén rokar, 3 ménamén fém kér té emormén, a féfene ghérsé siyém etnong Kerisofé Ngánjánene kénjún. 4 Táf Keriso, efe yém féfene efalo ghérsé, njam kufarngé, fém wéi so em yémafé ndimbal kwayaghayan.
english: If then you were raised together with Christ , seek the things that are above, where Christ is , seated on the right hand of God .
Set your mind on the things that are above , not on the things that are on the earth .
For you died , and your life is hidden with Christ in God .
When Christ , our life , is revealed , then you will also be revealed with him in glory .

nama: Ekmetati krot féfene mband tikéf: yaufi wal, wáiwáiyam, méndméndro, yaufi mwighé a kwénjté, árké yém mewangot. 6 Yéné téfnan, Ngánjánene nékw so yéném. 7 Fém té tayotau yéné yaufi yamamé, fronde fém kés tamorwén. 8 Wénde sénonjo fém kékmbongi yéné yamta: nékw, kwérnar, méndménd, wasaligh, a yaufi si orayégh mbírmbíre. 9 Yau táf engwawinda ámb árfet, ménamén fémofem té ewitaménd féfene tándáwár ghérsé yéfenjo wafroghyamafayo. 10 Nawamanetati totér ghérsaye, árkéméné té nénamndai totér matyam kénjún yáne Wafrogh ároene mbanmbanan. 11 Yéné totér ghérsayan némé ámb yau yéna yém Téndo ár or Ju ár, ghéngan néfégh ár o ghéngan néféghofnar ár, dábi ár, áronjagh ár, faiofnar ásáfogh ár o yuwek ár, wénde Keriso siyém méinyotio, a fá yémor méinyotio kénjún.
english: Put to death therefore your members which are on the earth : sexual immorality , uncleanness, depraved passion , evil desire , and covetousness , which is idolatry .
For these things ’ sake the wrath of God comes on the children of disobedience.
You also once walked in those , when you lived in them ,
but now you must put them all away: anger , wrath , malice , slander, and shameful speaking out of your mouth .
Don’ t lie to one another , seeing that you have put off the old man with his doings,
and have put on the new man , who is being renewed in knowledge after the image of his Creator ,
where there can’ t be Greek and Jew , circumcision and uncircumcision, barbarian, Scythian , bondservant, or free person; but Christ is all , and in all .

nama: Yénémaménnde, ndené fété Ngánjánene kaféghmén ár, njúnnjúnofnar a mindefifi uwéghkaf, nawamanetati fémyo yénaye ghérghérsisé, mer, yuwan ghérsé, merafé yam a métar. 13 Njam ámb féfene té ewam áwátaranégh ámb árfé, tawawalindangé yéfene yaufi ndené fété Yuré kés yawalindai féfene yaufi. Ámyogh ár aem ámb árfé a tawawalindangé yéfene yaufi. 14 A méinyotio yéné meryamfaf téfghangi uwégh, árké ménáyam taumbangé méinyotio yam ámbiro tikfan.
english: Put on therefore , as God ’s chosen ones, holy and beloved, a heart of compassion , kindness , lowliness , humility , and perseverance ;
bearing with one another , and forgiving each other , if any man has a complaint against any ; even as Christ forgave you , so you also do .
Above all these things , walk in love, which is the bond of perfection .

nama: Kerisoene krufrátam so elimnde féfene tikéf, ménamén fém fifikafe em ámbiro fifiyan fém té enmotai yéné krufrátfaf féfe kénjún. A so em kánjo raméghafé. 16 Kerisoene si so yémor féfene kénjún afoghare ndené fété nawatametati a nawáutanati fémyo méinyotio sáfot káfeté mwighaye. Wagh yérametati Ngánjánefaf ménaye samse, wafnjagh wagh, a wagh Ngánján Mbérmbérta kánjo ramégh tikéfafé. 17 A némé fémofem njam ewafrotati o norayati, ewafrotati méinyotio Yuré Yesuene yétkwénan, yarametati kánjo ramégh Ngánján Afai yá kénjúmé. Efalo yátogh árfene mérén ghérsé
english: And let the peace of God rule in your hearts , to which also you were called in one body , and be thankful .
Let the word of Christ dwell in you richly ; in all wisdom teaching and admonishing one another with psalms , hymns , and spiritual songs , singing with grace in your heart to the Lord .
Whatever you do , in word or in deed , do all in the name of the Lord Jesus , giving thanks to God the Father through him .

nama: Amaf, náyáretati féfenjo árfefaf, yénéfai fémofem tawafrotangi ndené fété efalo yátogh ár.
english: Wives , be in subjection to your husbands, as is fitting in the Lord .

nama: Ár, euwetati féfenjo amaf a yau táf tékrát em yéfefaf.
english: Husbands, love your wives , and don’ t be bitter against them .

nama: Ambum, eyáretati féfene afaf a amaf méinyotio efghon, yénayan náuwete Yuré.
english: Children , obey your parents in all things , for this pleases the Lord .

nama: Afaf a amaf, yau nékwot eméindati ambumtértér, o fá so kuwembangi.
english: Fathers , don’ t provoke your children , so that they won’ t be discouraged.

nama: Faiofnar ásáfogh téfnár, eyáretati féfenjo mbandmén yuré méinyotio yaman, a násáfotati, yau táfandro yéfene ghékfanro ménát yéfene ménde wifoghét, wénde násáfotati efalo tikfe árké yém Yuré férfér. 23 Némé ásáfogh njam yafrotati, násáfotati méinyotio féfene tikfe, ndené fété násáfotati Yurai, yau mbandmén yurai. 24 Nawafarotati ndené Yuram so tawaramangé fai féfe némé yémo té tawamnde yáne árét. Ménamén Keriso siyém efalofifi Yuré fém násáfotati yáyot. 25 Árké árom yafrote mámáfi so tinjongé wéndefai yánjo yaufimén, ménamén Ngánjánam moghan ekmete méinyotio ár ámbrérero.
english: Servants , obey in all things those who are your masters according to the flesh , not just when they are looking, as men pleasers, but in singleness of heart , fearing God .
And whatever you do , work heartily , as for the Lord and not for men ,
knowing that from the Lord you will receive the reward of the inheritance ; for you serve the Lord Christ .
But he who does wrong will receive again for the wrong that he has done, and there is no partiality .

nama: Yuré, ewawafrotati féfenjo faiofnar ásáfogh árét mbarkándaye a ámbrérero, ménamén fém mat em ndené féfene Yuré wéi kété yém njafaran. Wéikor waufarogh yam
english: Masters , give to your servants that which is just and equal , knowing that you also have a Master in heaven .

nama: Kétan karamangi Ngánjánafé orayégh kénjút, ghékéf éregh aem a kánjo ramégh. 3 A Ngánjánafé norayati téfeyot wéi, ménát Ngánjánam so tésawérngé sésafne téfene si waitoghét, ménát yéndfem so yéngwaitotam Kerisoene kwankwane yam, yéné téfnan yénd wényau kwéfkwéf méngon. 4 Ngánjánafé norayati ménát yéndon so néngafrotan safénro, ndené yéndon so fété. 5 Kor káfeté mwighaye nawarawenati wafroghyaman yéfe tambén efe em efalo yátoghofnar, ewafrotati mere méinyotio ásáfogh féfene sem yémafé. 6 Féfene si fia túmén tam méndefé a wayamneghafé, ménat fémofem so tawaramangi mbarkánd uwangogh méinyotio árét. Ambinomén ásneghafé si
english: Continue steadfastly in prayer , watching in it with thanksgiving ,
praying together for us also , that God may open to us a door for the word , to speak the mystery of Christ , for which I am also in bonds ,
that I may reveal it as I ought to speak .
Walk in wisdom toward those who are outside , redeeming the time .
Let your speech always be with grace , seasoned with salt, that you may know how you ought to answer each one .

nama: Tukikusém so ewaufrote méinyotio si tanemén. Fá siyém tane fútar, ndimbal mwighafé faiofnar ásáfogh ár yéndfé Yurane kénjún. 8 Yéndon yéngwáfáretan fá féfefaf ménát fém mat so em yénd ndernáye yénmor yéna a yémon so ewawéngsote féfene tikéf. 9 Fá enre yémafé Onesimusfé, téfene ndimbal mwighé kér ro fútar, efe wéi yém féfenjoyo. Yémofem so ewaufrot méinyotio némé nufrote yéna.
english: All my affairs will be made known to you by Tychicus , the beloved brother, faithful servant , and fellow bondservant in the Lord .
I am sending him to you for this very purpose , that he may know your circumstances and comfort your hearts ,
together with Onesimus , the faithful and beloved brother, who is one of you . They will make known to you everything that is going on here .

nama: Aristakusém, emafé yénlaware yéndfé kwéfkwéf méngon, engwawatembete ásneghafé si, a Makém wéi, efe yém Banabasene yákal. (Fémofem té náyárayénd si yánemén, fá njam yéném féfefaf táf tumyongi.) 11 Yesu, efe yémndetat Jéstus, wéi engwawatembete ásneghafé si. Yéné nambio ár fáro Ju ármén em tane ásáfogh árfefaf Ngánjánene limánégh kénjút, a fá té tam ndimbal wáutárégh ár tayot. 12 Efafras, efe ámb yém féfenjoyo a Keriso Yesuene faiofnar ásáfogh ár, engwawatembete ásneghafé si. Fá túmén yakai Ngánjánafé oraighan féfe téfnan, ménát fém so taikrataye ewakai Ngánjánene méndefaf, ndené fété sotafé efalo yátogh ár Keriso kénjún. 13 Yénd nafrotan yánemén fá minde násáfote féfeyot a yéfeyot efe em Laodikia yuwon a Ierafolis yuwon. 14 Téfene fútar Luk, efe yém njokté, a Demas, yémofem ásneghafé si engwawatembend féfe. 15 Tawaram tane ásneghafé si yéfe fútarét Laodikia yuwon, a amaf Nimfa a Yesuene mérnat efe náumendat yáne méngon.
english: Aristarchus, my fellow prisoner , greets you , and Mark the cousin of Barnabas ( concerning whom you received instructions , “ if he comes to you , receive him ”),
and Jesus who is called Justus . These are my only fellow workers for God ’s Kingdom who are of the circumcision , men who have been a comfort to me .
Epaphras , who is one of you , a servant of Christ , salutes you , always striving for you in his prayers , that you may stand perfect and complete in all the will of God .
For I testify about him that he has great zeal for you , and for those in Laodicea , and for those in Hierapolis .
Luke the beloved physician and Demas greet you .
Greet the brothers who are in Laodicea , with Nymphas and the assembly that is in his house .

nama: Soramé fémofem yaftati yéné férén, mat aem ndené yaftati wéi Laodikia Yesuene mérnan. Yéné efghonyo, yaftati tane férén efalo yátogh árét Laodikia yuwon yémofem so tawawatembangi féfe.
english: When this letter has been read among you , cause it to be read also in the assembly of the Laodiceans , and that you also read the letter from Laodicea .

nama: Taufrongi Akifuse: "Sia tifongé yéné ásáfogh árké Yuram yéramai fe."
english: Tell Archippus, “ Take heed to the ministry which you have received in the Lord , that you fulfill it .”

nama: Yénd, Fol, yéfarotan yéné ásneghafé si tanjo ngángaye. Wafarotati Ngánjánafé orayégh tayot njam yénd wém kwéfkwéf méngon. Ngárám so yém féfefaf.
english: I , Paul , write this greeting with my own hand . Remember my chains . Grace be with you . Amen.

nama: Yéné férén siyém yéfeta Fol, Sailes a Timoti. Yéndfem yéfarotam yéné kétán Tesalonika árfefaf efe em Afé Ngánján a Yuré Yesu Keriso kénjún. So ngárám a krufrát yém féfeyot. Kánjo ramégh yéfeyot Tesalonika árfeyot ndimbal mwighamén
english: Paul , Silvanus , and Timothy , to the assembly of the Thessalonians in God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ : Grace to you and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ .

nama: Yéndfem túmén kánjo Ngánjáne yarametam méinyotio féfenemén a engwafarotam téfene Ngánjánafé orayégh kénjún. 3 Yéndfem túmén ewafarotam téfene Afé Ngánjánene sáfan fémofem ndernáye féfene ndimbal mwighé yékmetati wafroghyaman, féfene uwégham ndernáye yékém táikér ásáfoghét, a ndernáye féfene méghmégh sotafé yém téfene Yuré Yesu Keriso kénjún.
english: We always give thanks to God for all of you , mentioning you in our prayers ,
remembering without ceasing your work of faith and labor of love and perseverance of hope in our Lord Jesus Christ , before our God and Father .

nama: Fútaréf, yénd mat yéném Ngánjánam euwete fém a ewaferyéng fém yandio. 5 Njam yéndfem enwarsamém féfeyot mer si, mé siro yau wénde waftafé a Ngánján Mbérmbérafé a kénjkam efalo yátoghafé. Fém mat em yénd ndernáye ténmorangérwén féfene kénjún féfe téfnan. 6 Fém nufénmetati téfeta a Yuré. Ndemamén fém tamorwén minde kérté yaman, fémofem yumyoyénd si áuwéghafé árké yéramai Ngánján Mbérmbéram. 7 Yénémaménnde, fém nénamndayénd waufarogh ár méinyotio efalo yátogh árét Makedonia a Akaya yuwon. 8 Yurane si marat náyátoi féfeta, yau kétándmaro Makedonia a Akaya yuwon, wénde féfene ndimbal mwighé Ngánján kénjún té namndai marat méinyotio yuwomé. Féyo yénd yau so némé norayam yénémamén. 9 Méinyotio ár norayat ménamén ndernáye fémofem yénd yénmumyoyénd yéndfem njam eyafoyém, a ndernáye fém nawengoyénd kétándmé mewang wáwefnoghta akegh a efalo Ngánjáne ásáfoghét 10 a sái yánjetam ménát yáne Ambum sái nénangota njafarta- yáne Ambum Yesu, fá efe yanoi kérta a emo yénmanjane yénd Ngánjánene nékwta árkéméné yéném.
english: We know , brothers loved by God , that you are chosen ,

and that our Good News came to you not in word only , but also in power , and in the Holy Spirit and with much assurance . You know what kind of men we showed ourselves to be among you for your sake .
You became imitators of us and of the Lord , having received the word in much affliction , with joy of the Holy Spirit ,
so that you became an example to all who believe in Macedonia and in Achaia.
For from you the word of the Lord has been declared , not only in Macedonia and Achaia, but also in every place your faith toward God has gone out , so that we need not to say anything .
For they themselves report concerning us what kind of a reception we had from you , and how you turned to God from idols to serve a living and true God ,
and to wait for his Son from heaven , whom he raised from the dead : Jesus , who delivers us from the wrath to come .

nama: Fútaréf, fém fémyo mat em ndené téfene yafogh féfefaf yau témorwén fifiofnar. 2 Fém mat em nderé mámáfie yénd ténmanjetawét Filifi yuwon, soramé yénd nénwanongém féfefaf minde tékrát tayaretam yéndfem kété. Wénde téfene Ngánjánam muyé yénmaramayéng yáne mer si waitoghét féfefaf marataye férférofnar ndemamén yénd mék téfnáram yénmarendayénd. 3 Fémofem té yéfandati yéndfem yau si táitotam unyégh a yaufi mwighafé o tawasotam. 4 Yénd korayawém ndené fété si résagh ár efe Ngánjánam efalo té yényátoi mer si waitoghét. Téfene téfén siyém Ngánján áuwéghét sái yéméindam, yau ár, mé Ngánjánamro yénmamanyote téfene tikfan. 5 Fém mer mat em ndené yénd yau awarmbogh si korayam ámb ároenemén, yénd yau kawafnam téfene fútaréf ménát fémofem mani sái ténmarametawét. Ngánján mat yém ndené yéné siyém efalo. 6 Yénd yau ménát néretam árém sái yénmuwetat, yau fémofem o ámb árém, 7 ndené fété Kerisoene muyafé ár, yénd féyotaro yéném ámb emnengégh sái yafrotam féfefaf. Wénde yénd téném métar féfene kénjún, ndenéyame amam nau yánjo ambum ewarawene. 8 Yéndfem táuwetam fém mindefifi, yénémamén yéndfem tawarametam féfeyot Ngánjánene mer siro yau, wénde téfene ghérsé ámnjoghmén ndenáyo. 9 Fútaréf, nawafarotati nderé mélmélafé yénd kásáfotam féfefaf. Sémbáran a efghon yéndfem mani ásáfoghan mélmél téfandawém téfendio mer ghérsé ámnjoghét ménát yéndfem yau so kérté féfe ewarametam Ngánjánene mer si waitoghan féfeyot.
english: For you yourselves know , brothers, our visit to you wasn’ t in vain ,
but having suffered before and been shamefully treated, as you know , at Philippi , we grew bold in our God to tell you the Good News of God in much conflict.
For our exhortation is not of error , nor of uncleanness, nor in deception .
But even as we have been approved by God to be entrusted with the Good News , so we speak — not as pleasing men , but God , who tests our hearts .
For neither were we at any time found using words of flattery, as you know , nor a cloak of covetousness ( God is witness ),
nor seeking glory from men ( neither from you nor from others), when we might have claimed authority as apostles of Christ .
But we were gentle among you , like a nursing mother cherishes her own children .
Even so , affectionately longing for you , we were well pleased to impart to you not the Good News of God only , but also our own souls , because you had become very dear to us .
For you remember , brothers, our labor and travail ; for working night and day , that we might not burden any of you , we preached to you the Good News of God .

nama: Fém fété téfene fandagh ár em, a ndenéyameyo Ngánján wéi, téfene wafroghyam yém mbarkánd, mer a téfnofnar féfefaf emofem efalo yiyátoyénd. 11 Fém mat em yéndfem efrendam fém méinyotio ndenéyame afam ambum nau efrende. 12 Yéndfem fém ewamnendam, fém ewawongsótam a ewendam féfene mer ghérsé ámnjoghét yéné ende Ngánján ndernáye ménde yém. Ménamén Ngánjánam emotai fém yáne limánégh a ndimbal kwayaghafaf.
english: You are witnesses with God how holy, righteously , and blamelessly we behaved ourselves toward you who believe .
As you know , we exhorted , comforted , and implored every one of you , as a father does his own children ,
to the end that you should walk worthily of God , who calls you into his own Kingdom and glory .

nama: Yénémamen, yénd yau so kékmbongém kánjo si Ngánjáne, njam fémofem yumyoyénd yáne mer si téfe tambén, fém yau kemnawét téfene simén ndené árfene mwighamén si kar yém, wénde efalo fété Ngánjánene si yém, árké yém ásáfoghan féfene kénjún emofem efalo yiyátotat. 14 Fútaréf, fém ufénmanégh ár náyátoyénd Yesuene mérnan Judia kénjún, árké em Keriso Yesu kénjún. Fém tékrátan takmetawét féfenjo yumén árém ndenéyameyo yéné Yesuene mérén kés tékrátan takmetawét Ju árém. 15 Yémofem esmetaménd Yuré Yesu a Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár, a wéi yénésmetat yénd. Yémofem Ngánján áuwéghofnar yiyátoyénd a ndenéyameyo ár wéi áuwéghofnar. 16 Yémofem yéta yénékmbotat mer wanjarégh simén Téndo árfeyot waitoghét. Yéné ende yémofem túmén farufaru efayotat yéfenjo yaufi. Wénde Ngánjánene nékwam soramé ewerai. Folene ménde Tesalonika ár fandaghét
english: For this cause we also thank God without ceasing that when you received from us the word of the message of God , you accepted it not as the word of men , but as it is in truth, God ’s word , which also works in you who believe .
For you , brothers, became imitators of the assemblies of God which are in Judea in Christ Jesus ; for you also suffered the same things from your own countrymen , even as they did from the Jews
who killed both the Lord Jesus and their own prophets , and drove us out , and don’ t please God , and are contrary to all men ,
forbidding us to speak to the Gentiles that they may be saved , to fill up their sins always . But wrath has come on them to the uttermost .

nama: Fútaréf, yénd soramé nófárnayém féfe tambén némbne efoghfénefénetro(wénde téfene tikfam fém yau efrangoyéng), yénd yéta kénufotam angoghét ménát féfe fandaghét. 18 Yénd ndimbal ménde ténmorwén féfefaf álighét, yénd, Fol yéta kufotawén angoghét féréghféréghe, wénde Sáifram yénd mé ténékmbotawéng. 19 Ménamén némé yam téfe yénmaramete méghmégh a áuwégh, a némé so yém téfene fai a ákiki árkéménáyan yénd mérne so yénmakai táf téfene Yuré Yesu njam nénangota? Féfefaf yéné yémǃ 20 Néméwét, fém em téfene ndimbal kwayaghé a áuwégh.
english: But we , brothers, being bereaved of you for a short season in presence , not in heart , tried even harder to see your face with great desire ,
because we wanted to come to you — indeed , I , Paul , once and again — but Satan hindered us .
For what is our hope , or joy , or crown of rejoicing ? Isn’ t it even you , before our Lord Jesus at his coming ?
For you are our glory and our joy .

nama: Féyo yénd féyotarofnar ténmorwén yéné yam sái tayaretawém teke, yéndfem mwighé yaitotamém téfembia ámnjoghét Atenén. 2 Yéndfem yéngwáfáretamém Timoti, efe yém téfene fútar a Ngánjánene ásáfogh ár emon Kerisoene si marat yiyátoi. Yéndfem yéngwáfáretam muyé ramghét féfeyot a féfe wawongsóghét efe fém ewakai ndimbal mwighaye. 3 Ménát efe yau so kásámbneta yéné ufoghan. Fém mat em ndené yénd té yénmaferyéng yéné ufogh yamot. 4 Njam yénd mé ténmorwén fémafé, yéndfem té tawaufrotawém féfe ndené yénd so yénmakéindat. A ndenáye fété kufrotau némé fém mat em. 5 Yéné téfnan, yéndon té yéngwáfáretamén Timoti. Yéndon yau so tayaretawén teke, féyo yéndon yéngwáfáretamén ménát féfene ndimbal mwighé ufénmanéghét. Yénd férfér kwémorwén ménamén ámb ende Sáifram mété eufota fém a téfene ásáfogh mété yém fifiofnar. Timotiene wawéngsoghmén afrogh
english: Therefore when we couldn’t stand it any longer , we thought it good to be left behind at Athens alone ,
and sent Timothy , our brother and God ’s servant in the Good News of Christ , to establish you and to comfort you concerning your faith ,
that no one would be moved by these afflictions . For you know that we are appointed to this task.
For most certainly , when we were with you , we told you beforehand that we are to suffer affliction , even as it happened , and you know .
For this cause I also , when I couldn’ t stand it any longer , sent that I might know your faith , for fear that by any means the tempter had tempted you , and our labor would have been in vain .

nama: Wénde njam Timoti té nénangotam, yémon yénérsam téfeyot mer si féfene ndimbal mwighamén a uwéghmén. Fá kafrotau ndené fémofem túmén yénmawafarotati téfene yafogh áuwéghafé, ndené fém ménde em téfe fandaghét ndené fété yénd ménde yéném féfe fandaghét. 7 Yénémaménnde, fútaréf, méinyotio téfene ndémke a tékrát kénjún, yénd muyafé namndayém féfenemén ménamén féfene ndimbal mwighé. 8 Ménamén sénonjo yénd efalo ghérsaye yénmor njam fém mé taikrataye enwakai Yurane kénjún. 9 Ndernáye yéndfem kánjo yarametam Ngánjáneyot féfeneménǃ Ménamén féfenemén téfefaf yém ndimbal áuwégh ndené kés nényawetam Ngánjánene sáfrére. 10 Sémbáran a efghon yéndfem yamnendam fá méinyotio téfene tikfe ménát yéndfem sái kor tawinjongém fém a tawaramangém némé féfene ndimbal mwighé kénjún náláite.
english: But Timothy has just now come to us from you , and brought us glad news of your faith and love, and that you have good memories of us always , longing to see us , even as we also long to see you .
For this cause , brothers, we were comforted over you in all our distress and affliction through your faith .
For now we live , if you stand fast in the Lord .
For what thanksgiving can we give again to God for you , for all the joy with which we rejoice for your sakes before our God ,
night and day praying exceedingly that we may see your face and may perfect that which is lacking in your faith ?

nama: So téfene Afé Ngánjánam yémonyo a téfene Yuré Yesum end yéfrende téfeyot ménát féfefaf sái yéném. 12 So Yuram yanote a yafarne féfene uwégh fémrofémro kénjún a méinyotio árét, ndené fété téfene uwégh féfeyot kés yafarnam. 13 Ndené yameyo yémon so muyé ewaramete, a fém so em téfnofnar a njúnnjúnofnar téfene Afé Ngánjánene sáfrére táf njam téfene Yuré Yesu yéném yémafé méinyotio efe yáne em.
english: Now may our God and Father himself, and our Lord Jesus Christ , direct our way to you .
May the Lord make you to increase and abound in love toward one another and toward all men , even as we also do toward you ,
to the end he may establish your hearts blameless in holiness before our God and Father at the coming of our Lord Jesus with all his saints.

nama: Fútaréf, wifoghan yéndfem ewatametamém ndernáye fém so emor ménát Ngánján áuwéghét sái yéméindati, ndené fété fém kés emor. Sénonjo yéndfem ewamnendam fém a ewendam fém Yuré Yesuene yétkwénan ménát sái yafrotati túmén. 2 Ménamén fém mat em némé yéndfem ewatametamém fém ménaye Yuré Yesuene muyaye.
english: Finally then , brothers, we beg and exhort you in the Lord Jesus , that as you received from us how you ought to walk and to please God , that you abound more and more .
For you know what instructions we gave you through the Lord Jesus .

nama: Ngánján ménde yém fém sái em njúnnjúnofnar, féyo fémofem so ekarotati yaufi wal yam. 4 Fém so fété mat em ndernáye fém so emor féfenjo amafafé njúnnjúnofnar a utmanégh ende, 5 yau wal yam mwighé afoghkaf aem mband árnit, efe mafina em Ngánján. 6 Yéné yaman, emo yau táf yáfútar mámáfi yafrota o yáne mer sái yérsa yaufie. Yuram so tékrátan tákmangé ár méinyotio yéné yaufimén, ndernáye yéndfem té taikrataye emndetamém fém frondeyo. 7 Ngánjánam yau yénmotai yénd yaufi ghérsé ámnjoghét, wénde njúnnjúnofnar ghérsé ámnjoghét. 8 Emon yéné watamegh si njam ekarota yau ároene em, wénde Ngánjánene, emo yéramai féfe Ngánján Mbérmbér.
english: For this is the will of God : your sanctification, that you abstain from sexual immorality ,
that each one of you know how to control his own body in sanctification and honor ,
not in the passion of lust , even as the Gentiles who don’ t know God ,
that no one should take advantage of and wrong a brother or sister in this matter ; because the Lord is an avenger in all these things , as also we forewarned you and testified .
For God called us not for uncleanness, but in sanctification.
Therefore he who rejects this doesn’ t reject man , but God , who has also given his Holy Spirit to you .

nama: Ámb yéna mwighé yau yém téfe faroghét uwéghmén féfenjo kénjún, ménamén Ngánjánamyo fém té tawatamete uwéghmén féfenjo kénjún. 10 Efaloe, fémofem té tanuyafotati féfenjo uwégh méinyotio fútarfefaf Makedonia yuwomé. Fútaréf, wénde yéndfem fém ewamnendam fémofem miya engéuwetati fá mindefifi. 11 Mé yéngwafrotati yéné uwégh ásáfogh métar ghérsé ámnjoghe, fém náreindati ásáfoghan féfenjo ngángaye, ndené fété yéndfem fém té ewawéngsotamém frondeyo, 12 ménát ámb ár efe yau em efalo yátogh ár so eutémndat fém, a fém yau so namnyotati ámb árfefaf némat ménde em. Yurane anogh
english: But concerning brotherly love , you have no need that one write to you . For you yourselves are taught by God to love one another ,
for indeed you do it toward all the brothers who are in all Macedonia . But we exhort you , brothers, that you abound more and more ;
and that you make it your ambition to lead a quiet life , and to do your own business , and to work with your own hands , even as we instructed you ,
that you may walk properly toward those who are outside , and may have need of nothing .

nama: Fútaréf, yénd ménde yéném fém mat kamndangi némé so nufrote efalo yátogh ár efe kér emorméng, ménát fém yau so ghérghérsisayan em ndenanit endefene méghmégh yau em. 14 Ménamén yéndfem efalo yiyátotam ndené Yesu kér yémormén a nanoi ghérsat, féyo yéndfem efalo yiyátotam ndené njam Yesu nénangota, Ngánjánam so enwangote ghérsat yémafé Yesufé efalo yátogh ár efe kér emorméng.
english: But we don’ t want you to be ignorant , brothers, concerning those who have fallen asleep , so that you don’ t grieve like the rest , who have no hope .
For if we believe that Jesus died and rose again , even so God will bring with him those who have fallen asleep in Jesus .

nama: Yéndfem némé ewatametam sénonjo siyém Yurane watamegh: yénd efe sái ghérsé yéném yéné efghon Yuré sái yéném yau so yéngém yéfe frondeyo efe té kér emormén. 16 Féyo Yuré fáyo so kéneworngé njafarta, njafar si résagh sénko árfene kém a Ngánjánene sufér kefé, a kér téfnár Kerisoe kénjún so kanongi fronde. 17 Yéné soramé, yénd efe mé sái ghérsé yéném a ténéfrangongi so kété káumendangém yémafé njafar kwamkwaman ménát Yuré sái téfángongém njafaran. Féyo yénd so mérne Yurafé yéném tuot. 18 Yénémamén féfenjo kénjúnro néwéngsotati yéné sie.
english: For this we tell you by the word of the Lord , that we who are alive , who are left until the coming of the Lord , will in no way precede those who have fallen asleep .
For the Lord himself will descend from heaven with a shout , with the voice of the archangel and with God ’ s trumpet . The dead in Christ will rise first ,
then we who are alive , who are left, will be caught up together with them in the clouds to meet the Lord in the air. So we will be with the Lord forever .
Therefore comfort one another with these words .

nama: Fútaréf, ámb yéna mwighé yau yém téfe faroghét féfeyot njam a árké efghon so nufrote. 2 Ménamén fém mer mat em Yurane angogh efoghmén so sélngwéle yém, ndenanit so yém oro téfnár nau yéném sémbáran. 3 Njam ár norayat, "Méinyotio yam srem krufrátro em a awanjaréghafé, " féyo táf kérté so kuyangé yéfefaf ndenanit amafom nau kérté tayarangé ambum ráfghan, a kété ámb awanjarégh yau so yém.
english: But concerning the times and the seasons , brothers, you have no need that anything be written to you .
For you yourselves know well that the day of the Lord comes like a thief in the night .
