For when they are saying , “ Peace and safety,” then sudden destruction will come on them , like birth pains on a pregnant woman . Then they will in no way escape .

nama: Fútaréf, wénde fém kwéfkwéfan yau em yéné yam ufroghmén a fém yau so sélngwél em njam Yurane efogh kawarangé ndenanit oro téfnár nau kénuwanongé. 5 Fém méinyotio em kwayaghane ambum a efghoene ambum. Yénd yau yéném sémbároene o kwéfkwéfoene. 6 Yénémaménnde, yau so ndenanit yéném ámb kés em, efe kémégh ekém, wénde fém anoghkaf so em a so nawamarotati. 7 Sémbár táf ár kémégh yékém, a sémbár táf wériafé káyátongi. 8 Wénde yénd efe kwayaghan yéném so nawarawenam, yénd so nawotam ndimbal mwighé a uwégh ndené wéf wambégh sáláme a wanjarégh méghmégh ndené walaf. 9 Ngánjánam yénd yau yénmaféryéng ménát yáne nékwan sái yéném wénde yéndfem yanayém wanjarégh téfene Yuré Yesu Keriso kénjúmé. 10 Keriso kér yémormén téfeyot, téu ghérsé yéném o kér táf Yesu sái nénangota, yénd so yénmor tuot yémafé. 11 So néwéngsotati féfenjo kénjún a nawáutánati ndenéyameyo, ndené fété sénonjo kés nufrotati. Folene soramamén wawanjagh si
english: But you , brothers, aren’ t in darkness , that the day should overtake you like a thief .
You are all children of light and children of the day . We don’t belong to the night , nor to darkness ,
so then let ’s not sleep , as the rest do , but let ’s watch and be sober .
For those who sleep , sleep in the night ; and those who are drunk are drunk in the night .
But since we belong to the day , let ’s be sober , putting on the breastplate of faith and love, and for a helmet , the hope of salvation .
For God didn’ t appoint us to wrath , but to the obtaining of salvation through our Lord Jesus Christ ,
who died for us , that , whether we wake or sleep , we should live together with him .
Therefore exhort one another , and build each other up , even as you also do .

nama: Fútaréf, utémndati fá efe em féfene limánégh ár Yurane ásáfogh kénjún. Fá minde násáfotat féfene kénjún a ewarametat mbérmbére wamarogh. 13 Ewauyafotati ndimbal utmanégh a uwégh ménamén yéfene ásáfoghmén. Krufrát ghérsaye aemor.
english: But we beg you , brothers, to know those who labor among you , and are over you in the Lord and admonish you ,
and to respect and honor them in love for their work ’s sake . Be at peace among yourselves .

nama: Fútaréf, yéndfem ewamnendam fém so ewendam efe em imángéghofnar. So ewawéngsotam efe férfér em. So ewáutánam efe em njangénnjangén. Métar aem méinyotio árfé. 15 Ndené yaufie yau so néwangotati, wénde túmén mer ewafrotati ámb árét a méinyotio árét.
english: We exhort you , brothers: Admonish the disorderly; encourage the faint-hearted; support the weak; be patient toward all .
See that no one returns evil for evil to anyone , but always follow after that which is good for one another and for all .

nama: Túmén áuwéghan aem. 17 Ngánjánafé orayégh túmén. 18 Kánjo si kér ro aem méinyotio yaman, ménamén yéné siyém Ngánjánene ménde féfeyot Keriso Yesu kénjún.
english: Always rejoice .
Pray without ceasing.
In everything give thanks , for this is the will of God in Christ Jesus toward you .

nama: Yau yékmbotati Ngánján Mbérmbéroene fés. 20 Yau ekenati ufrogh yammén si, 21 wénde ufoghan ekmetati méinyotio némé korayau, naweretati yéné sian árké mer yém, 22 ekenati méinyotio yaufi yam.
english: Don’ t quench the Spirit .
Don’t despise prophecies .
Test all things , and hold firmly that which is good .
Abstain from every form of evil .

nama: So Ngánjánam emo ténmaramangé téfe krufrát táyátongé fém njúnnjúnofnar méinyotio yaman. So ewarawene féfene mbérmbér, mwighé a fifi téfnofnar táf téfene Yuré Yesu Keriso yáne angoghan. 24 Ngánjánam so ewafrote yéné yam, ménamén Ngánján emo fém emotai siyém ndimbal mwighé kér ro.
english: May the God of peace himself sanctify you completely . May your whole spirit , soul , and body be preserved blameless at the coming of our Lord Jesus Christ .
He who calls you is faithful , who will also do it .

nama: Fútaréf, Ngánjánafé norayati téfeyot. 26 Áuwégh enguyafotati méinyotio fútar uweghe. 27 Yéndon ewamnendan fém Yurane yétkwénan yéné férén wafghét méinyotio fútarfefaf.
english: Brothers, pray for us .
Greet all the brothers with a holy kiss .
I solemnly command you by the Lord that this letter be read to all the holy brothers.

nama: Téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene ngárám so yém féfefaf.
english: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you . Amen.

nama: Yéné férén siyém yéfeta Fol, Sailes a Timoti. Yéndfem yéfarotam yéné kétán Yesuene mérénfaf Tesalonika kénjún téfene Afé Ngánján a Yuré Yesu Keriso kénjún:
english: Paul , Silvanus , and Timothy , to the assembly of the Thessalonians in God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ :

nama: So Afé Ngánjánam a Yuré Yesu Kerisom tawaramangé ngárám a krufrát féfeyot. Kánjo ramégh a orayégh Ngánjánefaf
english: Grace to you and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ .

nama: Fútaréf, yéndfem so fété kánjo yarametam Ngánjáne méinyotio efghon féfeyot. Yéné siyém mbarkánd téfeyot ménát wafroghét, ménamén féfene ndimbal mwighé nanote ndimbale a uwégh árkéménáyafé méinyotio fém em ámb árét nanote ndimbale. 4 Yéné téfnan yénd yéndio mere féfenemén mé néngorayam Ngánjánene Yesuene mérén kénjún. Yénd mé néngorayam mere ndernáye ende fémofem ewaindati a efalo eyátotai méinyotio wasérmbogh a tékrát fémofem árké efandati.
english: We are bound to always give thanks to God for you , brothers, even as it is appropriate, because your faith grows exceedingly , and the love of each and every one of you toward one another abounds,
so that we ourselves boast about you in the assemblies of God for your perseverance and faith in all your persecutions and in the afflictions which you endure.

nama: Méinyotio yéné yam efalo yiyátote ndené Ngánjánene mogh siyém mbarkánd, a ménát fém so féyotaro em Ngánján limánéghfaf, yénémamén fém tékrátan em. 6 Ngánján siyém mbarkánd: Yémon so ekmete kértayan fá emofem tékrátan ekmetat fém. 7 A Ngánjánam so tawaramangé enagh féfeyot efe fém té tam tékrátan, a téfeyot ndenéyameyo. Yémon so yafrote yéné táf njam Yuré Yesu kufarngé kétamé njafarta yánjo muyé kér ro njafar si résagh árfé, 8 fés arangafé, ménát tékrátan sái tákmangé fá emofem tékenat Ngánján a fá emofem yau káyáretat mer si téfene Yuré Yesuenemén. 9 Fá so ambino tékrátan tákmangé tuot, tafalongé kétamé Yurata a yánjo ndimbal kwayaghé waftata. 10 Njam fá nénangota sái tanangé ndimbal kwayaghé, a uyogh yánjo efalo yátogh ár tambén. Fém kété so em yéfene kénjún, ménamén fémofem efalo yiyátotati némé té ewaufroyém yánemén.
english: This is an obvious sign of the righteous judgment of God , to the end that you may be counted worthy of God ’s Kingdom, for which you also suffer .
For it is a righteous thing with God to repay affliction to those who afflict you ,
and to give relief to you who are afflicted with us when the Lord Jesus is revealed from heaven with his mighty angels in flaming fire,
punishing those who don’ t know God , and to those who don’ t obey the Good News of our Lord Jesus ,
who will pay the penalty : eternal destruction from the face of the Lord and from the glory of his might ,
when he comes in that day to be glorified in his saints and to be admired among all those who have believed , because our testimony to you was believed .

nama: Yénémaménnde, yénd mé noraiwam Ngánjánafé féfeyot ndené téfene Ngánjánam so eyátote efalo ghérsayan kétán ándan yémon emotai fém. Yénd noraiwam Ngánjánafé ndené Ngánjánam so yánjo waftaye ewafrote méinyotio féfene ménde a ndimbal mwighamén wafroghyam. 12 Yéné téfnan, árém so yuyotat Yuré Yesuene yétkwén ménamén fém ndernáye emor. Wéi fémofem so yuyotati, ménamén fém Yesuene em. Yéné méinyotio afrátaye em ménamén téfene Ngánjánene a Yuré Yesu Kerisoene ngárámmén.
english: To this end we also pray always for you that our God may count you worthy of your calling , and fulfill every desire of goodness and work of faith with power ,
that the name of our Lord Jesus may be glorified in you , and you in him , according to the grace of our God and the Lord Jesus Christ .

nama: Fútaréf, yéndfem so ewaufrotam ménamén téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene wéikor angoghmén a ndernáye méinyotio yénd so náumendam mérne yá fángoghét. 2 Yau mé nasambnetati o néwérsotati yéfenemén efe néngafrotat ndené Yurane angogh té nufar. Yau táf efalo eyátotati fá njam néngafrotat ndené yémofem té téfandat ghékéf waingégh, o ufrogh si, o táf férén njam té téngém téfe tambén. 3 Yau táf ewasotat ámb árém ámb endmé. Ménamén yéné efogh mé yau so yéném kétánotio ndimbal asénanégh Ngánjánefaf a nákofnar ár so kufarngé, efe Ngánjánam so yasérmbote. 4 Yémon so eséne a fá so nawarmbote fáyo méinyotio rokaran árké árém yanmotat ndené ngánján a méinyotio wáwefnoghmén rokar. Fá so kámnjongé Ngánjánene wáwefnogh méngon, namndeta ndené fáro kar yém Ngánján.
english: Now , brothers, concerning the coming of our Lord Jesus Christ and our gathering together to him , we ask you
not to be quickly shaken in your mind or troubled , either by spirit or by word or by letter as if from us , saying that the day of Christ has already come .
Let no one deceive you in any way . For it will not be unless the rebellion comes first , and the man of sin is revealed, the son of destruction.
He opposes and exalts himself against all that is called God or that is worshiped, so that he sits as God in the temple of God , setting himself up as God .

nama: Nawafarotati yéndo ndernáye tangémndetan njam yénd fémafé témorwén. 6 A fém mat em némé yam fá yangote, ménát so kété kufarngé yáne efogh njam kawerangé. 7 Yéné nákofnaye ásáfogh siyém ásáfoghan yém kwankwane, a so mé yém kwankwane kétánotio yéné ár emo mé yérete sái kitérmbongé yéné sifayata. 8 Féyo nákofnaye ár sof kufarngé, efe Yuré Yesum so yésmete yánjo sénféne amboneye a tirorngé yánjo angoghmén ndimbal kwayaghaye. 9 Yéné yaufi ár so yéném sái yafrota ásáfogh Sáiférene unyégh waftaye a ufarogh yame a sélngwélafé yame. 10 Yémon so ewafrote fénaté sáfot unyégh yam ménát sái ewasota fá efe em kétán tékrátfaf, ménamén fá kakenawét ménát sái tuwetawét a tumyongayénd efalo árkéménayan so kunjarngai fá. 11 Yéné téfnan Ngánjánam engwáfárete waftafé warsogh yéfefaf ménát yémofem so efalo eyátotat yéné unyégh. 12 Féyo fá so tákmangé tékrátan emofem yau efalo tiyátotat efalo si wénde káreindat yaufiyam wafroghan. Taikrataye aewakai
english: Don’t you remember that when I was still with you , I told you these things ?
Now you know what is restraining him , to the end that he may be revealed in his own season .
For the mystery of lawlessness already works . Only there is one who restrains now , until he is taken out of the way .
Then the lawless one will be revealed, whom the Lord will kill with the breath of his mouth and destroy by the manifestation of his coming ;
even he whose coming is according to the working of Satan with all power and signs and lying wonders ,
and with all deception of wickedness for those who are being lost, because they didn’ t receive the love of the truth, that they might be saved .
Because of this , God sends them a powerful delusion , that they should believe a lie ,
that they all might be judged who didn’ t believe the truth, but had pleasure in unrighteousness.

nama: Ndené téfeyot yéndfem túmén kánjo yarametam Ngánjáne féfe téfnan, áuwéghafé fútaréf Yuram efe euwete. Yénd yéném kánjo raméghafé ndené Ngánjánam ewaferyéng fém sái em yéfefafmé efe em fronde, ménát so mat náyátotati wanjaréghmén árké yénmormén Ngánján Mbérmbér kénjúmé emo eyátote njúnnjúnofnar a féfene efalo yátogh kénjúmé efaloyan. 14 Yémon ewanmoi fém wanjarghét táf yéndfem njam tawaufrotawém mer si; sénonjo fém so ewafnyang Yuré Yesu Kerisoene ndimbal kwayaghé kénjún.
english: But we are bound to always give thanks to God for you , brothers loved by the Lord , because God chose you from the beginning for salvation through sanctification of the Spirit and belief in the truth,
to which he called you through our Good News , for the obtaining of the glory of our Lord Jesus Christ .

nama: Tane fútaréf, méinyotio yéné aem mwighayan, taikre ewakai a kawerangi taikrataye yénayan méinyotio yéndfem némé tawatametam fém si afroghe a férne.
english: So then , brothers, stand firm and hold the traditions which you were taught by us , whether by word or by letter .

nama: So téfene Yuré Yesu Keriso a Ngánján téfene Afé, emo yénmuwetam yénd a yáne ngáráme yénmaramai tuot akegh wáutárégh a mer méghmégh, 17 ewamarotati féfenjo tikéf a so ewaramete muyé méinyotio meryam kénjún fémofem némé ewafrotati a norayati.
english: Now our Lord Jesus Christ himself, and God our Father , who loved us and gave us eternal comfort and good hope through grace ,
comfort your hearts and establish you in every good work and word .

nama: Ambinomén, tane áuwéghafé fútaréf, yéndfem ewamnendam fém ménát sái norayati Ngánjánafé téfeyot. Norayati Ngánjánafé fronde ménát Yurane si so marat náyátote wékeye a so yutémndat yénamé árkamé so yéngém, ndené fété ndernáye yénmormén féfefaf. 2 Norayati Ngánjánafé wéi, ndené yénd yénmanjane yaufi a mámáfi ár tambén, ménamén méinyotio ár yau efalo yátogh ár em.
english: Finally , brothers, pray for us , that the word of the Lord may spread rapidly and be glorified , even as also with you ,
and that we may be delivered from unreasonable and evil men ; for not all have faith .

nama: Wénde Yuré siyém ndimbal mwighé kér ro yém a yémon so eyátote muyafé a ewambeta kétamé yaufi ár tambén. 4 A yénd mwighé táikér yéném Yurane kénjún ndené fémofem té ewafngongi wafroghyam yéné yéndfem árké té engémndayém fém a fémofem so ewafrotati túmén. 5 Ngánjánam so enérse kétán kénjkam matyamfaf Ngánjánene uwéghfaf a wamarogh árké yéném kétamé Kerisoeta. Wawanjau mer ghérsé ámnjoghét
english: But the Lord is faithful , who will establish you and guard you from the evil one .
We have confidence in the Lord concerning you , that you both do and will do the things we command .
May the Lord direct your hearts into God ’ s love and into the perseverance of Christ .

nama: Áuwéghafé fútaréf, yéndfem ewarametam yéné wafarégh si téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene yétkwénan: Nayu aem méinyotio efalo yátogh árfe tambén efe mé ámnjoghro emor a yau ewaitotat yéné watamegh yéndfem árké engwaramayém. 7 Fém mat em ndené fémofem so fété ewaitotati téfene wafroghyam. Yénd yau sakram ténfindau táf fémafé yénd sténmorwén. 8 Yéndfem yau taumyotawém njamke ámb árfeta faiofnaye. Yénd kásáfotawém efogh a sémbár ménát yénd yau so kérté ténmorwén ámb féfefaf. 9 Yéné témorwén muyé téfefaf ndené yénd sái kómnendawém njamkeyot féfefaf, wénde yau yafrotamém, ménát yénd ménde ténmorwén ramghét yéné yam fémofem sái tawaitotangi. 10 Njam fémafé mé ténmorwén, yéndfem ewaramayém yéné si waitoghét: "Efe yau njam násáfota yau so enete."
english: Now we command you , brothers, in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ , that you withdraw yourselves from every brother who walks in rebellion and not after the tradition which they received from us .
For you know how you ought to imitate us . For we didn’t behave ourselves rebelliously among you ,
neither did we eat bread from anyone ’s hand without paying for it , but in labor and travail worked night and day , that we might not burden any of you .
This was not because we don’ t have the right , but to make ourselves an example to you , that you should imitate us .
For even when we were with you , we commanded you this : “ If anyone is not willing to work , don’t let him eat .”

nama: Wénde yénd mé náyáretam ndené fém ámb mé emor ménd ámnjogh, nakenati ásáfoghét a efogh yánetati mé árfefafmé arenganro. 12 Yuré Yesu Kerisoene yétkwénan yéndfem ewáfáretam yéné ár engémndetam mer ámnjoghét a ásáfoghét yéfenjo njamke nénet. 13 Tane fútaréf, wénde fém yau táf sakram efinda meryam wafroghmén.
english: For we hear of some who walk among you in rebellion, who don’t work at all , but are busybodies .
Now those who are that way , we command and exhort in the Lord Jesus Christ , that they work with quietness and eat their own bread.
But you , brothers, don’t be weary in doing what is right.

nama: Kor efandati yéné ár efe nakenat áyárghét némé yénd norayam téfene férnan. Nayu kéráye aem yéfe tambén ménát fá so wáiwáiam tawifongé. 15 Yau efandati ndené fene mék téfnár em, wénde ewawéngsotati ndené fété efalo yátogh ár em. Folene ambinomén ásneghafé si
english: If any man doesn’ t obey our word in this letter , note that man and have no company with him , to the end that he may be ashamed .
Don’t count him as an enemy , but admonish him as a brother.

nama: So krufrát Yuram yémonyo túmén ewaramete féfe yánjo krufrát méinyotio efghon a méinyotio yam kénjún. So Yuré yém féfefaf méinyotio.
english: Now may the Lord of peace himself give you peace at all times in all ways. The Lord be with you all .

nama: Yéna yém tane ásneghafé si árké yém tane ngángé faroghmén. Folém, yéndo túmén yéné ténjfi férén táf efarotan kerkeran méinyotio férnan ménát yéné yam so efalo wiyátote ndené yéné férén ta tambén fété eném.
english: I , Paul , write this greeting with my own hand , which is the sign in every letter . This is how I write .

nama: Téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene ngárám so yém méinyotio féfeyot.
english: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you all . Amen.

nama: Yénd wém Fol, Keriso Yesuene muyafé ár, wafaretai téfene Wanjarégh ár Ngánjánam a Keriso Yesum téfene méghmégh,
english: Paul , an apostle of Jesus Christ according to the commandment of God our Savior and the Lord Jesus Christ our hope ,

nama: Yéndo yéfarotam kétán Timoti, tane efalo ambum ndimbal mwighé kénjún: Afé Ngánjánam a Keriso Yesu téfene Yuram so ewaramete ngárám, ghérghérsisé a krufrát. Unyégh watameghmén
english: to Timothy , my true child in faith : Grace , mercy , and peace from God our Father and Christ Jesus our Lord .

nama: Yénd ménde wém fém sái némor Efesos ndimbal tesenan, ndené fété yéndon kés kénémndetan fém njam yénd álighan kwémorwén Makedoniat marat yuwot. Ámb ár kété em unyégh watameghan, a fémon táf tamndé fá kékmbongi. 4 Tawaufro yéfe kékmbongi yéné ninyé si tombé kéráye ákiafene yétkwén faroghmén, ménamén yéné yamam efunat amrorégh; yéné yam yau násáfotat Ngánjánene mwighé faroréghta, árkéméné mat té náyátoyém ndimbal mwighayan. 5 Yéné wáfareghoene fifi siyém uwégh árké néntone njúnnjúnofnar tikéfta, kwayaghé emaréghta, a sotafé ndimbal mwighata. 6 Ámb ár té nawengoyénd yéné mbarkánd endta a ewawalindai yéfene end ménáyan fifiofnar si warunyéghamé. 7 Fá ménde em nák watamegh ár sái em. Fá norayat minde taikrataye, wénde fá yau mat em némamén fá norayat.
english: As I urged you when I was going into Macedonia , stay at Ephesus that you might command certain men not to teach a different doctrine ,
and not to pay attention to myths and endless genealogies , which cause disputes rather than God ’s stewardship , which is in faith .
But the goal of this command is love from a pure heart , a good conscience , and sincere faith ,
from which things some , having missed the mark, have turned away to vain talking,
desiring to be teachers of the law , though they understand neither what they say nor about what they strongly affirm .

nama: Yénd mat yéném ndené nák siyém mer njam árom yafrota merkéráye. 9 Yénd mat yéném ndené nák yafrotaméng yau mbarkánd árét, wénde nák rafarégh árét a áyáréghofnar árét, yéfeyot ngánjánofnar a yaufiyamafé ár, a njúnnjúnafé árét a efe em méndméndafé Ngánjánefaf, yéfeyot emofem esmetat yéfene afaf o amaf, o ár ngi téfnárat, 10 yéfeyot efe em yaufi wal téfnár, ghakér ro mérés ro wal téfnárat, ár ténogh árét a unyégh ár a unyégh si waitogh ár o emofem ewafrotat ámb kés engém fénataye kétamé efalo watameghta. 11 Yéné watamegh so tinjongém mer si kénjúnro árké yéramayéng tafaf afroghét, yéné mer si kétándmé ndimbal kwayaghafé a frengégh Ngánjáneta. Yurane ngárám Fole
english: But we know that the law is good if a person uses it lawfully ,

as knowing this , that law is not made for a righteous person , but for the lawless and insubordinate, for the ungodly and sinners, for the unholy and profane, for murderers of fathers and murderers of mothers , for manslayers,
for the sexually immoral , for homosexuals, for slave-traders, for liars , for perjurers , and for any other thing contrary to the sound doctrine ,
according to the Good News of the glory of the blessed God , which was committed to my trust .

nama: Yéndo kánjo yarametan Keriso Yesue téfene Yuré, emo té waramai ta muyé ménát tane ásáfoghét. Yéndo kánjo yarametan yá emon té fifiyafé wiyátoi a wékafai yénd yáyot ásáfoghét. 13 Yéné awaingégh kwéf kés emormén yénd korayawén yaufi si yáfaf a tésmetawén a tasalitawén fá. Wénde Ngánján témorwén ghérghérsisé afoghare tafaf ménamén yénd yau ndimbal mwighafé kwémorwén a mat yau kwémorwén némé yéndon tafrotawén. 14 A téfene Yuram yasuryéng yáne ngárám ta a waramai ndimbal mwighé a uwégh árké em Keriso Yesu kénjún. 15 Yéné si siyém efalo ménát tumyongém méinyoe a efalo tiyátongém: Keriso Yesu yénmormén yéné mband maratot ménát yaufi ár ghérsé urtoghét. Yénd wémormén mindefifi yaufi téfnár a ewaindan méinyoto ár. 16 Wénde Ngánján yémormén ghérghérsisé kér ro tafaf ménát ndené Keriso Yesum sái tuyafongai yáne métar kufrotau tafaf, minde yaufi ár, ndené fété ufénmanéghét yéfeyot efe soramé so em efalo yátogh ár a tawanangi tuot ghérsé. 17 Kétán tuot Warsagh ár, kérofnar a fandaghofnar, mé fáro Ngánján-yáfafétro wafarerégh a ndimbal kwayaghé tuot a mbanjat. Efalo.
english: I thank him who enabled me , Christ Jesus our Lord , because he counted me faithful , appointing me to service ,
although I used to be a blasphemer, a persecutor , and insolent . However, I obtained mercy because I did it ignorantly in unbelief.
The grace of our Lord abounded exceedingly with faith and love which is in Christ Jesus .
The saying is faithful and worthy of all acceptance, that Christ Jesus came into the world to save sinners, of whom I am chief .
However, for this cause I obtained mercy , that in me first , Jesus Christ might display all his patience for an example of those who were going to believe in him for eternal life .
Now to the King eternal, immortal, invisible, to God who alone is wise, be honor and glory forever and ever . Amen.

nama: Timoti, tane ambum, yéndon efalo niyátotan yéné wáfareghan, árké si ndené Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár kénorayawét frondeyan fenemén. Násméta merot yéné sie ndené fimb sem ásméghét, 19 a miya ménj néngérnyang fenjo ndimbal mwighé a kwayaghé emarghe. Ámb ár yau káyáretawét kétán yéfene emaréghfaf a té eyátoyénd fifiofnar yéfene ndimbal mwighaye. 20 Yéfefaf ewafnyang fá em Imaneus a Aleksanda, efe yéndon eramayén Sáiféroene waftafaf; yéné yam so ewatamete sái kékmbongi yaufi si Ngánjánefaf.
english: I commit this instruction to you , my child Timothy , according to the prophecies which were given to you before , that by them you may wage the good warfare ,
holding faith and a good conscience , which some having thrust away made a shipwreck concerning the faith ,
of whom are Hymenaeus and Alexander, whom I delivered to Satan that they might be taught not to blaspheme.

nama: Frondefifi, tane wawéngsogh si siyém ndené méinyotio ómnengégh, Ngánjánafé orayégh, Ngánjánafé orayégh ámb árfeyot, kánjo ramégh uyogh Ngánjáne méinyotio árét. 2 Ngánjánafé norayati warsagh árfet a méinyotio limánégh árfet efe waftayan em, ménát yénd so yénmor métar a krufrát ghérsé méinyotio ngánján ghérsafé a njúnnjúnofnar. 3 Yéné siyém mer yém a yéremngote Ngánján téfene Wanjarégh ár. 4 A fá ménde yém sái tawanjarngé méinyotio ár. Fá ménde yém méinyotio ár sái mat káyátongi yáne si a sái tumyongi ndené fété efalo yém. 5 Ménamén kété siyém ámbiro Ngánján a ámbiro néndkéf ár yéfe kénjún Ngánján a ár, Keriso Yesu fá fáyo, 6 efe naramayéng méinyotio ár wanjarghét. Árkéméné yémormén fifiafé yéné mbarkánd kwéfon Ngánjánam sái méinyotio ár ghérsé tawértongai. 7 A yéné téfnan yénd wéngwáfáretam ndené fété Yesuene muyafé ár a watamegh ár Téndo árét, ménát ndimbal mwighé a efalomén si waitoghét. Yénd yau nuindan. Yénd efalo nafrotan!
english: I exhort therefore , first of all , that petitions , prayers , intercessions , and givings of thanks be made for all men ,
for kings and all who are in high places, that we may lead a tranquil and quiet life in all godliness and reverence.
For this is good and acceptable in the sight of God our Savior ,
who desires all people to be saved and come to full knowledge of the truth.
For there is one God and one mediator between God and men, the man Christ Jesus ,
who gave himself as a ransom for all , the testimony at the proper time ,
to which I was appointed a preacher and an apostle— I am telling the truth in Christ, not lying — a teacher of the Gentiles in faith and truth.

nama: Méinyotio Yesuene mérén wáwefnoghan yénd ménde wém ár sái Ngánjánafé norayat, ár efe ewatetaménd Ngánjánefaf a so yéfene ngángé euyotat Ngánjánafé oraighan nékwofnar a amroréghofnar. 9 Ndenayo yénd ménde wém amaf sái em métar a mer mwighaye sálámeyan a awoghan merkéráye, yau wéla ende séf rarmbéghafé o gol mendén o ndindi o wérawérat sálámeyafé, 10 wénde ménáyafé mer wafroghyamafé, árké yém mer amafoe efe nawarse ndené yéndon Ngánjáne yáwefnotan. 11 Amaf táf notametat métar a méinyotio yuwan ghérsaye. 12 Yéndon yau amaf eumyotan fá watameghét a sái wafté tawanangi árta. Fá fiya tam métar. 13 Ménamén Edém yafrotam fronde a If soramé. 14 A Edém yau yémormén efe yarsotai Sáifram, wénde amaf yarsotai a yérafaryéng Ngánjánene nák. 15 Wénde amaf so kawanjarngé ambum ráfégh kénjúmé, njam fá ménj yérnyang ndimbal mwighayan a uwéghan a njúnnjúnofnar a métar.
english: I desire therefore that the men in every place pray , lifting up holy hands without anger and doubting .
In the same way , that women also adorn themselves in decent clothing , with modesty and propriety, not with braided hair , gold , pearls , or expensive clothing ,
but with good works , which is appropriate for women professing godliness .
Let a woman learn in quietness with full submission.
But I don’t permit a woman to teach , nor to exercise authority over a man , but to be in quietness .
For Adam was formed first , then Eve .
Adam wasn’ t deceived , but the woman , being deceived , has fallen into disobedience;
but she will be saved through her childbearing , if they continue in faith , love, and holiness with sobriety .

nama: Yéné siyém efalo si: ár njam ménde yém Yesuene mérén limánéghét, yémon so yékwne mer ásáfogh. 2 A Yesuene mérén limánégh ár so yém téfnofnar; yáne ayém ámbiro amaf, awambégh yaufiyamta, awamarogh, a mbarkándro; yémon aeumyota wan téfnár yánjo méngot. Fá féyotaro so yém watameghét. 3 Fá yau so yém wéri nu téfnár, o ásmégh ár, wénde métar a krufrát kér ro. Fá yau táf yém mani uwégh ár. 4 Yémon fété aefrenda yánjo mérén mere a eméinda yáne ambumtértér ménát sái yiyáretat fá méinyotio utmanéghafé. 5 Ár ghakér mat so yém ndernáye ewarawene yánjoyo mérén. Njam yémon yau yafrota yéné, yémon féyotarofnar so yém sái ewarawene Ngánjánene ár Yesuene mérnan. 6 Fá sotafé ayém ndimbal mwighayan, ménát fá yau so tuktukan yém, a yémo yau so tanangé tékrat, ndené Sáifér kés yanai. 7 Fá ár ayém efe so yutémndat árém Yesuene mérén téndota, ménát fá yau so wáiwái yém a káwamangé Sáiféroene uréran. Dikunafenemén
english: This is a faithful saying : someone who seeks to be an overseer desires a good work .
The overseer therefore must be without reproach, the husband of one wife , temperate , sensible , modest , hospitable , good at teaching;
not a drinker, not violent , not greedy for money, but gentle , not quarrelsome, not covetous;
one who rules his own house well , having children in subjection with all reverence;
( for how could someone who doesn’ t know how to rule his own house take care of God ’s assembly ?)
not a new convert , lest being puffed up he fall into the same condemnation as the devil .
Moreover he must have good testimony from those who are outside , to avoid falling into reproach and the snare of the devil .

nama: Dikun ndenáyo aem mer wafroghyamafé aem efalofifi; yémofem yau so enetat wéri nu mindefifi o em nité manian. 9 Fá so nawéretat efalo sian ndimbal mwighamén ménáyafé kwayaghé emaréghafé. 10 Fá fété aeufotat fronde, a féyo njam yémofem taindangi ufogh yam, fá so násáfotat.
english: Servants , in the same way , must be reverent, not double-tongued , not addicted to much wine , not greedy for money,
holding the mystery of the faith in a pure conscience .
Let them also first be tested ; then let them serve if they are blameless.

nama: Amaf dikun ndenéyameyo mer wafroghyamafé aem a yau ár warunyégh amaf aem. Fá aem métar yamafé a unyéghofnar méinyotio yaman. 12 Dikun ayém mé ámbiro amafafé, a efrenda yáne ambumtértér a mérén merkéráye. 13 Yéné wáutárégh ár emofem ewafrotat ásáfogh mere fai ewafrotat yéfendio mer okayoghét a féyotaro so norayat férférofnar yéfene ndimbal mwighamén Keriso Yesu kénjún. Ndimbal warambnogh
english: Their wives in the same way must be reverent, not slanderers , temperate , and faithful in all things .
Let servants be husbands of one wife , ruling their children and their own houses well .
For those who have served well gain for themselves a good standing and great boldness in the faith which is in Christ Jesus .

nama: Ndené fété yéndon yéné férén yéfarotan feyot, yénd nemnan álighét a kéminjon fém tekofnaye. 15 Wénde njam yénd wém awaneghan, yéné férnam so mat kényátongé ndernáye yénd so nimndam téfenjo kénjúnro Ngánjánene méngo kénjún, árké yém Yesuene mérén akegh Ngánjánene, sérasér a efalo wamaroghmén. 16 Emo yau so tanyongé nderé ndimbal yém yéné warambnogh ngánján ghérsé: Fá nufaryéng ár fifie, a nauyafoi safét mbarkánde yékmai Ngánján Mbérmbéram, a yinjoyénd njafar si résagh árém, yánemén táitotawét yénamé ndimbal yuwomé, a efalo yiyátoyénd mband maratan a yéngwanayénd ndimbal kwayaghaye tukét kétán njafarot."
english: These things I write to you , hoping to come to you shortly ,
but if I wait long , that you may know how men ought to behave themselves in God ’s house , which is the assembly of the living God , the pillar and ground of the truth.

Without controversy , the mystery of godliness is great : God + 3:16 NU replaces “God” with “who” was revealed in the flesh , justified in the spirit , seen by angels, preached among the nations , believed on in the world , and received up in glory .

nama: Ngánján Mbérmbér noraye safénro ndené ámb árém so efrangotat ndimbal mwighé kété kerkeran; yémofem so eyáretat unyégh mbérmbér a ewaitotat Sáiféroene watamegh. 2 Ndené watamegh marat eyátotat unyégh árém, endefene emarégh em kérwén, ndenanit wafté tote kar nakérnaménd. 3 Ndené árém ewatametat ndené awerégh a ámb njamke nénet kar mámáfi yém. Wénde Ngánjánam ewafrotam yéné njamke ménát nénet, kánjo orayégh soramé, yémofem efe em efalo yátogh ár té mat namndayénd efalo si. 4 Méinyotio rokar ndené Ngánjánam kés ewafrotam sem mer; némndafi yau kenaghmén em, wénde méinyotio rokar aeumyotam kánjo raméghafé, 5 ménamén Ngánjánene si a Ngánjánafé orayégham tiyátongé merro Ngánjánefaf. Keriso Yesuene mer faiofnar ásáfogh ár
english: But the Spirit says expressly that in later times some will fall away from the faith , paying attention to seducing spirits and doctrines of demons ,
through the hypocrisy of men who speak lies , branded in their own conscience as with a hot iron ,
forbidding marriage and commanding to abstain from foods which God created to be received with thanksgiving by those who believe and know the truth.
For every creature of God is good , and nothing is to be rejected if it is received with thanksgiving .
For it is sanctified through the word of God and prayer .

nama: Njam fémo ewarameta yéné watamegh si efalo yátogh árfet, fém so kénamndé Keriso Yesuene mer ásáfogh ár, fém so namanjne fémyo mbérmbére yéné ndimbal mwighé si tukén a efalo watameghan árké fémon ewaitote. 7 Wénde némndafi yau ewafrota ngánjánofnar ninyé sifaf, árké em fifiofnar waitoghét. Mia fémyo notameta ménát ngánján ghérsat. 8 Fifie awatamegh siyém ámb merafayo yém, wénde mbérmbére awatamegh siyém minde merafé yém méinyotio yam kénjún, ménamén unyéghofnar sian ghérsé ere sómbio ménát sénonjotau a soramé yuwot. 9 Yéné siyém efalo si, ménát sái méinyoe tumyongi a efalo tiyátongi. 10 Yénd nasmetam a násáfotam taikrataye, ménamén yéndfem ekmangém téfene méghmégh akegh Ngánján kénjún, efe yém Wanjarégh ár méinyotio árét, a yéfefifi emofem efalo yiyátotat.
english: If you instruct the brothers of these things , you will be a good servant of Christ Jesus , nourished in the words of the faith and of the good doctrine which you have followed .
But refuse profane and old wives’ fables . Exercise yourself toward godliness .
For bodily exercise has some value , but godliness has value in all things , having the promise of the life which is now and of that which is to come .
This saying is faithful and worthy of all acceptance.
For to this end we both labor and suffer reproach , because we have set our trust in the living God , who is the Savior of all men , especially of those who believe .

nama: Tawaram yéfe yéné wawanjagh a yéné watamegh. 12 Emo yau néfanda fém yuwot ménamén fém ném tot ambum, wénde aném waufarogh ár yéné efalo yátogh árét fenjo sian, fenjo wafroghyaman, fenjo uwéghan, ndimbal mwighayan a féwénféwénofnaran. 13 Kétánotio yénd kénangon, koram fendio efogh a muyé kétán marataye Buk si waféghfaf a waitoghfaf a watameghfaf. 14 Yau tékarota mbérmbére fok árké yém fene kénjún, árké yéramayéng fefaf njam Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár korayawét a Yesuene mérén sénko árém efayoyénd yéfene ngángé fene tukén. 15 Engwafrota yéné yam a karam fémyo kétán yéfefaf, ménát fene anogh so yéfandat méinyotio árém. 16 Fémyo nafanda a efanda fenjo watamegh. Mé engwafrota yéné yam, ménamén njam fémon yafrota, fém so kawanjar a fá emofem niyáretat fém.
english: Command and teach these things .
Let no man despise your youth ; but be an example to those who believe , in word , in your way of life, in love, in spirit , in faith , and in purity.
Until I come , pay attention to reading, to exhortation , and to teaching .
Don’ t neglect the gift that is in you , which was given to you by prophecy with the laying on of the hands of the elders .
Be diligent in these things . Give yourself wholly to them , that your progress may be revealed to all .
Pay attention to yourself and to your teaching . Continue in these things , for in doing this you will save both yourself and those who hear you .

nama: Yau yusérmbota bulu, wénde noraya utmanégh ende ndené fété fene afé kar yém. Ewarena totér ambum ndenáye fenjo fútar em, 2 buluausé ndenáye amaf kar em, a totér amaf ndené fene mérés kar em, ménaye méinyotio mere.
english: Don’t rebuke an older man , but exhort him as a father ; the younger men as brothers;
the elder women as mothers ; the younger as sisters, in all purity.

nama: Yuyafota utmanégh yéfeyot efe kwiré em yéfembia. 4 Wénde njam kwiré yém ambumafé o áki ambumafé, fiya tawafrotangi fronde ndené efalo yátogh árfene ásáfogh yéfenjo mérén kénjún, a yéné ende fai so ewafrotat yéferafaf a yéfekif, ménamén yéné yaman Ngánján náuwete. 5 Kwiré efe yém mé yambia, árké árom yau yánjete fá, té ekmayéng méghmégh Ngánjánefaf a túmén Ngánjánafé orayégh ewafrote a yamnende ménát yáne wáutáréghét sémbár a efogh. 6 Wénde kwiré efe karamangé fifioene méndefaf té kér tém, ndemamén ghérsé yém. 7 Tawaram yéné wawanjagh si, ménát efe yau so tinjongém téfnot yémafé. 8 Wénde njam árké árém yau ewarawenat yéfene kaka fútar, wéi fá yéfenjo mérénfifi, yémofem té yékenangi ndimbal mwighé a yéfene yam wafrogh sem yuwon yéfeta emofem yau efalo yiyátotat Yesu.
english: Honor widows who are widows indeed .
But if any widow has children or grandchildren , let them learn first to show piety toward their own family and to repay their parents , for this is acceptable in the sight of God .
Now she who is a widow indeed and desolate , has her hope set on God and continues in petitions and prayers night and day .
But she who gives herself to pleasure is dead while she lives .
Also command these things , that they may be without reproach.
But if anyone doesn’ t provide for his own , and especially his own household , he has denied the faith and is worse than an unbeliever.

nama: Yau tafény ámb kwiré kwirafene yétkwénfaf téfandro fá njam yém 60 yunjéf, a fá ayém ámbirotaro ár awerégh ár 10 a árém témndetat yémon tawafrote meryam: amaf emo tawanote yánjo ambumtértér, mere taumyote wan téfnár yáne méngon, tawafrote métar ásáfogh ámb efalo yátogh árét, tawáutáne ár kértayan, a naramai fáyo kétán mer ásáfoghfaf.
english: Let no one be enrolled as a widow under sixty years old , having been the wife of one man ,

being approved by good works , if she has brought up children , if she has been hospitable to strangers , if she has washed the saints’ feet , if she has relieved the afflicted , and if she has diligently followed every good work .

nama: Wénde yau ekmeta totér kwirafene yétkwén fefayan; ménamén yéfene méndeyam njam eméindat fá ár aweréghét, yémofem so tawengongi sém Kerisoe. 12 Féyo fá so kamndangi kértafé yéfenjo frondeyo unyéghofnar simén rafarégh ár yáfaf. 13 Fá ndenéyame notametat ménát efogh ewifotat ménáyan sái nawarendat kétándmé méngo kétán ámb méngo; wénde minde mámáfi siyém, fá notametat ár warunyéghan, a ámb árfene yamfaf sái enwafnyang, a néngorayat ámb yammén ndené fá yau so fété. 14 Féyo yénémamén, yénd nemnan ndené totér kwiré so ár naweretat kor ménát ambumot, a so ewarawenat yéfenjo méngon, féyo ndené yaman yau so erametat ámb féneféne mék téfnárat ménáyan sái néngorayat yaufi si téfenemén. 15 Ámb kwiré té nawengoyénd a Sáifér yaitoyénd. 16 Wénde njam árké efalo yátogh amafoefaf té em kwiré yáne mérnan, yémon fété so ewarawene a yau so yéfayote kérté Yesuene mérnot, ménát Yesuene mérnam so ewáutáne yéné kwirat efe yéfembia em. Yesuene mérén sénko árfenemén
english: But refuse younger widows , for when they have grown wanton against Christ , they desire to marry ,
having condemnation , because they have rejected their first pledge .
Besides , they also learn to be idle, going about from house to house . Not only idle, but also gossips and busybodies , saying things which they ought not .
I desire therefore that the younger widows marry , bear children , rule the household, and give no occasion to the adversary for insulting.
For already some have turned away after Satan .
If any man or woman who believes has widows , let them relieve them , and don’ t let the assembly be burdened, that it might relieve those who are widows indeed .

nama: Yesuene mérén sénko árém emofem ewafrotat yéfenjo mer ásáfogh ndené fété limánégh árém so fété fai ersat merkéráye, mé yémofemro efe násáfotat taikrataye si waitoghan a watameghan. 18 Buk si noraye, "Yau kau sénfneyan tumbé njam kun ndau ásáfoghan yém" a wéikor 'Ásáfogh árém so fété ewarametat yéfene fai." 19 Yau náyáretati Yesuene mérén sénko ároenemén wánangogh, táfandro njam yénémnjat sómbio o nambio ghékfe fandagh árém. 20 Njam sénko árom yaufiyam yafrota, usérmbo safén ménát ámb ár so em férfér.
english: Let the elders who rule well be counted worthy of double honor , especially those who labor in the word and in teaching .
For the Scripture says , “ You shall not muzzle the ox when it treads out the grain.” And , “ The laborer is worthy of his wages .”
Don’t receive an accusation against an elder except at the word of two or three witnesses .
Those who sin, reprove in the sight of all , that the rest also may be in fear .

nama: Yéndon némndetan yéfene sáfrére Ngánján a Keriso Yesu a njúnnjúnofnar njafar si résagh ár: Fémo táf merkéráye ewaitota si yénd snorayan fefaf. Njam fémo ewaitota yéné fémo táf yuyafota ámbiro yam wafrogh kétán méinyotio árét, fémo yau táf yuyafota fénataye yam wafrogh fene fútarfefaf a ámb árfefaf. 22 Mé yau wékeye em ngángé fayoghét árfefaf yéfe wateghét Yurane ásáfoghét. Yau kufnya ámb árfene yaufiyaman, nawarawena fémyo njúnnjúnofnar.
english: I command you in the sight of God , and the Lord Jesus Christ , and the chosen angels, that you observe these things without prejudice , doing nothing by partiality .
Lay hands hastily on no one . Don’t be a participant in other people’s sins. Keep yourself pure.

nama: Yau nuro so yénete, wénde némbne wéri nu so téneta ndené fété murémuré ménamén fém túmén enjne ném.
english: Be no longer a drinker of water only , but use a little wine for your stomach ’s sake and your frequent infirmities.

nama: Ámb árfene yaufiyam em méinyo fandagh safén, a yéfene yaufiyam engém fronde moghfaf, wénde ámb árfene yaufiyam fandaghét em soramé. 25 Ndené yameyo mer wafroghyam fandaghét em mé safénro, a ndenáyo yéné árké yau em safénro yau so atnoghe em.
english: Some men ’s sins are evident , preceding them to judgment , and some also follow later.
In the same way also there are good works that are obvious , and those that are otherwise can ’ t be hidden .

nama: Fá efe em efalo yátogh faiofnar ásáfogh ár so fété merkéráye nemnat yéfene yurafenemén méinyotio utmanéghafé, ménát efe yau so noraye yaufi si Ngánjánene yétkwénfaf a téfene watameghfaf. 2 Efalo yátogh faiofnar ásáfogh ár endefene yuré em efalo yátogh ár yau táf yuwot efandati, ménamén fá wéi em efalo yátogh ár. Wénde fá so fété násáfotat merkéráye, ménamén efe eremngote yéfene ásáfoghan em efalo yátogh ár efe yéfene uwéghafé em. Unyégh watamegh a efalo wemár
english: Let as many as are bondservants under the yoke count their own masters worthy of all honor , that the name of God and the doctrine not be blasphemed.

Those who have believing masters , let them not despise them because they are brothers, but rather let them serve them , because those who partake of the benefit are believing and beloved. Teach and exhort these things .

nama: Emo njam ewatameta fénatayo si a yau natemnda efalo sifaf téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene a watameghfaf téfene ngánján ghérsamén 4 fá sem tuktuk ár em a mat yau em yénémamén. Fá sem wasnengégh mwighafé éwighét a amrorghét simén, a yéné yamam yénérse waramnjagh, asénanégh, yaufi si orayégh, mé fayogh, 5 a túmén éwigh yam eném kétándmé yéné árta endefene mer mwighé yau násáfotat a endefaf yau efalo em. Fá nemnat ndené ngánján ghérsé yame kar yém wemár.
english: If anyone teaches a different doctrine and doesn’ t consent to sound words , the words of our Lord Jesus Christ , and to the doctrine which is according to godliness ,
he is conceited , knowing nothing , but obsessed with arguments, disputes , and word battles, from which come envy , strife , insulting, evil suspicions ,
constant friction of people of corrupt minds and destitute of the truth, who suppose that godliness is a means of gain . Withdraw yourself from such .

nama: Ngánján ghérsayam minde wemár yényátote, táf yénd fiya ténremngongé yéné rokaram némé téfefaf em. 7 Némé yéndfem enérsamém yéné mband kénjút? Némé ámb yau! Némé so yéndfem tawanangém yéné mbandta? Némé yau! 8 Féyo, njam téfene yénmam njamke a sáláme, yéné fiya féyotaro ténmam téfeyot. 9 Wénde fá efe ménde em wemárot ufogh yaman nuitat a nawametat uréran tárfár mwighafnar a wasérmbogh mwighayan, árkéménayam fá ewewone wasnengéghfaf a wasérmboghfaf. 10 Ménamén mani uwégh siyém méinyotio yaufiyamoene sérémb. Ámb ár yéfenjo méndeyan té nénguyangi, nayu namndangi ndimbal mwighata a yéfene tikéf karéfkaréf nufrotat tárfár áuwéghofnar yaman. Folene watamegh si Timotie
english: But godliness with contentment is great gain .
For we brought nothing into the world , and we certainly can ’ t carry anything out .
But having food and clothing, we will be content with that .
But those who are determined to be rich fall into a temptation , a snare , and many foolish and harmful lusts , such as drown men in ruin and destruction .
For the love of money is a root of all kinds of evil . Some have been led astray from the faith in their greed, and have pierced themselves through with many sorrows .

nama: Wénde fém, Ngánjánene ár, takarota méinyotio yéné yam. Násméta ménát mbarkánd ghérsat, ngánján ghársat, ndimbal mwighé, uwégh, métar, a merafé yam. 12 Mer wérse yafrota fendio ndimbal mwighamén, a nawereta tuot ghérsat fendio; ménamén yéné ghérsat Ngánjánam némotai fém njam taikrataye norayam fenjo ndimbal mwighamén tárfár ghékéf fandagh ár sáfrére. 13 Ngánjánene ghékfan, emo ewaramete ghérsé méinyotio rokarat, a Keriso Yesue ghékfan, emo taikrataye norayam yáne ndimbal mwighamén Fontius Failetene ghékfan, yéndon némafaretan fém muyaye 14 ménát káyáre fenjo wáfaregh a ewéreta ndimbal mwighaye kétánotio yéné efogh njam téfene Yuré Yesu Keriso kufarngé. 15 Yáne ufarégh siyém Ngánjánene mbarkánd kwéfon. Ngánján siyém frengéghkaf a mé fáro Limánégh ár, warsagh árfene Warsagh ár, a yurafene Yuré. 16 Fáro yém kérofnar; fá yémor kwayaghé kénjún ndené efe yau so kaflangé kaka. Emon yau yinjoi fá; emon yau so tinjongé fá. Mé yáfafétro utmanégh a tuot wafté! Efalo.
english: But you , man of God , flee these things , and follow after righteousness , godliness , faith , love, perseverance , and gentleness .
Fight the good fight of faith . Take hold of the eternal life to which you were called , and you confessed the good confession in the sight of many witnesses .
I command you before God who gives life to all things , and before Christ Jesus who before Pontius Pilate testified the good confession ,
that you keep the commandment without spot, blameless until the appearing of our Lord Jesus Christ ,
which at the right time he will show , who is the blessed and only Ruler, the King of kings and Lord of lords .
He alone has immortality, dwelling in unapproachable light , whom no man has seen nor can see , to whom be honor and eternal power . Amen.

nama: Ewafareta fá efe wemár em yéné mband maratan yau so tuktukan em, wénde tákmangi yéfene méghmégh, yau ndené wemár rokaran, wénde Ngánján kénjúnro, emo marataye yénmaramete téfe méinyotio rokar téfene áuwéghét. 18 Ewafareta fá meryam wafroghét, wemár aem mer ásáfoghan, marataye ár aem a afrengéghkaf ámb ár wáutárghét. 19 Yéné ende yémofem so ewamndat yéfendio ngonjél árké so yém sotafé téfén soramé yutau. A féyo yémofem so tanangi ghérsé árké yém efalo ghérsé.
english: Charge those who are rich in this present age that they not be arrogant, nor have their hope set on the uncertainty of riches , but on the living God , who richly provides us with everything to enjoy;
that they do good , that they be rich in good works , that they be ready to distribute , willing to share ;
laying up in store for themselves a good foundation against the time to come , that they may lay hold of eternal life .

nama: Timoti, ewarawena némé té eraman fene ngángat. Nawarawena fifiofnar a mwighafnar amroréghta némé unyéghe ámb ár norayat ndené, "Matyam" 21 Ámb ár norayat té yanangém, wénde yénayoene fifi yémofem té téláitat ndimbal mwighane end. Ngánjánene ngárám so yém féfefaf méinyotio.
english: Timothy , guard that which is committed to you , turning away from the empty chatter and oppositions of what is falsely called knowledge ,
which some profess, and thus have wandered from the faith . Grace be with you . Amen.

nama: Yénd wém Fol, Keriso Yesuene muyafé ár Ngánjánene méndeyan wénmafaretam unyéghofnar ghérsé si afroghét árké yém Keriso Yesue kénjún,
english: Paul , an apostle of Jesus Christ through the will of God , according to the promise of the life which is in Christ Jesus ,

nama: Kétán Timoti, tane tikfafé ambum: Afé Ngánján a Keriso Yesu téfene Yuram so kémaramangé ngárám, ghérghérsisé, a krufrát. Kánjo ramégh a wawéngsogh yam
english: to Timothy , my beloved child : Grace , mercy , and peace , from God the Father and Christ Jesus our Lord .

nama: Yéndon kánjo yérametan Ngánjáne, endeyot yénd efalo násáfotan, ndené fété tane ákif kés tamorwén. Yéndon kánjo yarametan ndené fété yéndon kés némafarotan fém túmén tane Ngánjánafé orayégh kénjún sémbár a efogh. 4 Yéndon némawafarotan fene yengam, a yénd ménde wém fe fandaghét mindefifi, ménát ndené yénd so áuwégham kwafongé. 5 Yéndon némawafarotan fene ndimbal mwighé, yéné sáfot ndimbal mwighé ndené fenjo alé Lois a fenjo amé Yunis ndenáyo tawarwén. Yénd ndené nemnan fene ndenéyameyo. 6 Yéné téfnan yéndon némangotan mwighat fémon so yarawene fok árké Ngánjánam némaramai fe njam yéndon efayoyén tane ngángé fefaf. 7 Ménamén yéné Mbérmbér Ngánjánam yénmaramai yau yénméinde férférot, wénde yáne Mbérmbéram yénmafote waftaye, uwéghe a fembia awamaroghét.
english: I thank God , whom I serve as my forefathers did , with a pure conscience . How unceasing is my memory of you in my petitions, night and day
longing to see you , remembering your tears , that I may be filled with joy ;
having been reminded of the sincere faith that is in you , which lived first in your grandmother Lois and your mother Eunice and , I am persuaded , in you also .
For this cause , I remind you that you should stir up the gift of God which is in you through the laying on of my hands .
For God didn’ t give us a spirit of fear , but of power , love, and self-control .

nama: Fém yau so wáiwái ném téfene Yurane si afroghmén, o yau wáiwái ném tanemén, ménamén yénd náyáton kwéfkwéf méngo ár Kerisoene téfnan. Wénde, tanang fenjo ásáfogh sifayé tékrat kénjún mer si téfnan, Ngánjánam árké muyé té némaramai yénat. 9 Yémon yénd yénmanjaryéng a yénmanmoyéng yánjo árot, yau ménamén némé yéndfem tawafarotam, wénde ménamén yánjo ménde a ngárám. Yémon yénmaramai téfe yéné ngárám Keriso Yesue frondeyo rényéghan, 10 wénde sénonjo té nufar téfefaf Wanjarégh ár Keriso Yesuene ufarégh kénjúmé. Yémon té yékmboi kroene wafté a mer si kénjúmé nufar krofnar ghérsé.
english: Therefore don’ t be ashamed of the testimony of our Lord , nor of me his prisoner ; but endure hardship for the Good News according to the power of God ,
who saved us and called us with a holy calling , not according to our works , but according to his own purpose and grace , which was given to us in Christ Jesus before times eternal,
but has now been revealed by the appearing of our Savior , Christ Jesus , who abolished death , and brought life and immortality to light through the Good News .

nama: Ngánjánam té waferyéng yénd ndené fété Yesuene muyafé ár a watamegh ár ménát mer si waitoghét, 12 féyo yéné téfnan ndené yénd wém tékratan yéné yammén. Wénde yénd mé táikér mwighafé wém, ménamén yénd mat wém yéndon efe efalo yiyátotan, a yénd mé mat wém ndené fá féyotaro yém yémon so warawene némé yémon té yiyátoi tayot kétánotio Yesuene angoghot.
english: For this I was appointed as a preacher , an apostle, and a teacher of the Gentiles.

For this cause I also suffer these things . Yet I am not ashamed , for I know him whom I have believed , and I am persuaded that he is able to guard that which I have committed to him against that day .

nama: Taikrataye nawereta efalo sian ndené yéndon kés kématametan, ndené fété kés kénmaufarotan fe ménát waitoghét, a kawer taikrataye ndimbal mwighayan a uwéghan Keriso Yesu kénjún. 14 Ngánján Mbérmbér wafté kénjúmé, efe yémor téfe kénjún, ewarawena yéné meryam árké té eramayén feyot.
english: Hold the pattern of sound words which you have heard from me , in faith and love which is in Christ Jesus .
That good thing which was committed to you , guard through the Holy Spirit who dwells in us .

nama: Fém mat ném ndené méinyotio ár Eisiya yuwon, yémafé Fagelus a Emogenes, té wékenayénd yénd. 16 Yuram so tuyafongé ghérghérsisé Onesiforusene mérnot, ménamén yémon kwáutánau ta kértayan tárfár mbinotmé. Fá yau wáiwái témorwén ndené yénd wém kwéfkwéf méngon, 17 wénde njamandio fá néngufaryéng Rom kénjút, fá éregh nufngoi ménát tayot kétánotio yémon winjoi yénd. 18 Yuram so téramangé yáne ghérghérsisé yéné efghon! A fém mer mat ném nderé ndimbale yémon yafrotam tayot Efesos kénjún.
english: This you know , that all who are in Asia turned away from me , of whom are Phygelus and Hermogenes .
May the Lord grant mercy to the house of Onesiphorus , for he often refreshed me , and was not ashamed of my chain,
but when he was in Rome , he sought me diligently and found me
( the Lord grant to him to find the Lord ’ s mercy in that day ); and in how many things he served at Ephesus , you know very well .

nama: Tane ambum, muyafé aném ngárám kénjún árké yém Keriso Yesu kénjún. 2 Tawanang watamegh si ndené fémon kés kwiyárete si waitoghan tárfár ghékéf fandagh ár sáfrére, a engéumyotan fá kétán ndimbal mwighé kér ro árfefaf, emofem wéi so engwatametat ámb ár.
english: You therefore , my child , be strengthened in the grace that is in Christ Jesus .
The things which you have heard from me among many witnesses , commit the same things to faithful men who will be able to teach others also .

nama: Tanang fenjo sifayé tékratan, ndené fété Keriso Yesuene mer fiyaré. 4 Efe njam fiyaré yém, yémo yau so féghe ásáfogh ewafrote. Wénde, ménát yémon táf yéméinde áuwéghét yáne ndimbal ár emon témotangé fiyaré ásáfoghét. 5 Efe njam wérseyan yém yau so tanangé fai táfandro yémon njam nák ewaitota. 6 Taikér ásáfogh ndau téfnárom so fronde enete njam mbwe kafongi. 7 Mé kemnang némé yénd norayan, ménamén Yuram so kémaramangé fe mwighé kwayaghé méinyotio yaman.
english: You therefore must endure hardship as a good soldier of Christ Jesus .
No soldier on duty entangles himself in the affairs of life , that he may please him who enrolled him as a soldier .
Also , if anyone competes in athletics, he isn’t crowned unless he has competed by the rules .
The farmer who labors must be the first to get a share of the crops .
Consider what I say , and may the Lord give you understanding in all things .

nama: Kawafarota Yesu Keriso, efe nanoyéng kérta, a efe yémormén Deifidene ákimén, ndené fété yéné siyém tane mer si árké yéndon yaitotan. 9 Ménamén yéndon mer si yaitotan, yénd tékratan wém a tot ángéghe umbetaménd ndenanit kar oro téfnár wém. Wénde Ngánjánene si siyém yau umbéghkaf yém. 10 Féyo yénémamén yénd métar wém méinyotio yaman Ngánjánene waferégh ár téfnan, ménát yémofem wéi so tanangi wanjarégh árké yéném Keriso Yesue kénjúmé a yénérse tuot ndimbal kwayaghé.
english: Remember Jesus Christ , risen from the dead , of the offspring of David , according to my Good News ,
in which I suffer hardship to the point of chains as a criminal . But God ’s word isn’ t chained.
Therefore I endure all things for the chosen ones’ sake , that they also may obtain the salvation which is in Christ Jesus with eternal glory .

nama: Yéné si siyém efalo: "Njam yénd té kér téném yémafé, yénd so ndenáyo naketam yémafé.
english: This saying is trustworthy : “ For if we died with him , we will also live with him .

nama: Njam yénd mé yénngérnyang métaran, yénd mé so ndenáyo limánéghan yéném yémafé. Njam yéndfem tékenangém fá, yémo ndenáyo so ténkenangé yénd.
english: If we endure , we will also reign with him . If we deny him , he also will deny us .

nama: Njam yénd yau ndimbal mwighé kér ro yéném, fá mé yakai ndimbal mwighé kér ro, ménamén fáyo yau so nawawinde. Efalo yátoghkaf ásáfogh ár
english: If we are faithless, he remains faithful ; for he can ’t deny himself .”

nama: Mwighat ewangota fenjo ár yénémamén, a tawaram yéfe sotafé mat si Ngánjánene sáfrére yau násmetat sian. Yéné yau mer yém, wénde ewaghnati ár efe náyáretat. 15 Tafrota fenjo merfifi ménát fémyo karam kétán Ngánjánefaf ndené fété yátoghkaf, ndené ásáfogh ár efe yau wáiwái yém a emo mbarkánde yamarote efalo si. 16 Kitérmbongi njúnnjúnafé sita, árké yamam so tangférnangé a nayu kamndangi Ngánjáneta. 17 Yéfene watamegh marat so káyátongé ndenanit akmé. Sómbio amaf ere Emaneus a Filetus. 18 Yémofem té yéfrangeyayénd efalo end a tirorwét ámb efalo yátogh árfene ndimbal mwighé méné sie téfene anogh té nufrotam. 19 Wénde sotafé téfén Ngánjánam árké yékmai yau so nasambnete a Ngánjánam efarotam si yéné tukén ndené: "Yuré mat yém fá efe em yáne, " a "Fá efe norayat ndené fá em Yurane táf kawengongi kétándmé yaufiyamta."
english: Remind them of these things , charging them in the sight of the Lord that they don’ t argue about words to no profit , to the subverting of those who hear.
Give diligence to present yourself approved by God , a workman who doesn’ t need to be ashamed, properly handling the Word of Truth.
But shun empty chatter , for it will go further in ungodliness,
and those words will consume like gangrene , of whom is Hymenaeus and Philetus :
men who have erred concerning the truth, saying that the resurrection is already past , and overthrowing the faith of some .
However , God ’ s firm foundation stands , having this seal : “ The Lord knows those who are his ,” and , “ Let every one who names the name of the Lord depart from unrighteousness.”

nama: Ndimbal méngo kénjún kété em tárfár dis a bol wéla sáfot: ámb ewafrotat silfamén a golmén ménát mer wafroghyamot, ámb wénmén a ngwarngwarmén méinyotio efogh ásáfoghmén. 21 Ndené yameyo, fá efe té naumbnaménd fáyo kétamé méinyotio yaufi yamta, so em mer wafroghyamot, ménamén fá té naramayénd a mer em yéfene Yurafaf, a afrengéghkaf em ménát méinyotio meryam wafroghét.
english: Now in a large house there are not only vessels of gold and of silver, but also of wood and of clay . Some are for honor and some for dishonor.
If anyone therefore purges himself from these , he will be a vessel for honor , sanctified , and suitable for the master ’s use , prepared for every good work .

nama: Kitrémb totér árfene yaufi méndeta a mwighé takém mbarkánd kér ro yamot, ndimbal mwighé, uwégh a krufrát, mérne yémafé efe em mer tikfan kutnangi Yurafaf wáutárghét. 23 Wénde kitérmbongi kétándmé fifiofnar a mwighé ongén éwighta, ménamén fém mat em yémofem yéfunat amrorégh. 24 Ndené fété Yurane faiofnar ásáfogh ár, fém yau so namronati. Fém so kwénjtafnar ár em méinyotio árfefaf, a aem mer a métar watamegh ár. 25 Métare ewatameta fá emofem yékarotat efalo, ménát ndené Ngánjánam so tawaramangé yéfe féneféne yaufita awengoghét a mat kamndangi efalo. 26 A féyo fá so mwighat nénangotat kawanjarngi Sáiféroene urérta, emon té ernyai fá a eméindai yáne ménde wafroghét.
english: Flee from youthful lusts ; but pursue righteousness , faith , love, and peace with those who call on the Lord out of a pure heart .
But refuse foolish and ignorant questionings, knowing that they generate strife.
The Lord ’ s servant must not quarrel, but be gentle toward all , able to teach , patient,
in gentleness correcting those who oppose him . Perhaps God may give them repentance leading to a full knowledge of the truth,
and they may recover themselves out of the devil ’s snare , having been taken captive by him to do his will .

nama: Nawafarota ndené kété so yéngém táikér kwéf kerker efghon. 2 Ár so kénamndangi yandro manjorégh, nité, awarsagh kér ro, tuktuk, wasáligh, áyáréghofnar yéfene afaf a amafefaf, kánjo siofnar, njúnnjúnafé, 3 yau uwégh, yau yaufiyam tawawalindangi, warunyégh, awamaréghofnar, tékratro, so méndméndat yéfandat mer; 4 sén ramégh, mwighafnar yam wafrogh, minde tuktukan, uwégh so yém fifi méndeyan minde wénde yau uwégh Ngánjáne 5 so em ngánján ghérsafé árnit, wénde yékenat yáne efalo wafté. Nayu aem yéfe tambén.
english: But know this : that in the last days , grievous times will come .
For men will be lovers of self , lovers of money , boastful, arrogant , blasphemers, disobedient to parents , unthankful, unholy,
without natural affection, unforgiving, slanderers , without self-control, fierce, not lovers of good,
traitors , headstrong, conceited , lovers of pleasure rather than lovers of God ,
holding a form of godliness but having denied its power . Turn away from these , also .

nama: Ámb ár engém árfene méngot a áfrát tinjongi njangén amafefaf efe etumndat yéfenjo yaufiyamam a englimndat fénatayo yaufi mwigham, 7 yéné amafam efe yéta túmén nawatametat totér yam, wénde yaufifi so tanangi efalo matyammén. 8 Ndené fété Janes a Jambres asénanégh ár tarwén Mosesefaf, wéi yéné árém tékarotawét efalo si. Yéfene mwighé yau násáfotat mere a efe uyégh ár ere ndimbal mwighayan. 9 Wénde fá yau so eyowé matyaman nayu, ménamén méinyotio árém so efandat nderé onon fá ere. Ndené fété némé kufrotau yéfefaf Janes a Jambres. Kerkermén watamegh
english: For some of these are people who creep into houses and take captive gullible women loaded down with sins, led away by various lusts ,
always learning and never able to come to the knowledge of the truth.
Even as Jannes and Jambres opposed Moses , so these also oppose the truth, men corrupted in mind , who concerning the faith are rejected.
But they will proceed no further . For their folly will be evident to all men , as theirs also came to be .

nama: Wénde fémon té térse tane watamegh, tane wafroghyam, a tane yam ghérsé kénjún; fémon té tafénmete tane ndimbal mwighé, tane métar yam, tane uwégh, tane awamarogh, 11 tane tárfár wasérmboghyam, a tane tékratyam. Fém mat ném méinyotio yéné kufrotawét tafaf Antiok, Ikonium a Listran, ndimbal tékratfifi yéndo yérsamén! Wénde Yuram wanjaryéng yénd kétándmé méinyotio yéfeta. 12 Méinyotio ár efe ménde em ménát ngánján ghérsé Keriso Yesu kénjún so em wasérmboghyaman; 13 a yaufi ár a unyégh ár so yaufi náyátotat kétán minde yaufi. Ámb ár so ewawindat a wéi fáyo so nawawindat. 14 Wénde ndené fém, ménj miya néngérnyang efalo sian ndené fém kés kénmatametan a taikrataye efalo tiyáto. Fém mat ném efe fene watamegh ár tamorwén, 15 a fém kawafarota ndené kétándmayo fém kénmorwén tosé, fém mat té náyátoi njúnnjúnofnar Buk si, árké ménáyam so némaramete fe káfeté mwighé yéné yam so nélimnde kétán wanjarghét ndimbal mwighé kénjúmé Keriso Yesu kénjún. 16 Méinyotio Buk si siyém Ngánjánam té yétetayéng fifiotyo ménát efalo si watameghét, witrémboghét mámáfi, yaufi frengéghét, watamegh ménát mbarkánd ámnjoghét, 17 ménát yéné ár efe násáfote Ngánjáne so yém mer frengégh ár a watameghkaf méinyotio fénatayero meryam wafroghét.
english: But you followed my teaching , conduct, purpose , faith , patience , love, steadfastness ,
persecutions , and sufferings — those things that happened to me at Antioch, Iconium , and Lystra . I endured those persecutions . The Lord delivered me out of them all .
Yes , and all who desire to live godly in Christ Jesus will suffer persecution .
But evil men and impostors will grow worse and worse , deceiving and being deceived .
But you remain in the things which you have learned and have been assured of , knowing from whom you have learned them .
From infancy , you have known the holy Scriptures which are able to make you wise for salvation through faith which is in Christ Jesus .
Every Scripture is God-breathed and profitable for teaching , for reproof , for correction , and for instruction in righteousness ,
that each person who belongs to God may be complete , thoroughly equipped for every good work .

nama: Ngánjánene sáfrére a Keriso Yesuene sáfrére, emo so mogh yafrote ghérsé árfaf a kér árfaf, a ménamén fá nénangote ménát limánéghét ndené fété Warsagh ár, yéndon sotafé némawéngsotan fém: 2 Ngánjánene si yéngwaitota. Afrengéghkaf so ném táf njam mer kwéf yém o yau. Métare ewenda, taikrataye emndeta, a ewawéngsota fene ár mer watameghafé. 3 Efogh yéna yéném njam ár yau so náyáretat mbarkánd sifaf, wénde so ewaitotat yéfenjo méndero a so ekafetat yéfendio tárfár watamegh ár efe so nafrotat yéfeyot némat fá ménde em áyárghét. 4 Fá so kawengongi kétándmé efalo si áyáréghta a taramangi yéfene téngan kétán ninyé sifaf. 5 Wénde fém so nawarawene fémyo méinyotio yamamé, amyogh kértayan, yafrota ásáfogh ndené fété mer sioene waitogh ár, a yafrota fenjo ásáfogh ndené fété Ngánjánene ásáfogh ár.
english: I command you therefore before God and the Lord Jesus Christ , who will judge the living and the dead at his appearing and his Kingdom:
preach the word ; be urgent in season and out of season ; reprove , rebuke , and exhort with all patience and teaching .
For the time will come when they will not listen to the sound doctrine , but having itching ears, will heap up for themselves teachers after their own lusts ,
and will turn away their ears from the truth, and turn away to fables .
But you be sober in all things , suffer hardship , do the work of an evangelist , and fulfill your ministry .

nama: Ndené tayot siyém, kwéf té nawer ta ménát sái karaman. Kwéf siyém yéna yém ta ménát yéné ghérsé oroghét. 7 Yénd té kásmetan mer ásmégh. Yéndon té yifon tane wérse. Yéndon té tamndan ndimbal mwighé. 8 A sénonjo kété siyém ta nawanjete mbarkánd fai, árkéméné Yuré, mbarkánd Mogh árom, so kwaramangé ta yéné efghon a yau mé tayotro, wénde méinyotio árét efe nawanjetat yáne ufarghét. Ambinomén si
english: For I am already being offered , and the time of my departure has come .
I have fought the good fight. I have finished the course . I have kept the faith .

From now on , the crown of righteousness is stored up for me , which the Lord , the righteous judge , will give to me on that day ; and not to me only , but also to all those who have loved his appearing .

nama: Fenjo mer a yafrota ménát tafaf sái néném wékeye. 10 Demasém té wéfrangoi yénd, ménamén yémo tauwetau yéné mband marat rokar, yéné téfnan fá nuwanoi Tesalonikat. Kresens té nuwanoi Galasia, a Taitus kétán Dalmasia. 11 Lukro siyém yéna yém yéndfé. Ténmasro Mak a yénémnja fá fémo, ménamén yémon so wáutáne ta ásáfogh kénjún. 12 Yéndon yéngwáfáretan Tukikus Efesosét. 13 Njam fém kénuwano, ténman tane sénjté sáláme árké yéndon noroyén Karfusene méngon Troas tesenan, a wéi buk, ndenáyo ámb wérár ghéngan wafroghmén.
english: Be diligent to come to me soon ,
for Demas left me , having loved this present world, and went to Thessalonica ; Crescens to Galatia ; and Titus to Dalmatia .
Only Luke is with me . Take Mark and bring him with you , for he is useful to me for service .
But I sent Tychicus to Ephesus .
Bring the cloak that I left at Troas with Carpus when you come — and the books, especially the parchments .

nama: Aleksenda tot téfén ásáfogh ár yénd yémon tárfár ende kwaghne. Yuram so taramangé yáne fai ndené fété némé yémo té tafrote. 15 Aya kor anawarawena yánemén fémyo, ménamén yémon tékarotau mindefifi téfene si.
english: Alexander the coppersmith did much evil to me . The Lord will repay him according to his deeds .
Beware of him , for he greatly opposed our words .

nama: Efe ámb yau nokayoi ta kaka frondefifi kwéfon yénd nawamarotayén yéndio. Méinyotio árém wéfrangoyénd. Yénd Ngánjánafé noraiwam ndené Ngánján so tawalindangé yéfene yaufi! 17 Wénde Yurafé yénd ténmorare a waramayéng muyé, ménát yénd so kwémorwén si waitogh árro méinyotio Téndo árét áyárghét. A yénd kwanjarngé kérta. 18 A Yuram so kwanjarngé yénd kétándmé méinyotio yaufita a kwanangé yénd yáne njafar limánéghét. Mé yáfafétro ndimbal kwayaghé yém tuot a tuot! Efalo. Ambinomén áuwégh si
english: At my first defense, no one came to help me , but all left me . May it not be held against them .
But the Lord stood by me and strengthened me , that through me the message might be fully proclaimed, and that all the Gentiles might hear. So I was delivered out of the mouth of the lion .
And the Lord will deliver me from every evil work and will preserve me for his heavenly Kingdom. To him be the glory forever and ever . Amen.

nama: Yéndon engwatembetan áuwégh si kétán Frisila a Akwila a Onesiforusene mérnot. 20 Erastus témorangérwén Korint ndimbal yuwon, a yéndo yénfrangoyén Trofimus Miletus tesenan, ménamén fá témorwén enjne. 21 Fenjo mer a yafrota néném fronde soramé yunjéf kawerangé. Yubulusém engwatembayéng áuwégh si fefaf, wéi Fudens, a Linus, a Klaudia a méinyotio ámb efalo yátogh árém kés tawafrotat.
english: Greet Prisca and Aquila, and the house of Onesiphorus .
Erastus remained at Corinth , but I left Trophimus at Miletus sick.
Be diligent to come before winter . Eubulus salutes you , as do Pudens , Linus , Claudia , and all the brothers.

nama: Yuré so yém fene mbérmbéran. Ngánjánene ngárám so yém féfefaf méinyotio.
english: The Lord Jesus Christ be with your spirit . Grace be with you . Amen.

nama: Yéné férén siyém kétamé Fol, Ngánjánene faiofnar ásáfogh ár a Yesu Kerisoene muyafé ár.
english: Paul , a servant of God and an apostle of Jesus Christ , according to the faith of God ’s chosen ones and the knowledge of the truth which is according to godliness ,

nama: árké yém téfén méghmégh tuot ghérsat. Ngánján, efe yau nuinde, unyéghofnar si yénémndai fronde ufroghan. 3 A yáne waferégh efghon yémon safot yékmai yáne si kénjún. Yéné yékmai tafaf, a yéndo táitotawén ndené fété Ngánján téfene Wanjarégh árom té norayai.
english: in hope of eternal life , which God , who can’ t lie, promised before time began ;
but in his own time revealed his word in the message with which I was entrusted according to the commandment of God our Savior ,

nama: Yéndon férén yéngfarotan fefaf, Taitus, tane efalo ambum ndimbal mwighayan téfene árké yénmam. Ngárám a krufrát so yém kétándmé Ngánján Afé a Keriso Yesu téfene Wanjarégh ár. Taitus násáfotam kété Kreten
english: to Titus , my true child according to a common faith : Grace , mercy, and peace from God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ our Savior .

nama: Yéndon fém néfrangoyén Kreten, ménát fémon so tifo téfene ásáfogh kété a takaf Yesuene mérén sénko ár méinyotio tesenamé. Kawafarota tane wawanjagh: 6 sénko ár ayém kértafnar. Yáne so yém ámbiro amaf, yáne ambum aem efalo yátogh ár a méinyotio mer ghérsafé a áyáréghafé. 7 Yesuene mérén sénko ár yém ghékéf fayogh ár Ngánjánene ásáfoghfaf, fá táf yém kértafnar. Fá yau yém fáro násáfota o tekofnar nékw ár, o emo eneta wéri nu, o kwérnar ár, o mani nité ár. 8 Wénde fá ayém fútar wan téfnárfefaf, uwégh némé yém mer, yandio awamarogh, mbarkánd, njúnnjúnofnar, awatamegh. 9 Fá táf taikrataye nawereta efalo yátogh sian yéndfem árké kénémndetam fém. Yéné yameyo yémo so ewawéngsote ámb efalo watameghan a ndenáyo uyafogh yéfene yaufi efe em akenagh ár.
english: I left you in Crete for this reason , that you would set in order the things that were lacking and appoint elders in every city , as I directed you —
if anyone is blameless, the husband of one wife , having children who believe , who are not accused of loose or unruly behavior.
For the overseer must be blameless, as God ’s steward , not self-pleasing, not easily angered, not given to wine , not violent , not greedy for dishonest gain;
but given to hospitality , a lover of good , sober minded, fair, holy , self-controlled ,
holding to the faithful word which is according to the teaching , that he may be able to exhort in the sound doctrine , and to convict those who contradict him .

nama: Ménamén kété tárfár em, efe em ghéngan néfégh ár mérénmén, efe áyárghofnar em a ámb ár ewarsotat yéfene fifiofnar yame. 11 Fá so kékmbongi, ménamén yémofem ewengotat méinyotio mérén efalota yéfene unyégh watameghe, a méinyotio wáiwáiafé yam mani wafroghét. 12 Ámb Kretemén Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár norayai, "Kretemén ár túmén unyégh ár, kéghat wérár, a nité sakér ro." 13 Yéné si efalo yém. Yénémaménnde ewarna fá tékrate, ménát fá mé so em ndimbal mwighayan 14 a yau yérsati Ju árfene ninyé si a árfene wáfaregh emofem yékenat efalo si. 15 Yéfeyot efe em njúnnjúnofnar, méinyotio em njúnnjúnofnar, wénde yéfeyot efe em wasérmboghkaf a efalo yátoghofnar, kété yau yém mer, ménamén yéfene mwighé a emarégh sem wasérmboghkaf. 16 Fá norayat ndené mat em Ngánján, wénde yémofem mé yékenat yéfenjoyo wafroghyaman. Fá em méndménd a áyáréghofnar, féyotarofnar em mer wafroghét.
english: For there are also many unruly men , vain talkers and deceivers , especially those of the circumcision ,
whose mouths must be stopped : men who overthrow whole houses , teaching things which they ought not , for dishonest gain ’s sake .
One of them , a prophet of their own , said , “ Cretans are always liars , evil beasts , and idle gluttons .”
This testimony is true . For this cause , reprove them sharply, that they may be sound in the faith ,
not paying attention to Jewish fables and commandments of men who turn away from the truth.
To the pure , all things are pure , but to those who are defiled and unbelieving, nothing is pure ; but both their mind and their conscience are defiled .
They profess that they know God , but by their deeds they deny him , being abominable, disobedient, and unfit for any good work .

nama: Wénde fémo táf ewatameta ndernáye fifi yém sioene kém. 2 Ewatameta bulu sái nawamarotat, mwighé taikre em, yéfembia anawamarotat; mer aem yéfene ndimbal mwighayan, uwéghan, a métaran. 3 Ndené yameyo ewatameta auséausé sái emor njúnnjúnofnar ghérsaye, yau táf em ár si warunyégh ár o yau táf em tárfár wéri nu néne ár. Fá táf ewatametat némé yém mer. 4 Féyo fá táf ewatametat totér amafam sái euwetat yéfenjo ár a yéfenjo ambum, 5 so fáyo nawamarotat a njúnnjúnofnar em, a sái em mer méngo amaf efe áyárégh ár em yéfenjo árfefaf, ménát Ngánjánene si yau so yém utmanéghofnar.
english: But say the things which fit sound doctrine ,
that older men should be temperate , sensible , sober minded, sound in faith , in love, and in perseverance ,
and that older women likewise be reverent in behavior , not slanderers nor enslaved to much wine , teachers of that which is good ,
that they may train the young wives to love their husbands , to love their children ,
to be sober minded, chaste, workers at home , kind, being in subjection to their own husbands, that God ’s word may not be blasphemed.

nama: Ndené yameyo, ewawéngsota totér ár sái em yéfembia awamarogh ár. 7 A fémyo aném mer ufarogh méinyotio fene wafroghyame. A fene watamegh kénjún fém aném efaloe a táikér mwighafé. 8 Noraya mbarkánd siro ménát yau so némanangotat, ménát fene mék téfnár so ekmete wáiwáiot a némé yaufi si yau so norayat téfenemén.
english: Likewise , exhort the younger men to be sober minded .
In all things show yourself an example of good works . In your teaching , show integrity, seriousness, incorruptibility,
and soundness of speech that can ’ t be condemned, that he who opposes you may be ashamed , having no evil thing to say about us .

nama: Faiofnar ásáfogh ár so fété em áyárégh ár yéfenjo yurafefaf a remngogh ár méinyotio yaman. Yémofem yau so ewawangotat yéfenjo yurafet 10 o yau so oro nufrotat. Wénde fá táf nauyafotat ndené fá mer a efalo yátogh kér ro em, ménamén yéfene mer yammén, méinyotio árém so yuyafotat ndimbal utmanégh Ngánjánene watameghmén téfene Wanjarégh ár.
english: Exhort servants to be in subjection to their own masters and to be well-pleasing in all things , not contradicting,
not stealing, but showing all good fidelity , that they may adorn the doctrine of God , our Savior , in all things .

nama: Ngánjánam té yuyafotam yánjo ngárám ménát wanjaréghét méinyotio árét. 12 Yénayam yénmatamete yénd sái ekmbotam ngánjánofnar ghérsé a mbandoene ménde, a sái yénmor yéndio awamaroghafé, mbarkánd a ngánján ghérsaye sénonjo efghon, 13 njamandio yénd nawanjetam frengéghkaf efghot yénd méghmégh ándan yéném, njam ndimbal kwayaghafé kufarngé téfene ndimbal Ngánján a Wanjarégh ár, Yesu Keriso. 14 Fá té naramai fáyo téfeyot ménát sái ténmanjarngé kétamé méinyotio yaufita a tényátongé njúnnjúnofnar ár efe em yáne kaféghmén ár a ménát sái ewafrotam mer.
english: For the grace of God has appeared , bringing salvation to all men ,
instructing us to the intent that , denying ungodliness and worldly lusts , we would live soberly , righteously , and godly in this present age;
looking for the blessed hope and appearing of the glory of our great God and Savior , Jesus Christ ,
who gave himself for us , that he might redeem us from all iniquity and purify for himself a people for his own possession , zealous for good works .

nama: Ewatameta yéné yam a yafrota fenjo méinyotio muyaye ménát wawéngsoghét a mbarkánd yátoghét fenjo ár. Árké árom yau so nérete yuwot fefaf.
english: Say these things and exhort and reprove with all authority . Let no one despise you .

nama: Mat eyátota fenjo ár táf námyotat kétán gafaman limánégh árfaf a muyafé ár. Yémofem táf ewaitotat a afrengéghkaf aem méinyotio mer ásáfoghét. 2 Fá yau táf yaufi si néngamndetat, a aem krufrát a fútar awarnyégh, a túmén merafé yam aem méinyotio árfefaf. 3 Yéné efghon yénd yéndio ténmorwén fifiofnar, áyáréghofnar a mámáfi. Yénd ténmorwén faiofnar ásáfogh ár méinyotio fénaté fifioene wayamnegh a ménde tárfáran. Yéndfem taramangayém téfene ghérsé yaufifaf a waramnjagh, ámb árém méndméndat ténfandawét a yéndfem ndenáyo tafandawém méndméndafé fá. 4 Wénde njam Ngánjánam téfene Wanjarégh árém yuyafotam yánjo meryam a uwégh árét, 5 yémon yénd yénmanjaryéng, yau ménamén téfenjoyo mbarkánd yam wafroghmén, wénde ménamén yánjo ghérghérsisaye. Yémon yénmanjaryéng yénd Ngánján Mbérmbér kénjúmé, emo yénmaramai téfe totér áráfégh a totér ghérsé ménaye umbarghe. 6 Ngánjánam yasuryéng yánjo Mbérmbér téfefaf marataye Yesu Keriso kénjúmé téfene Wanjarégh ár, 7 ménát yánjo ngáráme yénd mbarkánd yényátoi Ngánjánafé a yénmaramai méghmégh tuot ghérsat árké yém téfene sifayé. 8 Yéné si efalo yém. Yénd ménde wém fém sái ewatameta yéné yamfaf, ménát emofem efalo yiyátotat Ngánján so mwighé yéfaronat meryam wafroghét. Yéné árké yém mer watameghét a féyotaro méinyotio árét. 9 Wénde ekarotati mwighafnar éwigh, ákifene tombé yétkwén sénagh, amrorégh, ásmégh nákmén. Yéné sem fifiofnar a kémbunofnar. 10 Yawéngsota sómbinotmé emo yétiane afalogh, a yéné soramé, yau wéikor yéférta fá. 11 Fém mat ném ndené yéné ár sem wasérmbogh ár, a yéfene yaufiyamam eyátote ndené yau em mer.
english: Remind them to be in subjection to rulers and to authorities , to be obedient , to be ready for every good work ,
to speak evil of no one , not to be contentious, to be gentle , showing all humility toward all men .
For we were also once foolish , disobedient, deceived , serving various lusts and pleasures , living in malice and envy , hateful , and hating one another .
But when the kindness of God our Savior and his love toward mankind appeared ,
not by works of righteousness which we did ourselves , but according to his mercy , he saved us through the washing of regeneration and renewing by the Holy Spirit ,
whom he poured out on us richly through Jesus Christ our Savior ;
that being justified by his grace , we might be made heirs according to the hope of eternal life .

This saying is faithful , and concerning these things I desire that you insist confidently , so that those who have believed God may be careful to maintain good works . These things are good and profitable to men ;
but shun foolish questionings, genealogies , strife , and disputes about the law ; for they are unprofitable and vain .
Avoid a factious man after a first and second warning ,
knowing that such a one is perverted and sinful, being self-condemned.

nama: Njam yéndon téngwatemban Atemas o Tukikus fefaf, mer yafrota ménát sái yéném tafaf Nikofolis tesenot, ménamén yéndon té mwighé téfaronan sái yunjfan wémor kété. 13 Tafrota fene mer wáutárghét Njenas nák téfnárai a Afolos ménát kénufngend áligh a ténfandangend ndené yéfene té eware rokar féyotaro yéfendio. 14 Téfene ár táf notametat ménát efogh sái ersat mer wafroghan, ménát so néusénat efalo ménde yamot, a fá yau so emor fifiofnar.
english: When I send Artemas to you , or Tychicus , be diligent to come to me to Nicopolis , for I have determined to winter there .
Send Zenas the lawyer and Apollos on their journey speedily, that nothing may be lacking for them .
Let our people also learn to maintain good works to meet necessary needs , that they may not be unfruitful.

nama: Méinyotio efe em yéna yéndfé kasnetangi fém. Tasnetangi téfene fútaréf ndimbal mwighaye. Ngánjánene ngárám so yém féfefaf méinyotio.
english: All who are with me greet you . Greet those who love us in faith . Grace be with you all . Amen.

nama: Yéné férén siyém kétamé yénd, Fol. Yénd wém kwéfkwéf méngon ménamén yénd násáfotan Keriso Yesue. Téfene fútar Timoti yéna yém yéndfé.
english: Paul , a prisoner of Christ Jesus , and Timothy our brother, to Philemon , our beloved fellow worker ,
