Yémo ewitam kwémbofnar yékwét, seine eumbai kwéfkwéfan, nawanjetat ménát moghét. 5 A Ngánjánam kérté yanai tándáwár mband maratan njam yémon yénérsam nu kéfér ngánjánofnar árfefaf, wénde yanjaryéng Noa, mbarkánd si waitogh ár, a ámb 7 ár. 6 Njam yémon té tékratan ekmeyai ndimbal tesen Sodom a Gomora ménáyan ewakérnam kétán mbangmbang, a yafrotam yéfefaf ufarogh némé so néngufrote ngánjánofnar árfefaf. 7 A njam té yémo yanjaryéng Lot, mbarkánd ár, ende tékrat tarametawét yaufi wal yame nákofnar árém. 8 Yéné mbarkánd ár témorangérwén yéfene kénjún, túmén efogh yémon téfandau ndémke njam tafandau a káyáretau yéfene yaufi wafroghyammén. 9 Njam yéné yém efalo, yénémamén Yuré mat yém ndernáye so ewanjane ngánjánene ár kétamé ufogh yamta a sái ewereta mbarkándofnar ár moghfaf yéné mogh efghon. 10 Fá efe eyota fifioene méndeyan yaghnat a yékenat Ngánjánene wafté.
english: For if God didn’ t spare angels when they sinned, but cast them down to Tartarus, and committed them to pits of darkness to be reserved for judgment ;
and didn’t spare the ancient world , but preserved Noah with seven others , a preacher of righteousness , when he brought a flood on the world of the ungodly,
and turning the cities of Sodom and Gomorrah into ashes , condemned them to destruction , having made them an example to those who would live in an ungodly way,
and delivered righteous Lot , who was very distressed by the lustful life of the wicked
( for that righteous man dwelling among them was tormented in his righteous soul from day to day with seeing and hearing lawless deeds ),
then the Lord knows how to deliver the godly out of temptation and to keep the unrighteous under punishment for the day of judgment ,
but chiefly those who walk after the flesh in the lust of defilement and despise authority . Daring , self-willed, they are not afraid to speak evil of dignitaries,

nama: Wénde njafar si résagh árém ewaindat yéné ár a em minde tukén a waftafé, yémofem yau tamndetawét yaufi si Yurane sáfrére. 12 Wénde yéné unyégh watamegh ár sem ndenanit kéghat wérár ménát werghét a krot. Fá nénwangotat tékrate fá árkéméné mafina em. Fá so kolindangi ndenanit kéghat wérár.
english: whereas angels, though greater in might and power , don’t bring a slanderous judgment against them before the Lord .
But these , as unreasoning creatures , born natural animals to be taken and destroyed , speaking evil in matters about which they are ignorant, will in their destroying surely be destroyed ,

nama: Fá so fai ewafrotat tékrate yéné tékrateyo yémofem árké tafrotat. Ménde yéfene siyém sái ewafrotat safén efogh kwayaghayan árkéménayam so eremngote yéfene fifi amanjarghan. Fá em wáiwái a ngárámofnar ndené kés nufeindat féfene njamkeyan, méinyotio yaman náuwetat yéfene yaufiyammén. 14 Wal ghékéf amafanyo, fá yau kékmbongi yaufiyam. Yémofem engwaramnat yau kékmbongi. Fá em nité. Fá sem Ngánjánene wafalngogh mbanmbanan. 15 Yémofem té norongi mbarkánd end a mwighé yaitongi sái yaitotat Bejerene ambum Balamene yam, emo méndefé tafandau yaufiyam wafroghét mani faie. 16 Wénde fá yusérmbotam siofnar ndonkiam ménamén yánjoyo yaufiyammén, korayau ár si kéme a yékmbotam yéné Ngánjánene mat yátogh árfene máméghéraye yam.
english: receiving the wages of unrighteousness; people who count it pleasure to revel in the daytime , spots and defects, reveling in their deceit while they feast with you ;
having eyes full of adultery , and who can’t cease from sin, enticing unsettled souls , having a heart trained in greed , accursed children !
Forsaking the right way , they went astray , having followed the way of Balaam the son of Beor, who loved the wages of wrongdoing;
but he was rebuked for his own disobedience. A speechless donkey spoke with a man’ s voice and stopped the madness of the prophet .

nama: Yéné ár sem ndenanit sotro nu yékwnit a esnit árké yéngtarne ménáyam mbormboram. Minde kwéfité nawanjete yéfeyot. 18 Fá nawarmbotat a fifiofnar sie ewafrotat, a yaufi wal méndeye ereindat fá emofem yérnyangi kétamé nawanjarngi ár efe emormén yaufi ghérsaye. 19 Yémofem unyéghofnar si ewaramayénd yéfe yuwekmén, táf fá fáyo em faiofnar ásáfogh ár wasérmboghan ménamén, "ár eyátote faiofnar ásáfogh ár némé yam té elimnde fá. 20 Yéné unyégh watamegh ár mat náyátoyénd yánemén téfene Yuré Yesu Keriso, emo yénmanjane yénd. Yéné téfnan, fá té nékmboyénd yaufi wafroghta árkéméné em mband maratoene. Fá té nénamndayénd yuwek kétamé yéné yam waftata. Wénde soramé njam yémofem wéi ewafrotat yéné yaufi yamyo, féyo yéné yam wafrogh so kénamndangi minde muyafé a taumbangi yéné ár wéikor a fá so awasérmboghan em. 21 Ndené árém yau fia tinjongayénd mbarkánd end. Yéné siyém ménamén tekofnar emormén a nangoyénd. Njam nangoyénd ekenayénd Ngánjánene minde muyafé si yémon árké té ewaramai. 22 A sómbio káfeté si efalo nufrotam yéfefaf. Ámb si noraye, "Ághé ménd nawetotam a yéngmormén a soramé nénangotam a enete wéikor yánjo ménd." A ámb si noraye, "Kimb kumbnau mer nuan a néwanoi a wéi nénangoi a káyátotau ghéndan."
english: These are wells without water, clouds driven by a storm , for whom the blackness of darkness has been reserved forever.
For , uttering great swelling words of emptiness, they entice in the lusts of the flesh , by licentiousness, those who are indeed escaping from those who live in error ;
promising them liberty , while they themselves are bondservants of corruption ; for a man is brought into bondage by whoever overcomes him .

For if , after they have escaped the defilement of the world through the knowledge of the Lord and Savior Jesus Christ , they are again entangled in it and overcome , the last state has become worse for them than the first .
For it would be better for them not to have known the way of righteousness , than after knowing it , to turn back from the holy commandment delivered to them .
But it has happened to them according to the true proverb , “ The dog turns to his own vomit again ,” and “ the sow that has washed to wallowing in the mire .”

nama: Áuwéghafé fútaréf, yéné siyém sénonjo yénamayo férén féfefaf. Yéndon té efaromén sómbio férén féfefaf mwighat minaghét féfe ámbiro mwighayan. 2 Yénd ménde wém fém sái nawafarotati si némé té kénorayawét tándái yémofem njúnnjúnofnar Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár a wáfaregh si yénmaramayéng téfene Yuram a Wanjarégh árom féfene Yesuene muyafé ár kénjúmé.
english: This is now , beloved, the second letter that I have written to you ; and in both of them I stir up your sincere mind by reminding you
that you should remember the words which were spoken before by the holy prophets and the commandment of us, the apostles of the Lord and Savior ,

nama: Frondefifi, fém a mat náyátotati ndené kété kerker efghon si wafrogh ár so eném, si so engwafrotat a ewaitotat yéfenjo yaufiyam ménde. 4 Fá so norayat, "Ánde yém yéné 'angogh' yémo syéngufoi? Kétándmayo téfene ákif té kér enmormén, méinyotio mé néngrete ndené endeyo kétándmayo mband marat fronde nénufrotam." 5 Wénde fá fifiyanyo ewawalinde ndené tándái yénaye Ngánjánene sie njafar naketat a mband marat yafrotam kétamé nuta a mé nuero. 6 Yéné nue wéi mband marat yéné efghon yékmangérmén kéfér a yérambaryéng. 7 Yéné sieyo sénonjo njafar a mband marat nawamndat kétán fését, em kétán mogh efogh a tékrat yam ngánjánofnar árfet.
english: knowing this first , that in the last days mockers will come , walking after their own lusts
and saying , “ Where is the promise of his coming ? For , from the day that the fathers fell asleep , all things continue as they were from the beginning of the creation .”
For they willfully forget that there were heavens from of old , and an earth formed out of water and amid water by the word of God ,
by which means the world that existed then , being overflowed with water , perished.
But the heavens that exist now and the earth , by the same word have been stored up for fire , being reserved against the day of judgment and destruction of ungodly men .

nama: Tane fútaréf, wénde yau tawawalindangé yéné ámbiro yam: Yurafaf ámbiro efogh siyém ndenanit 1,000 yunjéf, a 1,000 yunjéf ndenanit ámbiro efogh. 9 Yuré yau yém awanéghe sái nufrota yáne unyéghofnar si, ndené ámb néngemnat so nawanete. Wénde fá siyém métar fémafé, yau ménde yém ámb ár sái kolindangé, wénde méinyotio ár sái kawengongi yaufiyamta.
english: But don’t forget this one thing , beloved, that one day is with the Lord as a thousand years , and a thousand years as one day .
The Lord is not slow concerning his promise , as some count slowness ; but he is patient with us , not wishing that anyone should perish, but that all should come to repentance .

nama: Wénde Yurane efogh so yéném ndenanit oro téfnár. Njafar so nolindat ukefé. Fésam so yasérmbote méinyotio rokar. Mband marat a méinyotio rokar némé árém ewafrotat so kolindangi.
english: But the day of the Lord will come as a thief in the night, in which the heavens will pass away with a great noise , and the elements will be dissolved with fervent heat ; and the earth and the works that are in it will be burned up .

nama: Ménamén Ngánjánam so ewasérmbote méinyotio rokar yéné ende, fém efalo mat em ndernaye fémofem táf so násáfotati. Fém so emor njúnnjúnofnar a ngánján ghérsaye 12 njamandio fém néretati Ngánjánene efghot a wékeye tiyátongi yáne áligh. Yéné efgham so yénérsé tékrat yam njafar sái em fésan, a méinyotio rokar so nérndat waftamén. 13 Wénde yeretam yáne unyéghofnar si yénd néretam kétán totér njafar a totér mband marat, ánde mbarkánd yam so násáfotat.
english: Therefore , since all these things will be destroyed like this , what kind of people ought you to be in holy living and godliness ,
looking for and earnestly desiring the coming of the day of God , which will cause the burning heavens to be dissolved , and the elements will melt with fervent heat ?
But , according to his promise , we look for new heavens and a new earth , in which righteousness dwells .

nama: Yénémamén, áuwéghafé fútaréf, ndené fété fém néretati kétán yénat méinyotio yammén a tawinjongé mborofnar, téfnofnar a krufrátan yémafé. 15 Mwighayan yérsati ndené téfene Yurane métaroene fifi siyém wanjarghét, ndené fété téfene áuwéghafé fútar Folém wéi yéfarotam féfeyot ménaye káfeté mwighaye ndené Ngánjánam syaramai yá. 16 Yémo yéfarotam ndenéyameyo méinyotio yáne férnan, korayau yénamé yéné kértamén. Yáne férnan em ámb yam árkéméné em táikér résaghét, árkéméné áyáréghofnar a awanjmegh árém yéngwengotat, ndené ámb Buk sian kés yéngfayotat. Yéné téfnan, fá so em wasérmboghan.
english: Therefore , beloved, seeing that you look for these things , be diligent to be found in peace , without defect and blameless in his sight.
Regard the patience of our Lord as salvation ; even as our beloved brother Paul also , according to the wisdom given to him , wrote to you ,

as also in all of his letters , speaking in them of these things . In those , there are some things that are hard to understand , which the ignorant and unsettled twist , as they also do to the other Scriptures , to their own destruction.

nama: Yénémaménnde, áuwéghafé fútaréf, fém té mat náyátongi yéné, kor aem ménát fém yau so tawanangé nákofnar árfene yaufiyamam a kuyangi kétamé féfenjo waferéghkaf sifayata. 18 Wénde nanotati téfene Yuré a Wanjarégh ár Yesu Kerisoene ngárám a matyam kénjún. Yáyot so yém ndimbal kwayaghé sénonjo a tuot! Efalo.
english: You therefore , beloved, knowing these things beforehand , beware , lest being carried away with the error of the wicked , you fall from your own steadfastness .
But grow in the grace and knowledge of our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ . To him be the glory both now and forever . Amen.

nama: Fá efe nakete kétamayo rényégh, fá yéné féyém yéndfem efe yiyáráyém a yinjoyém, yéndfem yinjoyém téfenjo ghékfe a tianjawém téfenjo ngángaye, fá yém Yesu Keriso, ghérsé si. 2 Yéné ár efe yém ghérsé kétamé Ngánjáneta árké yuyafoi téfefaf a yéndfem té yinjoyém, a sénonjo yéndfem engwaufrotam a mat engyátotam fém ndené fá yéné féyém efe yém tuot ghérsé, fá tarwén Yárefafé a kété yémo yuyafoi téfeyot. 3 Yéndfem engwaufrotam féfe ménamén némé yéndfem té téfandam a káyáretam, ménát fémofé so nawareindam yéndfé, a téfene awarnyégh siyém yémafé Yárefafé a yánjo Ambum, Yesu Keriso. 4 Yéndfem yéfarotam yéné yammén ménát téfene áuwégh so yém afoghare. Áligh kwayaghayan
english: That which was from the beginning, that which we have heard, that which we have seen with our eyes , that which we saw , and our hands touched , concerning the Word of life
( and the life was revealed , and we have seen , and testify , and declare to you the life , the eternal life , which was with the Father , and was revealed to us );
that which we have seen and heard we declare to you , that you also may have fellowship with us . Yes , and our fellowship is with the Father and with his Son , Jesus Christ .
And we write these things to you , that our joy may be fulfilled .

nama: Yéné fiyém si yéndfem árké náyárayém kétamé yá tambén a yafnamoyém féfefaf: Ngánján siyém kwayaghé, yáne kénjún yau yém kwéfité. 6 Njam yénd norayam ndené yénd nawareindam yémafé, wénde yényota mé kwéfkwéfamé, yénd nuindam a yau yénmor efaloe. 7 Wénde njam yénd yényota kwayaghayan, ndené fété fá kés yém kwayaghayan, téfene yém awarnyégh téfenjo kénjún, a Ngánjánene Ambum, Yesuene férkam, yénmaine yénd kétamé méinyotio yaufita.
english: This is the message which we have heard from him and announce to you , that God is light , and in him is no darkness at all .
If we say that we have fellowship with him and walk in the darkness , we lie and don’ t tell the truth.
But if we walk in the light as he is in the light , we have fellowship with one another , and the blood of Jesus Christ his Son cleanses us from all sin.

nama: Njam yénd norayam ndené yau yéném yaufiyamafé, yénd nawawindam yéndio a efalo yau yém téfefaf. 9 Njam yéndfem eufanam téfenjo yaufiyam, fá yém ndimbal mwighé kér ro a mbarkánd a so tawalindangé téfene yaufiyam a yénmaina yénd kétamé méinyotio mbarkándofnar yamta. 10 Yénd njam norayam téfene yau em yaufiyam, yéndfem yéméindam Ngánján unyégh ár a yáne si yau yém téfene kénjún.
english: If we say that we have no sin, we deceive ourselves , and the truth is not in us .
If we confess our sins, he is faithful and righteous to forgive us the sins and to cleanse us from all unrighteousness.
If we say that we haven’ t sinned, we make him a liar , and his word is not in us .

nama: Tane tikfafé ambumtértér, yéndon yéfarotan yéné féfefaf ménát fémofem yau so yaufiyam ewafrotati. Wénde njam árké árom yafrota yaufiyam, téfene yém néndkéf ár efe noraye Yárefafaf, Yesu Keriso, Mbarkánd ár. 2 Fá siyém krufrát ghéngén téfene yaufiyam árké tawalindangé, a yau mé téfene yaufiyamro wénde méinyotio árfene yaufiyam.
english: My little children , I write these things to you so that you may not sin. If anyone sins, we have a Counselor with the Father , Jesus Christ , the righteous .
And he is the atoning sacrifice for our sins, and not for ours only , but also for the whole world .

nama: Yénd mat yéném ndené yénd té nénamndayém mat yánemén njam yéndfem ewaitotam yáne wáfaregh si. 4 Ár efe noraye, "Yénd mat wém fá, " wénde yau ewafrota némat yémo yénmáfárete yém unyégh ár, a efalo yau yém yáne kénjún. 5 Wénde njam árké árom ewaitota yáne si, Ngánjánene uwégh siyém efalo náyáto mbarkánd yáne kénjún. Yéné fiyém ndené yénd yéném yáne kénjún. 6 Efe njam noraya ménát sái yiyota ghérsayan yáne kénjún so fété yiyota ndené Yesu kés tiyotau. Totér nák
english: This is how we know that we know him : if we keep his commandments .
One who says , “ I know him ,” and doesn’ t keep his commandments , is a liar , and the truth isn’ t in him .
But God ’s love has most certainly been perfected in whoever keeps his word . This is how we know that we are in him :
he who says he remains in him ought himself also to walk just like he walked .

nama: Tane tikfafé fútaréf, yéndo yau yéfarotan totér nák féfefaf wénde tándáwár nák fém árké té náyárayénd kétamé rényéghta. Yéné watameghyo fiyém fém árké té nénáyárayénd. 8 Wénde yéné siyém efalo totér nák, a fém mat em yáne efalo fifi, ndené fété Kerisom kés ewafrote. Sénonjo yéné té wéi efalo yiyátoi féfene ghérsayan. Ménamén kwéfité néngolinde a efalo kwayaghé té natremngo.
english: Brothers, I write no new commandment to you , but an old commandment which you had from the beginning. The old commandment is the word which you heard from the beginning.
Again , I write a new commandment to you , which is true in him and in you , because the darkness is passing away and the true light already shines .

nama: Njam yénd norayam ndené yénd yéném kwayaghayan a méndméndat efandam ámb ár, yénd mé yéném kwéfitayan. 10 Wénde njam yéndfem euwetam ámb ár, yénd yéném kwayaghayan, a yéndfem yau so yaufiot eméindam ámb ár. 11 Wénde emofem njam méndméndat efandat fútaréf em kwéfitayan, emor kwéfitayan, a mafina em ándan so engém, ménamén kwéfitayam té eyáto yéné ár kwéfkwéf.
english: He who says he is in the light and hates his brother is in the darkness even until now .
He who loves his brother remains in the light , and there is no occasion for stumbling in him .
But he who hates his brother is in the darkness , and walks in the darkness , and doesn’ t know where he is going , because the darkness has blinded his eyes .

nama: Tikfafé ambumtértér, yéndon yéfarotan féfefaf ménamén féfene yaufiyam té tawalindangé Kerisoene kénjúmé.
english: I write to you , little children , because your sins are forgiven you for his name ’s sake .

nama: Afaf, yéndon yéfarotan féfefaf ménamén fémofem mat té yiyátongi fá efe yém kétamé rényégh. Totér ambum, yéndon yéfarotan féfefaf ménamén fémofem té yáindangi yaufi ár.
english: I write to you , fathers , because you know him who is from the beginning. I write to you , young men , because you have overcome the evil one . I write to you , little children , because you know the Father .

nama: Tikfafé ambumtértér, yéndon yéfarotan féfefaf ménamén fém mat té náyátongi Afé. Afaf, yéndon yéfarotan féfefaf ménamén fémofem mat té yiyátongi fá efe yém kétamé rényégh. Totér ambum, yéndon yéfarotan féfefaf ménamén fém em muyafé, a Ngánjánene si yékmang féfefaf, a fémofem té yáindangi yaufi ár. Yau yuwetati mband marat
english: I have written to you , fathers , because you know him who is from the beginning. I have written to you , young men , because you are strong , and the word of God remains in you , and you have overcome the evil one .

nama: Yau yuwetati mband marat o némé rokar em mband maratan. Árké árém njam yuwetat mband marat, Afane uwégh yau yém yáfaf. 16 Méinyotio némé em yéné mband maratmén- fifioene ménde, ghékfoene ménde, a tuktuk ghérsé-yau em Afata, wénde em mbandmén. 17 Mband marat a yánjo méndefayo so nawainde, wénde yéné ár emofem yafrotat Ngánjánene ménde so emor tuot. Wawéngsogh yéfenemén unyégh keriso
english: Don’ t love the world or the things that are in the world . If anyone loves the world , the Father ’s love isn’ t in him .
For all that is in the world — the lust of the flesh , the lust of the eyes , and the pride of life —isn’ t the Father ’s, but is the world ’s.
The world is passing away with its lusts , but he who does God ’s will remains forever .

nama: Tikfafé ambumtértér, yéné siyém kerker efogh. Fém té náyárangi ndené unyégh keriso so yéném, ndené sénonjo tárfár unyégh keriso té enmormén. Ndenaye yénd mat so yéném yéné siyém kerker efogh. 19 Fá nétoryénd téfe kénjúta, wénde fá yau efaloe tamorwén téfene, njam fá tamorwén téfene, fá so mé kawangsongayénd téfefaf; wénde fá nétoryénd, ménát so yéné kufarngé ndené fá yau em méinyotio téfene.
english: Little children , these are the end times, and as you heard that the Antichrist is coming , even now many antichrists have arisen. By this we know that it is the final hour .

They went out from us , but they didn’t belong to us ; for if they had belonged to us , they would have continued with us . But they left , that they might be revealed that none of them belong to us .

nama: Wénde féfefaf té Ngánján Mbérmbér yasuryéng Kerisom, a féyo méinyotio fém mat em efalo. 21 Yéndon yéfarotan féfefaf, yau ménamén fém mafina em efalo wénde ménamén fém mat em ndené unyégh si yau yéném efalota.
english: You have an anointing from the Holy One , and you all have knowledge .
I have not written to you because you don’ t know the truth, but because you know it , and because no lie is of the truth.

nama: A efe yém unyégh ár? Fá efe noraye ndené Yesu yau yém Keriso, ndené ár fem unyégh keriso. Yémofem té yékenangi Yárefé a Ambum. 23 Emofem yékarotat Ambum, wéi yékarotat Yárefé, wénde emofem yumyotat Ambum, ndenéyameyo yumyotat Yárefé.
english: Who is the liar but he who denies that Jesus is the Christ ? This is the Antichrist, he who denies the Father and the Son .
Whoever denies the Son doesn’ t have the Father . He who confesses the Son has the Father also .

nama: Mé a nemnati ménamén si fémofem árké nénáyárayénd fronde, a fém so em túmén ámbiro féfene tikfan yémafé Ambumofé a Yárefafé. 25 Ambumom té unyéghofnar si norayai téfefaf: tuot ghérsé.
english: Therefore , as for you , let that remain in you which you heard from the beginning. If that which you heard from the beginning remains in you , you also will remain in the Son , and in the Father .
This is the promise which he promised us , the eternal life .

nama: Yéndo yéfarotan ménát ewawéngsotan fém yéné árfenemén emofem elimndat ámb endmé fém. 27 Wénde Kerisom té efrendai fém ménaye Ngánján Mbérmbére. Sénonjo yáne Mbérmbér yémor féfefaf, a fémofem yau eronjati ámb watamegh ár. Ngánján Mbérmbér siyém efalo a ewatamete fém méinyotio yam. Féyo a emor ámbiro féfene tikfan yémafé Keriso, ndené fété Ngánján Mbérmbéram ndernáye tawatamete fém ménát wafroghét. Ngánjánene ambumtértér
english: These things I have written to you concerning those who would lead you astray .

As for you , the anointing which you received from him remains in you , and you don’ t need for anyone to teach you . But as his anointing teaches you concerning all things , and is true , and is no lie , and even as it taught you , you will remain in him .

nama: Tikfafé ambumtértér, sénonjo mé aem yáne kénjún, ménát fá njam kufarngé, yénd so yéném féyotaro a wáiwáiofnar yánerére yáne angoghan. 29 Fém njam mat em ndené fá yém mbarkánd, fém mat em ndené méinyotio árém emofem ewafrotat némé em mbarkánd té náráftayénd yáfaf.
english: Now , little children , remain in him , that when he appears , we may have boldness and not be ashamed before him at his coming .
If you know that he is righteous , you know that everyone who practices righteousness has been born of him .

nama: Afam té yénmuwetam yénd mindefifi ndené kés yénémndete Ngánjánene ambumtértér, a yénd efalofifi yéném yáne ambum. Téfén méné ár mband maratan yau mat em téfenemén yém ndené yémofem yau mat yiyátoyénd fá. 2 Tikfafé fútaréf, sénonjo yénd yéném Ngánjánene ambumtértér, a yénd yau mat nénamndangém ndernáye yénd fifi so yéném soramé yuwan. Wénde yénd mat yéném ndené njam Keriso nénangota wéikor, yénd so kénamndangém ndené fá kés yém, ménamén yéndfem so tinjongém fá ndené fété fá ndernáye yém. 3 Yéné méghmégham yénd yényátote njúnnjúnofnar, ndené fété Keriso kés yém njúnnjúnofnar.
english: See how great a love the Father has given to us , that we should be called children of God ! For this cause the world doesn’ t know us , because it didn’ t know him .
Beloved, now we are children of God . It is not yet revealed what we will be ; but we know that when he is revealed , we will be like him , for we will see him just as he is .
Everyone who has this hope set on him purifies himself , even as he is pure.

nama: Méinyotio ár emofem yaufiyam yéngwafrotat yéngrafnat Ngánjánene nák, ménamén yaufiyam siyém Ngánjánene nák rafarégh. 5 A fém mat em ndené fá nufaryéng ménát so tawitau téfene yaufiyam, a yáfaf kété yau yém yaufiyam. 6 Efe yém yáfaf yau so ewafrote yaufiyam. Emo njam ewafrota yaufiyam yau yinjoi fá a mat yau yiyáto fá.
english: Everyone who sins also commits lawlessness. Sin is lawlessness.
You know that he was revealed to take away our sins, and no sin is in him .
Whoever remains in him doesn’ t sin. Whoever sins hasn’ t seen him and doesn’ t know him .

nama: Tikfafé ambumtértér, yau yumyotati ámb árom sái elimnda fém mámáfi endmé. Emo njam ewafrota némé em mbarkánd fá siyém mbarkánd, ndené fété Keriso yém mbarkánd. 8 Sáifram té engwafngoi yaufiyam kétamayo rényégh, féyo árké ár efe ménjté mé yém yaufiyaman yém Sáiférene. Ngánjánene Ambum yénmormén yéné téfnan, ménát Sáiférene ásáfogh wirorghét.
english: Little children , let no one lead you astray . He who does righteousness is righteous , even as he is righteous .
He who sins is of the devil , for the devil has been sinning from the beginning. To this end the Son of God was revealed : that he might destroy the works of the devil .

nama: Fá efe em Ngánjánene ambumtértér yau so ménjté em yaufiyaman ménamén totér ghérsé kétamé Ngánjáneta yém yéfene kénjún, fá féyotarofnar em sái ménjté engém yaufiyaman, ménamén fá té nénamndayénd Ngánjánene ambumtértér. 10 Féyo yéndfem so efandam efe Ngánjánene ambumtértér em a efe Sáiférene ambumtértér em: Fá emofem yau ewafrotat mbarkánd yau em Ngánjánene ambum, a fá emofem yau enguwetat yéfene fútaréf yau em Ngánjánene ambumtértér. Náuwetati fémro fémro
english: Whoever is born of God doesn’ t commit sin, because his seed remains in him , and he can ’ t sin, because he is born of God .
In this the children of God are revealed , and the children of the devil . Whoever doesn’ t do righteousness is not of God , neither is he who doesn’ t love his brother.

nama: Yéné fiyém watamegh fémofem árké náyárayénd kétamé rényégh: Yénd so náuwetam téfenjo kénjún. 12 Yau ndené em Kein efe témorwén yaufi ároe tambén a yésmetam yánngén. Némamén yémo yésmetam krotio fá? Ménamén yam Keiném tawafrotau tamorwén mámáfi, a yam yanngnom tawafrotau tamorwén mer.
english: For this is the message which you heard from the beginning, that we should love one another —
unlike Cain , who was of the evil one and killed his brother. Why did he kill him ? Because his deeds were evil , and his brother’s righteous .

nama: Tane fútaréf, yau táf em sélngwél njam mband marat árém méndméndat efandat fém. 14 Yénd mat yéném yéndfem té yénfrangongém kér a té nényawangém ghérsat ménamén yéndfem náuwetam téfenjo kénjún, emo yau njam euweta mé yém kérwén. 15 Árké árom méndméndat efande yané fútaréf yém ngi téfnár, a fém mat em ndené yau ár ngi téfnárafefaf yém tuot ghérsé.
english: Don’ t be surprised , my brothers, if the world hates you .
We know that we have passed out of death into life , because we love the brothers. He who doesn’ t love his brother remains in death .
Whoever hates his brother is a murderer, and you know that no murderer has eternal life remaining in him .

nama: Ndenaye yénd mat yéném némé efalo uwégh yém: Yesum yéramai yánjo ghérsé téfeyot. Féyo yéndfem wéi taramangém téfene ghérsé téfene fútarfet. 17 Wénde njam endene em féyotaroan mani ménát sái yéngmor mer a efande yané fútaréf náronjat a nakena wáutárghét, ndernáye so norayam Ngánjánene uwégh yém ndené ároefaf?
english: By this we know love, because he laid down his life for us . And we ought to lay down our lives for the brothers.
But whoever has the world ’ s goods and sees his brother in need , then closes his heart of compassion against him , how does God ’ s love remain in him ?

nama: Tikfafé ambumtértér, yénd yau so náuwetam mé siero o kánkaye wénde ménaye wafroghyame a efaloe. 19 Ndenaye yénd mat yéném ndené yénd yéném efaloene, a ndenáye yéndfem ewalinjotam téfene tikéf Ngánján sáfrére. 20 Ndemamén téfene mwighayam so ténmaufrongé ndené yéndfem tawafrotam ámb yaufi, yénd wéi mé yau so yéném férfér Ngánjánefaf. Ngánjánam ewainde téfene mwighé. Fá té mat yém téfenemén méinyotio.
english: My little children , let ’s not love in word only , or with the tongue only , but in deed and truth.
And by this we know that we are of the truth and persuade our hearts before him ,
because if our heart condemns us , God is greater than our heart , and knows all things .

nama: Tane tikfafé fútaréf, njam téfene tikfam yau tényátongé yaufi, yénd so yéném férférofnar Ngánjánene sáfrére, 22 a Ngánjánam yénmaramete téfe némat yéndfem yéngwamnendam ménamén yéndfem ewaitatam Ngánjánene nák a ewafrotam némé yam áuwéghét yéméinde fá. 23 A yéné féyém yáne nák: ndené yéndfem so efalo yiyátotam yánjo Ambum Yesu Kerisoene yétkwén, a náuwetam téfenjo kénjún, ndené fété yémo yénmaramai téfe nák. 24 Fá emofem ewaitotat Ngánjánene nák emor yáne kénjún, a fá yém yéfene kénjún. A ndenáye yénd mat yéném ndené fá yémor téfene kénjún, yénd mat náyátotam ménáyan Ngánján Mbérmbér yémo yénmaramai téfe.
english: Beloved, if our hearts don’ t condemn us , we have boldness toward God ;
so whatever we ask, we receive from him , because we keep his commandments and do the things that are pleasing in his sight .
This is his commandment , that we should believe in the name of his Son , Jesus Christ , and love one another , even as he commanded .
He who keeps his commandments remains in him , and he in him . By this we know that he remains in us , by the Spirit which he gave us .

nama: Tikfafé fútaréf, yau táf efalo eyátotati méinyotio mbérmbér, wénde eufotati mbérmbér ménát fandaghét némé fá fété em Ngánjáneta, ménamén tárfár unyégh mat yátogh ár té engmormén mband maratot. 2 Yéné fiyém ndenáye fémofem so tayamngongi Ngánjánene Mbérmbér: Árké ár njam noraya ndené Yesu Keriso té yénmormén fifie fá fiyém Ngánjáneta. 3 Wénde njam ámb ár yau noraya ndené Yesuenemén, fém mat em yéné ároefaf siyém yéné mbérmbér yau yém árkéméné yéném Ngánjáneta a yém Kerisoene mék téfnár, fém mat em yéné mék téfnár té yénmorwén yénan mband maratot a sénonjo fá té yém yéna.
english: Beloved, don’ t believe every spirit , but test the spirits , whether they are of God , because many false prophets have gone out into the world .
By this you know the Spirit of God : every spirit who confesses that Jesus Christ has come in the flesh is of God ,

and every spirit who doesn’ t confess that Jesus Christ has come in the flesh is not of God ; and this is the spirit of the Antichrist, of whom you have heard that it comes . Now it is in the world already .

nama: Tikfafé ambumtértér, fém em Ngánjáneta a té ewaindayénd fá, ménamén fá efe yém féfene kénjún yáinde efe yém yéné mband maratan. 5 Fá em yéné mband maratmén, a némé fá nénorayat em mé mband maratmén, a mband marat náyárete yéfefaf. 6 Wénde yénd yéném Ngánjánene, a fá efe mat em Ngánján náyáretat téfefaf, wénde fá efe yau em Ngánjáneta yau náyáretat téfefaf. Ndenaye yénd mat yéném mbérmbér árké yém efaloe a mbérmbér árké yém unyéghe. Ngánján siyém uwégh
english: You are of God , little children , and have overcome them , because greater is he who is in you than he who is in the world .
They are of the world . Therefore they speak of the world , and the world hears them .
We are of God . He who knows God listens to us . He who is not of God doesn’ t listen to us . By this we know the spirit of truth, and the spirit of error .

nama: Tikfafé fútaréf, yénd so náuwetam téfenjo kénjún, ménamén uwégh yéném kétamé Ngánjáneta. Méinyotio ár emo euwete té nénamnde Ngánjánene ambum a mat yém Ngánján. 8 Emo yau njam euweta yau mat yém Ngánján, ménamén Ngánján siyém uwégh. 9 Ndenaye Ngánjánam yuyafotam yánjo uwégh téfeyot: Yémo yénmáfáretam yánjo mé yénaro Ambum yéné mband maratot ménát téfene so yém ghérsé yáne kénjúmé. 10 Yéné siyém efalofifi uwégh: yau yéné téfene uwégh Ngánjáneyot, yéné yém Ngánjánene uwégh téfeyot ménáyan yénmáfáretam yánjo Ambum ménát sái témorwén krufrát ghéngén sái tawitau téfene yaufiyam.
english: Beloved, let ’s love one another , for love is of God ; and everyone who loves has been born of God and knows God .
He who doesn’ t love doesn’ t know God , for God is love.
By this God ’s love was revealed in us , that God has sent his only born Son into the world that we might live through him .
In this is love, not that we loved God , but that he loved us , and sent his Son as the atoning sacrifice for our sins.

nama: Tikfafé fútaréf, njam Ngánjánam yénmuwetam yénd mindefifi wéi ndenéyameyo so náuwetam téfenjo kénjún. 12 Ámb árom yau yinjoi Ngánján, wénde njam yénd náuwetam téfenjo kénjún, Ngánján yémor téfefaf, a yáne uwégh káyátongé féwénféwénofnar téfefaf.
english: Beloved, if God loved us in this way , we also ought to love one another .
No one has seen God at any time . If we love one another , God remains in us , and his love has been perfected in us .

nama: Yénd mat yéném ndené yénd yénmor Ngánjánene kénjún a fá yémor téfene kénjún, ménamén yémo té yénmaramai téfe yánjo Mbérmbér. 14 Yéndfem té yinjoyém a so néngafrotam ndené Yárefam yénmáfáretam yánjo Ambum ménát sái témorwén Wanjarégh ár mband maratoe.
english: By this we know that we remain in him and he in us , because he has given us of his Spirit .
We have seen and testify that the Father has sent the Son as the Savior of the world .

nama: Efe njam néngoraya ndené Yesu siyém Ngánjánene Ambum yényau Ngánján yáne kénjún, a yéné ár yényau Ngánjánene kénjún. 16 A yénd mat yéném uwégh Ngánjánene árké yém téfeyot, a yéndfem efalo yiyátotam yéné uwégh.
english: Whoever confesses that Jesus is the Son of God , God remains in him , and he in God .
We know and have believed the love which God has for us . God is love, and he who remains in love remains in God , and God remains in him .

nama: Yéné fiyém ndenáye so yéndfem euwetam ámb ár méinyotio tikfe. Féyo, yénd so yéném férférofnar yéné efghon Ngánjánam njam so emote méinyotio ár. Yénd mat so yéném ndené Ngánjánam yau so tékratan ténékmangé yénd. Yénd mat yéném yéné ménamén yénd ténmor yéné mband maratan yéné ende Yesu ndernaye témorangérwén. 18 Ánde Ngánjánene uwégh yém, kété yau yém férfér, ménamén Ngánjánene féwénféwénofnar uwégham titérmbongé férfér. Féyo uwégh yau náyáto féwénféwénofnar yéné ároefaf efe yém férfér, ménamén férféram so tékmangé tékratan.
english: In this , love has been made perfect among us , that we may have boldness in the day of judgment , because as he is , even so we are in this world .
There is no fear in love; but perfect love casts out fear , because fear has punishment . He who fears is not made perfect in love.

nama: Yéndfem euwetam ménamén Ngánjánam fronde yénmuwetam yénd. 20 Njam ár norayat, "Yéndon yuwetan Ngánján" wénde méndméndat efandat yéfenjo fútaréf, fá em unyégh ár. Fá emofem yau euwetat yéfenjo fútaréf, efe yémofem té ewinjoyénd, yau so yuwetat Ngánján, efe yémofem yau té yinjoyénd. 21 A Ngánjánam yénmaramai téfe yéné nák: Fá emofem yuwetat Ngánján so wéi euwetat yéfenjo fútaréf.
english: We love him, because he first loved us .
If a man says , “ I love God ,” and hates his brother, he is a liar ; for he who doesn’ t love his brother whom he has seen , how can he love God whom he has not seen ?
This commandment we have from him , that he who loves God should also love his brother.

nama: Méinyotio árém emofem efalo yiyátotat ndené Yesu siyém Keriso yéném Ngánjánene ambumtértér, a méinyotio árém emofem yuwetat afé wéi yuwetat yáne ambum. 2 Yéné fiyém ndenáye yénd mat yéném yéndfem euwetam Ngánjánene ambumtértér, yéndfem njam yuwetam Ngánján a ewaitotam yáne nák. 3 Yéndfem euyafotam téfene uwégh yáyot Ngánjáneyot ménaye ewaitotam yáne nák, a yáne nák yau em táikér ménát waitoghét, 4 ménamén méinyotio Ngánjánene ambumam so taindangi mband marat, a yéné féyém téfene ndimbal mwighé árkéménayam yénmaramete téfe waingéghét. 5 Árké árom so taindangé mband marat? Mé yéné áromro emo Yesu efalo yiyátote ndené Ngánjánene Ambum.
english: Whoever believes that Jesus is the Christ has been born of God . Whoever loves the Father also loves the child who is born of him .
By this we know that we love the children of God , when we love God and keep his commandments .
For this is loving God , that we keep his commandments . His commandments are not grievous.
For whatever is born of God overcomes the world . This is the victory that has overcome the world : your faith .
Who is he who overcomes the world , but he who believes that Jesus is the Son of God ?

nama: Fá yéné féyém efe yénmormén nuafé a férék, Yesu Keriso. Fá yau yénmormén nuafaro, wénde nu a férék. A Ngánján Mbérmbér yénémamén nafrote ndené yéné siyém efalo, ménamén Ngánján Mbérmbér siyém efalo. 7 Féyo yéna em nambio ghékéf fayogh ár árkéménayam yénmaufrotat téfe Yesuenemén: 8 Ngánján Mbérmbér, nu a férék, yéné nambio ámbiro em.
english: This is he who came by water and blood, Jesus Christ ; not with the water only , but with the water and the blood. It is the Spirit who testifies , because the Spirit is the truth.
For there are three who testify :
the Spirit , the water , and the blood; and the three agree as one .

nama: Yéndfem efalo táyátongém árfene waitogh si, wénde némé Ngánján noraye, yéné yam yáinde árfene si, a yémo té yénmaufroi téfe efaloe yánjo Ambummén. 10 Árké ár emo efalo yiyátote Ngánjánene Ambum yáfaf yém efalo si árkéméné Ngánjánam yénmaufroi téfe. Wénde árké árom emo yau njam efalo yiyátota tiyátongé Ngánján unyégh ár. Ménamén yéné árom yau efalo yiyátote némé Ngánjánam yénmaufroi téfe yánjo Ambummén. 11 Ndené Ngánjánam yénmaufroi téfe: Ngánjánam té yénmaramai téfe tuot ghérsé, a yéné ghérsé siyém yáne Ambum kénjún. 12 Fá endefaf yém Ambum yáfaf yém ghérsé, fá endefaf yau yém Ngánjánene Ambum yau yáfaf yém ghérsé. Wifoghétro si
english: If we receive the witness of men , the witness of God is greater ; for this is God ’s testimony which he has testified concerning his Son .
He who believes in the Son of God has the testimony in himself . He who doesn’ t believe God has made him a liar , because he has not believed in the testimony that God has given concerning his Son .
The testimony is this : that God gave to us eternal life , and this life is in his Son .
He who has the Son has the life . He who doesn’ t have God ’ s Son doesn’ t have the life .

nama: Yéndon yéngfarotan yéné féfefaf emofem efalo yiyátotat Ngánjánene Ambum, ménát fém mat so em féfefaf yém tuot ghérsé. 14 Yénd féyotaro yéném ndené Ngánján so náyárete téfene Ngánjánafé orayégh njam yéndfem yéngwamnendam yénat árkéménáyan fá náuwete. 15 A njam yénd mat yéném ndené Ngánján náyárete njam yénd nomnendam, yénd mat kamndangém ndené téfene Ngánjánafé orayégh Ngánjánam ténmawangongé.
english: These things I have written to you who believe in the name of the Son of God , that you may know that you have eternal life , and that you may continue to believe in the name of the Son of God .
This is the boldness which we have toward him , that if we ask anything according to his will , he listens to us .
And if we know that he listens to us , whatever we ask, we know that we have the petitions which we have asked of him .

nama: Njam árké árom tinjongé fútar yaufiyaman, yaufiyam yéné árkéménayam yau yélimnde kétán krot, fém so norayét Ngánjánafé a Ngánjánam so taramangé ghérsé. Yénd norayan yéné árfenemén endefene yaufiyamam yau elimndat kétán tuot krot. Yéna yém yaufiyam árkéménayam yélimnde kétán krot. Yéndon yau norayan ndené fém so Ngánjánafé norayati yénémamén. 17 Méinyotio mbarkándofnar yam wafrogh siyém yaufiyam, wénde yéna fété yém yaufiyam árkéménayam yau so nélimnde kétán tuot krot.
english: If anyone sees his brother sinning a sin not leading to death , he shall ask , and God will give him life for those who sin not leading to death . There is sin leading to death . I don’ t say that he should make a request concerning this .
All unrighteousness is sin, and there is sin not leading to death .

nama: Yénd mat yéném ndené fá efe em Ngánjánene ambumtértér yau so ménjté em yaufiyaman. Ngánjánene Ambumom ewarawene fá, a yaufi árom yau so eyanje fá. 19 Yénd mat yéném ndené yénd yéném Ngánjánene, wénde Yaufi árom yélimnde méinyotio mband marat. 20 Yénd mat yéném ndené Ngánjánene Ambum té yénmormén a yénmaramai téfe matyam, ménát yénd so mat yéném fá yém efalo. A yénd yéném yáne kénjún efe yém efalo ménaye yáne Ambum Yesu Keriso. Fá siyém efalo Ngánján a tuot ghérsé. 21 Tikfafé ambumtértér, a nawarawenati kétamé mewangta.
english: We know that whoever is born of God doesn’ t sin, but he who was born of God keeps himself, and the evil one doesn’ t touch him .
We know that we are of God , and the whole world lies in the power of the evil one .

We know that the Son of God has come and has given us an understanding , that we know him who is true ; and we are in him who is true , in his Son Jesus Christ . This is the true God and eternal life .
Little children , keep yourselves from idols .

nama: Yéné férén siyém kétamé Jon, sénko ár.,
english: The elder , to the chosen lady and her children , whom I love in truth, and not I only , but also all those who know the truth,

nama: ménamén efalo, árké yém téfefaf a so yém yéndfé tuot.
english: for the truth’s sake , which remains in us , and it will be with us forever :

nama: Ngárám, ghérghérsisé a krufrát árké yéném kétamé Afé Ngánjáneta a kétamé Yesu Keriso yáne Ambum so yéném yéndfé efe yém efaloyan a uwéghan.
english: Grace , mercy , and peace will be with us , from God the Father and from the Lord Jesus Christ , the Son of the Father , in truth and love.

nama: Ta waramayénd ndimbal áuwégh ménáyan efandan ámb fene ambumtértér eyota efaloyan, ndenáye fété nák Afam ndernáye yénmaramete. 5 Amaf, sénonjo yéndon nomndetan fém ndené yénd so náuwetam téfenjo kénjún. Yéné yau totér nák em yéndo árké efarotan, wénde yéné árkéméné yéndfem té náyárayém kétamé rényégh. 6 A yéné uwégh fiyém: ndené yéndfem ewaitotam yéné nák. Ndené fémofem té náyárayénd kétamé rényégh, yéné nák siyém ndené fém emor uwéghan.
english: I rejoice greatly that I have found some of your children walking in truth, even as we have been commanded by the Father .
Now I beg you , dear lady , not as though I wrote to you a new commandment , but that which we had from the beginning, that we love one another .
This is love, that we should walk according to his commandments . This is the commandment , even as you heard from the beginning, that you should walk in it .

nama: Tárfár unyégh watamegh téfnár em mband maratan, sénonjo efe yau nénafrotat ndené Yesu Keriso yénmormén mband maratot ndené fété ár fifi. Yéné ár siyém unyégh ár a unyégh keriso. 8 Kor aem fémyo ndené fémofem yau so etarnati méinyotio yam fém árkéménát té kásáfotati, wénde ménát fémofem so tawanangi méinyoe fai. 9 Árké ár efe yau yémor Kerisoene watameghan, wénde yéngfayotat, yáfaf yau yém Ngánján. Wénde njam árké ár nawereta taikrataye kétán némé té ewatametam so ere kété Yárefé a Ambum. 10 Njam ár yau námyota yéné watameghfaf, yau yumyotati fá kétán féfene méngot o yésnetati. 11 Árké árom emo eumyote fá nufeinde yéfene yaufi wafroghfaf.
english: For many deceivers have gone out into the world , those who don’ t confess that Jesus Christ came in the flesh . This is the deceiver and the Antichrist.
Watch yourselves , that we don’t lose the things which we have accomplished , but that we receive a full reward .
Whoever transgresses and doesn’ t remain in the teaching of Christ doesn’ t have God . He who remains in the teaching has both the Father and the Son .
If anyone comes to you and doesn’ t bring this teaching , don’ t receive him into your house , and don’ t welcome him ,
for he who welcomes him participates in his evil deeds .

nama: Tane em tárfár faroghét féfeyot, wénde yénd méndefnar wém fene farogh fefayan, wénde yénd méghmégh wém ménát féfe fandaghét a sái norayam fémafé sáfero, ménát téfene áuwégh so yém wifoghkaf.
english: Having many things to write to you , I don’ t want to do so with paper and ink , but I hope to come to you and to speak face to face , that our joy may be made full .

nama: Fene kaféghmén mérésoene ambumtértér enwatembangi féfe yéfenjo ásnegh si.
english: The children of your chosen sister greet you . Amen.

nama: Yéné férén siyém kétamé Jon, sénko ár. Yéndo yéfarotan kétán tane tikfafé fútar Gaius, efe yéndon yuwetan efaloe.
english: The elder to Gaius the beloved, whom I love in truth.

nama: Tikfafé fútar, yénd Ngánjánafé noraiwam ndené fémon so yayamnete mer fifie awarawerégh a ndené méinyotio meran so néngém, ndené fété fene mbérmbére ghérsé kés yém meran. 3 Yénd minde áuwéghan kwémorwén njam ámb efalo yátogh ár nufaryénd a waufroyénd ta ménamén efalomén fene ghérsamén a ndernáye fém némor efaloyan. 4 Yénd ndimbal áuwégh wém njam yénd náyáretan tane ambumtértér emor efaloyan.
english: Beloved, I pray that you may prosper in all things and be healthy, even as your soul prospers .
For I rejoiced greatly when brothers came and testified about your truth, even as you walk in truth.
I have no greater joy than this : to hear about my children walking in truth.

nama: Tane tikfafé fútar, mer yém ndené fémo ewáutáne efalo yátogh ár, ndemamén fá em wan téfnár. 6 Fá té nafroyénd Yesuene mérénfaf yéna fene uwéghmén. Mé ewáutána njam yémofem niyafotat. Tawaram rokar yéfene álighét. Yénayam so Ngánján tiyátongé áuwéghét. 7 Ménamén fá nuwanoyénd Kerisoene ásáfoghét yau kamyotawét wáutárghét efalo yátoghofnar árta. 8 Yénémamén yéndfemyo so ewáutánam fá ménát yénd so násáfotam mérne efaloyot.
english: Beloved, you do a faithful work in whatever you accomplish for those who are brothers and strangers .
They have testified about your love before the assembly . You will do well to send them forward on their journey in a way worthy of God ,
because for the sake of the Name they went out , taking nothing from the Gentiles .
We therefore ought to receive such , that we may be fellow workers for the truth.

nama: Yéndon té téngfarotan kétán Yesuene mérénfaf, wénde Diotrefes ménde yém sái yém yéfene limánégh ár, a yémon yau so yénérse ámb utmanégh téfefaf. 10 Yénémamén njam yénd wéném, yéndon so enérsan méinyotio yam yémon tawafrotau: yaufi si fá korayau téfenemén a unyégh si téngwaitotau! Wénde yéné yau féyotaro témorwén yáyot, a yémon yau so eumyote ámb efalo yátogh ár njam fá eném, a ekmbota fá efe ménde em umyoghét a utorghét kétamé Yesuene mérénta.
english: I wrote to the assembly , but Diotrephes , who loves to be first among them , doesn’ t accept what we say .

Therefore , if I come , I will call attention to his deeds which he does , unjustly accusing us with wicked words . Not content with this , he doesn’ t receive the brothers himself, and those who would , he forbids and throws out of the assembly .

nama: Tikfafé fútar, yau yékwna némé yém yaufi, wénde yénaro yékwna némé yém mer. Árké ár emo ewafrote némé em mer yém Ngánjáneta, a árké ár emo ewafrote némé em yaufi yémo yau yinjoi Ngánján. 12 Wénde méinyotio ár norayat mere Demetriusenemén, wéi ndenáyo efalomén. Yénd yéndio wéi so néngorayam ndenéyameyo yáyot, a fém mat em yénd néngorayam efalo.
english: Beloved, don’ t imitate that which is evil , but that which is good . He who does good is of God . He who does evil hasn’ t seen God .
Demetrius has the testimony of all , and of the truth itself; yes , we also testify , and you know that our testimony is true .

nama: Tafaf em tárfár ménát afroghét féfeyot, wénde yénd méndefnar wém sái yéfarotan fene fefayan. 14 Yénd méghmégh wém ménát sái tawinjon fém wékeye, a yénd so norayam sáfero.
english: I had many things to write to you , but I am unwilling to write to you with ink and pen ;
but I hope to see you soon. Then we will speak face to face . Peace be to you . The friends greet you . Greet the friends by name.

nama: So yém Ngánjánene krufrát fefaf. Fene fútarfem yénan nénmawatembangi yéfene ásnegh si. Tawaramangi tane ásnegh si fénatayero téfene fútarfet.

Yéné férén siyém kétamé Juda tambén, Yesu Kerisoene faiofnar ásáfogh ár a yém Jemse yánngén. Yéndo yéfarotan yéfe méinyotio efe ekafai Ngánjánam, efe emor Ngánján Afane uwéghan a Yesu Kerisoene waraweréghan.
english: Jude , a servant of Jesus Christ , and brother of James , to those who are called , sanctified by God the Father , and kept for Jesus Christ :

nama: Féfefaf so yém mindefifi Ngánjánene ghérghérsisé, krufrát a uwégh. Unyégh watamegh téfnár
english: May mercy , peace , and love be multiplied to you .

nama: Tane tikfafé fútaréf, yénd minde ménde wém sái yéfarotan féfefaf ménamén wanjarégh árké yéndfem yéfalotam, yénd njam ménde wém faroghét féfeyot ménát wawéngsoghét sái násmétati ndimbal mwighat ambinotaro a méinyotio árét Ngánjánam árké yéramai. 4 Ámb ár té kwankwane nényawangi féfene mérnan. Tándái Ngánjánene mat yátogh árém té yéfarotaménd yéné árfenemén efe so moghan em kértafé. Fá em asénanégh ár Ngánjánafé a té tengotat téfene Ngánjánene ngárám ménát sái emor yaufiyam ghérsaye. Fá wéi ndenáyo nakenat ménát sái tumyongi Yesu Keriso, téfene fáro Ndimbal a Yuré.
english: Beloved, while I was very eager to write to you about our common salvation , I was constrained to write to you exhorting you to contend earnestly for the faith which was once for all delivered to the saints.

For there are certain men who crept in secretly, even those who were long ago written about for this condemnation : ungodly men , turning the grace of our God into indecency, and denying our only Master , God , and Lord , Jesus Christ .

nama: Yéndon mat engyátotan fém ámb yammén fém árké mat em: Nawafarotati ndené Yuram ewanjaryéng yánjo ár enéutoryéng kétándmé Ijifta, wénde soramé yémo ewalindai méinyotio fá emofem yau efalo tiyátotawét. 6 A ewafarotati njafar si résagh ár emofem yau tangsotawét yéfenjo wafté sifayé wénde yénéfrangoyénd yéfenjo méngo. Yuram té emnai njafar si résagh ár kwéfitayan, sein umbéghkaf em ambino ménát sái em moghan kété ndimbal efghon. 7 Wéi engwafarotati ndimbal tesen Sodom a Gomora a ámb téndo tesen yénamé, yéfene ár kimndawét ndené njafar si résagh árnit kufrotawét a tamorwén yaufi walan a fénataye ende walan: yémofem tékrát yinjoyénd tuot fésén, ndené fété safén matot méinyotio árét.
english: Now I desire to remind you , though you already know this , that the Lord , having saved a people out of the land of Egypt, afterward destroyed those who didn’ t believe .
Angels who didn’ t keep their first domain, but deserted their own dwelling place, he has kept in everlasting bonds under darkness for the judgment of the great day .

Even as Sodom and Gomorrah and the cities around them , having in the same way as these given themselves over to sexual immorality and gone after strange flesh , are shown as an example , suffering the punishment of eternal fire .

nama: Ndené yameyo, yéné árfene onjo árkéménayam eméinde yaufiyamot yéfene fifi. Yémofem yékarotat Ngánjánene muyé a ewasalitat ndimbal kwayaghé ár tukmén. 9 Wénde njam sénko njafar si résagh ár, Maikélfé néwiménd Sáiférafé emo so tanangai Mosesene kér fifi, yau korayau yaufi si ndené Sáiférefaf. Wénde fá norayai, "Yuram némusérmbote fém!" 10 Wénde yéné unyégh watamegh ár néngorayat yéné yammén fá yau mat em, a némé fá mat em fifie, ndenanit mwighafnar wérár. Yéné yam rem árkéménayam ewirone fá.
english: Yet in the same way , these also in their dreaming defile the flesh , despise authority , and slander celestial beings.
But Michael , the archangel, when contending with the devil and arguing about the body of Moses , dared not bring against him an abusive condemnation , but said , “ May the Lord rebuke you !”
But these speak evil of whatever things they don’ t know . They are destroyed in these things that they understand naturally , like the creatures without reason.

nama: Yéné so yém yaufififi yéfeyot! Yémofem té yaitoyénd Keinene end, a fá té naramangi fáyo ménát wafroghét yaufi némé Balamém tawafrotau mani téfnan. Fá té kásmetawét Ngánjánafé, ndené Kora skufrotau. Féyo fá so tawalindangé.
english: Woe to them ! For they went in the way of Cain , and ran riotously in the error of Balaam for hire , and perished in Korah ’s rebellion.

nama: Fá ndenanit em njúnnjúnafé mbor féfene efalo yátogh árfene nénefaf fémofem senetati. Yémofem senetat fémafé a yau em férfér, nawarawenat mé fáro. Fá em ndenanit nu kwéf árké mbormboram ewarende, wénde nuofnar. Fá em ndenanit wén mbweyofnar yunjfan, wén árké erufetat sérmbafé, kér em. 13 Yéfene wáiwáiafé yam nufanat ndenanit mbérorkam yénau nufrotat nékwafé arakaf sofan. Fá ndenanit em kénd árké té nimndayénd yéfenjo frengégh sifayata njafaran. Ngánjánam té yéfrendam méinyo kwéfité, kwéfkwéf sifayé yéfeyot. Ngánjánam kété so ewamnde tuot.
english: These are hidden rocky reefs in your love feasts when they feast with you , shepherds who without fear feed themselves ; clouds without water, carried along by winds; autumn trees without fruit, twice dead, plucked up by the roots ;
wild waves of the sea , foaming out their own shame; wandering stars, for whom the blackness of darkness has been reserved forever .

nama: Enok témorwén 7mén ár saté Edéme soramé, a fá té korayau yéfenemén yéné árfenemén njam norayai, "Kéretangi! Yuré yéném tausen a tausen njafarmén njúnnjúnofnar si résagh árfé 15 ménát sái emota méinyotio ár. Yémo so tékrátan tákmangé méinyotio yéné ngánjánofnar ár ménamén méinyotio yaufiyam yémofem árké tawafrotawét. Yuram efalo so tékrátan tákmangé yéné ngánjánofnar yaufi ár ménamén méinyotio yaufi si árké korayawét yáfaf.
english: About these also Enoch , the seventh from Adam, prophesied , saying , “ Behold , the Lord came with ten thousands of his holy ones,

to execute judgment on all , and to convict all the ungodly of all their works of ungodliness which they have done in an ungodly way , and of all the hard things which ungodly sinners have spoken against him .”

nama: Yéné ár nawatarnat a efayotat ámb ár; engwafrotat yaufiyam fá ándan ménde em wafroghét; fá nawauyotat yéfenjoménro a yémofem yuwan eyátotat ámb ár ménát sái ewarsat némat fá ménde em. Matot a wafroghét
english: These are murmurers and complainers , walking after their lusts — and their mouth speaks proud things —showing respect of persons to gain advantage .

nama: Tane tikfafé fútaréf, nawafarotati mat si féfe té tawarametawét yémofem téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene muyafé árém. 18 Yémofem ewaufroyénd féfe ndené, "Kerker efghon, kété so yém árké árém so si wawafrotat féfe a so ewaitotat yéfenjo yaufiyam ménde." 19 Yéné árém té eméindat fém afaloghét, efe elimndat yéfenjo fifi méndeyam, endefefaf yau yém Ngánján Mbérmbér.
english: But you , beloved, remember the words which have been spoken before by the apostles of our Lord Jesus Christ .
They said to you , “ In the last time there will be mockers , walking after their own ungodly lusts .”
These are those who cause divisions and are sensual , not having the Spirit .

nama: Tikfafé fútaréf, mé a narmbotati fémyo féfene mindefifi njúnnjúnofnar ndimbal mwighayan, ndené fété Ngánján Mbérmbéram sái ewáutána oraighét Ngánjánafé, 21 a kawerangi fémyo kété Ngánjánene uwéghan, njamandio fém nawanjetati téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene ghérghérsisat sái tawaramangé féfe tuot ghérsé.
english: But you , beloved, keep building up yourselves on your most holy faith , praying in the Holy Spirit .
Keep yourselves in God ’ s love, looking for the mercy of our Lord Jesus Christ to eternal life .

nama: Engéuyafotati ghérghérsisé ámb árét fá efe natambnat; 23 enéfnanati ámb ár kétamé fésta, a ewanjanati fá; euyafotati ghérghérsisé férférafé ámb árét, engkarotati yéfene sáláme árké em njúnnjúnafé yaufiyammén. Yuwetam Ngánján
english: On some have compassion, making a distinction ,
and some save , snatching them out of the fire with fear , hating even the clothing stained by the flesh .

nama: Kétán yáfaf emo so ewarawene kétamé uyéghta a ménát sái tauyafongé fém yáne ndimbal kwayaghé tambén téfnofnar wénde ménáyafé ndimbal áuwéghafé. 25 Fá fiyém mé yénaro Ngánján, fá emo yénd ténmanjarngé, yáyot so yém ndimbal kwayaghé, ndimbal, wafté, a muyé Yesu Keriso téfene Yuré kénjúmé, kétándmayo méinyotio efogh árké kénawaindat, sénonjo, a tuot! Efalo.
english: Now to him who is able to keep them from stumbling, and to present you faultless before the presence of his glory in great joy,
to God our Savior , who alone is wise, be glory and majesty , dominion and power , both now and forever . Amen.

nama: Yéné siyém uyafogh yam Yesu Kerisoeta, árkéméné Ngánjánam yaramai yá tauyafotau yánjo ásáfogh téfnárafet némé yam tekofnar so nufrote. Kerisom yéngwáfáretam yánjo njafar si résagh ár sái mat tiyátotau yánjo ásáfogh téfnár Jon, 2 a Jon kafrotau méinyotio némé yémo téfandau ménamén Ngánjánene simén a Yesu Kerisoene simén. 3 Frengéghkaf yém emo sái yafta yéné ufrogh yammén si, a frengéghkaf em efe náyáretat a tanangi tikfe némé té yéfarotaménd kété, ménamén efogh siyém kaka. Jonene ásneghafé si kétán 7 Yesuene mérén kénjút
english: This is the Revelation of Jesus Christ , which God gave him to show to his servants the things which must happen soon , which he sent and made known by his angel to his servant , John ,
who testified to God ’s word and of the testimony of Jesus Christ , about everything that he saw .
Blessed is he who reads and those who hear the words of the prophecy , and keep the things that are written in it , for the time is near .

nama: Yéné férén siyém Jone tambén tafarotau kétán 7 Yesuene mérén kénjút kété Esia marat yuwon.
english: John , to the seven assemblies that are in Asia : Grace to you and peace from God , who is and who was and who is to come ; and from the seven Spirits who are before his throne ;

nama: a kétamé Yesu Kerisoe tambén, efe yém ndimbal mwighé kér ro fandagh ár yéné yammén, fronde efe nanoi kérta a efe yém mband maratmén warsagh árfene limánégh ár.
english: and from Jesus Christ , the faithful witness , the firstborn of the dead , and the ruler of the kings of the earth . To him who loves us , and washed us from our sins by his blood—

nama: a emo yényátoi yénd sái yéném Ngánján limánéghan a ghéngén wárogh ár ménát sái yutémndam Ngánján Yárefé. Yáfaf so yém ndimbal kwayaghé a wafté tuot! Efalo.
english: and he made us to be a Kingdom, priests to his God and Father — to him be the glory and the dominion forever and ever . Amen.

nama: "Kéretangi, fá nénangote njafar kwamkwamafé! Méinyotio árém so yéfandat, emofem fimbe yékunyayénd, a méinyotio ár mband maratan so tafarngé yeyam yáne téfnan. So fété nufrote! Efalo.
english: Behold , he is coming with the clouds , and every eye will see him , including those who pierced him . All the tribes of the earth will mourn over him . Even so , Amen.

nama: Yuré Ngánján noraye, "Yénd wém fronde a soramé, efe yém, efe témorwén, a efe so yéném, Méinyotio tukén waftafé." Ndenanit témorwén Ároene Ambum
english: “ I am the Alpha and the Omega , ” says the Lord God , “ who is and who was and who is to come , the Almighty .”

nama: Yénd wém Jon, féfene mérénmén. Ménamén yénd yéném Yesuene limánégh kénjún, yéndfem yérsam kérté a tékrat. Féyo, yénd so yéném muyafé a métar, ndené fété Yesum so yénmáutáne. Yénd kété kwémorwén Fatmos féran, ménamén té táitotawén Ngánján a Yesuenemén si. 10 Yurane efghon yénd kwémorwén Ngánján Mbérmbéran a káyáretawén ta sémta ndimbal si, ndenanit sufér ke, 11 ndené norayai, "Efarota bukan némé fémon efande, a tangwatemb 7 Yesuene mérénfaf: kétán Efesos, Sémirna, Fegamo, Taiatira, Sadis, Filadelfia a kétán Laodikia."
english: I John , your brother and partner with you in the oppression, Kingdom, and perseverance in Christ Jesus , was on the isle that is called Patmos because of God ’s Word and the testimony of Jesus Christ.
I was in the Spirit on the Lord ’s day , and I heard behind me a loud voice , like a trumpet
saying , “ What you see, write in a book and send to the seven assemblies : to Ephesus , Smyrna , Pergamum , Thyatira , Sardis , Philadelphia , and to Laodicea .”

nama: Yénd néngawengoyén ménát so tinjongayén efe norayau tafaf. Njam sémta nawengoyén yéndo ewinjoyén 7 wakayoghkaf gol lambefé, 13 a yéné lambefé wakayogh néndkéf fifiyan yéndo yinjoyén ndenanit Ároene Ambum, tawongérwén tombé sáláme kétánotio kafkaf a golmén beles téfarngérwén wéfamé. 14 Yáne sénko séf tamorwén kwayagharo ndenanit kafe séfnit, o ás fifinit, a yáne ghékéf kánetawét fés kankanit. 15 Yáne kafkaf kwayagharo tamorwén ndenanit wainaghkaf a frengéghkaf tot téfén a yáne kém ndenanit témorwén tárfár nu ráráke yénau yém. 16 Yáne tambén ngángaye taweretau 7 kénd, a yáne mbírmbírta néngtoryéng witmafé sénté náifé, a yáne sáf kálálau ndenanit sotafé efogh yénau nanete. 17 Yéndo njam yinjoyén, yénd nuyáyén yáne kafkafot kér árnit. Yémon efayoi yánjo tambén ngángé a korayangé, "Yau férfér ném! Yénd wém fronde a soramé. 18 Yénd wém efe ghérsé wém! Efe kér yémormén a sénonjo yénd ghérsé wém tuot! Tafaf em ki kérmén a fésmén. 19 Yénémamén efarota fémon némé té efande, sénonjo némé yém a némé so néngufrotat soramé. 20 7 kénd ténoghmén yam yéné fémon kés tafande tane tambén ngángata, a wéi 7 wakayoghkaf gol lambefé yéné em: 7 kénd kés em njafar si résagh ár yéné fem 7 Yesuene mérnot, a 7 lambefé wakayoghmén kés em 7 Yesuene mérén yéné fem.
english: I turned to see the voice that spoke with me . Having turned , I saw seven golden lamp stands.
And among the lamp stands was one like a son of man , clothed with a robe reaching down to his feet , and with a golden sash around his chest .
His head and his hair were white as white wool , like snow . His eyes were like a flame of fire .
His feet were like burnished brass , as if it had been refined in a furnace . His voice was like the voice of many waters .
He had seven stars in his right hand . Out of his mouth proceeded a sharp two-edged sword . His face was like the sun shining at its brightest.
When I saw him , I fell at his feet like a dead man . He laid his right hand on me , saying , “Don’ t be afraid . I am the first and the last ,
and the Living one . I was dead , and behold , I am alive forever and ever . Amen. I have the keys of Death and of Hades.
Write therefore the things which you have seen , and the things which are , and the things which will happen hereafter .

The mystery of the seven stars which you saw in my right hand , and the seven golden lamp stands is this : The seven stars are the angels of the seven assemblies . The seven lamp stands are seven assemblies .

nama: Yéfarota yéné férén kétán njafar si résagh ároefaf Efesos Yesuene mérén kénjún:
english: “ To the angel of the assembly in Ephesus write : “ He who holds the seven stars in his right hand , he who walks among the seven golden lamp stands says these things :

nama: Yénd mat wém méinyotio yammén fémofem némé ewafrotati. Yéndon té téfandan féfene minde ásáfogh a féfene métar a awamarogh. Yénd mat wém fém yau nafghetati yaufiyam árfé. Fémofem té tawasufetati efe kamndetat kar Yesuene muyafé ár wénde yau em, a fémofem té mat eyátongi fá sem unyégh ár. 3 Fém té métare tam tékrátamé tayot ékmboghofnar. 4 Wénde tane áwátaranégh yéné yém féfefaf: fémofem yau wuwetati yénd ndené fronde kés tamorwén. 5 Kemnangi nderé nayu fém té nuyangi fronde féfenjo uwéghta! Kénawengongi tafaf wéikor a násáfotati ndené fronde ndernáye kásáfotawét. Yau njam fémofem yafrotati, yénd so wéném tawitérmbon lambefé wakayoghmén yéfenjo sifayata méinyotio Yesuene mérnamé. 6 Wénde yéné yém mer féfenemén: fémofem méndefnar yéfandati Nikolait mérnafene mámáfi yam wafrogh, yéndon wéi ndenáyo.
english: “ I know your works , and your toil and perseverance , and that you can ’ t tolerate evil men , and have tested those who call themselves apostles, and they are not , and found them false .
You have perseverance and have endured for my name ’ s sake , and have not grown weary .
But I have this against you , that you left your first love.
Remember therefore from where you have fallen , and repent and do the first works ; or else I am coming to you swiftly, and will move your lamp stand out of its place , unless you repent .
But this you have , that you hate the works of the Nicolaitans , which I also hate .

nama: Árké ár ménde em áyárghét, táf náyáretat Ngánján Mbérmbéroefaf, a yérsat ndernáye Ngánján Mbérmbér noraye Yesuene mérnafefaf. Yéné ár efe njam nawaindat so yémofem enetat kétamé ghérsé akegh wénta árké yém Ngánjánene sariafé limánéghan. Kétán Yesuene mérén Sémirna kénjún
english: He who has an ear , let him hear what the Spirit says to the assemblies . To him who overcomes I will give to eat from the tree of life , which is in the Paradise of my God .

nama: Yéfarota yéné férén kétán njafar si résagh ároefaf Sémirna Yesuene mérén kénjún:
english: “ To the angel of the assembly in Smyrna write : “ The first and the last , who was dead , and has come to life says these things :

nama: Yénd mat wém féfene tékrátmén a áronjaghmén, wénde fém em wemár! Yénd mat wém fém emofem norayat yaufi si féfefaf. Fá norayat fá sem Ju ár em, wénde fá em Sáiféroene mérén. 10 Yau férfér em ménamén némé tékrát fémofem so yéngfandati. Sáifram ámb fém so ewite kwéfkwéf méngot ménát sái eufote. Fém so tékratan em 10 efogh. Ewakai ndimbal mwighaye njam krotro em, a yéndon so tawaraman tuot ghérsé ákiki.
english: “ I know your works, oppression, and your poverty ( but you are rich ), and the blasphemy of those who say they are Jews , and they are not , but are a synagogue of Satan .

Don’ t be afraid of the things which you are about to suffer . Behold , the devil is about to throw some of you into prison , that you may be tested ; and you will have oppression for ten days . Be faithful to death , and I will give you the crown of life .

nama: Árké ár efe njam ménde em áyárghét, so náyáretat némé Ngánján Mbérmbér noraye Yesuene mérénfaf. Efe njam em nawaindat yau so yasérmbote yénamayo kéram. Kétán Yesuene mérén Fegamam kénjún
english: He who has an ear , let him hear what the Spirit says to the assemblies . He who overcomes won’ t be harmed by the second death .

nama: Yéfarota yéné férén kétán njafar si résagh ároefaf Fégamam Yesuene mérén kénjún:
english: “ To the angel of the assembly in Pergamum write : “ He who has the sharp two-edged sword says these things :

nama: Yénd mat wém ndené fém emor yéné ndimbal tesenan ánde Sáiféroene limánégh ámnjogh sifayé yém. Wénde fém mé táikér tawakai tafaf a fém yau nékmbotati ta efalo yátoghan táf njam Antifas, tane ndimbal mwighé kér ro fandagh ár, krot yékmayénd féfene ndimbal tesen ánde Sáifér yémor.
english: “ I know your works and where you dwell , where Satan ’s throne is . You hold firmly to my name , and didn’ t deny my faith in the days of Antipas my witness , my faithful one , who was killed among you , where Satan dwells .

nama: Wénde tane yéna em ámb áwátaranégh féfefaf: féfefaf yéna em ár efe kaweretawét yéné watameghfaf Balam, yémo yatametam Balak ménát sái tamndetau Israil ár mewang njamke nénet a máméghéraye wal yamot. 15 Ndené yameyo, féfefaf em ámb Nikolait mérénmén ár féfene kénjún emofem yéné watameghyo yaitotat. 16 Eurotati yaufiyam! Yau njam, yénd so wéném tekofnar féfefaf a so nasmetam yémafé tane witmafé sénté náifé tane mbírmbírta.
english: But I have a few things against you , because you have there some who hold the teaching of Balaam, who taught Balak to throw a stumbling block before the children of Israel , to eat things sacrificed to idols , and to commit sexual immorality .
So also you likewise have some who hold to the teaching of the Nicolaitans .
Repent therefore , or else I am coming to you quickly and I will make war against them with the sword of my mouth .

nama: Árké ár efe ménde em áyárghét, so náyáretat ndernáye Ngánján Mbérmbér noraye Yesuene mérénfaf. Méinyotio efe njam nawaindat so enetat féskaf flawé árké té engétnoi njafaran. A yéndon so ewarametan fénatayero kwayaghé wím a yéné wíman so ekai totér yétkwén árkéméné ámb ár yau mat so yém mé fáro emo tanangé. Kétán Yesuene mérén Taiatira kénjún
english: He who has an ear , let him hear what the Spirit says to the assemblies . To him who overcomes , to him I will give of the hidden manna , and I will give him a white stone , and on the stone a new name written which no one knows but he who receives it .

nama: Yéfarota yéné férén kétán njafar si résagh ároefaf Taiatira Yesuene mérén kénjún:
english: “ To the angel of the assembly in Thyatira write : “ The Son of God , who has his eyes like a flame of fire , and his feet are like burnished brass , says these things :

nama: Yénd mat wém féfene wafroghyam-féfene uwégh, féfene ndimbal mwighé, féfene ásáfogh, a féfene awamarogh. A sénonjo féfene mer wafroghyam fémofem ewafrotati engwaindat méinyotio wafroghyam fémofem kés tawafrotawét fronde. 20 Wénde tane yém ámb áwátaranégh féfefaf: fémofem yumyotati yéné amaf Jejebel, efe fáyo namndete Ngánjánene si résagh ár ménát sái elimnda tane ásáfogh téfnár nayu. Amafom emndete fá ménát sái ewáwefnotat mewangat, enetat mewangafene wateghmén njamke a ewafrotat máméghéraye wal yam. 21 Yéndon té yaramayén yá efoghféneféne yáne yaufiyam ékmboghét. Wénde fá yau so kékmbongé yánjo yaufi wal yam wafroghta. 22 Yénémaménnde, yéndon yéné amaf so yitan enjne sifayafaf, a yémon so tékrát yéfande ndimbal kéráye yémafayo emofé yaufi wal tafrotat yémafé, ndemamén fá so kékmbongi yéfenjo yaufiyam wafroghta. 23 Yéndon so tákman yáne waitogh ár krotio. Féyo méinyotio Yesuene mérén mat so em ndené yénd yéné fwém emo ewafande tikéf a mwighé, a yéndon so fai ewawangotan ámbiroámbiro féfeyot féfene wafroghyam féyotaroyan.
english: “ I know your works , your love, faith , service , patient endurance , and that your last works are more than the first .

But I have this against you , that you tolerate your woman Jezebel , who calls herself a prophetess . She teaches and seduces my servants to commit sexual immorality and to eat things sacrificed to idols .
I gave her time to repent , but she refuses to repent of her sexual immorality .
Behold , I will throw her and those who commit adultery with her into a bed of great oppression, unless they repent of her works .
I will kill her children with Death , and all the assemblies will know that I am he who searches the minds and hearts . I will give to each one of you according to your deeds .

nama: Wénde yénd norayan yéné féfefaf ámb ár Taiatira kénjún. Fémofem yau táitotati unyégh watamegh, ndené fété fá ewanmotat 'kénjkame atnogh yamafé.' Féyo, yéndo yau so tamndan ménát sái taitongi ámb táikér nák. 25 Wénde kétánotio yénd nénangotan, fém so naweretati taikrataye némé em féfene. 26 Yéfeyot efe njam nawaindat, efe so ménjté engém tane ménde wafroghan kétánotio yatoghfaf, yéndon so tawaraman wafté ndimbal yu limánéghét. 27 Yémofem so elimndat ndimbal yu tot téfén wétue a so tatiarngé karéfkaréf ndenanit ngéndmén sin. 28 Yéfefaf ndenéyameyo muyé so em yéndon árké yanayén tane Afata, a yéndo wéi so tawaraman akw kénd. 29 Árké ár efe ménde yém áyárghét, fái káyáretangi ndernáye Ngánján Mbérmbér noraye Yesuene mérénfaf.
english: But to you I say , to the rest who are in Thyatira — as many as don’ t have this teaching , who don’ t know what some call ‘ the deep things of Satan ’— to you I say , I am not putting any other burden on you .
Nevertheless , hold that which you have firmly until I come .
He who overcomes , and he who keeps my works to the end , to him I will give authority over the nations .
He will rule them with a rod of iron , shattering them like clay pots, as I also have received of my Father ;
and I will give him the morning star.
He who has an ear , let him hear what the Spirit says to the assemblies .

nama: Yéfarota yéné férén kétán njafar si résagh ároefaf Sadis Yesuene mérén kénjún:
english: “ And to the angel of the assembly in Sardis write : “ He who has the seven Spirits of God and the seven stars says these things : “ I know your works , that you have a reputation of being alive , but you are dead .

nama: Kanongi! Féfene efalo yátogh yau yém muyafé a krotro yém. Féyo yénémamén fémofem so féfenjo ndimbal mwighé muyafé táyátongi. Ménamén yéndo ewawinjon féfene wafroghyam yau kor em féwénféwénofnar tane Ngánjánefaf. 3 Nawafarotati kétán némé té yanayénd a náyárayénd; terangi taikrataye a kawengongi féfene yaufiyamta. Fém yau njam kanongi, yénd so wéném féfefaf ndenanit oro téfnár, a fém yau mat so em árké efghon yénd so wéném féfefaf.
english: Wake up and strengthen the things that remain , which you were about to throw away, for I have found no works of yours perfected before my God .
Remember therefore how you have received and heard . Keep it and repent . If therefore you won’t watch , I will come as a thief , and you won’t know what hour I will come upon you .

nama: Wénde féfefaf em nambioro ár Sadisén emofem yau mbandafé tayátongi yéfenjo sáláme. Yémafé yénd so yényota kwayaghé sálámefé, ménamén fá sem féyotaro. 5 Fá efe njam nawaindat so nawotat kwayaghé sáláme. Yéndon yau so yéfene yétkwén tawalindangén ghérsé buk tambén. Wénde yéndo so mat táyáton tane Afanerére a yáne njafar si résagh árrére ndené fá sem tane em. 6 Fá efe yém ténganafé, so fété náyárete némé Ngánján Mbérmbér noraye Yesuene mérénfaf. Kétán Yesuene mérén kété Filadelfia kénjún
english: Nevertheless you have a few names in Sardis that didn’ t defile their garments . They will walk with me in white , for they are worthy.
He who overcomes will be arrayed in white garments , and I will in no way blot his name out of the book of life , and I will confess his name before my Father , and before his angels.
He who has an ear , let him hear what the Spirit says to the assemblies .

nama: Yéfarota yéné férén kétán njafar si résagh ároefaf Filadelfia Yesuene mérén kénjút:
english: “ To the angel of the assembly in Philadelphia write : “ He who is holy, he who is true , he who has the key of David , he who opens and no one can shut , and who shuts and no one opens, says these things :

nama: Yénd mat wém méinyotio féfene wafroghyam, a yéndo té yésaurén sésafne féfeyot árké árom yau so témnangé. Yénd mat wém féfene em némbnar muyé, wénde fémofem káyáretati tane si a yau tekenati tane yétkwén. 9 Káyárangi! Efe em Sáiférene mérén, yéné unyégh ár efe norayat fá kar Ju ár em wénde yau, yéndo so eméindan fá sái eném nénáwefnotat féfene kafkafot. Fá méinyotio mat so káyátongi ndené yéndo fém euwetamén. 10 Ménamén fémofem tane wafaregh té teretati awamaroghafé, yéndon wéi so ewarawenan fém kétamé ufoghyam efghon árkéméné so nufrote méinyotio mband maratan ménát sái eufotat méinyotio ár mband maratan. 11 Yénd nénangotan wékeye. Naweretati yéna féfefaf némé em, ménát ámb árom yau so tanangé féfene ákiki. 12 Fá efe njam nawaindat so kénamndangi sérasér Ngánjánene wáwefnogh méngon a fá kété so emor tuot a yéndon so efarotan yéfefaf tane Ngánján yétkwén a tane Ngánjánene ndimbal tesen yétkwén, totér Jerusalem, árkéméné nénewone njafarta tane Ngánjáneta. Yéndon wéi so efarotan yéfefaf tane totér yétkwén. 13 Fá efe yém ténganafé, so fété náyárete némé Ngánján Mbérmbér noraye Yesuene mérénfaf. Kétán Yesuene mérén Laodikia kénjún
english: “ I know your works ( behold , I have set before you an open door , which no one can shut ), that you have a little power , and kept my word , and didn’ t deny my name .

Behold , I make some of the synagogue of Satan , of those who say they are Jews , and they are not , but lie — behold , I will make them to come and worship before your feet , and to know that I have loved you .
Because you kept my command to endure, I also will keep you from the hour of testing which is to come on the whole world , to test those who dwell on the earth .
I am coming quickly ! Hold firmly that which you have , so that no one takes your crown .

He who overcomes , I will make him a pillar in the temple of my God , and he will go out from there no more . I will write on him the name of my God and the name of the city of my God , the new Jerusalem , which comes down out of heaven from my God , and my own new name .
He who has an ear , let him hear what the Spirit says to the assemblies .

nama: Yéfarota yéné férén kétán njafar si résagh ároefaf Laodikia Yesuene mérén kénjún:
english: “ To the angel of the assembly in Laodicea write : “ The Amen, the Faithful and True Witness , the Beginning + 3:14 or, Source, or Head of God ’s creation , says these things :

nama: Yénd mat wém féfene wafroghyam, ndené fém yau em krufrát o yau em wafté. Yénd ménde wém fém so em krufrát o wafté! 16 Wénde fém em méndefnar-yau wafté o krufrát, yéndon so mbérme ewitan tane mbírmbírta! 17 Fém norayati, 'Yénd wém wemár; tane em méinyotio rokar yénd némat so ménde wém. Wénde fém yau mat náyátongi ndené fém em áuwéghofnar, wáiwáiafé, oronjagh, kwéfkwéf a firo. 18 Yéndon ewawéngsotan fémofem sái tanangi gol ta tambén gol árkéméné yém fése frengéghmén, táf fém so em wemár. A wéi ndenáyo tanangi kwayaghé sáláme ménát yau so wáiwái yam néramete fenjo firomén. A tanangi fagharégh wékwér féfenjo ghékfot ménát fém so táf kéretangi. 19 Yéndon tausérmbotangén a téfél ewarametan méinyotio árét efe yéndo euwetan. Mwighé tanangi a kawengongi féfene yaufiyamta. 20 Káyárangi! Yénd yéna wakai sésafnefaf a náutanan. Fém njam káyáre tane kém a tésawér sésafne, yénd so kényawan, a yéndfem so njamke enetam.
english: “ I know your works , that you are neither cold nor hot . I wish you were cold or hot .
So , because you are lukewarm , and neither hot nor cold , I will vomit you out of my mouth .
Because you say , ‘ I am rich , and have gotten riches , and have need of nothing ,’ and don’ t know that you are the wretched one , miserable , poor , blind , and naked ;

I counsel you to buy from me gold refined by fire , that you may become rich ; and white garments , that you may clothe yourself , and that the shame of your nakedness may not be revealed ; and eye salve to anoint your eyes , that you may see.
As many as I love , I reprove and chasten . Be zealous therefore , and repent .
Behold , I stand at the door and knock . If anyone hears my voice and opens the door , then I will come in to him and will dine with him , and he with me .

nama: Yéndon so eumyotan méinyotio ár efe njam nawindat ménát sái yénmor yéndfé tane kitarayan, ndené fété yénd wémormén waingégh téfnár a namnjeyayém tane Afafé yáne limánégh ámnjogh sifayan. 22 Fá efe yém ténganafé, so fété náyárete némé Ngánján Mbérmbér noraye Yesuene mérénfaf.
english: He who overcomes , I will give to him to sit down with me on my throne , as I also overcame and sat down with my Father on his throne .
He who has an ear , let him hear what the Spirit says to the assemblies .”

nama: Yéné soramé yénd néngretayén, a kété témorwén sésafne sauréghkaf njafaran. A kém yéndon fronde náyárayén kénorayau tafaf ndenanit sufér kenit norayai, "Kénarmbo yénan, a yéndon so némauyafotan némé yam so nufrotat yéné soramé." 2 Mé tekofnaye yénd kwémorwén Ngánján Mbérmbéran, a témorwén ta rére limánégh ámnjogh sifayé njafaran ámb ár kété témorangérwén. 3 Efe témorangérwén limánégh ámnjogh sifayan kálálau ndenanit wén arau ngarot wím a férék ngarot wímnit, a kété témorwén sikwálkwál árké natremngoi kwayaghayam yarendai yáne limánégh ámnjogh sifayé. 4 24 ámb limánégh ámnjogh sifayam yarendayénd fá, a 24 sénko ár tamorangérwén yénamé. Fá méinyotio kwayaghé sáláme umaneghkaf tamorwén, a golmén ákiki tawawongérwén yéfene sénkoyamé. 5 Kétamé limánégh ámnjogh sifayata toyé karametawét a árurke kásmetawét. Utmanégh kitaré frondeta tamorwén 7 tosin, árké em 7 mbérmbér Ngánjánene. 6 Yéné limánégh ámnjogh sifayé frondeta témorwén ndenanit arakaf glas nunit kálálau. Néndkéfan, limánégh ámnjogh sifayé warengéghkaf tamorwén 4 akegh ghérsafé rokar{a{ ...f* {a{4.6 akegh ghérsafé rokar living creature. need to be assistance from consultant
english: After these things I looked and saw a door opened in heaven ; and the first voice that I heard, like a trumpet speaking with me , was one saying , “ Come up here , and I will show you the things which must happen after this .”
Immediately I was in the Spirit . Behold , there was a throne set in heaven , and one sitting on the throne
that looked like a jasper stone and a sardius . There was a rainbow around the throne , like an emerald to look at .
