Around the throne were twenty-four thrones . On the thrones were twenty-four elders sitting , dressed in white garments , with crowns of gold on their heads .
Out of the throne proceed lightnings, sounds , and thunders . There were seven lamps of fire burning before his throne , which are the seven Spirits of God .
Before the throne was something like a sea of glass , similar to crystal . In the middle of the throne , and around the throne were four living creatures full of eyes before and behind .

nama: Fronde akegh ghérsafé rokar kéretau ndimbal munjan fusnit, yénamayomén kéretau ndenanit kaunit, a nambiomén témorwén ár sáfafé; a 4mén témorwén ndenanit anefégh ndikaké. 8 Yéné 4 akegh ghérsafé rokar tamorwén 6 njambafé, a yéfene ghékéf turawarwén njambamé kénjúta a faruta. Efogh a sémbár fá yau kékmbongi oraighan: "Njúnnjúnofnar, njúnnjúnofnar, njúnnjúnofnar siyém Yuré Ngánján Méinyotio waftafé, fá efe témorwén, efe yém, a efe so yéném."
english: The first creature was like a lion , the second creature like a calf , the third creature had a face like a man , and the fourth was like a flying eagle.

The four living creatures , each one of them having six wings , are full of eyes around and within . They have no rest day and night , saying , “Holy, holy, holy is the Lord God , the Almighty , who was and who is and who is to come !”

nama: Njam yéné akegh ghérsafé rokaram yuyotat a utémndat a kánjo yarametat yáyot efe yémor limánégh ámnjogh sifayan a efe nakete tuot, 10 yéné 24 sénko ár táf budme kiangi a yáwefnotat yá efe nakete tuot a yémofem táf tákmangi yéfenjo ákiki limánégh ámnjogh sifayé frondeta a norayat,
english: When the living creatures give glory , honor , and thanks to him who sits on the throne , to him who lives forever and ever ,
the twenty-four elders fall down before him who sits on the throne and worship him who lives forever and ever , and throw their crowns before the throne , saying ,

nama: "O Yuré téfene Ngánján, fém ném féyotaro sái yérsa ndimbal kwayaghé o utmanégh a wafté, ménamén fémo ewafrotam méinyotio rokar, a fene méndeyan naketat a kufrotawét."
english: “Worthy are you , our Lord and God , the Holy One , to receive the glory , the honor , and the power , for you created all things , and because of your desire they existed and were created !”

nama: Féyo yéndo yinjoyén buk yáne tambén ngángata efe témorangérwén limánégh ámnjogh sifayan; férén takayongérwén kénjúta a faruta yéné bukan, a tamorwén 7 manéghkaf. 2 A yéndon yinjoyén muyé kér ro njafar si résagh ár, efe nutnai minde keye, "Efe so féyotaro yém ferghét yéné manéghkaf buk sauréghét?" 3 Wénde efe ámb yau njafaran o mband maratan o mband marat mbanmbanan féyotaro yém sái tésawérngé yéné buk a yafta. 4 Féyo yénd ye nufngoyén ménamén ámb ár yau yinjoyén emo féyotaro so tésawérngai yéné buk a taftau. 5 Wénde ámb 24 sénko ár kénjúmén yémon wémndai yénd, "Yau nenda! Kéreta, Ndimbal munjan fus kétamé Judane mérénmén, Deifidene Ákimén, féyotaro yém, yémo so tasawérngé yéné buk a yáne 7 manéghkaf."
english: I saw , in the right hand of him who sat on the throne , a book written inside and outside, sealed shut with seven seals .
I saw a mighty angel proclaiming with a loud voice , “ Who is worthy to open the book , and to break its seals ?”
No one in heaven above , or on the earth , or under the earth , was able to open the book or to look in it .
Then I wept much , because no one was found worthy to open the book or to look in it .
One of the elders said to me , “Don’ t weep . Behold , the Lion who is of the tribe of Judah , the Root of David , has overcome : he who opens the book and its seven seals .”

nama: Féyo yéndo yinjoyén Sif tosé, kéretau ndenanit kar té yésmetaménd, takayongérwén limánégh ámnjogh sifayé néndkéfan, a yarendayénd 4 akegh ghérsafé rokaram a 24 sénko árém, a tamorwén 7 tartarafé a 7 ghékfafé, árké em Ngánjánene 7 mbérmbér árkéméné ewáfárete méinyotio mband maratan. 7 Fá nénaflai a yakawai buk yáne tambén ngángata efe témorangérwén limánégh ámnjogh sifayan. 8 Njam yémon yéngwanai buk, 4 akegh ghérsafé rokar a 24 sénko ár nuyáyénd Sif tosafaf frondeta. Yéfene tawamorwén gitanit wagh kembnemén a gol dis ghéngén wafoghkaf Ngánjánene árfene Ngánjánafé orayégh si. 9 A yémofem taufanawét totér wagh yéné siafé: Fém ném féyotaro sái tané yéné buk a sái tésawér yéné manéghkaf buk. Fém té nesmetaménd, a fene férkam té fai ewafrotam ár Ngánjáneyot kétamé méinyotio mérén a fénataye si a ár tárfár a méinyotio yu.
english: I saw in the middle of the throne and of the four living creatures , and in the middle of the elders , a Lamb standing , as though it had been slain , having seven horns and seven eyes , which are the seven Spirits of God , sent out into all the earth .
Then he came , and he took it out of the right hand of him who sat on the throne .

Now when he had taken the book , the four living creatures and the twenty-four elders fell down before the Lamb, each one having a harp , and golden bowls full of incense , which are the prayers of the saints.

They sang a new song , saying , “ You are worthy to take the book and to open its seals , for you were killed, and bought us for God with your blood out of every tribe , language , people , and nation ,

nama: A fémofem fá té táyátotati Ngánjánene limángégh a yáne ghéngén wárogh ár a fá so em limánégh ár mband maratan."
english: and made us kings and priests to our God ; and we will reign on the earth .”

nama: A yénd néngretayén wéikor, a yéndon eyáráyén tausen a milion njafar si résagh ár wagh taufanawét tarendawét limánégh ámnjogh sifayé yémafé ámb akegh ghérsafé rokar a sénko ár. 12 Ndimbal kéme yémofem wagh tufanawét waftafé: "Féyotaro yém Sif tosé efe té yésmetaménd, sái tanangé wafté a wemár a káfeté mwighé a muyé a utmanégh a ndimbal kwayaghé a frengégh."
english: I looked , and I heard something like a voice of many angels around the throne , the living creatures , and the elders . The number of them was ten thousands of ten thousands , and thousands of thousands ,
saying with a loud voice , “Worthy is the Lamb who has been killed to receive the power , wealth , wisdom , strength , honor , glory , and blessing !”

nama: A yéndon táyáretawén méinyotio ghérsafé rokar njafaran a mband maratan a mband marat mbanmbanan a arakafan, yémofem wéi wagh taufanawét: "Frengégh a utmanégh a ndimbal kwayaghé a wafté yáne yém efe yémor limánégh ámnjogh sifayan a yáyot wéi Sif tosé efe yém tuot!"
english: I heard every created thing which is in heaven , on the earth , under the earth , on the sea , and everything in them , saying , “ To him who sits on the throne and to the Lamb be the blessing , the honor , the glory , and the dominion , forever and ever ! Amen!”

nama: A wéi 4 akegh ghérsafé rokar norayayénd, "Efalo!" A wéi 24 sénko ár nuyáyénd a yáwefnoyénd Ngánjáne a Sif tosae.
english: The four living creatures said , “Amen!” Then the elders fell down and worshiped .

nama: Njam yénd kéretawén Sif tosam yésawéryéng fronde 7mén manéghkaf yam bukan. Féyo ámb akegh ghérsafé rokar néngutnai yéné ke ndenanit árurkenit, "Kénaf!" 2 Yénd néngretayén tukét a yinjoyén kwayaghé os. Os résagh árém teretau namb, a yémo yanai ákiki. Fá kérsau ménát sái kawaindau ásméghan fáro.
english: I saw that the Lamb opened one of the seven seals , and I heard one of the four living creatures saying , as with a voice of thunder , “ Come and see !”
Then a white horse appeared , and he who sat on it had a bow . A crown was given to him , and he came out conquering , and to conquer .

nama: Njam Sif tosam yésawéryéng yénamayo manéghkaf yam, yéndo yiyárayén yénamayo akegh ghérsafé rokar korayau, "Kénaf!" 4 A ámb os nufaryéng férkat. Yéné résagh ároe yaramayénd waftafé witmafé sénté náifé, muyé ménát sái yitérmbotat krufrát ghérsé mband maratan a kété témorwén mék árké ár kásmetawét fárofáro.
english: When he opened the second seal , I heard the second living creature saying , “ Come !”
Another came out , a red horse . To him who sat on it was given power to take peace from the earth , and that they should kill one another . There was given to him a great sword .

nama: Njam Sif tosam yésawéryéng nambiomén manéghkaf yam, yéndo yiyárayén nambiomén akegh ghérsafé rokar norayai, "Kénaf!" A yénd njam néngretayén yéndon yinjoyén kwéfité os. A yéné os résagh árom tawerwéng sékel yánjo ngángaye. 6 Féyo ke yénmormén kétamé 4 akegh ghérsafé rokar tambén, "Ámbiro wem ámbiro efogh ásáfogh fai, a nambio biskar ámbiro efogh ásáfogh fai, a yau yaghna olif wékwér a wéri nu!"
english: When he opened the third seal , I heard the third living creature saying , “ Come and see !” And behold , a black horse , and he who sat on it had a balance in his hand .
I heard a voice in the middle of the four living creatures saying , “ A choenix of wheat for a denarius , and three choenix of barley for a denarius ! Don’ t damage the oil and the wine !”

nama: A njam Sif tosam yésawéryéng 4mén manéghkaf yam, yéndo yiyárayén 4mén akegh ghérsafé rokar norayai, "Kénaf!" 8 A yénd njam néngretayén tukét, yinjoyén férénférnafé os wén arau ngarot, yéné os résagh ároene yétkwén témorwén Kér, endefaf kuwaitotau kér fés. Yéfeyot ewaramayénd wafté ámbiro 4mén mband marat sái witmafé sénté naifaye tásmétawét ár, káukáue a enjneye a kéghat wéráre.
english: When he opened the fourth seal , I heard the fourth living creature saying , “ Come and see!”

And behold , a pale horse , and the name of he who sat on it was Death . Hades followed with him . Authority over one fourth of the earth , to kill with the sword , with famine , with death , and by the wild animals of the earth was given to him .

nama: Njam Sif tosam yésawéryéng 5mén manéghkaf yam, yéndo ewinjoyén yéfene mbérmbér ghéngén wárogh kitaré mbanmbanan ghérsé efe té tásmetawét ménamén Ngánjánene si téfnan a si afroghmén. 10 Fá kutnawét Yurafaf ndimbal keye, "Múye kér ro Yuré, njúnnjúnofnar a efalofifi! Nderé teke so tawanjetam fémon sái moghan takém efe em yéné mband maratmén ménamén yémofem némé tafrotat téfefaf? Njam so téfene férékmén fai yangote yéné árfefaf?" 11 Féyo kwayaghé sáláme tawarametau yéfeyot fénatayero, a fá emndayéng enaghét némbnare kétánotio méinyotio Yurane ásáfogh téfnár a yáne waitogh ár sái esmetat efe Ngánjánam eumyoi séméghét. 12 Yénd néretayén Sif tosam yésawéryéng 6mén manéghkaf yam, a kété témorwén ndimbal sokrere, a efogh nénamndai kwéfité ndenanit kwéfité sáláme, a ghérare nénamndai féréknit. 13 Kénd uyégh nénufngoyénd njafarta yénan mband maratot ndenanit tikéf wén mbwe yénau natarnat ndimbal mbormboram njam esambneta. 14 A njafar naknam ndenanit fefanit, a méinyotio mband tunakéf a fér kimndawét yéfenjo sifayata.
english: When he opened the fifth seal , I saw underneath the altar the souls of those who had been killed for the Word of God , and for the testimony of the Lamb which they had .
They cried with a loud voice , saying , “ How long , Master , the holy and true , until you judge and avenge our blood on those who dwell on the earth ?”

A long white robe was given to each of them . They were told that they should rest yet for a while , until their fellow servants and their brothers, who would also be killed even as they were , should complete their course.
I saw when he opened the sixth seal , and there was a great earthquake . The sun became black as sackcloth made of hair , and the whole moon became as blood.
The stars of the sky fell to the earth , like a fig tree dropping its unripe figs when it is shaken by a great wind.
The sky was removed like a scroll when it is rolled up . Every mountain and island was moved out of its place .

nama: Féyo mband maratmén warsagh ár, limánégh ár, fiyaré sénko ár, wemár ár, ár efe em ndimbal waftafé, méinyotio faiofnar ásáfogh ár a yuwek ár, a ár méinyotio, katnotawét mband fénemé a wím mbanmbanan mband tunakfan. 16 A fá kutnawét mband tunakéffaf a wímfaf, "Kénuyangi a ténétnongi yáne sáfta efe yénmor limánégh ámnjogh sifayan a kétamé Sif tosane nékw tambén! 17 Ménamén yéfene ndimbal nékw efogh té nufar, a efe so yénamé kunjarngé?"
english: The kings of the earth , the princes, the commanding officers, the rich , the strong , and every slave and free person, hid themselves in the caves and in the rocks of the mountains .
They told the mountains and the rocks , “ Fall on us , and hide us from the face of him who sits on the throne , and from the wrath of the Lamb ,
for the great day of his wrath has come , and who is able to stand ?”

nama: Yéné soramé yéndon ewinjoyén 4 njafar si résagh ár tawakayongérwén 4 mband marat kwéndkwéndan, yéné njafar si résagh árém yangoyénd mbormbor 4 kwéndkwénd tambén ménát ámb mbormbor yau so téfnjau mband maratan o arakafan o wénan. 2 Féyo yéndon yinjoyén ámb njafar si résagh ár wér tambén, térsau akegh Ngánjánene manéghkaf yam. Fá kutnau ndimbal keye kétán 4 njafar si résagh árfefaf endefet ewaramayénd wafté wasérmboghét mband marat a arakaf: 3 "Yau yasérmbotati mband marat o arakaf o wén kétánotio yéndfem kor manéghkaf yam yérue ewatnam téfene Ngánjánene faiofnar ásáfogh ár sáf sotan." 4 Féyo yéndo eyárayén yéné ár mérén efe manéghkaf yam yérue eramayénd 144,000 kétamamén méinyotio mérén Israilmén.
english: After this , I saw four angels standing at the four corners of the earth , holding the four winds of the earth , so that no wind would blow on the earth , or on the sea , or on any tree .
I saw another angel ascend from the sunrise, having the seal of the living God . He cried with a loud voice to the four angels to whom it was given to harm the earth and the sea ,
saying , “Don’ t harm the earth , the sea , or the trees , until we have sealed the bondservants of our God on their foreheads !”
I heard the number of those who were sealed , one hundred forty-four thousand , sealed out of every tribe of the children of Israel :

nama: Kétamé Judane mérénta 12,000 manéghkaf yam yérue eramayénd, kétamé Réubenene mérénta 12,000, kétamé Gadene mérénta 12,000,
english: of the tribe of Judah twelve thousand were sealed , of the tribe of Reuben twelve thousand , of the tribe of Gad twelve thousand ,

nama: kétamé Ásarene mérénta 12,000, kétamé Naftaliene mérénta 12,000, kétamé Ménasene mérénta 12,000,
english: of the tribe of Asher twelve thousand , of the tribe of Naphtali twelve thousand , of the tribe of Manasseh twelve thousand ,

nama: kétamé Simionene mérénta 12,000, kétamé Lefiene mérénta 12,000, kétamé Isakarene mérénta 12,000,
english: of the tribe of Simeon twelve thousand , of the tribe of Levi twelve thousand , of the tribe of Issachar twelve thousand ,

nama: kétamé Jebulunene mérénta 12,000, kétamé Josefene mérénta 12,000, kétamé Benjaminene mérénta 12,000. Ndimbal ár mérén
english: of the tribe of Zebulun twelve thousand , of the tribe of Joseph twelve thousand , and of the tribe of Benjamin twelve thousand were sealed .

nama: Yéné soramé yénd néngretayén, a kété tamorwén ndimbal ár mérén waféghofnaye! Fá tamorwén méinyotio ár mérénmén, ndimbal yumén, a si téfénmén, a fá tawakayongérwén limánégh ámnjogh sifayé tambén a Sif tosé frondeta, tawawongérwén kwayaghé sáláme a taweretawét nginar arau yéfenjo ngángaye. 10 A fá kutnawét ndimbal keye: "Wanjarégh yém téfene Ngánjáneta, efe yémor limánégh ámnjogh sifayan, a yáyot wéi Sif tosé!"
english: After these things I looked , and behold , a great multitude which no man could count, out of every nation and of all tribes , peoples , and languages , standing before the throne and before the Lamb, dressed in white robes , with palm branches in their hands .
They cried with a loud voice , saying , “ Salvation be to our God , who sits on the throne , and to the Lamb !”

nama: Méinyotio njafar si résagh ár tawakayongérwén yarendayénd limánégh ámnjogh sifayé a sénko ár a 4 akegh ghérsafé rokar. Fá sénkoe kuitawét limánégh ámnjogh sifayarére a táwefnotawét Ngánjáne, 12 korayawét: "Efalo! Uwégh a ndimbal kwayaghé a káfeté mwighé a kánjo a utmanégh a wafté a muyé yém téfene Ngánjáne kétánotio tuot! Efalo!"
english: All the angels were standing around the throne , the elders , and the four living creatures ; and they fell on their faces before his throne , and worshiped God ,
saying , “Amen! Blessing , glory , wisdom , thanksgiving , honor , power , and might , be to our God forever and ever ! Amen.”

nama: Féyo ámb sénko árom wémotai, "Yéné kwayaghé sálámefé sem efe em, a árkamé fá enmormén?"
english: One of the elders answered , saying to me , “ These who are arrayed in the white robes , who are they , and where did they come from ?”

nama: Yéndon yawangoyén, "Ndimbal, fém mat ném." A fá korayangé, "Yéné em efe tamorwén ndimbal kértayan; yémofem té taumbnawét yéfenjo sáláme a eyátoyénd kwayaghé Sif tosane férkan.
english: I told him , “ My lord , you know .” He said to me , “ These are those who came out of the great suffering . + 7:14 or, oppression They washed their robes and made them white in the Lamb ’ s blood.

nama: Yénémamén, fá yéné fem Ngánjánene limánégh ámnjogh sifayarére a yémofem yáwefnotat yáyot efogh a sémbár yánjo wáwefnogh méngo kénjún; a fá efe yémor limánégh ámnjogh sifayan so em yémafé mérne.
english: Therefore they are before the throne of God , and they serve him day and night in his temple . He who sits on the throne will spread his tabernacle over them .

nama: Yau wéikor so siogham fá eramete yau wéi so fá nu siogham eramete. Efogh waftayam yau so elále, fá yau so ewakérne.
english: They will never be hungry or thirsty any more . The sun won’ t beat on them , nor any heat ;

nama: Ménamén Sif tosé efe yémor limánégh ámnjogh sifayé kaka so mé ewanjete ndenanit sif wanjengégh ár. Yémon so elimnde kétán akegh wérér nufaf. A Ngánjánam so tawawányányongé méinyotio yengam kétamé yéfene ghékéfta.
english: for the Lamb who is in the middle of the throne shepherds them and leads them to springs of life-giving waters . And God will wipe away every tear from their eyes .”

nama: Njam yémo yésawéryéng 7mén manéghkaf, métar náyátoi njafaran séno ámbiro efoghféneféne mbarmbar. 2 A yéndon ewinjoyén 7 njafar si résagh ár tawakayongérwén Ngánjánerére, a yéfe ewaramayéng 7 sufér.
english: When he opened the seventh seal , there was silence in heaven for about half an hour .
I saw the seven angels who stand before God , and seven trumpets were given to them .

nama: Ámb njafar si résagh ár, emo teretau gol ghéngén disafé, yénmormén a nokayoi ghéngén wárogh kitarérére. Yémo ewanai tárfár ghéngén wateghét, ménáyafé méinyotio Ngánjánene árfene Ngánjánafé orayégh si, gol ghéngén wárogh kitarayan limánégh ámnjogh sifayé frondeta. 4 Yéné ghéngén kwam, méinyotio Ngánjánene árfene Ngánjánafé orayéghafé, kuyotawét Ngánjánrére kétamé njafar si résagh ároene ngángata. 5 Féyo njafar si résagh árom yéngwanai ghéngén dis, yaflitam fés farko kétamé ghéngén wárogh kitarata, a yéngwitam mbandot; árurke nufngoi ásmégh, toyé aramégh nufngoyénd a kété témorwén sokrere. Sufér
english: Another angel came and stood over the altar , having a golden censer . Much incense was given to him , that he should add it to the prayers of all the saints on the golden altar which was before the throne .
The smoke of the incense , with the prayers of the saints, went up before God out of the angel’s hand .
The angel took the censer , and he filled it with the fire of the altar , then threw it on the earth . Thunders , sounds , lightnings, and an earthquake followed .

nama: Féyo 7 njafar si résagh ár nafrendaménd sufér waufghét.
english: The seven angels who had the seven trumpets prepared themselves to sound .

nama: Fronde njafar si résagh árom yaufetai yánjo sufér, a nu mbwe a fés wanjméghkaf férkafé enwitam mbandot. Ámbiro nambiomén mband marat nakérnam, a ámbiro nambiomén wén kakérnawét a yus méinyotio nefoi.
english: The first sounded , and there followed hail and fire , mixed with blood, and they were thrown to the earth . One third of the earth was burned up , and one third of the trees were burned up , and all green grass was burned up .

nama: Féyo yénamayo njafar si résagh árom yaufetai yánjo sufér, a ámb rokar ndenanit mband tunakéf fésafé yitam arakafot. Ámbiro nambiomén arakaf nawengoi férkot, 9 a ámbiro nambiomén akegh rokar arakafan eramngotam, a ámbiro nambiomén bout ewasérmbotam.
english: The second angel sounded , and something like a great burning mountain was thrown into the sea . One third of the sea became blood,
and one third of the living creatures which were in the sea died . One third of the ships were destroyed .

nama: Nambiomén njafar si résagh árom yaufetai yánjo sufér, a ndimbal kénd, natremngoi ndenanit tosin, nénuyai njafarta kétán ámbiro nambiomén wanjet a wérér nufaf 11 Yéné kéndoene yétkwén siyém "Ghafté kér ro." Ámbiro nambiomén nu namndai ghafté, a tárfár ár kér tamorwén yéné nu tambén árké té nénamndayénd ghafté.
english: The third angel sounded , and a great star fell from the sky , burning like a torch , and it fell on one third of the rivers , and on the springs of water .
The name of the star is “ Wormwood .” One third of the waters became wormwood . Many people died from the waters , because they were made bitter .

nama: 4mén njafar si résagh árom yaufetai yánjo sufér. Ámbiro nambiomén efogh yiroryéng a ámbiro nambiomén ghérare, a ámbiro nambiomén kénd kés em, ménát yéfene ámbiro nambiomén kwayaghé nénamndayénd kwéfité; ámbiro nambiomén efogh témorwén kwayaghafnar a ámbiro nambiomén sémbár witmaro wéi ndenáyo.
english: The fourth angel sounded , and one third of the sun was struck , and one third of the moon , and one third of the stars, so that one third of them would be darkened ; and the day wouldn’ t shine for one third of it , and the night in the same way .

nama: Féyo yénd néngretayén tukét, a yéndo yiyárayén ámbiro ndikáké kutnau ndimbal keye njamandio kanefetau tukmé njafaran, "Férférafé! Férférafé! Férférafé méinyotio ár efe emor yéné mband maratan, ménamén sufér kemén árké ámb nambio njafar si résagh árém so ewaufetat!"
english: I saw , and I heard an eagle, flying in mid heaven , saying with a loud voice , “ Woe ! Woe ! Woe to those who dwell on the earth , because of the other blasts of the trumpets of the three angels, who are yet to sound !”

nama: 5mén njafar si résagh árém yaufetai yánjo sufér. Yéndo yinjoyén kénd árké té nénuyai mband maratot kétamé njafarta, yá yaramai ki yéné kwémbofnar yékwmén. 2 Njam yémon yésawéryéng kwémbofnar yékw, kwam nénokayoi kétamé ndenanit kwérkwér fés kwam yénau yém, féyo efogh a njafar kwéfité namndeyayénd ménamén yéné yékwoene kwammén. 3 Yéné kwam tambén ngumbainy kéntonawét mband maratot a ewaramayénd wafté ndenanit ndérkamé yátmane wafté yénau yém. 4 Ámb árom ewafaretai, "Yau ewaghnati yus yéné mband maratmén o wén o fénaté wén sáf, wénde ewghnati efe yau em Ngánjánene manéghkaf yéruafé yéfene sáf sotan. 5 Yau esmetati kérotio wénde ndémkero ewarametati 5 ghérare." Ndémke ndenanit témorwén yénau ndérkamé yatmam térarngé ár. 6 Yéné 5 ghérareyan árém yéta so yéronjat kér wénde yau so tinjongi; fá yéta so ménde em kér sái em, wénde kéram mé so ewainde.
english: The fifth angel sounded , and I saw a star from the sky which had fallen to the earth . The key to the pit of the abyss was given to him .
He opened the pit of the abyss, and smoke went up out of the pit , like the smoke from a burning furnace . The sun and the air were darkened because of the smoke from the pit .
Then out of the smoke came locusts on the earth , and power was given to them , as the scorpions of the earth have power .
They were told that they should not hurt the grass of the earth , neither any green thing , neither any tree , but only those people who don’ t have God ’ s seal on their foreheads .
They were given power , not to kill them , but to torment them for five months . Their torment was like the torment of a scorpion when it strikes a person.
In those days people will seek death , and will in no way find it . They will desire to die , and death will flee from them .

nama: Ngumbainy ndenanit kéretawét mékot os yénau náfrendat. Yéfene sénkoyan tawawéngérwén ndenanit golmén ákiki, a yéfene sáf ndenanit tamorwén ár sáfnit. 8 Yéfene séf ndenanit tawamorwén amaf séfnit, a yéfene sén ndenanit ndimbal munjan fusene sén. 9 Fá tawawéngérwén tot téfénmén awambégh sáláme, a yéfene njamb uke ndenanit témorwén tárfár osafene tétatétake yénau yém eumbang ose résaghmén mékot yénau nérsat. 10 Fá tamorwén keran wétafé ndenanit ndérkamé yátmé, a yéfene ker tamorwén waftafé árkéménaye árét ndémke tawarametawét 5 ghérare. 11 Yéfene kété témorwén warsagh ár efe témorwén kwémbofnar yékwmén si résagh ár, endene yétkwén yémndetat Ibru sie Abadon, a wéi Grik sie Afolion. Yéné sómbio yétkwénafene fifi siyém Wirorégh ár.
english: The shapes of the locusts were like horses prepared for war . On their heads were something like golden crowns , and their faces were like people ’s faces .
They had hair like women ’ s hair , and their teeth were like those of lions .
They had breastplates like breastplates of iron . The sound of their wings was like the sound of many chariots and horses rushing to war .
They have tails like those of scorpions , with stingers . In their tails they have power to harm men for five months .
They have over them as king the angel of the abyss. His name in Hebrew is “Abaddon”, but in Greek , he has the name “Apollyon”.

nama: Fronde férférafé yam té kawainde, wénde ámb sómbio férférafé yam mé ere ufroghét.
english: The first woe is past. Behold , there are still two woes coming after this .

nama: 6mén njafar si résagh árom yaufetai yánjo sufér. Féyo yénd káyáretawén si 4 tartar tambén kété golmén ghéngén wárogh kitaré tambén efe yakai Ngánjánerére. 14 Norayai 6mén njafar si résagh ároefaf efe témorwén suférafé, "Táfer 4 njafar si résagh ár efe taumbang kété ndimbal wanjen Eufrates!" 15 4 njafar si résagh ár efe té káfrendawét yéné efoghfénefénet, a efghot a ghéraret a yunjfot té nétoryénd ámbiro nambiomén mband marat ár ngiot. 16 Yénd náyárayén nderé tárfár tamorwén mék téfnár efe tafayongérwén osamé 200 milion.
english: The sixth angel sounded . I heard a voice from the horns of the golden altar which is before God ,
saying to the sixth angel who had the trumpet , “ Free the four angels who are bound at the great river Euphrates !”
The four angels were freed who had been prepared for that hour and day and month and year , so that they might kill one third of mankind.
The number of the armies of the horsemen was two hundred million . I heard the number of them .

nama: Os a osafene résagh ár yéndon tafandawén tanjo ghékéf waingéghe kéretawét ndené: Yéfene wéf awoghmén tamorwén fésafé férék ngarot, ndéndák ngarot, téndal ngarot ndené rémérémé wékwér. Osafene sénko tamorwén ndenanit ndimbal munjan fusafene sénkonit, a yéfene sénfneta kéntonau fés, kwam a rémérémé wékwér. 18 Ár mérén ámbiro nambiomén tásmetau krotio yéné nambio férférafé kérté yame: fés, kwam a rémérémé wékwére árké kéntonawét osafene sénfneta. 19 Yéné osafene wafté stamorwén yéfene mbírmbíran a yéfene keran. Yéfene ker tamorwén kambannit sénkoyafé, yénaye kal tawaramangayénd árét.
english: Thus I saw the horses in the vision and those who sat on them , having breastplates of fiery red, hyacinth blue, and sulfur yellow ; and the horses ’ heads resembled lions ’ heads . Out of their mouths proceed fire , smoke , and sulfur .
By these three plagues , one third of mankind was killed: by the fire , the smoke , and the sulfur , which proceeded out of their mouths .
For the power of the horses is in their mouths and in their tails . For their tails are like serpents , and have heads ; and with them they harm.

nama: Ámb ár mérén efe yau tásmetau yéné férférafé kérté yamam, yau wéi nékmboyénd yaufiyam wafroghta. Yémofem mé ménjtaye tawáwefnotawét yaufi mbérmbérat a gol wafroghmén mewangat, silfé, tot téfénmén, wímmén a wénmén, yéné mewang árkéméné yau néretat o yau náyáretat o yau eyota! 21 Fá yau nawengoyénd ár ngi tambén o ghar tambén o yaufi wal yam tambén o oro tambén.
english: The rest of mankind, who were not killed with these plagues , didn’ t repent of the works of their hands , that they wouldn’ t worship demons , and the idols of gold , and of silver, and of brass , and of stone , and of wood , which can ’ t see, hear, or walk .
They didn’ t repent of their murders , their sorceries , their sexual immorality , or their thefts .

nama: Yéndo yinjoyén ámb wafté kér ro njafar si résagh ár kénewonau njafarta. Fá njafar kwamkwam umaneghkaf témorwén, a sikwálkwál témorwén yáne sénko tukta; yáne sáf ndenanit efogh, a yáne ghambér ndenanit tamorwén kwérkwér fés. 2 Yémo teretau némbne buk árké mé tésawérngérwén yáne ngángayan. Yémo yánjo tambén kafkaf eyai arakafan a yánjo fatrata kafkaf eyai mbandan, 3 a fá nutnai ndimbal keye ndenanit ndimbal munjan fus. Njam fá nutnam, 7 árurkeyam yawangoyénd. 4 Njam 7 árurkeyam norayayénd, yéndo táf farogh féfé ewafngoyén, wénde kém kétamé njafarta yénmormén kénorayau tafaf, "Ewarambnota ndernáye 7 árurke norayat; yau efarota yéné!"
english: I saw a mighty angel coming down out of the sky , clothed with a cloud . A rainbow was on his head . His face was like the sun , and his feet like pillars of fire .
He had in his hand a little open book . He set his right foot on the sea , and his left on the land .
He cried with a loud voice , as a lion roars . When he cried , the seven thunders uttered their voices .
When the seven thunders sounded , I was about to write ; but I heard a voice from the sky saying , “ Seal up the things which the seven thunders said , and don’ t write them .”

nama: Njafar si résagh ár yéndon árké yinjoyén takayongérwén arakafan a mbandan euyoi yánjo tambén ngángé njafarot. 6 Fá norayai efalo yátogh si Ngánjánene yétkwénan, efe nakete tuot, emo yafrotam njafar a méinyotio rokar kété, mband marat a méinyotio rokar yéné kénjún, a arakaf a rokar méinyotio yéné kénjún, fá norayai, "Kété ámb yau awanegh so yém! 7 Wénde njam 7mén njafar si résagh árom taufetangé yánjo sufér, Ngánjánene warambnogh yam táf so nufrotat, yéné so nufrotat ndené fété ndernáye té mat táyátotau yánjo ásáfogh téfnár, Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár."
english: The angel whom I saw standing on the sea and on the land lifted up his right hand to the sky

and swore by him who lives forever and ever , who created heaven and the things that are in it , the earth and the things that are in it , and the sea and the things that are in it , that there will no longer be delay ,
but in the days of the voice of the seventh angel, when he is about to sound , then the mystery of God is finished , as he declared to his servants the prophets .

nama: Féyo kém árké náyárayén yéndon kétamé njafarta nénorayai tafaf wéikor, "Nguwano, téngwan sauréghkaf buk árkéméné yéfai njafar si résagh ároene ngángayan efe yakai arakafan a mbandan."
english: The voice which I heard from heaven , again speaking with me , said , “ Go , take the book which is open in the hand of the angel who stands on the sea and on the land .”

nama: Féyo yénd wéngmormén njafar si résagh ároefaf a yamnendayén fá ménát sái kwaramangai némbne buk. Yémo kwémndangé yénd, "Téngwan a téneta; so tengongé fene fút ghaftat, wénde fene mbírmbíran ménde sái yém ndenanit fáméghár." 10 Yéndo yéngwanayén némbne buk njafar si résagh ároene ngángata a yénetamén, ndenanit ménde témorwén fáméghár tane mbírmbíran, wénde yéndo njam yénetamén, tane fútan namndai ghafté. 11 Féyo yémofem wémndayénd, "Fém táf néngafrota wéikor tárfár árfefaf, ámb yuwomé, fénaté sifaf a warsagh árfefaf."
english: I went to the angel, telling him to give me the little book . He said to me , “ Take it and eat it . It will make your stomach bitter , but in your mouth it will be as sweet as honey .”
I took the little book out of the angel’s hand , and ate it . It was as sweet as honey in my mouth . When I had eaten it , my stomach was made bitter .
They told me , “ You must prophesy again over many peoples , nations , languages , and kings.”

nama: Féyo ta waramai ufoghét wétu, a yénd wémndai, "Kénngém a tufota Ngánjánene wáwefnogh méngo a ghéngén wárogh kitaré, a tawafta méinyotio wáwefnogh téfnár. 2 Wénde yau táf yufota téndo tambén wáwefnogh méngo sifayé, ménamén Ngánjánam té yéramai yéné sifayé Téndo árfefaf. Yémofem so kafkafe yésénat njúnnjúnofnar ndimbal tesen 42 ghérare. 3 Yéndon so wafté tawaramen tanjo sómbio ghékéf fandagh árét, a fá so nawot saghé sáláme a so néngafrot yéné efogh kénjúmé 1,260 efogh." 4 Yéné sómbio fandagh ár sere sómbio olif wén a sómbio lambefé fayoghmén árkéméné ewakayare Yuranerére efe yém mband maratoene. 5 Árké árom njam yéta ngiot tawafnge fá, fés so yéném sénfneta a tawifongé yéfene mék téfnár; a ndené ende yéné ár kér so em emofem njam ngiot tawafngend fá. 6 Fá ere waftafé njafar manéghét ménát némé nu yau so nafamnde táf njam néngafrot. Fá ere waftafé wengoghét wérér nu férkot, a sái engwafaret férférafé kérté yam mband maratot fá ndernáye njam ménde ere.
english: A reed like a rod was given to me . Someone said , “ Rise and measure God ’s temple , and the altar , and those who worship in it .
Leave out the court which is outside of the temple , and don’ t measure it , for it has been given to the nations . They will tread the holy city under foot for forty-two months .
I will give power to my two witnesses , and they will prophesy one thousand two hundred sixty days , clothed in sackcloth .”
These are the two olive trees and the two lamp stands , standing before the Lord of the earth .
If anyone desires to harm them , fire proceeds out of their mouth and devours their enemies . If anyone desires to harm them , he must be killed in this way .

These have the power to shut up the sky , that it may not rain during the days of their prophecy . They have power over the waters , to turn them into blood, and to strike the earth with every plague , as often as they desire .

nama: Njam yémofem tifend afrogh si, ndimbal gásié árkéméné sái kénurtongé kwémbofnar yékw tambén so násmetat yéné sómbio árfé. Yémon so tawaindange a esméwé krotio. 8 A yéfene kér fifi so ekmare endén Jurusalemén, ndimbal tesen árké ufarogh yétkwéne emndét Sodom o Ijif, yéné ndimbal tesen ánde yéfene Yuré yénamndaménd wafatarégh wénan. 9 Nambio a mbarmbar efogh, méinyotio ár, mérén, fénaté si, a ndimbal yumén árém so efandét yéfene kér fifi, árké ár yau so taumyongi mband raméghét.
english: When they have finished their testimony , the beast that comes up out of the abyss will make war with them , and overcome them , and kill them .
Their dead bodies will be in the street of the great city , which spiritually is called Sodom and Egypt, where also their Lord was crucified .
From among the peoples , tribes , languages , and nations , people will look at their dead bodies for three and a half days , and will not allow their dead bodies to be laid in a tomb .

nama: Ár efe em yéné mband maratmén so erametat ramégh yéfenjo kénjún a téménd sái yafrotat, ménamén sómbio Ngánjánene mat yátogh árfene kérmén emofem takméwét ár kértayan.
english: Those who dwell on the earth will rejoice over them , and they will be glad . They will give gifts to one another , because these two prophets tormented those who dwell on the earth .

nama: Wénde nambio a mbarmbar efogh soramé, ambone Ngánjáne tambén ninyawai yéfefaf, a fá nokayeyayénd; a férféram ewifoi méinyotio fá emofem tafandwét fá. 12 Féyo ndimbal ke yénmormén kétamé njafarta, "Kénaflend yénan." A fá néwaneyayénd njafarot njafarkwamkwam kénjúmé mé tafandwét yéfene mék téfnáram. 13 A yéné efoghféneféneyanyo kété témorwén yaufiyaufi sokrere a ámbiro 10mén ndimbal tesen yiroryéng, a 7,000 ár kér emormén yéné sokrereyan, a méinyotio ár efe yau kér emormén férfér tamorwén a ndimbal kwayaghé tarametawét njafarmén Ngánjáne.
english: After the three and a half days , the breath of life from God entered into them , and they stood on their feet . Great fear fell on those who saw them .
I heard a loud voice from heaven saying to them , “ Come up here !” They went up into heaven in a cloud , and their enemies saw them .
In that day there was a great earthquake , and a tenth of the city fell . Seven thousand people were killed in the earthquake , and the rest were terrified and gave glory to the God of heaven .

nama: Yénamayo férférafé yam té nawaindé, wénde nambiomén férférafé yam yéném tekofnaye. 7mén sufér ke
english: The second woe is past. Behold , the third woe comes quickly .

nama: Féyo 7mén njafar si résagh árom yaufetai yánjo sufér, a kété tamorwén ndimbal ke kutnawét njafaran, "Mband marat sénonjo té nénamndé téfene Yurane limánégh a yáne Kerisoene limángégh, a yémon so yélimnde tuot!" 16 Féyo 24 sénko ár tamorangérwén yéfenjo limánégh ámnjogh sifayan Ngánjánrére keitawét yéfenjo sénkoe a táwefnotawét yá, 17 a fá korayawét: "Yéndfem kánjo némarametam fe, Yuré Ngánján Méinyotio waftafé, fém efe ném a fém efe kénmorwén, sénonjo fémo té yané fenjo ndimbal wafté a té limánégh yérnyé.
english: The seventh angel sounded , and great voices in heaven followed , saying , “ The kingdom of the world has become the Kingdom of our Lord and of his Christ . He will reign forever and ever !”
The twenty-four elders , who sit on their thrones before God ’s throne , fell on their faces and worshiped God ,
saying : “ We give you thanks , Lord God , the Almighty , the one who is and who was , because you have taken your great power and reigned.

nama: Mband marat ár mérén nékw té tam fefaf, wénde sénonjo fene nékw efogh té nufar. Yéné efogh té nawer sái emota kér ár a fai ewarameta fenjo ásáfogh téfnárat, fémo so fai ewaramete fenjo faiofnar ásáfogh árét Ngánjánene mat yátogh árét a efalo yátogh ár a méinyotio emofem yéfandat fene yétkwén férférafé, kétamé némbnar kétán ndimbal, a fémon so ewasérmbote méinyotio fá emofem tasérmbotat mband marat."
english: The nations were angry , and your wrath came , as did the time for the dead to be judged , and to give your bondservants the prophets , their reward , as well as to the saints and those who fear your name , to the small and the great , and to destroy those who destroy the earth .”

nama: Féyo njafaran Ngánjánene wáwefnogh méngo nasawéryéng, a yáne Nák Boks safénro téfandawét yáne wáwefnogh méngo kénjún. Féyo kété témorwén toyé karametawét, árurke kásmetawét a karoghawét, nu mbwefé ndimbal mbormbor, a sokrere.
english: God ’s temple that is in heaven was opened, and the ark of the Lord ’s covenant was seen in his temple . Lightnings, sounds , thunders , an earthquake , and great hail followed .

nama: Ndimbal sélngwélafé yam nufaryéng njafaran: amaf efogh umaneghkaf témorwén, ménáyafé ghérare témorwén yáne kafkaf mbanmbanan a 12 kéndafé ákiki téfayongérwén yáne sénkoyan. 2 Amaf témorwén ambum suafé a tékrát téfandau áráfghét.
english: A great sign was seen in heaven : a woman clothed with the sun , and the moon under her feet , and on her head a crown of twelve stars.
She was with child . She cried out in pain, laboring to give birth .

nama: Wéi ámb sélngwélafé yam nufaryéng njafaran: ámb ndimbal férék ngarot ndimbal fuwai 7 sénkofé a 10 tartarafé a tawafayongérwén 7 ákiki yéfene ámbiroámbiro sénkoyamé. 4 Yáne keram ámbiro nambiomén kénd esamburyéng njafar tambén a enwitam mband maratot, féyo nawengoi amafoe tambén emo ambum ráfghét térametau, ménát yémo so ténetau yáne ambum njam káráftau. 5 Amafom yéráftam ghakér ambum, emo so elimnde méinyotio ndimbal yu ménaye warsagh ároene tot téfénmén wétue, a njafar si résagh árom yéngétnoi yáne ambum a yéngwanai Ngánjánefaf a yáne limánégh ámnjogh sifayafaf. 6 Amaf nawatembai fanfne yuwot yéné sifayat Ngánjánam árké té yáfrendam yáyot, ánde fá so témorwén wambghan 1,260 efogh.
english: Another sign was seen in heaven . Behold , a great red dragon , having seven heads and ten horns , and on his heads seven crowns .
His tail drew one third of the stars of the sky , and threw them to the earth . The dragon stood before the woman who was about to give birth , so that when she gave birth he might devour her child .
She gave birth to a son , a male child , who is to rule all the nations with a rod of iron . Her child was caught up to God and to his throne .
The woman fled into the wilderness , where she has a place prepared by God , that there they may nourish her one thousand two hundred sixty days .

nama: Féyo mék kété témorwén njafaran. Maikél a yánjoyo njafar si résagh árfé kásmetawét ndimbal fuwayafé a ndimbal fuwayoene si résagh árfé. 8 Wénde ndimbal fuwai yau kor muyafé yémormén, a yémofem yétarnaménd yéfenjo sifayé kété njafaran. 9 Yéné ndimbal fuwai yénmitaménd yuwot, yéné tándáwár kamban yémndetat Defol, o Sáifér, emo elimndé unyéghe méinyotio ár mband maratan. Fá té yénmitaménd mband maratot yánjo si résagh árfé.
english: There was war in the sky . Michael and his angels made war on the dragon . The dragon and his angels made war .
They didn’ t prevail. No place was found for them any more in heaven .

The great dragon was thrown down, the old serpent , he who is called the devil and Satan , the deceiver of the whole world . He was thrown down to the earth , and his angels were thrown down with him .

nama: Féyo yénd náyárayén ndimbal ke njafarta kénorayau, "Sénonjo Ngánjánene wanjarégh té nufar! Sénonjo Ngánjánam té yuyafo yánjo wafté ndené Warsagh ár! Sénonjo yáne Kerisom yuyafo yáne muyé. Ménamén ár emo tawawafrotau sénkér efalo yátogh árét efogh a sémbár Ngánjánene sáfrére, njafar si résagh árém yénmitaménd yuwot. 11 Efalo yátogh árém yáindayénd Sif tosane férke a Ngánjánene si waitoghe, a yémofem yau yéfenjo ghérsé táuwetawét mindefifi wénde férférofnar tamorwén krot. 12 Yénémaménnde náuwetati, fém njafar a fém efe em kété! Wénde ghérghérsisé mband maratoe a arakaf, ménamén Sáifér té téném féfefaf, fá siyém nékw afoghkaf, ménamén fá mat yém yáne kwéf ndémbndémb té namndangi."
english: I heard a loud voice in heaven , saying , “ Now the salvation , the power , and the Kingdom of our God , and the authority of his Christ has come ; for the accuser of our brothers has been thrown down, who accuses them before our God day and night .
They overcame him because of the Lamb’s blood, and because of the word of their testimony . They didn’ t love their life , even to death .
Therefore rejoice , heavens , and you who dwell in them . Woe to the earth and to the sea , because the devil has gone down to you , having great wrath , knowing that he has but a short time .”

nama: Njam ndimbal fuwayam yinjoi ndené fá té yénmitaménd mband maratot. Féyo yémo téronjau amaf emo yéráftam ghakér ambum. Fá ménde témorwén tésmangai. 14 Yéné amafoe yaramayénd ndimbal ndikakane sómbio njamb, ménát fá so kanefetau yáne frengéghkaf sifayafaf fanfne yuwot, ánde fá so tambetawét nambio yunjéf a mbarmbar kétamé yéné kambanoeta. 15 A wéi yéné kambanam sénféne tambén yénmetoi amafoefaf nu ndenanit wanje, ménát amaf so kéféram tanangai. 16 Wénde amaf yáutánam mband maratam. Mband maratam yánjo sénféne yésawéryéng a néloi nu árké nu ndimbal fuwayam té yénmetoi yánjo sénféneta. 17 Féyo ndimbal fuwai nékw témorwén amafoefaf a nuwanoi a mék yéfunai yáne ambumafefaf, méinyotio emofem efalo eyátotat Ngánjánene nák a naweretat Yesuene sian. 18 A ndimbal fuwai nokayoi arakaf téndon.
english: When the dragon saw that he was thrown down to the earth , he persecuted the woman who gave birth to the male child .

Two wings of the great eagle were given to the woman , that she might fly into the wilderness to her place , so that she might be nourished for a time , times , and half a time , from the face of the serpent .
The serpent spewed water out of his mouth after the woman like a river , that he might cause her to be carried away by the stream.
The earth helped the woman , and the earth opened its mouth and swallowed up the river which the dragon spewed out of his mouth .
The dragon grew angry with the woman , and went away to make war with the rest of her offspring, who keep God ’ s commandments and hold Jesus ’ testimony .

nama: Féyo yéndon yinjoyén ndimbal gásié nénurtoi arakafta. Kété tamorwén 10 tartar a 7 sénko a ákiki tafayongérwén méinyotio tartaramé, a fénatayero sénkoyamé yaufi yétkwén tawakayongérwén. 2 Ndimbal gásié yéndon árké yinjoyén kéretau ndenanit fénaté sáfot ndimbal munjan fus yétkwén leféd, wénde tamorwén kafkaf ndenanit kéghat ndimbal wérár yétkwén Beya a sénféne ndenanit ndimbal munjan fus. Ndimbal fuwayam yaramai ndimbal gásiyai yánjo wafté a yánjo limánégh ámnjogh sifayé a ndimbal muyé. 3 Ámb ndimbal gásiane sénkoyan mbor kéretau ndenanit kar yésmetaménd fronde, a yéné kérmén mbor mer nénamndai. Méinyotio mband marat sélngwél tamorwén a táitotawét ndimbal gásié. 4 Árém táwefnotawét ndimbal fuwaye ménamén yémon té yaramai yánjo muyé ndimbal gásiyai. Yémofem wéi táwefnotawét ndimbal gásiyai, korayawét, "Efe ndené yém ndimbal gásié? Emo so mék téfunangé yáfaf?"
english: Then I stood on the sand of the sea . I saw a beast coming up out of the sea , having ten horns and seven heads . On his horns were ten crowns , and on his heads , blasphemous names .
The beast which I saw was like a leopard , and his feet were like those of a bear , and his mouth like the mouth of a lion . The dragon gave him his power , his throne , and great authority .
One of his heads looked like it had been wounded fatally. His fatal wound was healed , and the whole earth marveled at the beast .
They worshiped the dragon because he gave his authority to the beast ; and they worshiped the beast , saying , “ Who is like the beast ? Who is able to make war with him ?”

nama: Ngánjánam yumyoi ndimbal gásié siot sái korayau yaufi si Ngánjánefaf, a yáyot yaramai muyé wafroghét fá némé ménde témorwén 42 ghérareyot. 6 Fá korayau sotafé yaufi si Ngánjánefaf, a tasérmbotau yáne yétkwén a yáne ámnjogh sifayé a yéfefaf wéi ndenáyo efe emor njafaran. 7 Ngánjánam wafté yaramai Ngánjánene árfé ásméghét a sái tawaindangé fá. A yaramai wafté méinyotio ár limánéghét, méinyotio mérén, fénaté si téfén ár, ndimbal yumén ár. 8 Méinyotio ár efe em yéné mband maratmén so yáwefnotat ndimbal gásiyai. Wénde yéné ár endefene yétkwén em Sif tasane ghérsé bukan, yémofem yau so yáwefnotat. Sif tosam yétkwén ewafarotam yéné efalo yátogh árfene yánjo bukan frondeyo soramé mband marat nufrotam. Fá yéné féyém Sif tosé árém efe yésmetaménd.
english: A mouth speaking great things and blasphemy was given to him . Authority to make war for forty-two months was given to him .
He opened his mouth for blasphemy against God , to blaspheme his name , his dwelling, and those who dwell in heaven .
It was given to him to make war with the saints and to overcome them . Authority over every tribe , people , language , and nation was given to him .
All who dwell on the earth will worship him , everyone whose name has not been written from the foundation of the world in the book of life of the Lamb who has been killed.

nama: Fá efe yém ténganafé, so fété náyárete! 10 Efe njam té ewéretat kwéfkwéf méngot so fété em kwéfkwéf ár. Efe njam esmetat krot witmafé sénté naifaye so fété esmetat witmafé sénté naifaye. Yéné yém ndené efalo yátogh ár táf so em métar a muyafé. Yémofem táf so mé efalo yiyátotat Ngánján. Ámb ndimbal gásié néntoryéng mband marat tambén
english: If anyone has an ear , let him hear.
If anyone is to go into captivity, he will go into captivity. If anyone is to be killed with the sword , he must be killed. Here is the endurance and the faith of the saints.

nama: Féyo yéndon yinjoyén ámb ndimbal gásié kéntonau mband marat tambén. Fá témorwén sómbio tartarafé ndenanit Sif tosé, wénde fá korayau ndenanit ndimbal fuwai kar témorwén. 12 Yémo tawafrotau méinyotio muyé frondemén ndimbal gásiane sáfrére, a yéméindai mband marat a yánjo ár wáwefnoghét fronde ndimbal gásié, efe té kér kénjúta mer náyátoi. 13 A yémon tawafrotau ndimbal sélngwélafé ufarogh yam, téfunau fés kénatarnawét njafarta mband maratot ár ghékfan. 14 Ménamén sélngwélafé ufarogh yam téfnan yáyot wafté yaramayénd ménát sái tafrotau fronde ndimbal gásiane muwémuwaye. Yémo tamndetau méinyotio ár mband maratan ménát yémofem so tafrotawét mbanmban ndimbal gásiai utmanéghét efe té yésmetaménd witmafé sénté naifaye a wénde mer wéi nénamndai. 15 Yénamayomén ndimbal gásiai yaramayénd wafté ménát sái taramangai ambone fronde ndimbal gásiane mbanmbanoe, ménát ndimbal gásiane mbanmban so korayau krot ekmeta yéné ár emofem yau njam yáwefnotat mbanmbanoe. 16 Yémo wéi wáfaregh ewafngoi méinyotio ár, némbnar kétán ndimbal, wemár a yauyau, yuwek a orsagh ár, ménát sái tarsawét mbor yéfene tambén ngángayan o sáf sotan, 17 ménát ámb yau so rokar manie erse o etérne maniot táfandro njam yéné mborafé yém, árké yém ndimbal gásiane yétkwén o yáne wafégh yétkwén.
english: I saw another beast coming up out of the earth . He had two horns like a lamb and it spoke like a dragon .
He exercises all the authority of the first beast in his presence . He makes the earth and those who dwell in it to worship the first beast , whose fatal wound was healed .
He performs great signs , even making fire come down out of the sky to the earth in the sight of people .

He deceives my own people who dwell on the earth because of the signs he was granted to do in front of the beast , saying to those who dwell on the earth that they should make an image to the beast who had the sword wound and lived .
It was given to him to give breath to the image of the beast , that the image of the beast should both speak , and cause as many as wouldn’ t worship the image of the beast to be killed.
He causes all , the small and the great , the rich and the poor , and the free and the slave , to be given marks on their right hands or on their foreheads ;
and that no one would be able to buy or to sell unless he has that mark , which is the name of the beast or the number of his name .

nama: Yéna yém káfeté mwighé. Efe yém mwighé kér ro so yafene yéné wafégh ndimbal gásiane, ménamén yéné siyém ároenemén waferégh a yáne waférghét siyém 666.
english: Here is wisdom . He who has understanding , let him calculate the number of the beast , for it is the number of a man. His number is six hundred sixty-six .

nama: Féyo yéndon yinyoyén Sif tosé takayongérwén Jaion mband tunakfan, mérne yánjo waitogh árfé 144,000 méinyotio efe tamorwén yáne yétkwénafé a Yárefane yétkwénafé takayongérwén yéfene sáf sotan 2 A yéndon náyárayén ke njafarta ndenanit tárfár wérér nu yénau nasunat o ndimbal toyé kenit. Ndenanit témorwén tárfár ár kembnemén wagh rokare yénau nambnat mérne. 3 A yémofem térametawét totér wagh limánégh ámnjogh sifayé rére a 4 akegh ghérsafé wérár a sénko árfene rére. Árké ár yau so kotametau yéné wagh, wénde mé fáro 144,000 árro mat tamorwén efe té ewaferyéng yéné mband maratan. 4 Fá yéné em efe yau kawasérmbotat amafafé, fá mé méinyo em. Yémofem táitotat Sif tosé árkamé fá tiota. Fá yéné wanjaréghkaf em ár tambén, árké em frondembwe Ngánjáneyot a Sif tosai. 5 Némé unyégh yau ewawinjoyénd yéfene mbírmbíran, fá sem téfnofnar. Nambio njafar si résagh ár
english: I saw , and behold , the Lamb standing on Mount Zion , and with him a number, one hundred forty-four thousand , having his name and the name of his Father written on their foreheads .
I heard a sound from heaven like the sound of many waters and like the sound of a great thunder . The sound which I heard was like that of harpists playing on their harps .

They sing a new song before the throne and before the four living creatures and the elders . No one could learn the song except the one hundred forty-four thousand , those who had been redeemed out of the earth .

These are those who were not defiled with women , for they are virgins . These are those who follow the Lamb wherever he goes . These were redeemed by Jesus from among men , the first fruits to God and to the Lamb.
In their mouth was found no lie , for they are blameless.

nama: Féyo yéndon yinjoyén ámb njafar si résagh ár kanefetau njafar tukma, a yáfaf témorwén akegh mer si sái téngwaitotau yéfefaf mé efe ár yémorare yéné mband maratan, méinyotio ndimbal yu, mérén, a fénaté si. 7 Fá korayau ndimbal kéme, "Férférafé yéfandati Ngánján a yarametati yá ndimbal kwayaghé! Ménamén yáne mogh efogh té nawer. Yáwefnotati yá emo ewafrotam njafar, mband marat, arakaf a wérér nu."
english: I saw an angel flying in mid heaven , having an eternal Good News to proclaim to those who dwell on the earth — to every nation , tribe , language , and people .
He said with a loud voice , “ Fear the Lord , and give him glory , for the hour of his judgment has come . Worship him who made the heaven , the earth , the sea , and the springs of waters !”

nama: Yénamayo njafar si résagh árom yáitoi a korayau, 'Té nuyai! Té nuyai ndimbal Babilon, emon táyátote méinyotio ár mband maratan ténetat yáne wéri nu ménaye amafoene yaufi wal yame!"
english: Another , a second angel, followed, saying , “Babylon the great has fallen , which has made all the nations to drink of the wine of the wrath of her sexual immorality .”

nama: Nambiomén njafar si résagh árom ewaiteyai a kutnau ndimbal kéme, "Árké árém njam yáwefnotat ndimbal gásiai a yáne mbanmbanoe a tanangi yáne mbor sáf sotan o ngángayan. 10 Yémofem wéi so yenetat Ngánjánene nékw wéri nu, árkéméné té yasuryéng ndimbal muyaye kétán yánjoyo nékw kafusifaf! Fá so em awambghan fés a rémérémé wékwéran njúnnjúnofnar njafar si résagh ár a Sif tosane rére. 11 Yéfene ndémke féskwam so nuyote tuot. Yéfeyot ámb yau yém enaghét efogh o sémbár emofem yáwefnotat ndimbal gásiai a yáne mbanmbanoe, o yéné ároe emo tanangé yáne yétkwénafé mbor."
english: Another angel, a third , followed them , saying with a great voice , “ If anyone worships the beast and his image , and receives a mark on his forehead or on his hand ,

he also will drink of the wine of the wrath of God , which is prepared unmixed in the cup of his anger . He will be tormented with fire and sulfur in the presence of the holy angels and in the presence of the Lamb.
The smoke of their torment goes up forever and ever . They have no rest day and night , those who worship the beast and his image , and whoever receives the mark of his name .

nama: Yéné siyém ménát yém awamarogh yéfeyot Ngánjánene árét, emofem ewaitotat Ngánjánene nák a ewakai ndimbal mwighé kér ro Yesuefaf.
english: Here is the perseverance of the saints, those who keep the commandments of God and the faith of Jesus .”

nama: Féyo yénd náyárayén kém njafarta kénorayau, "Efarota: Frengéghkaf fá em yéné kér téfnár efe kér em Yurane kénjún kétánotio sénonjo. Ngánján Mbérmbér noraye, "Néméwét! Fá so nenat yéfenjo ásáfoghta, ménamén yéfenjo wafroghyamam so ewaitote fá." Mband maratoene wau yu
english: I heard a voice from heaven saying , “ Write , ‘ Blessed are the dead who die in the Lord from now on .’” “ Yes ,” says the Spirit , “ that they may rest from their labors , for their works follow with them .”

nama: Yénd néngretayén, a tane rére témorwén kwayaghé njafar kwamkwam, a témorangérwén njafar kwamkwaman ndenanit ároene ambum, golmén ákikiafé sénkoyan a tafayongérwén sénté wau yu náifé teretau ngángaye. 15 Féyo ámb njafar si résagh ár néntoryéng wáwefnogh méngota a nutnai ndimbal kéme yáfaf efe témorangérwén njafar kwamkwaman, "Tané fenjo náifé néfghét, ménamén efogh té nawer néfghét a mband maratoene wau yu té nawer." 16 Féyo fá efe témorangérwén njafar kwamkwaman yéfnendai yánjo náifé mband maratan, a mband maratoene wau yu nawerai.
english: I looked , and saw a white cloud , and on the cloud one sitting like a son of man , having on his head a golden crown , and in his hand a sharp sickle .
Another angel came out of the temple , crying with a loud voice to him who sat on the cloud , “ Send your sickle and reap , for the hour to reap has come ; for the harvest of the earth is ripe !”
He who sat on the cloud thrust his sickle on the earth , and the earth was reaped .

nama: Ámb njafar si résagh ár néntoryéng wáwefnogh méngota njafaran, a yáne wéi témorwén sénté náifé.
english: Another angel came out of the temple which is in heaven . He also had a sharp sickle .

nama: Wéi mé ámb njafar si résagh ár, efe témorwén waftafé fésfaf, yénmormén ghéngén wárogh kitarata a kutnau ndimbal kéme njafar si résagh árfaf endene témorwén sénté náifé, "Tané fenjo sénté naifé, a tanfeta mbwe kétamé ménj ndau mband maratan, ménamén yéfene mbwe té nénamndangi wau!" 19 Njafar si résagh árom yéfnendai yánjo náifé mband maratan a eumendam yéfene mbwe, a engwitam yékwét Ngánjánene nékwfaf. 20 Fá yéné tatumndawét yékwén ndimbal tesen téndo tambén, a férék kéntonau yéné rétégh tambén nawengoi wanjeyot ndené 180 kilomité tombé a ndené 1.5 mité kénjkam.
english: Another angel came out from the altar , he who has power over fire , and he called with a great voice to him who had the sharp sickle , saying , “ Send your sharp sickle and gather the clusters of the vine of the earth , for the earth ’ s grapes are fully ripe!”
The angel thrust his sickle into the earth , and gathered the vintage of the earth and threw it into the great wine press of the wrath of God .
The wine press was trodden outside of the city , and blood came out of the wine press , up to the bridles of the horses , as far as one thousand six hundred stadia.

nama: Yéndon yinjoyén njafaran ámb ndimbal a sélngwélafé ufarogh yam: 7 njafar si résagh árém taweretawét ambinomén 7 férférafé kérté yam, árkéménayam so Ngánjánene nékw tifongé. 2 A yéndon yinjoyén ndenanit glasafé arakafnit wanjméghkaf témorwén fésafé. Fá tawakayongérwén yéné glasafé arakaf téndon, yéné ár emofem té yáindayénd ndimbal gásié a yáne mbanmban a wafégham árké yésérmbéne yáne yétkwén. Yémofem taweretawét wagh kembnemén rokar Ngánjánam árké té ewaramai 3 a taufanawét Ngánjánene ásáfogh téfnár Mosesene wagh a Sif tosane wagh: "Ndimbal a mere em fene yam wafrogh, Yuré Ngánján Méinyotio wafté. Mbarkánd a efalofifi em fene end ndimbal yuoene Warsagh ár.
english: I saw another great and marvelous sign in the sky : seven angels having the seven last plagues , for in them God ’ s wrath is finished .
I saw something like a sea of glass mixed with fire , and those who overcame the beast , his image , and the number of his name , standing on the sea of glass , having harps of God .

They sang the song of Moses , the servant of God , and the song of the Lamb , saying , “ Great and marvelous are your works , Lord God , the Almighty ! Righteous and true are your ways , you King of the nations .

nama: Emofem yau so férférafé néfandat, Yuré a so yénérsat ndimbal kwayaghé fene yétkwénfaf? Ménamén mé fémro ném njúnnjúnofnar. Méinyotio ndimbal yu so eném fe wáwefnoghét ménamén fene mbarkánd yam fémon némé tawafrote té mat káyátotat.
english: Who wouldn’ t fear you , Lord , and glorify your name ? For you only are holy . For all the nations will come and worship before you . For your righteous acts have been revealed .”

nama: Yéné soramé yénd néretayén, a njafar kénjún yinjoyén wáwefnogh méngo, Ngánjánene farai méngo asawéréghkaf. 6 7 njafar si résagh árém emofem taweretawét 7 férférafé kérté yam, enmormén wáwefnogh méngota umaneghkaf mer álálagh sálámefé a gol belesafé tafarngérwén yéfenjo wéfamé. 7 Féyo ámb 4mén akegh ghérsafé rokaram ewaramai 7 njafar si résagh árét gol dis Ngánjánene nékw wafoghkaf, efe nakete tuot. 8 A wáwefnogh méngo nofayoi kwamam kétamé Ngánjánene ndimbal kwayaghata a waftata, a árké ár yau so mé kényawangai wáwefnogh méngo kétánotio 7 njafar si résagh árém kor tawifongi wasurégh 7 férférafé kérté yam.
english: After these things I looked , and the temple of the tabernacle of the testimony in heaven was opened.
The seven angels who had the seven plagues came out , clothed with pure , bright linen , and wearing golden sashes around their chests .
One of the four living creatures gave to the seven angels seven golden bowls full of the wrath of God , who lives forever and ever .
The temple was filled with smoke from the glory of God and from his power . No one was able to enter into the temple until the seven plagues of the seven angels would be finished .

nama: Féyo yéndo yiyárayén ndimbal kém korayau kétamé wáwefnogh méngota 7 njafar si résagh árfefaf: "Tangém tawasunangi 7 dis Ngánjánene nékw mband maratan!"
english: I heard a loud voice out of the temple , saying to the seven angels, “ Go and pour out the seven bowls of the wrath of God on the earth !”

nama: Fronde njafar si résagh ár yéngmormén a yasuryéng yánjo dis mbandot, a mafulafé a ndémkefé fénend atyarégh nufngoyénd yéné árfefafmé efe tamorwén ndimbal gásiane mborafé a táwefnotat yáne mbanmbanoe.
english: The first went , and poured out his bowl into the earth , and it became a harmful and painful sore on the people who had the mark of the beast , and who worshiped his image .

nama: Yénamayo njafar si résagh árom yasuryéng yánjo dis arakafot. Nawengoi arakaf kér ároene féréknit, méinyotio ghérsafé rokar arakafan kér emormén.
english: The second angel poured out his bowl into the sea , and it became blood as of a dead man . Every living thing in the sea died .

nama: Nambiomén njafar si résagh árom yasuryéng yánjo dis wanjeyamé a wérér nuamé, a méinyotio nawengoyénd férkot. 5 A yéndo yiyárayén njafar si résagh ár efe témorwén waftafé méinyotio nufaf korayau, "Fém fété ném mbarkánd yéné tékrát yammén, O Njúnnjúnofnar ár, efe ném a efe túmén témorwén!
english: The third poured out his bowl into the rivers and springs of water , and they became blood.
I heard the angel of the waters saying , “ You are righteous , who are and who were , O Holy One , because you have judged these things .

nama: Fene njúnnjúnofnar ár a fene mat yátogh ár té esmetaménd krotio a yéfene férék té tasunawét mbandan. Féyo fémo té ewaramai yéfene ngi téfnárat férék nénet. Yéné fiyém yéfene fai."
english: For they poured out the blood of saints and prophets , and you have given them blood to drink . They deserve this .”

nama: A yénd náyárayén si kétamé ghéngén wárogh kitarata kénorayau, "Néméwét, Yuré Ngánján Méinyotio wafté! Fene tékrát kéméghét siyém efalo yém a mbarkánd!"
english: I heard the altar saying , “ Yes , Lord God , the Almighty , true and righteous are your judgments .”

nama: 4mén njafar si résagh árom yasuryéng yánjo dis efoghfaf, téméindau minde waftat ménát ár sái tawakérnau yéné fese. 9 Ár tawakérnau yéné ndimbal efogh waftayam, a yémofem tafalngotawét Ngánjánene yétkwén, emo enwáfárete yéné férférafé kérté yam. Wénde fá yau kawengotawét yaufiyam wafroghta a tuyafotawét yáyot ndimbal kwayaghé.
english: The fourth poured out his bowl on the sun , and it was given to him to scorch men with fire .
People were scorched with great heat , and people blasphemed the name of God who has the power over these plagues . They didn’ t repent and give him glory .

nama: Féyo 5mén njafar si résagh árom yasuryéng yánjo dis ndimbal gásiane limánégh ámnjogh sifayan, a yáne ndimbal yu yafaryéng kwéfitayam. Árém kánké tarnawét yéfenjoyo ndémkemén, 11 a tafalngotawét Ngánján njafarmén ménamén yéfene ndémkemén a fénendmén, wénde fá kakenawét awengowét yéné yaufita némé tawafrotawét mé yémofem.
english: The fifth poured out his bowl on the throne of the beast , and his kingdom was darkened . They gnawed their tongues because of the pain ,
and they blasphemed the God of heaven because of their pains and their sores . They still didn’ t repent of their works .

nama: 6mén njafar si résagh árom yasuryéng yánjo dis kété ndimbal wanjen Eufrates, a yéné nu namndai sot, ménát yéfrendai end yéfeyot warsagh árét wer tambén. 13 Féyo yéndon ewinjoyén nambio yaufi mbérmbér kéretawét ndenanit ndokre. Fá kéntonawét ndimbal fuwayoene sénfénta, ndimbal gásiane sénféneta, a unyégh mat yátogh árfene sénféneta. 14 Yéné yaufi mbérmbér fem emofem yétyanat fénaté ufarogh yam, a fá engém yénamé méinyotio warsagh árfefaf yéné mband maratmén, ménát sái eumendat fá mékot Méinyotio wafté Ngánjánene ndimbal efghot.
english: The sixth poured out his bowl on the great river , the Euphrates . Its water was dried up , that the way might be prepared for the kings that come from the sunrise.
I saw coming out of the mouth of the dragon , and out of the mouth of the beast , and out of the mouth of the false prophet , three unclean spirits , something like frogs;
for they are spirits of demons , performing signs , which go out to the kings of the whole inhabited earth , to gather them together for the war of that great day of God the Almighty .

nama: "Káyárangi, yénd so wéném oro téfnárnit! Frengéghkaf fá yém efe mé néréte ewarawene yánjo sáláme, ménát fá yau so yéngém firo a waiwaiafé."
english: “ Behold , I come like a thief . Blessed is he who watches, and keeps his clothes , so that he doesn’ t walk naked , and they see his shame.”

nama: Féyo yémofem eumendayénd warsagh ár méinyotio yéné sifayat árké Ibru sie yémndetat Amagedon.
english: He gathered them together into the place which is called in Hebrew , “Harmagedon”.

nama: 7mén njafar si résagh árom yasuryéng yánjo dis mbormborfaf, a wáwefnogh méngota yénmormén ndimbal kém kétándmé limánégh ámnjogh sifayata, korayau, "Té nefo!" 18 Féyo toyé natremngoyénd, a aruruke kásmetawét a ndimbal sokrere kásámbnetau. Yéné sokrere yau nufrotam kétándmayo ár njam yafrotam mband maratan! 19 Ndimbal tesen Babilon nambio karéf nufrotam, a ndimbal tesen méinyotio yuwomé kironau. Ngánján táf nawafarotai méinyotio Babilonene yaufiyam, a yémon yéméindam yéné kafusian nénet árké yáne yaufififi nékw wéri nue té yafoi. 20 Méinyotio fér kolindawét a mband tunakéf yau kafandawét. 21 Njafarta ndimbal nu mbwe kénatarnawét, ndené 45 kg minde kértafé kuitawét árfefaf, a yémofem tafalngotawét Ngánján yéné férférafé kérté yammén, ménamén yéné témorwén minde mafulafé.
english: The seventh poured out his bowl into the air. A loud voice came out of the temple of heaven, from the throne , saying , “ It is done !”
There were lightnings, sounds , and thunders ; and there was a great earthquake such as has not happened since there were men on the earth — so great an earthquake and so mighty .

The great city was divided into three parts , and the cities of the nations fell . Babylon the great was remembered in the sight of God , to give to her the cup of the wine of the fierceness of his wrath .
Every island fled away , and the mountains were not found .
Great hailstones , about the weight of a talent , came down out of the sky on people . People blasphemed God because of the plague of the hail , for this plague was exceedingly severe .

nama: Ámb 7mén njafar si résagh ár emo taweretau 7 dis yénmormén tafaf a norayai, "Kénaf, yéndon so némauyafotan kérté yam árkéméné so yéném yaufi wal kér ro amafoefaf, efe yémor tárfár nuan. 2 Mband maratoene warsagh árfé wal yafrotat yéné amafofé, a efe em yéné mband maratmén té eyátoi wériafé yáne yaufi wal wéri nue.
english: One of the seven angels who had the seven bowls came and spoke with me , saying , “ Come here . I will show you the judgment of the great prostitute who sits on many waters ,
with whom the kings of the earth committed sexual immorality . Those who dwell in the earth were made drunken with the wine of her sexual immorality .”

nama: Yénamé njafar si résagh árom wéngwasroi Ngánján Mbérmbéran fanfne yuwot. Kété yéndon yinjoyén amaf témorangérwén férék ngarot ndimbal gásiyayan endene tamorwén 7 sénko a 10 tartar, faroghkaf méinyotio tamorwén Ngánjáne wanyogh siafé. 4 Amaf umaneghkaf témorwén ndéndák a férkat sálámeyafé a golmén rokar a méndefé wímmén a ndindimén. Amafom teretau yánjo ngángaye golmén kafusi yaufiyam afoghare a yáne awasérmbogh wal yam. 5 Yéné yétkwén férén takayongérwén amafoene sáf sotan: "Ndimbal Babilon, yéfetmé wal kér ro mérésmérésafene a mband maratoene méinyotio yaufi." 6 Yéndo yinjoyén amaf wériafé témorwén. Yémo enetam Ngánjánene árfene férék efe kafrotawét Yesuenemén.
english: He carried me away in the Spirit into a wilderness . I saw a woman sitting on a scarlet-colored beast , full of blasphemous names , having seven heads and ten horns .

The woman was dressed in purple and scarlet , and decked with gold and precious stones and pearls , having in her hand a golden cup full of abominations and the impurities of the sexual immorality of the earth .
And on her forehead a name was written , “ MYSTERY , BABYLON THE GREAT , THE MOTHER OF THE PROSTITUTES AND OF THE ABOMINATIONS OF THE EARTH .”
I saw the woman drunken with the blood of the saints and with the blood of the martyrs of Jesus . When I saw her , I wondered with great amazement .

nama: Féyo njafar si résagh árom kwémndangé yénd, "Fém némamén sélngwél ném? Yéndon so némawafenan feyot kwankwane yam amafoenemén a ndimbal gásianemén árkéménéyam yérse fá endene em 7 sénko a 1o tartar. 8 Yéné ndimbal gásié fémo árké yinjo, fronde ghérsé témorwén, wénde sénonjo yau, a wéikor fá so tekofnaye mé kénurtongé kwémbofnaye yékwta a so yéngém tuot tékrátfaf. Ár efe emor mband maratan endefene yétkwén yau ekai ghérsé bukan kétándmayo mband marat nufrotam, so em sélngwél njam yémofem tinjongi ndimbal gásié, ménamén ghérsé té namndai, sénonjo siyém yau, a wéi so yéném.
english: The angel said to me , “ Why do you wonder ? I will tell you the mystery of the woman and of the beast that carries her , which has the seven heads and the ten horns .

The beast that you saw was , and is not ; and is about to come up out of the abyss and to go into destruction. Those who dwell on the earth and whose names have not been written in the book of life from the foundation of the world will marvel when they see that the beast was , and is not , and shall be present .

nama: Yéné siyém káfeté mwighat. 7 sénko sem 7 mband tunakéf árkéménáyan amaf yéfai. Kété ndenéyameyo em 7 warsagh ár: 10 5 warsagh ár té nuyáyénd fronde, 6mén warsagh ár sénonjo mé násáfote limánéghan, a 7mén warsagh ár mé yéném sái kufarngé; wénde fá njam yéném, yáne limánégh sái yém tekofnaye. 11 Yéné ndimbal gásié árké mé ghérsé témorwén, wénde yau naketam tekot, fá simormén 8mén warsagh ár efe yém 7mén a wéi so yéngém yánjo tékrátfaf.
english: Here is the mind that has wisdom . The seven heads are seven mountains on which the woman sits .
They are seven kings . Five have fallen , the one is , and the other has not yet come . When he comes , he must continue a little while .
The beast that was , and is not , is himself also an eighth , and is of the seven ; and he goes to destruction.

nama: Yáne 10 tartar sem 10 warsagh ár yéné fem emofem mé yau wafté ewanangi, wénde fá so takafangé yéfenjo yu limánéghét witmé karéf efoghro sái yélimndat mérne ndimbal gásiafé. 13 Yéfene so em ámbiro mwighé, a sái taramangi yéfenjoyo wafté a muyé ndimbal gásiai. 14 Fá so násmetat Sif tosafaf, wénde Sif tosam so tawaindangé ménamén fá siyém yurafene Yuré a warsagh ár Warsagh ár. A yáne ár efe té emotai a ekafai a ndimbal mwighé kér ro yémafé so em.
english: The ten horns that you saw are ten kings who have received no kingdom as yet , but they receive authority as kings with the beast for one hour .
These have one mind , and they give their power and authority to the beast .
These will war against the Lamb, and the Lamb will overcome them , for he is Lord of lords and King of kings ; and those who are with him are called , chosen , and faithful .”

nama: Njafar si résagh árom norayai tafaf, "Yéné nu árkéméné fémo kés yinjo, ánde yaufi wal amaf yémor, eufarote ndimbal yu, ár tárfár, ár téfén, a fénaté si. 16 Ndimbal gásié a yáne 1o tartar so méndméndat téfandawét yaufi wal amaf. Yémofem so téngwakawangi némé yáne em a so téfrangongi firo; yémofem so yénetat yáne fifi a yakérnat fése. 17 Ngánjánam yékmai yéfene tikfan árkéméné so yaitotat yáne mwighé farorégh. Fá mé so kamyongi sái taramangi yéfenjo muyé ndimbal gásiai, a Ngánjánene si táf so efalo káyátongé.
english: He said to me , “ The waters which you saw , where the prostitute sits , are peoples , multitudes , nations , and languages .
The ten horns which you saw , they and the beast will hate the prostitute , will make her desolate , will strip her naked , will eat her flesh , and will burn her utterly with fire .
For God has put in their hearts to do what he has in mind , to be of one mind , and to give their kingdom to the beast , until the words of God should be accomplished .

nama: Yéné amaf fémo árké té yinjo ghékéf waingéghe yufarote ndimbal tesen árkéménéyam elimnde mband maratmén warsagh ár.
english: The woman whom you saw is the great city which reigns over the kings of the earth .”

nama: Yéné soramé yéndo yinjoyén ámb njafar si résagh ár kénewonau kétamé njafarta. Fá témorwén ndimbal muyafé, a mband marat yáne ndimbal kwayagham yétremngoi. 2 Ndimbal keye fá nutnai: "Té nuye! Té nuye Babilon yéné ndimbal tesen! Fá té nénamndé atnogh sifayé defolene a yaufi mbérmbérafene a njén yaufi ménafene, a yaufi wérárafene tarékw. 3 Ménamén méinyotio ndimbal yuam té ténetat yáne yaufi wal wéri nu. Mband maratmén warsagh árfé wal tafrotawét yéné amafofé, a rokar térarégh ár mband maratmén wémár káyátotawét yéné amafoene mani ngonjél tambén."
english: After these things , I saw another angel coming down out of the sky , having great authority . The earth was illuminated with his glory .

He cried with a mighty voice , saying , “ Fallen , fallen is Babylon the great , and she has become a habitation of demons , a prison of every unclean spirit , and a prison of every unclean and hated bird !

For all the nations have drunk of the wine of the wrath of her sexual immorality , the kings of the earth committed sexual immorality with her , and the merchants of the earth grew rich from the abundance of her luxury.”

nama: Féyo yéndo wéi ámb si kém náyárayén njafarot, kénorayau, "Kéntonangi yéné amafoe tambén, tane ár, ménát fém yau so nufeindati yáne yaufiyamot, ménát fém yau so tawanangé yéné amafoene tékrát yamam!
english: I heard another voice from heaven , saying , “ Come out of her , my people , that you have no participation in her sins, and that you don’ t receive of her plagues ,

nama: Ménamén yéné amafoene yaufiyam té kafayotat farufaru njafarot, a Ngánjánam té yawafarota yáne yaufiyam.
english: for her sins have reached to the sky , and God has remembered her iniquities.

nama: Yafrotati yéné yam ndernáye yéné amafom té tawafrote ámb ár. Taramangi yá férghe tékrát yáne méinyotio yaufiyammén. Yémo taméindau ár tárfár kérté yamot yáne kafusi nénean, féyo yawafrotati ndenéyameyo sómbinotmé tárfár kérté yándio.
english: Return to her just as she returned, and repay her double as she did , and according to her works . In the cup which she mixed , mix to her double .

nama: Taramangi yá minde kérté a ye ndené ndimbal kwayaghé a ngonjél yémo té ewaramai yáfaftio. Ménamén yémon té mé ténémndetau: Yénd wémor warsagh amaf kitarayan ndené warsagh amaf! Yénd yau wém séfarékw amaf, yénd yau mat so wém ye!
english: However much she glorified herself and grew wanton, so much give her of torment and mourning . For she says in her heart , ‘ I sit a queen, and am no widow , and will in no way see mourning .’

nama: Yénémaménnde, ámb efghon yáne férférafé kérté yam so kufarngé yáfaf- kér, ye a káukáu. Fá so yakérne fésam, ménamén waftafé yém Yuré Ngánján, emo yéné amaf so tékmangé tékrátan.
english: Therefore in one day her plagues will come : death , mourning , and famine ; and she will be utterly burned with fire , for the Lord God who has judged her is strong .

nama: Njam mband maratoene warsagh árém emofé yaufi wal tafrotat yéné amafofé a mer téfandawét yáne ngonjélan so nendat yéné ndimbal tesenmén njam yémofem tinjongi kwam kétámé yéné amaf árké fésam yakérne. 10 Ménamén fá férférafé so em yáne tékrátmén, fá so ewakai nayuta a nendat: "Nderé tékrat! Nderé tékrat! O ndimbal tesen, o Babilon, wafté kér ro tesen! Ámbiro efoghféneféneyan fém té ném tékrátan!"
english: The kings of the earth who committed sexual immorality and lived wantonly with her will weep and wail over her , when they look at the smoke of her burning ,
standing far away for the fear of her torment, saying , ‘ Woe , woe , the great city , Babylon, the strong city ! For your judgment has come in one hour .’

nama: Rokar térarégh ár mband maratmén so nendat a ye nawerametat yánemén, ménamén árké árom yau yéfene rokar so ewarse manie wéikor, 12 rokar ndené gol, silfé, méndefé wím, a ndindi, mer sáláme, ndéndák ngarot sáláme, áfrát sáláme, férék ngarot sáláme méinyotio fénataye mer wimafé wén a méinyotio fénataye rokar aiforimén, tukén mani kér ro wén, bronj, tot téfén, a mabulmén; 13 sinamon, wanjmengégh rokar a mer wimafé rokar, mir a mer wimafé wékwér, a wéri nu a olif wénmén wékwér, féskaf flawé a flawé mbwe, kau a sif, os a os résaghmén, faiofnar ásáfogh ár a árfene ghérsé.
english: The merchants of the earth weep and mourn over her , for no one buys their merchandise any more :

merchandise of gold , silver, precious stones , pearls , fine linen , purple , silk , scarlet , all expensive wood , every vessel of ivory , every vessel made of most precious wood , and of brass , and iron , and marble ;
and cinnamon , incense , perfume , frankincense , wine , olive oil , fine flour , wheat , cattle , sheep , horses , chariots , and people ’s bodies and souls .

nama: Fá so norayat, "Méinyotio mer rokar fémofem árké téngwayamnetati té nolindangi, a méinyotio féfene ngonjél a kwayaghé rokar té narambar, a yau so wéi nawafarnjat." 15 Rokar térarégh ár, emofem tatérwét maniot yéné rokar a ngonjél rokar tawafrotat yéné amafoe tambén so kokayongi nayuta, ménamén férférafé so em yáne tékrát yammén. Fá so nendat a ye nawerametat, 16 a korayawét, "Nderé tékrát! Nderé tékrát, ndimbal tesen. Fá kumanetau mer áfrat ndéndák ngarot a férkat sáláme, a kawafnau fáyo gole, méndefé wíme a ndindie! 17 A mé ámbiro efoghféneféneyan méinyotio mer rokar yéné tesenmén té narambar!"
english: The fruits which your soul lusted after have been lost to you . All things that were dainty and sumptuous have perished from you , and you will find them no more at all .
The merchants of these things , who were made rich by her , will stand far away for the fear of her torment, weeping and mourning ,
saying , ‘ Woe , woe , the great city , she who was dressed in fine linen , purple , and scarlet , and decked with gold and precious stones and pearls !
For in an hour such great riches are made desolate.’ Every ship master , and everyone who sails anywhere, and mariners, and as many as gain their living by sea , stood far away ,

nama: Fá so norayat njam yéfandat fés kwam nayu nuyota, "Ámb ánde ndené ndimbal tesen yau tém ndené yéné ndimbal tesen stém!" 19 Yémofem táf so ewitat ngwérméng yéfenjo sénkofaf, fá kawarametawét a ye kéndawét, norayayénd, "Nderé tékrát! Nderé tékrát yém yéné ndimbal tesenoe! Fá siyém ndimbal tesen ánde fá efe karendawét boutan nénamndayénd wemár kétamé yáne ngonjélta! A sénonjo mé ámbiro efoghféneféneyan méinyotio té nefo!"
english: and cried out as they looked at the smoke of her burning , saying , ‘ What is like the great city ?’

They cast dust on their heads , and cried , weeping and mourning , saying , ‘ Woe , woe , the great city , in which all who had their ships in the sea were made rich by reason of her great wealth !’ For she is made desolate in one hour .

nama: Wénde fém, o njafar, náuwétati yáne kérkéfmén! Fém wéi ndenáyo náuwétati, efalo yátogh ár a Yesuene muyafé ár a Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár! Ménamén kerkeran Ngánjánam té moghan yékém féfene téfnan.
english: “ Rejoice over her , O heaven , you saints, apostles, and prophets , for God has judged your judgment on her .”

nama: Féyo waftafé njafar si résagh árom yékafai wím ndimbal ndené mbwe tiaréghmén wím. Yémo yitam arakafot a nutnai, "Babilon, ndimbal tesen, so nawite máméghéraye ndenáye yéndon ndernáye titan yéné wím. Árké árom yau so néfande fém wéikor. 22 Yau wéikor gité wagh kém so náyáretat kété, yau wagh, waghfégh rokar, sufér! Kété yau so em rokar térarégh méngo! Yau wéikor rais waferéghmén so náyáretat! 23 Lambefé kwayaghé kété yau so nálálat féfefaf wéikor. Kété yau so em áuwégh kém awérégh témndan.
