Fene rokar térarégh ár tam ndimbalfifi mband maratan, tawéindat ndimbal yu yéné amafoene ghar yame!"
english: A mighty angel took up a stone like a great millstone and cast it into the sea , saying , “ Thus with violence will Babylon, the great city , be thrown down, and will be found no more at all .

The voice of harpists , minstrels, flute players, and trumpeters will be heard no more at all in you . No craftsman of whatever craft will be found any more at all in you . The sound of a mill will be heard no more at all in you .

The light of a lamp will shine no more at all in you . The voice of the bridegroom and of the bride will be heard no more at all in you , for your merchants were the princes of the earth ; for with your sorcery all the nations were deceived .

nama: Yéné tesenan Ngánjánene mat yátogh árfene a Ngánjánene njúnnjúnofnar ároene férék té ewinjoyénd, a méinyotio efe esmetaménd yéné mband maratan.
english: In her was found the blood of prophets and of saints, and of all who have been slain on the earth .”

nama: Yéné soramé yéndon tiyáretawén ámb rokar ndenanit ár mérén yénau narne njafaran, kutnawét, "Ngánján yuyotam! Wanjarégh a ndimbal kwayaghé a wafté yém téfene Ngánjánene!
english: After these things I heard something like a loud voice of a great multitude in heaven , saying , “Hallelujah! Salvation , power , and glory belong to our God ;

nama: Efalo a mbarkánd yém yáne mogh yam! Yémo té yafalngo yéné yaufi wal amaf emo tasérmbote mband marat yáne yaufi wal yame. Yémo té fai yawango yéné amafoe yáne árfene kér téfnan."
english: for his judgments are true and righteous . For he has judged the great prostitute who corrupted the earth with her sexual immorality , and he has avenged the blood of his servants at her hand .”

nama: Wéikor fá kutnawét, "Ngánján yuyotam! Fés kwam kuyotau yéné ndimbal tesenta tuotot!"
english: A second said , “Hallelujah! Her smoke goes up forever and ever .”

nama: 24 sénko ár a 4 akegh ghérsafé rokar nuyáyénd a táwefnotawét Ngánjáne, efe témorangérwén limánégh ámnjogh sifayan. A kutnawét "Néméwét, Ngánján yuwetam!"
english: The twenty-four elders and the four living creatures fell down and worshiped God who sits on the throne , saying , “Amen! Hallelujah!”

nama: Wéikor si yénmormén limánégh ámnjogh sifayé tambén, korayau, "Yuyotam téfene Ngánján, méinyotio fém yáne faiofnar ásáfogh ár, fém emofem férférafé yéfandati, méinyotio némbnar kétán ndimbal!"
english: A voice came from the throne , saying , “ Give praise to our God , all you his servants , you who fear him , the small and the great !”

nama: Féyo yéndon yiyárayén ke ndenanit ár tárfár yénau nutnat, ndenanit nu wérér rárákenit a ndimbal árurke yénau kutnangé, "Ngánján yuwetam! Ménamén Yuré Ngánján Méinyotio waftafé limánéghan yém!
english: I heard something like the voice of a great multitude , and like the voice of many waters , and like the voice of mighty thunders , saying , “Hallelujah! For the Lord our God , the Almighty , reigns!

nama: Yénd so náuwétam a áuwéghafé yéném a yarametam yá ndimbal kwayaghé! Ménamén áwérégh yam té nufar Sif tosafé, a yáne amaf té kafrende fáyo.
english: Let ’s rejoice and be exceedingly glad , and let ’s give the glory to him . For the wedding of the Lamb has come , and his wife has made herself ready .”

nama: Mer sáláme, kwayaghé a njúnnjúnofnar, yaramayénd yáyot awoghét." Ménamén mer sálámeyam eufarote Ngánjánene árfene meryam wafrogh.
english: It was given to her that she would array herself in bright , pure , fine linen , for the fine linen is the righteous acts of the saints.

nama: Féyo njafar si résagh ár norayai tafaf, "Efarota: Frengéghkaf fá em efe té taumyongi Sif tosane áwérégh téméndfaf." A wéikor wémndai, "Yéné sem efalofifi si em Ngánjánene."
english: He said to me , “ Write , ‘ Blessed are those who are invited to the wedding supper of the Lamb .’” He said to me , “ These are true words of God .”

nama: Yénamé yénd nuyáyén yáne kafkafot yá wáwefnoghét, wénde fá norayai tafaf, "Yau yéné yafrota! Yénd mé faiofnar ásáfogh ár yénre fémafé a ámb efalo yátogh árfé, méinyotio fá efe nawéretat efalo yátoghfaf Yesum ewafote fá. Yáwefnota Ngánjáne!" Ménamén afrogh Yesuenemén siyém Ngánjánene mat yátoghmén Mbérmbére yém." Résagh ár yéfai kwayaghé osan
english: I fell down before his feet to worship him . He said to me , “ Look ! Don’ t do it ! I am a fellow bondservant with you and with your brothers who hold the testimony of Jesus . Worship God , for the testimony of Jesus is the Spirit of Prophecy .”

nama: Yéndo yinjoyén njafar sauréghare témorwén, a kwayaghé os kété takayongérwén. Yáne résagh ár árké yémndetat Ndimbal mwighé a Efalo, mbarkándayero yémo mogh yafrote a mék. 12 Yáne ghékéf em ndenanit fés kánkékánké, a yáne sénkoyan tafayongérwén tárfár ákiki. Férén takayongérwén yáfaf, árké ár yau mat em yéné férénmén wénde mé fáro. 13 Fá siyém awoghkaf yém férék ukéghkaf sálámefé, a yáne yétkwén siyém Ngánjánene Si. 14 Njafarmén fiyaram táitotawét fá, kérsau kwayaghé osan a tawongérwén mer sáláme, kwayaghé a njúnnjúnofnar. 15 Yáne sénféneta yéném witmafé sénté náifé, árkéménaye so yirone ndimbal yu. Yémo so elimnde warsagh ároene tot téfén wétue. Yémon so etumnde wéri nu wafroghmén rokaran Méinyotio wafté Ngánjánene yaufiyaufi nékwe. 16 Yáne sálámeyan a buraburan férén takayongérwén, "Warsagh árfene Warsagh ár a yurafene Yuré."
english: I saw heaven opened, and behold , a white horse , and he who sat on it is called Faithful and True . In righteousness he judges and makes war .
His eyes are a flame of fire , and on his head are many crowns . He has names written and a name written which no one knows but he himself.
He is clothed in a garment sprinkled with blood. His name is called “ The Word of God .”
The armies which are in heaven , clothed in white , pure , fine linen , followed him on white horses .

Out of his mouth proceeds a sharp , double-edged sword that with it he should strike the nations . He will rule them with an iron rod . He treads the wine press of the fierceness of the wrath of God , the Almighty .
He has on his garment and on his thigh a name written , “ KING OF KINGS AND LORD OF LORDS .”

nama: Féyo yéndon yinjoyén njafar si résagh ár takayongérwén efghan, efe nutnai ndimbal keye méinyotio menafefaf árké nanefetat njafaran, "Taném, kénáumendangi méinyotio Ngánjánene ndimbal témndot, 18 ménát fémofem so yéngnetati warsagh árfene fenjen, fiyarafene sénko árfene, a fiyarafene, os a yéfene résagh árfene, a méinyotio árfene fenjen, faiofnar ásáfogh ár a yuwek ár, némbnar ár kétán ndimbal!"
english: I saw an angel standing in the sun . He cried with a loud voice , saying to all the birds that fly in the sky, “ Come ! Be gathered together to the great supper of God ,

that you may eat the flesh of kings , the flesh of captains , the flesh of mighty men , and the flesh of horses and of those who sit on them , and the flesh of all men , both free and slave , small and great .”

nama: Féyo yéndo ewinjoyén ndimbal gásié a mband maratmén warsagh ár a yéfene fiyaré káumendawét méinyotio mérne ménát mék sái tafrotawét yémafé os résagh árfé a yáne fiyaré. 20 Wénde ndimbal gásié yerayénd, a méinyotio yémafé yáne unyégh mat yátogh árfé emofem unyégh ufarogh yam tawafrotawét yáne sáfan. Yáne ufarogh yame yémo tawawindau yéfeyot emofem té ersaménd yéné mbor ndimbal gásiane a táwefnotawét yáne mbanmbanoe. Yéné sómbio sermén ewimend ghérséghérsé kétán akrarégh fés raméramé wékwérfaf. 21 A ámb stamorwén tásmetau krot witmafé sénté naifaye árké ténmorwén yáne sénféne tambén efe témorangérwén osan, a méinyotio men stamorwén kwésro tamorwén yéfene fenjen nénemén.
english: I saw the beast , the kings of the earth , and their armies , gathered together to make war against him who sat on the horse and against his army .

The beast was taken , and with him the false prophet who worked the signs in his sight , with which he deceived those who had received the mark of the beast and those who worshiped his image . These two were thrown alive into the lake of fire that burns with sulfur .
The rest were killed with the sword of him who sat on the horse , the sword which came out of his mouth . So all the birds were filled with their flesh .

nama: Féyo yéndo yinjoyén njafar si résagh ár kénewonau njafarta, tawerwéng kwémbofnar yékwmén ki a ndimbal sein ngángaye. 2 Yémon yerayéng ndimbal fuwai, yéné tándáwár kamban, efe yém Defol o Sáifér a yumbetam 1,000 yunjfot. 3 Njafar si résagh árém yitam kwémbofnar yékwét, a yémnai a marét yafrotam méinyotio fá, ménát yau so kor témorwén fá mband maratan ár waunyéghét wéikor kétánotio kor 1,000 yunjéf kefongi. Yéné soramé fá so kafitrarngé mé tekofnarot.
english: I saw an angel coming down out of heaven , having the key of the abyss and a great chain in his hand .
He seized the dragon , the old serpent , who is the devil and Satan , who deceives the whole inhabited earth , and bound him for a thousand years ,
and cast him into the abyss, and shut it and sealed it over him , that he should deceive the nations no more until the thousand years were finished . After this , he must be freed for a short time .

nama: Yéndon ewinjoyén limánégh ámnjogh sifayé, yéné ár kété tamorangérwén endefet té wafrogh muyé ewaramayénd mogh kéméghét. A yéndon ewinjoyén yéné árfene mbérmbér efe té esmetaménd Yesuenemén afrogh téfnan a ménamén Ngánjánene simén. Yémofem yau táwefnotawét ndimbal gásiai o yáne mbanmbanoe a wéi yau ewanayénd yáne mbor yéfene sáf sotan o yéfene ngángayan. Fá nénamndayénd ghérsat a télimndawét Kerisofé 1,000 yunjéf. 5 (Ámb kér téfnár yau nanotaménd ghérsat kétánotio kor 1,000 yunjéf yiyato.) Yéné fiyém fronde anogh kérta. 6 Áuwéghafé a njúnnjúnofnar fá yéné fem efe sái kérta nanotat fronde anoghan. Yénamayo kér siyém waftafé yau yém yéfefaf, wénde fá so em Ngánjánene ghéngén wárogh ár a wéi Kerisoene a so yélimndat yémafé 1,000 yunjéf. Sáifér yáindayénd
english: I saw thrones , and they sat on them , and judgment was given to them . I saw the souls of those who had been beheaded for the testimony of Jesus and for the word of God , and such as didn’ t worship the beast nor his image , and didn’ t receive the mark on their forehead and on their hand . They lived and reigned with Christ for a thousand years .
The rest of the dead didn’ t live until the thousand years were finished . This is the first resurrection.

Blessed and holy is he who has part in the first resurrection. Over these , the second death has no power , but they will be priests of God and of Christ , and will reign with him one thousand years .

nama: Njam 1,000 yunjéf kawaindangé, Sáifér táf so ténmutorngi kwéfkwéf méngota, 8 a so kuwanongé waunyéghét méinyotio yuwomé árkémé mband maratoene 4 kwéndkwénd eyato, Gog a Magog. Sáifram so eumende fá mékot, wafghét sái em ndenanit arakaf téndo miri mband yénau em wafofnar. 9 Fá nófarnayénd mband maratan a ewarendayénd méngoméngo Ngánjánene árfene a yáne tikfafé tesen. Wénde fés yénmormén njafarta a ewakérnam. 10 Féyo Sáifér, emo tawawindau yitaménd fés a rémérémé wékwérfaf akrarégh sifayat, ándan ndimbal gásié a unyégh mat yátogh ár ewitaménd. Fá kété so em tékrátan efogh a sémbár tuot. Kér téfnár so em moghan
english: And after the thousand years , Satan will be released from his prison
and he will come out to deceive the nations which are in the four corners of the earth , Gog and Magog , to gather them together to the war , whose number is as the sand of the sea .
They went up over the width of the earth and surrounded the camp of the saints and the beloved city . Fire came down out of heaven from God and devoured them .
The devil who deceived them was thrown into the lake of fire and sulfur , where the beast and the false prophet are also . They will be tormented day and night forever and ever .

nama: Féyo yéndon yinjoyén ndimbal kwayaghé limánégh ámnjogh sifayé a fá efe témorangérwén kété. Mband marat a njafar nawaindangeyayénd yáne sáfrére, a yéfeyot ámb sifayé yau témorwén. 12 A yéndon ewinjoyén kér ár, ndimbal kétán némbnar, tawakayongérwén limánégh ámnjogh sifayé rére. Buk sauréghare, a ámb buk wéi sauréghkaf témorwén, árké yém ghérsamén buk. Kér ár moghan tamorwén ménamén némé yam yémofem tawafrotawét, árké té kakayotawét bukan. 13 Arakafam enémiyoi méinyotio kér ár efe kété tamorwén yáne wérghan. Kér a kér árfene sifayé yétkwén Ades enémiyoi méinyotio kér ár efe kété tamorwén wéi. Féyo Ngánjánam moghan ekmai ár fénatafénataye. Ngánjánam ewinjoi némé yémofem té tawafrotawét a yémo mwighé ekmai némé mbarkánd témorwén. 14 Féyo kér a Ades ewitam kénjút marataye fését. Yéné marataye fés siyém yénamayo kér. 15 Árké ároene yétkwén yau tékayongérwén ghérsé bukan fá tawitawét kénjút marataye fését.
english: I saw a great white throne and him who sat on it , from whose face the earth and the sky fled away . There was found no place for them .

I saw the dead , the great and the small , standing before the throne , and they opened books. Another book was opened, which is the book of life . The dead were judged out of the things which were written in the books, according to their works .
The sea gave up the dead who were in it . Death and Hades gave up the dead who were in them . They were judged , each one according to his works .
Death and Hades were thrown into the lake of fire . This is the second death , the lake of fire .
If anyone was not found written in the book of life , he was cast into the lake of fire .

nama: Féyo yéndon ewinjeyayén totér njafar a totér mband marat. Fronde njafar a fronde mband marat té nawaindangeyayénd, a arakaf yau kété nafrangoi. 2 Yéndon yinjoyén Njúnnjúnofnar ndimbal tesen, totér Jerusalem, kénewonau njafarta Ngánjáne tambén, afrengéghare sariafé umaneghkaf amafnit yánjo ároe. 3 A yéndon náyárayén ndimbal ke kétamé limánégh ámnjogh sifayata kénorayau, "Sénonjo Ngánjánene méngo siyém yánjo árfé! Fá so emor yémafé, a fá so em yáne ár. Ngánján fá fáyo so yém yémafé, a so yém yéfene Ngánján. 4 Yémon so méinyotio yengam ewawányányote yéfene ghékéfta. Kété yau so yém kér, wéikor ghérghérsisé o ye o ndémke, ménamén tándáwár yam té nawaindangi."
english: I saw a new heaven and a new earth , for the first heaven and the first earth have passed away, and the sea is no more .
I saw the holy city , New Jerusalem , coming down out of heaven from God , prepared like a bride adorned for her husband.
I heard a loud voice out of heaven saying , “ Behold , God ’s dwelling is with people ; and he will dwell with them , and they will be his people , and God himself will be with them as their God .
He will wipe away every tear from their eyes . Death will be no more ; neither will there be mourning , nor crying , nor pain any more . The first things have passed away .”

nama: Fá efe témorangérwén limánégh ámnjogh sifayan norayai, "Yéndon sénonjo méinyotio rokar yiyátotan totér!" Wéi norayai tafaf, "Yéfarota yéné, ménamén yéné si sem ndimbal mwighafé em a efalo." 6 A fá norayai tafaf, "Téfe nufrote! Yénd wém fronde a soramé, rényégh a wifogh. Yáyot efe nuam yéramete yéndon so taraman nu nénet faiofnaye kétamé ghérsé wérér nu tambén. 7 Fá efe em waingégh ár yémofem so tawanangi yéné méinyotio: yénd so wém yáne Ngánján, a fá so em tane ambum. 8 Wénde férférro ár, sén ramégh ár, ndimbal mwighé táranégh ár, ár ngi téfnár, yaufi wal téfnár, a fá efe em fénatafénaté ghar yam wafrogh ár, mewang wáwefnogh ár a méinyotio unyégh ár- yéfene sifayé sái yém fés a rémérémé wékwér akrarégh sifayé, yéné féyém yénamayo kér." Totér Jerusalem
english: He who sits on the throne said , “ Behold , I am making all things new .” He said , “ Write , for these words of God are faithful and true .”
He said to me , “ I am the Alpha and the Omega , the Beginning and the End . I will give freely to him who is thirsty from the spring of the water of life .
He who overcomes , I will give him these things . I will be his God , and he will be my son .

But for the cowardly , unbelieving, sinners, abominable, murderers , sexually immoral , sorcerers , idolaters , and all liars , their part is in the lake that burns with fire and sulfur , which is the second death .”

nama: Ámb 7mén njafar si résagh ár emo taweretau 7 dis afoghare soramamén férférafé kérté yam yénmormén a norayai tafaf, "Kénaf, yéndon so kénmauyafon totér awerégh amaf, árké yém Sif tosane amaf." 10 A yémo wéngwanai yénd Ngánján Mbérmbére kétán minde tukén mband tunakéf tukét, a kwauyafotau Njúnnjúnofnar ndimbal tesen, Jerusalem, kénewonau kétamé njafarta Ngánjáne tambén. 11 Témorwén Ngánjánene ndimbal kwayaghafé, a yáne álálagh témorwén ndenanit mer sariafé wím, kwayaghé a glasro wímmén. 12 Témorwén wím áráke minde tukmé 12 sésafnefé tamorwén 12 njafar si résagh ár sésafne féyotaro. Yéné sésafneyan yétkwén takayongérwén yéfene 12 Israilmén mérén. 13 Kété tamorwén nambio sésafne wer tambén, nambio yambérmé tambén, nambio náikái tambén, a nambioyo mbormbor tambén. 14 Yéné ndimbal tesenoene wím áráke stamorwén 12 wímafé, a kété tafayongérwén 12 Sif tosane muyafé árfene yétkwén. 15 Njafar si résagh ár efe norayai tafaf teretau golmén ufogh wétu ndimbul ménát sái tufotau yéné tesen, yáne sésafne, a wím áráke. 16 Tesen témorwén tombé a marat féyotaro témorwén ndenaro. Yémo tufotau ndimbal tesen yéné ufogh wétu ndimbule a yinjoi ndené 2,200 kilomité yu tombé témorwén, ndenéyameyo marat a ndenéyameyo tuk. 17 Yémon tufotau yéné áráke téndo, a témorwén ndené 65 mité sénjté, árfene ufogh yame árké njafar si résagh árom tafrotau. 18 Yéné áráke témorwén mer kwayaghé wímmén, a ndimbal tesen témorwén mé merfifi golménro, ndenanit glas. 19 Ndimbal tesenmén áráke werégh téfénmén wím stamorwén wamaneghkaf fénataye méndefé wíme. Fronde werégh téfénmén wím témorwén jasfamén, yénémayomén safairémén, nambiomén ageitmén, 4mén emeraldmén. 20 5mén oniks, 6mén kanalian, 7mén krisolit, 8mén beril, 9mén tofaj, 1omén krisofrase, 11mén jasint, a 12mén ametist. 21 12 sésafne stamorwén 12 ndindinit férénférnafé; fénatayero sésafne stamorwén ámbiro ndindi mbwe ngarot. A ndimbal tesenoene end tékmangérwén mé golro, ndenanit glas.
english: One of the seven angels who had the seven bowls which were loaded with the seven last plagues came , and he spoke with me , saying , “ Come here . I will show you the bride , the Lamb ’ s wife .”
He carried me away in the Spirit to a great and high mountain , and showed me the holy city , Jerusalem , coming down out of heaven from God ,
having the glory of God . Her light was like a most precious stone , like a jasper stone , clear as crystal ;
having a great and high wall with twelve gates , and at the gates twelve angels, and names written on them , which are the names of the twelve tribes of the children of Israel .
On the east were three gates , and on the north three gates , and on the south three gates , and on the west three gates .
The wall of the city had twelve foundations , and on them twelve names of the twelve Apostles of the Lamb.
He who spoke with me had for a measure a golden reed to measure the city , its gates , and its walls .
The city is square . Its length is as great as its width . He measured the city with the reed : twelve thousand twelve stadia. Its length , width , and height are equal .
Its wall is one hundred forty-four cubits , by the measure of a man , that is , of an angel.
The construction of its wall was jasper . The city was pure gold , like pure glass .
The foundations of the city ’s wall were adorned with all kinds of precious stones . The first foundation was jasper , the second sapphire , the third chalcedony , the fourth emerald ,
the fifth sardonyx , the sixth sardius , the seventh chrysolite , the eighth beryl, the ninth topaz , the tenth chrysoprase , the eleventh jacinth , and the twelfth amethyst.
The twelve gates were twelve pearls . Each one of the gates was made of one pearl . The street of the city was pure gold , like transparent glass .

nama: Yéndon yau yinjoyén wáwefnogh méngo yéné ndimbal tesenan, ménamén Yuré Ngánján Méinyotio Waftafé a Sif tosé fá sere yéfene wáwefnogh méngo. 23 Yéné ndimbal tesenan yau efogh a ghérare so nanét kété, ménamén Ngánjánene ndimbal kwayagham so yéramete kwayaghé, a Sif tosé fá yéné féyém lambefé. 24 Ndimbal yumén ár so eyota yáne kwayaghan, a mband maratmén warsagh árém so enérsat yéfenjo ndimbal kwayaghé kétán. 25 Efghon yau sésafne so namnat, ménamén kété yau sémbár yém. 26 Méinyotio ndimbal yuam so enérsat yéfenjo ndimbal kwayaghé a utmanégh yéné ndimbal tesenfaf. 27 Wénde némé yaufi yau so kényawangé kétán, yau yéné ár emofem ewafrotat wáiwáiafé yam o unyéghe, wénde mé fáro endefene yétkwén ekai Sif tosane ghérsé bukan.
english: I saw no temple in it , for the Lord God the Almighty and the Lamb are its temple .
The city has no need for the sun or moon to shine , for the very glory of God illuminated it and its lamp is the Lamb.
The nations will walk in its light . The kings of the earth bring the glory and honor of the nations into it .
Its gates will in no way be shut by day ( for there will be no night there ),
and they shall bring the glory and the honor of the nations into it so that they may enter .
There will in no way enter into it anything profane, or one who causes an abomination or a lie , but only those who are written in the Lamb’s book of life .

nama: Féyo njafar si résagh árom kwauyafotau ghérsamén nuafé wanje, mé glasro, ténféronau kétamé Ngánjánene limánégh ámnjogh sifayata a Sif tosata 2 kété néndkéfan yéné ndimbal endmé yéné ndimbal tesenan, a wanje witmawitmé karéfamé tayangérwén ghérsamén wén, kafotawét 12 fénaté wén mbwe sáf, afogh wén mbwe yáfene témorwén túmén ghérareye. A yéné wénafene arau sem mer áyátoghét em méinyotio ndimbal yuwot. 3 Kété yau so yém wafalngogh. Ngánjánene limánégh ámnjogh sifayé a Sif tosane utmanégh ámnjogh sifayé so yém yéné ndimbal tesenan, a yáne faiofnar ásáfogh árém so yáwefnotat. 4 Yémofem so yéfandat yáne sáf, a yáne yétkwén so em faroghkaf yéfene sáf sotan. 5 Kété yau so yém sémbár. Yémofem yau so náronjat lambefé kwayaghé o efogh kwayaghé, ménamén Yuré Ngánján so yém yéfene kwayaghé. A yémofem so yélimndat tuot. Yesu nénangote
english: He showed me a river of water of life , clear as crystal , proceeding out of the throne of God and of the Lamb,

in the middle of its street . On this side of the river and on that was the tree of life , bearing twelve kinds of fruits , yielding its fruit every month . The leaves of the tree were for the healing of the nations .
There will be no curse any more . The throne of God and of the Lamb will be in it , and his servants will serve him .
They will see his face , and his name will be on their foreheads .
There will be no night , and they need no lamp light or sun light ; for the Lord God will illuminate them . They will reign forever and ever .

nama: Njafar si résagh árom norayai tafaf, "Yéné si sem ndimbal mwighafé a efalo. Yuré Ngánján, emo ewaramete Ngánján Mbérmbér Ngánjánene mat yátogh árfet, té ténmáfárete yánjo njafar si résagh ár ménát emo sái ewauyafota yáne faiofnar ásáfogh árfét némé yam so natyanat tekofnaye."
english: He said to me , “ These words are faithful and true . The Lord God of the spirits of the prophets sent his angel to show to his bondservants the things which must happen soon .”

nama: "Kor aem! Yénd nénangotan tekofnar! Frengéghkaf yéné ár yém emo erete afrogh si yéné Bukan."
english: “ Behold , I am coming soon ! Blessed is he who keeps the words of the prophecy of this book .”

nama: Yénd, Jon, yéné fwém efe káyáretau a tafandau yéné yam. A yéndon njam káyáretawén a tafandawén, yénd nuyáyén wáwefnoghét njafar si résagh ároene kafkafot emo tauyafotau yéné yam tafaf. 9 Wénde fá norayai tafaf, "Yau yéné yafrota! Yénd wém Ngánjánene faiofnar ásáfogh ár ndené fété fém kés ném a fene fútár Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár ndené fété méinyotio emo efalo yiyátota némé té efarotamén yéné bukan. Yáwefnota Ngánjánetro!"
english: Now I , John , am the one who heard and saw these things . When I heard and saw, I fell down to worship before the feet of the angel who had shown me these things .
He said to me , “ You must not do that ! I am a fellow bondservant with you and with your brothers, the prophets , and with those who keep the words of this book . Worship God .”

nama: A fá norayai tafaf, "Yau yamnda kwankwane yéné yam ufroghmén si yéné bukan, ménamén efogh kaka nénáyátote. 11 Fá emo ewafrote yaufi, mé a ewafrota yaufi. Fá efe yém awasérmboghan, mé a yém awasérmboghan. Fá emo ewafrote mer yam mé a ewarota mer yam, a fá efe yém njúnnjúnofnar, mé a yém njúnnjúnofnar."
english: He said to me , “Don’ t seal up the words of the prophecy of this book , for the time is at hand .
He who acts unjustly, let him act unjustly still . He who is filthy , let him be filthy still . He who is righteous , let him do righteousness still . He who is holy, let him be holy still .”

nama: "Kor aem! Yénd nénangotan tekofnar! Tane fai sem tafaf em a yéndon so ewarametan fénatayero ménamén némé yémofem té tawafrotat. 13 Yénd wém Alfa a Omega, Fronde a Soramé, Rényégh a Wifogh.
english: “ Behold , I am coming soon ! My reward is with me , to repay to each man according to his work .
I am the Alpha and the Omega , the First and the Last , the Beginning and the End .

nama: Frengéghkaf fá em emofem eumbénat yéfenjo sáláme a fá so em féyotaro sái enetat ghérsamén wén mbwe a so ngényawangi sésafnemé kétán ndimbal tesenfaf. 15 Wénde téndota fá em ághé efe notametat ghar yam, a yaufi wal yam, ár ngi téfnár, mewang wáwefnogh téfnár a méinyotio ár emofem méndefé yéfandat unyégh ghérsé ámnjogh.
english: Blessed are those who do his commandments, that they may have the right to the tree of life , and may enter in by the gates into the city .
Outside are the dogs , the sorcerers , the sexually immoral , the murderers , the idolaters , and everyone who loves and practices falsehood .

nama: "Yéndo, Yesum, té yéngwáfáretamén tane njafar si résagh ár sái kafrotau yéné yammén méinyotio Yesuene mérnamé. Yénd wém Deifidene Ákimén, a kwayaghé Akw Kénd."
english: I , Jesus , have sent my angel to testify these things to you for the assemblies . I am the root and the offspring of David , the Bright and Morning Star.”

nama: Ngánján Mbérmbér a awerégh mérés noraye, "Taném!" A tumyo fá efe náyárete noraye, "Taném!" Efe njam nuam nérameta, fá so kénaflangé, a efe njam ménde yém, faiofnaye yémo ghérsé wérér nu so tanangé.
english: The Spirit and the bride say , “ Come !” He who hears, let him say , “ Come !” He who is thirsty , let him come . He who desires , let him take the water of life freely .

nama: Yéndon ewawéngsotan méinyotio ár efe náyáretat yéné afrogh si yéné bukan: Árké árom njam efayota yánjoyo yéné Buk sian, Ngánjánam so faru efayote férférafé kérté yam yáfaf árké emndete yéné bukan. 19 A árké árom njam efnane si yéné afrogh Buk si tambén, Ngánjánam so tawitrombonga yéfene muyé kétamé ghérsé wén mbwe néneta, a Njúnnjúnofnar ndimbal tesen élawégh tambén, árkéméné emndete yéné bukan.
english: I testify to everyone who hears the words of the prophecy of this book : if anyone adds to them , God will add to him the plagues which are written in this book .
If anyone takes away from the words of the book of this prophecy , God will take away his part from the tree of life , and out of the holy city , which are written in this book .

nama: Fá efe nafrote yéné yammén noraye, "Néméwét, yénd nénangotan wékeye." Efalo. Kéném, Yuré Yesu.
english: He who testifies these things says , “ Yes , I am coming soon .” Amen! Yes , come , Lord Jesus !

nama: Yuré Yesuene ngárám so yém méinyotio Ngánjánene árfé. Efalo.
english: The grace of the Lord Jesus Christ be with all the saints. Amen.
